Matthew28:9 Jesuh in lampi-ah tua numeite na dawntuahin, “Lungnuam un!” ci-in a na hopih hi. Numeite in zong Jesuh a khe-ah lenin a bia uh hi." 
Matthew28:10 Tua ciangin Jesuh in amaute kiangah, “Lau kei un. Pai unla, Galilee gamah ka sanggamte a pai nadingin va gen un. Tua lai-ah kei hong mu ding uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Matthew28:11 Tua bangin numeite a pai laitakin han a cing galkapte pawlkhat khua sungah hong ciah uh a, siampi liante kiangah a thupiang khempeuh a ko uh hi." 
Matthew28:12 Siampi liante in upate tawh thu kikupna khat nei-in vai a hawm khit uh ciangin sum tampi tawh galkapte golhguk uh a," 
Matthew28:13 “Mite kiangah, ‘A nungzuite, zanin ka ihmut kalun hong pai-in a luang a gukhia uh hi,’ ci-in gen un." 
Matthew28:14 Gam ukpa Pilat in hih thu a zak ciangin ama lungkim zawh nading dongin ka na genpih ding uh a, note a dingin bangmah lunghihmawhna om lo ding hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Matthew28:15 Tua ahih manin galkapte in a sum sang uh a, a kisawl bangin a gamta uh hi. Tua ahih manin tuni dongin Jew mite lakah tu-a bangin hih thu a kigengen lai ahi hi." 
Matthew28:16 Nungzui sawm le khatte zong, Jesuh in a gensa bangin Galilee gam a mualtungah a pai uh hi." 
Matthew28:17 Amaute in Jesuh a muh uh ciangin bia uh a, ahi zongin pawlkhat in umzo taktak lo uh hi." 
Matthew28:18 Tua ciangin amaute mai-ah Jesuh hong pai a, “Leitungah ahi a, vantungah ahi zongin vangliatna khempeuh kei tungah hong kipia khinta hi." 
Matthew28:19 Tua ahih ciangin note pai unla, midang khempeuh, keima nungzui mi suaksakin, Pa min, Tapa min, le Kha Siangtho min tawh tui sungah na phum un." 
Matthew28:20 Tua ciangin note tungah ka hong gen thute khempeuh a zuih nadingun na hilh un. Hun bei dongin note a hong ompih tawntung ding ka hihna thu phawk ta un,” a ci hi." 
Mark1:1 Pasian’ Tapa Jesuh Khrih tawh kisai Lungdamna Thu hih bang ahi hi. 
Mark1:2 Kamsang Isaiah Lai Siangtho sungah, “Nangma mai-ah ka kamtai pa ka sawl a, amah in na pai nading lampi a bawlkhol ding hi." 
Mark1:3 Gam sungah mi khat kiko a, ‘Topa’ pai nading lampi bawl unla, a tot ding lampi tangsak un,’ ci hi,” ci-in a kigelhna tawh hong kipankhia hi." 
Mark1:4 Tua mah bangin gam sungah Johan hong vak a, mawhna kisikin tui kiphum un; tua hileh na mawhna uh Pasian in hong maisak ding hi, ci-in thu a hilh hi." 
Mark1:5 Johan’ thuhilhna a ngai dingin Jerusalem khua a kipan Judea gam sunga om mi khempeuhte a hong pai uh hi. Amaute in a mawhnate uh va pulak uh a, Jordan Gun sungah Johan in amaute a tuiphum hi." 
Mark1:5 Johan’ thuhilhna a ngai dingin Jerusalem khua a kipan Judea gam sunga om mi khempeuhte a hong pai uh hi. Amaute in a mawhnate uh va pulak uh a, Jordan Gun sungah Johan in amaute a tuiphum hi." 
Mark1:6 Johan in kalaoh mul kigan puan silhin, savun kawnggak tawh a kawng gak a, kauphe le gamlak khuaizu tawh a kivak hi." 
Mark1:7 Amah in mite tungah thu hilh a, “Ka nungah hong pai ding pa pen kei sangin nakpitakin lianzaw a, kunin a khedap khau a sutsak ding nangawnin ka kilawmzo kei hi." 
Mark1:8 Keimah in tui sungah note kong phum a, amah in Kha Siangtho sungah note hong phum ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Mark1:9 Tua laitakin Galilee gam sunga om Nazareth khua panin Jesuh hong pai a, Jordan Gun sungah Johan in amah a tuiphum hi." 
Mark1:10 Tui sung panin Jesuh a thawhkhiat khit phetin vantung kihongin, ama tungah vakhu bangin Kha Siangtho a hong kumsuk a mu hi." 
Mark1:11 Vantung panin aw khat hong ging a, “Nang pen ka it mahmah ka Tapa na hi a, nang tungah ka lungkim mahmah hi,” a ci hi." 
Mark1:12 Thakhat thu-in Kha Siangtho in gamlakah Jesuh a paisak hi. 
Mark1:13 Gamlakah ni sawmli sung om a, Satan in tua hun sungteng a ze-et hi. Tua lai-ah gamsa gilote zong om a, ahi zongin vantung mite hong pai-in amah huhin an a vak uh hi." 
Mark1:14 Thong sungah Johan a kikhiat khit ciangin Galilee gam sungah Jesuh hong pai a, Pasian kiang panin hong pai Lungdamna Thuthak gen a," 
Mark1:15 “A hunhoih hong tungta a, Pasian’ Uk ding hun hong kipanta hi. Na mawhna uh kisikkik unla, hih Lungdamna Thuthak um un,” ci-in a hilh hi." 
Mark1:16 Galilee Tuili gei tawnin Jesuh a pai laitakin, Simon le a nau Andru, ngabengte ahih manun, ngen tawh nga khuhin a om a mu hi." 
Mark1:17 Jesuh in amau tegel kiangah, “Kei hong zui un; nga mat bangin mi tampi a huaite kong suaksak ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Mark1:18 Amau tegel in zong a ngen uh nusia-in Jesuh a zuipah uh hi. 
Mark1:19 Tawmkhat a pai khit ciangin Zebedi’ tapa James le a nau Johan zong, a gunkuang tung uhah a ngen uh khui-in a om a mu leuleu hi." 
Mark1:19 Tawmkhat a pai khit ciangin Zebedi’ tapa James le a nau Johan zong, a gunkuang tung uhah a ngen uh khui-in a om a mu leuleu hi." 
Mark1:20 Jesuh in amaute a muh phetin sampah a, amau tegel in zong a pa uh Zebedi le a thacialte uh nusia-in Jesuh’ nung a zui uh hi." 
Mark1:21 Tua ciangin Kapernaum khua tung uh a, a Sabbath ni-in kikhopna inn sungah Jesuh pai-in thu hilh ding a kipan hi." 
Mark1:22 A thuhilhna a za mi khempeuh in ama thugenna zia hangin lamdang a sa uh hi. Amah in Thukham hilh siate bangin thu gen loin aana nei mite bangin thu a genzaw hi. 
Mark1:23 Tua laitakin kikhopna inn sungah dawivei mi khat hong lut a," 
Mark1:24 “Nazareth khuami Jesuh aw, kote tawh nang bang kisai ihi hiam? Kote a susia dingin hih lai-ah hong om na hi hiam? Pasian’ mi siangtho na hihlam kong thei hi,” ci-in a kiko hi." 
Mark1:25 Jesuh in, “Pau kei in; hih mipa sung panin paikhia in,” ci-in tua dawi tungah thu a pia hi." 
Mark1:26 Dawi gilo in tua mipa kongkaw sakin a linsakgawp khit ciangin nakpitakin awngin ama sung panin a paikhia hi. 
Mark1:27 Mi khempeuh in lamdangsa uh a, khatlekhat in, “A bangci thu ahi hiam? Bang thuthak hilh tuan ahi hiam? Hih mipa in dawi gilote thupiak nading aana nei a, dawi gilote in ama thu a mang uh hi,” ci-in a kikum uh hi." 
Mark1:28 Tua ahih ciangin hih Jesuh’ thu in Galilee gam sung khempeuh thakhatin a zelpak hi. 
Mark1:29 Tua ciangin kikhopna inn panin amaute paikhia-in Simon le a nau Andru’ inn-ah paisuakpah uh a, James le a nau Johan in zong a zui uh hi." 
Mark1:29 Tua ciangin kikhopna inn panin amaute paikhia-in Simon le a nau Andru’ inn-ah paisuakpah uh a, James le a nau Johan in zong a zui uh hi." 
Mark1:30 Simon’ sungnu nattunin lupna ngak a, Jesuh a tunphetin tua nu’ natna thu ama kiangah kigen hi." 
Mark1:31 Amah zong tua nu kiangah pai a, a khutin lenin a phongto hi. A natna dam a, a zinte zong a dozo pah hi." 
Mark1:32 Tua nitak lam, ni a tum khit ciangin mite in Jesuh kiangah cina khempeuh le dawivei khempeuh a hong paipih uh hi." 
Mark1:33 Tua khuami khempeuh a inntualah hong kikhawm uh hi. 
Mark1:34 Jesuh in natna namkim a vei mi tampi damsak a, dawi tampi tak zong a hawlkhia hi. Dawite in Jesuh thei uh ahih manin, Jesuh in dawite thu gensak lo hi." 
Mark1:35 A zing ciang phalvak ma-in Jesuh tho-in gamdaihna mun khatah na pai-in thu a ngen hi. 
Mark1:36 Ahi zongin Simon le a lawmte in Jesuh a zong dingin nungzuih uh a," 
Mark1:37 amah a muh uh ciangin, “Mi khempeuh in nang hong kan uh hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Mark1:38 Ahih hangin Jesuh in, “Hih kiimnai-a om khuadangte-ah pai ni. Keima hong paina pen thuhilh ding ahih manin tua khuate-ah thu ka hilh ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Mark1:39 Tua ahih ciangin Galilee gam sung khempeuhah amah zin a, a kikhopna uh innte-ah thu hilhin dawite a hawlkhia hi." 
Mark1:40 Miphak khat Jesuh kiangah hong pai-in khukdin a, “Topa aw, hong damsak nuam peuh lecin nong damsak thei ding hi,” ci-in a thum hi." 
Mark1:41 Jesuh in hehpihhuaisa ahih manin a khut zanin lawng a, “Nang kong damsak nuam hi,” a ci hi." 
Mark1:42 Thakhat thu-in a phaknatna bei-in a damsiang hi. 
Mark1:43 Tua ciangin Jesuh in khauhtakin ama tungah thu genin paikhiasak pah a," 
Mark1:44 “Hih thu kuama kiangah gen kei in. Siampipa kiangah paisuak pahin amah kivelsak in. Tua ciangin na damsiangna thu mi khempeuh in a theih nadingin Moses thupiaksa bangin biakpiakna bawl in,” a ci hi." 
Mark1:45 Ahih hangin a mipa paikhia-in a paina khempeuhah hih thupiang khempeuh gen belin a nei hi. Hih thu nakgen lua-in kitheithang gawp ahih manin, tua hun a kipanin mite’ theihin khua sungah Jesuh lut thei nawn lo hi. Tua ahih manin gamdaihna munah amah om a, mun khempeuh panin ama kiangah mite a hong pai uh hi." 
Mark2:1 Tuazawh ni tawmkhat khit ciangin Kapernaum khua-ah Jesuh hong paikik a, inn-ah a omna thu hong kitheithang hi." 
Mark2:2 Mi tampi tak hong kikhawm uh ahih manin innsung khempeuh, kongkhak pualam nangawnah mi a dim hi. Jesuh in amaute kiangah Pasian’ thu hilhin a om laitakin," 
Mark2:3 mihing li in Jesuh kiangah khutlekhezaw mi khat a paipih dingin hong pua uh hi. 
Mark2:4 Ahi zongin mihonpi kinehlua ahih manin Jesuh kiangah paipih thei lo uh hi. Tua ahih manin Jesuh’ omna san inn tungkhum hongletin, a lupna pheek tawh a mipa a khaisuk uh hi." 
Mark2:5 Jesuh in hih mite’ up mahmahna thu a muh ciangin khutlekhezaw mipa kiangah, “Ka ta aw, na mawhnate hong kimaisak hi,” a ci hi." 
Mark2:6 Tua lai-ah a om, Thukham hilh siate pawlkhat in a lungsim sung uhah," 
Mark2:7 “Bang hangin hih mipa, Pasian tawh a kikim bangin kingaihsunin hih bangin pau ngam ahi hiam? Pasian simloh kuamah in mawhna maisak thei lo hi,” ci-in a ngaihsun uh hi." 
Mark2:8 Jesuh in a lungsim sung uha amau ngaihsutna theipah ahih manin amaute kiangah, “Bang hangin tua bangin ngaihsun na hi uh hiam?" 
Mark2:9 Hih khutlekhezaw mipa kiangah, ‘Na mawhna hong kimaisak khin hi,’ cih ding le, ‘Tho-in na lupna pheek la inla pai dih in,’ cih ding koi baihzaw ahi hiam?" 
Mark2:10 Ahi zongin Mihing Tapa in leitungah mawhmaisak theih nading thu nei hi, ci-in na theih nadingun kong lak ding hi,” a ci hi. Tua ahih manin khutlekhezaw mipa kiangah," 
Mark2:11 “Tho-in na lupna pheek la inla, na inn-ah ciah in,” a ci hi." 
Mark2:12 Tua mipa zong amaute khempeuh’ muhin tho a, a lupna pheek la-in a paikhia pah hi. Amaute khempeuh in lamdangsa mahmah uh a, Pasian phatin, “Hih bang mahmah i mu ngei nai het kei hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Mark2:13 Tua ciangin Galilee Tuili gei-ah Jesuh a paikik hi. Ama kiangah mihonpi hong pai uh a, Jesuh in tua mihonte thu a hilh hi." 
Mark2:14 Tua bangin a paina-ah Alfeas tapa Levi, a siahdonna zumah tu-in a om a mu hi. Jesuh in ama kiangah, “Kei hong zui in,” a ci hi. Levi zong dingin Jesuh’ nung a zuipah hi." 
Mark2:15 Tua nung ciangin Jesuh in Levi’ inn-ah an a va ne hi. Siahdong mi tampi le thukham a khial mi tampite in Jesuh zui uh a, amaute tampi in Jesuh le a nungzuite tawh an a nekhawm uh hi." 
Mark2:16 Hih thukham khialte le siahdongte tawh Jesuh in an a nekkhopna Farisi mite sung panin Thukham hilh siate pawlkhat in a muh uh ciangin a nungzuite kiangah, “Bang hangin hih bang mite tawh an nekhawm ahi hiam?” ci-in a dong uh hi." 
Mark2:17 Jesuh in hih thu a zak ciangin amaute kiangah, “Cidamte in siavuan kisam lo uh a, cina mite bek in kisam uh hi. Mite in a zahtak mihoihte a kisik nadingun a sam dingin a hong pai ka hi kei a, mite in a pampaih mite a kisik nadingun a sam dingin a hong pai ka hi hi,” a ci hi." 
Mark2:18 Tua hun laitakin Tuiphumpa Johan’ nungzuite le Farisi mite in an a tang uh hi. Jesuh kiangah mi pawlkhat hong pai-in, “Bang hangin Tuiphumpa Johan’ nungzuite le Farisi mite’ nungzuite in an tang uh a, nangma nungzuite in tang lo se ahi uh hiam?” ci-in a dong uh hi." 
Mark2:19 Jesuh in, “Mopawi a siim mite in an ne lo dingin um na hi uh hiam? Zineipa tawh a omkhawm sung uh an ne loin om lo ding uh hi." 
Mark2:20 Ahi zongin amaute kiang panin zineipa a kipaikhiatpih hun hong tung ding a, tua hun a tun ciangin an ne loin a om ding uh hi." 
Mark2:21 “Kuamah in puantungsilh lui phop nadingin a ton nai lo puanbek a thak zang ngei lo hi. Zang zenzen leh a puanbek thak in a puan lui balkek ding a, a vang gol zawsop ding hi." 
Mark2:22 Kuamah in savun um lui sungah leenggahzu a thak thun ngei lo hi. Thun zenzen leh leenggahzu in savun um phukham ding a, a leenggahzu le a savun um, a nih tuakin a kisia suak ding hi. Tua ahih manin leenggahzu thak koih nadingin savun um thak kizang hi,” ci-in a dawng hi." 
Mark2:23 Khatvei, Sabbath ni khatin Jesuh le a nungzuite, mangbuh lo nawkin a pai uh hi. A paikawmun a nungzuite in mangbuhvui a zut uh hi." 
Mark2:24 Tua ahih ciangin Farisi mite in Jesuh kiangah, “Bang hangin Sabbath ni-in gamtat loh dingpi, na nungzuite gamta uh ahi hiam?” a ci uh hi." 
Mark2:25 Jesuh in, “David in annek ding a kisap laitakin a gamtatna thu sim ngei lo na hi uh hiam? Amah le a mite a gilkial uh hi." 
Mark2:26 Tua ahih ciangin Pasian’ biakinn sungah lutin Pasian biakna-a a kipia anlumte a ne uh hi. Abiathar in siampi lianpen a sep laitakin hih thu piang hi. I Thukham tawh kizui-in ci lehang, hih anlumte pen siampite bek in a nektheih ding hinapi-in David in ne-in, a mite nangawn a pia lai hi,” ci-in a dawng hi." 
Mark2:27 Tua ciangin Jesuh in, “Sabbath ni, mihingte’ phattuam nadingin a kibawl hi a, mihing pen Sabbath ni a phattuam nadingin a kibawl hi lo hi." 
Mark2:28 Tua ahih ciangin Mihing Tapa pen Sabbath ni nangawn a ukpa ahi hi,” ci-in a thugen a khum hi." 
Mark3:1 Tua ciangin kikhopna inn sungah Jesuh paikik a, tua lai-ah a khut a langkhat a zaw mi khat na om hi." 
Mark3:2 Jesuh gamtakhial hi, ci-in a mawhsak nuam mi pawlkhat tua lai-ah om uh a, Sabbath ni-in hih mipa a damsakkha hiam, ci-in vil gige uh hi." 
Mark3:3 Jesuh in khutzaw mipa kiangah, “Hih a mai lamah hong ding in,” a ci hi." 
Mark3:4 Tua ciangin mite kiangah, “Sabbath ni-in bang i hih ding i Thukham in hong deih ahi hiam? Huh ding maw, gimsak ding; mi khat a nuntakna hot ding maw, thah ding; koi hong deihzaw ahi hiam?” ci-in a dong hi. Ahih hangin kuamah in dawng lo hi." 
Mark3:5 Jesuh in hehmai tawh a kiim a pam en kawikawi a, ahi zongin a khialhna uh le a thuphawk theih lohna uh hangin mite khasiathuai a sa zel hi. Tua ciangin a mipa kiangah, “Na khut zan in,” a ci hi. Amah in zong a khut zan a, damin a ngeina bangkik hi." 
Mark3:6 Tua ahih ciangin kikhopna inn panin Farisi mite paikhia-in Herod pawlte kimkhat tawh kikhopna neipah uh a, Jesuh a thahtheih nading uh a vaihawm uh hi." 
Mark3:7 Tua lai panin Galilee Tuili-ah Jesuh le a nungzuite pai uh a, Galilee gam, Judea gam," 
Mark3:7 Tua lai panin Galilee Tuili-ah Jesuh le a nungzuite pai uh a, Galilee gam, Judea gam," 
Mark3:8 Jerusalem khua, Idumia gam, Jordan galkhat, Taia khuapi kiim le Sidon khuapi kiima om gamte in ama hihsa thute zakhin uh ahih manin, hih gamte panin mihon tampi tak, ama kiangah hong pai uh hi." 
Mark3:9 Mihonte tamlua mahmah ahih manin amaute in Jesuh a nehcipgawp khak loh nadingin ama om nading gunkuang khat a koih nadingun a nungzuite a sawl hi. 
Mark3:10 Amah in cina mi tampi damsakkhin ahih manin, Jesuh a lawntheih nadingun cina khempeuh in amah hong naih ciat uh hi." 
Mark3:11 Tua laitakin mite’ sunga lut dawite in Jesuh a muh uh ciangin a mai-ah pukin kiko uh a, “Nang pen Pasian’ Tapa na hi hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Mark3:12 Dawite in amah kua mi ahi cihna thu a genkhiat loh nadingun Jesuh in nakpitakin dawite a kham hi. 
Mark3:13 Tua lai panin a mualtung lamah Jesuh paito a, mi a deihteng ama kiangah a sam hi. Tua a sap mite ama kiangah hong pai uh a," 
Mark3:14 amah in mi sawm le nih teelin, sawltakte, ci-in min a phuah hi. Jesuh in, “Kei tawh a kikhawl dingin noteng ka hong teel hi. Thu a hilh dingin zong ka hong sawl ding a," 
Mark3:15 dawi hawlkhiat nading vangliatna na nei ding uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Mark3:16 Tua a teel mi sawm le nihte: Simon (Jesuh in a min thak dingin Peter a phuah pa)," 
Mark3:17 Zebedi’ tapa James le a naupa Johan (Jesuh in hih unaute pen “Vanging bang,” a cih nopna Boanerges min a phuahte)," 
Mark3:17 Zebedi’ tapa James le a naupa Johan (Jesuh in hih unaute pen “Vanging bang,” a cih nopna Boanerges min a phuahte)," 
Mark3:18 Andru, Filip, Bartholomew, Matthai, Thomas, Alfeas’ tapa James, Thaddeas, Simon (gam khual pa)," 
Mark3:18 Andru, Filip, Bartholomew, Matthai, Thomas, Alfeas’ tapa James, Thaddeas, Simon (gam khual pa)," 
Mark3:19 le Jesuh a lehhek Iskariot’ tapa Judas ahi uh hi. Tua lai panin inn-ah Jesuh ciah a," 
Mark3:20 ama kiangah mihonpi hong kikhawmkik zel ahih manin Jesuh le a nungzuite in an nangawn ne thei lo uh hi. 
Mark3:21 A innkuanpihte in hih thu a zak uh ciangin Jesuh a la dingin hong kuankhia uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh, “Jesuh mihai suakta hi,” a kicihna thu a za uh hi." 
Mark3:22 Jerusalem khua pan a hong pai Thukham hilh siate pawlkhat in, “Hih pa sungah Beelzebul lut hi. Dawimangpa in ama tungah dawi hawlkhiat theih nading vangliatna pia hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Mark3:23 Tua ahih ciangin Jesuh in ama kiangah mite samin thugentehna tawh thu hilh a, “Satan in Satan bangci hawlkhiat theih ding ahi hiam?" 
Mark3:24 Gam khat peuhpeuh phelnih kisuahin kido le-uh tua gam kip lo ding hi. 
Mark3:25 Innkuan khat peuhpeuh phelnih kisuahin kido le-uh tua innkuan kipzo lo ding hi. 
Mark3:26 Satan le Satan kikhenin kido le-uh kipzo lo ding uh a, a bei ding uh hita uh hi." 
Mark3:27 Mi thahatpa hencip masa lopi-in kuamah in mi thahatpa’ innsung pan a neihsate laksak zo lo ding hi. A hencip khit ciang bekin laksakzo pan bek ding hi. 
Mark3:28 “Tua ahih ciangin hih thu phawk un! Mihingte’ mawhna le a kampau siatnate uh kimaisak thei ding hi. 
Mark3:29 Ahi zongin Kha Siangtho langpangin thu a gente in mawhna kip sukha uh ahih manin a mawhna uh kimaisak ngei lo ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Mark3:30 (Mi pawlkhatte in, “Jesuh in dawi vei hi,” ci uh ahih manin hih bangin thu a gen ahi hi.)" 
Mark3:31 Tua laitakin a nu le a naute hong tung uh a, inn pualamah ngakin, Jesuh a sam dingin mi a sawl uh hi." 
Mark3:32 Ama kiimah a tu mihonpite in, “Na nu le na naute, inn pua-ah om uh a, nang hong sam uh hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Mark3:33 Jesuh in, “Ka nu le ka naute i cih kuate ahi hiam?” ci-in a dong hi." 
Mark3:34 Ama kimkotah a tu mite en a, “Hih lai-ah ka nu le ka sanggamte om uh hi." 
Mark3:35 Pasian’ deihna bangin a gamta mi khempeuh ka nu le ka sanggamte ahi uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Mark4:1 Jesuh in Galilee Tuili gei-ah thuhilh ding kipankik leuleu hi. Ama kiimah a kikhawm mite tamlua ahih manin gunkuang sungah pai-in a tu hi. A gunkuang pen tui tungah om a, mihonpite ahihleh tuigei leilakah om uh hi." 
Mark4:2 Amah in thugentehna tawh thu tampi hilh a, a thuhilhna-ah:" 
Mark4:3 “Ngai un! Khaici vawhpa, khaici vawh dingin a kuankhia hi." 
Mark4:4 Khaici a vawh ciangin pawlkhatte lamdung tu a, vasate hong leengin tawmin a ne uh hi." 
Mark4:5 Pawlkhatte leihoih a sah lohna mun, suang a kitawphah tung tu a, lei sah lo ahih manin thakhatin popah hi." 
Mark4:6 Tua ankungnote in zung thuk kha zo lo ahih manin nisa in a kat ciangin a keutumpah uh hi. 
Mark4:7 Pawlkhatte lingbulsum omna lak tu a, lingte hong selin depgawp ahih manin bangmah gahzo lo hi." 
Mark4:8 Adangte ahihleh leihoihna mun tu ahih manin hong po-in khang a, a zah sawmthum, a zah sawmguk, a zah zakhat dongin an hong piang hi,” a ci hi." 
Mark4:9 Tua ciangin Jesuh in, “Zak nading bil a neite in hih thu za ta un,” ci-in a thugen a khum hi." 
Mark4:10 Mihonpite a ven’, amah guak a om ciangin nungzui sawm le nihte le ama thugen a za mite in, na thugentehna a khiatna hong gen in, ci-in a ngen uh hi." 
Mark4:11 Jesuh in, “Pasian’ Ukna tawh kisai thusim, Pasian in note tungah hong gen khinzo hi. Ahi zongin a pualama om mite tungah na khempeuh, thugentehna bek tawh kigen hi." 
Mark4:12 Bang hang hiam cih leh, ‘En en napi-un a muh nai loh nading, za za napi-un a tel nai loh nading; amaute in mu-in tel le-uh Pasian’ lamah kihei ding uh a, Pasian in amaute’ mawhna maisak ding hi,’” ci-in a dawng hi." 
Mark4:13 Tua ciangin Jesuh in, “Note in hih thugentehna thei lo na hi uh hiam? Thei lo na hih uhleh, thugentehna khat peuhpeuh bangci theih ngei ding na hi uh hiam?" 
Mark4:14 Khaici vawhpa in khaici vawh bangin Pasian’ thu a vawh hi. 
Mark4:15 Khat veivei lamdung a tu khaici bang a, mite in a thu za napi-in, a zakkhit phetun Satan hong pai-in amaute sunga a kivawh thute lakkhiatsak hi." 
Mark4:16 Mi pawlkhatte, khaici pawlkhat a tukna suang kitawphah leilak tawh kibang uh hi. Thu a zak phetun lungdam takin sang uh hi." 
Mark4:17 Ahi zongin amaute sungah thuktum lo ahih manin sauveipi kip lo hi. Tua thu hangin lungkhamna ahi a, bawlsiatna ahi zongin a tun ciangin a pukpah uh hi." 
Mark4:18 Mi pawlkhatte, khaici pawlkhat a tukna mun lingbulsum a omna leilak tawh kibang uh hi. Hih bang mite in Pasian’ thu a zak hangun," 
Mark4:19 hih leitung lunghihmawhna, hauhnopna, le deihna dang a tuamtuamte in a thu khuhcip ahih manin bangmah suakkhia zo lo hi." 
Mark4:20 Ahi zongin midangte ahihleh khaici pawlkhat a tukna mun leihoih tawh kibang uh hi. Amaute in Pasian’ thu za-in sang uh a, pawlkhatte a dingin a zah sawmthum, pawlkhatte a dingin a zah sawmguk, pawlkhatte a dingin a zah za khatin man a nei hi,” a ci hi." 
Mark4:21 Tua ciangin Jesuh in, “Mi khatpeuh in mei a kivak hong la-in lawh peuh khuh a, ahih kei leh lupna nuai peuhah koih ngei ahi hiam? A kimuh theih nading meivakna kho sang tungah koih hi lo ahi hiam?" 
Mark4:22 Thusimin a kikoih peuhmah khatvei teitei thulang a suak ding, a kiseel peuhmah khatvei teitei a kipholak ding, cih deihna simloh bang dang om ahi hiam?" 
Mark4:23 Zak nading bil a neite in hih thu za ta un,” a ci hi." 
Mark4:24 Tua ciangin amaute kiangah, “Na zak uh thu limtakin ngaihsun un. Midangte tungah na piakna uh tawh kizui-in note tungah Pasian in hong pia ding a, a tamzaw-in hong piathuah ding hi." 
Mark4:25 A neisa mipa tungah Pasian in piathuah ding a, a nei lo mipa tung panin themkhat a neihsun nangawn laksak ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Mark4:26 Tua ciangin Jesuh in, “Pasian’ Ukna pen mi khat in a lolai-ah a vawh khaici tawh kibang hi." 
Mark4:27 Khaici vawhpa zanin ihmu a, zingsangin tho-in sunin a nasep ngeiteng a sem hi. Tua kikal sungin a khaici na po-in na khang a, ahi zongin tua a khantheihna zia amah in a thu thei lo hi." 
Mark4:28 Leitang in ama thu-in na khangsaktawm a, a masa-in a tehno, tua ciangin a kung, tua ciangin a tak a om dongin na khangsak hi." 
Mark4:29 An a min ciangin anlak ding hun ahih manin amah in a phiaukawi tawh an at ding a kipan hi,” a ci hi." 
Mark4:30 Tua ciangin Jesuh in, “Pasian’ Ukna bang tawh kibang ci ding a, i gentel nadingin bang thugentehna zang ding ihi hiam?" 
Mark4:31 Leitung a om khaici khempeuh lakah a neu penpen ankam tang tawh kibang hi. Mi khat in tua ankam tang lei-ah vawh a," 
Mark4:32 tawlkhat khit ciangin hong po-in hong khangto a, khaikung khempeuh lakah a golpen pawl hong suak hi. A kung golin a hiangte zaai ahih manin ama liim sung a hiang kawmah vasate in bu a tom uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Mark4:33 Jesuh in hih bang thugentehnate zangin mite tungah thu hilh a, amaute’ telzawh zah ciangciang thu a gen hi." 
Mark4:34 Thugentehna lo tawh thu hilh ngei lo hi. A nungzuite guak tawh a omkhawm ciangin a thu khempeuh a gentel zel hi. 
Mark4:35 Tua ni mah a nitak ciangin Jesuh in a nungzuite kiangah, “Tui kantanin galkhat lamah pai ni,” a ci hi." 
Mark4:36 Tua ahih ciangin a nungzuite in mihonpite nusia-in Jesuh a na tuannasa gunkuang tungah kahin a gunkuang tawh a paikhiatpih uh hi. Gunkuang dangte in zong amau a zui uh hi. 
Mark4:37 Tua laitakin nakpitakin huihpi hong nung a, tuihual hong omin gunkuang sungah tui hong dim dektak hi." 
Mark4:38 Jesuh pen gunkuang nung lamah lukham khamin ihmu-in a om hi. A nungzuite in amah phongin, “Sia aw, kote sita le ung phamawh hong sa lo na hi hiam?” a ci uh hi." 
Mark4:39 Jesuh zong tho-in, “Nung nawn kei in,” ci-in huihpi thu pia a, tuihualte kiangah, “Kilok nawn kei un,” a ci hi. Tua ciangin huihnung khawlin dai khipkhep pah hi." 
Mark4:40 Tua ciangin Jesuh in a nungzuite kiangah, “Bang hangin lau na hi uh hiam? Tu ciang dong upna nei nai lo na hi uh hiam?” a ci hi." 
Mark4:41 A nungzuite in lamdangsa mahmah uh a, “Huihpi le tuihualte nangawn, ama sawl bangin a gamta uh hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Mark5:1 Tua ciangin Jesuh le a nungzuite Galilee Tuili galkhat, Gadara mite’ gam sung a tung uh hi." 
Mark5:2 Gunkuang tung panin Jesuh a kumsuk khit phetin, han lak panin a hong pai mi khat in na dawntuah hi." 
Mark5:3 Hih mipa dawivei hi a, han lakah a teng hi. Kuamah in hih mipa, sikkhau tawh henzo nawn lo uh hi." 
Mark5:4 Tamveipi tak, a khut le a khe, sikkhau tawh kihen khin ngei a, ahi zongin a kihen simin a sikkhaute botsatin, a khe-a kibulh kolte a sukham gawp hi. Amah hatlua ahih manin kuamah in hih zo lo hi." 
Mark5:5 Sun le zanin han lak le mualtung tengah vak kawikawi a, awng gawpin, suang hiamte tawh amah a kikuiliam hi." 
Mark5:6 Hih mipa in Jesuh a gal muh ciangin hong delhin ama mai-ah khukdin a," 
Mark5:7 nakpitakin kiko-in, “A Lianpen Pasian’ Tapa Jesuh aw, kei bang hong nuammawh na hi hiam? Kei, gim hong pia kei in, ci-in Pasian’ min tawh kong thum hi,” a ci hi." 
Mark5:8 (Hih bangin a cihna pen, Jesuh in, “Dawi aw, hih mipa sung panin paikhia in,” a cihna hang ahi hi.)" 
Mark5:9 Jesuh in, “Na min bang ahi hiam?” ci-in a dong hi. Mipa in, “Kote tampi pha ka hih manun ka min pen A Honpi ahi hi,” ci-in a dawng hi." 
Mark5:10 Tua gam panin mundangah dawite a hawlkhiat loh nadingin tua mipa in a thum lailai hi. 
Mark5:11 Tua laitakin tua nai-a om mualpangah vok hon tampi gamta-in a om hi. 
Mark5:12 Dawite in, “Hua vokte kiang beekah hong paisak inla, a sungah hong tumsak in,” ci-in a thum uh hi." 
Mark5:13 Tua ahih manin Jesuh in dawite a pai nading uh thu pia a, dawite zong mipa sung panin paikhia-in vokte sungah a lut uh hi. Tua vok honpite a vekpi-in tulnih bang pha hi. Mualtung panin taisuk henhan uh a, tuili sung kidenna-in tuikia mangkhin uh hi." 
Mark5:14 Tua ciangin tua vokcingte tai-in khuasung le gam sung tengah hih thupiang a gen uh hi. Tua thupiangte a en dingin mite zong hong pai uh hi. 
Mark5:15 Jesuh kiang a tun uh ciangin dawi tampi a vei ngei mipa zong a mu uh hi. Tua mipa hoihtakin om a, a lungsim pilin, puan silhin a om a muh uh ciangin lamdangsa-in lau mahmah uh hi." 
Mark5:16 Hih thupiang a mu mi khempeuh in dawivei pa tunga thupiang le vokte thu, mi khempeuh kiangah a gen kawikawi uh hi." 
Mark5:17 Tua ahih ciangin amau gam panin a paikhiat nadingin mipite in Jesuh a sawlkhia uh hi. 
Mark5:18 Tua lai panin gunkuang tungah Jesuh a kahtoh kik ciangin dawi a vei ngei mipa in, “Kei zong hong zuisak in,” ci-in a thum hi." 
Mark5:19 Ahi zongin Jesuh in amah zuisak lo a, “Na innkuanpihte kiangah ciahkik inla, Topa in nang a hong hehpihna le nangma tunga a hong bawlnate va gen in,” ci-in a sawlzaw hi." 
Mark5:20 Tua ahih ciangin a mipa ciah a, tua kiima om Khuapi Sawmte sungah, Jesuh in ama a dingin a sepnate gen a, tua thu a za mi khempeuh in lamdang a sa uh hi." 
Mark5:21 Jesuh, gunkuang tuangin a galkah khit ciangin, tuili gei ama kiangah mi tampi tak hong kikhawm leuleu uh hi." 
Mark5:22 Tua laitakin kikhopna inn a uk, Jairas a kici mi khat hong pai a, Jesuh a muh ciangin a khe phungah bokin," 
Mark5:23 “Ka tanu si dektak ta hi. Amah a cidam kikin a nuntak theih nadingin hong pai inla, ama tungah na khut hong ngaksak in,” ci-in a thum hi." 
Mark5:24 Jesuh zong, tua mipa tawh a paikhia khawm hi. Mi tampi tak in zong zui uh ahih manin Jesuh a nehcip uh hi." 
Mark5:25 Tuate lakah, kum sawm le nih sung tawntung siluang natna a nei numei khat a om hi." 
Mark5:26 Siavuan tampi in amah bawl a, a sum neih khempeuh zangkhin napi-in noptuamzaw loin gim semsemzaw hi." 
Mark5:27 Tua numei in Jesuh’ thu za ahih manin mihonte kawmah Jesuh’ nung a zui hi. 
Mark5:28 Tua nu in, “A puan mong nangawn va lawngkha leng, dam ning,” ci-in a ngaihsun hi." 
Mark5:29 A va lawnkhit phetin a siluang khawlpah a, ama sunga a natna a damlam a kiphawk hi." 
Mark5:30 Jesuh in ama sung panin a vangliatna a paikhiatlam phawkpah ahih manin mihonpite lakah khuadakin, “Kua in ka puan hong lawng na hi uh hiam?” a ci hi." 
Mark5:31 A nungzuite in, “Mihonpite in nang hong nehcihlam na thei hi. Bang hangin kua in hong lawng na hi uh hiam, ci mawk na hi hiam?” a ci uh hi." 
Mark5:32 Ahi zongin amah a lawngte a theih nadingin Jesuh khuadak kawikawi lai hi. 
Mark5:33 Tua numei in ama tunga thupiang thei ahih manin laukawm lingkawmin hong pai-in a khephungah hong bok a, a thupiang khempeuh ahi bangbangin a hong gen hi." 
Mark5:34 Jesuh in zong tua nu kiangah, “Ka tanu aw, na upna in nang hong damsakzo hi. Cidamsuak inla, lungnuam takin va ciah in,” a ci hi." 
Mark5:35 Tua laitakin kikhopna inn ukpa’ inn panin kamtaite hong tung uh a, “Na tanu si khinta hi. Bang hangin Siapa mawk gimsak nawn ding na hi hiam?” a ci uh hi." 
Mark5:36 Ahi zongin Jesuh in amau thu kigen don loin kikhopna inn ukpa kiangah, “Lunghimawh kei in; upna nei peuh in,” a ci hi." 
Mark5:37 Tua lai panin Jesuh in Peter le James le a nau Johan longal kuamah dang kizuisak nawn lo hi. 
Mark5:37 Tua lai panin Jesuh in Peter le James le a nau Johan longal kuamah dang kizuisak nawn lo hi. 
Mark5:38 Kikhopna inn ukpa’ inn a tun uh ciangin mite’ kahna le thumna, a gamlumna uh a mu hi." 
Mark5:39 Amah sungtumin, “Bang hangin hici gamlum na hi uh hiam? Bang hangin kap na hi uh hiam? Numeino a si hi lo hi; a ihmu hibek hi,” a ci hi." 
Mark5:40 Amaute in Jesuh zahpih bawlin nuihsan uh ahih manin Jesuh in amaute khempeuh pusuaksak a, numeino’ pa le a nu, le a nungzui thumte tawh, numeino’ lupna inndei-ah a pai uh hi." 
Mark5:41 Tua ciangin numeino’ khut lenin, “Numeino aw, tho in,” a cihna, “ Talitha kumi,” a ci hi." 
Mark5:42 Numeino zong thakhatin tho-in lam a paipah hi. (Amah kum sawm le nih pha ta hi.) Tua ciangin amaute in lamdangsa mahmah uh hi. 
Mark5:43 Hih thu, kuama kiangah a gen loh nadingun Jesuh in nakpitakin amaute kham a, tua ciangin, “Numeino an pia un,” ci-in a sawl hi." 
Mark6:1 Tua lai panin ama pianna khua Nazareth-ah Jesuh pai a, a nungzuite in a zui uh hi." 
Mark6:2 A Sabbath ni ciangin kikhopna inn-ah thu a hilh hi. Ama thuhilh a za mi tampite in lamdangsa-in, “Hih pa in hih thute koi panin a ngah ahi hiam? Hih pa tungah a kipia pilna a bang pilna ahi hiam? Bangci-in nalamdang hici bawltheih ahi hiam?" 
Mark6:3 Amah khutsiampa hilel a, Mary’ tapa hi lo ahi hiam? James, Josef, Judas, le Simon-te’ u hi lo ahi hiam? A nau numeite zong hih lai mah a om hi lo ahi uh hiam?” a ci uh hi. Tua hi a, amah sangzo lo uh hi." 
Mark6:3 Amah khutsiampa hilel a, Mary’ tapa hi lo ahi hiam? James, Josef, Judas, le Simon-te’ u hi lo ahi hiam? A nau numeite zong hih lai mah a om hi lo ahi uh hiam?” a ci uh hi. Tua hi a, amah sangzo lo uh hi." 
Mark6:4 Tua ciangin Jesuh in amaute kiangah, “Kamsang khat pen, ama khua, ama behte, le ama innsung longal-ah kizahtakin pahtawina a ngah hi,” a ci hi." 
Mark6:5 Tua hi a, cina tawmkhatte tungah khut nga-in a damsak cih simloh, tua lai-ah nalamdang lian bawl thei lo hi." 
Mark6:6 Amaute in amah a uploh manin lamdang a sa mahmah hi. Tua ciangin tua kiima om khuaneute-ah thuhilhin a pai kawikawi hi. 
Mark6:7 Jesuh in sawm le nihte sam a, amaute tungah dawi hawlkhiat nading vangliatna pia-in, amaute nih nihin a sawlkhia hi." 
Mark6:8 Amaute kiangah, “Ciangkhut simloh, na khualzinna uhah bangmah keng kei un. An ahi a, ip ahi a, sum ahi zongin keng kei un." 
Mark6:9 Khedap bulh unla, ahi zongin puanak nih silhthuah kei un." 
Mark6:10 A zin dingin a hong deih inn khat peuhpeuhah tung unla, tua khua panin na paikhiat mateng uh tua inn mahah om paisuak un." 
Mark6:11 Na paina uh khua khatpeuh in note hong sang loin, na thuhilhna uh hong ngaihnop kei uhleh, tua khua nusia-in, na khe uha leivui bangte sinsan un. Tua pen amaute a dingin hilhkholhna ahi hi,” ci-in a vaikhak hi." 
Mark6:12 Tua ahih ciangin amaute kuankhia uh a, mite a mawhna panun a kisik nadingun thu a hilh uh hi." 
Mark6:13 Dawi tampi hawlkhia uh a, cina mi tampi sathau zutin a damsak uh hi." 
Mark6:14 Kumpi Herod in Jesuh thu a kigengenna thu a za hi. Mi pawlkhat in, “Tuiphumpa Johan, sihna panin hingkik hi. Tua ahih manin hih vangliatnate nei hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Mark6:15 Ahi zongin a dangte in, “Elijah hi,” ci uh a, pawlkhat leuleu in, “Tanglai-a kamsangte mah bangin kamsang khat hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Mark6:16 Herod in Jesuh’ nasepnate a zak ciangin, “A lutang ka tankhiat sak Johan hong hingkik hi,” a ci hi." 
Mark6:17 Bang hang hiam cih leh Herod in a nau Filip’ zi Herodias a tenpihna hangin Johan in Herod kiangah, “Na naupa’ zi na tenpih ding ngeina hi lo hi,” ci-in gen zelzel ahih manin Herodias a heh suak a, galkapte in Johan manin thong sungah a khiat nadingin Herod a vaihawmsak hi." 
Mark6:18  
Mark6:19 Tua ahih manin Herodias in Johan mudahin thatnuam a, ahi zongin that zo lo hi." 
Mark6:20 Bang hang hiam cih leh Johan pen a thuman mihoih khat hi, ci-in Herod in ngaihsun ahih manin amah zahtakin siatna a thuak nading panin hu hi. Ama thugente in a lungsim nuam losak hi; ahi zongin a thugen zanuam veve hi." 
Mark6:21 Ahi zongin a tawpna-ah Herodias in hunhoih ngah hi. Herod a suah ni hun a tun ciangin kumpi uliante, galkapmangte, le Galilee gam sunga om ulian khempeuh a dingin pawi a kham hi." 
Mark6:22 Tua pawi bawlna sungah Herodias’ tanu hong pai-in hong laam a, Herod le a leenglate khempeuh lungdam mahmah uh hi. Tua ahih ciangin kumpipa in, “Bang deih na hiam; na deih peuhpeuh kong pia ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Mark6:23 Amah in kamciam pia a, “Ka kumpi gam phelkhat ciang dong nangawnin, nong nget peuhpeuh kong piak nading kong kiciam hi,” a ci hi." 
Mark6:24 Tua ahih ciangin tua numeino va paikhia-in a nu kiangah, “Bang ngen ding ka hi hiam?” ci-in a va dong hi. A nu in, “Tuiphumpa Johan’ lutang ngen in,” ci-in a dawng hi." 
Mark6:25 Numeino zong kumpipa kiangah hong paikik pahin, “Kuangdai khat sungah Tuiphumpa Johan’ lutang nong piakpah ding ka deih hi,” a va ci hi." 
Mark6:26 Hih thu a zak ciangin kumpipa dah mahmah hi. Ahi zongin a kiciamnasa hang le a leenglate’ maitang a zahtakna hangin nial ngam lo hi. 
Mark6:27 Tua ahih ciangin Johan’ lutang a hong paipih nadingin galkapte khat a sawlpah hi. Amah zong pai-in thong sungah Johan’ lutang tankhia a," 
Mark6:28 kuangdai khat sungah a lutang hong paipihin numeino tungah a pia hi. 
Mark6:29 Johan’ nungzuite in hih thu a zak uh ciangin hong pai-in a luanghawm la uh a, hanah a vui uh hi." 
Mark6:30 Tua khit ciangin Jesuh kiangah sawltakte hong ciahkik uh a, a sepna khempeuh uh le a thuhilhna khempeuh uh a zasak uh hi." 
Mark6:31 Mi a ciah leh a kuan kiphamat uh ahih manin Jesuh le a nungzuite in annek nading hun nangawn nei man lo uh hi. Tua ahih manin Jesuh in, “Ei guak i om theih nading mun khatah paikhia ni; tua lai-ah na tawlnga thei ding uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Mark6:32 Tua ahih ciangin gunkuang tuangin gamdaihna mun a zuan dingin a pai uh hi. 
Mark6:33 Ahi zongin a paikhiatlam uh le amaute ahihlam uh, mi tampi in thei uh ahih manin khuapi khempeuh panin a hong pai mite, lei lam tawnin na pai uh a, Jesuh le a nungzuite a tun ma-in a na ma tun uh hi." 
Mark6:34 Jesuh, tuigei a tun ciangin mi tampi a na omkhin mu a, amaute, a cing om lo tuute tawh kibang sa ahih manin a khasiat mahmah hi. Tua hi a, amaute thu tampi tak a hilh hi." 
Mark6:35 Nitak lam ciangin a nungzuite in Jesuh kiangah, “Tu-in nitak hita a, hih lai mun lah gamlak ahi hi." 
Mark6:36 Hih kiima om khuate-ah amaute pai-in a annek ding uh a lei nadingun hih mihonte sawlkhia in,” a ci uh hi." 
Mark6:37 Ahi zongin Jesuh in, “Amaute’ nek ding bangkhat peuhpeuh pia un,” a ci hi. A nungzuite in, “Ngun peek zanih tawh anlum va lei-in amaute’ nek dingin pia ding ka hi uh hiam?” ci-in a dong uh hi." 
Mark6:38 Tua ciangin Jesuh in, “Anlum bangzah nei na hi uh hiam, va en dih un,” a ci hi. Amaute in, “Anlum nga le ngasa tawn nih om hi,” ci-in a hong genkik uh hi." 
Mark6:39 Tua ciangin Jesuh in, “Mihonte a pawl a pawlin khen unla, lopa hing tungah tusak un,” a ci hi." 
Mark6:40 Tua ahih manin mihonte zong pawlkhatah za, pawlkhatah sawmnga, cih bangin a honhonin a gualtut uh hi." 
Mark6:41 Tua ciangin Jesuh in a anlum nga le a ngasa tawn nihte la a, vantung lam ento-in Pasian tungah lungdamna a ko hi. A anlumte balnen a, mite tungah a piak dingin nungzuite a pia hi. Tua mah bangin ngasa tawn nihte zong amaute khempeuh a hawmsak hi." 
Mark6:42 Amaute khempeuh in ne-in a kham uh hi. 
Mark6:43 Tua ciangin nungzuite in a kikhamval anlum le ngasa khawm uh a, paipel sawm le nih a dim hi." 
Mark6:44 Tua an a ne mi sung panin pasal cingteng tulnga a pha hi. 
Mark6:45 Tua khit phetin Jesuh in a nungzuite gunkuangah tuangsakin, a galkhat a om Bethsaida khua-ah mapaisak a, amah in mihonte a khua ciatah a ciah dingin a sawl hi." 
Mark6:46 Amaute tawh a kikhen khit ciangin thungen dingin mualtungah a kahto hi. 
Mark6:47 Khuamial ciangin tui laizang dong gunkuang tungta a, Jesuh ahihleh leitungah amah guakin omlai hi." 
Mark6:48 Huih in a nungzuite lehmut ahih manin gunkuang hot zo loin haksa a sakna thu uh Jesuh in a thei hi. Tua hi a, zingsang lam nai thum pan nai guk kikal khawngin a nungzuite kiang lamah tuitung tawnin Jesuh a pai hi. Amaute a khengsuak ding bangin pai a," 
Mark6:49 ahi zongin a nungzuite in tuitung a mi pai a muh ciangun, “Sikha hi,” ci-in ngaihsun uh ahih manin a awngkek gawp uh hi." 
Mark6:50 Bang hang hiam cih leh amah a muh uh ciangin lau mahmah uh hi. Ahih hangin Jesuh in thakhatin amaute hopihpah a, “Lungnuamin om un. Keimah ka hi hi; lau kei un,” a ci hi." 
Mark6:51 Tua ciangin amaute omna gunkuang tungah Jesuh kahto a, huihpi zong a daipah hi. Nungzuite in lamdang a sa mahmah uh hi." 
Mark6:52 Bang hang hiam cih leh lungsim navak lo uh ahih manin anlum tawh kisai thupiang tel thei lo uh hi. 
Mark6:53 Tui a kantan khit uh ciangin Gennesaret gam tung uh a, tuigei-ah a gunkuang uh a khih uh hi." 
Mark6:54 Gunkuang panin a paikhiat khit phetun mite in Jesuh ahihlam a theipah uh hi. 
Mark6:55 Tua gam sung tengah mite tai kawikawi uh a, Jesuh om hi, ci-in a kigenna mun peuhpeuhah cinate a lupna pheek uh tawh hong pua uh hi." 
Mark6:56 Khuapi, khuaneu, le khuakehte a a paina khempeuhah, mite in mihon kikhopna munah cinate hong pua uh a, a puanmongteep beek a lawnsak nading deihin Jesuh kiangah a thum uh hi. A puanmongteep a lawngkha mi khempeuh cidam pahpah uh hi." 
Mark7:1 Tua laitakin Jerusalem panin a hong pai Farisi mite le Thukham hilh siate, Jesuh kiangah hong kikhawm uh hi." 
Mark7:2 A nungzuite pawlkhat in khanglui ngeina zui loin, khut silloin an a neklam uh a mukha uh hi." 
Mark7:3 (Farisi mite le Jew mite khempeuh in khanglui ngeina zui-in khut silloin an ne lo uh hi. 
Mark7:4 Nektheih zuakna panin a kilei nate zong amau teek mah in a sawp kei uhleh ne lo uh hi. Khanglui ngeina a zuih uh, hai khawng, beel khawng, sumngo kibawl beellekuang khawngte sawp ding cih ngeina a zuih uh tampi om hi.)" 
Mark7:5 Tua ahih manin Farisi mite le Thukham hilh siate in Jesuh kiangah, “Bang hangin na nungzuite in, khanglui laipek panin tuni dongin a kizui pulepa ngeinate zui loin, khut silloin an ne ahi uh hiam?” ci-in a dong uh hi." 
Mark7:6 Jesuh in amaute dawng a, “A tungthama a hoihin a kilangkhem note’ thu, Isaiah in a genkholhna man mahmah hi. Ama genna-ah, ‘Pasian in hih bangin gen hi: Hih mite in a kampi bek uh tawh kei hong zahtakbawl uh a, a lungsim taktak uh kei tawh kigamla hi." 
Mark7:7 Mihingte’ bawltawm thukhamte, Pasian’ thukham zahin mite tungah hilh uh ahih manin, kei hong biak hangun a kimanna om lo hi,’ ci hi." 
Mark7:8 Note in Pasian’ thukham nawlkhinin, mihingte’ thuhilhna na zui zawsop uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Mark7:9 Tua ciangin Jesuh in a thugen zomlai a, “Na khanglui ngeina uh na zuihtheih nadingun Pasian’ thukhamte a nawlkhinzia na siam mahmah uh hi." 
Mark7:10 Moses in, ‘Na nu le na pa zahtak un. A nu a pa a samsiate kithat hen,’ ci hi." 
Mark7:11 Ahi zongin note in, ‘Mi khatpeuh in a nu a pa a piaktheih ding na khat peuhpeuh a neih hangin, hih pen korban (Pasian a’ ding) hi, ci peuh leh," 
Mark7:12 a nu le a pa a huh nading panin suakta thei hi,’ ci-in thu na hilh uh hi." 
Mark7:13 Hih bang danin mite thu na hilhna uh tawh Pasian’ thu na pampaih uh hi. Hih bangzia-in na gamtatna uh adang tampi zong omlai hi,” a ci hi." 
Mark7:14 Tua ciangin Jesuh in mihonpite samin amaute kiangah, “Mi khempeuh aw, ka thugen hong ngai unla, ka thugente theitel un." 
Mark7:15 A pualam panin mite sungah tumin mi a ninsakthei bangmah om lo hi. Ahi zongin mite sung panin a pusuak khiate in mi ninsakthei hi. 
Mark7:16 (Zak nading bil a neite in hih thu za ta un,” a ci hi.)" 
Mark7:17 Mihonpite nusia-in inn sungah a lut khit ciangin a nungzuite in hih thugentehna thu a dong uh hi. 
Mark7:18 Jesuh in, “Note in zong bangmah a thei lo himawk hi lo na hi uh hiam? A pualam panin mite sungah a tum nate in mi ninsak thei lo hi." 
Mark7:19 A lungsimah tum loin a gil sung bekah tum ahih manin tua panin kithakhia lel hi. (Hih bang a gen ciangin an khempeuh nek dingin a siangtho ahi hi, ci-in Jesuh in a gen ahi hi.)" 
Mark7:20 Mihingte sung panin a pusuak khiate in mihing ninsak hi. 
Mark7:21 Bang hang hiam cih leh mihingte’ lungsim sung panin nungak-tangval mawhnopna, guktakna, mi thahna, zilepasal neisate tawh mawhnopna," 
Mark7:22 huaihamna, gitlohna, khemna, gamtat hoih lohna, enna, mi gensiatna, kisialhna, le haitatna a piangsakthei ngaihsutna hoih lote khempeuh," 
Mark7:23 mihingte sung panin pusuakin mite ninsak ahihlam thei lo na hi uh hiam?” a ci hi. 
Mark7:24 Tua lai panin Jesuh dingkhia-in Taia khuakiim gamah a pai hi. Inn khat sungah lut a, kuamah in a theih loh ding a ut hangin a busim thei kei hi." 
Mark7:25 A tanu dawi a vei nupi khat in Jesuh’ thu a zak ciangin hong pai-in ama khe phungah hong bok hi. 
Mark7:26 Tua nupi pen Grik mi hi a, Syria gam Foenisia khua-a a suak ahi hi. A tanu sung panin dawi a hawlkhiatsak nadingin a hong thum hi." 
Mark7:27 Ahih hangin Jesuh in, “Naupangte an nesak masa ni. Naupangte’ nek ding kimlai ui khawite piak masak ding kilawm lo hi,” ci-in a dawng hi." 
Mark7:28 Ahi zongin nupi in, “Hi mah hi, Topa aw; sabuai nuai-a uite in naupangte’ khamvalteng ngahbuang hi lo ahi hiam?” a cih ciangin," 
Mark7:29 Jesuh in nupi kiangah, “Hih banga na kampauna hangin na inn-ah ciah ta in; na tanu sung panin dawi a paikhiazo hi,” a ci hi." 
Mark7:30 Amah zong a inn-ah ciahpah a, a tanu nuamtakin lum hithiatin a om mu ahih manin dawi a paikhiat khitna thu a thei hi." 
Mark7:31 Tua ciangin Taia khuakiim gam panin Jesuh paikhia a, Sidon khuapi nawkin pai a, Khuapi Sawmte gam lam tawnin Galilee Tuili-ah a tung hi." 
Mark7:32 Mi pawlkhat in a bilngongin a pau thei lo mi khat, Jesuh kiangah hong paipih uh a, ama tungah a khut a ngaksak nadingin a thum uh hi." 
Mark7:33 Jesuh in zong mihonte omna panin tua mipa paikhiatpih a, a mipa’ bil tegel sungah a khutmete guang a, tua ciangin a khutmete cil nuhin a leii lawnsakin" 
Mark7:34 vantung lam ento a, khuisa-in, “Kihong in,” a cihnopna ahi “ Effatha” a ci hi." 
Mark7:35 Thakhatin a mipa’ bil kihongin, a leii zong hong kol a, nuamtakin a pauthei hi." 
Mark7:36 Kuama kiangah hih thute a gen loh nadingun Jesuh in kham a, ahi zongin nakkham le nakgen semsem zawsop uh hi." 
Mark7:37 Amaute in genzawh loh dongin lamdangsa mahmah uh a, “Hih mipa in septheih loh bangmah nei lo hi. Bilngongte nangawn khua zasak thei a, a pau thei lote nangawn pau theisak hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Mark8:1 Tua khit a sawt loin Jesuh kiangah mihon tampi tak hong kikhawm leuleu uh a, amaute in annek ding nei nawn lo uh ahih manin Jesuh in a nungzuite samin amaute kiangah," 
Mark8:2 “Hih mite, kei kiangah ni thum bang hong omkhin uh a, tu-in nek ding nei nawn lo uh ahih manin hehpihhuai ka sa hi." 
Mark8:3 Amaute pawlkhat gamlapi panin a hong pai uh ahih manin gilkialin ciahsak leng, lamkalah cimawh kha ding uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Mark8:4 A nungzuite in, “Hih mite piak ding, hih gamlakah an bangci ngah ding ihi hiam?” a cih uh ciangin" 
Mark8:5 Jesuh in, “Anlum bangzah nei na hi uh hiam?” ci-in a dot leh, “Sagih nei ung,” ci-in a dawng uh hi." 
Mark8:6 Tua ciangin Jesuh in leilakah mihonte tusak a, a anlum sagih la-in Pasian tungah lungdamna a kohkhit ciangin balnenin, mihonpite a lui dingin a nungzuite tungah a pia hi. A nungzuite in zong mihonte a lui uh hi." 
Mark8:7 Ngasa neu tawmkhat zong nei uh ahih manin Pasian tungah lungdamna a kohkhit ciangin hihte zong mipite mai-ah a lui nadingun a nungzuite a sawl hi. 
Mark8:8 Amaute in ne-in a khamkhit uh ciangin a khamvalte uh khawm uh a, paipel lian sagih a dim hi." 
Mark8:9 Hih lai-ah mi tulli bang om hi. 
Mark8:10 Tua ciangin mihonpite ciahkhiasak a, a nungzuite tawh gunkuang tungah tuangpahin Dalmanutha gamah a pai uh hi." 
Mark8:11 Farisi mite hong pai-in Jesuh tawh thu kinial uh a, amah a mawhsak theih nading uh a deihna-in Pasian tawh kipawl ahihna a lah nadingin lim khat a lah ding a ngen uh hi." 
Mark8:12 Tua ciangin Jesuh nakpitakin a sung tawngah khuisa-in, “Bang hangin hih mite in lim hong ngen ahi uh hiam? Hih mite tungah lim kilak peuhmah lo ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Mark8:13 Tua ciangin amaute nusia-in gunkuang sungah tuangin a galkhat lamah a pai hi. 
Mark8:14 A nungzuite in anlum a puakthuah ding uh mangngilh uh ahih manin gunkuang sungah anlum khat bek a nei uh hi. 
Mark8:15 Jesuh in, “Farisi-te’ silngo le Herod pawlte’ silngo kidawm un,” ci-in a hilhkhol hi." 
Mark8:16 Anlum i neih loh manin hih thu hong gen hi ding hi, ci-in a nungzuite a kikum uh hi." 
Mark8:17 Jesuh in amaute thugen thei ahih manin amaute kiangah, “Anlum na neih loh manun bang hangin thu kikum na hi uh hiam? Theithei nai lo, telthei nai lo na hi uh hiam? Na lungsim uh tua zahin navak lo ahi hiam?" 
Mark8:18 Mit nei napi-in mu lo na hi uh hiam? Bil nei napi-in za lo na hi uh hiam? 
Mark8:19 Mihing tul ngate’ nek dingin anlum nga ka balnen thu mangngilh ta na hi uh hiam? Tua hun lai-in a kikhamval na khop uh paipel bangzah dim ahi hiam?” a cih ciangin, “Sawm le nih,” a ci uh hi." 
Mark8:20 “Mihing tul lite a dingin lum sagih ka balnen lai-in a khamval uh paipel lian bangzah dim khawm na hi uh hiam?” a cih leuleu ciangin, “Sagih,” a ci uh hi." 
Mark8:21 Tua ciangin Jesuh in, “Theitel nai lo na hi uh hiam?” a ci hi." 
Mark8:22 Tua ciangin Bethsaida khua tung uh hi. Mi pawlkhat in Jesuh kiangah mittaw khat hong paipih uh a, amah a lawn nadingun a thum uh hi." 
Mark8:23 Jesuh in tua mittaw pa’ khut lenin khuanawlah a paipih hi. A mipa’ mitah a cil a phih khit ciangin a khut tawh lawng a, “Na khat peuhpeuh na mu thei hiam?” ci-in a dong hi." 
Mark8:24 A mipa zong khuadak a, “Mite ka mu thei hi; ahi zongin singkung a lam pai tawh kibang uh hi,” ci-in a dawng hi." 
Mark8:25 Tua ciangin a khut tawh a mit lawnsak leuleu hi. Hih hun ciangin a mipa nakpitakin hak ahih manin khua mu theikik a, na khempeuh a kitel takin a mu thei hi." 
Mark8:26 Tua ciangin Jesuh in, “Na khua-ah ciahsuakpah inla, hih khua sungah lutkik kei in,” ci-in a vaikhak hi." 
Mark8:27 Tua ciangin Jesuh le a nungzuite, Sisaria Filippi gam sung khuaneute-ah a zin dingin a ding khia uh hi. Lam a pai laitakun a nungzuite kiangah, “Mite in kei kua hi, hong ci uh hiam?” ci-in a dong hi." 
Mark8:28 Amaute in, “Pawlkhat in, Tuiphumpa Johan hi, hong ci uh hi. Pawlkhat in, Elijah hi, hong ci uh a, pawlkhat in, kamsang khat peuhpeuh hi ding hi, hong ci uh hi,” ci-in a dawng uh hi." 
Mark8:29 “Tua ahihleh note in kei kua hi, nong ci uh hiam?” ci-in amaute a dot ciangin Peter in, “Nang pen Khrih na hi hi,” ci-in a dawng hi." 
Mark8:30 Tua ciangin Jesuh in, “Kua mi ka hi cih thu kuama kiangah gen kei un,” ci-in a nungzuite thu a pia hi." 
Mark8:31 Tua ciangin Jesuh in, “Mihing Tapa in tampi tak thuak ding hi; upate, siampi liante, le Thukham hilh siate in amah nial ding uh hi. Amah kithat ding a, ni thum khit ciangin hingkik ding hi,” ci-in a nungzuite hilh ding a kipan hi." 
Mark8:32 Hih thu a kitel takin amaute kiangah a gen hi. Peter in Jesuh paikhiatpihin, “Hih bangin thu gen kei in,” ci-in a taii hi." 
Mark8:33 Ahi zongin Jesuh kihei-in a nungzuite a etkawmin Peter lehtai a, “Satan aw, ka nungah om in. Nang in Pasian’ ngaihsut bangin thu ngaihsun loin, mihing’ ngaihsut bangin na ngaihsun hi,” a ci hi." 
Mark8:34 Tua ciangin Jesuh in mihonpite le a nungzuite ama kiangah sam a, “Mi khatpeuh ka nungzui a suahnop leh ama deihna bangin gamta nawn loin a singlamteh kisuanin hong zui ding hi." 
Mark8:35 Hih a leitung nuntakna a hu nuamte in a nuntakna bulpi nangawn tawh suplawh ding a, keima hang le lungdamna thu hangin a nuntakna a suplawhte in a nuntakna bulpi huzo ding hi." 
Mark8:36 Mi khatpeuh in hih leitung khempeuh a ngah hangin a nuntakna bulpi suplawh leh bang phattuamna om ahi hiam? 
Mark8:37 Ama nuntakna bang tawh leikik thei nawn ding ahi hiam? 
Mark8:38 Pasian thei loin a gilo hih mite lakah keima hang le ka thuhilhte hangin maizumin kei hong pulak ngam lo mi peuhmah, a Pa’ minthanna vang le a siangtho vantung mite tawh a minthangin hong paikik ciangin Mihing Tapa zong ama hangin maizumin pulak ngam lo ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Mark9:1 Tua ciangin Jesuh in a thugen zomlai a, “Hih lai-a a om mi pawlkhatte a sih ma-in vanglianpi tawh Pasian’ Ukna hong tung taktak ding ahihna thu phawk un,” a ci hi." 
Mark9:2 Tua zawh ni guk khit ciangin Jesuh in Peter, James, le Johan-te samin amauteng guak mualtung khatah a paipihto hi. Amaute’ muhtangpi mahin Jesuh a mel hong kikheel a," 
Mark9:2 Tua zawh ni guk khit ciangin Jesuh in Peter, James, le Johan-te samin amauteng guak mualtung khatah a paipihto hi. Amaute’ muhtangpi mahin Jesuh a mel hong kikheel a," 
Mark9:3 leitung a puansawpte kuamah in a paaksak zawh loh dong ding zahin a puante pakin a tee hi. 
Mark9:4 Tua lai-ah Elijah le Moses hong omin, Jesuh tawh a kiho a mu uh hi." 
Mark9:5 Peter zong hong pau-in Jesuh kiangah, “Sia aw, hih lai-a i om, nuam mahmah hi. Nang a’ ding buk khat, Moses a’ ding buk khat, Elijah a’ ding buk khat kong lamsak ding uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Mark9:6 Amah le a lawmte naklau mahmah uh ahih manin a cih ding mel a theih loh man ahi hi. 
Mark9:7 Meii hong kai-in a liim in amaute hong liah a, tua meii sung panin aw khat hong gingin, “Hih pa, ka it ka Tapa ahi hi; ama thu na ngai un,” a hong ci hi." 
Mark9:8 A kiim a pam a khuadak uhleh Jesuh simloh kuamah dang na om nawn lo hi. 
Mark9:9 Mualtung panin a paisuk kawmun Jesuh in amaute kiangah, “Sihna panin Mihing Tapa a thawhkik matengin hih na muhte uh kuama kiangah gen kei un,” ci-in a kham hi." 
Mark9:10 Ama cih mah bangin im uh a, ahi zongin, “Sihna panin thokik,” a cih bang a cihnopna hi ding ahi hiam, ci-in a lungsim sung uhah a ngaihsun uh hi." 
Mark9:11 Tua ciangin Jesuh kiangah, “Bang hangin Thukham hilh siate in, Elijah hong pai masa ding, ci uh ahi hiam?” ci-in a dong uh hi." 
Mark9:12 Jesuh in, “Na khempeuh a bawlkhol dingin Elijah hong pai masa takpi hi. Mihing Tapa in gimna tampi thuakin simmawhna ngah ding hi, ci-in Lai Siangtho in gen hi lo ahi hiam?" 
Mark9:13 Ahi zongin ke’n kong cihin-ah, Elijah hong paikhin takpi a, Lai Siangtho in ama thu a gensa mah bangin mi pawlkhatte in a ututun amah a bawl uh hi,” ci-in a dawng hi." 
Mark9:14 Nungzui dangte’ omna-ah a tunkik uh ciangin tua lai-ah mi tampi tak na om uh hi. Thukham hilh sia pawlkhatte le nungzuite thu na kisel uh hi. 
Mark9:15 Mihonte in Jesuh a muh phetun lamdangsa-in ama kiangah va tai-in a hopih uh hi. 
Mark9:16 Jesuh in a nungzui dangte kiangah, “Amaute tawh bang thu kisel na hi uh hiam?” ci-in a dong hi." 
Mark9:17 Mihon lak panin mi khat in hong dawng a, “Sia aw, ka tapa in dawi vei-in pau thei lo ahih manin nangma kiangah kong paipih hi." 
Mark9:18 Dawi in amah a mat simin leilak denna a, a cilphuan bua-in a ha gawi-in kongkawcip hi. Na nungzuite in dawi hong hawlkhiatsak nading ka ngen a, ahi zongin hawlkhia thei lo uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Mark9:19 Jesuh in amaute kiangah, “Upna nei lo mite aw, note bang tanvei hong ompih ding a, bang tanvei hong kikholhpih ding ka hi hiam? A naupang hong paipih un,” a ci hi." 
Mark9:20 Amaute in zong Jesuh kiangah a naupang hong paipih uh hi. Dawi in Jesuh a muh phetin naupang kongkawsak ahih manin leilakah pukin kikhuk a, a cilphuan a bua hi." 
Mark9:21 Jesuh in, “A nat zawh bang tanvei sawtta ahi hiam?” ci-in a pa kiangah a dong hi. “A neutung a kipan ahi hi." 
Mark9:22 A sih nadingin meikhuk sung le tui sungah tamveipi puksakzo hi. Na hihtheih leh kote hong hehpih inla hong huh in,” ci-in a dawng hi." 
Mark9:23 Jesuh in, “Bang hangin na hihtheih leh, ci na hi hiam? A umte a dingin na khempeuh hithei hi lo ahi hiam?” a ci hi." 
Mark9:24 Thakhatin naupang’ pa kiko a, “Ka um hi; ka upna a kicin nadingin hong huh in,” a ci hi." 
Mark9:25 Mihonte amau kiangah a hong kikhawm dingin a hong taina uh Jesuh in a muh ciangin, “A pau thei lo, a bilngong dawi aw, hih naupang sung pan paikhia inla, tumkik ngei nawn kei in,” ci-in a taii hi." 
Mark9:26 A dawi nakpitakin kiko-in naupang a kongkawtsak khit ciangin a taikhia hi. Naupang pen misi tawh kibangin omcip ahih manin mi khempeuh in, “Si ta hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Mark9:27 Ahi zongin Jesuh in naupang a khutin lenin a phottoh leh a ding hi. 
Mark9:28 Innsungah Jesuh a tumkhit ciangin a nungzuite in, “Bang hangin kote in dawi hawlkhia thei lo ka hi uh hiam?” ci-in a dongsim uh hi." 
Mark9:29 “Thungetna simloh a dang in hih bangte hawlkhia thei lo hi,” ci-in Jesuh in a dawng hi." 
Mark9:30 Tua lai panin dingkhia-in Galilee gam sung nawkin pai uh a, ahi zongin mite’ theih ding Jesuh a ut kei hi." 
Mark9:31 Bang hang hiam cih leh a nungzuite kiangah thu hilh a, “Mihing Tapa, mihingte’ khut sungah kipia-in amaute in that ding uh a, ahi zongin ni thum khit ciangin hingkik ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Mark9:32 A nungzuite in hih ama thuhilhna thei lo uh a, ahi zongin amah dong ngam lo uh hi." 
Mark9:33 Tua ciangin Kapernaum khua tung uh a, inn sungah a lutkhit uh ciangin a nungzuite kiangah, “Lampi-ah bang thu kisel na hi uh hiam?” ci-in a dong hi." 
Mark9:34 Kua lianpen ihi hiam, ci-in lampi-ah amau khatlekhat kisel uh ahih manin kuamah in dawng ngam lo uh hi." 
Mark9:35 Tua ciangin Jesuh tu a, a kiangah nungzui sawm le nihte samin, “Mi khat peuhpeuh a lianpen a suahnop leh a neupen suak photin mi khempeuh’ nasem hi masa ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Mark9:36 Tua ciangin Jesuh in naupang khat la a, amaute laizangah paipihin a ang-ah tawi a," 
Mark9:37 “Keima hangin hih bang naupangno khat a limbawl mi in kei hong limbawl hi a, kei hong limbawl mi in kei hong limbawl hi loin kei hong sawl pa a limbawl ahi hi,” a ci hi." 
Mark9:38 Johan in, “Sia aw, nangma min zangin dawi a hawlkhia mi khat ka mu uh hi. Amah, ei’ pawl hi lo ahih manin ka kham uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Mark9:39 “Amah kham kei un. Keima min zangin nalamdang a bawl mipa in keimah gensiat tawh thuahpah cih om thei lo ding hi. 
Mark9:40 Eite hong langpang lo peuhmah i pawl ahi hi. 
Mark9:41 Khrih pawl na hihna hangun tui hai khat hong suah mi peuhmah in thaman ngah hamtang ding ahihna phawk un,” ci-in Jesuh in a gen hi." 
Mark9:42 Jesuh in, “Mi khatpeuh in kei hong um hih naupangno khat a khialsak ding ahihleh a ngawngah an gawina suang lianpi khat kikhihin tuipi sungah kikhia leh ama a dingin hoihzaw thampek hi." 
Mark9:43 Tua ahih manin na khut in hong khialhsak leh sattan in. Mei a mih ngei lohna hell khuk sungah khut kim tawh na lut sangin khut langkhat bui-in nuntakna sungah lut lecin nang a dingin hoihzaw hi. 
Mark9:44 (Tua lai-ah thante si ngei lo a, a mei zong mit ngei lo hi.)" 
Mark9:45 Na khe in hong khialhsak leh sattan in. Khe kim nei-in hell sungah hong kikhiat sangin khe langkhat bui-in nuntakna sungah lut lecin nang a dingin hoihzaw hi. 
Mark9:46 (Tua lai-ah thante si ngei lo a, a mei zong mit ngei lo hi.)" 
Mark9:47 Na mit in hong khialhsak leh khelkhia in. Mit kim tawh hell khuk sungah hong kikhiat sangin mit langkhat taw-in Pasian’ Ukna sungah om lecin nang a dingin hoihzaw hi. 
Mark9:48 Tua hell khuk sungah thante si ngei lo a, a mei zong mit ngei lo hi." 
Mark9:49 Bang hang hiam cih leh biakpiakna sa pen ci a kisawh ciangin Pasian’ santheih a suah bangin ze-etna haksa thuakzawhna in Pasian’ santheih hong suaksak ding hi. 
Mark9:50 Ci hoih hi; ahi zongin a alna mang leh bangci alsakkik thei ding na hi uh hiam? Note in ci al bangin hoihna nei unla, khatlekhat kilem un,” a ci hi." 
Mark10:1 Tua lai panin Jesuh dingkhia-in Judea gam le Jordan Gun gal gam tengah a pai hi. Ama kiangah mihon tampi hong kikhawmkik uh a, a hilh ngeisa bangin amaute tungah thu a hilh hi." 
Mark10:1 Tua lai panin Jesuh dingkhia-in Judea gam le Jordan Gun gal gam tengah a pai hi. Ama kiangah mihon tampi hong kikhawmkik uh a, a hilh ngeisa bangin amaute tungah thu a hilh hi." 
Mark10:2 Farisi mi pawlkhat hong pai uh a, amah a mawhsak theih nading uh a deihna-in, “Mi khat in a zi a mathei ding mah ahi hiam?” ci-in a dong uh hi." 
Mark10:3 Jesuh in, “Moses in bang thu hong pia ahi hiam?” ci-in a dot ciangin amaute in," 
Mark10:4 “Moses in kimakna lai gelhsakin masak thei hi,” ci-in a dawng uh hi." 
Mark10:5 Jesuh in amaute kiangah, “Note, hilhzawhin om lo na hih manun Moses in hih ngeina a bawl ahi hi." 
Mark10:6 Ahi zongin piancil lai-in, ‘Pasian in numei le pasal a bawl hi." 
Mark10:7 Tua ahih manin pasal in a nu le a pa nusia-in a zi tawh kigawm ding a," 
Mark10:8 amau nihte pen pumkhat bang ahi ding uh hi,’ na kici hi. Tua ahih manin amaute nih hi nawn loin khat hita uh hi." 
Mark10:9 Tua ahih manin Pasian’ gawmsa mite, kuamah in khen kei ta hen,” a ci hi." 
Mark10:10 Innsungah a tumkhit uh ciangin nungzuite in hih thu tawh kisai Jesuh kiangah a dongkik uh hi. 
Mark10:11 Amah in, “A zi ma-a numei dang tawh a teng mi peuhmah a zi a palhngulh ahi hi." 
Mark10:12 A pasal ma-a pasal dang tawh a teng mi peuhmah in zong a pasal a palhngulh ahi hi,” a ci hi." 
Mark10:13 Mi pawlkhat in a naupangte uh Jesuh in a lawnsak ding deih uh ahih manin hong paipih uh a, ahi zongin a nungzuite in na kham uh hi." 
Mark10:14 Jesuh in tua thu a phawk ciangin a heh suak a, a nungzuite kiangah, “Naupangte kham kei unla, ka kiangah hong paisak un. Bang hang hiam cih leh Pasian’ Ukna sungah hih bang mite a om ahi hi." 
Mark10:15 Hih naupangno khat’ man’ bangin Pasian’ Ukna a mang lo mi peuhmah Pasian’ Ukna sungah om lo ding ahihna thei un,” a ci hi." 
Mark10:16 Tua ciangin naupangnote la-in a ang-ah tawi a, a tung uhah a khut nga-in thupha a pia hi." 
Mark10:17 Jesuh in a khualzinna a zom dingin a paikhiat ding laitakin mi khat hong tai-in a mai-ah hong khukdin a, “A dik siapa aw, nuntak tawntungna ka ngah nadingin bang hih ding ka hi hiam?” a ci hi." 
Mark10:18 Jesuh in, “Bang hangin kei midik hong ci na hi hiam? Pasian simloh kuamah a diktatzo om lo hi." 
Mark10:19 Mi that kei in; numei tungah mawh kei in; mi’ neihsa gu kei in; mi khem kei in; na nu na pa zahtak in, cihna thukhamte thei lo na hi hiam?” a ci hi." 
Mark10:20 Amah in, “Sia aw, ka neutung a kipanin hih thukhamte khempeuh ka zuikhin hi,” a ci hi." 
Mark10:21 Tua ciangin Jesuh in itna tawh tua mipa enin, “Na khat bek na kisam lai hi. Pai inla, na neih khempeuh na zuak khit ciangin mizawngte tungah na sumkhotte va pia in. Tua hileh vantungah sum na hau ding hi. Tua khit ciangin ka nung hong zui in,” a ci hi." 
Mark10:22 Tua mipa mihau khat ahih manin hih thu a zak ciangin, maikhingin a dahsa-in a paikhia hi." 
Mark10:23 Jesuh in a kiima om a nungzuite enin amaute kiangah, “Pasian’ Ukna sungah mihaute a lut ding uh bangzah takin haksa ahi hiam?” a ci hi." 
Mark10:24 Nungzuite in hih thu a zak uh ciangin lamdangsa uh a, ahi zongin Jesuh in a thugen zomlai-in, “Tate aw, Pasian’ Ukna sungah lut ding bangzah takin haksa ahi hiam?" 
Mark10:25 Pasian’ ukna sungah mihau khat a lut ding sangin phim bilvang sungah kalaoh khat a lut ding baihzaw lai hi,” a ci hi." 
Mark10:26 Tua ciangin amaute in lamdangsa mahmah uh a, “Tua bang hileh kua in hotkhiatna ngahzo ding ahi hiam?” a ci uh hi." 
Mark10:27 Jesuh in amaute enin, “Mihingte a dingin hi zo lo mah hi; ahi zongin Pasian a dingin ahi mawh thu hi lo hi; Pasian a dingin na khempeuh hithei hi,” a ci hi." 
Mark10:28 Tua ciangin Peter in ama kiangah, “Ko zong na khempeuh nusia-in nang kong zui uh hi,” ci-in a gen ciangin" 
Mark10:29 Jesuh in amaute kiangah, “Hi mah hi; ke’n kong cihin-ah, keima hang le lungdamna thu hangin a inn, a sanggam pasalte, a sanggam numeite, a nu, a pa, a tate, le a leitang, khat peuhmah a nusiate in" 
Mark10:30 tukhang hunin a zah zakhat innte, sanggam pasalte, sanggam numeite, nute, tate, leitangte ngah ding uh a, bawlsiatna zong ngah ding uh hi. Hong tung ding hunah zong nuntak tawntungna ngahlai ding uh hi." 
Mark10:31 Ahi zongin tuhun laitakin a lian ahi mi tampite tua hun ciangin a neu hi ding uh a, tuhun laitakin a neu ahi mi tampite a lian hi ding uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Mark10:32 Jerusalem khua manawhin a paitoh laitakun a nungzuite mai-ah Jesuh na ma pai hi. A nungzuite patau uh a, amaute a zui mihonpite zong a lau uh hi. Jesuh in nungzui sawm le nihte tuamsap kik leuleu a, ama tunga piang ding thute genin," 
Mark10:33 “Na ngai un. Tu-in Jerusalem khua-ah a paito ding ihi hi; tua lai mun panin siampi liante le Thukham hilh siate’ khut sungah Mihing Tapa kipia ding hi. Amaute in a sih nadingin thu a khen khit uh ciangin Gentail mite’ khut sungah a ap ding uh hi. 
Mark10:34 Tua mite in amah simmawh bawlin, cilphihin, satin a that ding uh hi. Ni thum khit ciangin amah thokik ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Mark10:35 Tua laitakin Zebedi’ tapa James le Johan in Jesuh hong naih uh a, “Kong nget peuhpeuh uh nong vaihawmsak ding ka deih uh hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Mark10:35 Tua laitakin Zebedi’ tapa James le Johan in Jesuh hong naih uh a, “Kong nget peuhpeuh uh nong vaihawmsak ding ka deih uh hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Mark10:36 Jesuh in, “Bang kong vaihawmsak ding deih na hi uh hiam?” ci-in a dot ciangin" 
Mark10:37 amaute in, “Minthangin kumpi tokhom tungah na tut ciangin na taklamah khat, na veilamah khat hong tusak lecin ka ut uh hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Mark10:38 Ahi zongin Jesuh in, “Note in na hong nget uh na thei kei uh hi. Keimah in ka thuak ding gimna note in thuakzo ding a, ka kiphum nading gimna-ah kiphumzo ding na hi uh hiam?” ci-in a dot ciangin" 
Mark10:39 amaute in, “Ka hizo ding uh hi,” ci-in a dawng uh hi. Tua ciangin Jesuh in amaute kiangah, “Keimah in gimna ka thuak ding mah bangin na thuak takpi ding uh a, ka thuak ding kiphumna zong na thuak takpi ding uh hi." 
Mark10:40 Ahi zongin ka taklama tut ding le ka veilama tut ding pen kei’ hong piaktheih hi lo a, a tu dingin Pasian in a vaihawmsaksate a’ ding ahi hi,” a ci hi." 
Mark10:41 Hih a kihona uh thu, nungzui dang sawmte in a zak uh ciangin James le Johan tungah a heh suak uh hi." 
Mark10:41 Hih a kihona uh thu, nungzui dang sawmte in a zak uh ciangin James le Johan tungah a heh suak uh hi." 
Mark10:42 Ahi zongin Jesuh in amaute samin, “Leitung mi a ukte in mite tungah aana nei-in, mi a makaite in thuneihna tawh a ukna thu na thei uh hi." 
Mark10:43 Ahi zongin note lakah tua bangin hi lo ding hi. Note lakah a lian nuam khat peuhpeuh, adangte khempeuh’ nasem hi ding a," 
Mark10:44 a makai ahi nuam khat peuhpeuh, adangte khempeuh’ sila hi ding hi." 
Mark10:45 Bang hang hiam cih leh Mihing Tapa zong, midangte ama na a semsak dingin a hong pai hi lo hi. Midangte’ na a sem ding le mi tampi a tatkhiat nading ama nuntakna a pia dingin a hong pai ahi zaw hi,” a ci hi." 
Mark10:46 Tua ciangin Jerikho khua a tung uh hi. Tua khua panin a nungzuite le mihonpite tawh a paikhiat laitakun, Timias’ tapa a mittaw khutdawhin a ngen Bartimias, lampi gei-ah na tu hi." 
Mark10:47 Nazareth khuami Jesuh ahihna thu a theih ciangin nakpitakin awng a, “David’ suan Jesuh aw, kei hong hehpih in,” a ci hi." 
Mark10:48 A kiima om mihonte in amah taii-in, a pau loh nadingin a kham uh hi. Ahi zongin amah nakpitakin awngzaw semsem a, “David’ suan aw, kei hong hehpih in,” a ci hi." 
Mark10:49 Tua ciangin Jesuh khawlin a nungzuite kiangah, “Va sam un,” a ci hi. Amaute in mittaw pa samin ama kiangah, “Na lung nuamsak in; ding in; amah in nang a hong sam hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Mark10:50 Amah in zong a puan lawnkhia a, dingto pahin Jesuh kiangah a pai hi." 
Mark10:51 Jesuh in, “Bang kong hihsak ding deih na hi hiam?” ci-in a dot ciangin mittaw pa in, “Sia aw, khua ka mukik thei nuam hi,” a ci hi." 
Mark10:52 Tua ciangin Jesuh in, “Na ciah thei ta ding hi; na upna in nang hong damsakzo hi,” a cihkhit phetin amah in khua mukik theipah a, tua a paina lampi-ah Jesuh’ nung a zui hi." 
Mark11:1 Jerusalem khuanai, Bethfage le Bethany khuaneute a omna Oliv Mual a tun uh ciangin Jesuh in a nungzuite nih ma sawl a," 
Mark11:2 “Mai-a om khua-ah va pai un. Khua na tun phetun, kuamah a tuan ngei nai lohna lano khat khau a kikhih na mu ding uh hi. Hong sut unla hong kai un." 
Mark11:3 Mi khatpeuh in, ‘Bang hangin tua la khau sut na hi uh hiam?’ hong cih leh, ‘Topa in deih hi; hih lai mahah kong kaikikpah ding uh hi,’ ci-in gen un,” a ci hi." 
Mark11:4 Amau tegel zong paipah uh a, kongzing a kong gei khatah lano a kikhih khat mu uh ahih manin a khau a sutpah uh hi." 
Mark11:5 Tua kiima om mite in, “Bang hangin tua lano khau sut na hi uh hiam?” ci-in a dot uh ciangin," 
Mark11:6 Jesuh’ vaikhak thuteng gen uh a, bangmah cih nawn lo uh hi." 
Mark11:7 Jesuh kiangah a lano tunpih uh a, a lano tungah a puan uh phahin a tungah Jesuh a tuang hi." 
Mark11:8 Mi tampite in ama pai nading lampi-ah a puan uh na phah uh a, mi pawlkhat in lolai panin a sat uh sawlpangte na phah uh hi." 
Mark11:9 Jesuh’ mai-a a pai mite le a nunga a zui mite in, “Pasian phat un! Topa’ tangin a hong pai mipa, Pasian in thupha pia ta hen!" 
Mark11:10 A hong tung ding i pu David’ ukna, Pasian in thupha pia ta hen! Pasian phat un!” ci-in a awng uh hi." 
Mark11:11 Tua bangin Jerusalem khua sungah Jesuh lut a, biakinn sungah pai-in na khempeuh a en kawikawi hi. Tua ciangin ni niam khinta ahih manin sawm le nihte tawh Bethany khua-ah a pai hi." 
Mark11:12 A zing ciangin Bethany khua pan paikhia uh a, Jesuh a gil a kial hi." 
Mark11:13 A teh a no theikung khat galmuh ahih manin a gahkhak leh ci-in a lo dingin a va pai hi. Thei min hun hi lo ahih manin, a phung a tun ciangin a teh simloh bangmah na om lo hi." 
Mark11:14 Tua ciangin theikung kiangah, “Nang tung panin kuamah in theigah loin ne nawn kei ta hen,” a ci hi. Hih thu, a nungzuite in a za uh hi." 
Mark11:15 Jerusalem khua a tun uh ciangin, biakinn huang sungah Jesuh lutin tua sungah sumzuak sumlei-a a omte hawlkhiat ding kipan a, sumkhekte’ sabuaite lumlet sakin, vakhu zuakte’ tutphahte sawnpaih sak hi." 
Mark11:16 Biakinn huang sungah kuamah bangmah paipihsak lo hi. 
Mark11:17 Tua ciangin mite kiangah thu hilh a, “Ka inn pen mi khempeuh a dingin thungetna inn kici ding hi,” ci-in Pasian in a genna thu Lai Siangtho sungah kigelh hi lo ahi hiam? Ahi zongin note in guta buluhte’ bukna mun na suaksak uh hi, ci-in thu a hilh hi." 
Mark11:18 Siampi liante le Thukham hilh siate in hih thu a zak uh ciangin Jesuh a thahtheih nading uh lampi a zong uh hi. Ahi zongin mihonpi in ama thuhilhna lamdangsa uh ahih manin amaute in Jesuh a kihta uh hi. 
Mark11:19 A nitak ciangin khuapi panin Jesuh le a nungzuite a paikhia uh hi. 
Mark11:20 A zingsang ciangin tua lampi mah zui-in a paikik ciangun tua theikung a zung dongin a sihna a mu uh hi. 
Mark11:21 Peter in a thu phawk ahih manin, “Sia aw, na theikung samsiat a sita hi,” a ci hi." 
Mark11:22 Jesuh in amaute kiangah, “Upna nei un." 
Mark11:23 Upna na neih nak-uhleh hih mual kiangah, ‘Na omna panin paikhia-in tuipi sung kidenna in,’ ci le-uhcin, na lungsim sung uhah uplahna om loin na gen bangun piang taktak ding hi, ci-in na up nak-uhleh, na cih bangun hong piang ding hi." 
Mark11:24 Tua ahih manin note kiangah kong genin-ah: Na khat peuhpeuh na nget uh ciangin ngah ding ci-in um un; tua hileh na nget peuhpeuh uh na ngah ding uh hi. 
Mark11:25 Thungen dingin na din uh ciangin midang tungah na hehna uh a om khat peuhpeuh maisak un; tua hileh vantungah a om na Pa un note’ mawhna hong maisak ding hi. 
Mark11:26 (Midangte’ mawhna na maisak kei uhleh vantungah a om na Pa un note’ mawhna zong hong maisak lo ding hi,” ci-in a dawng hi.)" 
Mark11:27 Tua ciangin Jerusalem tungkik leuleu uh hi. Biakinn kiimah Jesuh a vak kawikawi laitakin siampi liante, Thukham hilh siate, le upate hong pai uh a," 
Mark11:28 “Hih nate, kua’ thu tawh bawl a, na bawl nadingin kua in aana hong pia ahi hiam?” ci-in a dot uh ciangin" 
Mark11:29 Jesuh in, “Keimah in note tungah thu khat kong dong masa ding hi; nong dawn uhleh kei zong kua thu tawh ka bawl, cih kong gen ding hi." 
Mark11:30 Johan in tui a phumtheih nading thu Pasian kiang panin a ngah ahi hiam, ahih kei leh mihingte tung panin a ngah ahi hiam, hong gen un,” a ci hi." 
Mark11:31 Tua ciangin amaute khatlekhat kikum uh a, “Pasian kiang pan hi,” ci lehang, “Tua ahihleh bang hangin Johan’ thu um lo na hi uh hiam?” hong ci ding a," 
Mark11:32 “Mihingte’ tung pan hi,” cih ding lah, mi khempeuh in Johan pen kamsang taktakin ngaihsun uh ahih manin mite i kihta zel hi, a ci uh hi." 
Mark11:33 Tua ahih ciangin, “Ka thei kei uh hi,” ci-in a dawng uh hi. Jesuh in zong, “Hih nate kua thu tawh ka bawl cih thu kei zong kong gen kei ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Mark12:1 Tua ciangin Jesuh in amaute kiangah thugentehna zangin thu hilh a, “Mi khat in lo zuanin leenggui suan a, a kimkot umin leenggah cil nading bawl a, a hon nading tausang khat a lam khit ciangin, lo khawhlawhte khawhlawhsak a, amah gam dangah a pai hi." 
Mark12:2 Leenggah lawh hun a tun ciangin ama ngah ding tangteng a la dingin lo khawhlawhte kiangah a nasemte khat a paisak hi. 
Mark12:3 Lo khawhlawhte in tua a nasempa manin satgawp uh a, a guak ciahsakkik uh hi." 
Mark12:4 Tua ciangin lo nei pa in a nasem dang khat a sawl hi. Amaute in tua pa a lutang na liamsakgawp uh a, a na simmawh bawl uh hi." 
Mark12:5 Tua ciangin adang khat sawl leuleu a, a na that uh hi. Tua bangin adang tampi sawl a, pawlkhat na satgawp uh a, pawlkhat na that uh hi." 
Mark12:6 Tua ciangin a sawltheih ding a it mahmah a tapa khat bek omlai ahih manin, ‘Amaute in ka tapa na zahtakbawl ding uh hi,’ ci-in a nunung penin a sawl hi." 
Mark12:7 Ahi zongin lo khawhlawhte in, ‘Hih pa pen a gamhluah ding pa ahi hi. Pai un; amah va that huan ni; tua hileh hih ama luah ding gamh eima a’ suak ding hi,’ a kici uh hi." 
Mark12:8 Tua ahih manin amah manin that uh a, lo nawlah a pai uh hi." 
Mark12:9 “Tua ahihleh lonei pa in bangci bawl ding ahi hiam? Amah hong pai-in lo khawhlawhte that ding a, a lo, midangte a khawhlawhsak ding hi." 
Mark12:10 ‘Innlamte in a nilkhiat suang pen innkiu suang bulpi suak khinta hi. 
Mark12:11 Hih thu Topa’ bawl hi a, i muh ciangin lamdang i sa hi,’ ci-in Lai Siangtho sungah a kigelh sim ngei lo na hi uh hiam?” a ci hi." 
Mark12:12 Hih thugentehna pen amaute a cihnopna a a gen ahihlam Jew makaite in thei uh ahih manin Jesuh a kimat theih nading a hanciam uh hi. Ahi zongin mihonpite kihta uh ahih manin Jesuh bangmah cih loin a paisan uh hi. 
Mark12:13 Tua ciangin Jesuh ama kampauna tawh a kimat theih nadingin Farisi mi pawlkhat le Herod mi pawlkhat Jesuh kiangah thudong dingin hong kisawl hi. 
Mark12:14 Amaute in, “Sia aw, nangmah in thutang genin, midangte’ pau ding phamawh na sak lohna, uliante’ maitang zahtak tuan loin, Pasian in mite a gamtat dingin a deihna thute tangtakin na hilhna ka thei uh hi. Tua ahih manin Rom Kumpipa Sisar tungah siah i piak ding kilawm ahi hiam, kilawm lo ahi hiam?" 
Mark12:15 Pia ding ihi hiam, pia lo ding ihi hiam?” ci-in a dong uh hi. Ahi zongin Jesuh in amau lungsimtawng thei ahih manin, “Bang hangin kei hong thangsiah se na hi uh hiam? Ka et dingin dangka peek khat hong la dih un,” a ci hi." 
Mark12:16 Amaute in zong dangka peek khat hong paipih uh a, tua ciangin Jesuh in, “Hih dangka tunga om kua’ lim hi a, kua’ min ahi hiam?” ci-in a dot ciangin, “Rom Kumpipa Sisar’ lim le a min ahi hi,” ci-in a dawng uh hi." 
Mark12:17 Tua ciangin Jesuh in, “Tua ahihleh, Sisar’ neihsate Sisar’ tungah pia unla, Pasian’ neihsate Pasian’ tungah pia un,” a ci hi. Tua ama thudawnna hangin lamdang a sa mahmah uh hi." 
Mark12:18 Tua ciangin, thawhkikna om lo hi, a ci Saddusi mi pawlkhat hong pai leuleu uh a," 
Mark12:19 “Sia aw, ‘Mi khat in ta nei loin a zi a sihsan leh tua a si mipa’ khang a kizop theih nadingin a naupa in tua meigongnu tenpih ding hi,’ ci-in Moses in eite a dingin ngeina a koih hi." 
Mark12:20 Khatvei, unau pasal sagih om uh hi. A u pen in zi nei a, ta nei loin a si hi." 
Mark12:21 A nau in a upa’ zi luah hi; amah zong ta nei loin si leuleu hi. A thumna pa," 
Mark12:22 le adangte khempeuh, a sagihna dong in tua nu tenpih uh a, ta nei lo vive mahin a si uh hi. A tawpna ciangin tua numei zong a si hi." 
Mark12:23 Tua ahihleh, hih unau pasal sagihte in hihnu tenpih kim ciat uh ahih manin, mi khempeuh a thawhkik ni ciangin a kua pen’ zi hi ding ahi hiam?” ci-in a dong uh hi." 
Mark12:24 Jesuh in, “Na khial mahmah uh hi. Lai Siangtho ahi a, Pasian’ vangliatna ahi zongin na theih lohna hang uh ahi hi." 
Mark12:25 Sihna panin mite a thawhkik ciangin vantungah a om vantung mite mah bangin zinei pasalnei cih om lo ding uh hi. 
Mark12:26 Thawhkikna thu tawh kisai-in ci lehang, Moses’ laigelhna sung sawlpang kuang thu a genna munah Pasian in Moses kiangah, ‘Kei pen Abraham’ Pasian, Isaac’ Pasian, Jakob’ Pasian ka hi hi,’ a cihna mun sim ngei lo na hi uh hiam?" 
Mark12:27 Tua bang a cih ciangin Pasian pen misite’ Pasian hi loin mihingte’ Pasian hi, a ci nuam ahi hi. Tua ahih manin na ngaihsun khial mahmah uh hi,” ci-in a dawng hi." 
Mark12:28 Tua thukidotna a za Thukham hilh siate khat in, Saddusi mite’ dotnate limtakin Jesuh in a dawntheihna a muh ciangin Jesuh hong neh a, “Thukham khempeuh lakah bang thukham a lianpen ahi hiam?” ci-in a dong hi." 
Mark12:29 Jesuh in, “Thukham a lianpen in: Israel mite aw, ngai un: I Topa Pasian bek mah Topa ahi hi." 
Mark12:30 Na Topa Pasian uh, na lungsim khempeuh, na nuntakna khempeuh, na pilna khempeuh, le na thahatna khempeuh uh tawh na it un, a cihna ahi hi." 
Mark12:31 A nihna in: Nangma pumpi na it bangin na vengte na it in, cihna ahi hi. Hih tegel sangin thukham a lianzaw a dang om nawn lo hi,” ci-in a dawng hi." 
Mark12:32 Tua ciangin Thukham hilh siapa in, “Sia aw, na gen mah bangin hi ka sa mahmah hi. Topa bek mah Pasian hi a, amah simloh pasian dang kuamah om lo hi." 
Mark12:33 Mite in a lungsim khempeuh, a pilna khempeuh, le a hatna khempeuh uh tawh Pasian itin, amau pumpi a it bangin a vengte a it ding uh ahi hi. Pasian biak nadingin biakna tau tunga gan gawhnate le biakna dang khempeuh sangin hih thukham nihte zuih ding thupizaw takpi hi,” a ci hi." 
Mark12:34 Jesuh in hih mipa’ thugenzia hoihsa ahih manin, “Pasian’ Ukna sungah a om dektak mahmah na hi hi,” a ci hi. Tua khit a kipanin Jesuh kiangah kuamah in thu dong ngam nawn lo uh hi." 
Mark12:35 Jesuh in biakinn sungah thu a hilh laitakin, “Bang hangin Thukham hilh siate in Khrih pen David’ suan hi lel hi, ci thei uh ahi hiam?" 
Mark12:36 Kha Siangtho’ sawlna tawh David mahmah in thu gen a, ‘Topa in keima Topa tungah thu gen hi: Na galte, na khe nuai-ah ka koih matengin, ka taklamah na tu in,’ ci hi." 
Mark12:37 David mahmah in Khrih pen ‘Topa,’ ci hi. Tua ahihleh Khrih pen David’ suan hi lel, cih mawkmawk ding hithei ding ahi hiam?” a ci hi. Mihonte in hih thu a zak uh ciangin a lungdam mahmah uh hi." 
Mark12:38 Jesuh in a thuhilhna-ah, “Thukham hilh sia pawlkhatte na bat khak loh nadingun na kidawm un. Amaute in puantualpi silhnuam uh a, mite lakah mite in a zahtak hopih ding a deih uh hi." 
Mark12:39 Kikhopna inn sungah, uliante a dingin a kikoihcing tutphah nuamte tungah tunuam uh a, pawi sungah zong uliante’ tutna mun hoihte bekah a tunuam uh hi." 
Mark12:40 Meigong numeite tungah nuamtaksa-in a neihsate laksakin zangmang uh a, mite in mihoih a saktheih nading uh a deihna hangun thu saupipi a ngen uh hi. Amau’ kineihkhemna tawh kizui-in a gimthuak ding uh lianzaw ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Mark12:41 Biakinn sumpi khiatna kuang gei-ah Jesuh tu a, mihonte in sumpi a khiat laitakun a en hi. A haute in tampipi hong khia uh hi." 
Mark12:42 A zawng meigong numei khat zong hong pai a, sumnen tang nih hong khia hi." 
Mark12:43 Tua ciangin a nungzuite sam a, “Adangte khempeuh sangin hih mizawng meigongnu in tam khia zaw hi." 
Mark12:44 Bang hang hiam cih leh adangte in a neihval a lamval sung panun a khia uh ahi hi; ahi zongin amah zawng mahmah napi-in ama kivak nading nangawn siit loin a neih khempeuh a khiakhin ahi hi,” a ci hi." 
Mark13:1 Biakinn panin Jesuh a pusuah laitakin a nungzuite khat in, “Sia aw, hih biakinnte bangzah takin lian a, a suangte bangzah takin gol ahi hiam?” a ci hi." 
Mark13:2 Jesuh in, “Hih innte liansa-in thupi na sa mahmah hi. Ahi zongin hih innte lamna-a a kiciang suangte nih bek nangawn a kithuapna a om lo zah dongin a kiphelkek gawp hun hong tung ding hi,” ci-in a dawng hi." 
Mark13:3 Biakinn galkhatah a om Oliv Mual tungah Jesuh tu-in a om laitakin Peter, James, Johan, le Andru hong pai-in amauteng guak a om laitakin," 
Mark13:3 Biakinn galkhatah a om Oliv Mual tungah Jesuh tu-in a om laitakin Peter, James, Johan, le Andru hong pai-in amauteng guak a om laitakin," 
Mark13:4 “Hih na thugen cik ciangin hong tung ding a, hih na thugente khempeuh hong tun ding ciangin bang lim hong om ding ahi hiam?” ci-in a dong uh hi." 
Mark13:5 Jesuh in amaute kiangah, “Kuamah in hong khem zawh loh nadingin na kidawm un." 
Mark13:6 Keima min pua-in mi tampi hong pai ding uh a, ‘Keimah, Khrih ka hi hi,’ ci-in mi tampi a khemzo ding uh hi." 
Mark13:7 A gamla a galkidona thute le a nai-a galkidona huging na zak uh ciangin patau kei un. Tuate a piang ding mah hi a, hun beina ding hi nai lo hi." 
Mark13:8 Minam khat le minam khat, kumpi khat le kumpi khat kido ding uh hi. Mun tuamtuamah zin hong ling ding a, kial zong hong tung ding hi. Hihte khempeuh pen gimna kipatna hi pan hi." 
Mark13:9 “Limtakin kidawm un. Note hong kimanin thukhen zumah hong kipaipih ding a, kikhopna inn sungah zong hong kisat ding hi. Ukpite le kumpite mai-ah keima thu gen nading hun na ngah ding uh hi." 
Mark13:10 Ahi zongin hun beina a tun ma-in mi khempeuh tungah Lungdamna Thu kihilh masa phot ding hi. 
Mark13:11 Note hong kimanin, thusitna a thuak dingin thukhen zumah hong kipaipih ciangin bang gen ding ihi hiam, ci-in ma lunghihmawh kei un. A thugen ding pen note hi loin Kha Siangtho ahih manin a hun tak ciangin na gen dingun a hong kisawl peuhpeuh na gen un." 
Mark13:12 Unau khatlekhat a sih nadingun kikhia ding uh a, pa in a ta khia-in, ta in a nu le a pate khia-in a thatsak ding uh hi." 
Mark13:13 Keima hangin Gentail mi khempeuh in note hong mudah ding uh a, ahi zongin a sih dongun a thuakzote in hotkhiatna a ngah ding uh hi." 
Mark13:14 “Ama om loh nading pi-ah a lipkhaphuai zehphitna a hong om na muh uh ciangin (hih lai a simte in Jesuh’ cihnopna thei ta un!) Judea gam a om mite mualtungah tai un. 
Mark13:14 “Ama om loh nading pi-ah a lipkhaphuai zehphitna a hong om na muh uh ciangin (hih lai a simte in Jesuh’ cihnopna thei ta un!) Judea gam a om mite mualtungah tai un. 
Mark13:15 A innkhum zangah a om laitak ahi khate zong, a kumsuk ciangin a neihsate a taipih dingin a la dingin a inn sungah lut nawn kei hen." 
Mark13:16 Lolai-ah a om laitak ahi khate zong, a puan la dingin a inn uh zuan nawn kei hen." 
Mark13:17 Tua laitakin nupi naupaiite le naungek neite a dingin haksa mahmah ding hi. 
Mark13:18 Phalbi laitakin hih thu hong piankhak loh nadingin thu na ngen un. 
Mark13:19 Bang hang hiam cih leh Pasian in leitung a piansak cil a kipanin tuhun dong, cikmahin tua bang haksatna a om ngei lo, nidang ciangin zong a om ngei nawn lo ding, tua hun laitakin hong tung ding hi." 
Mark13:20 Topa in tua gimna hun a ni khiam lo hileh a suaktazo kuamah om lo ding hi. Ahi zongin ama teel mite a khualna-in a ni a khiam hi. 
Mark13:21 “Tua laitakin mi khatpeuh in, ‘Hih lai-ah Khrih om hi; hua lai-ah Khrih om hi,’ ci-in hong gen leh, um kei un." 
Mark13:22 Bang hang hiam cih leh Khrih kineihkhemte le kamsang kineihkhemte hong piang ding a, ahih zawhleh, a teelsa mite nangawn a khem nadingun lim le na lamdangte hong bawl ding uh hi." 
Mark13:23 Tua ahih manin kidawm un! A hun ma-in kong genkhin hi. 
Mark13:24 “Tua haksatna hun khit ciangin ni hong mial ding a, kha hong taang nawn lo ding hi." 
Mark13:25 Van panin aksite hong kia ding a, vantung a om nate a omngei bangin omthei nawn lo ding hi." 
Mark13:26 Tua ciangin Mihing Tapa, vangliatna le minthanna tawh meii lakah a hong paisuk kimu ding hi." 
Mark13:27 Tua ciangin leitung mun khempeuhah vantung mite sawl ding a, leimong khat pan mong khat kikalah a om a teel mite khempeuh a kaikhawmsak ding hi."
