Mark13:28 Thei kung tung pana thupiang panin thu thei un. A hiangte hong meeng a, a teh hong no ciangin khuakhal hun hong naita ding hi, ci-in na thei un." 
Mark13:29 Tua mah bangin hih thute hong tun ciangin amah hong naita a, hong tung dektak hi, ci-in na thei un." 
Mark13:30 Hih thu limtakin phawk un. Tu laitakin a nungta mi khempeuh a sihkhit ma-in hih thute hong tung ding hi. 
Mark13:31 Van le lei mangthang ding a, ahi zongin ka thugente mangthang ngei lo ding hi." 
Mark13:32 “Ahi zongin tua ni le tua nai hun ding kuamah in thei lo hi. Vantunga om vantung mite ahi a, Tapa ahi keimah in ahi zongin ka thei kei a, ka Pa bek in a thei hi." 
Mark13:33 Tua hun ding thei lo na hih manun kikemin pilvang un. 
Mark13:34 Mi khat khualzin dingin paikhia a, a dinkhiat ding ciangin amau’ sep ding ciat a nasemte tungah tavuan pia a, kongcing pa in limtakin a cin ding a sawl mipa tawh kibang hi." 
Mark13:35 Inn nei pa, nitak ahi a, zankim ahi a, zingsang ak khuankuan ahi a, zingsang khuavak khit ahi zongin a bang hunin hong tung ding cih thei lo na hih manun ngakin na pilvang un." 
Mark13:36 Tua hikeileh amah thakhatin hong tungin na ihmut laitakun hong tuakkha ding hi. 
Mark13:37 Note tungah kong gen mah bangin mi khempeuh tungah zong, ‘Ngakin na pilvang un,’ ka ci hi,” a ci hi." 
Mark14:1 Paisan Pawi le Silngo Sawh loh Anlum Pawi a tun ma ni nih ni-in siampi liante le Thukham hilh siate in Jesuh simmatin a thahtheih nading uh lampi a zong uh hi. 
Mark14:2 Ahi zongin, “Mihonpite hong buai kha ding ahih manin hih pawi hun sungin hih kei ni,” a ci uh hi." 
Mark14:3 Bethany khua-ah, miphak ahi ngei Simon’ inn-ah Jesuh in an a nek laitakin, numei khat in a manpha mahmah nard paknamtui citak suangngo thawl dimin a om khat hong tawi a, a suangngo thawl sukhamin Jesuh’ lu tungah a paknamtui a sungsuk hi." 
Mark14:4 Tua lai-a om mi pawlkhat a heh suak a, “Bang hangin hih paknamtui mawk beisak ahi hiam?" 
Mark14:5 Kizuak le ngun peek zathum val kikhawng ding a, a sum mizawngte tungah kipia thei ding hi,” ci-in nakpitakin tua numei a mawhsak uh hi." 
Mark14:6 Ahi zongin Jesuh in, “Bangmah cih se kei un! Bang hangin nawngkaisak na hi uh hiam? Amah pen a kilawm a hoihin kei tungah hong gamta hi." 
Mark14:7 Mizawngte ahihleh note tawh omkhawm tawntung ding a, na huhnop hun peuhpeuhun na huh thei ding uh hi. Ahi zongin kei pen note tawh kong omkhawm tawntung kei ding hi." 
Mark14:8 Amah in ka luang a kivui nadingin paknamtui a hong ma nuhkhol hi a, a hihtheih zahzah ciang a hih khinta ahi hi." 
Mark14:9 Hih thu limtakin phawk un! Lungdamna thu a kihilhna leitung mun khempeuhah hihnu’ thu kiphawkin kei tungah hong sepnate kigengen ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Mark14:10 Tua laitakin sawm le nihte sungpan Iskariot’ tapa Judas in amaute tungah Jesuh a piaktheih nadingin siampi liante kiangah a va pai hi. 
Mark14:11 Siampi liante in a thu a zak uh ciangin lungdam mahmah uh a, sum tawh kong guai ding uh hi, ci-in thu a ciam uh hi. Tua ahih manin Judas in Jesuh a lehhek theih nading a hunhoih a zong hi." 
Mark14:12 Paisan Pawi an dingin tuuno a kigawh ni, Silngo Sawh loh Anlum Pawi ni masa ni-in a nungzuite in Jesuh kiangah, “Koi lai-ah pai-in Paisan Pawi an ding hong bawlsak ding ka hi uh hiam?” ci-in a dong uh hi." 
Mark14:13 Tua ciangin Jesuh in a nungzuite nih sawlin amaute kiangah, “Jerusalem khua sungah va pai le-uhcin, tuibeel a pua mi khat na mu ding uh hi. Amah zui unla," 
Mark14:14 ama tumna innteek pa kiangah, ‘Siapa in hih bangin ci hi: Ka nungzuite tawh Paisan Pawi an ka nek nading uh zintun nading inndei koilai ahi hiam, ci hi,’ va ci un." 
Mark14:15 Amah in a baihsa-in a na kikoihsa inndei tungnung a zai khat hong lak ding hi. Tua lai-ah na bawl un,” a ci hi." 
Mark14:16 Nungzui tegel zong khua sungah va pai uh a, Jesuh’ gen bangin a va mu uh hi. Tua lai-ah Paisan Pawi an ding a bawl uh hi." 
Mark14:17 A nitak ciangin a nungzui sawm le nihte tawh tua munah Jesuh a om hi. 
Mark14:18 An a nek laitakun Jesuh in, “Tu laitakin kei tawh an a nekhawm mi khat in kei hong lehhek ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Mark14:19 A nungzuite in lamdangsa uh a, a banbanin, “Kei nong cihna hi kei buangin teh,” a ci ciat uh hi." 
Mark14:20 Jesuh in amaute kiangah, “No sawm le nihte sung, kei tawh an kuang a sawkkhawmte mah sungpan ahi hi." 
Mark14:21 A kigelhsa mah bangin Mihing Tapa ahihleh si ding a, ahi zongin a lehhek pa’ thuakna nasia mahmah ding hi. Tua mipa a piang ngei het lo hileh ama a dingin hoihzaw tham ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Mark14:22 Tua bangin an a nek laitakun Jesuh in anlum la-in lungdamna a kohkhit ciangin balnenin a nungzuite tungah pia a, “Ne un; hih pen keima pumpi ahi hi,” a ci hi." 
Mark14:23 Tua ciangin hai la a, lungdamna a kohkhit ciangin a nungzuite tungah pia a, tua hai panin a dawnkim uh hi." 
Mark14:24 Tua ciangin amaute kiangah, “Hih pen mi tampite a dingin a luang, thuciamna thak a kipsak keima sisan ahi hi." 
Mark14:25 Pasian’ Ukna sungah leenggahzu thak ka dawnkik ni matengin leenggahzu a dawn nawn lo ding ka hihna thu limtakin thei un,” a ci hi." 
Mark14:26 Amaute inla khat a sakkhit uh ciangin Oliv Mual-ah a pai uh hi. 
Mark14:27 Tua ciangin Jesuh in amaute kiangah, “‘Tuucingpa ka satlum ding a, tuute a kithehthang ding hi,’ ci-in Lai Siangtho sungah a kigelh mah bangin note in kei nong taisan ding uh hi." 
Mark14:28 Ahi zongin hong kithawh kiksak khit ciangin Galilee gam note mai-ah ka pai ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Mark14:29 Tua ciangin Peter in, “Adang khempeuh in nang hong taisan ahi zongin ke’n kong nusia ngei kei ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Mark14:30 Jesuh in, “Tuzan mahmahin ak nihvei a khuan’ ma-in thumvei tak kei na hong nial ding lamtak phawk in,” a ci hi." 
Mark14:31 Ahi zongin Peter in, “Nang tawh sihkhawm nading ciang dong ahi zongin kong nial ngei het kei ding hi,” ci-in khauhtakin a gen hi. Tua mah bangin a vekpi-un a ci kim uh hi." 
Mark14:32 Tua lai panin Gethsemane a kici munah pai-in a tun uh ciangin Jesuh in a nungzuite kiangah, “Thu ka va nget hun sungteng hih lai-ah na om un,” a ci hi." 
Mark14:33 Tua ciangin Peter, James, le Johan-te paipih lai a, nakpitakin lungkhamin a dahna hong kipan hi." 
Mark14:33 Tua ciangin Peter, James, le Johan-te paipih lai a, nakpitakin lungkhamin a dahna hong kipan hi." 
Mark14:34 Amah in, “Ka lungsim dahna lianlua mahmah ahih manin ka si dektak hi. Hih lai-ah om unla na ngak un,” a ci hi." 
Mark14:35 Amah tawmkhat pailai-in leilakah boksuk a, ahi thei ding ahihleh hih thuakna hun tawh a kipelh nadingin thu a ngen hi." 
Mark14:36 “Pa aw, na khempeuh na hihthei hi. Hih ka thuak ding gimna tawh hong kipelhsak in. Ahi zongin kei’ deihna bang hi loin nangma deihna bang hizaw hen,” a ci hi." 
Mark14:37 Tua ciangin hong pai a, a nungzui thumte ihmu-in om a muh ciangin Peter kiangah, “Simon aw, ihmu na hi uh hiam? Nai khat sung nangawn hong ngak zo lo liang na hi uh hiam?” a ci hi." 
Mark14:38 Tua ciangin amaute kiangah, “Ze-etna-ah na pukkhak loh nadingun pilvangin thu ngen un. Lungsim in ze-etna nangnuam napi, pumpi in nang zo lo hi,” a ci hi." 
Mark14:39 Tua ciangin paikhia leuleu-in thu a nget ngeiteng mah va ngen leuleu hi. 
Mark14:40 Hong paikik ciangin a nungzuite na ihmu leuleu uh hi. A ihmut uh suak mahmah hi. Jesuh kiangah a gen ding uh bangmah thei lo uh hi. 
Mark14:41 A thumveina a hong ciahkik ciangin amaute kiangah, “Ihmu-in na tawlnga hithiat lailai na hi uh hiam? Phazo hi. A hun hong tungta hi. Mihing Tapa mawhnei mite’ khut sungah hong kipia khinta hi." 
Mark14:42 Tho un; pai ta ni. Kei hong lehhek pa hih lai-ah hong tungta hi,” a ci hi." 
Mark14:43 Tua bangin Jesuh in thu a gen laitakin sawm le nihte sung panin Judas hong tung a, siampi liante, Thukham hilh siate, le upate in a sawl mihonte in namsau le molhtum tawi-in hong zui uh hi." 
Mark14:44 A lehhek pa in mihonte tungah, “Ka nap pa pen Jesuh hi ding hi. Tua pa man unla limtakin cingin paikhiatpih un,” ci-in a genkhol hi." 
Mark14:45 Tua ahih manin hong tun phetin Jesuh kiangah paipah a, “Sia aw,” ci-in limnap mahmah hi." 
Mark14:46 Tua ahih ciangin amaute in Jesuh manin limtakin a lencip uh hi. 
Mark14:47 Tua laitakin a gei-a dingte khat in a namsau dokin siampi lianpen pa’ nasempa a sat leh a bil a satkhiatsak hi. 
Mark14:48 Tua ciangin Jesuh in amaute kiangah, “Guta buluhte a man ding bang keekin, kei a man dingin namsau le molhtum tawh hong kuan na hi uh hiam?" 
Mark14:49 Nisim nisimin biakinn sungah thuhilhin note tawh ka omkhawm a, ahi zongin nong man kei uh hi. Ahi zongin hih thu pen Lai Siangtho sunga a kigelh thu a tun nading ahi hi,” a ci hi." 
Mark14:50 Tua ciangin a nungzuite khempeuh in Jesuh a taisan uh hi. 
Mark14:51 Puanza kang khat bek a silh tangval khat in zong Jesuh a zui hi. Amaute pawlkhat in amah a mat ciangin," 
Mark14:52 a puanza kang nusia-in a guaktangin a tai hi. 
Mark14:53 Mihonte in siampi lianpen pa’ inn-ah Jesuh paipih uh a, siampi liante, upate, le Thukham hilh siate hong kikhawm uh hi." 
Mark14:54 Peter in zong Jesuh’ nung galzuih a, siampi lianpen pa’ inntual ciangah a om hi. Tua lai-ah palikte tawh mei awi-in a tukhawm hi." 
Mark14:55 Siampi liante a kipan uliante khempeuh in Jesuh a thahtheih nadingin thu zong uh a, ahi zongin bangmah mu lo uh hi." 
Mark14:56 Mi tampi in amah a mawhsak nadingun zuauthu gen uh a, ahi zongin a genna uh khatlekhat kituak lo hi." 
Mark14:57 Tua ciangin mi pawlkhat hong dingin amah a mawhsak nadingun zuauthu hong gen uh a," 
Mark14:58 “Mihingte’ lam hih biakinn ka susia ding a, ni thum khit ciangin mihingte’ lam ahi lo adang khat ka lam ding hi,” a cihna ka za uh hi, ci-in hong gen uh hi." 
Mark14:59 Amaute nangawn zong a thugenzia uh kituak lo hi. 
Mark14:60 Tua ciangin amaute khempeuh mai-ah siampi lianpen pa hong dingin Jesuh thu dong a, “Nangmah mawhsakna-in a gen uh thute na dawn nading om lo ahi hiam?” ci-in a dong hi." 
Mark14:61 Ahi zongin Jesuh pau loin a omcip hi. Tua ciangin siampi lianpen pa in, “Phatna a ngah Pasian’ Tapa, Khrih na hi hiam?” ci-in a dongkik leuleu hi." 
Mark14:62 Jesuh in, “Ka hi hi; Vanglian Pasian’ taklamah Mihing Tapa omin meii lakah a hong pai na mu ding uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Mark14:63 Tua ciangin siampi lianpen pa in a puan balkek a, “Thudang kisam nawn lo hi." 
Mark14:64 Pasian’ tungah a paukhialhna na zazo uh hi. Bangci ngaihsut na hi uh hiam?” a ci hi. Hih mipa thah dingin kilawm hi, ci-in amaute khempeuh in thu a khen uh hi." 
Mark14:65 Tua ciangin mi pawlkhat in cilphih uh a, a mai tunsakin beeng uh a, “Kua in hong beng ahi hiam, gen in,” a ci uh hi. Palikte in zong amah paipihin a beeng uh hi." 
Mark14:66 A nuai-a inntualah Peter a om laitakin siampi lianpen pa’ nasem numeite khat hong pai a," 
Mark14:67 Peter mei awi-in om a muh ciangin limtakin en a, “Nang zong, Nazareth khuami Jesuh tawh na kikhawl ngei hi,” a ci hi." 
Mark14:68 Ahi zongin Peter in nial a, “Ka thei kei hi; bang na cihna ahi hiam, cih zong ka tel kei hi,” ci-in dawngin tual pualam paina lampi lamah a pai hi. Tua laitakin ak a khuang hi." 
Mark14:69 Tua numei mah in a omna-ah Peter mu a, a gei-a omte kiangah, “Hih pa, hua mite khat hi takpi hi,” a cikik leuleu hi." 
Mark14:70 Ahi zongin Peter in nial leuleu hi. Tawlkhat khit ciangin a gei-a omte in Peter kiangah, “Nang zong Galilee gammi na hih manin huate khat na hi takpi hi,” a ci leuleu uh hi." 
Mark14:71 Tua ciangin Peter in, “Na gen mipa uh ka theih taak leh Pasian in kei hong dawm kei ta hen,” ci-in a kiciam hi." 
Mark14:72 Tua khit phetin ak nihveina a khuang hi. Tua ciangin, “Ak nihvei a khuan’ ma-in kei thumvei na hong nial ding hi,” ci-in Jesuh in ama tungah a gensa thu Peter in phawkkik a, dahlua-in a kap hi." 
Mark15:1 A zingsang ciangin siampi liante in upate, Thukham hilh siate, le ulian dang khempeuh tawh thu kikupna khat nei uh a, Jesuh a henkhit uh ciangin paikhiatpihin Pilat tungah a ap uh hi." 
Mark15:2 Pilat in, “Nang, Jew mite’ Kumpipa na hi hiam?” ci-in a dot ciangin Jesuh in, “Nang zong tua mah nong ci hi,” ci-in a dawng hi." 
Mark15:3 Siampi liante in Jesuh a mawhsakna tampi gen uh ahih manin 
Mark15:4 Pilat in Jesuh kiangah, “Na dawn nading om lo ahi hiam? Nang hong mawhsakna thute na zazo hi,” a ci hi." 
Mark15:5 Ahi zongin Jesuh in amah a kimawhsaknate kamkhat beek dawng het lo ahih manin Pilat in lamdang a sa mahmah hi. 
Mark15:6 Paisan Pawi hun simin mite in Pilat tungah a nget peuhpeuh mi khat, thong panin a khah a ngeina ahi hi." 
Mark15:7 Kumpi a lehdo laitakun mi a that, thong sunga kikhumte lakah Barabbas a kici mi khat zong kihel hi." 
Mark15:8 Pilat kiangah mihonte hong paito uh a, hih bang hun pawlin a hih ngei bangin mi khat a khah nading a hong ngen uh hi." 
Mark15:9 Pilat in amaute kiangah, “Jew mite’ Kumpipa ka khah ding hong deih na hi uh hiam?” ci-in a dong hi." 
Mark15:10 Bang hang hiam cih leh siampite in Jesuh a hazatna hangin hih bangin ama kiangah a paipihna thu teltakin a thei hi. 
Mark15:11 Ahi zongin Barabbas hong khahsak zaw in, ci-in mihonte in a nget nadingun siampite in mihonte a hanthawn uh hi." 
Mark15:12 Tua ciangin Pilat in mihonte tungah, “Jew mite’ Kumpipa na cih pa uh bangcih ding ka hi hiam?” ci-in a dot ciangin" 
Mark15:13 amaute in, “Singlamteh tungah that in,” ci-in a awng uh hi." 
Mark15:14 Tua ciangin Pilat in, “Bang hangin tua ci na hi uh hiam? Bang siatna bawl ahi hiam?” a cih ciangin, “Singlamteh tungah that in,” ci-in a kinakko zaw semsem uh hi." 
Mark15:15 Pilat in mihonte lungkimsak nuam ahih manin Barabbas khah a, Jesuh a satsak khit ciangin singlamteh tungah thah dingin galkapte’ khut sungah a ap hi." 
Mark15:16 Tua ciangin galkapte in gam ukpa’ inntualah Jesuh paipih uh a, galkap dang khempeuh zong kikhawmsak uh hi." 
Mark15:17 Jesuh, puansan silhsak uh a, ling lukhu bawlin a lu tungah a khusak uh hi." 
Mark15:18 A zahtakbawl bang keekin hopih uh a, “Jew mite’ Kumpipa aw, na khansau ta hen!” a ci uh hi." 
Mark15:19 Tua ciangin pumpeeng tawh a lu satin cilphih uh a, a zahtakbawl kineihin a mai-ah a kun uh hi." 
Mark15:20 Tua bangin a simmawhbawl khit uh ciangin a puansan suahkhiatsak uh a, ama puan ngeite a silhsakkik uh hi. Tua ciangin singlamteh tungah thah dingin a paikhiatpih uh hi." 
Mark15:21 Tua bangin a pai laitakun, Alexander le Rufas’ pa, Sairin khuami Simon a kici mi khat, gam sung panin khuapi sunga hong pai tawh kituak uh a, Jesuh’ singlamteh a pua dingin lammat uh hi." 
Mark15:22 Lutang guh a cihnopna Golgotha munah paipih uh a," 
Mark15:23 tua lai-ah myrrh a kici zatui a sawhsa uh leenggahzu pia uh a, ahi zongin Jesuh in ne nuam lo hi." 
Mark15:24 Tua ciangin singlamteh tungah amah khai uh a, a puante kua in a koi ngah ding cih a theih nadingun suang lawnin ai san uh a, amauteng in a puante a hawm uh hi." 
Mark15:25 Jesuh, singlamteh tungah a khai hun pen zingsang nai kua laitak ahi hi." 
Mark15:26 “Jew mite’ Kumpipa,” ci-in amah a mawhsakna uh lai kigelh hi." 
Mark15:27 A taklamah khat, a veilamah khat, mi thatte nih tawh a kikhai khawm hi." 
Mark15:28 (Hih bangin a hihna uh tawh, “Khialhna a nei mite tawh kisim khawm hi,” ci-in Lai Siangtho sungah a kigelh thu a tung ahi hi.)" 
Mark15:29 Amah a va mukha mi peuhpeuh in a lu uh singin zahpihbawl uh a, “A! Biakinn susia-in ni thum sungin a lamkik ding pa!" 
Mark15:30 Singlamteh tung panin hong kumsuk inla, nangmah kihonkhia tawm in!” a ci uh hi." 
Mark15:31 Tua bangmahin siampi liante le Thukham hilh siate in zong zahpih bawlin, “Midangte honkhiazo napi, amah le amah kihonkhia zo lo!" 
Mark15:32 Israel mite’ kumpipa Khrih tu-in singlamteh tung panin hong kumsuk leh amah um ni!” a kici uh hi. Jesuh tawh a kikhai khawm mi nihte in zong a simmawhbawl uh hi. 
Mark15:33 Tua ciangin sunkim nai sawm le nih laitak a kipanin nai thum sung leitung khempeuhah khim a zing hi. 
Mark15:34 Nitak nai thum laitakin Jesuh nakpitakin kiko a, “Ka Pasian, ka Pasian aw, bang hangin kei hong nusia na hi hiam?” a cihna ahi, “Eloi, Eloi, lama sabakthani?” a ci hi." 
Mark15:35 Tua a kikona a zak uh ciangin tua lai-a om mi pawlkhatte in, “Elijah a sam hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Mark15:36 Tua laitakin mi khat va tai a, leenggahzu-hau sungah tuihupna diahin pumpeeng dawnah a henkhit ciangin Jesuh’ hup dingin tahto a, “Khawl dih un, singlamteh tung panin a sutkhia dingin Elijah hong pai hiam, en dih ni,” a ci hi." 
Mark15:37 Tua ciangin nakpitakin Jesuh kiko-in a laitat hi. 
Mark15:38 Biakinn sunga kidalna puan a tung lam pan a taw dongin kikekin phelnih a kisuah hi. 
Mark15:39 Jesuh’ mai-ah a ding galkap mangpa in tua bangin kiko-in a laitah a muh ciangin, “Hih pa, Pasian’ ta taktak ahi hi,” a ci hi." 
Mark15:40 Jesuh a gal et numei pawlkhat zong a om hi. Tuate lakah Magdala khuami Mary, a nauzaw James le Josef’ nu Mary, le Salome ahi uh hi." 
Mark15:40 Jesuh a gal et numei pawlkhat zong a om hi. Tuate lakah Magdala khuami Mary, a nauzaw James le Josef’ nu Mary, le Salome ahi uh hi." 
Mark15:41 Galilee gam sungah Jesuh a om lai-in hih numeite in Jesuh zui-in a huh uh hi. Jerusalem ciang dong Jesuh a hong zui numei dang tampi zong a om hi. 
Mark15:42 Tua ni pen Sabbath ni ma, Kigin’ ni ahih manin nitak lam ciangin," 
Mark15:43 mite in a zahtak, ulian vaihawmte lakah a kihel, Pasian’ Uk ding hun zong a lamen, Arimathea khuami Josef, hangtakin Pilat kiangah hong pai-in Jesuh’ luang a hong ngen hi." 
Mark15:44 Pilat in a lungsimah, Jesuh a si khin takpi mah hi ding ahi hiam, ci-in ngaihsun ahih manin galkap mangpa samsak a, si khinta ahi hiam, ci-in a dong hi." 
Mark15:45 Galkap mangpa’ genna panin a sihkhitna thu a theih ciangin a luang a laktheih nadingin Josef tungah thu a pia hi. 
Mark15:46 Josef in zong puanpak lei a, singlamteh tung panin Jesuh’ luang lakhia-in, a puan lei tawh hoihtakin vialin tuam a, tawhsa-in a om suang han sungah a sial hi. Tua ciangin suangtum khat hualin a kongvang a hu hi." 
Mark15:47 Magdala khuami Mary le Josef’ nu Mary in, Jesuh a kivuina mun a thei uh hi." 
Mark16:1 Sabbath ni a bei khit ciangin Magdala khuami Mary, James nu Mary, le Salome-te in Jesuh’ luang a va zut nadingun paknamtui a va lei uh hi." 
Mark16:1 Sabbath ni a bei khit ciangin Magdala khuami Mary, James nu Mary, le Salome-te in Jesuh’ luang a va zut nadingun paknamtui a va lei uh hi." 
Mark16:2 Nipi ni zingsang tung nisuah phetin hanah a pai uh hi. 
Mark16:3 Amaute khatlekhat kikum uh a, “Han kongvang hukna suangtum kua’n hong likkhiatsak ding ahi hiam?” a ci uh hi." 
Mark16:4 Tua laitakin a khuadak uhleh a suangtum a kilikkhia khinsa-in a mu uh hi. (Tua suangtum a gol mahmah khat ahi hi.) 
Mark16:5 Han sungah a lut uhleh, a taklam pang uhah, puanpak a silh tangval khat a tu mu uh a, lamdangsa-in a lau uh hi." 
Mark16:6 Tua tangvalpa in, “Lamdangsa kei un. Singlamteh tungah a kithat Nazareth khuami Jesuh na zong uh hi. Amah kithokiksak khin a, hih lai-ah om nawn lo hi. Amah a kisialna mun hong en un." 
Mark16:7 Tu-in pai unla, Peter le Jesuh’ nungzui dangte kiangah hih thu va gen un. Note tungah hong gensa bangin Galilee gam amaute mai-ah pai hi; tua lai-ah amah na mu ding uh hi, ci hi, ci un,” a ci hi." 
Mark16:8 Amaute in lamdangsa-in lau uh ahih manin han panin taisuak pah uh a, kuamah dang kiangah hih thu gen lo uh hi." 
Mark16:9 (Sihna panin Jesuh a thawhkik khit ciangin ama sung pan dawi sagih a hawlkhiatna, Magdala khuami Mary tungah Nipi ni zingsang tungin kilang masa hi." 
Mark16:10 Tua nu zong hong pai-in a dah a kapin a om Jesuh’ lawm luite kiangah hih thu a va gen hi. 
Mark16:11 Ahi zongin Jesuh a nuntakna thu le tua nu mahmah in a muh khitna thu a genna a zak uh hangin, a thugen um zo lo uh hi.)" 
Mark16:12 (Tua khit ciangin khuapi panin khuaneu-ah nungzui nihte a pai laitakun amaute tungah a mel tuam khatin Jesuh kilang hi. 
Mark16:13 Hih tegel zong kileh kikin a lawm dangte uh kiangah gen uh a, ahi zongin amau’ thugen, na um lo uh hi.)" 
Mark16:14 (Tua khit ciangin a tawpna-ah, an a nek laitakun nungzui sawm le khatte mahmah kiangah a kilang hi. A kithawhkiksak khit ciangin amah a mu mite’ thugen um lo uh ahih manin a lungkhauhna uh le a up lohna hangun amaute a taii hi." 
Mark16:15 Tua khit ciangin amaute tungah, “Leitung khempeuhah note pai kawikawi unla, mi khempeuh tungah Lungdamna Thu na hilh ta un." 
Mark16:16 Lungdamna Thu umin tui a kiphum mi peuhpeuh in hotkhiatna ngah ding a, a um lo mi peuhpeuh in mawhsakna thuak ding uh hi." 
Mark16:17 A um mite tungah hih vangliatna limte kipia ding hi: Keima hangin dawi hawlkhia thei ding uh a, pau dangte pau thei ding uh hi." 
Mark16:18 Gul a lawn’ hangun bangmah ci lo ding uh a, gu tui a dawn hangun zong bangmah ci lo ding uh hi. Cinate tungah a khut uh nga ding uh a, cinate dam ding uh hi,” a ci hi.)" 
Mark16:19 (Tua bangin Topa Jesuh in amaute tungah thu a gen khit ciangin vantungah kilato-in Pasian’ taklamah a tu hi. 
Mark16:20 Nungzuite zong mun khempeuhah pai-in thu a hilh uh hi. Topa in zong amaute’ nasep seppih a, a thuhilhnate uh man hi, ci-in a lahna-in amaute tungah vangliatna limte a pia hi.)" 
Luke1:1 A lian mahmah Theofilas aw: Eite lakah a piang ngeisa thu a kigente, mi tampi in amau siamna zah ciat tawh lai-in a gelh uh hi." 
Luke1:2 A kipat cil a kipanin amau’ mit mahmah tawh a mu mite in hong gente uh a gelh uh ahi hi. 
Luke1:3 Kei zong, hih thute khempeuh a kipat cil a kipanin limtakin kantel khin ka hih manin, a thu a kizomzomin nang a dingin hong gelhsak leng hoih ding hi, ci-in ka ngaihsun hi." 
Luke1:4 Nang tungah a hong kigensa thute khempeuh a man taktak na theih nading deihsakna tawh ka hong gelh ahi hi. 
Luke1:5 Judea gam a hong uksawn kumpi Herod hun laitakin siampi Abijah’ pawlte’ sung panin Zekhariah minnei siampi khat a om hi. A zi’ min Elizabeth hi a, amah zong Aaron’ suan ahih manin siampi nam mah ahi hi."

Luke1:6 A nih tuakun Pasian’ muhna-ah a manin gamta uh a, Topa’ thukhamte le a ngeina khempeuh a zui uh hi." 
Luke1:7 Ahi zongin Elizabeth ciing ahih manin amau nupa in ta nei lo uh a, a nih tuakun zong a teekta uh ahi hi." 
Luke1:8 Nikhat, ama pawlte’ sep hun ding a tun ciangin Zekhariah in Pasian’ mai-ah siampi nasep a sem hi." 
Luke1:9 Siampite’ hih ngeizel bangin biakna tau tungah, paknamtui kua in hal ding, ci-in ai a kisan ciangin Zekhariah in a ngah hi. Tua ahih manin Topa’ biakinn sungah amah lut a," 
Luke1:10 amah in paknamtui halin a om laitakin mihonpi dangte a pualamah thungenin na om uh hi. 
Luke1:11 Tua laitakin Topa’ vantungmi khat ama kiangah hong kilang a, paknamtui a kihalna biakna tau taklam pangah a ding hi." 
Luke1:12 Zekhariah in vantungmi a muh ciangin lamdangsa mahmah a, a lau mahmah hi." 
Luke1:13 Ahi zongin vantungmi in ama kiangah, “Zekhariah aw, lau kei in. Pasian in na thungetna hong zakhin a, na zi Elizabeth in tapa khat a nei ding hi. A min dingin Johan na phuak ding hi." 
Luke1:14 Amah hong suah ciangin nang na lungdam mahmah ding a, midang tampite in zong hong lungdampih ding uh hi." 
Luke1:15 Topa’ muhna-ah amah milian khat hi ding hi. Amah in leenggahzu ahi a, khamtheihzu khat peuhpeuh ahi zongin ne lo ding hi. A suah phet a kipanin Kha Siangtho tawh kidim ding hi." 
Luke1:16 Amah in Israel mi tampi tak, amau’ Topa Pasian’ kiangah tunpihkik ding hi." 
Luke1:17 Amah pen kamsang Elijah mah bangin thahatna le vangliatna tawh Pasian mai-ah hong mapai ding hi. Pate le tate kilemsakkikin, mihoihte’ lungsim bang a neih nadingun thumang lo mite’ lungsim heisak ding a, Topa a dingin a kilawm dingin mite a bawlkhol ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Luke1:18 Tua ciangin Zekhariah in vantungmi kiangah, “Hih na thugen a manna bangci theih ding ka hi hiam? Kei ka teekta a, ka zi zong lah a teek mahmah ahi hi,” a cih ciangin" 
Luke1:19 vantungmi in dawng a, “Kei pen Pasian’ na a sem Gabriel ka hi hi. Nang kiangah thu hong genin, hih lungdamna thu a ko dingin a hong sawl ka hi hi." 
Luke1:20 Ahi zongin, a hong tung ding ka thugen a hun lai-in um lo na hih manin nangma tunga kong thugen a tun matengin pau thei loin na om ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Luke1:21 Tua hun sungteng, mihonte in Zekhariah na ngak uh a, biakinn sungah sauveipi a om manin lamdang a sa uh hi." 
Luke1:22 Amah hong pusuah ciangin pau thei lo ahih manin, biakinn sungah maang mu hi, ci-in a thei uh hi. Pau thei lo ahih manin a khut tawh a lim a lak hi." 
Luke1:23 Biakinn sungah ama nasep ding hun a bei ciangin a inn-ah a ciah hi. 
Luke1:24 Tua khit ciangin a zi Elizabeth gai a, kha nga sung inn panin koimahah a paikhia kei hi."

Luke1:35 Vantung mi in, “Nangma tungah Kha Siangtho hong tung ding a, nangma tungah Pasian’ vangliatna hong om ding hi. Tua ahih manin a hong suak ding a siangtho naungek pen Pasian’ Tapa kici ding hi." 
Luke1:36 Na behnu Elizabeth zong thei in. A ciing hi, kici napi-in a teek mahmah zawh nungin naupaii a, tu-in a naupaii zawh kha guk pha ta hi." 
Luke1:37 Tua ahih manin Pasian in a bawl theih loh khat zong om lo hi,” ci-in a dawng hi."

Luke1:39 Tua khit a sawt loin Mary kithawi a, Judea mualtung gam a khua khatah a va paipah hi."

Luke1:42 nakpitakin kiko-in, “Numei khempeuh lakah thupha ngah pen nu na hi a, na neih ding naungek in thupha ngah ding hi."

Luke1:47 hong Hon Pasian’ hangin ka nuam mahmah hi.

Luke1:50 amah a zahtak mite tungah a khangkhangin hehpihna a lak hi. 
Luke1:51 Amah in a hat mahmah a khut zan a, kiliatsakna lungsim a nei mite a thehthang hi." 
Luke1:52 Kumpi vangliante, a tokhom panun khiasuk a, mineute, milianin a bawl hi." 
Luke1:53 Bangmah a nei lote tungah na manpha tampi pia a, mihaute, khuthawm guakin a paikhiasak hi." 
Luke1:54 I pu i pate tungah a kiciamna tungsak a, a nasempa Israel a huh hi."

Luke1:60 Ahi zongin a nu in, “Hilo ding hi; ama min dingin Johan i phuak ding hi,” a ci hi."

Luke1:64 Tua laitakin Zekhariah hong pauthei kik a, Pasian a phat hi." 
Luke1:65 A vengte khempeuh in lamdangsa-in lau uh a, Judea mualtung gam sung khempeuhah hih thu a kitheithang hi." 
Luke1:65 A vengte khempeuh in lamdangsa-in lau uh a, Judea mualtung gam sung khempeuhah hih thu a kitheithang hi." 
Luke1:66 Hih thu a za mi khempeuh in, “Hih naungek a bangci mi hong hi ding hiam?” ci-in a lungsim sung uhah a ngaihsun ciat uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa in amah a huhna thu teltakin kilang hi." 
Luke1:67 Tua ciangin Johan’ pa Zekhariah, Kha Siangtho tawh kidimin Pasian’ thu gen a," 
Luke1:68 “Israel mite’ Topa Pasian phat ciat ni. A mite a huh dingin hong pai-in amaute a suaktasak hi. 
Luke1:69 A nasempa David’ suante sung panin eite a dingin Vanglian Honpa hong pia hi. 
Luke1:70 Amah in tanglai-in a kamsang mi siangthote tungtawnin thu hong gen a," 
Luke1:71 i galte kiang panin hong hotkhiat nading le hong mudahte’ khutsung panin hong hotkhiat nading thu a hong ciam hi. 
Luke1:72 I pu i pate a hehpih nading le ama thuciam siangtho hong mangngilh loh nading, amah in hong gen hi." 
Luke1:73 I pu Abraham tungah kamciamna kho khat bawl a," 
Luke1:74 i galte kiang panin eite hong hotkhiat nading le launa om loin amah bia-in," 
Luke1:75 i khang tawnin ama mai-ah a siangtho, a thumanin i om tawntung theih nading thu hong ciam hi." 
Luke1:76 “Nang, ka tapa na hi a, Lianpen Pasian’ kamsangpa hong kici ding hi. Ama pai nading lampi a bawlkhol dingin Topa’ mai-ah na mapai ding hi." 
Luke1:77 Na mawhna uh hong kimaisak khit ciangin, hotkhiatna na ngah ding uh hi, ci-in ama mite kiangah na gen ding hi." 
Luke1:78 I Pasian lungnem mahmah a, hehpihna hong nei hi. Eite tungah hotkhiatna khuavak hong taangsak ding a," 
Luke1:79 sih ding lauhuaina sungah a om mi khempeuh tungah vantung khuavak hong taangsak ding a, nopsakna lampi-ah hong kha ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Luke1:80 Tua naungek a pumpi le a lungsim siamna hong khang a, Israel mite lakah a kilaak hun matengin sehnel gam sungah a om hi." 
Luke2:1 Tua hun laitakin gam tampi a uk Sisar Augustas in ama ukna gam sung mi a phazah a kitheih nadingin mi khempeuh min sazian a kilak nadingin thu a pia hi. 
Luke2:2 Kuirinias in Syria gam a uksawn hun laitakin hih bangin mi phazah kisimna thu hong piang hi. 
Luke2:3 Tua ahih manin amau khua ciatah min pia dingin mi khempeuh a pai uh hi. 
Luke2:4 Josef zong David’ suante khat ahih manin Galilee gam sung Nazareth khua panin David’ suahna khua ahi Judea gam Bethlehem khua-ah a pai hi. 
Luke2:4 Josef zong David’ suante khat ahih manin Galilee gam sung Nazareth khua panin David’ suahna khua ahi Judea gam Bethlehem khua-ah a pai hi. 
Luke2:5 Tua bangin min sazian kikhumsak dingin a pai ciangin tenpih dingin zuthawl a piaksa a lawmnu Mary tawh a paikhawm uh hi. A lawmnu naupaii hi a," 
Luke2:6 Bethlehem khua-ah a tam sungun a nausuah ding hun hong tung hi. 
Luke2:7 Zintun nading mun dang khempeuh mi dim khinta ahih manin ganbukah tung uh a, a tacil ahi ta pasal khat nei-in, puan tawh tunin gan annekna kuang sungah a sial hi." 
Luke2:8 Tua hun laitakin gamlakah a tuuhonte a giahpih tuucing pawlkhat a om uh hi. 
Luke2:9 Amaute kiangah Topa’ vantungmi khat hong kilang a, Topa’ minthanna vang in amaute hong taan ahih manin a lau mahmah uh hi." 
Luke2:10 Ahi zongin vantungmi in, “Lau kei un. Mi khempeuh a lungdamsak ding thuthak hoih khat note a’ ding ka hong puak hi." 
Luke2:11 Tuni-in David khuapi sungah, note a hong honkhia ding Khrih Topa a suak hi." 
Luke2:12 Amah na theih nading uh a lim hih bang hi ding hi: Puan tawh kitun naungek khat, gan annekna kuang sungah a kisial na mu ding uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Luke2:13 Tua khit phetin tua vantungmi tawh vantung mihonpite thakhatin hong omin Pasian phatna la sa uh a," 
Luke2:14 “Van a sang belna-ah a om Pasian’ min thang hen la, ama pahtak leitung mite tungah nopna om ta hen,” a ci uh hi." 
Luke2:15 Vantung mite vantungah a ciahkik khit uh ciangin tuucingte in, “Bethlehem khua-ah pai-in, Topa’ hong gen hih thupiang va en ni,” a kici uh hi." 
Luke2:16 Amaute nawhpai mahmah uh a, Mary le Josef le gan annekna kuang sungah a kisial naungek a mupah uh hi." 
Luke2:17 Tua bangin naungek a muh uh ciangin, vantungmi in amaute kiangah hih naungek tawh kisai thu a gente a gensawn uh hi." 
Luke2:18 Hih tuucingte’ thugen a za mi khempeuh in lamdang a sa uh hi. 
Luke2:19 Mary in ahihleh a lungsimah hih thute ciamtehin a ngaihsunsun hi. 
Luke2:20 Tuucingte zong ciahkik uh a, amaute tungah a kigensa bangin a zaksa le a muhsa uh thute hangin Pasian’ min a phat uh hi." 
Luke2:21 Naungek a vun a ki-at ni hun nipikal khat a cin khit ciangin, amah a kipaii ma-in a min dingin vantungmi in a piaksa ahi Jesuh, a min dingin a phuak uh hi." 
Luke2:22 Moses Thukham sungah a kigelhna tawh kizui-in Josef le Mary a kisiansuah ding uh hun hong tung hi. Tua ahih manin Topa tungah naungek a ap dingin Jerusalem-ah a paipih uh hi. 
Luke2:23 Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa’ Thukham sungah, “Ta pasal masa peuhmah Topa tungah ki-ap ding hi,” ci-in kigelh hi." 
Luke2:24 Topa Thukham sungah a kigelhna tawh kizui-in biakna-in vakhu nih ahi a, kawl vakhuno nih ahi zongin a pia dingin zong a pai uh ahi hi." 
Luke2:25 Jerusalem khua sungah Simeon a kici mi khat na om hi. Amah a thuman, a biakna mi mahmah khat hi a, Israel mite a kihotkhiat hun ding a ngakngak mi khat ahi hi. Kha Siangtho in a ompih mi khat hi a," 
Luke2:26 Topa’ hong ciamsa Khrih a muh matengin a sih loh nading thu zong ama tungah Kha Siangtho in na genkhin hi. 
Luke2:27 Kha Siangtho’ makaihna tawh biakinn sungah Simeon a pai hi. A nu le a pate in thukham sunga om ngeina bangin Topa tungah naungek a ap dingin biakinn-ah a hong paipih uh ciangin," 
Luke2:28 Simeon in naungek la-in a ang-ah tawi-in Pasian’ tungah lungdamna ko a," 
Luke2:29 “Topa aw, na thuciamna tu-in nong tungsak a, na nasempa keima lungsim nong nuamsak hi." 
Luke2:30 Ka mit mahmah tawh nong hotkhiatna ka mukhin a," 
Luke2:31 minam khempeuh’ muhin nong tungsak a," 
Luke2:32 Gentail mite in khuavak a muh nading le nangma mi Israel-te a minthan nadingin na vaihawm hi,” a ci hi." 
Luke2:33 Naungek’ nu le pate in, hih bangin Simeon in naungek’ thu a genna a zak uh ciangin lamdang a sa mahmah uh hi." 
Luke2:34 Tua ciangin Simeon in amaute thupha a piak khit ciangin naungek’ nu Mary kiangah, “Hih naungek pen, Israel mite sungah mi tampi in siatna a ngah nading, le mi tampi in hotkhiatna a ngah nading ahi hi. Mi tampi in hih naungek nial ding uh a," 
Luke2:35 mite’ lungsimtawng a kilatna hong hi ding hi. Dahna lungkhamna in namsau hiam bangin nangma lungsim mahmah zong hong sunkham ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Luke2:36 Tua laitakin Asher minamte sung panin Fanuel’ tanu Anna minnei kamsang numei khat a om hi. Amah a khangham mahmah khat hi a, a nungak laitakin a neih a pasal tawh kum sagih sung a tenkhop khit ciangin," 
Luke2:37 kum sawmgiat le kum li sung meigongin a om ahi hi. Amah pen biakna a nusia ngei lo mi khat hi a, a sun a zanin Pasian bia-in an tangin thu a ngenngen mi khat ahi hi." 
Luke2:38 Tua bangin Jesuh a ki-ap hun laitakin hih kamsangnu hong pai-in Pasian tungah lungdamna ko a, Jerusalem a suahtak nading lamenin a ngak mi khempeuh tungah hih naungek’ thu a gen hi." 
Luke2:39 Amaute in Topa’ Thukham tawh kizui-in hih ding a kisam khempeuh a bawl khit uh ciangin Galilee gam, amau khua Nazareth-ah a ciahkik uh hi." 
Luke2:40 Tua naupang hong khangin hong thahat hi. Lungpilna tawh kidim a, Pasian in thupha a pia hi." 
Luke2:41 Kumsimin Jerusalem khua-a Paisan Pawi a kibawlna-ah Jesuh’ nu le pa a pai zel uh ahi hi. 
Luke2:42 Jesuh, kum sawm le nih a phak ciangin a ngeina bangin tua pawi-ah a thumun a pai uh hi." 
Luke2:43 Tua pawi vengin a ciahkik uh ciangin Jerusalem khua-ah naupang Jesuh kinusia kha hi. A nu le a pa in a nusiatlam uh thei lo uh hi. 
Luke2:44 Amaute’ honlak mahah a omomin ngaihsun uh ahih manin ni khat lam paikhin uh a, tua ciangin a lawmte le a tanaute lak khawng a zong pan uh hi." 
Luke2:45 Amah a muh zawh loh uh ciangin Jerusalem-ah kileh kikin a zong uh hi. 
Luke2:46 A ciahzawh uh a ni thum ni ciangin biakinn sungah amah mu uh a, siate lakah tu-in a thugen uh ngai-in, thu zong dong zelin a om a mu uh hi." 
Luke2:47 Amah in pilna tawh thu genin a dawnna a za mite khempeuh in lamdangsa mahmah uh hi. 
Luke2:48 A nu le a pa in a muh uh ciangin lamdangsa uh a, a nu in, “Ka ta aw, bang hangin hong hici bawl na hi hiam? Na pa tawh lungkham mahmahin nang ka hong zong uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Luke2:49 Jesuh in a nu le a pa kiangah, “Bang hangin kei hong zong na hi uh hiam? Ka Pa’ inn sungah ka om ding lamtak thei lo na hi uh hiam?” ci-in a dawng hi." 
Luke2:50 Ahi zongin bang a cihnopna ahi hiam, ci-in a nu le a pa in thei lo uh hi." 
Luke2:51 Tua ahih ciangin a nu le a pa zui-in Nazareth khua-ah ciahkik a, amaute’ thu mangin tua lai-ah hoihtakin a om hi. A nu in hih thu khempeuh a lungsim sungah ngaihsunsun hi." 
Luke2:52 Jesuh a pumpi le a pilna khang a, ama gamtatna in Pasian le mite a lungkimsak semsem hi." 
Luke3:1 Gam tampi a uk Sisar Tiberius in a ukzawh a kum sawm le ngana, Pontias Pilat in Judea gam ukin, Herod in Galilee gam ukin, a nau Filip in Iturea gam le Trakhonitis gam ukin, Lysanias in Abilene gam uk a," 
Luke3:1 Gam tampi a uk Sisar Tiberius in a ukzawh a kum sawm le ngana, Pontias Pilat in Judea gam ukin, Herod in Galilee gam ukin, a nau Filip in Iturea gam le Trakhonitis gam ukin, Lysanias in Abilene gam uk a," 
Luke3:2 Annas le Kaiafas in siampi lianpen a sep laitakin sehnel gamah a om, Zekhariah’ tapa Johan’ tungah, Pasian’ thu hong tung hi." 
Luke3:3 Tua ahih ciangin Jordan Gun kiim gam khempeuhah Johan pai kawikawi a, kamsang Isaiah in Lai Siangtho sungah a gelh mah bangin, “Na mawhna panun kisik unla tui kiphum un. Tua hileh Pasian in na mawhnate uh hong maisak ding hi,” ci-in thu a hilh hi." 
Luke3:4 Isaiah in hih bangin na gelh hi: “Gam sungah mi khat kiko a, ‘Topa’ pai nading lampi bawl unla, a tot ding lampi tangsak un." 
Luke3:5 Kuam thuk khempeuh kivukdim ding a, mual lian mual neu khempeuh kitotam ding hi. Lam kawite kitangsak ding a, a leihumte kinelsak ding hi." 
Luke3:6 Mi khempeuh in Pasian’ hotkhiatna ngah ding uh hi,’” ci-in a kigelh hi." 
Luke3:7 Ama tuiphum ding utin a hong pai mi tampite kiangah Johan in, “Gul bangin ngian a zang note aw, hong tung ding Pasian’ hehna panin na suahtak theih nading uh kua in hong gen ahi hiam?" 
Luke3:8 Na kisikna uh a kilat nadingin gamta un. Note khatlekhat in, ‘Abraham’ suante ihi ngawn hi,’ mawkcih kei un. Ke’n kong cihin-ah, Pasian in hih suangte nangawn Abraham’ suanlekhakte-in bawl thei lel hi." 
Luke3:9 Tu mahmahin sing a bulphuk dingin hei tawh kingimzo hi. Gah hoih a gah lo singkung khempeuh kiphukin meikhuk sungah kikhul ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Luke3:10 Tua ciangin mihonpite in, “Tua bang ahihleh bangci gamtat ding ka hi uh hiam?” ci-in a dot uh ciangin" 
Luke3:11 Johan in, “Puanak nih a nei mipa in a nei lote hawm unla, annek ding a neite in a nei lote hawm un,” ci-in a dawng hi." 
Luke3:12 Siahdongte pawlkhat zong tui a kiphum dingin hong pai-in Johan kiangah, “Sia aw, bangci gamtat ding ka hi uh hiam?” ci-in a dong uh hi." 
Luke3:13 Amah in, “Na don’ dingun a kilawm zahval na dong kei un,” ci-in a dawng hi." 
Luke3:14 Galkap pawlkhatte in zong ama kiangah, “Kote, bangci gamtat ding ka hi uh hiam?” ci-in a dot uh ciangin, “Zawhthawh thu tawh ahi a, a man lopi-in mawhsakna tawh ahi zongin kuama sum sut kei unla, na khasum ngahzah uh tawh lungkim un,” ci-in a dawng hi." 
Luke3:15 Thulian khat peuhpeuh hong piang ding hi, ci-in mite’ lawpna hong khang semsem a, hih pa pen Khrih hi kha ding hi, ci-in mite in a lungsim uhah a ngaihsun uh hi." 
Luke3:16 Tua ahih ciangin Johan in amaute kiangah, “Keimah in tui sungah note ka hong phum hi; ahi zongin kei sangin nakpitakin a lianzaw khat hong pailai ding hi. Ama khedap khau a sutsak ding nangawnin kei ka kilawmzo nai kei hi. Amah in Kha Siangtho le mei sungah note hong phum ding hi." 
Luke3:17 A buh cilsate a zapsiang nadingin amah in a khut sungah lawhpi tawi a, a takteng ansal sungah koihin, a siteng a mit ngei lo mei sungah a khul ding hi,” ci-in a gen hi." 
Luke3:18 Tua bangin a lam tuamtuamin Johan in mite hanthawnin Lungdamna Thu a hilh hi. 
Luke3:19 Ahi zongin, gam ukpa Herod in ama naupa’ zi Herodias a tenpihna hang le a gamtat hoih lohna a tuamtuamte’ hangin Johan in Herod a taii hi." 
Luke3:20 Tua ciangin Herod in thong sungah Johan khia a, a gamtatsiatna a behlap lailai hi." 
Luke3:21 Mi khempeuh a kituiphum khit uh ciangin Jesuh zong a kituiphum hi. Jesuh in thu a nget laitakin vantung kihong a," 
Luke3:22 vakhu pumpi lim nei-in Kha Siangtho ama tungah hong kumsuk hi. Tua laitakin vantung panin aw khat hong ging a, “Nang pen ka it ka Tapa na hi a, nangma tungah ka lungkim mahmah hi,” a ci hi." 
Luke3:23 Nasep a kipat ciangin Jesuh ama khan kum sawmthum bang a pha hi. Mite in ama pa Josef hi, ci-in a ngaihsun uh hi. Josef’ pa Heli," 
Luke3:24 Heli’ pa Matthat, Matthat’ pa Levi, Levi’ pa Melkhi, Melkhi’ pa Jannai, Jannai’ pa Josef," 
Luke3:25 Josef’ pa Mattathias, Mattathias’ pa Amos, Amos’ pa Nahum, Nahum’ pa Esli, Esli’ pa Naggai," 
Luke3:26 Naggai’ pa Maath, Maath’ pa Mattathias, Mattathias’ pa Semein, Semein’ pa Josek, Josek’ pa Joda," 
Luke3:27 Joda’ pa Joanan, Joanan’ pa Resa, Resa’ pa Zerubbabel, Zerubbabel’ pa Shealtiel, Shealtiel’ pa Neri," 
Luke3:28 Neri’ pa Melkhi, Melkhi’ pa Addi, Addi’ pa Kosam, Kosam’ pa Elmadam, Elmadam’ pa Er," 
Luke3:29 Er’ pa Joshua, Joshua’ pa Eliezer, Eliezer’ pa Jorim, Jorim’ pa Matthat, Matthat’ pa Levi," 
Luke3:30 Levi’ pa Simeon, Simeon’ pa Judah, Judah’ pa Josef, Josef’ pa Jonam, Jonam’ pa Eliakim," 
Luke3:31 Eliakim’ pa Melea, Melea’ pa Menna, Menna’ pa Mattatha, Mattatha’ pa Nathan, Nathan’ pa David," 
Luke3:32 David’ pa Jessi, Jessi’ pa Obed, Obed’ pa Boaz, Boaz’ pa Salmon, Salmon’ pa Nahshon," 
Luke3:33 Nahshon’ pa Amminadab, Amminadab’ pa Admin, Admin’ pa Hezron, Hezron’ pa Perez, Perez’ pa Judah," 
Luke3:34 Judah’ pa Jakob, Jakob’ pa Isaac, Isaac’ pa Abraham, Abraham’ pa Terah, Terah’ pa Nahor," 
Luke3:35 Nahor’ pa Serug, Serug’ pa Reu, Reu’ pa Peleg, Peleg’ pa Eber, Eber’ pa Shelah," 
Luke3:36 Shelah’ pa Kainan, Kainan’ pa Arpakshad, Arpakshad’ pa Shem, Shem’ pa Noah, Noah’ pa Lamek," 
Luke3:37 Lamek’ pa Methuselah, Methuselah’ pa Enok, Enok’ pa Jared, Jared’ pa Mahalaleel, Mahalaleel’ pa Kainan," 
Luke3:38 Kainan’ pa Enos, Enos’ pa Seth, Seth’ pa Adam, Adam’ pa Pasian ahi hi." 
Luke4:1 Kha Siangtho tawh a kidimin Jordan gun panin Jesuh hong ciahkik a, Kha Siangtho in gamlakah paipihin," 
Luke4:2 Dawimangpa in ni sawmli sung a ze-et hi. Tua hun sung Jesuh in bangmah ne lo a, tua ze-etna hun a bei ciangin a gil kial mahmah hi." 
Luke4:3 Dawimangpa in Jesuh kiangah, “Pasian’ Tapa na hih takpi leh hih suang anlum suaksak in,” a ci hi." 
Luke4:4 Jesuh in, “Lai Siangtho sungah, ‘Anlum bek tawh mite nungta zo lo hi,’ ci-in kigelh hi lo ahi hiam?” ci-in a dawng hi." 
Luke4:5 Tua ciangin Dawimangpa in Jesuh paipihto a, thakhat thu-in leitung kumpi gam khempeuh a lah khit ciangin," 
Luke4:6 “Hihte khempeuh keima tungah hong kipia khin ahih manin, ka piaknop peuhpeuh tungah ka pia thei hi. Hih vangliatna le hauhnate khempeuh nangma tungah kong pia ding hi." 
Luke4:7 Keima mai-ah kunin hong bia lecin hihte khempeuh nangma a’ hi ding hi,” a cih ciangin" 
Luke4:8 Jesuh in, “Lai Siangtho in, ‘Topa Pasian na bia inla, ama na bek sem in,’ ci hi lo ahi hiam?” ci-in a dawng hi." 
Luke4:9 Tua ciangin Dawimangpa in gamlak panin Jerusalem khua-ah Jesuh paipih a, biakinn khumzang a sangpenna munah a kahtohpih khit ciangin, “Pasian’ Tapa taktak na hih leh hih lai panin tuaksuk in." 
Luke4:10 Bang hang hiam cih leh Lai Siangtho in, ‘Pasian in nang a hong kem dingin a vantung mite hong sawl ding hi,’ ci-in a gen banah," 
Luke4:11 ‘Na khete nangawn suang tawh kitatin a liam khak loh nadingin vantung mite in a khut uh tawh nang hong dom ding uh hi,’ zong ci lai hi,” a cih ciangin" 
Luke4:12 Jesuh in, “Lai Siangtho in, ‘Topa na Pasian na ze-et kei in,’ ci hi,” ci-in a dawng hi." 
Luke4:13 Dawimangpa in a hihtheihna khempeuhah Jesuh a ze-et khit ciangin tawlkhat sung a nusia phot hi. 
Luke4:14 Tua ciangin Kha Siangtho vangliatna tawh a kidimin Galilee gamah Jesuh a ciahkik hi. Tua kiima om gam khempeuhah ama thu kizakim hi. 
Luke4:15 Jesuh in amaute’ kikhopna innte-ah thu hilh a, mi khempeuh in amah a phatkim uh hi." 
Luke4:16 Tua ciangin ama khanna Nazareth khua-ah Jesuh pai a, Sabbath ni ciangin a paingei bangin kikhopna inn-ah a pai hi. Lai Siangtho a sim dingin amah ding a," 
Luke4:17 a nget bangin a sim dingin kamsang Isaiah Lai Siangtho bu a kipia hi. A laibu lemin a simnopna mun a zon ciangin a nuai-a bangin a kigelhna mun mu-in a sim hi. Tua munah," 
Luke4:18 “Gimna a thuak mite tungah Lungdamna Thu a hilh dingin Topa in kei hong sehkhin ahih manin keima sungah Topa’ kha hong om hi. Salin a kimante tungah suahtakna thu a gen ding, mittawte in khua a muhkik theih nading, a kinengniamte a suaktasak ding le" 
Luke4:19 Topa in a mite a hotkhiat ding kum a pulak dingin kei hong sawl hi,” ci-in a kigelh hi." 
Luke4:20 Hih thu a kigelhna munteng a simkhit ciangin a laibu khupin biakinn nasempa tungah pia kikin a tu hi. Kikhopna inn sungah a om mi khempeuh in limtakin amah a en uh hi. 
Luke4:21 Tua ciangin amaute tungah thugen ding kipan a, “Note’ zakin a hong kisim Lai Siangtho thu, tuni-in a hong tung hi,” a ci hi." 
Luke4:22 Amaute khempeuh in Jesuh thupi sa mahmah uh a, thugen siam sa mahmah uh ahih manin, “Hih pa, Josef’ tapa hi lel hi lo ahi hiam?” a ci uh hi." 
Luke4:23 Tua ciangin Jesuh in amaute kiangah, “Paunak khatah, ‘Zato pa aw, nangmah kidamsak tawm in,’ a cihna thu kei tungah nong cihnop ding uh ka thei hi. ‘Kapernaum khua-ah na bawl thu ka zakte uh zong hih lai na khua-ah hong bawl in,’ zong nong cinuam ding uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Luke4:24 Tua ciangin Jesuh in a thugen zomlai a, “Ke’n kong cihin-ah, kamsang a kuamah peuh ama khua-ah kipakta ngei lo hi." 
Luke4:25 A taktakin ci lehang, Elijah’ hun lai-in kum thum le alang sung guah zu lo a, gam sung khempeuhah kialpi a tun hun laitakin Israel gam sungah meigong numei tampi tak om hi." 
Luke4:26 Ahi zongin tua numei tampite khat beek kiangah Elijah kisawl lo a, Sidon gam Zarefath khua-a om meigongnu kiang bekah kisawl hi." 
Luke4:27 Kamsang Elisha’ hun laitakin Israel gam sungah miphak tampi om a, ahi zongin kuamah in damna ngah loin, Syria mi Naaman bek in damna ngah hi,” a ci hi." 
Luke4:28 Hih thu a zak uh ciangin kikhopna innsunga om mi khempeuh a heh mahmah uh hi. 
Luke4:29 Amaute dingin khuanawlah Jesuh paipih uh a, khuanawl keenah a bungbu sawnkhiat dingin a paipih uh hi." 
Luke4:30 Ahi zongin amaute’ lak nawkin Jesuh a paikhia hiau hi. 
Luke4:31 Tua ciangin Galilee gam Kapernaum khua-ah paisuk a, Sabbath ni-in thu a hilh hi." 
Luke4:32 Amah in aana neite bangin thu gen ahih manin amaute in lamdang a sa mahmah uh hi. 
Luke4:33 Kikhopna inn sungah dawivei mi khat om a, nakpitakin kiko-in," 
Luke4:34 “Nazareth khuami Jesuh aw, kote tawh bang kisai ihi hiam? Kote a susia dingin hong pai na hi hiam? Pasian’ mi siangtho na hih lamtak ka hong thei uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Luke4:35 Jesuh in tua dawi taii a, “Pau kei inla, ama sung panin paikhia in,” ci-in thu a pia hi. Dawi in a mipa mihon lakah a puksak khit ciangin ama sung panin paikhia a, ahi zongin liamsak lo hi." 
Luke4:36 Kikhopna innsunga a om mi khempeuh in lamdangsa mahmah uh a, “Hih a kampaute a bangci kampau ahi hiam? Aana le vang neihna tawh dawi thu pia a, dawite a taikhia uh hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Luke4:37 Hih Jesuh’ thu tua gam mun khempeuhah a kiza hi. 
Luke4:38 Kikhopna inn panin Jesuh paikhia-in Simon’ inn-ah a lut hi. Simon’ sungnu nattunin na gim mahmah a, hih ama natna thu Jesuh kiangah a gensak uh hi." 
Luke4:39 Jesuh zong pai-in a lupna gei-ah ding a, a cinatna a taii ciangin a nattutna dampah a, amah zong thozo pahin a zinte a dozo pah hi." 
Luke4:40 Ni a tumkhit ciangin natna tuamtuam a nei mi khempeuh Jesuh kiangah hong paipih uh a, Jesuh in amaute khempeuh tungah a khut nga-in a damsak hi." 
Luke4:41 Mi tampi sung panin dawite zong taikhia uh a, “Nang pen Pasian’ Tapa na hi hi,” ci-in a kiko uh hi. Amah pen Khrih ahihlam thei uh ahih manin amaute taii-in pausak lo hi." 
Luke4:42 Khua a vak ciangin khuasung panin gamdaihna munah Jesuh a paikhia hi. Mite in amah zong uh a, a muh uh ciangin amah a taam lai nadingin a kho uh hi." 
Luke4:43 Ahi zongin amah in, “Pasian’ Ukna hangin Lungdamna Thu a hilh ding mahin a hong kisawl ahih manin khua dangte-ah zong ka va hilh ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Luke4:44 Tua ahih manin Galilee gam sunga om kikhopna innte-ah thuhilhin a om hi. 
Luke5:1 Khatvei, Gennesaret Tuili gei-ah Jesuh dingin a om laitakin, mite in Pasian’ thu zanuamin Jesuh hong nehcip uh hi." 
Luke5:2 Jesuh in tui gei-ah gunkuang nih a om a mu hi. Tua gunkuang nei ngasa bengte a gunkuang panun tuakkhia-in tui sungah a ngente a sawp uh hi. 
Luke5:3 Tua gunkuangte sung panin Simon’ gunkuang sungah Jesuh tuang a, lei tawh tawm a kigamla zek dingin a gunkuang tawm a hawh nadingin Simon kiangah a gen hi. Tua ciangin gunkuang sungah tu a, tua lai panin thu a hilh hi." 
Luke5:4 Thuhilh a tawp ciangin Simon kiangah, “Tui thukna lamah na gunkuang hot inla, na ngen tawh ngasa khuh in,” a ci hi." 
Luke5:5 Tua ciangin Simon in, “Sia aw, tu zanthapai ngasa ka khuh uh hangin khat zong ka man kei uh hi. Ahi zongin khuh in, nong cih leh, ka khuh ding hi,” ci-in a dawng hi." 
Luke5:6 A ngen a khuh le ngasa tampi tak awk a, a ngen kikeek dektak hi." 
Luke5:7 A gunkuang dang khatah a om a lawmte hong pai-in a huh nadingun a khut uh a van uh hi. Amaute zong hong pai uh a, gunkuang tegel sungah ngasa a dimtakin guang uh ahih manin a gunkuang tum dektak hi." 
Luke5:8 Simon Peter in hih thu a muh ciangin Jesuh’ mai-ah khukdin a, “Topa aw, kei mawhnei mi ka hih manin ka kiang panin paikhia in,” a ci hi." 
Luke5:9 Tua zahin ngasa tampi a matna hangun amah le a lawmte in lamdang a sa mahmah uh hi. 
Luke5:10 Tua mah bangin Simon’ lawmte ahi, Zebedi’ tapa James le Johan-te in zong lamdang a sa uh hi. Jesuh in Simon kiangah “Lau kei in. Tu a kipanin ngasa mat bangin mi tampi a huai pa na suak ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Luke5:10 Tua mah bangin Simon’ lawmte ahi, Zebedi’ tapa James le Johan-te in zong lamdang a sa uh hi. Jesuh in Simon kiangah “Lau kei in. Tu a kipanin ngasa mat bangin mi tampi a huai pa na suak ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Luke5:11 Tui gei-ah a gunkuangte uh a tunpih khit uh ciangin a na khempeuh uh nusia-in Jesuh a zui uh hi. 
Luke5:12 Khatvei, khuasung khatah Jesuh a om laitakin tua khua sungah a pumtangin phaknatna a vei mi khat a om hi. A phakpa in Jesuh a muh ciangin a mai-ah bokin, “Topa aw, hong damsak nuam peuh lecin kei nong damsak thei ding hi,” ci-in a thum hi." 
Luke5:13 Jesuh in zong a khut zanin amah lawng a, “Kong damsak nuam hi; dam ta in,” ci-in a dawng hi. Tua khit phetin a phaknatna a dampah hi." 
Luke5:14 Tua ciangin Jesuh in ama kiangah, “Hih thu kuamah dang kiangah gen kei in. Siampipa kiangah paisuakpah inla kivelsak in. Tua ciangin na damna thu a kilat nadingin Moses thupiak mah bangin biakna pia in,” ci-in thu a pia hi." 
Luke5:15 Ahi zongin Jesuh’ thu kitheithang semsem zawsop a, ama thu a ngai ding le a natna panun damna a ngah nadingun mi tampi tak a hong pai uh hi." 
Luke5:16 Ahi zongin gamdaihna munah Jesuh paikhia-in thu a ngen hi. 
Luke5:17 Khatvei, Jesuh in thu hilhin a om laitakin Galilee gam, Judea gam, le Jerusalem khua panin a hong pai Farisi mi pawlkhat le Thukham hilh siate pawlkhat hong om hi. Cina damsak theih nading Topa’ vangliatna, Jesuh tungah kipia hi." 
Luke5:17 Khatvei, Jesuh in thu hilhin a om laitakin Galilee gam, Judea gam, le Jerusalem khua panin a hong pai Farisi mi pawlkhat le Thukham hilh siate pawlkhat hong om hi. Cina damsak theih nading Topa’ vangliatna, Jesuh tungah kipia hi." 
Luke5:18 Mi pawlkhat in khutlekhezaw mi khat a lupna pheek tawh hong pua uh a, inn sungah paipihin Jesuh mai-ah koih ding a hanciam uh hi." 
Luke5:19 Mihon tamlua ahih manin a lutpih nading uh lampi om lo hi. Tua ahih ciangin innkhum zangah kahpihto-in innkhum hong let uh a, mihonte’ lak, Jesuh’ omna mai sanah a lupna pheek tawh a khaisuk uh hi." 
Luke5:20 Jesuh in amaute’ upna a muh ciangin a mipa kiangah, “Lawm aw, na mawhnate hong kimaisak khinta hi,” a ci hi." 
Luke5:21 Tua ciangin Thukham hilh siate le Farisi mite in a lungsim sung uhah, “Hih bangin Pasian tawh a kikimin a pau ngam mipa kua ahi hiam? Mihing kuamah in mawhna maisak thei lo a, Pasian bek in maisak thei hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Luke5:22 Jesuh in amaute’ ngaihsutna thei ahih manin amaute kiangah, “Bang hangin tua bangin ngaihsun na hi uh hiam?" 
Luke5:23 ‘Na mawhnate hong kimaisak hi,’ cih ding baihzaw ahi hiam, tua ahih kei leh, ‘Tho inla, lam pai in,’ cih ding baihzaw ahi hiam?" 
Luke5:24 Mihing Tapa in mawhna maisak theih nading leitungah vangliatna nei hi, ci-in na theih nadingun kong lak ding hi,” a ci hi. Tua ahih ciangin khutlekhezaw mipa kiangah, “Tho inla na lupna pheek pua-in na inn-ah ciah in,” a ci hi." 
Luke5:25 Thakhat thu-in amaute khempeuh’ muhin a mipa zong tho-in a lupna pheek la a, Pasian phatkawmin a inn-ah a ciah hi." 
Luke5:26 Tua ciangin amaute khempeuh in lamdangsa mahmah uh a, lau mahmah kawmin Pasian phatin, “Tuni-in a lamdang mahmah na khat i mu hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Luke5:27 Tua khit ciangin Jesuh paikhia a, siahdongpa Levi, a zumah a tu a mu hi. Jesuh in, “Kei hong zui in,” a ci hi." 
Luke5:28 Levi zong dingpah a, a na khempeuh nusia-in Jesuh a zui hi." 
Luke5:29 Tua ciangin Levi in ama inn-ah Jesuh vakna annek pawipi bawl a, annekna sabuai-ah siahdong dang tampite le midangte zong tawh a tukhawm uh hi." 
Luke5:30 Farisi mite le amau sung panin Thukham hilh siate, nungzuite tungah phun uh a, “Bang hangin siahdongte le thukham khial mite tawh an nekhawm na hi uh hiam?” a ci uh hi." 
Luke5:31 Tua ciangin Jesuh in, “Cidamte in siavuan kisam lo uh a, cina mite bek in kisam uh hi." 
Luke5:32 Mite in a zahtak mihoihte a kisik nadingun a sam dingin hong pai ka hi kei a, mite in a pampaih mite a kisik nadingun a sam dingin a hong pai ka hi hi,” ci-in a dawng hi." 
Luke5:33 Tua ciangin amaute pawlkhat in Jesuh kiangah, “Johan’ nungzuite in an tangin thu ngen zelzel uh a, Farisi mite’ nungzuite zong tua bangmahin gamta napi-in, bang hangin nangma nungzuite in tang loin om se uh ahi hiam?” ci-in a dong uh hi." 
Luke5:34 Jesuh in amaute kiangah, “Mopawi-ah zineipa le pawisimte a omkhawm laitakin a pawisimte an tangsak thei ding na hi uh hiam?" 
Luke5:35 Amaute kiang panin zineipa a kipaikhiatpih hun hong tung ding a, tua hun ciangin tang ding uh hi,” ci-in a dawng hi." 
Luke5:36 Tua ciangin Jesuh in thugentehna dang khat zong gen a, “Mi khat in puan thak khat eukhia-in puan lui thuapna-in nei lo hi. Tua bangin hih leh a puan thak pen a keeksak suak ding a, a puan thak eukhiat zong a puan lui tawh etlawm lo ding hi." 
Luke5:37 Kuamah in savun um lui sungah leenggahzu a thak thun ngei lo hi. Thun zenzen leh leenggahzu thak in a savun um phukham ding a, a leenggahzu bua-in, a savun um zong kisia ding hi." 
Luke5:38 Tua ahih manin savun um thak sungah leenggahzu thak a kikoih ding ahi hi. 
Luke5:39 Kuamah in leenggahzu lui a nek khit ciangin a thak nenuam nawn lo hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh amah in, ‘A lui khumzaw hi,’ ci hi,” a ci hi." 
Luke6:1 Sabbath ni khatin mangbuh lo nawkin Jesuh le a nungzuite a pai uh hi. A nungzuite in mangbuhvuite zut uh a, a khutsung uhah nuai-in a ne uh hi." 
Luke6:2 Amaute lakah a om Farisi mite pawlkhat in, “Sabbath ni-in i hih dingin a kilawm lo gamtatna bang hangin gamta na hi uh hiam?” a ci uh hi." 
Luke6:3 Tua ciangin Jesuh in amaute kiangah, “David le a kikholhpihte a gilkial laitakun David’ gamtatna thu sim ngei lo na hi uh hiam?" 
Luke6:4 Pasian’ inn sungah amah lut a, siampite lobuang midangte’ nek ding ahi lo Ompihna Anlum la-in ne a, ama kikholhpihte zong a nesak hi,” ci-in a dawng hi." 
Luke6:5 Tua ciangin Jesuh in, “Mihing Tapa pen Sabbath ni a Ukpa ahi hi,” ci-in a thugen a khum hi." 
Luke6:6 Sabbath a ni dang khatin kikhopna inn khatah Jesuh pai-in thu a hilh hi. A khut taklam a zaw mi khat tua lai-ah na om hi. 
Luke6:7 Thukham hilh siate le Farisi mite pawlkhat in Jesuh a mawhsak theih nading uh thu zong nuam uh ahih manin, Sabbath ni-in hih mipa a damsak hiam, ci-in na encik gige uh hi." 
Luke6:8 Ahi zongin Jesuh in amau’ ngaihsutna thei ahih manin a khutzaw mipa kiangah, “Ding inla, mihonte mai hih lai munah hong pai in,” a ci hi. A mipa zong hong pai-in mihon mai-ah a hong ding hi." 
Luke6:9 Tua ciangin Jesuh in amaute kiangah, “Note tungah thu khat kong dong nuam hi. Sabbath ni-in a pha bawl ding le a sia bawl ding koi kilawmzaw a, mi khat’ nuntakna suahtaksak ding le siatsak ding koi hoihzaw ahi hiam?” a ci hi." 
Luke6:10 Amaute khempeuh a et kawikawi khit ciangin a mipa kiangah, “Na khut zan in,” a ci hi. Amah in zong a khut zan a, a ngeina bangin a khut hong damkik hi." 
Luke6:11 Ahi zongin amaute heh mahmah uh a, Jesuh a suktheih nading uh khatlekhat a kikumpah uh hi." 
Luke6:12 Ni khat, thungen dingin mualtungah Jesuh pai a, zan tawntung Pasian kiangah thu ngenin a om hi." 
Luke6:13 Khua a vak ciangin a nungzuite sam a, amaute sung panin sawm le nih teelkhia-in sawltakte ci-in min a phuak hi." 
Luke6:14 Tuate in: Simon (Peter ci-in min a phuah pa) le a naupa Andru, James le a nau Johan, Filip, Bartholomew," 
Luke6:14 Tuate in: Simon (Peter ci-in min a phuah pa) le a naupa Andru, James le a nau Johan, Filip, Bartholomew," 
Luke6:15 Matthai, Thomas, Alfeas’ tapa James, Simon (gam khual pa)," 
Luke6:15 Matthai, Thomas, Alfeas’ tapa James, Simon (gam khual pa)," 
Luke6:16 James’ tapa Judas, le Jesuh a lehhek pa Iskariot’ tapa Judas ahi uh hi." 
Luke6:16 James’ tapa Judas, le Jesuh a lehhek pa Iskariot’ tapa Judas ahi uh hi." 
Luke6:17 Tua mualtung panin Jesuh le a nungzui teelte paisuk uh a, a nung a zui midang tampite tawh mun zang khatah a ding hi. Jerusalem khua le Judea gam khempeuh le tuipi gei-a om Taia khua le Sidon khuapite panin a hong pai mihon tampi zong hong om uh hi." 
Luke6:17 Tua mualtung panin Jesuh le a nungzui teelte paisuk uh a, a nung a zui midang tampite tawh mun zang khatah a ding hi. Jerusalem khua le Judea gam khempeuh le tuipi gei-a om Taia khua le Sidon khuapite panin a hong pai mihon tampi zong hong om uh hi." 
Luke6:18 Tua mite pen ama thuhilhna a ngai ding le a natna uh panin damna a ngahnop manun a hong pai uh ahi hi. Dawi a vei mite zong hong pai uh a, damna a ngah uh hi." 
Luke6:19 Jesuh’ tung panin vangliatna paikhia-in mi khempeuh damsak ahih manin mi khempeuh in amah lawn’ ding a hanciam uh hi. 
Luke6:20 Tua ciangin Jesuh in a nungzuite en a, “No mizawngte Pasian’ Ukna sungah om na hih manun thupha ngah mi na hi uh hi." 
Luke6:21 Tuhunin a gilkial note nidang ciangin na gil uh a vah ding hi. Tuhunin a dah note nidang ciangin na nuam ding uh hi. 
Luke6:22 “Mihing Tapa’ hangin mite in hong mudahin hong tuamkoih a, hong simmawhin migiloin hong seh ciangin thupha ngah na hi uh hi." 
Luke6:23 Vantungah na thaman ding uh lian mahmah ahih manin tua bang na tuah uh ciangin nuamin lungdamin na diang un. Bang hang hiam cih leh a pu a pate un zong tua bangmahin kamsangte tungah a bawl uh hi. 
Luke6:24 “Ahi zongin tuhunin a hau note in nopsakna ngahkhin na hih manun gimna na thuak ding uh hi. 
Luke6:25 Tuhunin a gilvah note in gilkial gimna na thuak ding uh hi. Tuhunin a lungdam note dahin na kap ding uh hi. 
Luke6:26 “Mi khempeuh in note hong pahtakbawl ciangin gimna a thuak ding na hi uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh a pu a pate un zong tua bangmahin kamsang zuaute a pahtakbawl uh hi. 
Luke6:27 “Ahi zongin ka thugen a za note kiangah kong cihin-ah: Na galte uh na it unla, no hong mudah mite tungah a pha na bawl un." 
Luke6:28 No hong phuisamte thupha na pia unla, no hong bawlsiate a’ ding thu na ngetsak un." 
Luke6:29 Na paang langkhat a hong bengte, a langkhat zong na dawhlai un. Na puantungsilh uh a hong sutte tungah, na puansungsilh uh zong na piathuah lai un." 
Luke6:30 A hong ngente peuhmah na pia unla, na na uh a hong laksakte tung panin lakik kei un." 
Luke6:31 Note tungah a hong kibawl ding na deih uh bangin midangte tungah na bawl un. 
Luke6:32 “No hong itte bek it le-uhcin bang hangin thupha ngah ding na hi uh hiam? Mawhnei mite nangawn in amau a itte a it uh hi. 
Luke6:33 No tungah a hoihin a hong gamtate tung bekah a hoihin gamta le-uh cin bang hangin thupha ngah ding na hi uh hiam? Mawhneite nangawn tua bangmahin gamta uh hi. 
Luke6:34 Ngahkik ding na lametna uh mite tung bekah leitawi na piak uhleh bang hangin thupha ngah ding na hi uh hiam? Mawhneite nangawn in zong a piakzah mah uh a ngahkik dingin khatlekhat kileitawi uh hi. 
Luke6:35 Tua bang lelin note na gamta kei ding uh hi. Na galte uh itin amaute tungah thupha bawl unla, lohkik ding lamen loin leitawi pia un. Tua hileh na thaman uh lian ding a, a Lianpen Pasian’ tate na hi ding uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh lungdamna mel a theithei lo mite le a huaiham mite tungah amah migi hi." 
Luke6:36 Tua ahih manin na Pa un hehpihna a neih bangin note in zong hehpihna lungsim nei ta un. 
Luke6:37 “Midangte’ thu khen kei un. Tua hileh no tungah zong Pasian in thu hong khen lo ding hi. Midangte mawhsak kei un. Tua hileh Pasian in note zong hong mawhsak lo ding hi. Midangte’ mawhna maisak un. Tua hi leh Pasian in note’ mawhna zong hong maisak ding hi. 
Luke6:38 Midangte tungah pia un. Tua hileh Pasian in note tungah zong hong pia ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh midangte na piakna uh tawh kizui-in a henhen, a tahtah, a dimletin Pasian in note tungah hong pia ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Luke6:39 Tua ciangin Jesuh in amaute kiangah thugentehna khat zong gen a, “Mittaw khat in mittaw dang khat lam paipih thei lo hi. Paipih zenzen leh a nih tuakun hawkguamah kiakhawm ding uh hi." 
Luke6:40 Sang naupang khat a siapa sangin lianzaw ngei lo hi; a sin ding khempeuh a theihkhit ciangin a siapa tawh kikim pan bek ding hi.” 
Luke6:41 “Bang hangin na mit sungah singluang a tang phawkkha loin na lawmte’ mit sunga ninthem tang etsak na hi hiam? 
Luke6:42 Na mit sunga singluang hong tang nangawn mu lo napi-in, ‘Lawm aw, na mit sunga ninthem tang hong lakkhiatsak ning,’ ci-in na lawmte kiangah bangci gentheih ding na hi hiam? No a kineihkhemte aw, na mit sung uha singluang tang lakhia masa le-uhcin, na lawmte uh mit sunga ninthem tang mu-in na lakhia thei pan ding uh hi.”" 
Luke6:43 “A cidam singkung in gah ginalo gah ngei lo a, a ginalo singkung in gah limci gah ngei lo hi." 
Luke6:44 Singkung khempeuh a gah tawh kithei thei hi. Sialtalling kung panin theigah kilo ngei lo a, lingvom kung panin leenggah kilo ngei lo hi." 
Luke6:45 Mihoih pa in a lungsim sunga thuhoih omteng hong suahkhia a, migilo pa in a lungsim sunga a gitlohna teng hong suahkhia hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh mite pen amau’ lungsim sunga a om bangbang a hong paukhia uh ahi hi." 
Luke6:46 “Bang hangin, ‘Topa aw, Topa aw,’ hong ci napi-in ka hong gente zui lo na hi uh hiam?" 
Luke6:47 Ka kiangah hong pai a, ka thuhilhna za-in a zuite khempeuh pen kua tawh kibang hiam cih leh," 
Luke6:48 suang tungah inn lamin, a khuamkua ding suangsung thukpi tak to-in a phut pa tawh kibang hi. Tui a khan ciangin tui in tua inn a nawk hangin limtakin kilam ahih manin susia zo lo hi." 
Luke6:49 Ahi zongin ka thuhilhna za napi-in a zui lote pen bulkip a nei lo, leilak mawkmawkah inn a lam pa tawh kibang hi. Tuikhang in tua inn a nawk ciangin thakhat thu-in siagawppah a, tua inn pen naksiat mahmah hi,” a ci hi." 
Luke7:1 Jesuh in mite kiangah a thugen dingteng a man khit ciangin Kapernaum khua-ah a pai hi. 
Luke7:2 Tua khua sungah Rom mi galkapbu khat om a, tua bupa in a it mahmah nasem khat a nei hi. Tua a nasempa a ci na-in a si dektak hi." 
Luke7:3 Tua bupa in Jesuh’ thu a zak ciangin, ama kiangah Jew mi upate pawlkhat sawl a, Jesuh hong pai-in a nasempa a damsak nading a thumsak hi." 
Luke7:4 Jesuh kiangah Jew mi upate a tun uh ciangin nakpitakin thum uh a, “Amah na huh dingin a kilawm mahmah mi khat ahi hi." 
Luke7:5 Amah in ei minam hong it mahmah a, kikhop nading inn khat zong hong lamsak hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Luke7:6 Tua ahih manin Jesuh in zong amaute sapna bangin a va zui hi. Jesuh a tun madiakin galkap bupa in Jesuh kiangah a lawmte pawlkhat sawl a, “Topa aw, ka inn-ah nong pai nadingin kei kilawm zo lo ka hih manin hong pai dah hoh in." 
Luke7:7 Nangmah tawh a kimu dingin zong kilawmzo kisa lo ka hih manin keima pumpi kong pai kei hi. Thu pia peuh lecin ka nasempa dam lel ding hi. 
Luke7:8 Kei zong uliante’ khutnuai-ah hong kikoih mi khat ka hi a, keima khutnuai-ah zong galkapte a om hi. Khat kiangah, ‘Pai in,’ ci leng a pai hi. Khat kiangah, ‘Hong pai in,’ ci leng a hong pai hi. Ka nasempa kiangah, ‘Hih na sem in,’ ci leng zong sem hi,” a ci hi." 
Luke7:9 Jesuh in hih thu a zak ciangin lamdangsa mahmah a, amah a zui mihonte lamah kihei-in, “Israel mite lak nangawnah hih bang upna ka mu nai kei hi,” a ci hi." 
Luke7:10 A kamtaite, galkap bupa inn-ah hong tunkik ciangin a nasempa a na damsiang khinta hi." 
Luke7:11 Tua khit a sawt loin Nain khua-ah Jesuh pai a, a nungzuite le mihonpite in zong a zui uh hi." 
Luke7:12 Tua khua kulhkongpi a tun laitakun misi vui-a hong pai mihon tawh a kituak uh hi. A misi pen meigong khat’ tapa khat neihsun hi a, tua khuasung mihon tampite in tua si vuina-ah meigongnu hong zui uh hi." 
Luke7:13 Topa in tua meigongnu a muh ciangin a khasiat suak a, “Kap kei in,” ci-in a khem hi." 
Luke7:14 Tua ciangin pai-in a hankuang va len a, si puate zong a khawlpah uh hi. Tua ciangin Jesuh in, “Tangval aw, tho in, kong ci hi,” a ci hi." 
Luke7:15 Misi pa zong hong tuto-in hong paupah hi. Tua ciangin Jesuh in a nu kiangah a ap hi. 
Luke7:16 Amaute khempeuh in lamdangsa mahmah uh a, Pasian min phatin, “Eite lakah kamsang lian khat hong om khinta a, a mite a honkhia dingin Pasian hong pai khinta hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Luke7:17 Hih Jesuh thu pen Judea gam sung le a kiim gam khempeuhah kizel hi. 
Luke7:17 Hih Jesuh thu pen Judea gam sung le a kiim gam khempeuhah kizel hi. 
Luke7:18 Johan’ nungzuite in hih Jesuh’ thu khempeuh Johan kiangah a gen uh hi. 
Luke7:19 Johan in zong ama nungzuite nih sam a, Topa kiangah amaute paisakin, “Johan in hong pai ding a cih pa mah na hi hiam, tua ahih kei leh adang na lamen lai ding ka hi uh hiam?” ci-in a dong dingin a sawl hi." 
Luke7:20 Jesuh kiangah amaute a tun uh ciangin, “‘Hong pai ding ka cih pa mah na hi hiam, tua ahih kei leh adang na lamen lai ding ka hi uh hiam?’ ci-in a dong dingin Tuiphumpa Johan in hong sawl hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Luke7:21 Tua hun laitak mahmahin natna a tuamtuamte tampi damsakin, dawivei mite sung panin dawite hawlkhia a, mittaw mi tampi khua a musak hi." 
Luke7:22 Tua ahih manin Johan’ kamtaite kiangah, “Va ciahkik unla, na muhsa uh le na zaksa uh thute khempeuh Johan kiangah va gen un. Mittawte in khua muthei a, khebaite lam paithei a, miphakte damkik a, bilngongte in khua zathei kik a, misite kihingsakkik a, mizawngte tungah Lungdamna Thu kihilh hi." 
Luke7:23 Kei hong umte pen a lungdamhuai mahmah ahi hi,” ci-in a dawng hi." 
Luke7:24 Johan’ kamtaite a ciahkik khit ciangin Jesuh in mihonte tungah Johan’ thu gen a, “Johan kiang gamlakah na pai uh ciangin bang a en dingin a pai na hi uh hiam? Huih in a mut awn diamdiam lopa kungte a en ding maw?" 
Luke7:25 Tua ahih kei leh bang a en dingin a pai na hi uh hiam? Puan hoihnono a silh mi khat a en ding maw? A taktakin ci lehang tua bangin puan hoih silh a, nuamtakin a omte pen inn lianpipi sungah teng uh hi." 
Luke7:26 Tua ahihleh bang a en dingin a pai na hi uh hiam? Kamsangpa khat a en dingin a pai na hi uh hiam? Hi hi, kamsangpa a en dingin na pai uh a, kamsang ciang bek hi loin a lianzaw khat na mu uh hi." 
Luke7:27 Bang hang hiam cih leh Lai Siangtho in Johan thu a genna-ah, ‘Hih lai-ah ka kamtai pa om hi. Nangma lampi a hong dingin na mai-ah ka mapaisak ding hi, ci-in Pasian in gen hi,’ ci-in kigelh hi." 
Luke7:28 Johan pen leitung mihing sung khempeuh panin a lianpen ahi hi. Ahi zongin Pasian’ Ukna sunga a om mi a neupen i cihte nangawn Johan sangin lianzaw lai hi,” a ci hi." 
Luke7:29 Siahdongte le midangte khempeuh in hih thu a zak uh ciangin Pasian’ deihna zui-in Johan’ khut sungah tui a kiphum uh hi. 
Luke7:30 Ahi zongin Farisi mite le Thukham hilh siate in Pasian’ deihna nialin Johan khut sungah tui kiphum ding ut lo uh hi. 
Luke7:31 Tua ciangin Jesuh in, “Tuhuna mite bang tawh genteh ding a, bang tawh kibang ci ding ka hi hiam?" 
Luke7:32 Mihon omna lamkabomah a tu naupang a kimawlte tawh kibang uh hi. Naupang honkhat in a lawmte kiangah, ‘Lam nading khuang kong tumsak hangun na lam nuam kei uh a, kahna la ka sak hangun lah na kap nuam tuan kei uh hi,’ a cihte tawh a kibang uh hi." 
Luke7:33 Bang hang hiam cih leh Tuiphumpa Johan hong pai a, amah in zu le an tangin a om ciangin, ‘Dawivei hi,’ a ci uh hi." 
Luke7:34 Mihing Tapa hong pai leuleu a, zune anne-in a om ciangin, ‘Zuhai, anhai pa, siahdongte le midangte in a kikholhpih nop loh mite tawh a kikhawlpa,’ ci leuleu uh hi." 
Luke7:35 Ahi zongin Pasian’ pilna a man ahih lamtak, ama thu a zui mite in kilangsak hi,” a ci hi." 
Luke7:36 Farisi mite khat in a inn-ah an ne dingin Jesuh sam a, Jesuh zong pai-in an ne dingin a tu hi." 
Luke7:37 Tua khua sungah a paktat numei khat om hi. Farisi mipa’ inn-ah Jesuh in an ne-in a omna thu a zak ciangin paknamtui suangngo thawl a dim khat hong paipihin," 
Luke7:38 Jesuh’ nungah tu-in kap a, a khitui tawh Jesuh’ khete kawtsakin a sam tawh nulsak a, a khete namin a sathau puak a nuh hi." 
Luke7:39 Jesuh a sam Farisi mipa in a muh ciangin a lungsim sungah, “Hih pa pen kamsang taktak hileh amah a lawng hih numeinu a bangci mi ahi hiam cih thei ding a, ama gamtat hoih lohna teng zong thei ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Luke7:40 Tua ciangin Jesuh in, “Simon aw, kong gennop khat om hi,” a ci hi. Simon in, “Sia aw, bang hong gennuam na hi hiam?” a cih ciangin" 
Luke7:41 Jesuh in, “Lei a ba mi nih om hi. Khat in ngun peek zanga ba a, a khat in sawmnga ba hi." 
Luke7:42 Amau tegel in a loh zawh loh ciangin a batna pa un a nih tuakun a maisak hi. Hih mi nihte sung panin kua in amah itzaw ding ahi hiam?” a ci hi. 
Luke7:43 Simon in, “Leiba tam a maisakna pa in itzaw dingin ka um hi,” ci-in a dawn ciangin Jesuh in, “Na genna man mahmah hi,” a ci hi." 
Luke7:44 Tua ciangin numei lamah Jesuh kihei a, Simon kiangah, “Hih numei’ gamtatna na mu hiam? Na inn-ah kong pai a, ka khe sil nading tui nong pia kei hi. Ahi zongin amah in a khitui tawh ka khe hong silsak a, a sam tawh hong nulkeusak hi." 
Luke7:45 Nang in napna tawh leengla na hong do kei a, ahi zongin amah in hih lai-ah kong tun a kipanin tu dongin ka khe a nap khawl nai lo hi." 
Luke7:46 Nang in ka lu sathau nong nilhsak kei a, ahi zongin amah in ka khe nangawn sathau namtui hong nuhsak hi." 
Luke7:47 Tua ahih ciangin nang kiangah kong genin-ah, ama mawhna tampi tak a omte kimaisak khin ahih manin amah in a itna nakpitakin a lak hi. Ahi zongin tawmno bek a kimaisakte in a itna uh tawmno bek mahin a lak uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Luke7:48 Tua ciangin Jesuh in numei kiangah, “Na mawhnate hong kimaisak khin hi,” a ci hi." 
Luke7:49 Tua ciangin Jesuh tawh sabuai-ah an a nekhawm midangte in a lungsim sung uhah, “Mawhna nangawn a maisak hih mipa kua ahi hiam?” a ci uh hi." 
Luke7:50 Tua ciangin Jesuh in numei kiangah, “Na upna in nang hong damsak khinta hi; lungnuam takin va ciah in,” a ci hi." 
Luke8:1 Tuazawh tawlkhat khit ciangin khuapite le khuaneute-ah a ban banin Jesuh pai a, Pasian’ Ukna hangin Lungdamna Thu hilhin a vak kawikawi hi. Tua a vak kawikawina-ah nungzui sawm le nihte," 
Luke8:2 le a sungpan dawi a hawlkhiatsakte le natna tuamtuam pan a damsak numei pawlkhat in zong a zui uh hi. Tua numeite: A sung panin dawi sagih a kihawlkhiatna Mary (Magdala khuami Mary a kici nu)," 
Luke8:3 Herod’ khutnuai-a ulian Khuza’ zi Joanna, Susanna, le numei dang tampite hi uh a, amau’ neihsa tawh Jesuh le a nungzuite a huh uh hi." 
Luke8:4 Khua khat khit khua khat panin Jesuh kiangah a hong pai mi hong kibehlaplap a, mi tampi tak hong om ciangin Jesuh in thugentehna khat gen a," 
Luke8:5 “Khaici vawhpa khaici vawh dingin a kuankhia hi. Khaici a vawh ciangin pawlkhatte lampidung tu a, khe tawh kisik gawpin vasate in a ne hi." 
Luke8:6 Pawlkhatte, suang kitawphahna leilak tu a, a po tei hangin leisung a nom tam lo ahih manin a vulkik pah hi." 
Luke8:7 Pawlkhatte, lingbulsum omna leilak tu a, lingte a khan ciangin a deplum hi." 
Luke8:8 Pawlkhatte, leihoihna lak tu-in khang a, a zah zakhat ciang dong a piang hi,” a ci hi. Tua ciangin Jesuh nakpitakin kiko a, “Zak nading bil a neite in hih thu za ta un,” ci-in a thugen a khum hi." 
Luke8:9 Hih thugentehna bang a cihnopna ahi hiam, ci-in a nungzuite in a dot ciangin" 
Luke8:10 Jesuh in, “Pasian’ Ukna thu tawh kisai thusim, note tungah hong kigen hi. Ahi zongin midangte in, en en napi-un a muh loh nading za za napi-un a tel loh nadingun amaute tungah thugentehna tawh thu kigen hi,” a ci hi." 
Luke8:11 Tua ciangin Jesuh in, “Thugentehna a khiatna pen hih bang ahi hi: Khaici pen Pasian’ thu hi." 
Luke8:12 Lamdungah khaici a tukna munte pen Pasian’ thu a zate a cihnopna ahi hi. Tuate in Pasian’ thu a zak hangun a thu um loin, hotkhiatna a ngah loh nadingun Dawimangpa hong pai-in a lakkhiatsak hi." 
Luke8:13 Suang kitawphah leilak a tukna munte pen Pasian’ thu a zak ciangin lungdam takin a sangte a cihna ahi hi. Ahi zongin amaute sungah thuktum lo ahih manin tawlkhat sung bek um uh a, ze-etna hun a tun ciangin a puk uh hi." 
Luke8:14 Lingbulsum omna a tukna munte pen Pasian’ thu za napi-in a nuntakna sung uhah leitung lunghihmawhna, hauhna, le nopsaknate in depgawp ahih manin bangmah a suakkhia zo lote a cihnopna ahi hi." 
Luke8:15 Leihoih a tukna munte pen Pasian’ thu a zak ciangin lungsimtak tawh a thu mangin kip tawntung uh ahih manin amau a dingin man a neite a cihnopna ahi hi,” a ci hi." 
Luke8:16 Tua ciangin Jesuh in, “Mei a vak khit ciangin lawh a khuh ahi a, lupna nuai-ah a koih ahi zongin kuamah om lo hi. Innsungah a lut uh ciangin mite in khua a muhtheih nadingin meivak koihna kho sangah koih bek uh hi." 
Luke8:17 Bang hang hiam cih leh, thusimin a kikoih peuhmah, khatvei teitei thulang a suak lo ding, a kiselcip peuhmah, khatvei teitei a kipholak lo ding, bangmah om lo hi." 
Luke8:18 Tua ahih ciangin thu na ngaih uh ciangin limtakin kingaihsun un. Bang hang hiam cih leh a neisa mipa tungah Pasian in piathuah ding a, a nei lo mipa tung panin themkhat nei-a a kingaihsut nangawn lakkhiatsak ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Luke8:19 Tua laitakin Jesuh’ nu le a naute hong pai uh a, ahi zongin mihon kinehlua uh ahih manin ama kiangah pai thei lo uh hi." 
Luke8:20 Tua ahih manin mi khat in Jesuh kiangah, “Na nu le na naute in nang hong munuam uh a, innpua-ah om uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Luke8:21 Tua ciangin Jesuh in a dawnna-in mihon khempeuh tungah, “Pasian’ thu za a, a zuite khempeuh pen ka nu le ka sanggamte ahi hi,” a ci hi." 
Luke8:22 Nikhat, Jesuh a nungzuite tawh gunkuang tungah tuang a, amaute kiangah, “Tuili galkhatah pai ni,” ci-in a pai uh hi." 
Luke8:23 Tua bangin a pai laitakun Jesuh a ihmu hi. Tui tungah nakpitakin huihpi hong nungin gunkuang sungah tui dim dingin hong kipan a, lauhuai mahmah hi." 
Luke8:24 Nungzuite in Jesuh hong naihin phong uh a, “Topa aw, Topa aw, kote ka si dektak uh hi,” a ci uh hi. Jesuh zong tho-in huihpi le tui kilok a daih nadingin thu pia a, a thupiak bangin hong dai dide pah hi." 
Luke8:25 Tua ciangin Jesuh in a nungzuite kiangah, “Na upna uh koi-ah om khinta ahi hiam?” a ci hi. Ahi zongin amaute lau-in lamdangsa uh a, khatlekhat in, “Hih pa kua ahi hiam? Thu a piak ciangin huihpi le tuihualte nangawn in a thu mang uh hi,” a kici uh hi." 
Luke8:26 Tua ciangin Galilee Tuili galkhat, Gadara gam a tung uh hi." 
Luke8:27 Gunkuang tung panin leilakah Jesuh hong paisuk laitakin tua khuasunga om dawivei mi khat in a na dawn hi. Tua dawivei pa pen sauveipi sung puan silhloin omkhin a, inn-ah zong om loin han lak khawngah om tawntung hi." 
Luke8:28 Jesuh a muh ciangin nakpitakin awngin a mai-ah khukdin a, “A Lian Pasian’ Tapa Jesuh aw, kei bang hong nuammawh na hi hiam? Kei, gim nong piak loh nadingin ka hong thum hi,” ci-in nakpitakin a kiko hi." 
Luke8:29 Hih bangin a cihna pen, ama sung panin dawi a paikhiat nadingin Jesuh in thu a piakna hang ahi hi. Dawi in tua mipa tamveipi tak man a, a khut le a khete sikkhau tawh khihin a kikepcip hangin a sikkhaute peksat a, dawi in gamlakah a paikhiatpih hi." 
Luke8:30 Jesuh in ama kiangah, “Na min bang ahi hiam?” ci-in a dot ciangin, ama sungah dawi tampi lut ahih manin, “A Honpi,” ci-in a dawng hi." 
Luke8:31 Leihawm thukpi sungah amaute a khiat loh nadingin Jesuh kiangah a thum uh hi. 
Luke8:32 Tua laitakin tua kiim mualpang to-ah vok honpi khat gamta-in a om hi. Tua vokte sungah a luttheih nadingun dawite in Jesuh kiangah thum uh a, Jesuh in zong amau’ ngetna bangin a pia hi." 
Luke8:33 Tua ahih manin dawite zong mipa sung panin paikhia-in vokte sungah lut uh a, vokte zong tui gei keen tung khawngah tuaksuk gawpin a vekpi-in tui a kia hi." 
Luke8:34 Vokcingte in hih thupiang a muh uh ciangin amaute tai-in khuasung le gam sung tengah a zasak uh hi. 
Luke8:35 Hih thupiang a en dingin mite hong pai uh a, Jesuh kiang a tun uh ciangin dawi a paikhiatna mipa Jesuh kiangah omin, puan silhin, a pilkikna thu a muh uh ciangin a vekpi-un lamdangsa-in a lau uh hi." 
Luke8:36 Tua thupiang a mu masa mite in dawivei pa a damnazia thute, amaute tungah a na gen uh hi." 
Luke8:37 Tua ciangin Gadara gam kiima om khempeuh lau mahmah uh ahih manin Jesuh a paikhiat nadingin a sawl uh hi. Jesuh zong gunkuang tungah tuangin a ciah hi. 
Luke8:38 Dawi a paikhiatna mipa in Jesuh kiangah, “Kei zong hong zuisak in,” ci-in a thum hi; ahi zongin Jesuh in," 
Luke8:39 “Na inn-ah ciah inla, Pasian in nang a dingin bangzah takin na hong sepsak hiam, cihna thu va gen in,” ci-in a sawlkhia hi. A mipa zong ciah a, ama a dingin Jesuh’ sepsakna thu khempeuh, khuasung tengah a gengen hi." 
Luke8:40 Tuili galkhatah Jesuh hong ciahkik ciangin, ama hong ciahkik ding ngakin om niloh uh ahih manin mite na nuam mahmah uh hi." 
Luke8:41 Tua laitakin kikhopna inn ukpi Jairas a kici mi khat hong pai-in Jesuh’ khe phungah hong khukdin a, ama inn-ah a pai nadingin a thum hi." 
Luke8:42 Bang hang hiam cih leh kum sawm le nih a pha tanu khat a neihsun pen a ci na-in a si dektak hi. Jesuh zong tua inn zuan dingin a pai laitakin mihonpite in zui-in a nehcip uh hi. 
Luke8:43 Tua laitakin kum sawm le nih tawntung siluang natna vei-in, a neih khempeuh siavuante cialna-in a zat hangin kuamah in a damsak zawh loh numei khat," 
Luke8:44 mihonte lak Jesuh nungah hong pai-in Jesuh’ puanmongteep lawngsim a, thakhatin a siluang a kangpah hi." 
Luke8:45 Tua ciangin Jesuh in, “Kua in hong lawng na hi uh hiam?” a ci hi. Kuamah in, “Hong lawng ing,” a cih loh ciangin Peter in, “Topa aw, mi khempeuh in nang hong umcihin hong nehcip uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Luke8:46 Ahi zongin Jesuh in, “Ka sung panin vangliatna a paikhiat lamtak phawk ka hih manin mi khat in hong lawng hi,” a ci hi." 
Luke8:47 Numei in amah a kiphawkna thu a theih ciangin a lingsa-in hong pai-in Jesuh mai-ah hong bok a, Jesuh a lawnna thu le amah a dampahna thuteng, tua lai-a om mi khempeuh’ zakin Jesuh kiangah a pulak hi." 
Luke8:48 Tua ciangin Jesuh in numei kiangah, “Ka tanu aw, na upna in nang hong damsakzo hi; lungnuam takin na ciah in,” a ci hi." 
Luke8:49 Tua bangin thu a gen laitakin kikhopna inn ukpa’ inn panin kamtai khat hong tung a, “Na tanu si khinzo ta hi. Siapa gimsak nawn kei in,” a hong ci hi." 
Luke8:50 Ahi zongin Jesuh in hih thu a zak ciangin, kikhopna inn ukpa kiangah, “Lunghimawh kei in; upna nei peuh lecin na tanu a hingkik ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Luke8:51 Tua inn-ah Jesuh a tun ciangin Peter, Johan, le James le numeino’ nu le pa simloh kuamah dang, inn sungah zuisak lo hi." 
Luke8:51 Tua inn-ah Jesuh a tun ciangin Peter, Johan, le James le numeino’ nu le pa simloh kuamah dang, inn sungah zuisak lo hi." 
Luke8:52 Tua lai-a om mi khempeuh, tua numeino’ sihna hangin kapin, thumin na om uh hi. Ahi zongin Jesuh in, “Kap nawn kei un, amah a si hi lo hi; a ihmu bek ahi hi,” a ci hi." 
Luke8:53 Amah a sihkhitna thei uh ahih manin Jesuh a nuihsan lel uh hi. 
Luke8:54 Ahi zongin Jesuh in numeino a khutin lenin, “Numeino aw, tho in,” a ci hi." 
Luke8:55 Numeino zong hingkik a, thakhatin a thopah hi. Tua ciangin numeino’ nek ding an pia un, ci-in Jesuh in a sawl hi." 
Luke8:56 Numeino’ nu le pa in lamdangsa mahmah uh a, ahi zongin hih thupiangte kuama kiangah a gen loh nadingun Jesuh in a kham hi." 
Luke9:1 Tua ciangin Jesuh in nungzui sawm le nihte sam a, dawite a hawlkhiat theih nading uh le cinate a damsak theih nadingun vangliatna le aana a pia hi." 
Luke9:2 Tua ciangin Pasian’ Ukna thu a hilh ding le cinatnate a damsak dingin kuankhia sakin 
Luke9:3 amaute kiangah, “Tu-a na khualzinna uhah bangmah keng kei un. Ciangkhut ahi a, ip ahi a, an ahi a, sum ahi zongin keng kei unla, puan-ak zong a valin kengthuah kei un." 
Luke9:4 Khua khatpeuhah na lut uh ciangin tua khua panin na paikhiat matengun a inn-ah hong tungsakte’ inn mahah om paisuak un. 
Luke9:5 A inn uhah a hong tunsak nop lohna khua peuhpeuh panin na paikhiat uh ciangin amaute hilhkholhna-in na khe uha leivui bangte sinsan un,” ci-in a vaikhak hi." 
Luke9:6 Nungzuite zong kuankhia uh a, khua khempeuhah pai-in Lungdamna Thu hilh uh a, a paina khempeuh uhah cinate a damsak uh hi." 
Luke9:7 Galilee gam sungteng a uk Herod in hih thupiangte a zak ciangin lungmang mahmah hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh mi pawlkhat in, “Johan hong hingkik hi,” ci uh hi." 
Luke9:8 Pawlkhat in, “Elijah hong kilangkik hi,” ci uh a, pawlkhat in, “Tanglai kamsangte khat hong hingkik hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Luke9:9 Herod in, “Johan a ngawng ka tansak khitsa ahi hi; hih a thu ka zak mipa kua hi ding ahi hiam?” a ci hi. Tua ahih manin Jesuh tawh kimuh ding a hanciam hi." 
Luke9:10 Sawltakte a khualzinna panun a hong tunkik uh ciangin a sepna teng uh Jesuh kiangah a gen uh hi. Jesuh in zong amauteng bek a om theih nadingun amaute samkhia a, Bethsaida khua lamah a paipih hi." 
Luke9:11 Mihonte in hih thu a theih uh ciangin Jesuh nungdelh uh a, Jesuh in zong amaute na nolh loin, amaute tungah Pasian’ Ukna thu na hilh a, natna a neite zong a damsak hi." 
Luke9:12 Ni a tum kuan ciangin nungzui sawm le nihte in Jesuh kiangah, “Hih lai mun gamlak ahih manin, hih kiima om khuate-ah mite va pai-in annek ding le giah nading a zon nadingun mihonte sawlkhia in,” a ci uh hi."
