Luke9:13 Ahi zongin Jesuh in amaute kiangah, “A nek dingun nektheih khat peuhpeuh pia un,” a cih ciangin amaute in, “Kote va pai-in hih mi khempeuhte a dingin an va lei ding ka hih kei buang uhleh, anlum nga le ngasa tawn nih cih simloh bangmah dang om lo hi,” ci-in a dawng uh hi." 
Luke9:14 Tua lai-ah mi tulnga bang a om hi. Tua ciangin Jesuh in a nungzuite kiangah, “Mite sawmnga, sawmnga-in a pawlpawlin tusak un,” ci-in a sawl hi." 
Luke9:15 A nungzuite in zong tua a sawl mah bangin mite a tusak uh hi. 
Luke9:16 Tua ciangin Jesuh in anlum nga le ngasa tawn nih la-in vantung lam nga a, Pasian tungah lungdamna ko-in balnen a, mite tungah a lui dingin a nungzuite tungah a pia hi." 
Luke9:17 Mi khempeuh in ne-in a khamkhit uh ciangin, a nungzuite in a kikhamval teng khawm uh a, paipel sawm le nih a dim hi." 
Luke9:18 Khatvei, Jesuh guak thungenin a om laitakin a nungzuite zong ama kiangah om uh hi. Jesuh in a nungzuite kiangah, “Mite in kei kua hi, hong ci uh ahi hiam?” ci-in a dong hi." 
Luke9:19 Amaute in, “Pawlkhat in, Tuiphumpa Johan hi, hong ci uh hi. Pawlkhat in Elijah hi, hong ci uh a, pawlkhat in, tanglai kamsangte khat peuhpeuh hong hingkik hi ding hi, hong ci uh hi,” ci-in a dawng uh hi." 
Luke9:20 Tua ciangin Jesuh in, “Tua ahihleh note in kei kua hi, hong ci na hi uh hiam?” ci-in a dong hi. Tua ciangin Peter in, “Nang pen Pasian’ Khrih na hi hi,” ci-in a dawng hi." 
Luke9:21 Tua ciangin Jesuh in, “Hih thu kuama kiangah gen kei un,” ci-in a nungzuite thu a pia hi." 
Luke9:22 Tua ciangin Jesuh in a nungzuite kiangah, “Mihing Tapa in tampi tak thuak ding a, upate, siampi liante, le Thukham hilh siate in amah nial ding uh hi. Amah kithat ding a, a ni thum ni-in kihing kiksak ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Luke9:23 Tua ciangin Jesuh in a nungzuite le mi khempeuh kiangah, “Mi khatpeuh in kei hong zuihnop leh ama deihna bangin gamta nawn loin nisimin a singlamteh pua-in hong zui ding hi." 
Luke9:24 Hih leitung nuntakna a hu nuamte in a nuntakna bulpi nangawn tawh suplawh ding a, kei’ hangin a nuntakna a suplawhte in a nuntakna bulpi hu zo ding hi." 
Luke9:25 Mi khat in leitung khempeuh a ngah hangin a nuntakna bulpi suplawh leh bang phattuamna om ding ahi hiam? 
Luke9:26 Keima hang le ka thuhilhnate hangin a maizum peuhmah, a Pa’ minthanna vang le a siangtho vantung mite’ minthanna tawh a minthangin hong paikik ciangin Mihing Tapa zong ama hangin a maizum ding hi." 
Luke9:27 Ke’n kong cihin-ah, hih lai-ah a om mi pawlkhatte in Pasian’ Ukna a muh khit uh matengin si lo ding uh ahihna phawk un,” a ci hi." 
Luke9:28 Hih thu a genkhit nipikal khat bang khit ciangin Jesuh in Peter, Johan, le James te sam a, mualtungah thungen dingin a paipihto hi." 
Luke9:28 Hih thu a genkhit nipikal khat bang khit ciangin Jesuh in Peter, Johan, le James te sam a, mualtungah thungen dingin a paipihto hi." 
Luke9:29 Jesuh in thu a nget laitakin a mel hong kikheel a, a puante zong pakin tee mahmah hi." 
Luke9:30 Thakhat thu-in mihing nih tawh a kiho-in hong omvat hi. Tua mi nihte pen Moses le Elijah hi a," 
Luke9:31 vantung minthanna vang lim nei uh a, Jerusalem khua-ah pai-in sihna tawh Pasian’ deihna a tunsak nading thu a kikumkum uh ahi hi." 
Luke9:32 Peter le a lawm tegel lusu-in ihmu uh a, ahi zongin amaute hong khanglo-in, Jesuh’ minthanna vang le amah tawh a dingkhawm mi nihte a mu uh hi." 
Luke9:33 A mite, Jesuh kiang panin a paikhiat laitakin Peter in bang gen ka hi hiam, cih mel zong a thei lopi-in Jesuh kiangah, “Topa aw, hih lai-a i om, nuam mahmah hi. Nang a’ ding buk khat, Moses a’ ding buk khat, Elijah a’ ding buk khat, buk thum kong lamsak ding uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Luke9:34 Hih bangin thu a gen laitakin meii hong kai a, a liim in amaute hong liah hi. Meii in a tuamcip ciangin nungzuite a lau uh hi." 
Luke9:35 Tua ciangin meii lakah aw khat hong ging a, “Hih pa, ka Teelsa ka Tapa ahi hi; ama thu na ngai un,” a ci hi." 
Luke9:36 Tua awging a bei khit ciangin Jesuh guak bek hong om hi. Nungzuite in hih a muhsa uh thu tua hun sawngteng kuama kiangah gen loin a imcip uh hi. 
Luke9:37 A zing ciangin mualtung panin hong paisuk uh a, mi tampi in Jesuh na dawn uh hi." 
Luke9:38 Mihon lak panin mi khat hong kiko a, “Sia aw, ka tapa nong etsak nadingin kong thum hi. Amah bek ta a ka neih ahi hi." 
Luke9:39 Dawi in amah man a, thakhat thu-in kikogawp hi. A cilphuan a buak dongin kongkawcipsak a, gimsak gawp a, nusia nuam lo hi." 
Luke9:40 Na nungzuite in a dawi hong hawlkhiatsak nading uh ka thum a, ahi zongin hong hawlkhiatsak thei lo uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Luke9:41 Jesuh in, “Note in bangzahin upna nei lo a, bangzahin khial na hi uh hiam? Note bang tanvei hong ompih ding a, bang tanvei hong kikholhpih ding ka hi hiam?” a ci hi. Tua ciangin a mipa kiangah, “Na tapa hong paipih in,” ci-in a dawng hi." 
Luke9:42 A naupang hong pai laitakin dawi in leilakah tuksakin a kongkawcipsak hi. Ahi zongin Jesuh in a dawi taii a, naupang damsakin, a pa kiangah a piakik hi." 
Luke9:43 Hih bangin Pasian a vang a liatna hangin mi khempeuh in lamdang a sa uh hi. Mite in Jesuh’ hihnate khempeuh lamdangsa-in a om laitakin Jesuh in a nungzuite kiangah," 
Luke9:44 “Mihingte’ khut sungah Mihing Tapa kipia ding ahihna thu mangngilh het kei un,” a ci hi." 
Luke9:45 Ahi zongin amaute in a cihnopna thei lo uh hi. Amaute in a theihtel loh nading mahun a kibawl hi a, bang a cihnopna hiam, ci-in Jesuh kiangah lah a dong ngam kei uh hi." 
Luke9:46 Kua lianpen ding ihi hiam, ci-in nungzuite lakah kiselna khat hong om hi." 
Luke9:47 Jesuh in amaute’ lungsim ngaihsutna a phawk ciangin naupang khat la-in a gei-ah omsak a," 
Luke9:48 a nungzuite kiangah, “Keima hangin hih naupang a limbawl mi peuhmah in kei hong limbawl hi a, kei hong limbawl mi peuhmah in kei hong sawl pa zong a limbawl ahi hi. Note khempeuh lakah a neupen pa a lianpen pa ahi hi,” a ci hi." 
Luke9:49 Tua ciangin Johan in, “Topa aw, nangma min tawh dawi a hawlkhia mi khat ka mu uh a, amah pen eima pawl sungah a om hi lo ahih manin ka kham uh hi,” a hong ci hi." 
Luke9:50 Ahi zongin Jesuh in ama kiangah, “No hong langpang lote note’ pawl ahih manin kham kei un,” a ci hi." 
Luke9:51 Jesuh vantungah a kilaktoh ding hun a nai kuan ciangin Jerusalem khua manawh dingin a ngaihsun hi. Ama mai-ah nungzui pawlkhat mapaisak a," 
Luke9:52 Jesuh a dingin a kisam khempeuh a vaihawmsak dingin Samaria khua khatah a lut uh hi. 
Luke9:53 Ahi zongin Jesuh in Jerusalem khua manawh sawm ahih manin tua khuamite in Jesuh na tungsak nuam lo uh hi. 
Luke9:54 A nungzuite sung pan James le Johan in hih thu a theih uh ciangin Jesuh kiangah, “Topa aw, vantung panin meikuang ngenin amaute kangtumsak le ung nong awi hiam?” a ci uh hi." 
Luke9:54 A nungzuite sung pan James le Johan in hih thu a theih uh ciangin Jesuh kiangah, “Topa aw, vantung panin meikuang ngenin amaute kangtumsak le ung nong awi hiam?” a ci uh hi." 
Luke9:55 Ahi zongin Jesuh kihei-in amaute a taii hi. 
Luke9:56 Tua ciangin khua dang khatah a paisuak uh hi. 
Luke9:57 Lampi-ah a pai laitakun mi khat in Jesuh kiangah, “Na paina khempeuhah kong zui ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Luke9:58 Jesuh in, “Ngiate in lup nading kua nei uh a, vasate in zong giah nading bu nei uh hi. Ahi zongin Mihing Tapa in a luptheih nading mun koimahah nei lo hi,” a ci hi." 
Luke9:59 Tua ciangin Jesuh in midang khat kiangah, “Kei hong zui in,” a ci hi. Ahi zongin amah in, “Topa aw, kei hong ciahsak inla, ka pa hong vuisak masa in,” a ci hi." 
Luke9:60 Ahi zongin Jesuh in, “Misi bang ahi mite in misite na vui tahen. Nang ahihleh va pai inla Pasian’ Ukna thu va hilh in,” a ci hi." 
Luke9:61 Tua ciangin midang khat in, “Topa aw, nang ka hong zui ding hi. Ahi zongin ka inn-ate, mangpha hong khasak masa in,” a ci hi." 
Luke9:62 Jesuh in ama kiangah, “Bawng lokhawhna lenkawmin a nunglam a en mi pen Pasian’ Ukna tawh kituak lo hi,” ci-in a dawng hi." 
Luke10:1 Tua khit ciangin Jesuh in ama pai nading khua le mun khempeuhah nih nihin a na pai dingin mi sawmsagih seh a, ama mai-ah a mapaisak hi." 
Luke10:2 Amaute kiangah, “Anlak ding tam mahmah a, ahi zongin mi tawm bek in anlak na sem uh hi. Tua ahih manin an nei pa in a ante a la dingin mi hong sawl nadingin thu ngen un." 
Luke10:3 Note va kuan un. Ngiahon lakah tuuno khah bangin note ka hong sawl hi. 
Luke10:4 Sum ahi a, ip ahi a, khedap a val ahi zongin keng kei un. Lamkalah mi tawh kimawk hoho kei un." 
Luke10:5 Inn khat peuhpeuhah na lut uh ciangin, ‘Hih inn-ah nopsakna hong tung ta hen,’ ci-in hopih masa un." 
Luke10:6 Tua inn sungah nopsakna a ngahthei ding mi a om leh kip paisuak ding a, a om kei leh na hopihna thupha uh na dokkik ding uh hi." 
Luke10:7 Nasemte in a thaman a ngah ding a kilawm ahih mah bangin na zintunna inn mah uhah omsuak unla, a hong piak peuhpeuh uh na ne un. Na zintunna inn uh kheel themthum kei un." 
Luke10:8 Khua khat peuhpeuhah na lut uh ciangin note hong tunsak leh, amaute’ hong lui peuhpeuh ne unla," 
Luke10:9 tua khuasunga cinate damsak un. A khuamite kiangah, ‘Pasian’ Uk nading hun note a dingin hong naita hi,’ ci-in gen un." 
Luke10:10 Ahi zongin khua khat peuhpeuhah na lut uh ciangin note hong tunsaknop kei leh a khuasung kongzingah pai unla," 
Luke10:11 ‘Na khuasung uha leivui, ka khe tung uhah a hong bangte nangawn, note hilhkholhna-in ka nulkhia uh hi. Ahi zongin Pasian’ Uk nading hun a hong naina thu thei ta un,’ ci-in gen un." 
Luke10:12 Ke’n kong cihin-ah, Thukhen Ni ciangin Sodom khuamite’ thuak ding sangin tua khuamite’ thuak ding haksazaw lai ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Luke10:13 Tua ciangin Jesuh in, “Khorazin khuapi mite le Bethsaida khuapi mite aw, gimna lianpi na thuak ding uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh note khua sungah a hong kilak na lamdangte, Taia le Sidon khua sungah kilak hileh amaute in kisikna limin sawtpekin puanhampi silhin vut kinuh ding uh hi." 
Luke10:14 Tua ahih manin Thukhen Ni ciangin Taia le Sidon khuapi mite’ thuak ding sangin note’ thuak ding haksazaw lai ding hi. 
Luke10:15 No Kapernaum khuapi mite aw, van a sangna munah hong kipahtawi ding sa na hi uh hiam? Hell khuk sungah hong kilawnsuk ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Luke10:16 Tua ciangin Jesuh in a nungzuite kiangah, “Note’ thu a hong zuite khempeuh, kei’ thu a hong zui hi a, note’ thu a hong zui lote khempeuh, kei’ thu a hong zui lo ahi uh hi. Kei’ thu a hong zui lote khempeuh pen kei a hong sawl pa’ thu a zui lo ahi uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Luke10:17 Sawmsagihte lungdam mahmahin hong ciahkik uh a, “Topa aw, nangma min tawh dawite nangawn ka hawlkhiazo uh hi,” a hong ci uh hi." 
Luke10:18 Jesuh in amaute kiangah, “Vantung panin keekkia bangin Satan a kiatna ka mu hi." 
Luke10:19 Tu-in thei un. Gulpi le momaite na sikgawp nading uh le na galte uh na zawh nadingun note tungah vangliatna ka hong piazo a, amaute in note bangmah hong cih zo lo ding uh hi." 
Luke10:20 Ahi zongin dawite in na thu uh hong manna hangin lungdam kei unla, vantungah na min uh a kigelh manin lungdamzaw un,” a ci hi." 
Luke10:21 Tua laitakin Kha Siangtho in lungdamna tawh Jesuh kidimsak hi. Jesuh in, “Vantung le leitung Topa ahi ka Pa aw, mipilte le misiamte tungah na ip thute, bangmah a thei lo hih mite tungah lak na hih manin ka nuam hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh hih thu pen nangma deihna bang ahi hi,” a ci hi." 
Luke10:22 Tua ciangin Jesuh in amaute kiangah, “Hih nate khempeuh ka Pa in kei tungah hong ap khinzo hi. Pasian simloh, Tapa a thei kuamah om lo hi. Tapa le Tapa in a theihsaknop mite simloh, Pa a thei kuamah om lo hi,” a ci hi." 
Luke10:23 Tua ciangin nungzuite lamah kihei a, “Tu-a na muh uh nate na muh manun a hampha mahmah na hi uh hi." 
Luke10:24 Ke’n kong cihin-ah, kamsang tampite le kumpi tampite in tu-a note’ muhte a muhnop uh hangin mu ngei lo uh a, a zaknop uh hangin za ngei lo uh hi,” ci-in a tuamin a gen hi." 
Luke10:25 Jesuh a ze-et dingin Thukham hilh siate khat hong ding a, “Sia aw, nuntak tawntungna ka ngahtheih nadingin bang sem ding ka hi hiam?” ci-in a dong hi." 
Luke10:26 Jesuh in, “Thukham sungah bang kigelh a, bang sim na hi hiam?” a ci hi." 
Luke10:27 Amah in, “Na Topa Pasian na lungsim khempeuh, na nuntakna khempeuh, na hatna khempeuh, le na pilna khempeuh tawh na it inla, nangmah na ki-it bangin na vengte na it in,” ci-in kigelh hi, ci-in a dawng hi." 
Luke10:28 Tua ciangin Jesuh in, “Na dawnna man mahmah hi. Tua bangin gamta lecin nuntak tawntungna na ngah ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Luke10:29 Ahi zongin Thukham hilh siapa amah kitangsak nuam ahih manin Jesuh kiangah, “Ka vengte i cih kuate ahi hiam?” ci-in a dong hi." 
Luke10:30 Jesuh in dawng a, “Jerusalem panin Jerikho khua-ah mi khat paisuk a, lamkalah migilote in na suam a, a neih khempeuh laksakin a satgawp khit uh ciangin nusia uh a, a si dektaksa-in a paisan uh hi." 
Luke10:31 Tua laitakin siampi khat tua lampi tawnin hong paisuk a, amah a muh ciangin lamnawl lam tawnin a paisan hi." 
Luke10:32 Tua ciangin Levi mi khat zong tua mah bangin hong pai a, amah a muh ciangin lamnawl lam tawnin a paisan leuleu hi." 
Luke10:33 Ahi zongin Samaria mi khualzin khat, tua lai mun hong tungin a liam pa a muh ciangin hehpihhuaisa a," 
Luke10:34 a kiangah va pai-in a liammate sathau le leenggahzu a nuhsak khit ciangin a tunsak hi. Tua ciangin a la tungah tuangsak a, zintun inn khatah paipihin tua lai-ah a khoi hi." 
Luke10:35 A zingsang ciangin zintun inn nei pa kiangah sum peek nih pia a, ‘Hih mipa limtakin na khoi in. Na beina dang khempeuh, kong paikik ciangin kong loh ding hi,’ ci hi." 
Luke10:36 Hih mihing thumte sung panin, a kisuampa a dingin a koi pen a vengpa hi dingin na um hiam?” a ci hi." 
Luke10:37 Amah in, “A hehpih pa hi ding hi,” a ci hi. Tua ciangin Jesuh in ama kiangah, “Nang zong pai inla, tua bangmahin gamta in,” a ci hi." 
Luke10:38 Amaute a pai laitakun khua khatah Jesuh bang a, Martha kici numei khat in a inn-ah na tungsak hi." 
Luke10:39 Martha in Mary kici nau numei khat nei a, Topa’ thugente ngai-in Mary a om hi." 
Luke10:40 Martha bek in na semin manlah mahmah ahih manin a heh suak a, “Topa aw, ka naunu in kei bek na hong sepsak niloh phamawh sa lo na hi hiam? Kei hong huh nadingin hong sawl in,” a ci hi." 
Luke10:41 Ahi zongin Topa in, “Martha, Martha aw, nang na lunghihmawhna tam hi." 
Luke10:42 Ahi zongin a kisam taktak khat bek om a, Mary in tua a kisam na pen a semsem ahih manin, a nasep kikhawlsak lo ding hi,” ci-in a dawng hi." 
Luke11:1 Khat vei, Jesuh in mun khatah thu a ngen hi. A thunget a mankhit ciangin a nungzuite khat in, “Topa aw, Johan in a nungzuite a hilh bangin kote zong thungetzia hong hilh in,” a ci hi." 
Luke11:2 Jesuh in amaute kiangah, “Hih bangin na ngen ding uh hi: ‘Pa aw, na min siangtho kizahtak hen la, na Ukna hun hong tung tahen." 
Luke11:3 Nisim khamkhop an hong pia in. 
Luke11:4 Kote tungah a hong mawhte mawh maisakna ka neih bangun ko’ mawhna zong hong maisak in. Ze-etna lian hong thuaksak ke’n,’ ci-in na ngen ding uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Luke11:5 Tua ciangin Jesuh in a nungzuite kiangah, “Note khatpeuh, na lawmte uh khat inn-ah zankim laitakin pai-in, ‘Lawm aw, anlum lum thum khawng hong leitawi sak in." 
Luke11:6 Ka lawmte khat zin hong tung a, ka piak ding ka nei het kei hi,’ ci le-uhcin," 
Luke11:7 amah in a innsung panin, ‘Hong nawngkaisak dah in. Kong ka kalhkhin uh a, ka naupangte tawh ka lum khinzo uh hi. Kong thokhia thei kei a, bangmah kong pia thei kei ding hi,’ ci-in hong dawng ding hi." 
Luke11:8 Tua ahihleh ke’n kong cihin-ah, a lawm ahihna hangin amah tho tuan loin bangmah a piak loh hangin, a nget teiteina hangin amah tho-in a kisapna teng a pia ding hi." 
Luke11:9 Tua ahih manin note kiangah kong cihin-ah: Ngen un; na ngah ding uh hi. Zong un; na mu ding uh hi. Kiu un; kongkhak hong kihon ding hi. 
Luke11:10 Bang hang hiam cih leh a ngente khempeuh in ngah ding a, a zongte khempeuh in mu ding a, a kiute khempeuh a dingin kong kihon ding hi." 
Luke11:11 Note lakah pa ahi mi khatpeuh in, a tapa in ngasa ngen leh ngasa tangin gul a pia ding," 
Luke11:12 aktui ngen leh aktui tangin momai a pia ding kua om na hi uh hiam? 
Luke11:13 Note mihoih lo hinapi-in na tate uh tungah a hoih piak ding theithei na hih uhleh, vantung a om na Pa un a ngente tungah Kha Siangtho piazaw kan ding hi lo ahi hiam?” a ci hi." 
Luke11:14 Jesuh in a pau thei lo mi khat sung panin dawi hawlkhia a, dawi a paikhiat khit ciangin a mipa pauthei a, mite in lamdang a sa mahmah uh hi." 
Luke11:15 Ahi zongin mi pawlkhat in, “Dawimangpa Beelzebul in dawi hawlkhiat theih nading vangliatna ama tungah a pia ahi hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Luke11:16 Mi pawlkhat leuleu in amah a ze-etna-in, Pasian’ thukimpihna a kilat nadingin nalamdang a bawl ding a ngen uh hi." 
Luke11:17 Ahi zongin Jesuh in amaute’ ngaihsutna thei ahih manin, “Gam khat peuhpeuh, a gammite kiphelkhamin pawlkhat le pawlkhat kido le-uh tua gam sauvei kip lo ding a, innkuan khat peuhpeuh a mite kiphelkhamin kido le-uh kikhenthang ding uh hi." 
Luke11:18 Tua mah bangin Satan ukna sunga om mite zong khatlekhat kido le-uh a ukna bangci kip ding ahi hiam? Kei pen, Beelzebul’ vangliatna tawh dawi hawlkhia hi, nong ci uh hi." 
Luke11:19 Ke’n Beelzebul’ vangliatna tawh dawi hawlkhia ka hih leh, na mipihte un kua’ vangliatna tawh hawlkhia ahi uh hiam? Na ngaihsut khialhna uh amaute in hong langsak ding hi." 
Luke11:20 Note’ ngaihsut bang hi loin, ke’n Pasian’ vangliatna tawh dawite hawlkhia ka hih manin, note kiangah Pasian’ Ukna hun hong tungta ahihna phawk un." 
Luke11:21 “Mi thahat khat in a hiam neih khempeuh tawh ama inn a cin ciangin a neihsa khempeuh suakta hi. 
Luke11:22 Ahi zongin amah sangin a hatzaw mi khat in amah simin a zawhgawp khit ciangin, ama muan a hiam khempeuh laksakin a pawlte tawh a hawm hi." 
Luke11:23 Kei hong pawlpih lo peuhmah keima lang hi uh a, tuute hong kaihkhoppih lo peuhmah tuute a thehthang gawpte ahi uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Luke11:24 Tua ciangin Jesuh in, “Mi khatpeuh sung panin dawi a kihawlkhiat khit ciangin a ten nading mun keuna zongin a vak kawikawi hi. A om nading mun a muh loh ciangin, ‘Hong kihawlkhiatna inn mahah lutkik ning,’ ci hi." 
Luke11:25 A hong tunkik ciangin hoihtakin kiphiat siangin a hoih linlianin a mu hi. 
Luke11:26 Tua ciangin amah paikhia kikin, amah sangin a siazaw dawi sagih hong paipih a, a sungah lutin a teng uh hi. Tua mipa’ pianzia pen a masa sangin hong siazaw hi,” a ci hi." 
Luke11:27 Jesuh in hih thu a genkhit ciangin mihon lak panin numei khat hong paukhia a, “Nang hong paii numei, a nawi na teep numei, mi hampha mahmah ahi hi,” a ci hi." 
Luke11:28 Ahi zongin Jesuh in, “Pasian’ thu za-in a zuite hamphazaw lai hi,” ci-in a dawng hi." 
Luke11:29 Mihonte in Jesuh hong neh semsem uh a, Jesuh in zong a thugen zomlai-in, “Tuhun mite gilo mahmah uh hi. Amaute in lim lamdang ngen uh a, ahi zongin Jonah lim simloh a dang kipia lo ding hi." 
Luke11:30 Nineveh khua mite a dingin kamsang Jonah pen lim khat ahih mah bangin tuhun mite a dingin Mihing Tapa zong, lim ahi ding hi." 
Luke11:31 Thukhen Ni ciangin leitaw lam gam pana hong pai Kumpinu hong dingin tuhun mite mawhsakna thu hong gen ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Solomon’ pilna thu a za dingin leimong khat panin amah hong pai a, ahi zongin Solomon sangin a lianzaw khat hih lai-ah om hi." 
Luke11:32 Thukhen Ni ciangin Nineveh khuamite hong dingin note mawhsakna thu hong gen ding uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh amaute in Jonah’ thuhilhna a zak uh ciangin a mawhnate uh kisik uh a, ahi zongin Jonah sangin a lianzaw khat hih lai-ah a om hi,” a ci hi." 
Luke11:33 Tua ciangin Jesuh in, “Kuamah in meivak a vakkhit ciangin a munbu ah koih lo a, lawh zong khuhlo hi. Innsungah a lut mi khempeuh in khua a muhtheih nadingin meivak koihna tungah a koihzaw hi." 
Luke11:34 Na mittang uh note’ pumpi a dingin meivak tawh kibang hi. Na mit uh ciim leh na pumpi khempeuh un hoihtakin mu thei a, na mit uh maang leh na pumpi uh a dingin khuamial ahi hi." 
Luke11:35 Tua ahih ciangin na pumpi sung uha om khuavak pen khuamial ahih khak loh nading limtakin kingaihsun un. 
Luke11:36 Tua bang hi peuh leh, meivak a taan ciangin khua na muh uh mah bangin na pumpi uh a dingin khuamialna mun om loin a vekpi-in a taangkim ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Luke11:37 Jesuh in a thugen a mankhit ciangin Farisi mi khat in an nekpih dingin Jesuh a sam hi. Amah zong pai-in an ne dingin a tu hi. 
Luke11:38 Jesuh in khut sil masa loin an a neklam a muh ciangin Farisi mipa in lamdangsa mahmah hi. 
Luke11:39 Tua ciangin Topa in ama kiangah, “No Farisi mite in hai leh kuangte a pualam na siangsak uh a, ahi zongin note na lungsim sung uhah huaihamin na gi kei uh hi." 
Luke11:40 No mihaite aw, a pualam a bawlpa in a sunglam zong bawl hi lo ahi hiam?" 
Luke11:41 Ahi zongin na hai leh na kuang sung uhah a omte pen itna tawh mizawngte tungah pia le-uhcin, note a dingin na khempeuh hong siang ding hi." 
Luke11:42 “No Farisi mite in gimna na thuak ding uh hi. Note in Pasian tungah lengmasel, thuambuak a kipan anteh theipuam dongin sawm-ah-khat pia napi-in, mite tungah thuman ding le Pasian it ding na donkha kei uh hi. Hihte khempeuh na hihkim ding uh hi a, paihkhiat na neih ding uh hi lo hi." 
Luke11:43 “No Farisi mite in gimna na thuak ding uh hi. Kikhopna inn sungah tutphah nuampen ah na tunuam uh a, mihon lakah hong kizahtak hopih ding na ut uh hi." 
Luke11:44 A kiciamteh lo hankhuk, mite in a theih loh manun a va sikkhakna munte tawh na kibang uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Luke11:45 Tua ciangin Thukham hilh siate khat in Jesuh kiangah, “Sia aw, hih bang thu na gen ciangin kote zong a hong ko bawl na hi hi,” a ci hi." 
Luke11:46 Jesuh in, “No Thukham hilh siate in zong gimna na thuak ding uh hi. Note in a puak hak mahmah ding van, mite tungah na suan uh a, ahi zongin tua van a puakpih dingin na khutmeno khat nangawn uh na tangsak nuam kei uh hi." 
Luke11:47 Note in gimna na thuak ding uh hi. Na pu na pate un a thahsa kamsangte’ han a hoihin na bawl uh hi. 
Luke11:48 Tua ahih manin na pu na pate uh gamtatnate a thukimpih, a tecite na hi uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh amaute in kamsangte thatin, note in a han na bawl uh hi." 
Luke11:49 Tua thu hangin Pasian’ Pilna a kici laibu sungah, ‘Amaute kiangah kamsangte le sawltakte ka sawl ding a, amaute in tua mite pawlkhat bawlsia-in na that ding uh hi,’ ci-in kigelh hi." 
Luke11:50 Tua ahih manin leitung piancil a kipan kamsang a kithatte khempeuh hangin tuhuna mite gim kipia ding a," 
Luke11:51 Abel a kithah a kipan biakna tau le siangtho mun kikalah a kithat Zekhariah a sihna ciang dong, tua mi thahna hangin gimna a thuak ding uh hi. Ke’n kong cihin-ah, hih thute khempeuh hangin tuhuna mite gim hong kipia taktak ding hi." 
Luke11:52 No Thukham hilh siate in gimna na thuak ding uh hi. Note in pilna ngah theih nading konghonna tawhtang nei napi-in a sungah note na lut tuan kei uh a, a tum dingin a paite zong lah na khaktan uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Luke11:53 Tua mun panin Jesuh a paikhiat khit a kipanin Thukham hilh siate le Farisi mite in nakpitakin Jesuh mawhzon ding kipanin thu tampi tak dong uh a," 
Luke11:54 a kampau khialhnate a mattheih nadingun thangsiahin a hanciam uh hi. 
Luke12:1 Mi a tul tampite hong kikhawmin khatlekhat a kisikkha gawp dongin kinehcipin a om laitakin Jesuh in a nungzuite kiangah thu gen masa a, “Farisi mite’ kineihkhemna ahi, a silngo uh limtakin kidawm un." 
Luke12:2 A kiseelte khatvei teitei kimu ding a, thusimte khatvei teitei thulang suak ding hi." 
Luke12:3 Zan khuamial sunga na gente uh sun khuavak sungah kigenkik ding a, innsung tawngah na kihuau simnate uh mi khempeuh in theithang ding uh hi." 
Luke12:4 “Lawmte aw, note kiangah kong genin-ah, pumpi a thahkhit ciangin a siazaw a hihthei nawn lote na kihta kei un." 
Luke12:5 Kuate kihta ding na hi uh hiam cih leh, mite in a thah khitsa mipa pen hell khuk sungah a khiathuah theilai Pasian na kihta un." 
Luke12:6 Gitta nga ciangin hamu-in kizuak lel hi lo ahi hiam? Tua bang hi lel napi-in Pasian in gitta khat beek mangngilh lo hi. 
Luke12:7 Na lutung uha om na sammal zah ciat nangawn uh Pasian in thei khin hi. Note lunghimawh kei un. Gitta tampi sangin na manphazaw ciat uh hi. 
Luke12:8 “Note kiangah kong cihin-ah, keima mi ahihna mi’ theihin a genkhiate, Mihing Tapa in zong Pasian’ vantung mite’ mai-ah, keima mi hi, ci-in genkhia ding a," 
Luke12:9 ahi zongin keima mi ahihna mi’ theihin a genkhia nuam lote, Pasian’ vantung mite mai-ah zong keima mi hi, ci-in Mihing Tapa in genkhia nuam lo ding hi." 
Luke12:10 Mihing Tapa a langpangte a mawhna uh kimaisak thei ding a, Kha Siangtho a langpangte a mawhna uh kimaisak lo ding hi." 
Luke12:11 Thusitna a thuak dingin kikhopna inn-ah ahi a, hausa zumah ahi zongin hong paipih uh ciangin bang gen ding a, bangci kihut ding ka hi hiam, ci-in lunghimawh kei un." 
Luke12:12 Bang hang hiam cih leh a hun a tun ciangin Kha Siangtho in na gen dingteng uh hong hilh ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Luke12:13 Tua laitakin mihon lak panin mi khat in Jesuh kiangah, “Sia aw, ka pa un a hong sihsan gamh pawlkhat tawh ka u in kei hong inntuan nadingin hong gensak in,” a ci hi." 
Luke12:14 Ahi zongin Jesuh in a mipa kiangah, “No unau’ gamh a hawm dingin kua in kei hong seh ahi hiam?” ci-in a dawng hi." 
Luke12:15 Tua ciangin Jesuh in amaute khempeuh kiangah, “Hoihtakin kidawm unla, na huaiham loh nadingun kikem un. Bang hang hiam cih leh bangzahta-in mi khat a hauh hangin a neihsa tawh a nuntakna taktak kicing zo lo hi,” a ci hi." 
Luke12:16 Tua ciangin Jesuh in amaute kiangah thugentehna khat gen a, “Mi hau pa khat’ lo-ah an tampi a piang hi." 
Luke12:17 Tua ciangin amah in a lungsim sungah, ‘Ka an khempeuh ka koih nading mun kicing lo ahih manin bangcih ding ka hi hiam?" 
Luke12:18 Tua ahih manin hih bangin ka gamta ding hi: Ka ansalte phelin a lianzaw ansalte ka lam ding a, tuate sungah ka ante le ka neih khempeuh ka seng ding hi." 
Luke12:19 Tua ciangin keimah in: Mi hampha mahmah ka hi hi. Kum tampi sung ka khom ding annek tuidawn le na hoih tampi ka nei hi. An ne, zu ne-in, a nuam theithei-in ka om hithiat ding hi,’ ci hi." 
Luke12:20 Ahi zongin Pasian in ama kiangah, ‘Mihai pa aw, tuzan mahmahin na si ding hi. Hih na neihsa teng kua’n zang nawn ding ahi hiam?’ ci hi,” a ci hi." 
Luke12:21 Tua ciangin Jesuh in a thugen a khupna-in, “Tua mah bangin amau a’ ding bekin a kholcipte pen Pasian’ muhna panin mihau hi lo uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Luke12:22 Tua ciangin Jesuh in a nungzuite kiangah, “Tua ahih ciangin note kiangah kong genin-ah: I nuntak nadingin bang ne ding a, i pumpi tungah bang silh ding ihi hiam, ci-in lunghimawh kei un." 
Luke12:23 Nuntakna pen an sangin thupizaw a, pumpi pen puan sangin thupizaw hi." 
Luke12:24 Vasate ngaihsun dih un: Amaute in khai tuh lo uh a, anlak cih zong nei lo uh hi. Amaute in beemlepang zong nei lo napi-in Pasian in annek tasamsak lo hi. Vasate sangin note nakpitakin na manphazaw uh hi." 
Luke12:25 Note na lunghihmawh manun na nuntak hun uh nai khat sung bek a sotto thei kua om na hi uh hiam? 
Luke12:26 Tua bang a themno khat nangawn hih thei lo na hih uhleh bang hangin adangte lunghimawh se na hi uh hiam? 
Luke12:27 Gamlak a paakte ngaihsun dih un. Tuate in a nek ding uh na sem lo uh a, a silh ding uh puan zong gan lo uh hi. Ahi zongin note kiangah kong genin-ah: Bangzahin a hauh hangin Solomon nangawn, hih paakte khat zahin a hoihin kizem zo lo lai hi." 
Luke12:28 Upna neu mite aw, tuni-in om a, zing ciangin keutumin meikhuk sungah a kikhultum lopa kungte, Pasian in puansilh guan ahihleh note hong guanzaw kan ding hi lo ahi hiam?" 
Luke12:29 Tua ahih manin bang ne ding, bang dawn ding, ci-in lunghimawhin om tawntung kei un." 
Luke12:30 Gentail mi khempeuh in hih nate lunghihmawh penin nei uh hi. Hih nate na kisap lamtak uh zong na Pa un hong thei hi. 
Luke12:31 Tua ahih manin Pasian’ Ukna ngaihsutin nei masazaw un. Tua hileh hih na kisapna dangte uh zong Pasian in hong piathuah ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Luke12:32 Tua ciangin Jesuh in, “Tuuhon tawmnote aw, lau-in lunghimawh kei un. Na Pa un ama Ukna sungah ukna thu a nei dingin a hong sehsa ahi hi." 
Luke12:33 Na neihsa uh zuak unla, mizawngte tungah tua sumte na pia un. Note a dingin a sia thei lo sumkholna na bawl unla, gutate in a luh zawh lohna, leikha in zong a nek zawh lohna, cikmahin a kiam ngei hetloh nading mun vantungah na sumte uh na khol un." 
Luke12:34 Bang hang hiam cih leh na sum uh a omna munah na lungsim uh om tawntung ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Luke12:35 Tua ciangin Jesuh in, “Na kawng uh gakin, na mei uh vakin a kigingsa-in om unla," 
Luke12:36 a topa uh mopawi simna panin hong tungin kongkhak a kiuh ciangin thakhatin kong a honpah theih nadingun a topa’ ciah ding a ngak nasemte bangin om un. 
Luke12:37 A topa hong ciah ciangin a kigingsa-in amah ngakin a om uh a muh nasemte pen mi hampha mahmah ahi uh hi. Note kiangah kong genin-ah, a topa zong hong kithawi-in a nasemte an vak dingin tusak ding a, amahmah in a nasemte an thukin na a sem ding hi." 
Luke12:38 Zankim laitak ahi a, zingsang khuavakkuan lam ahi zongin a hong ciah hun peuhpeuh ciangin amah ngakin a om a muh nasemte pen mi hampha mahmah ahi uh hi." 
Luke12:39 Ahi zongin na phawk ding uh thu khat om hi. Mi khat in guta pa’ hong pai ding hun theikhol leh a inn luhsak lo ding hi. 
Luke12:40 Tua mah bangin Mihing Tapa zong na upmawh loh uh hun laitakin hong pai ding ahih manin note zong a kigingsa-in om tawntung un,” a ci hi." 
Luke12:41 Peter in, “Topa aw, hih thugentehna ko bek nong cihna ahi hiam, ahih kei leh mi khempeuh a’ ding na cihna ahi hiam?” ci-in a dong hi." 
Luke12:42 Topa in, “A pil a citak nasempa i cih a bangcite ahi hiam? A naseppih dangte ukin a hun manmanin amaute’ nekzah ding ciat a pia dingin a topa in a seh nasempa ahi hi." 
Luke12:43 A topa hong ciah ciangin hih ama sawl bangin a sem a muh nasempa pen mi hampha mahmah ahi hi. 
Luke12:44 Ke’n kong cihin-ah, a neihsa khempeuh a uk dingin a topa in tua nasempa koih takpi ding hi." 
Luke12:45 Ahi zongin tua nasempa in a lungsim sungah, ‘Ka topa hong ciahkik hak ding hi,’ ci-in ngaihsunin a naseppih numei le pasalte satgawp hen la, zukham ankhamin ommawk leh," 
Luke12:46 tua nasem pa’ topa pen ama upmawh loh ni, a theihkholh loh hunin hong tung ding hi. A topa in nakpitakin amah gim pia ding a, a thumang lo mite tawh a kibangin a thuaksak khawm ding hi." 
Luke12:47 A topa’ deihna thei napi-in a topa’ deih bangin a gamta nuam lo nasem pa pen nakpitakin kisat ding hi. 
Luke12:48 Ahi zongin a topa’ deihna a theih lohna hangin satthuak nading a gamtakha nasem pa pen kidamsat zawdeuh ding hi. Tampi a kipiakna pa tung pan tampi kikal ding a, a tamzaw a ki-apna pa tung pan a tamzaw kikal ding hi,” ci-in a dawng hi." 
Luke12:49 Tua ciangin Jesuh in, “Leitungah meikuang a khah dingin a hong pai ka hi a, tu mahmahin a meikuang kipan khinta hileh ka ut hi." 
Luke12:50 Gimna sungah ka kiphum nading khat om a, tua thu a kikhit matengin ka lungsim a nuam thei kei hi." 
Luke12:51 Leitungah kilemna a omsak dingin a hong pai hong sa na hi uh hiam? Hilo hi. Ke’n kong cihin-ah, kikhenna a omsak dingin a hong pai ka hizaw hi." 
Luke12:52 Tu a kipanin innkuan sungah mihing nga a phate, a langah thum, a langah nihin kikhenin kido ding uh hi." 
Luke12:53 A pa in a tapa do-in, a tapa in a pa do ding a, a nu in a tanu do-in, a tanu in a nu do ding a, a teeknu in a monu do-in, a monu in a teeknu do ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Luke12:54 Jesuh in mihonte kiangah zong, “Nitumna lamah meiipi hong kai na muh uh ciangin, ‘Guah hong zu ding hi,’ ci-in thakhatin na genthei pah uh a, tua mah bangin guah hong zu takpi hi." 
Luke12:55 Leitaw lam panin huih hong nun’ ciangin, ‘Ni hong sa ding hi,’ na ci uh a, tua mah bangin ni hong sa takpi hi." 
Luke12:56 No a kineihkhem mite aw, vanlelei na et uh ciangin a piang ding thu thei na hih uhleh, tuhun thute bang hangin theithei lo na hi uh hiam?” a ci hi." 
Luke12:57 Tua ciangin Jesuh in, “Bang hangin na gamtat nading uh a manin khen thei lo na hi uh hiam?" 
Luke12:58 Mi khatpeuh in na tungah thu hong bawlin zum-ah hong paipih leh, zuma thukhente mai-ah hong kaigawpin, thukhente in palikte kiangah hong apin, palikte in thong sungah a hong koih loh nadingin, na lang pa uh tawh na thu uh a siantheih nadingin na siam tawpun lamkalah hanciam un." 
Luke12:59 Ke’n kong cihin-ah, tua bangin gamta kei le-uhcin, na liausum uh na piak khit matengun thong panin na suakta kei ding uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Luke13:1 Tua laitakin tua lai-a om mi pawlkhat in Jesuh kiangah, Galilee mite in Pasian kiangah biakna pia-in a om laitakin Pilat in a thah mite’ thu a gen uh hi." 
Luke13:2 Jesuh in amaute kiangah, “Tua bangin hih Galilee mite kithat ahih manin, Galilee midangte khempeuh sangin hih a kithat mite a mawhna uh lianzaw hi, ci-in ngaihsun na hi uh hiam?" 
Luke13:3 Hilo hi. Ke’n kong cihin-ah, na mawhna panun na kisik kei uhleh amaute mah bangin note zong na si ding uh hi." 
Luke13:4 Tua ahih kei leh, Siloam Tuibeem gei-a tausang a puk lai-in a denlup mi sawm le giatte bangci ngaihsut na hi uh hiam? Hih bangin a sih manun Jerusalem khuasunga a teng midangte sangin a mawhna uh lianzaw hi, ci-in ngaihsun na hi uh hiam?" 
Luke13:5 Hilo hi. Ke’n kong cihin-ah, na mawhna panun na kisikkik kei uh leh note zong amaute mah bangin na si ding uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Luke13:6 Tua ciangin Jesuh in amaute kiangah thugentehna khat gen a, “Mi khat in a lolai-ah theikung khat a suansak hi. Theigah a lo dingin a pai ciangin bangmah na gah lo hi." 
Luke13:7 Tua ahih manin amah in a lokho pa kiangah, ‘A beisa kum thum sung theigah lo dingin ka pai zelzel a, ahi zongin gah lo hi. Tua ahih manin phuk in. Bang hangin lo sung mawk nawngkaisak ding ahi hiam?’ ci hi." 
Luke13:8 Tua ciangin lokho pa in, ‘Topa aw, tu kum sung zong hih bangmahin omsaklai phot in. A phung kimkot to-in eklei ka sung ding hi." 
Luke13:9 Kum kik ciangin hong gah leh a hoih hi pah ding hi. Ahi zongin hong gah kei veve leh i phuk ding hi,’ ci-in a dawng hi,” a ci hi." 
Luke13:10 Sabbath ni khatin Jesuh in kikhopna inn khat sungah thu hilhin a om hi. 
Luke13:11 Dawivei numei khat tua lai-ah om a, tua dawi in kum sawm le giat sung tua numei cina sakin a nung kulsak a, dingtang thei hetloin a om hi." 
Luke13:12 Jesuh in tua numei a muh ciangin a kiangah sam a, “Lawm aw, na natna panin na damta hi,” a ci hi." 
Luke13:13 Tua ciangin numei tungah a khut nga a, thakhat thu-in amah dingtang thei-in Pasian a phatpah hi." 
Luke13:14 Ahi zongin Jesuh in Sabbath ni-in cina a damsakna hangin kikhopna inn ukpa a heh suak a, mite kiangah, “Na a kisep theih nading hun ni guk sung om hi. Tua hun sungin hong pai-in kidamsak unla, ahi zongin Sabbath ni-in hong pai kei un,” a ci hi." 
Luke13:15 Tua ciangin Topa in amah dawng a, “No a kineihkhem mite aw, note in Sabbath ni mahin zong na bawngte uh ahi a, na late uh ahi zongin a buk panin na khihna khaute uh sutin, tui pia dingin paipih hi lo na hi uh hiam?" 
Luke13:16 Tua mah bangin Satan in Abraham’ suante khat ahi hih numei pen kum sawm le giat sung hencip hi. Hih a kihencipna panin Sabbath ni-in hih numei khahkhiat ding kilawm hi lo ahi hiam?” a ci hi. 
Luke13:17 Hih Jesuh’ dawnna in alangte khempeuh maizumsak a, Jesuh’ sep hih na lamdangte khempeuh hangin midang khempeuh a lungdam mahmah uh hi." 
Luke13:18 Tua ciangin Jesuh in, “Pasian’ Ukna bang tawh kibang a, bang tawh genteh ding ka hi hiam cih leh:" 
Luke13:19 Mi khat in a lo-ah a vawh ankam tang khat tawh kibang hi. Tua ankam tang hong khangin kung golpi hong suak a, vasate in a hiang tungah bu a tom thei uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Luke13:20 Tua ciangin Jesuh in, “Pasian’ Ukna bang tawh genteh leuleu ding ka hi hiam cih leh:" 
Luke13:21 Nupi khat in annel lom sungah a sawh silngo tawh kibang hi. Tua silngo in a annel lom khempeuh a pawmsak hi,” a ci hi." 
Luke13:22 Tua ciangin khuapite le khuaneute nawkin Jesuh paisuak a, Jerusalem khua manawhin a paikawmin thu a hilh hi." 
Luke13:23 Tua laitakin mi khat in, “Siapa aw, hotkhiatna a ngah mi tawmno khat bek hi ding ahi hiam?” ci-in a dong hi." 
Luke13:24 Jesuh in amaute kiangah, “Kong kawcik tawnin na lut nadingun hanciam un. Note kiangah kong genin-ah, mi tampi tak in lut ding a hanciam uh hangin lut zo lo ding uh hi." 
Luke13:25 Inn nei pa hong tho-in kong hong khak ciangin, note kong pualamah dingin kongkhak na kiu ding uh a, ‘Topa aw, kote zong kong hong hon in,’ na ci ding uh hi. Amah in, ‘Note koilai panin a hong pai na hi uh hiam kong thei kei hi,’ ci-in hong dawng ding hi." 
Luke13:26 Note in, ‘Nangmah tawh anne tuidawn khawmin i om a, ka khuasung uhah thu nong hilh hi,’ na ci ding uh hi." 
Luke13:27 Ahi zongin amah in, ‘Note koi panin a hong pai cih kong thei kei hi. A giloin a gamta note khempeuh aw, kei kiang panin paikhia un,’ hong ci ding hi." 
Luke13:28 Pasian’ Ukna sungah Abraham, Isaac, Jakob, le kamsangte khempeuh a omna mu napi-in, note a pualamah hong kihawlkhiat ciangin tua huna na kahna uh le na ha gawina uh bangzah takin nasia ding ahi hiam?" 
Luke13:29 Nisuahna le nitumna, leilu le leitaw lam panin mite hong pai-in Pasian’ Ukna sung sabuai kiimah tukhawm ding uh hi." 
Luke13:30 Tua hi a, tuhuna mineute tuahun ciangin milian hi ding a, tuhuna miliante tuahun ciangin mineu hi ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Luke13:31 Tuahun laitakin Farisi mi pawlkhat hong pai-in Jesuh kiangah, “Herod in nang thah hong sawm ahih manin hih lai panin mun dang khatah paikhia in,” a ci uh hi." 
Luke13:32 Jesuh in, “Pai unla, ngia bangin ngian a zang tua Herod kiangah hih bangin va gen un: ‘Tuni le zing ciang sung dawi hawlkhia-in cina ka damsak ding a, thai ciangin ka nasep ka man ding hi, ci hi,’ va ci un." 
Luke13:33 Ahi zongin tuni, zing le thai sungteng ka ma nawtsuakin ka pai ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Jerusalem khuasung lobuang mun dangah kamsangpa a kithah ding kilawm lo hi." 
Luke13:34 “Jerusalem, Jerusalem aw, kamsangte na that a, Pasian’ hong sawl kamtaite na denglum hi. Akpi in a kha tawh a note a huai mah bangin na mite ka huainuam tawntung a, ahi zongin na ut kei hi." 
Luke13:35 Tu-in na innte kinusiacip ding hi. ‘Topa min tawh a hong pai mipa, Pasian in thupha pia ta hen,’ na cih hun hong tun matengin kei nong mu nawn kei ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Luke14:1 Sabbath ni khatin Farisi mi upa khat’ inn-ah an ne dingin Jesuh pai a, mite in amah encik uh hi." 
Luke14:2 Tua laitakin a khut le a khe a bawk mi khat Jesuh kiangah hong pai a," 
Luke14:3 Jesuh in zong Thukham hilh siate le Farisi mite kiangah, “Sabbath ni-in cina damsak ding i Thukham in hong hiam, khak hiam?” ci-in a dong hi." 
Luke14:4 Ahi zongin kuamah in dawng loin omcip uh hi. Jesuh in zong tua mipa samin a damsak khit ciangin a ciahsak hi. 
Luke14:5 Tua ciangin Jesuh in amaute kiangah, “Note khatpeuh’ tapa ahi a, na bawngtal uh ahi zongin tuikhuk thukpi sungah Sabbath ni-in kia leh, Sabbath ni hinapi-in kaikhia veve ding hi lo na hi uh hiam?” a ci hi." 
Luke14:6 Ahi zongin kuamah in hih thu dawng thei lo uh hi. 
Luke14:7 Tua annekna ah a kisam mite pawlkhat, uliante’ tut nading munah a tutnopna uh a muh ciangin amaute kiangah thu khat gen a," 
Luke14:8 “Mopawi khatpeuhah hong kisap ciangin uliante’ tut nading munah tu kei un. Tua pawi siim dingin a kisamte lakah note sangin a ulianzaw khat hong omkha thei ding a," 
Luke14:9 innteek pa in note kiangah, ‘Hih lai-ah amah tusakzaw ni,’ hong ci ding hi. Tua ciangin minautangte’ tutna munah maizumpi in na tusuk ding uh hi." 
Luke14:10 Note pen tua bangin a hong kisap ciangin minautangte’ tutna munah na tuzaw un. Innteek pa hong pai-in, ‘Lawm aw, hih tutphah nuamah hong tuzaw in,’ hong ci ding hi. Tua bangin leengla dangte khempeuh lakah hong cih ciangin nang a dingin angtanhuai mahmah hi." 
Luke14:11 Bang hang hiam cih leh a kiliansakte khempeuh in niamkhiatna thuak ding uh a, a kiniamkhiatte khempeuh a lianin kibawl ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Luke14:12 Tua ciangin Jesuh in a innteek pa kiangah, “Sun-an nekna-ah ahi a, nitak-an nekna-ah ahi zongin mi na sap ciangin, na lawmte ahi a, na sanggamte ahi a, na behte ahi a, mihau na vengte ahi zongin sam kei in. Amaute in zong an ne ding mahin nang hong samkik ding uh a, hih bangin hong sapna hangin na anvakna thaman a ngahkik na hi ding hi." 
Luke14:13 Tua bangin anvakna pawi na bawl ciangin mizawngte, khezawte, khebaite, le mittawte sam in." 
Luke14:14 Amaute in nang hong thukkik zo lo ding uh ahih manin nang a dingin a lungdamhuai hong hi ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh sihna panin mihoihte a thawhkik hun ciangin Pasian in nang tungah hong thukkik ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Luke14:15 An ne-a a tutpih mite khat in hih thu a zak ciangin Jesuh kiangah, “Pasian’ Ukna sungah an ne-a a tu mite bangzahin mi hampha ahi uh hiam?” a ci hi." 
Luke14:16 Jesuh in ama kiangah, “Khatvei mi khat in pawi lianpi khat bawlin mi tampi a sam hi." 
Luke14:17 Annek ding hun ciangin a nasempa sawl a, ‘Tu-in na khempeuh a baihsa-in omkhin ahih manin hong paita un,’ ci-in a khohsa mite a samsak hi." 
Luke14:18 Ahih hangin a khohsa mite in a pai theih loh nading uh paulap zong ciat uh hi. A masa pen pa in, ‘Lo khat ka lei a, ka va et ding kisam ahih manin kong pai thei kei ding hi,’ na ci hi." 
Luke14:19 Adang khat in, ‘Bawngtal kap nga ka lei a, a va sin ding ka hih manin kong pai thei kei ding hi,’ na ci hi." 
Luke14:20 Adang khat leuleu in, ‘Ka zi ding a kila khin phet ahih manin kong pai thei kei ding hi,’ na ci hi." 
Luke14:21 Tua ahih ciangin a nasempa hong ciahin a topa kiangah hih thute hong zasak hi. Tua ciangin innteek pa a heh suak a, a nasempa kiangah, ‘Khuasung kongzing khempeuhah va pai inla, mizawng, khezaw, mittaw, le khebai mite hong paipih in,’ ci-in a sawl leuleu hi." 
Luke14:22 Tua khit a sawt loin a nasempa in, ‘Topa aw, na cih bangin ka sam khin a, ahi zongin om nading mun omlai hi,’ a ci hi." 
Luke14:23 Tua ciangin a topa in a nasempa kiangah, ‘Gam sung lamliante le lamneute-ah va pai inla, ka inn-ah mi a dim theih nadingin mi khempeuh hong paipihmang khin in." 
Luke14:24 Ke’n kong cihin-ah, ka sap masak mite khat beek in ka an ciamkha lo ding uh hi,’ ci hi,” a ci hi." 
Luke14:25 Mi tampi tak in Jesuh hong zui uh a, Jesuh zong kihei-in amaute kiangah," 
Luke14:26 “Kei kiangah a hong pai mite peuhmah in a nu le a pa, a zi le a ta, a sanggam numeite le a sanggam pasalte, le ama pumpi mahmah a nial ngam kei leh keima nungzui suak thei lo ding hi." 
Luke14:27 Ama singlamteh mah puatawmin ka nung hong zui lote, keima nungzui hi thei lo hi." 
Luke14:28 Mi khatpeuh in inn lianpi khat lamding a sawm le, ka zozo ding hiam cih a theih nadingin a bei dingzah tuat masa hi." 
Luke14:29 Tua bangin tuat masa kei leh tua inn a khuampite a phuhkhit ciangin zawh lohpi-in khawl ding a, tua inn a kizo lo a mu mite khempeuh in amah nuihsan ding uh hi." 
Luke14:30 ‘Hih mipa in inn lamding kipan napi-in zozo lo hi,’ ci ding uh hi." 
Luke14:31 Galkap tul sawm a nei kumpi khat in galkap tul sawmnih tawh a hong kuan kumpi khat do dingin a kithawi leh, tua kumpipa a dozo ding mahin i hat takpi hiam ci-in ngaihsun masa ding hi." 
Luke14:32 A zozo ding ahih vet kei leh, tua kumpipa a hong tun ma, a gamla-ah a om lai-in, ama kiangah kamtaite sawl ding a, kilem nading thu gensak ding hi." 
Luke14:33 Tua mah bangin mi khat in a neih khempeuh a piakkhiat ngam kei leh keima nungzui suak thei lo ding hi. 
Luke14:34 “Ci hoih hi; ahi zongin a alna bei leh i al kiksak theih nading lampi om lo hi. 
Luke14:35 Lei hoihsak nadingin kizang thei lo a, eklei dingin zong kibawl thei lo ahih manin paihmawk a kul hi. Tua ahih manin zak nading bil a neite in za ta un,” a ci hi." 
Luke15:1 Khatvei, Jesuh’ thugen a ngai dingin siahdongte le mawhneite tampi tak a hong pai uh hi." 
Luke15:2 Farisi mite le Thukham hilh siate phun uh a, “Hih mipa, mawhneite tawh kikhawlin an nangawn nekhawm hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Luke15:3 Tua ahih manin Jesuh in amaute kiangah thugentehna khat gen a," 
Luke15:4 “Note sung panin khatpeuh in tuu zakhat nei-in, tua sung panin khat mansuah leh bangcih ding ahi hiam? Lopa ne-in a gamta tuu sawmkua le kuate nusia-in, a muh matengin tua a mang tuu khat a zong dingin kuankhia ding hi." 
Luke15:5 A muh ciangin lungdam mahmahin a liangko-ah pua-in ciahpih ding hi. 
Luke15:6 Inn a tun ciangin a lawmte le a vengte samin, ‘A mangsa ka tuu mukik ka hih manin ka nuam mahmah hi. Lungdamna pawi bawl ni,’ a ci ding hi." 
Luke15:7 Tua mah bangin kisikkik ding a kisam lo mihoih sawmkua le kuate tungah lungdamna sangin mawhnei mi khat a kisikna hangin vantungah lungdamna lianzaw ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Luke15:8 Tua ciangin Jesuh in tua ahih kei leh zong, “Numei khat in sum peek sawm a neih sung panin khat mansuah leh bangcih ding ahi hiam? Meivak vakin, a innsung teng phiatin, a muh matengin mun khempeuh limtakin zong ding hi." 
Luke15:9 A muh ciangin a lawmte le a vengte samin amaute kiangah, ‘Ka sum mansuahsa mukik ka hih manin ka nuam mahmah hi. Lungdamna pawi bawl ni,’ ci ding hi." 
Luke15:10 Tua mah bangin mawhnei mi khat a kisikkikna hangin Pasian’ vantung mite lungdam mahmah uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Luke15:11 Tua ciangin Jesuh in thugentehna khat gen leuleu a, “Mi khat in tapa nih a nei hi." 
Luke15:12 A nauzawpa in, ‘Pa aw, neihsa kei’ ngah ding tangteng tu-in hong pia in,’ a ci hi. Tua ahih manin a pa in zong, a ta tegel a hawmsak hi." 
Luke15:13 Ni tawmkhat khit ciangin a nauzawpa in ama neihsateng zuakin a sum tawh inn panin a gamlapi-ah paikhia a, a sumte a phengzat gawp hi." 
Luke15:14 A sum neih khempeuh a zatmang khit ciangin tua ama omna gamah kialpi tung a, ahi zongin amah in bangmah nei nawn lo hi." 
Luke15:15 Tua ahih manin tua gammite khat kiangah nasem dingin va pai a, a innteek pa in vokcing dingin ama lo-ah a sawl hi." 
Luke15:16 Vokte’ begap nekte nangawn a duhgawh ciang dongin om a, ahi zongin kuamah in an pia lo hi." 
Luke15:17 A tawpna-ah thu ngaihsun thei a, ‘Ka pa’ nasemte khempeuh in gaih zawh lohin an khamval nei uh a, tu-in hih lai-ah gilkialin a puksi ding ka hita hi." 
Luke15:18 Kei kithawi-in ka pa kiangah ka ciah ding a, “Pa aw, Pasian tung le nangma tungah ka khial khin hi." 
Luke15:19 Na tapa cih dingin zong kilawm nawn lo ka hih manin na nasemte khat bangin hong bawl lel in,” ka ci ding hi,’ a ci hi." 
Luke15:20 Tua ahih manin amah kithawi-in a pa kiangah a ciahkik dingin a pai hi. Ahi zongin inn a tun ma-in a pa in na galmuh a, hehpihhuaisa mahmah ahih manin va delhin, a tapa ngawng kawi-in a nam hi." 
Luke15:21 A tapa in, ‘Pa aw, Pasian tung le nangma tungah ka khialkhin hi. Na tapa cih dingin zong ka kilawm nawn kei hi,’ a ci hi." 
Luke15:22 Ahi zongin a pa in a nasemte sam a, ‘Hong manlang un. Puan hoihpen hong la unla silhsak un. A khutme-ah zungbuh butsak unla, a khe-ah khedap zong bulhsak un." 
Luke15:23 Tua ciangin i bawngno limcipen hong go unla, lungdam pawi bawl ni." 
Luke15:24 Bang hang hiam cih leh ka tapa a sisa hong nungta a, ka tapa a mangsa hong tungkik hi,’ a ci hi. Tua ahih manin lungdamna pawi bawl a kipan uh hi." 
Luke15:25 “Tua laitakin a tapa uzaw pen lo kuan hi a, vaiciah inn hong tun kuan ciangin lamna le lasakna gingte a za hi." 
Luke15:26 Amah in zong nasemte khat sam a, ‘Bang thu om ahi hiam?’ ci-in a dong hi." 
Luke15:27 ‘Na naupa hong tungkik hi. Cidamin hong tungkik ahih manin na pa in i bawngtalno limcipen go hi,’ ci-in a nasempa in a dawng hi." 
Luke15:28 A ta uzaw pen a heh suak mahmah ahih manin inn sungah zong hong tum nuam lo hi. Tua ahih manin a pa va pusuakin, a ta hong sungtumna dingin a zol hi." 
Luke15:29 A tapa uzaw in, ‘Tu a beisa hunsung khempeuh, nasemte khat bangin nangma a dingin na ka sem a, na thu zong kong nial ngei het kei hi. Tua hinapi, kei bang hong pia ngei na hi hiam? Ka lawmte tawh pawi ka bawl nadingin keel khat nangawn nong pia kei hi." 
Luke15:30 Ahi zongin hih na tapa in na neihsa khempeuh numei paktatte tungah zangmang khin a, hong ciahkik ciangin bawngtalno limcipen na gawh lai hi,’ a ci hi." 
Luke15:31 A pa in, ‘Ka ta aw, nang pen hih lai-ah kei tawh a omkhawm tawntung na hi a, keima neih khempeuh nangma a’ ahi hi." 
Luke15:32 Tu-in na naupa a sisa hong hingkik a, a mangsa hong tungkik ahih manin lungdamin pawi i bawl ding ahi hi,’ ci-in a pa in a dawng hi,” a ci hi." 
Luke16:1 Tua ciangin Jesuh in a nungzuite kiangah, “Sum hau pa khat om a, a neihsateng a uk dingin ama khutnuai-ah mi khat a koih hi. Tua a neihsateng a uk dingin a koih mipa in a topa’ sumteng phengzat gawp hi, ci-in kikhia hi." 
Luke16:2 A topa in zong amah sam a, ‘Na gamtatna ka zak a bangci thu ahi hiam? Keima neihsa a uk dingin hong koih thei nawn lo ding ka hih manin a beisa hun sungah ka neihsate na zeekna sazian a kimtakin hong pia in,’ a ci hi." 
Luke16:3 Tua ciangin a nasempa in lungngai a, ‘Ka topa in ka nasepna panin hong tawpsak ding ahih manin bangci gamtat ding ka hi hiam? Thatang nasep lah ka ngap kei a, nektawm ding mi kiangah nget ding lah ka maizum hi." 
Luke16:4 Tu’n ka gamtat nading ka theita hi. Tua ka ngaihsut bangin gamta leng, ka nasepna panin ka tawp ciangin lawm nei-in, amaute in a inn-ah kei hong tungsak ding uh hi,’ ci hi." 
Luke16:5 Tua ahih manin a topa’ sum a bate khat khatin sam a, a masa pen pa kiangah, ‘Ka topa tungah bangzah ba na hi hiam?’ a ci hi." 
Luke16:6 Amah in, ‘Sathau tambong zanih dim ba ing,’ ci hi. Tua ciangin amah in, ‘Na leibatna lai va la in,’ ci hi; tua ciangin, ‘Na leiba om lai sathau tambong zakhat hi. Tu mahmahin tusuk inla, tambong za khatin ciamteh in,’ ci hi." 
Luke16:7 Tua ciangin adang khat pa kiangah, ‘Nang bangzah ba na hi hiam?’ ci-in a dot ciangin, ‘Mangbuh seu zakhat ba ing,’ ci hi. Tua ciangin amah in, ‘Na leibatna lai va la in,’ ci hi; tua ciangin, ‘Na leiba om lai seu sawmgiat hi. Seu sawmgiat, ci-in ciamteh in,’ ci hi." 
Luke16:8 A diktat lo nasempa pen ama ngiansiamna hangin a topa in a pakta hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Pasian thu a zui mite sangin leitung mihingte pen a nasepna uhah ngiansiam zaw uh hi. 
Luke16:9 “Note kiangah kong genin-ah, hih na leitung sum uh a bei ciangin tawntung nuntakna inn-ah hong kilutsak theih nadingin lawm zonna-in hih leitung sumte na zang un." 
Luke16:10 “A tawmno-ah a diktatte pen a tamah zong diktat uh a, a tawmno-ah a citak lote pen a tamah zong citak lo uh hi." 
Luke16:11 Hih leitung sumte-ah na cihtak kei uhleh kua in no tungah vantung sum hong ap ngam ding ahi hiam? 
Luke16:12 Midangte’ neihsa tungah na cihtak kei uhleh, kua in no tungah nomau gamhluah ding hong ap ngam ding ahi hiam?" 
Luke16:13 “To nih’ na a semkhawmzo nasem kuamah om lo hi. A to khat mudahin khat it ding a, khat beelin khat a simmawh ding hi. Pasian’ na le leitung sum na na semkhawmzo kei ding uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Luke16:14 Sum a deih phadiak Farisi mite in hih thute a zak uh ciangin Jesuh a nuihsan uh hi. 
Luke16:15 Jesuh in amaute kiangah, “Mite in note a man penin hong ngaihsut theih nadingin na om uh a, ahi zongin Pasian in na lungsimtawng uh a hong thei hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh mihingte in a manpha mahmahin a ngaihsutte pen Pasian in bangmahin sim lo hi." 
Luke16:16 “Tuiphumpa Johan’ hun ciang dong Moses Thukham le kamsangte’ thugente pen zuih belin kinei a, ahi zongin Pasian’ Ukna hangin Lungdamna Thu a kihilh hun a kipanin hih thu-ah mi khempeuh hong kituhteh uh hi." 
Luke16:17 Ahi zongin Thukham a neupen themno khat nangawn a maiman’ ding sangin van le lei a manthan ding olzaw lai hi. 
Luke16:18 “Pasal khat in a zi ma-in numei dang a tenpih leh tua numei tawh a mawh hi a, a kima numei a tenpih pasal zong numei tawh a mawh mah ahi hi." 
Luke16:19 “Khatvei, mihau mahmah khat om a, nisimin puan manpha nono silhin, anlim nono ne-in a om hi." 
Luke16:20 Tua ciangin a pumtangin meima a vei, Lazaras a kici mizawng khat zong, mihau pa’ kongbiangah hong kikoih a," 
Luke16:21 mihau pa’ sabuai tung panin a kia annengte nenuamin a ngak hi. Tua bangin a om laitakin uite hong pai-in a meima hong liahliah sak uh hi. 
Luke16:22 Tua ciangin mizawng pa hong si a, vantung a Abraham kiangah a om dingin vantung mite in a paipih uh hi. Mihau pa zong hong si leuleu-in a kivui hi." 
Luke16:23 Ahi zongin hell khuk sungah gimna thuakin a om hi. A khuadak leh, gamlapi mun khatah Abraham le Lazaras a omkhawm a galmuh hi." 
Luke16:24 Tua ahih manin nakpitakin kiko a, ‘Pa Abraham aw, kei hong hehpih in. Meiphual sungah omin nakpitakin gimna thuak ka hih manin Lazaras in a khutme dawn tui diahin ka leii hong votsak nadingin hong sawl in,’ a ci hi." 
Luke16:25 Ahi zongin Abraham in, ‘Ka ta aw, leitungah na nuntak laitakun nang nopsakna namkim na ngah laitakin Lazaras in haksatna namkim a thuak hi. Ahi zongin tu-in amah in hih lai-ah nopsakna a ngah laitakin nangmah in haksatna a thuak na hi hi." 
Luke16:26 Tua tham loin, i kikalah kuam thukpi khat om a, hih lai panin nang kiangah hong pai nuamte kuamah pai zo lo a, nangma omna panin hih lai-ah zong kuamah hong pai zo lo hi,’ ci-in a dawng hi." 
Luke16:27 Tua ciangin mihau pa in, ‘Pa aw, tua bang ahihleh zong, ka inn uhah Lazaras nong sawlsak nadingin ka hong thum hi." 
Luke16:28 Inn-ah nau pasal nga ka nei lai a, ke’n gim ka thuakna hih lai munah hong tunkhak loh teitei nadingun kei’ gamtat bangin a gamtat loh nadingun hong hilhsak hen,’ a ci hi." 
Luke16:29 Ahi zongin Abraham in, ‘Na sanggamte a hilh dingin Moses le kamsangte om uh ahih manin tuate’ thugen na ngai ta uh hen,’ a ci hi." 
Luke16:30 Tua ciangin mihau pa in, ‘Pa Abraham aw, tua nong gen zong a kicing khin hi mah hi. Ahi zongin a sisa mi khat hingkikin amaute kiangah va paikik leh a mawhna panun ka naute kisik hamtang ding uh hi,’ a ci hi." 
Luke16:31 Ahi zongin Abraham in, ‘Amaute in Moses le kamsangte’ thu a mannop kei uhleh, mi khat hong hingkikin amaute kiangah a va gen hangin umsakzo tuan lo ding hi,’ ci-in a dawng hi,” a ci hi." 
Luke17:1 Tua ciangin Jesuh in a nungzuite kiangah, “Mite a puktheih nading ze-etna hong piang hamtang ding hi. Ahi zongin tua puk nading a piangsak mipa in gimna ngah ding hi." 
Luke17:2 Hih naupangno khat a khialh nading a piansak sangin a ngawngah an gawina suang lianpi khat khihin tuipi sungah kikhia leh ama a dingin hoihzaw thampek ding hi. 
Luke17:3 Note hoihtakin kingaihsun un. Na sanggampa uh no tungah hong khialh leh amah taii unla, a kisik leh a mawhna maisak un." 
Luke17:4 Nikhat sungin sagihvei ciang dong hong khialh hangin zong, a sagihvei mahin no kiangah hong pai-in, ‘Ka kisik hi,’ hong cih nakleh na maisak khin ding uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Luke17:5 Nikhat, sawltakte in Topa kiangah, “Ka upna uh hong liansak in,” a ci uh hi." 
Luke17:6 Topa in, “Ankam tang cia a pha upna nei le-uhcin, hih nailung kung kiangah, ‘Kizunglot inla tuipi sungah va po in,’ ci le-uhcin na cih bangun piangzo ding hi." 
Luke17:7 “Note khatpeuh in na lo uh hong khawhsak ahi a, na tuu uh a hong cinsak ahi zongin nasem khat nei le-uhcin, inn-ah a hong tun ciangin, ‘Hong pai inla na an ne pah in,’ na ci uh hiam?" 
Luke17:8 Na ci kei uh hi. Ama kiangah, ‘Ka nitak-an ding hong bawl inla, na puan silhin ka annek sungteng hong vil in. Ka man khit ciangin na ne thei ding hi,’ na cizaw uh hi." 
Luke17:9 Tua bangin a sawlteng a sepna hangin a nasempa tungah, ‘Ka nuam mahmah hi,’ ci tuan lo hi." 
Luke17:10 Tua mah bangin note in zong hong kisawlteng na sepkhit uh ciangin, ‘Nasem mawkmawkte mah ihi a, i tavuanteng bek mah a sem khin ihi hi,’ na ci uh hi,” ci-in a dawng hi." 
Luke17:11 Jerusalem khua manawhin Jesuh a pai laitakin Samaria le Galilee gam kikal tawnin a pai hi. 
Luke17:12 Khuaneu khatah a lut dektak laitakin miphak sawm in a dawntuah uh hi. Jesuh tawh a kigamla munah ding uh a," 
Luke17:13 nakpitakin kiko-in, “Topa Jesuh aw, kote hong hehpih in,” a ci uh hi." 
Luke17:14 Jesuh in amaute a muh ciangin, “Pai unla siampite va kivelsak un,” a ci hi. Amaute a va pai uh ciangin lamkalah a dam uh hi." 
Luke17:15 Amaute sung panin a damlam a kitheih ciangin khat hong lehtai kik a, nakpitakin Pasian a phat hi." 
Luke17:16 Tua ciangin Jesuh’ khe mai-ah bokin a lungdamna a ko hi. Hih mipa pen Samaria mi ahi hi. 
Luke17:17 Tua ciangin Jesuh hong paukhia a, “Mihing sawm kidamsak hi lo ahi hiam? Adang kuate koi lai-ah om ahi uh hiam?" 
Luke17:18 Bang hangin hih gamdang mipa bek Pasian’ tungah lungdamna a ko dingin hong kileh ahi hiam?” a ci hi. 
Luke17:19 Tua ciangin Jesuh in ama kiangah, “Tho inla ciah in. Na upna in nang hong damsak hi,” a ci hi." 
Luke17:20 Khatvei Farisi mite pawlkhat in, cik ciangin Pasian’ Ukna hun hong tung ding ahi hiam, ci-in Jesuh dong uh a, Jesuh in, “Pasian’ Ukna pen mit tawh muhtheihin hong tung lo ding hi." 
Luke17:21 Hih lai-ah om hi, hua lai-ah om hi, cih bangin kuama gentheih hi lo hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh note lakah Pasian’ Ukna hong om khinzo hi,” ci-in a dawng hi." 
Luke17:22 Tua ciangin Jesuh in nungzuite kiangah, “Nikhat ni ciangin Mihing Tapa nikhat sung bek nangawn na muhnop hun uh hong tung ding a, ahi zongin na mu kei ding uh hi." 
Luke17:23 Mite in, ‘Hih lai-ah om hi,’ hong ci ding uh hi. Ahi zongin amau’ cihna mun a en dingin paikhia kei un." 
Luke17:24 Amah hong pai taktak ciangin khuaphialep in van mong khat pan mong khat dong hong taanzaih mah bangin kitheikim ding hi. 
Luke17:25 Ahi zongin amah in gimna tampi tak thuak masa ding a, ama huna mite in amah nial ding uh hi." 
Luke17:26 Noah hunin up lohpi-in tuiciin a tun bangin Mihing Tapa zong uploh hun khatin hong tung ding hi. 
Luke17:27 Teembaw sungah Noah lutin Tuiciin in mi khempeuh a sihsak ni ciang dongin tua huna mite in anne zune-in om uh a, mo kipi mo kikha-in a om uh hi." 
Luke17:28 Lot huna mah tawh zong hong kibang ding hi. Tua hun lai-in zong anne zune-in om uh a, sumlei sumzuak, lokho, inn lamin a omom laitakun," 
Luke17:29 Sodom panin Lot a paikhiat ni-in van panin kaat leh meikuang hong kiasuk a, amaute khempeuh a kangtum hi." 
Luke17:30 Mihing Tapa hong kilat ni ciangin zong tua mah tawh hong kibang ding hi. 
Luke17:31 “Tuani a hong tun ciangin a innkhum zangah a om mipa in a innsunga a om a neihsate a la dingin kumsuk kei hen. Tua mah bangin lo-ah a om mipa zong a inn-ah ciahkik kei hen. 
Luke17:32 Lot’ zi na phawk un. 
Luke17:33 A nuntakna a hu nuamte in a nuntakna bulpi taanlawh ding a, a nuntakna a taanlawhte in a nuntakna bulpi huzo ding hi." 
Luke17:34 Ke’n kong cihin-ah, tuahun laitakin zanin lupna tungah a lumkhawm mi nih sung panin khat kila-in khat kinusia ding hi." 
Luke17:35 An a sukhawm numei nih, khat kila-in khat kinusia ding hi." 
Luke17:36 Lo a kuankhawm mi nih, khat kila-in khat kinusia ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Luke17:37 Tua ciangin a nungzuite in Jesuh kiangah, “Topa aw, koi laitakah tua thute hong piang ding ahi hiam?” ci-in a dot uh ciangin Jesuh in, “Sapul omna peuhah musane a om mah bangin mi omna peuhah hong piang ding hi,” ci-in a dawng hi." 
Luke18:1 Tua ciangin amaute in thu ngen tawntungin a lungkiat ngei loh nading uh a hilh nopna-in Jesuh in a nungzuite kiangah thugentehna khat gen a," 
Luke18:2 “Khuapi khat sungah Pasian a zahtak lo, mi zong a don lo thukhen mang khat a om hi." 
Luke18:3 Tua khuasung mahah meigong numei khat zong om a, ama kiangah hong pai tawntungin, ‘Ka thu uh hong khensak in,’ ci-in a thum tawntung hi." 
Luke18:4 Tawlkhat sung thudon loin om a, ahi zongin a nung ciangin, ‘Pasian zahtak loin, mite zong ka donnop kholloh hangin," 
Luke18:5 hih meigongnu in hong nawngkaisak niloh ahih manin, a thu khensak kei leng, hong pai nilohin hong lunggimsak ding hi,’ ci-in ngaihsun hi,” a ci hi." 
Luke18:6 Tua ciangin Topa in, “Hih mihoih lo thukhen pa’ kampauna ngaihsun un." 
Luke18:7 A sun a zanin ama tungah a thumthum ama mite’ thu a manin Pasian in khensak lo ding ahi hiam? Amaute a huh ding kizekaisak ding ahi hiam? 
Luke18:8 Ke’n kong cihin-ah, amaute’ thu a manin manlang takin khensak ding hi. Ahi zongin Mihing Tapa hong pai ciangin leitungah amah a um mi a mu ding hiam?” ci-in a genthuah hi." 
Luke18:9 Amaute hoih kisa mahmahin, midang khempeuh a simmawhbawl mite tungah Jesuh in zong thugentehna khat gen a," 
Luke18:10 “Thungen dingin biakinn-ah mi nih a pai uh hi. Khat pen Farisi mi hi a, a khat pen siahdongpa ahi hi." 
Luke18:11 Farisi mipa dingin thu ngen a, ‘Pasian aw, kei pen midangte bangin a huaiham, a thuman lo, numei tungah a mawh mi ka hi kei hi; hua lai-a siahdongpa bang hi lo ka hih manin nangma tungah ka nuamna kong pulak hi." 
Luke18:12 Nipikal khatin ni nih sung an ka tang a, ka ngah khempeuh sung panin sawm-ah-khat nang tungah kong pia hi,’ a ci hi." 
Luke18:13 Ahi zongin siahdongpa pen a gamla simah ding a, vantung lamah zong dak ngam loin a dip humin kuncip a, ‘Pasian aw, kei mimawh mi khial pa hong hehpih in,’ ci-in a ngen hi." 
Luke18:14 Ke’n kong cihin-ah, hih mipa pen Pasian tawh a kilemsa-in a inn-ah ciah a, a khat pa pen tua bangin ciah lo hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh a kiliansakte pen kiniamkhiatsuk ding a, a kiniamkhiatte pen a lianin kibawl ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Luke18:15 Jesuh in thupha a piaksak ding a deihna-un mi pawlkhat in a naupangnote nangawn uh Jesuh kiangah hong paipih uh hi. A nungzuite in hih thu a theih uh ciangin amaute na taii uh hi. 
Luke18:16 Ahi zongin Jesuh in naupangnote sam a, “Naupangte hong pai ding khaktan kei un; ka kiangah hong paisak un. Bang hang hiam cih leh naupang a bang mite pen Pasian’ Ukna sungah om thei bek hi." 
Luke18:17 Ke’n kong cihin-ah, naupang bangin Pasian’ Ukna a mang lo peuhmah Pasian’ Ukna sungah om thei lo ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Luke18:18 Jew mi ulian khat in Jesuh kiangah, “A dik siapa aw, nuntak tawntungna ka ngah nadingin bang hih ding ka hi hiam?” ci-in a dong hi." 
Luke18:19 Jesuh in, “Bang hangin kei midik hong ci na hi hiam? Pasian simloh kuamah a diktatzo om lo hi." 
Luke18:20 Numei tungah mawh kei in; mi that kei in; mi’ neihsa gu kei in; zuauthu gen kei in; na nu na pa zahtak in, cihna thukhamte thei lo na hi hiam?” a ci hi." 
Luke18:21 Tua ciangin amah in, “Ka neutung a kipanin hih thukhamte khempeuh ka zuihsa ahi hi,” ci-in a dawng hi." 
Luke18:22 Jesuh in hih thu a zak ciangin ama kiangah, “Na khat na kisam lai hi. Na neihsa khempeuh zuak inla, mizawngte tungah na sum khotte pia in. Tua hileh vantungah na hau ding hi. Tua khit ciangin ka nung hong zui in,” a ci hi." 
Luke18:23 Ahi zongin tua mipa in hih thu a zak ciangin amah hau mahmah ahih manin a dah a suak hi. 
Luke18:24 Jesuh in ama dahna a muh ciangin, “Pasian’ Ukna sungah mihaute a lut ding bangzah takin haksa ahi hiam?" 
Luke18:25 Pasian’ Ukna sungah mihau khat a lut ding sangin phim bilvang sungah kalaoh khat a lut ding baihzaw lai hi,” a ci hi." 
Luke18:26 Tua thu a za mite in, “Tua bang ahihleh kua in hotkhiatna ngahzo ding ahi hiam?” ci-in a dong uh hi." 
Luke18:27 Ahi zongin Jesuh in, “Mihingte’ hih zawh loh pen Pasian in hihzo hi,” ci-in a dawng hi." 
Luke18:28 Tua ciangin Peter in, “Ko zong ka inn ka lo uh nusia-in nang ka hong zui uh hi,” a cih ciangin" 
Luke18:29 Jesuh in amaute kiangah, “A mantakin kong genin-ah, Pasian’ Uk ding a deihna hangin a inn a lo, a zi a ta, a nu a pa, ahih kei leh a sanggamte a nusiate in," 
Luke18:30 tuhunin a zah tampi, le hong tung ding hunah nuntak tawntungna a ngah lo ding kuamah om lo hi,” a ci hi." 
Luke18:31 Tua ciangin Jesuh in nungzui sawm le nihte a tuamin paikhiatpihin amaute kiangah, “Tu-in Jerusalem khua-ah a pai ding ihi a, kamsangte in Mihing Tapa’ thu a gelh khempeuh, tua lai munah a hong tung ding hi." 
Luke18:32 Pasian in Gentail mite’ khut sungah amah ap ding a, amaute in zahpihin, simmawhin, cilphih ding uh hi." 
Luke18:33 Tua ciangin amah satin that ding uh a, ahi zongin a ni thum ni-in hingkik ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Luke18:34 Ahi zongin nungzuite in hih ama thugente tel zo lo uh hi. Amaute’ tel zawh loh dingin kihem gen ahih manin, Jesuh’ gente bang a cihnopna ahi hiam, ci-in a thei kei uh hi." 
Luke18:35 Jerikho khua kiang Jesuh a tun ciangin lampi gei-ah khutdawh a ngen mittaw khat a na tu hi. 
Luke18:36 Mihon a paina a zak ciangin bang ahi hiam, ci-in a dong hi." 
Luke18:37 Mite in, “Nazareth khuami Jesuh hong pai hi,” a na ci uh hi." 
Luke18:38 Tua ciangin nakpitakin amah kiko a, “David’ suan Jesuh aw, kei hong hehpih in,” a na ci hi." 
Luke18:39 A mai-a om mite in amah taii uh a, pau kei in, ci-in a kham uh hi. Ahi zongin amah kinakko semsem a, “David’ suanpa aw, kei hong hehpih in,” ci veve hi." 
Luke18:40 Tua ahih manin Jesuh zong khawl a, ama kiangah mittaw pa a kipaipih nadingin thu a pia hi. A geinai hong tun ciangin Jesuh in," 
Luke18:41 “Bang kong hihsak ding deih na hi hiam?” ci-in a dot ciangin, “Topa aw, khua ka mukik thei nuam hi,” ci-in a dawng hi." 
Luke18:42 Tua ciangin Jesuh in, “Na upna in nang hong damsak khinta hi,” a ci hi." 
Luke18:43 Amah in zong thakhatin khua muthei pah a, Jesuh zui-in Pasian tungah a lungdamna a ko hi. Mihonpite in zong a muh ciangin a vekpi-un Pasian a phat uh hi." 
Luke19:1 Jerikho khua-ah Jesuh lut a, a paisuak dingin khuasung a nawk laitakin," 
Luke19:2 Zakkhias a kici siahdong ukpa khat na om a, amah mihau khat ahi hi." 
Luke19:3 Amah in Jesuh kua hiam cih a muh nadingin hanciam hi; ahi zongin amah mi tuntom khat ahih manin mihon lakah a mu zo kei hi. 
Luke19:4 Tua ahih manin amah na matai a, Jesuh a muhtheih nadingin a tot nading lampi gei-a theithek kung tungah a na kah hi." 
Luke19:5 Jesuh, tua mun a tun ciangin khuadak to-in ama kiangah, “Zakkhias aw, manlangin hong kumsuk in. Na inn-ah tuzan kong taam ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Luke19:6 Tua ahih manin Zakkhias zong hong kum mengmeng a, lungdam mahmahin a inn-ah Jesuh a tungsak hi." 
Luke19:7 Hih thu a thei mi khempeuh phun uh a, “Mimawh pa’ inn-ah a giak dingin Jesuh a pai hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Luke19:8 Tua ciangin Zakkhias dingin Topa kiangah, “Topa aw, ka neihsa a kimkhat mizawngte tungah ka pia ding hi. Mi khatpeuh khemin a na ka laksak leh a zah li-in ka lohkik ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Luke19:9 Tua ciangin Jesuh in ama kiangah, “Tuni-in hih innkuan in hotkhiatna a ngah hi. Hih mipa pen Abraham’ suante khat zong hi lai hi." 
Luke19:10 Bang hang hiam cih leh a mangthangte a zong ding le a honkhia dingin Mihing Tapa a hong pai ahi hi,” a ci hi." 
Luke19:11 Jesuh pen Jerusalem khua a tung dektak hi a, Pasian’ Ukna hun hong tung kuanta ding hi, ci-in mite in zong ngaihsun uh ahih manin, mite in ama thugen a na ngaih laitakun Jesuh in amaute kiangah thugentehna khat genthuah lai a," 
Luke19:12 “Khatvei, ulian khat om a, kumpi za a lakkhit ciangin a ciahkik dingin gamlapi gamah a pai dingin a ding khia hi." 
Luke19:13 A dinkhiat ma-in ama nasem mihing sawmte sam a, amaute tungah sum zakhat ciat pia-in, ‘Ka om loh sungin hih sumte tawh na siam bang bangun sum na bawl ciat un,’ ci-in a vaikhak hi." 
Luke19:14 Ahi zongin ama gammite in hih ulianpa mudah uh ahih manin ama nungah kamtai sawl uh a, ‘Ka kumpi dingun nang kong deih kei uh hi,’ cisak uh hi." 
Luke19:15 “Ahi zongin hih ulianpa kumpi za ngahsa-in hong tunkik ciangin, sum a ap a nasemte in bangzah ciat a na meetsak uh hiam ci-in a theih nadingin a kiangah a nasemte hong pai nadingun thu a pia hi." 
Luke19:16 A nasem khat hong pai masa a, ‘Topa aw, nong sum piak zakhat tawh tulkhat ka meetsak hi,’ hong ci hi." 
Luke19:17 Amah in, ‘Hoih mahmah hi; nang pen nasem gina na hi hi. Thuneu-ah citak na hih manin khuapi sawm na uk ding hi,’ a ci hi." 
Luke19:18 Tua ciangin a nasem nihna pa hong pai a, ‘Topa aw, nong sum piak zakhat tawh zanga ka meetsak hi,’ hong ci hi." 
Luke19:19 Amah in, ‘Khuapi nga na uk ding hi,’ a ci hi." 
Luke19:20 Tua ciangin a nasem dang khat hong pai a, ‘Topa aw, hih lai-ah na sum zakhat om hi. Mainul khat tawh tunin ka seelcip hi." 
Luke19:21 Nang pen mi sit hak khat na hih manin kong kihta hi. Sum lam lopi-in sum deih pa na hi a, lokho lopi-in an la nuampa na hi hi,’ a hong ci hi." 
Luke19:22 A topa in ama kiangah, ‘Nasem ginalopa aw, nangma kampau mah tawh nang na kiman hi. Sum lam lopi-in sum ka deihlam, lokho lopi-in an la nuamin, mi sit hak ka hihlam nong thei hi." 
Luke19:23 Tua bangin hong thei na hih leh bang hangin sumkholna-ah ka sumte na koih lo na hi hiam? Na koih hi lecin, kong tunkik ciangin a pi le a meet kigawm ka ngahkik ding hi,’ a ci hi." 
Luke19:24 Tua ciangin a kiangah a ding a nasemte kiangah, ‘Ama tung panin a sum zakhat la unla, sum tulkhat a nei nasempa tungah pia un,’ a ci hi." 
Luke19:25 Amaute in a topa kiangah, ‘Topa aw, amah in sum tulkhat neikhin hi lo ahi hiam?’ a ci uh hi." 
Luke19:26 A topa in, ‘Ke’n kong cihin-ah, a neisate tungah kipiathuah ding a, ahi zongin a nei lote tung panin themkhat a neihsun nangawn kilaksak ding hi." 
Luke19:27 Tu-in, kumpi dingin kei a hong deih lo ka galte pen hih lai-ah hong paipih unla, keima muhna-ah that un,’ ci hi,” a ci hi." 
Luke19:28 Jesuh in hih thuteng a genkhit ciangin amah masa-in Jerusalem khua manawhin a paisuak hi. 
Luke19:29 Oliv Mual tunga a om Bethfage le Bethany khuanai a tun ciangin a nungzuite nih masawlin 
Luke19:30 amaute kiangah, “Mai-a om khua-ah va pai un. A khuasung na lut uh ciangin kuamah a tuan ngei nai lohna lano khat khau a kikhih na mu ding uh hi. A khau sut unla, hih lai-ah hong kai un." 
Luke19:31 Mi khatpeuh in, ‘Bang hangin sut na hi uh hiam?’ hong cih leh, ‘Topa in deih hi,’ ci-in dawng un,” ci-in a vaikhak hi." 
Luke19:32 Amau tegel zong paipah uh a, Jesuh’ gen bang teekteek mahin a na om hi." 
Luke19:33 A la khau a sut laitakun la neite in, “Bang hangin sut na hi uh hiam?” ci-in a dot ciangin," 
Luke19:34 “Topa in deih hi,” ci-in a dawng uh hi." 
Luke19:35 Amaute in Jesuh kiangah a la paipih uh a, a lano tungah a puan uh phahin Jesuh a tuangsak uh hi." 
Luke19:36 La tungah tuangin Jesuh a pai laitakin a lampi tungah mite in a puante uh na phah uh hi. 
Luke19:37 Jerusalem khua a tunkuan, Oliv Muala lam suktuah a kipatna panin Jesuh’ nung a zui mihonpite khempeuh in amau muhsa nalamdang liante hangin, nakpitakin a gingin Pasian’ tungah lungdamna ko-in amah phat ding kipan uh a," 
Luke19:38 “Pasian in Topa’ tangin a hong pai kumpipa, thupha pia tahen. Vantungah nopna om hen la, Pasian’ min thang ta hen,” ci-in a awng uh hi." 
Luke19:39 Tua ciangin mihon lak panin Farisi mi pawlkhat in Jesuh kiangah, “Sia aw, hih bangin a awng na nung hong zuite kham in,” a cih ciangin" 
Luke19:40 Jesuh in, “Ke’n kong cihin-ah, hih mite in hong phat loin khawl ta le-uh zong, hih lamdung a suangte in phatin awng veve ding uh hi,” ci-in a dawng hi." 
Luke19:41 Jerusalem khua hong nai semsem a, a khuapi a muh ciangin Jesuh in tamlawh a," 
Luke19:42 “Nopsak tawntung theih nading bang kisam hiam, ci-in tuni-in thei lecin ut mahmah ing. Ahi zongin nang na theithei kei hi." 
Luke19:43 Na kimkotah na galte in a panmun ding uh hong to-in, hong umcihin hong nehcih hun hong tung ding hi." 
Luke19:44 Nang le na kulh sunga om mi khempeuh hong sumai ding uh a, a omna ngei munah suang khat zong om nawn lo ding hi. Hih bang a pianna pen nang a hu dingin Pasian hong pailam na phawk lohna hang ahi hi,” a ci hi." 
Luke19:45 Tua ciangin biakinn sungah Jesuh lutin a sunga om sumbukte hawlkhiat ding kipan a," 
Luke19:46 “‘Ka inn pen thungetna inn kici ding hi,’ ci-in Pasian in a genna thu Lai Siangtho sungah kigelh hi. Ahi zongin note in gutate’ bukna phualpi na suaksak uh hi,” ci-in amaute kiangah a gen hi." 
Luke19:47 Jesuh in nisimin biakinn sungah thu a hilh hi. Siampi liante, Thukham hilh siate, le upate in amah thatnuam uh hi;" 
Luke19:48 ahi zongin mi khempeuh in a thugente mal khat zong khahsuah nuam loin a thu ngai tawntung uh ahih manin a suktheih nading uh a hun om thei lo hi. 
Luke20:1 Nikhat, Jesuh in biakinntual sungah mite kiangah thu hilhin, Lungdamna Thu genin a om laitakin, siampi liante, Thukham hilh siate, le upate hong paikhawm uh a," 
Luke20:2 Jesuh kiangah, “Kua’ thu tawh hih bangin gamta a, kua in thu hong pia ahi hiam, hong gen dih in,” ci-in a dot uh ciangin" 
Luke20:3 Jesuh in, “Kei zong thu khat ka hong dong ding hi. Hong gen dih un." 
Luke20:4 Johan’ tuiphumna pen Pasian’ tung panin thu ngah ahi hiam, ahih kei leh mihing tung panin thu ngah ahi hiam?” ci-in a dawng hi." 
Luke20:5 Tua ciangin amaute khatlekhat kikum uh a, “Pasian’ tung panin thu ngah hi,” ci lehang, “Bang hangin ama thu um lo na hi uh hiam?” hong ci ding a," 
Luke20:6 “Mihing tung panin a ngah hi,” ci leuleu lehang, Johan pen kamsang taktak hi, ci-in mi khempeuh in um uh ahih manin suang tawh hong denglum ding uh hi, a kici uh hi." 
Luke20:7 Tua ahih manin Johan’ tuiphumna pen kua thu tawh hiam, cih thei kei ung, ci-in a dawng uh hi." 
Luke20:8 Tua ciangin Jesuh in amaute kiangah, “Hih bangin ka nasepnate kua’ thu tawh ka sep hiam cih kei zong kong gen kei ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Luke20:9 Tua ciangin Jesuh in mite kiangah thugentehna khat gen a, “Mi khat in lo zuanin leenggui suan a, lo khawhlawhte khawhlawh sakin, amah gam dangah pai-in sauveipi a tam hi." 
Luke20:10 Leenggah min hun a tun ciangin ama ngahzah tang ding a va la dingin lo khawhlawhte kiangah a nasemte khat a sawl hi. Ahi zongin lo khawhlawhte in amah na satgawp uh a, khut hawmguakin a ciahsak uh hi." 
Luke20:11 Tua ciangin nasem dang khat sawl leuleu a, lo khawhlawhte in tua pa zong na satgawpin maizumsak gawp uh a, khut hawmguak mahin a ciahsak uh hi." 
Luke20:12 Tua ciangin a thumveina dongin a nasem dang khat mah sawl leuleu a, lo khawhlawhte in amah zong na liamsak gawpin na sawnkhia uh hi." 
Luke20:13 Tua ciangin leenggah lonei pa in, ‘Bang cih ding ka hi hiam? Ka it mahmah ka tapa ka sawl ding hi. Amaute in amah na zahtakbawl kha ding uh hi,’ a ci hi." 
Luke20:14 Ahi zongin lo khawhlawhte in a tapa a muh uh ciangin khatlekhat in, ‘Hih pa, a gamhluah ding pa ahi hi. Ama gamhluah ding teng i ngahtheih nadingin amah that ni,’ a ci uh hi." 
Luke20:15 Tua ahih manin amaute in lo nawlah amah sawnkhia-in a that uh hi. “Tua ahihleh lonei pa in hih lo khawhlawhte bang cih ding ahi hiam? 
Luke20:16 Amah hong pai-in hih lo khawhlawhte that ding a, midangte khawhlawhsak ding hi,” a ci hi. Amaute in hih thu a zak uh ciangin, “Hih bangin piang kei ta peuh hen,” a ci uh hi." 
Luke20:17 Tua ciangin Jesuh in amaute enin, “‘Innlamte in a nilkhiat suang pen innkiu suang bulpi suak khinta hi,’ ci-in Lai Siangtho in a gen pen bang a cihnopna ahi hiam?" 
Luke20:18 Tua suang tungah a kia mi khempeuh kizangawp ding a, mi khatpeuh tungah tua suang a kiat leh zong dengvuigawp ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Luke20:19 Jesuh in hih thugentehna a gen pen amaute a cihnopna hi, ci-in Thukham hilh siate le siampi liante in thei uh ahih manin Jesuh manpah nuam uh hi; ahi zongin mihonte kihta uh ahih manin manpah ngam lo uh hi." 
Luke20:20 Tua ahih manin a hunhoih ngakin vil gige uh a, ukna aana a neite’ khut sungah Jesuh a aptheih nadingun ama kampau tawh a mat nopna-un, lungsim takpi tawh thudong a va kineihkhem dingin mi pawlkhat thukan dingin a cial uh hi." 
Luke20:21 Hih thukante in Jesuh kiangah, “Sia aw, na thuhilhnate le na thugente man mahmah hi. Nang in miliante zahtakbawl tuan loin, Pasian’ thu a mantakin na hilhna ka thei uh hi." 
Luke20:22 Rom Kumpipa Sisar’ tungah siah i piak ding a kilawm mah ahi hiam, kilawm lo ahi hiam?” ci-in a dong uh hi." 
Luke20:23 Ahi zongin Jesuh in amau’ ngianbawlna thei ahih manin," 
Luke20:24 “Sum peek khat hong lak dih un. Hih sum tunga om lim le min kua-a’ ahi hiam?” a cih ciangin, “Kumpipa’ lim le min hi,” ci-in a dawng uh hi." 
Luke20:25 Tua ciangin Jesuh in, “Tua ahihleh, Kumpipa a’ teng Kumpipa tungah na pia unla, Pasian a’ teng Pasian’ tungah na pia un,” a ci hi." 
Luke20:26 Ama kampauna tawh mihon lak panin a mat nadingun thu om thei lo ahih manin ama thudawnna hangin lamdangsa-in a om khikhe uh hi. 
Luke20:27 Tua ciangin, “Thawhkikna om lo hi,” a ci mi pawlkhat Jesuh kiangah hong pai uh a," 
Luke20:28 “Sia aw, Moses in eite a dingin ngeina khat hong koihsak a, ‘Mi khat in ta nei loin a zi a sihsan leh, tua a sipa’ khang a kizop theihna dingin a naupa in tua meigongnu tenpih ta hen,’ ci hi." 
Luke20:29 Khatvei, unau pasal sagih om hi. A u pen in zi nei a, ta nei loin a si hi." 
Luke20:30 Tua ciangin a naupa in tenpih a," 
Luke20:31 tua banah a nausawn in tenpih leuleu hi. Tua bangin a unau sagih dongin tenpih uh a, ta nei lo vive-in a si khin uh hi." 
Luke20:32 A tawpna-ah numei zong hong si hi. 
Luke20:33 A unau sagih mahin hihnu tenpih ciat khin uh ahih manin thawhkik ni ciangin hih numei pen a kua pen’ zi hi ding ahi hiam?” ci-in a dong uh hi. 
Luke20:34 Tua ciangin Jesuh in, “Tu huna hih leitung mite in numei le pasal kitenna nei uh hi." 
Luke20:35 Ahi zongin sihna panin thokikin a hong tung ding hunah a nungta dingin a kilawm mite in kitenna cihte nei lo uh hi. 
Luke20:36 Amaute pen vantungmi tawh kibang uh a, sithei nawn lo uh hi. Sihna panin a thokik khinte ahih manin amaute pen Pasian’ tate ahi uh hi." 
Luke20:37 Tua tham loin Moses in zong misite a thawhkikna thu teltakin hong lak hi. Sawlpang kuang thu a genna munah Topa pen, ‘Abraham Pasian, Isaac Pasian, Jakob Pasian,’ ci-in a na gen hi." 
Luke20:38 Amaute khempeuh hing uh ahih manin, Pasian pen mihingte’ Pasian hi a, misite’ Pasian hi lo hi, a cihnopna ahi hi,” ci-in a dawng hi." 
Luke20:39 Tua ciangin Thukham hilh siate pawlkhat in, “Sia aw, na dawnna hoih mahmah hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Luke20:40 Tua ahih manin Saddusi mite in thu a dong ngam nawn kei uh hi. 
Luke20:41 Ahi zongin Jesuh in amaute kiangah, “Bang hangin Thukham hilh siate in Khrih pen David’ suan hi, ci zenzen ahi uh hiam?" 
Luke20:42 Bang hang hiam cih leh David mahmah in La Bu sungah, ‘Topa in keima Topa tungah thu gen a: Na galte, na khenuai-ah ka koih matengin ka taklamah tu in,’ ci hi." 
Luke20:43  
Luke20:44 David in Khrih pen, ‘Topa,’ ci ahih manin bang hangin Khrih pen David’ suan hi thei ding ahi hiam?” a ci hi." 
Luke20:45 Tua ciangin Jesuh in mi khempeuh zakin a nungzuite kiangah," 
Luke20:46 “Thukham hilh siate na batkhak loh nadingun kidawm un. Amaute in puantualpi silhnuam uh a, mihon lakah a kizahtak hopih ding deihin, kikhopna innsung le pawi lakah a om uh ciangin uliante’ tutna mun hoihte bekah tunuam uh hi." 
Luke20:47 Meigong numeite tungah nuamtaksa-in, khemin a neihsateng uh laksak uh a, mite in mihoih a sak nading uh a deihna-un thu saupipi a ngen uh hi. Amau’ kineihkhemna tawh kizui-in a gimthuak ding uh lianzaw ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Luke21:1 Jesuh a khuadak leh mihaute in biakinn sumkuang sungah a letsong uh a khiatna," 
Luke21:2 le a zawng meigong khat in zong sumnen tang nih a khiat a mu hi. 
Luke21:3 Tua ciangin amah in, “Ke’n kong cihin-ah, hih a zawng meigongnu in a dangte khempeuh sangin tamzaw a khia hi." 
Luke21:4 Bang hang hiam cih leh adangte in a zatval uh sumte a khia uh ahi hi. Ahi zongin hih numei a zawng mahmah hinapi-in a nuntak nading khempeuh a khia khin ahi hi,” a ci hi." 
Luke21:5 Mi pawlkhat in suang hoih mahmahte tawh kilamin tua biakinn hoihin a thupi mahmahna le Pasian tungah letsong tampi a kipiaknate a gen uh ciangin Jesuh in," 
Luke21:6 “Tu-a na muh uh hih nate khempeuh a siatgawp ding hun hong tung ding hi. Inn lamna-a a kiciang suangte a kithuapin a om nangawn om nawn loin kiphelkekmang ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Luke21:7 Tua ciangin amaute in, “Cik ciangin hih thu hong piang ding a, hih thu a pian ding ciangin bang lim hong om ding ahi hiam?” ci-in a dot uh ciangin" 
Luke21:8 Jesuh in, “Kidawm unla, mi’ khemsa-in ta kei un. Bang hang hiam cih leh keimah a kineih mi tampi hong pai ding uh a, ‘Keimah, Khrih ka hi hi; a hun hong tungta hi,’ hong ci ding uh hi. Tua bang mite’ nung zuikha kei un." 
Luke21:9 Gal thu ahi a, gam kilumlet nading thu ahi zongin na zak uh ciangin lau kei un. Hih bang thute a hong piang masa ding mah hi a, ahi zongin bei nading hong naita hi, a cihnopna hi nai lo hi,” a ci hi." 
Luke21:10 Tua ciangin Jesuh in a thugen zomlai a, “Gam khat le gam khat hong kido-in, kumpi khat le kumpi khat hong kido ding hi." 
Luke21:11 Mun khempeuhah nakpitakin zin hong lingin, kialpi le pulnatna zong hong tung ding hi. A kihtakhuai a tuamtuamte le lim lianpipi vanah hong kilang ding hi." 
Luke21:12 Ahi zongin hihte khempeuh hong pianma-in keima hangin note hong kimanin hong kibawlsia ding hi. Kikhopna innte-ah thusitna thuakin thongah khiat dingin hong ki-ap ding a, ukpite le kumpite mai-ah hong kipaipih ding hi." 
Luke21:13 Hih hun sung pen note in Lungdamna Thu na gentheih nading uh hunhoih ahi hi. 
Luke21:14 Tua hun ciangin eite in bangci gen ding cih lunghihmawhin nei kei un. 
Luke21:15 Bang hang hiam cih leh tua hun ciangin note’ gen ding thu le pilna kong guan ding a, na galte uh khat beek in note’ thugen hong nialzo loin, zong hong sel zo lo ding uh hi." 
Luke21:16 Na nu na pate, na sanggamte, na behte, le na lawmte mahmah un note hong khia ding a, note pawlkhat in thahna na thuak ding uh hi." 
Luke21:17 Mi khempeuh in keima hangin note hong mudah ding uh hi.
