Luke21:18 Ahi zongin na samzang khat nangawn uh mangthang lo ding hi. 
Luke21:19 Hih bangin thuakzo le-uhcin nuntakna taktak ngah ding na hih manun kiptakin om un. 
Luke21:20 “Galkapte in Jerusalem khuapi a umcihna na muh uh ciangin tua khuapi a siat nading naita hi, ci-in na thei ding uh hi." 
Luke21:21 Tua ciangin Judea gam sunga omte mualtungah tai un. Jerusalem khuasunga omte zong taikhia unla, gam sung khuaneu-a om mite, Jerusalem khua sungah lut nawn kei un." 
Luke21:21 Tua ciangin Judea gam sunga omte mualtungah tai un. Jerusalem khuasunga omte zong taikhia unla, gam sung khuaneu-a om mite, Jerusalem khua sungah lut nawn kei un." 
Luke21:22 Bang hang hiam cih leh Lai Siangtho sungah a kigelh mah bangin, ‘Gim Piak Ni,’ ahi hi." 
Luke21:23 Tua huna naupaiite le naungek neite a dingin haksa mahmah ding hi. Hih leitungah gimna lianpi hong tung ding a, Pasian in hih mite gim a pia ding hi." 
Luke21:24 Mi pawlkhat, namsau tawh kithat ding a, pawlkhat, galmatin gam dangah kiciahpih ding hi. Tua ciangin Gentail mite’ uk hun a bei matengin Jerusalem khuapi a siacipin om ding hi." 
Luke21:25 “Ni, kha, le aksite tungah lim hong om ding hi. Tuipi ging le tuihual liante kihtakna hangin leitung mi khempeuh lau-in lunggim ding uh hi." 
Luke21:26 Leitungah tu-in bang hong piang ding, ci-in a ngaihsut kawmun mite lau-in sibup ding uh hi. Vantunga om nate a pai ngei bangin pai nawn loin lampial mangkhin ding uh hi." 
Luke21:27 Tua ciangin Mihing Tapa hong kilang ding a, minthanna le vangliatna tawh meii lakah hong pai ding hi." 
Luke21:28 Hih thute a pian ding hong kipat ciangin, note hong kihotkhiat ding hun hong naita ahih manin, dingin nuamna lungsim tawh khuadak un,” a ci hi." 
Luke21:29 Tua ciangin Jesuh in amaute kiangah thugentehna khat gen a, “Thei kung a kipan singkung khempeuh en dih un." 
Luke21:30 A teh hong no na muh uh ciangin khuakhal hong naita hi, ci-in na thei uh hi." 
Luke21:31 Tua mah bangin hih thute hong piang na muh uh ciangin Pasian’ Ukna hun hong tungta ding hi, ci-in na thei ding uh hi." 
Luke21:32 Hih lai-a om mite a sihkhit ma-in hih thute hong piang ding ahihna phawk un. 
Luke21:33 Van le lei a mangthang zongin ka thugente maimang ngei lo ding hi. 
Luke21:34 “Limtakin kidawm un. Thakhat thu-in tua Ni hong tung kha ding ahih manin zune anne le leitung nuntakna lunghimawhin thamang kei un. 
Luke21:35 Theihkholh lohin thang kisai bangin leitung mi khempeuh tungah hih thu hong piangvat ding hi. 
Luke21:36 Hih thupiang khempeuh thuakzawh nading thahatna na neih nading uh, le Mihing Tapa mai-ah na dintheih nadingun a tawntungin thu ngenin vil niloh un,” a ci hi." 
Luke21:37 Tua sungteng nisimin Jesuh in biakinn-ah thu hilh a, nitak ciangin paikhia-in Oliv Mual tungah a giak zel hi." 
Luke21:38 Ama thuhilhna a ngai dingin mi khempeuh zingsang simin biakinn-ah hong pai baih uh hi. 
Luke22:1 Tu-in Paisan Pawi a kici Silngo Sawh loh Anlum Pawi hun hong naita hi. 
Luke22:2 Siampi liante le Thukham hilh siate in mihonpite kihta uh ahih manin kuama theih lohin Jesuh a kithah theih nading lampi a zong uh hi. 
Luke22:3 Tua ciangin sawm le nihte sung panin Iskariot tapa Judas sungah Satan hong lut hi. 
Luke22:4 Tua ahih manin Judas va paikhia a, siampi liante le biakinncing palikmangte tawh va kiho uh a, amaute’ khut sungah Jesuh a piaktheihna dingzia a kikum uh hi." 
Luke22:5 Amaute na nuam mahmah uh a, sum tawh guaih dingin thuciam a na pia uh hi." 
Luke22:6 Judas zong thukim a, mihonte’ theih lohin amaute’ khut sungah Jesuh a piaktheih nading lampi zon ding a kipan pah hi." 
Luke22:7 Tua ciangin Silngo Sawh loh Anlum Pawi hun sungin Paisan Pawi an-a nek ding tuuno gawh ni hun hong tung hi. 
Luke22:8 Jesuh in Peter le Johan kiangah, “Va pai unla, eite’ Paisan Pawi annek ding va vaihawm un,” ci-in a sawl hi." 
Luke22:9 “Koi lai-ah va bawl le ung hong deih na hi hiam?” ci-in a dong uh hi. 
Luke22:10 Amah in, “Jerusalem khuasung na lut uh ciangin tuibeel a pua pasal khat na mu ding uh hi. Ama lutna inn-ah zui unla," 
Luke22:11 a innteek pa kiangah, ‘Siapa in: Ka nungzuite tawh Paisan Pawi an ka nektheih nading uh inndei koi lai hiam, ci hi,’ ci-in va dong un." 
Luke22:12 Amah in a baihsa-in a na kikoihsa inndei tungnung a zai khat hong lak ding hi. Tua lai-ah a kisam khempeuh a baihsa-in na koih un,” a ci hi." 
Luke22:13 Amau tegel zong pai uh a, Jesuh’ gensa bang teekteekin va mu uh a, tua lai-ah Paisan Pawi annek ding a bawl uh hi." 
Luke22:14 A hun a tun ciangin Jesuh zong sawltakte tawh sabuai-ah a tu hi. 
Luke22:15 Tua ciangin Jesuh in amaute kiangah, “Sihna ka thuakma-in note tawh hih Paisan Pawi an i nekkhop ding ka ut mahmah khat ahi hi." 
Luke22:16 A mantakin kong genin-ah, Pasian’ Ukna sungah a cingtaak Paisan Pawi hun hong tun mateng, Paisan Pawi an ka ne ngei nawn kei ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Luke22:17 Tua ciangin Jesuh in a hai sang a, Pasian’ tungah lungdamna a kohkhit ciangin, “Hih hai hong sang unla, na vekpi-un na gual dawn un." 
Luke22:18 Bang hang hiam cih leh Pasian’ Ukna hun hong tun mateng, tu a kipanin leenggahzu ka dawn nawn kei ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Luke22:19 Tua ciangin anlum la-in Pasian tungah lungdamna a kohkhit ciangin amaute tungah pia a, “Hih pen note a dingin a hong kipia keima pumpi ahi hi. Keimah nong phawk nadingun na ne un,” a ci hi." 
Luke22:20 Tua mah bangin an a nekkhit uh ciangin amaute tungah hai pia a, “Hih leenggahzu pen note a dingin a luangkhia, Pasian’ thuciamna thak a kipsak ka sisan ahi hi." 
Luke22:21 Ahi zongin kei hong lehhek ding pa’ khut in sabuai-ah kei tawh an a sawkkhawmna thu thei un. 
Luke22:22 Bang hang hiam cih leh Pasian’ sehsa bangin Mihing Tapa si ding a, ahi zongin amah a lehhek pa in gimna thuak ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Luke22:23 Tua ciangin hih bangin a gamta ding eite lakah kua hi ding ihi hiam, ci-in amaute khatlekhat a kidong uh hi." 
Luke22:24 Nungzuite lakah kua a lianpenin kingaihsun ding, ci-in kiselna thu hong piang hi." 
Luke22:25 Tua ciangin Jesuh in amaute kiangah, “Gentail mi hih leitung kumpite in a mite uh tungah ukna aana zang uh a, tua bangin mi a uk Gentail-te in amaute pen, ‘Mite’ nopsak nadingin nasemte,’ a kicih ding deih lai uh hi." 
Luke22:26 Ahi zongin note lakah tua bang hi lo ding hi; a lianpen pa a neupen bangin om ding a, a makai pen pa a nungzui nunungpen bangin om ding hi." 
Luke22:27 Anne dingin sabuai-ah a tupa le an a piapa kua lianzaw ahi hiam? Anne dingin a tupa lianzaw mah hi. Ahi zongin kei pen note lakah anpia-in na a sempa bangin ka hong om hi. 
Luke22:28 “Gimna ka thuak sung khempeuh note in kei nong ompih uh hi. 
Luke22:29 Ka Pa in uk nading aana kei tungah hong piak mah bangin kei zong note tungah ka hong pia ding hi. 
Luke22:30 Keima Ukna sungah anne tuidawnin sabuai kiimah na tu ding uh a, Israel minam sawm le nihte tungah thu a khen dingin thukhenna tokhom tungah na tu ding uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Luke22:31 Tua ciangin Jesuh in, “Simon, Simon aw, lokho pa in buhhum a haih bangin note khempeuh hong ze-et nadingin Satan in thu a ngah khitna thu phawk in." 
Luke22:32 Ahi zongin, Simon aw, na upna na khahsuah loh nadingin nang a dingin thu kong ngetsak khin hi. Kei kiangah nong kiheikik ciangin nungzui na lawmte na hanthawn in,” a ci hi." 
Luke22:33 Tua ciangin Peter in, “Topa aw, nang tawh thong a kiakhawm ding le a sikhawm dingin a kigingsa-in ka om hi,” ci-in a gen hi." 
Luke22:34 Tua ciangin Jesuh in, “Peter aw, ke’n a mantakin kong genin-ah, ‘Amah ka thei kei hi,’ ci-in thumvei nong nialkhit matengin tuni-in ak khuang lo ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Luke22:35 Tua ciangin Jesuh in amaute kiangah, “Note in sumbawm, ip, le khedap keng loin kong sawlkhiat lai-in kitangsapna na nei uh hiam?” ci-in a dot ciangin, “Bangmah ka kitangsapna uh om lo hi,” ci-in a dawng uh hi." 
Luke22:36 Tua ciangin Jesuh in, “Ahi zongin, tu-in ahihleh, sumbawm ahi a, ip ahi zongin a neite in keng unla, namsau a nei lo peuhmah in na puansilh uh zuak unla khat lei un." 
Luke22:37 Bang hangin hih bangin hong gen ka hi hiam cih leh, Lai Siangtho in, ‘Mawhneite lakah amah kihelsak hi,’ ci-in keima thu a genna pen hong tung ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Luke22:38 Amaute in, “Topa aw, en in; hih lai-ah namsau nih om hi,” ci-in a gen uh ciangin Jesuh in, “Tua ahihleh phazo hi,” ci-in a dawng hi." 
Luke22:39 Tua ciangin Jesuh a pai ngei zel bangin, khuasung nusia-in Oliv Mual tungah pai a, a nungzuite in zong a zui uh hi." 
Luke22:40 Ama painopna mun a tun ciangin amaute kiangah, “Ze-etna na tuahkhak loh nadingun thu ngen un,” ci-in a gen hi." 
Luke22:41 Tua ciangin amaute kiang panin suanglot khat tan bang pailai a, khukdinin thu ngen a," 
Luke22:42 “Pa aw, nangma ngaihsutna bang ahihkhak leh hih ka thuak ding gimna tawh hong kipelhsak in. Ahi zongin kei deihna bang hi loin nangma deihna bang hi ta hen,” a ci hi." 
Luke22:43 Tua ciangin vantung panin ama kiangah vantungmi khat hong pai a, Jesuh’ tha a hatsak hi." 
Luke22:44 Lunggim mahmah ahih manin nakpitakin thu ngen semsem a, leilak a si mal gol taak bangin a khua-ul a taak hi." 
Luke22:45 A thungetna panin dingin a nungzuite kiangah paikik a, amaute a dahna hangun gimin ihmu-in a om a mu hi." 
Luke22:46 Jesuh in, “Bang hangin ihmu na hi uh hiam? Tho unla ze-etna-ah na pukkhak loh nadingun thu ngen un,” a ci hi." 
Luke22:47 Tua bangin thu a gen laitakin mihonpi khat hong pai a, sawm le nihte sung panin Judas a kici mipa hong makai-in Jesuh a nam dingin hong naih hi." 
Luke22:48 Ahi zongin Jesuh in ama kiangah, “Judas aw, napna tawh Mihing Tapa lehhek na hi hiam?” a na ci hi." 
Luke22:49 Jesuh’ kiima om mite in a thupiang ding a muh ciangun, “Topa aw, ka namsau uh tawh ka sat ding uh hiam?” a ci uh hi." 
Luke22:50 Amaute khat in siampi lianpen pa’ nasempa sat a, a taklam bil a satkhia hi." 
Luke22:51 Ahi zongin Jesuh in, “Tua bangin gamta nawn kei un,” ci-in a mipa’ bil lawnsakin a damsak hi." 
Luke22:52 Tua ciangin Jesuh in amah a man dingin a hong pai siampi liante, biakinncing palikmangte, le upate kiangah, “Namsau le molhtum tawh kei hih dingin nong kuan nadingun kei pen gal le sa ka hi hiam?" 
Luke22:53 Nisimin biakinn-ah note tawh ka omkhawm a, bangmah nong cih kei uh hi. Ahi zongin hih hun pen nomau’ hun hi a, khuamial sung a uk Satan’ vangliat hunsung ahi hi,” a ci hi." 
Luke22:54 Tua ciangin Jesuh manin paikhiatpih uh a, siampi lianpen pa’ inn a tunpih uh hi. Peter in zong a kihalin nungzuih hi." 
Luke22:55 Inntualah meiphual kicih a, tua meiphual kiima tute lakah Peter zong a kihel hi." 
Luke22:56 Mei awi-a omte lakah Peter a omlam, nasem numei khat in a muh ciangin limtakin Peter en a, “Hih pa zong Jesuh tawh a kikhawlte khat hi,” a ci hi." 
Luke22:57 Ahi zongin Peter in, “Ka nau aw, amah ka thei kei hi,” ci-in a nial hi." 
Luke22:58 Tua khit a sawt loin midang khat in amah hong mu leuleu a, “Nang zong amaute tawh pawlkhat na hi hi,” a ci hi. Ahi zongin Peter in, “Lawm aw, ka hi kei hi,” a ci hi." 
Luke22:59 Tua khit nai lang bang ding ciangin midang khat in, “Hih mipa Galilee mi ahih manin amah zong Jesuh tawh a kipawlte hi taktak hi,” hong ci teitei hi." 
Luke22:60 Ahi zongin Peter in, “Lawm aw, na thugen ka thei kei hi,” ci-in a dawng hi. Tua bangin a pau laitakin thakhatin ak hong khuang hi." 
Luke22:61 Jesuh zong kihei-in Peter hong en a, “Tuni-in ak a khuan’ ma-in thumvei nong nial ding hi,” ci-in Topa’ kampauna thu Peter in hong phawkvat hi." 
Luke22:62 Tua ciangin Peter paikhia-in nakpitakin a kap hi. 
Luke22:63 Jesuh a cingte in simmawh bawlin a sat uh hi. 
Luke22:64 Puan tawh a mit tuamsak uh a, “Kua’n hong sat ahi hiam, thei dih in,” a ci uh hi." 
Luke22:65 Amah simmawh bawlna kam tampi a pau uh hi. 
Luke22:66 Khua a vak ciangin upate, siampi liante, le Thukham hilh siate hong kikhawm uh a, uliante mai-ah Jesuh hong kipaipih hi." 
Luke22:67 Amaute in, “Khrih na hi hiam, hong gen in,” ci-in a dot uh ciangin Jesuh in, “Kong gen hangin nong um kei ding uh a," 
Luke22:68 thu kong dot hangin zong nong dawng kei ding uh hi. 
Luke22:69 Ahi zongin tu a kipanin a Vanglian Pasian’ taklamah Mihing Tapa tu ding hi,” ci-in a dawng hi." 
Luke22:70 Tua ciangin a vekpi-un, “Tua ahihleh Pasian’ Tapa na hi hiam?” a cih uh ciangin, “Pasian’ Tapa hi, nong ci uh hi,” ci-in a dawng hi." 
Luke22:71 Tua ciangin amaute in, “Thudang bangmah kisam nawn lo hi. Ama kam mahmah panin i za khinta hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Luke23:1 Tua ciangin a vekpi-in ding khia uh a, Pilat mai-ah a paipih uh hi." 
Luke23:2 Tua lai panin amah mawhzon ding kipan uh a, “Hih mipa in ka mipihte uh lam khialsakin, kumpipa tungah siah piak loh dingin thu gen a, amahmah zong Khrih ahi kumpi khat ahihna a kigenna zong ka za uh hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Luke23:3 Tua ciangin Pilat in, “Nang, Jew mite’ kumpipa na hi hiam?” ci-in a dot ciangin, “Nang zong tua mah nong ci hi,” ci-in a dawng hi." 
Luke23:4 Tua ciangin Pilat in siampi liante le mihonte kiangah, “Hih mipa mawhsak nading thu bangmah ka mu kei hi,” a ci hi." 
Luke23:5 Ahi zongin amaute in nawhsa takin nakpau semsem uh a, “Amah in mite a buai nadingin thu hilh a, Galilee gam pan hong kipanin Judea gam sung khempeuhah hong hilh a, tu-in hih lai mun hong tungta hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Luke23:5 Ahi zongin amaute in nawhsa takin nakpau semsem uh a, “Amah in mite a buai nadingin thu hilh a, Galilee gam pan hong kipanin Judea gam sung khempeuhah hong hilh a, tu-in hih lai mun hong tungta hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Luke23:6 Pilat in hih thu a zak ciangin, “Hih mipa Galilee mi ahi hiam?” ci-in a dong hi." 
Luke23:7 Jesuh pen Herod’ ukna sung mi ahihlam a theih ciangin, tua laitakin Herod mah zong Jerusalem-ah om ahih manin ama kiangah a paisak hi." 
Luke23:8 Herod in Jesuh’ thu zaza a, amah a muhnop sawt mahmah khinta ahih manin Jesuh a muh ciangin a nuam mahmah hi. Jesuh in nalamdang a bawlte a mu dingin kilamen hi." 
Luke23:9 Tua ahih manin Herod in thu tampi tak dong a, ahi zongin Jesuh in kam khat beek dawng lo hi." 
Luke23:10 Siampi liante le Thukham hilh siate in hong neh uh a, Jesuh mawhsakna thu nakpitakin hong gen uh hi." 
Luke23:11 Tua ciangin Herod le galkapte in Jesuh zahko-in simmawh bawl uh a, kumpi puantualpi a silhsak khit uh ciangin Pilat kiangah a puakkik uh hi." 
Luke23:12 Hih hun ma-in Herod le Pilat kilem loin kigalbawl uh a, ahi zongin tua ni mahmahin amau tegel kilem kikin kipawlbawl uh hi." 
Luke23:13 Pilat in zong siampi liante, upate, le mihonpite sam khawmin" 
Luke23:14 amaute kiangah, “Hih mipa in i mipihte lam khialsak hi, ci-in mawhsakin kei kiangah nong paipih uh hi. Note khempeuh mai mahah amah thu ka sit a, amah na mawhsakna uh thute khat beekah a mawhna ka mu kei hi." 
Luke23:15 Tua mah bangin Herod in zong ama mawhna mu lo a, eite kiangah amah hong puakkik hi. Hih mipa in sihna a thuak nadingin ama gamtatna bangmah om lo hi." 
Luke23:16 Tua ahih manin amah satna tawh thuhilhin ka khah ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Luke23:17 (Paisan Pawi hun simin Pilat in amaute’ deih thongkia khat a khah ding ahi hi.) 
Luke23:18 Tua ciangin mihon khempeuh kiko uh a, “Amah that in! Barabbas hong khahsak in!” a ci uh hi." 
Luke23:19 Barabbas pen khua sungah mi a buaisakna hang, le mi a thahna hangin thong sungah a kikhum ahi hi." 
Luke23:20 Pilat in Jesuh khahnuam ahih manin mihonpite tungah khatvei a genkik hi. 
Luke23:21 Ahi zongin mihonpite in, “Singlamteh tungah that in, singlamteh tungah that in,” ci-in a kiko uh hi." 
Luke23:22 Tua ciangin amaute tungah a thumveina thu gen a, “Amah in bang mawhna bawl ahi hiam? Sihna a thuak nadingin ama gamtatna bangmah ka mu kei hi. Tua ahih manin amah satin ka khah ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Luke23:23 Ahi zongin a aw neihzah uh tawh amaute awng semsem uh a, singlamteh tungah Jesuh a thah nading gen uh ahih manin a tawpna-ah a zo uh hi." 
Luke23:24 Tua ahih manin amaute’ ngetna bangin piak dingin Pilat in thu a khen hi. 
Luke23:25 Mi buaisakna le mi thahna hangin thong sungah a kikhia mipa amau’ ngetna bangin khah a, amau’ deihna bangin a bawl dingun Jesuh a piakhia hi." 
Luke23:26 Tua ciangin amaute in Jesuh paikhiatpih uh a, gam sung panin khuapi sungah a hong pai, Sairin khuami Simon a kici mi khat tawh a kituak uh hi. Amaute in tua pa manpah uh a, a singlamteh suanin Jesuh’ nung zui-in a puasak uh hi." 
Luke23:27 Jesuh’ nung zui-in mi tampi tak pai uh a, tuate lakah Jesuh kahin a tamlawh numei pawlkhat zong a kihel hi." 
Luke23:28 Jesuh zong amaute lamah kihei a, “Jerusalem khua numeite aw, kei hong kah kei unla, note le na tate uh a dingin kap un." 
Luke23:29 Bang hang hiam cih leh mite in, ‘Ta a nei ngei lo, naungek nawi a teepsak ngei lo numei ciingte mi hampha mahmah ahi hi,’ a cih hun hong tung ding hi." 
Luke23:30 Tua hun hong tun ciangin mite in, ‘Mual lian mual neute in hong cipnelhin a si khin hi lehang utzaw hang,’ ci ding uh hi." 
Luke23:31 Singkung hing bang ahi kei tungah hih bangin hong bawl uh ahihleh singkung keu bang ahi note tungah hong nak hihzaw kan ding uh hi lo ahi hiam?” a ci hi. 
Luke23:32 Mi that ahi, thonga kikhum mi nih zong, Jesuh tawh thahkhawm dingin a paipih uh hi." 
Luke23:33 “Lutang Guh,” a kicihna mun a tun uh ciangin singlamteh tungah Jesuh kilhcip uh a, tua mi that mi nihte zong, Jesuh’ taklamah khat, a veilamah khat kilhcip uh hi." 
Luke23:34 Ahi zongin Jesuh in, “Pa aw, amaute in bang hih ihi hiam cih thei lo uh ahih manin a mawhna uh na maisak in,” a ci hi. Tua ciangin amau’ ngah ding ciat a theih nadingun ai sanin a puante a hawm uh hi." 
Luke23:35 Jew mi upate in Jesuh zahko-in, “Amah in midangte honkhia hi. Pasian teelsa Khrih ahih takpi leh amah le amah kihonkhia ta hen,” ci-in a simmawhbawl laitakun tua lai-a ding mite in a enen uh hi." 
Luke23:36 Galkapte in zong zahpihbawl uh a, a kiangah hong pai-in leenggahzu thuk pia uh a," 
Luke23:37 “Jew Mite’ Kumpipa na hih takpi leh nang le nang kihonkhia in,” a ci uh hi." 
Luke23:38 “Jew Mite’ Kumpipa hi,” ci-in a kigelh lai zong ama tung sanah kisuang hi." 
Luke23:39 Amah tawh a kikhai khawm mi that pa khat in zong Jesuh zahko a, “Nang Khrih hi lo na hi hiam? Nangmah kihonkhia inla, tua ciangin kote zong hong honkhia in,” a ci hi." 
Luke23:40 Ahi zongin a khat pa in a lawmpa taii a, “Pasian nangawn kihta lo na hi hiam? I vekpi-in gim hong kipiakna kibangkim hi." 
Luke23:41 Ei tegel pen i gamtatna tawh kizui-in thu hong kikhen ahih manin ahi ding mah ahi hi. Ahi zongin amah in khialhna bangmah nei lo hi,” a cih khit ciangin" 
Luke23:42 Jesuh kiangah, “Jesuh aw, Kumpi-in nong pai ciangin kei zong hong phawk in,” a ci hi." 
Luke23:43 Jesuh in ama kiangah, “A mantakin ke’n kong cihin-ah: Tuni-in Paradais-ah kei tawh na omkhawm ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Luke23:44 Tua hun laitak pen sunkim nai sawm le nih pawl hi a, ni mial ahih manin nitak lam nai thum ciang dong leitung khempeuhah khua mial a," 
Luke23:45 tua hun sungin biakinn sung dalna puan kikekin phelnih a suak hi. 
Luke23:46 Tua ciangin nakpitakin Jesuh kiko a, “Pa aw, nangma khut sungah keimah kong ki-ap hi,” a cih khit ciangin a si ta hi." 
Luke23:47 Galkap mangpa in hih thupiang a muh ciangin Pasian phat a, “Hih pa, mihoih taktak khat ahi hi,” a ci hi." 
Luke23:48 Hih thute a en dingin a hong pai mihonpite in a thupiang teng a muh uh ciangin dahin dip humsa-in a ciah uh hi. 
Luke23:49 Galilee gam panin Jesuh a hong zui amah a thei ngei mite le numeite in gal et uh ahih manin a thupiang khempeuh a thei uh hi. 
Luke23:50 Tua laitakin Josef a kici mi khat om a, Judea gam sunga om Arimathea khuami ahi hi. Amah pen mihoih, a zahtakhuai mi khat hi a, Pasian’ Uk ding hun lamenin a ngakngak mi khat ahi hi. Amah pen ulian thuvaihawm sunga kihel hi a, ahi zongin a lawmte’ vaihawmna leh a nasepnate uh thukimpih lo hi." 
Luke23:50 Tua laitakin Josef a kici mi khat om a, Judea gam sunga om Arimathea khuami ahi hi. Amah pen mihoih, a zahtakhuai mi khat hi a, Pasian’ Uk ding hun lamenin a ngakngak mi khat ahi hi. Amah pen ulian thuvaihawm sunga kihel hi a, ahi zongin a lawmte’ vaihawmna leh a nasepnate uh thukimpih lo hi." 
Luke23:51  
Luke23:52 Hih mipa Pilat kiangah va pai-in Jesuh’ luang a ngen hi. 
Luke23:53 Tua ciangin Jesuh’ luang la suk a, puankang tawh a tun khit ciangin kuamah a kivui ngei nai lohna suang kikhuak hankhuk sungah a vui hi." 
Luke23:54 Tua ni pen nipi zawh ni nga ni hi a, Sabbath ni hong hi dektak ta hi." 
Luke23:55 Galilee gam panin a hong zui numeite in zong a kivuina-ah zui uh ahih manin a hanphual le a luang kisialzia khempeuh zong a mu uh hi. 
Luke23:56 Tua ciangin amaute ciah uh a, Jesuh’ luang a nuh dingun paknamtui le sathau a bawlkhol uh hi. Thukham zui-in Sabbath ni tawlnga-in a om uh hi." 
Luke24:1 Nipi ni zingsang tungin numeite in a bawlsa uh paknamtui tawi-in hanah va pai uh hi. 
Luke24:2 Han phual a tun uh ciangin hankhuk hukna suang a kilikkhia mu uh ahih manin 
Luke24:3 a sungah tumpah uh a, ahi zongin Topa Jesuh’ luang na om lo hi." 
Luke24:4 Amaute in lamdangsa-in a om laitakun amaute gei-ah puanpak a silh mi nih hong dingvat uh hi. 
Luke24:5 Numeite lau mahmah uh ahih manin lei lam nga-in kuncip uh hi. Tua mi nihte in, “Bang hangin misite lakah mihing zong na hi uh hiam?" 
Luke24:6 Hih lai-ah om nawn lo hi; kithosak zo hi. Galilee gamah a om lai-in note kiangah thu hong genin," 
Luke24:7 ‘Mawhnei mite’ khut sungah Mihing Tapa kipia ding a, singlamteh tungah kithatin, a ni thum ni-in hingkik ding hi,’ a cih thute phawk un,” a ci uh hi." 
Luke24:8 Tua ciangin amaute in Jesuh’ thugente phawkkik uh a," 
Luke24:9 han panin ciahkikin, nungzui sawm le khatte le midangte kiangah hih thute a gen uh hi." 
Luke24:10 Sawltakte kiangah hih thu a gen numeite pen Magdala khuami Mary, Joanna, James’ nu Mary, le numei dangte ahi uh hi." 
Luke24:10 Sawltakte kiangah hih thu a gen numeite pen Magdala khuami Mary, Joanna, James’ nu Mary, le numei dangte ahi uh hi." 
Luke24:11 Ahi zongin hih numeite’ thugen pen thu phuahtawm bangin ngaihsun uh a, um lo uh hi." 
Luke24:12 Ahi zongin Peter dingin hanah va tai a, han sung a etsuk ciangin a kitunna puan bek na om hi. Tua ciangin amah in zong tua thupiang lamdangsa-in inn-ah a ciahkik hi." 
Luke24:13 Tua ni mahin, Jesuh’ thu a zui mi nih, Jerusalem khua panin tai sagih bang a gamla Emmaus kici khua-ah a pai uh hi." 
Luke24:14 A paikawmun hih thupiangte kikumkum uh hi. 
Luke24:15 Tua bangin kiho-in thu kikumin a om laitakun Jesuh mahmah in hong naihin amaute tawh hong tonkhawm hi. 
Luke24:16 Amau tegel in a muh hangun Jesuh ahihlam thei lo uh hi. 
Luke24:17 Jesuh in, “Na lam paikawmun bang gengen na hi uh hiam?” ci-in a dong hi. Amau tegel zong dinkhawl pah uh a, a maisuah uh dahmai mahmah lai hi." 
Luke24:18 Tua ciangin amau tegel sung panin Kleopas a kici pa in, “Jerusalem-a hawhte lakah tusawng tenga tua lai-a thupiang a thei lo nang bek na hi ding hi,” ci-in a dawng hi." 
Luke24:19 Tua ciangin Jesuh in amaute kiangah, “Bang thu ahi hiam?” ci-in a dot ciangin amaute in, “Nazareth khuami Jesuh tunga thupiang ahi hi. Amah pen kamsang khat hi a, Pasian le mite khempeuh in a thugen le a nasepna-ah vang a nei mahmah khatin a ngaihsut uh ahi hi." 
Luke24:20 Ahi zongin ka siampi liante uh le ka uliante un sihna thukhenna a thuak dingin Pilat tungah ap uh a, singlamteh tungah kithat hi." 
Luke24:21 Amah pen Israel mite a honkhia ding pa hi, ci-in ka lamet uh ahi hi. Tua bang hinapi-in hih thuteng hong piang a, tu-in a thu pianzawh a ni thumna hita hi." 
Luke24:22 Ko pawlte’ sung panin numei pawlkhat in lamdang ka sak uh thu hong gen uh hi. Amaute, tu zingsang tungin hanah va pai uh a," 
Luke24:23 ahi zongin ama luang na om nawn lo hi. Tua ciangin amaute hong ciahkik uh a, vantung mite a muhna uh le tua vantung mite in Jesuh a hinkik khitna thu a gennate uh hong gensawn uh hi." 
Luke24:24 Tua ciangin ka lawmte uh pawlkhat zong hanah va pai uh a, numeite’ gen bang teekteekin va mu uh a, ahi zongin Jesuh mu lo uh hi,” ci-in a dawng hi." 
Luke24:25 Tua ciangin Jesuh in amau tegel kiangah, “Bangzah takin hai a, bang dingin kamsangte’ thugen um thei lo na hi uh hiam?" 
Luke24:26 Khrih in minthanna a ngah nadingin hih bangteng a thuak ding kisam hi lo ahi hiam?” a ci hi. 
Luke24:27 Tua ciangin Jesuh in Lai Siangtho sungah ama thu a kigennate khempeuh, Moses laibu a kipanin kamsangte’ laibu khempeuh a khiatna a gen hi." 
Luke24:28 Tua khua a tun uh ciangin Jesuh a paisuak ding bangin hong om a," 
Luke24:29 ahi zongin amau tegel in kho-in, “Tu-in nitak lam hita a, ni tum dektak ahih manin ko tawh hong tamkhawm in,” a ci uh hi. Tua ahih manin Jesuh zong amaute tawh a tam hi." 
Luke24:30 Amaute tawh an ne dingin a tut ciangin Jesuh in anlum la a, Pasian tungah lungdamna a kohkhit ciangin balnenin amaute a pia hi." 
Luke24:31 Tua laitakin a haktawm bangin Jesuh ahih lamtak mu-in thei uh a, ahi zongin amau’ muhna panin Jesuh a mangpah hi." 
Luke24:32 Amau tegel in, “Lampi-ah i paikawmin Lai Siangtho khiatna hong gen laitakin i lungsim hong lawpsak mahmah hi mah lo ahi hiam?” a kici uh hi." 
Luke24:33 Amau zong thakhatin ding pahin Jerusalem-ah paikik uh a, nungzui sawm le khatte le adangte na kikhawmin," 
Luke24:34 “Topa hingkik khin takpi hi. Simon kiangah na kilak khinzo hi,” ci-in a kigengen laitak uh a tuak uh hi." 
Luke24:35 Tua ciangin tua mi nihte in zong a lam pai laitak uha thupiang teng le anlum a balnen ciangin Topa ahih lamtak a theihnate uh a gen uh hi. 
Luke24:36 Amaute hih thu kikumin a om laitakun thakhat thu-in Jesuh mahmah amaute lakah hong ding a, “Nopna ngah ta un,” ci-in amaute a hopih hi." 
Luke24:37 Ahi zongin amaute lau-in linglawng gawp uh a, sikha a mu hi ni, ci-in a ngaihsun uh hi." 
Luke24:38 Tua ciangin Jesuh in amaute kiangah, “Bang hangin lungmang a, bang hangin lungka na hi uh hiam?" 
Luke24:39 Ka khut le ka khete en un; kei mahmah ka hi hi. Hong lawng unla hong thei un. Tu-a keima neih bangin sikha in pum le tak nei ahi hiam?” a cih khit ciangin 
Luke24:40 a khut le a khete a lak hi. 
Luke24:41 Amaute nuamlua kisa-in lamdangsa-in um zo lo phialin a om laitakun, “Nektheih khat peuhpeuh na nei uh hiam?” ci-in a dot ciangin" 
Luke24:42 amaute in zong ngasa haankeu khat pia uh a," 
Luke24:43 Jesuh in saangin amaute’ muhin a ne hi. 
Luke24:44 Tua ciangin Jesuh in amaute kiangah, “Tu-a thupiang khempeuh pen note tawh kong omkhawm lai-a ka gengen thute mah ahi hi. Moses Thukham laibu sung, kamsangte laibu sung le Late sungah a kigelh thu khempeuh a tung ding ahi hi,” a ci hi." 
Luke24:45 Tua ciangin Lai Siangtho sung thu a theih nadingun a lungsim uh honsak a," 
Luke24:46 amaute kiangah, “Khrih in sihna thuakin, a ni thum ni-in sihna panin hingkik ding a," 
Luke24:47 Jerusalem khua a kipan minam khempeuh tungah a mawhna uh kisikin a kimaisak nading thu, ama min tawh kihilh ding hi, ci-in kigelh hi." 
Luke24:48 Note pen hih thu khempeuh a thei teci na hi uh hi. 
Luke24:49 Ka Pa’ hong ciamsa thu, note tungah ka hong pia ding hi. Ahi zongin vantung panin tua vangliatna na ngah mateng uh hih Jerusalem khuapi-ah na ngak un,” a ci hi." 
Luke24:50 Tua ciangin Jerusalem khuasung panin Bethany khuagei ciang amaute paipih a, tua lai panin a khut laamto-in amaute thupha a pia hi." 
Luke24:51 Amaute thupha a piak laitakin amaute kiang panin paikhia-in vantungah amah a kilato hi. 
Luke24:52 Amaute in amah bia uh a, lungdam mahmahin Jerusalem khua-ah a ciahkik uh hi." 
Luke24:53 Tua ciangin Pasian tungah lungdamna a ko dingin biakinn-ah a pai tawntung uh hi. 
John1:1 A kipat cil-in Thu na om a, tua Thu, Pasian tawh na omkhawm a, tua Thu, Pasian ahi hi." 
John1:2 Tua hi a, a kipat cil a kipanin Thu le Pasian na omkhawm hi." 
John1:3 Pasian in Thu tawh na khempeuh piangsak a, a kipiangsak na khempeuh, Thu tawh loin a kipiangsak khat beek om lo hi." 
John1:4 Nuntakna a nei khempeuh in tua Thu tung panin a nuntakna uh ngah a, tua nuntakna in mi khempeuh tungah khuavak hong tunpih hi." 
John1:5 Tua khuavak pen khuamial lakah taang a, khuamial in tua khuavak a zo kei hi." 
John1:6 Pasian in Johan kici mi khat kamtai dingin hong paisak a," 
John1:7 mi khempeuh in ama thugenna za-in tua khuavak a uptheih nadingun tua khuavak thu a gen dingin a hong pai ahi hi. 
John1:8 Tua Johan mahmah pen khuavak hi lo a, khuavak thu a gen dingin a hong pai ahi hi." 
John1:9 Ama gen khuavak taktak pen zong leitungah hong tung khin a, mi khempeuh a taan khin hi." 
John1:10 Amah, leitungah om a, amah tawh leitung a kibawl hinapi-in leitung mite in amah na thei kha lo uh hi." 
John1:11 A khua le a tui-ah va pai a, ahi zongin a khuapih a tuipihte in ama thugen na ngai lo uh hi." 
John1:12 Tua bang hitaseleh ama thu ngai-in amah a um mite khempeuh tungah Pasian’ tate suahtheih nading thu a pia hi. 
John1:13 Tua bangin Pasian’ tate suahna pen leitung ngeina nute pate sung panin suahna tawh hi loin Pasian sung panin suahna ahi hi. 
John1:14 Tua Thu mihing hong suakin kote lakah hong om a, itna nei-in citak mahmah ahih manin Pasian’ pianzia a neihna ka mu cian uh hi. Hih pianzia pen Pasian’ Tapa khat bek hihna tawh a neih pianzia ahi hi." 
John1:15 Johan in ama thu gen a, “Keima nungah hong pai hinapi-in keima suah ma-in amah omkhin ahih manin kei sangin amah lianzaw hi,” ci-in ka gen pa pen hih pa ahi hi, ci-in a kiko hi." 
John1:16 A kicing ama hong itna hangin eite khempeuh tungah thupha a banbanin hong pia hi. 
John1:17 Pasian in Moses tungtawnin Thukham hong pia a, ahi zongin Jesuh Khrih hangin itna le cihtakna thu hong pai hi." 
John1:18 Kuamah in Pasian mu ngei lo hi. Pasian tawh a kinai pen, Pasian mah ahi Tapa khat bek in Pasian hong kilangsak hi." 
John1:19 Jerusalem khua-a Jew mi uliante in Johan kiangah siampite le Levi mite paisak uh a, “Nang kua na hi hiam?” ci-in a dongsak uh hi." 
John1:20 Johan in zong na ipbawl loin a siangtakin na genkhia a, “Kei pen Khrih ka hi kei hi,” a na ci hi." 
John1:21 Tua ciangin amaute in, “Tua ahihleh kua na hi hiam? Elijah na hi hiam?” a cih uh ciangin, “Ka hi kei hi,” na ci hi. Kamsangpa na hi hiam, ci-in a dot uh ciangin, ka hi kei hi, a na ci leuleu hi." 
John1:22 Tua ciangin amaute in, “Tua ahihleh kua na hi hiam? Kote hong sawlte kiangah ka gen ding uh thu hong gen in. Nang, kua kici na hi hiam?” ci-in a dot uh ciangin" 
John1:23 Johan in, “Kamsang Isaiah in a na gen mah bangin, ‘Topa’ tot ding lampi na tangsak un,’ ci-in gam sungah a kikopa ka hi hi,” ci-in a dawng hi." 
John1:24 Hih thu a dong mite pen Farisi mite in a sawl uh ahi hi. 
John1:25 Amaute in Johan kiangah, “Nang pen Khrih lah hi lo, Elijah lah hi lo, kamsang lah hi lo na hih leh bang hangin tuiphum mawk na hi hiam?” ci-in a dot uh ciangin" 
John1:26 Johan in, “Keimah in tui sungah mite a phum lel ka hi hi. Ahi zongin tu mahmahin note’ muh ngei loh mipa, note’ lak mahah hong om hi." 
John1:27 Keima khit ciangin note lakah amah in nasep hong kipan ahih hangin, kei pen ama khedap khau a sutsak ding nangawnin ka kilawmzo nai kei hi,” ci-in a dawng hi." 
John1:28 Hih bang thu kidotna a pianna mun pen Johan in mite tui phumin a omna, Jordan Gun nisuahna lam gal-a om Bethany khua ahi hi." 
John1:29 A zing ciangin Johan in ama kiangah Jesuh hong pai a muh ciangin, “En un, leitung mawhna a lakhia Pasian’ Tuuno hih lai-ah hong pai hi." 
John1:30 Keima nungah mi khat hong pai ding a, keima suah ma-in amah omkhin ahih manin kei sangin amah lianzaw hi, ci-in ka gen pa ahi hi." 
John1:31 Amah a bangci mi hi ding cih thei lo napi-in, Israel mite in amah a theih nadingun tui sungah mite a phum dingin a hong pai ka hi hi,” a ci hi." 
John1:32 Johan in hih mipa thu teci na pang a, “Vantung panin vakhu bangin Kha hong paisukin ama tungah a om ka mu hi." 
John1:33 Keimah in amah ka theih nai loh hangin, tui sungah mite a phum dingin kei a hong sawl Pasian in, ‘A tungah Kha hong paisukin a omna mipa pen Kha Siangtho sungah mite a phum ding pa ahi hi,’ ci-in hong genkhol hi." 
John1:34 Tua ahih manin hih mipa pen Pasian’ Tapa hi, ci-in thei ka hih manin teci ka pang hi,” a ci hi." 
John1:35 A zing ciangin Johan le a nungzuite nih ding khawmin a om laitakin," 
John1:36 amaute gei-ah Jesuh hong pai a muh ciangin Johan in limtakin enin, “Hih lai-ah Pasian’ Tuuno hong pai hi,” a ci hi." 
John1:37 A nungzui tegel in hih a kampauna za uh ahih manin Jesuh a zui pah uh hi. 
John1:38 Jesuh kihei a, amau tegel in a zuihlam a muh ciangin, “Bang zong na hi uh hiam?” ci-in a dong hi. Amaute in, “Sia aw, koi lai-ah om na hi hiam?” ci-in a dawng uh hi." 
John1:39 Jesuh in, “Hong pai unla, ka omna mun hong mu un,” a na ci hi. Amau tegel in zong Jesuh va zui uh a, a omna mun a va mu uh hi. Tua hun pen nitak nai li hun pawl ahih manin ama kiangah a giak uh hi." 
John1:40 Johan kampauna za-in Jesuh a zui nihte sung panin khat pen Simon Peter’ naupa Andru ahi hi. 
John1:41 A zing ciangin a u Simon zongpahin ama kiangah, “Messiah ka mu zo uh hi,” a ci hi. Tua pen Khrih a cihnopna ahi hi." 
John1:42 Tua ciangin Jesuh kiangah a u Simon a paipih hi. Jesuh in amah enin, “Nang pen Johan’ tapa Simon na hi hi. Tu a kipanin Sifas hong kici ding hi,” a ci hi. Sifas pen Peter tawh a kibang hi a, suangtum a cihna ahi hi." 
John1:43 A zing ciangin Jesuh in Galilee gamah pai ding ngaihsun hi. Filip tawh kituak a, ama kiangah, “Hong zui in,” a ci hi." 
John1:44 Filip pen Andru le Peter’ tenna Bethsaida khuami mah ahi hi. 
John1:45 Nethanel tawh a kituah ciangin Filip in, “Moses in Thukham laibu sungah a gelh mipa, le kamsangte in zong a gelh mipa ka mu khin uh hi. Amah Jesuh hi a, Nazareth khuami Josef’ tapa ahi hi,” a ci hi." 
John1:46 Nethanel in, “Nazareth khua panin bang hong piang peuhmah ding ahi hiam?” na cihsan hi. Ahi zongin Filip in, “Hong pai inla, hong mu dih in,” a ci hi." 
John1:47 Jesuh in ama kiangah Nethanel hong pai a muh ciangin, “En un, hih mipa, Israel mi taktak hi a, a lungsimah zuauthu om het lo hi,” a ci hi." 
John1:48 Nethanel in, “Kei hong bangci theih na hi hiam?” ci-in a dot ciangin Jesuh in, “Filip in nang hong sap ma-in theikung nuai-ah na om laitakin ka hong mu hi,” ci-in a dawng hi." 
John1:49 Tua ciangin Nethanel in, “Sia aw, nang, Pasian’ Tapa na hi hi. Israel mite’ Kumpi zong na hi hi,” a cih ciangin" 
John1:50 Jesuh in, “Theikung nuai-ah ka hong mu hi, ka hong cih manin Pasian Tapa le Israel mite Kumpi ka hihlam hong um na hi hiam? Hihte sangin a thu lianzaw na mu lai ding hi,” a ci hi." 
John1:51 Tua ciangin Jesuh in, “Ke’n a mantak kong genin-ah, vantung a kihong na mu ding uh a, Mihing Tapa le vantung kikalah Pasian’ vantung mite a kumsuk a kahto na mu ding uh hi,” a ci hi." 
John2:1 Tua zawh ni nih khit ciangin Galilee gam Kana khua-ah mo pawi om a, Jesuh’ nu zong tua pawi-ah a om hi." 
John2:2 Jesuh le a nungzuite zong tua pawi-ah a kisam hi. 
John2:3 Leenggahzu a bei ciangin Jesuh’ nu in, “Leenggahzu om nawn lo hi,” ci-in Jesuh kiangah a gen hi." 
John2:4 Tua ciangin Jesuh in, “Nu aw, bang hangin na lunghihmawhna hong ko zenzen na hi hiam? Keima hun tung nai lo hi,” ci-in a dawng hi." 
John2:5 Ahi zongin Jesuh’ nu in nasemte kiangah, “Ama hong gen bangbangin gamta un,” a ci hi." 
John2:6 Jew mite in amau biakna ngeina-ah kisilsiang nading ngeina nei uh ahih manin tua lai-ah tui tambong guk tambong sagih bang a ta thei thambelpi guk a om hi. 
John2:7 Jesuh in nasemte kiangah, “Tua thambelpite sungah tui a dimin koih un,” ci-in a sawl mah bangin a dim sitsetin tui a koih uh hi." 
John2:8 Tua ciangin Jesuh in, “Tu-in tui pawlkhat suak unla, zuphung pa kiangah va paipih un,” a ci hi. Amaute in zong tua mah bangin a va paipih uh hi." 
John2:9 Zuphung pa in leenggahzu a suak tui a ciap ciangin, (tui a sung nasemte in a theih hangin) koi panin kingah ahi hiam, ci-in thei lo ahih manin zinei tangvalpa samin," 
John2:10 “Midangte in leenggahzu khumte hawm masakin nei uh a, mite in a khamgawp khit uh ciangin a ngeinate hawm pan uh hi. Ahi zongin nangmah in a khum pen teng tu dong na sitlai hi,” a ci hi." 
John2:11 Jesuh in nalamdang a bawl masak pen Galilee gam Kana khua-ah hih bangin Pasian’ pianzia a neihna kilangsak a, a nungzuite in zong amah a um uh hi." 
John2:12 Tua khit ciangin Jesuh le a nu, a sanggamte le a nungzuite, Kapernaum khua-ah pai-in tua lai-ah ni tawmkhat a taam uh hi." 
John2:13 Jew mite’ Paisan Pawi hun hong naita ahih manin Jerusalem khua-ah Jesuh a pai hi. 
John2:14 Biakinn huangsung a lut ciangin bawng, tuu, le kawl vakhu zuakte mu a, sumkhekte zong a sumkhekna sabuai-ah a tu mu hi." 
John2:15 Amah in zong khauteep bawlin biakinn huangsung panin tuu le bawng a kipan ganhing khempeuh hawlkhia a, sumkhekte’ sabuai zong sawnpaih sakin a sum khempeuh a thehthang sak hi." 
John2:16 Tua ciangin kawl vakhu zuakte kiangah, “Na kawl vakhute uh hih lai panin paikhiatpih un. Ka Pa’ inn pen sumzuakna inn phualpi-in nei kei un,” a ci hi." 
John2:17 Hih bangin a gamtatna hangin, “Nangma inn ka deihluatna in ka lungsim hong uklah sak hi,” ci-in Lai Siangtho sungah a kigelhna thu, a nungzuite in a phawk uh hi." 
John2:18 Tua ciangin Jerusalem khua-ah a om Jew uliante Jesuh kiangah hong pai uh a, “Hih bangin na gamtat theih nading thu na neihna bang lim tawh hong lakthei ding na hi hiam?” ci-in a dot uh ciangin" 
John2:19 Jesuh in, “Hih biakinn susia le-uhcin ni thum sungin ka dingsakkik ding hi,” ci-in a dawng hi." 
John2:20 Tua ciangin Jew uliante in, “Hih biakinn kum sawmli le kum guk sung a kilam ahi hi. Ni thum sungin dingsakkikzo ding na hi hiam?” a ci uh hi." 
John2:21 Ahi zongin Jesuh in biakinn a cih ciangin ama pumpi a cihna ahi hi. 
John2:22 Tua ahih manin sihna panin amah a kithawhkiksak ciangin a nungzuite in Jesuh’ thugen phawkkik uh a, Lai Siangtho le Jesuh’ thugente a um uh hi." 
John2:23 Paisan Pawi hun laitakin Jerusalem khua sungah Jesuh a om sungin Jesuh in vangliatna tawh nalamdang a bawlte mu uh ahih manin mi tampi in amah a um uh hi. 
John2:24 Ahi zongin Jesuh in mi khempeuh limtakin theitel ahih manin amaute muang lo hi. 
John2:25 Amah in mite’ lungsimtawng dong thei ahih manin mite a bangci mi ahi hiam cih thu midangte in ama kiangah a gen ding kisam lo hi. 
John3:1 Nikodemas a kici Jew mi ulian khat om a, amah pen Farisi a kici mite pawl ahi hi." 
John3:2 Khatvei zan khuamial laitakin Jesuh kiangah va pai a, “Sia aw, mi khat peuhpeuh Pasian in ompih lo hileh hih na lamdangte kuamah in bawl thei lo ding ahih manin nang pen Pasian’ hong sawl siapa na hihna ka hong thei uh hi,” a ci hi." 
John3:3 Jesuh in, “A mantakin kong genin-ah, mi khatpeuh a suahkik kei leh Pasian’ Ukna sungah lut thei lo ding hi,” a ci hi." 
John3:4 Tua ciangin Nikodemas in, “Mi khat a teek khit ciangin bangci suahkik thei ding ahi hiam? A nu’ sungah lutkikin suakkik thei ding ahi hiam?” ci-in a dot ciangin" 
John3:5 Jesuh in, “A mantakin kong genin-ah, mi khatpeuh tui le Kha Siangtho tawh a suahkik kei leh Pasian’ Ukna sungah lut thei lo ding hi." 
John3:6 Mihing sung panin a suakte mihing mah hi bek a, Kha tawh a suakte pen kha mi ahi hi." 
John3:7 Tua ahih manin, ‘Na suahkik ding ahi hi,’ ka hong cihna hangin lamdangsa kei in." 
John3:8 Huih zong a utna peuhpeuhah nung a, a huging na zaktheih hangin koi lam panin hong nung a, koi lamah nung ahi hiam, cih na mu thei kei hi. Kha tawh a suak mite zong tua mah bang ahi hi,” ci-in a dawng hi." 
John3:9 Tua ciangin Nikodemas in, “Hih thu bangci piantheih mawk ding ahi hiam?” ci-in a dot ciangin" 
John3:10 Jesuh in, “Israel mite’ sia hinapi-in hih thu theithei lo na hi hiam?" 
John3:11 A mantakin kong genin-ah, kote in ka theihsa uh thu bek genin, ka muhsa uh thu bek teci a pang ka hi uh a, ahi zongin note kuamah in ka thugente uh nong um nuam kei uh hi." 
John3:12 Hih leitung thute tawh a kisai thu kong gen ciangin um lo na hih uhleh vantung thute ka hong gen ciangin bangci up mah ding na hi uh hiam? 
John3:13 Vantung panin a hong paisuk Mihing Tapa keimah simloh vantungah a paito ding kuamah om lo hi,” a ci hi." 
John3:14 Moses in gamlak khuam tungah sumngo gul a khai mah bangin Mihing Tapa zong hong kikhai ding a," 
John3:15 amah a um mi khempeuh nungta tawntung ding hi. 
John3:16 Pasian in leitung mite hong it mahmah ahih manin ama Tapa a um mi khempeuh si nawn loin a hin tawntung theih nadingun a Tapa neihsun a hong piak dongin a hong itna a hong lak hi. 
John3:17 Pasian in leitungah a Tapa hong sawlna pen mawhsakna thukhen dingin a hong paisak hi loin, leitung mite a honkhia dingin a hong paisak hizaw hi." 
John3:18 Amah a um mite in mawhsak thukhenna thuak lo ding uh hi. Amah a um lote pen Pasian’ Tapa neihsun um lo uh ahih manin mawhsak thukhenna a thuak khinta uh ahi hi. 
John3:19 Tua bangin mawhsak thukhenna a thuakna uh a hang in: Leitungah khuavak hong tungkhin napi-in a gamtatna uh hoih lo ahih manin leitung mite in khuavak sangin khuamial deihzaw uh hi. 
John3:20 A gamtat hoih lo mite in a siatna uh a kilatkhak ding ut lo uh ahih manin khuavak deih lo uh a, khuavakah pai nuam lo uh hi." 
John3:21 Ahi zongin thumanin a gamta mite ahihleh a gamtatnate uh Pasian’ deihna tawh kituak hi, ci-in a kilatsak theih nadingun khuavak sungah a pai uh hi." 
John3:22 Hih thute khit ciangin Jesuh le a nungzuite Judea gamah pai uh a, tua gamah a nungzuite tawh omin mite tui a phum hi." 
John3:22 Hih thute khit ciangin Jesuh le a nungzuite Judea gamah pai uh a, tua gamah a nungzuite tawh omin mite tui a phum hi." 
John3:23 Tuiphumpa Johan zong thong kia nai lo hi. Tua hi a, tui tampi omna Salim khua kiang Ainon kici munah Johan in mite tuiphum a, ama kiangah mite hong pai-in tui a kiphum uh hi." 
John3:24  
John3:25 Tua laitakin biakna vai-in kisian’ suahna tawh kizomin Johan’ nungzuite le Jew mi pawlkhat thu kiseel uh hi. 
John3:26 Tua ahih manin Johan nungzuite a kiangah hong pai uh a, “Sia aw, Jordan Gun galkhatah na om khawmpih ngei pa, ama thu na genna na phawk lai hiam? Tu-in amah in mi tuiphumphum a, mi khempeuh in amah zuan uh hi,” ci-in a gen uhleh" 
John3:27 Johan in, “Pasian in hih theih nading thu pia kei leh kuamah in bangmah hih thei lo hi." 
John3:28 Kei pen Khrih ka hi kei a, ama mai-ah a hong kisawlpa ka hi lel hi, ci-in ka genna thu note mahmah in na zaksa uh ahi hi." 
John3:29 Mo pen zinei ding tangvalpa a’ ding bek ahi hi. Zineipa kiangah a ding a lawmpa in ama kampau ding bek ngai a, ama awging a zak ciangin nuam mahmah hi. Tua mah bangin tu-in ama hangin ka nuam a, keima lungdamna kicingta hi." 
John3:30 Amah lian semsem ding a, kei ka hih leh ka neu semsem ding hi." 
John3:31 “Vantung pan hong pai pa pen adang khempeuh sangin lianzaw hi. Leitung panin a piang mi pen leitung mi hi a, leitung thute bek mah a gen hi. Tua ahih manin vantung panin a hong pai pa ahihleh adang khempeuh sangin a lianzaw ahi hi." 
John3:32 Amah in a muhsa leh a zaksa thu a gen hinapi-in kuamah in ama thugen um lo uh hi. 
John3:33 Ama thugen a umte pen, Pasian’ thugen man hi, ci-in a um ahi uh hi." 
John3:34 Pasian in a sawl mipa tungah ama Kha a kicingin pia ahih manin a sawl mipa in Pasian’ thugente mah a gen ahi hi. 
John3:35 Pa in Tapa it ahih manin ama khut sungah na khempeuh a pia hi. 
John3:36 Tua ahih manin Tapa a um mi peuhmah nungta tawntung ding a, Tapa’ thu a mang lote in nuntak mu lo ding a, amaute tungah Pasian heh tawntung ding hi,” a ci hi." 
John4:1 Jesuh in Johan sangin mi tam ngahzaw in a tuiphumna thu Farisi mite in a za uh hi. 
John4:2 (A taktakin Jesuh mahmah in tui phum loin a nungzuite bek in a phum ahi hi.) 
John4:3 Jesuh in tua thu a phawk ciangin Judea gam panin paikhia-in Galilee gamah a paikik hi. 
John4:3 Jesuh in tua thu a phawk ciangin Judea gam panin paikhia-in Galilee gamah a paikik hi. 
John4:4 Tua a paina-ah Samaria gam a nawk ding kisam hi. 
John4:5 Tua bangin a nawk ciangin Samaria gam sungah Saikhar a kici khua khat a tung hi. Tua khua gei-ah Jakob in a tapa Josef a piak lo khat om hi. 
John4:6 Tua lo sungah tuikhuk khat om a, a khualzinna-in Jesuh gim ahih manin a tuikhuk gei-ah a tu hi. Tua hun pen sunkim laitak ahi hi." 
John4:7 Tua laitakin Samaria numei khat tuitawi dingin tuikhukah a hong pai hi. Jesuh in tua numei kiangah, “Na tui hong dawnsak in,” a ci hi." 
John4:8 Tua laitakin khua sungah an lei dingin Jesuh nungzuite paikhia khin uh hi. 
John4:9 Jew mite in buah tang uh a, Samaria mite’ na zatte zanglo uh ahih manin, Samaria numei in Jesuh kiangah, “Bang hangin nang Jew mi in kei Samaria numei kiangah tui hong ngen na hi hiam?” a ci hi." 
John4:10 Jesuh in, “Pasian’ hong piaktheih dingte le tuidawn ding hong ngen pa theitel hi lecin, ama kiang pan tui a ngen ding na hizaw a, amah in nuntakna tui nang hong pia ding hi,” a ci hi." 
John4:11 Tua ciangin numei in, “Sia aw, tuikhuk thuk mahmah a, ahi zongin tui khai nading bangmah na nei kei hi. Koi panin tua nuntakna tui ngah thei ding na hi hiam?" 
John4:12 Tua tham loin, i pupi Jakob sangin lianzaw ding na hi hiam? Amah a kipan a tate le a ganhingte in a nek hih tui sangin a limcizaw koi-ah ngah ding na hi hiam?” a cih ciangin" 
John4:13 Jesuh in, “Hih tui a dawn khempeuh dangtak kik ding uh a," 
John4:14 ahi zongin keima piak ding tui a dawn khempeuh dangtak kik nawn lo ding uh hi. Tua ka piak tui a dawnte sungah nuntakna tuinak piang ding a, a nungtasak paisuak ding hi,” a ci hi." 
John4:15 Tua ciangin numei in, “Sia aw, tua bang ahihleh ka dang a tak nawn loh nading le hih lai-ah tuitawi-in ka pai nawn loh nadingin kei zong tua tui hong pia in,” a ci hi." 
John4:16 Tua ciangin Jesuh in, “Va ciahin na pasal va sam inla, hih lai-ah hong paikik un,” a ci hi." 
John4:17 Numei in, “Pasal ka nei kei hi,” a cih ciangin Jesuh in, ” ‘Pasal ka nei kei hi,’ na cih pen man mahmah hi." 
John4:18 Pasal nga na nei khin ngei a, tu-a na ompih zong na pasal hi lo hi. Tua ahih manin na thugen man mahmah hi,” a ci hi." 
John4:19 Tua ciangin numei in, “Sia aw, nang pen kamsang khat na hihna thu ka hong thei hi." 
John4:20 Ko Samaria mite’ pupite in hih lai mualtungah Pasian bia uh a, ahi zongin no Jew mite in Pasian biakna mun pen Jerusalem khua ahi hi, na ci uh hi,” a cih ciangin" 
John4:21 Jesuh in, “Lawm aw, hih ka thugen ding hong um in: Mite in hih mualtung hitaleh Jerusalem hitaleh ah Pa Pasian a biak nawn loh hun hong tung ding hi." 
John4:22 No Samaria mite in na theih taktak lohpi uh na bia uh a, ahi zongin ko Jew mite tungtawnin hotkhiatna thu hong pai ahih manin kote in ka theih uh a bia ka hi uh hi." 
John4:23 Ahi zongin Pasian a bia taktakte in Pasian’ Kha’ lamlahna le thuman tak tawh a biak hun hong tung ding a, tu-in zong a hong tung khinta ahi hi. Pa Pasian in tu-a bangin amah i biak ding a hong deih ahi hi." 
John4:24 Pasian pen Kha ahi hi; amah a biate in tua Kha’ lamlahna le thuman taktak tawh a bia ding uh hi,” a ci hi." 
John4:25 Tua ciangin numei in, “Khrih a kici Messiah hong pai nading thu ka thei hi. Amah hong pai ciangin thu khempeuh hong gen ding hi,” a cih ciangin" 
John4:26 Jesuh in, “Tu-a nang tawh a kiho keimah pen tua na gen pa ka hi hi,” a ci hi." 
John4:27 Tua laitakin Jesuh nungzuite hong tung uh a, ahi zongin kuamah in, “Numei aw, bang deih na hi hiam?” cihna ahi a, “Bang hangin tua numei tawh kiho na hi hiam?” cihna ahi zongin dong ngam lo uh hi." 
John4:28 Tua ciangin numei in a tuibeel nusia-in khua sungah ciah a, a khuapih mite kiangah," 
John4:29 “Hong pai un. Ka gamtatnasa a hong thei pa va en ni. Amah Khrih hi kha ding hi,” a va ci hi." 
John4:30 Tua ahih manin a khuapihte zong Jesuh kiangah a va pai uh hi. 
John4:31 Mite a hong tunma hunsung tengin a nungzuite in, “Sia aw, an ne in,” ci-in a kun uh hi." 
John4:32 Ahi zongin Jesuh in, “Note in na theih loh uh nek ding an ka nei hi,” a na ci hi." 
John4:33 Tua ahih manin a nungzuite khatlekhat kiho-in, “Mi khatpeuh in an na puak khin hi ding ahi hiam?” a kici uh hi." 
John4:34 Tua ciangin Jesuh in, “Keimah hong sawl pa’ deihna bangin na semin, sep dingin hong piak nasep zawhna pen ka nuntakna an ahi hi." 
John4:35 Note in na paunak uhah, ‘Khai tuh khit kha li ciangin anlak hun hi,’ na ci uh hi. Tu-in note khuadakin lote en un. An khempeuh min khinta a, lak ding bek in sam hi." 
John4:36 Khaituh pa le anla pa a lungdam khawm theih nadingin anla pa thaman a kipiak mah bangin anla pa in zong a nungta tawntung dingin mi a khawm ding hi. 
John4:37 Tua ahih manin, ‘Khat in khai tuhin, adang khat in a an la,’ ci-in paunak a om pen thuman mahmah hi." 
John4:38 Tua ahih manin note in na khawh loh uh lo-ah an a la dingin ka hong sawl hi. Midang in tua lo na kho a, note in a lak bek a si na hi uh hi,” a ci hi." 
John4:39 Tua numei in, “Ka gamtatnasate khempeuh hong thei hi,” ci-in a thugenna hangin tua khuasunga om Samaria mi tampi tak in Jesuh a um uh hi." 
John4:40 Tua ahih manin Jesuh kiangah Samaria mite a va tun uh ciangin amaute’ khua-ah a taam nadingin kun uh a, Jesuh zong tua khua-ah ni nih a taam hi." 
John4:41 Tua ahih manin tua numei’ thugenna hangin Jesuh a um mi tampi tak kibehlap hi. 
John4:42 Tua thu um mite in tua numei kiangah, “Nangma thugenna hangin a um ka hi nawn kei uh a, komau mahmah in a thugen za-in, leitung mite a Honkhia ding pa taktak hi, ci-in thei ka hih manun a um ka hi uh hi,” a ci uh hi." 
John4:43 Tua lai-ah ni nih a taam khit ciangin Galilee gamah a pai hi. 
John4:44 Jesuh mahmah in zong, “Kamsang a kuamah peuh ama gamah kipakta ngei lo hi,” ci-in a gen ngei hinapi-in," 
John4:45 Paisan Pawi hun laitakin Jerusalem-ah Galilee mite va pai-in, tua pawi sungah Jesuh’ septe khempeuh mu khin uh ahih manin, Jesuh a tun ciangin Galilee mite in na limbawl mahmah uh hi." 
John4:46 Tui, leenggahzu a suahsakna Galilee gam Kana khua-ah Jesuh paikik hi. Tua laitakin Kapernaum khua-ah kumpi nasem ulian khat om a, a tapa a ci a na hi." 
John4:47 A tapa gim mahmahin si dektak ahih manin, Judea gam panin Galilee gamah Jesuh hong paina thu a zak ciangin ama kiangah va pai a, Kapernaum khua-ah Jesuh hong pai-in a tapa a damsak nadingin a va thum hi." 
John4:47 A tapa gim mahmahin si dektak ahih manin, Judea gam panin Galilee gamah Jesuh hong paina thu a zak ciangin ama kiangah va pai a, Kapernaum khua-ah Jesuh hong pai-in a tapa a damsak nadingin a va thum hi." 
John4:48 Jesuh in ama kiangah, “Note in lim le nalamdang lian ka bawl na muh kei uhleh Topa ka hihna thu na hong um kei ding uh hi,” a cih ciangin" 
John4:49 ulianpa in, “Sia aw, ka ta a sih ma-in hong pai ta peuh in,” ci-in a thum hi." 
John4:50 Tua ciangin Jesuh in, “Va ciah in. Na tapa nungta ding hi,” a ci hi. Tua ulianpa in Jesuh’ thugen um ahih manin a ciah hi." 
John4:51 Lampi-ah a nasemte in na dawntuah uh a, “Na tapa nungta ding hi,” ci-in na ko uh hi." 
John4:52 Amah in, “Bang hunin a noptuam hong kipan ahi hiam?” ci-in a dot ciangin amaute in, “Zan sun nai khat pawlin a cisa hong kiamvat hi,” ci-in a dawng uh hi." 
John4:53 Jesuh in, “Na tapa nungta ding hi,” a cih hun tawh a kituak lian ahihna thu a pa in thei a, amah a kipan a innkuanpihte khempeuh in Jesuh a um uh hi." 
John4:54 Hih nalamdang pen Judea gam panin Galilee gamah hong pai khit a kipanin Jesuh in nalamdang a bawl a nihna ahi hi. 
John4:54 Hih nalamdang pen Judea gam panin Galilee gamah hong pai khit a kipanin Jesuh in nalamdang a bawl a nihna ahi hi. 
John5:1 Tua khit ciangin, Jerusalem khua-ah Jew mite biakna pawi kibawl ahih manin Jesuh zong a pai hi." 
John5:2 Jerusalem khuasung Tuu Kongpi a kici gei-ah Hebru pau-in Bethzatha a kici bual khat om a, tua bual kimkotah talap nga a om hi." 
John5:3 Hih talapte sungah a mittaw, a khebai, khutlekhezaw, cina tampi lum phengphang uh hi. (Amaute in tua bualtui a kilawh ding ngakin a om uh ahi hi." 
John5:4 Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa’ vantungmi khat in tua bual tui lok thei zel a, tui a kilawh khit ciangin tua lai a tung masa penpen ama natna panin a dam hi.)" 
John5:5 Tua talapte sung khatah kum le kum giat sung a cina khin mi khat a om hi. 
John5:6 Jesuh in tua cina pa mu a, tua munah sauveipi a lupkhitna a theih ciangin ama kiangah, “Na dam nuam hiam?” ci-in a dot leh" 
John5:7 cina pa in, “Sia aw, bualtui a kilawh ciangin kei hong pua ding kuamah om lo ahih manin, kei ka tun ma-in midang khat a bual sung na tungkhin pahpah hi,” ci-in a dawng hi." 
John5:8 Tua ciangin Jesuh in, “Tho inla, na lupna pheek pua-in pai in,” a cih ciangin," 
John5:9 tua cina pa thakhatin dampah a, a lupna pheek la-in a paipah hi. Tua ni pen Sabbath ni hi citciat ahih manin," 
John5:10 Jerusalem khuasunga om Jew mi uliante in cina damkik pa kiangah, “Tuni pen Sabbath ni ahih manin lupna pheek na puak ding ngeina hi lo hi,” a cih uh ciangin" 
John5:11 amah in, “Kei hong damsak pa in, ‘Na lupna pheek la inla pai in,’ hong ci hi,” ci-in a dawng hi." 
John5:12 Tua ciangin amaute in, “‘Na lupna pheek la inla pai in,’ hong ci kua ahi hiam?” ci-in a dong uh hi." 
John5:13 Ahi zongin tua munah mi tampi om a, Jesuh paikhia ziau ahih manin cina damkik pa in amah a damsak kua ahi hiam, cih a thei kei hi." 
John5:14 Tua khit ciangin Jesuh in biakinn sungah tua cina dam pa mukik a, ama kiangah, “Tu-in na dam khinta hi. Mawhna bawl nawn kei in. Tua hikeileh a siazaw khat na thuak ding hi,” a ci hi." 
John5:15 Tua ciangin amah zong pusuak a, Jerusalem khua-a Jew mi uliante kiangah, “Keimah hong damsak pa pen Jesuh ahi hi,” ci-in a va ko hi." 
John5:16 Tua ahih manin Jesuh in Sabbath ni-in cina a damsakna hangin amaute in Jesuh bawlsiat ding a kipan uh hi. 
John5:17 Ahi zongin Jesuh in amaute kiangah, “Ka Pa in tuni dongin na sem tawntung ahih manin kei zong ka sep ding mah ahi hi,” a ci hi." 
John5:18 Hih bangin ama kampauna hangin amaute in Jesuh thatnuam semsem uh hi. Amah in Sabbath thukham a palsat bek hi loin, Pasian nangawn ka Pa ci ahih manin Pasian tawh a kikimin kiseh hi, ci-in a mawhsak uh hi." 
John5:19 Tua ahih manin Jesuh in amaute kiangah, “A mantakin gen lehang: Tapa in ama thu bek tawh bangmah sem lo a, a Pa in a sep a muhteng bek a sem ahi hi. Tua hi a, a Pa in a septeng mah a Tapa in zong a sem ahi hi." 
John5:20 Pa in a Tapa itin, ama septeng mah lak a, mailam hunah zong hih sangin a lianzaw a sep ding lak lai ding ahih manin lamdang na sa mahmah ding uh hi." 
John5:21 Pa in mi sisate nangawn thosakin a nuntaksak mah bangin Tapa in zong a ut peuhpeuh nungtasak thei hi. 
John5:22 Pa in kuama tungah thukhen nasep sem lo hi. Mi khempeuh in Pa a zahtak mah bangin Tapa a zahtak theih nadingun Pa in thukhen nasep khempeuh a Tapa tungah a pia hi. Tua ahih manin Tapa a zahtak lo mi khempeuh pen Tapa a sawl Pa Pasian zong a zahtak lo ahi uh hi. 
John5:23  
John5:24 “A mantakin kong genin-ah: Ka thugennate za-in kei hong sawl pa a um khempeuh a nungta paisuak ding hita hi. Mawhsak thukhenna ngah nawn loin, sihna panin a hingkik ta ahi hi." 
John5:25 A taktakin ci lehang: A si mite in Pasian’ Tapa’ aw a zak hun uh hong tung ding hi bek loin tu-in a hun hong tungkhin hita a, ama aw a za mi khempeuh nungta ding uh hi." 
John5:26 Pa in nuntakna a piaktheih mah bangin Tapa in zong a piaktheih nadingin Pa in a bawl hi. 
John5:27 Amah pen Mihing Tapa ahih manin thu khentheih nading aana ama tungah a pia hi. 
John5:28 Hih thu ka hong gen ciangin lamdangsa kei un. Han sungah a om misi khempeuh in ama aw za-in," 
John5:29 han sung panin a hong paikhiat uh hun hong tung ding hi. A gamtat hoih mite pen a nungta tawntung dingin hong thokik ding uh a, a gamtat siate ahihleh mawhsak thukhenna a thuak dingin hong thokik ding uh hi." 
John5:30 “Keima thu guak tawh ka hihtheih bangmah om lo hi. Pasian’ hong genna bang bekin thu ka khen hi. Keima ut bangin sem loin kei hong sawl pa’ deih bangin sem ka hih manin ka thukhenna thuman hi. 
John5:31 “Keima thu tawh kisai-ah kei mahmah in teci pang leng kuamah in a thumanin sang thei lo ding hi. 
John5:32 Tua ahih manin keima a’ ding teci a pang ding mi khat om a, keima thu genin teci a panna thuman hi, ci-in ka thei hi." 
John5:33 Note in Johan kiangah thu a dong dingin mi na sawl uh a, amah in note kiangah a thuman hong genzo hi." 
John5:34 Keimah in mihingte’ teci panna a kisam ka hi kei a, note in hotkhiatna na ngahtheih nadingun note a’ ding ngaihsutna tawh hih thuteng a hong gen ka hizaw hi." 
John5:35 Johan pen meivak bangin kuangin a taang hi a, ama khuavak sungah tawlkhat nuamsa-in om ding na ut uh hi." 
John5:36 Ahi zongin Johan’ teci panna sangin a lianzaw teci khat ka nei a, tua in: Ka Pa in sep dingin a hong piak tu-a ka sep thute in kei a dingin teci a pang hi a, Pa in kei a hong sawl taktak ahihna hong kilangsak hi." 
John5:37 Tua ban panin kei a hong sawl Pasian in zong keima a dingin teci a pang hi. Note in Pasian’ sawl pa’ thu um lo na hih manun Pasian’ aw lah za ngei lo, a maitang lah mu ngei lo, na lungsim uhah zong ama thu a ciing lo na hi uh hi." 
John5:38  
John5:39 Nuntak tawntung ngahtheih nading lametna tawh Lai Siangtho sung na lim sim mahmah uh a, tua na sim uh Lai Siangtho in keima thu mah genin teci pang napi-in," 
John5:40 na nuntak theih nadingun kei kiangah nong painuam kei veve uh hi. 
John5:41 “Hih bangin kong gen ciangin mihingte in hong pahtak ding ka deihna hi lo a," 
John5:42 note’ lungsim sungah Pasian itna na neih hetlohna uh ka theihna hang hizaw hi. 
John5:43 Ka Pa’ thu tawh kei hong pai napi-in na hong sangnuam kei uh hi. Tua hinapi-in midang khatpeuh ama thu tawh hong paitawm leh na sang ding uh hi. 
John5:44 Pasian’ pahtak theih nading hanciam nuam loin, note khatlekhat na kiphat theih nading uh a hanciam mite’ thugen, a bang hangin um zawsop na hi uh hiam?" 
John5:45 Hih bangin ka hong gen ciangin ka Pa kiangah note a hong mawhsak ding pa hi, ci-in hong ngaihsun kei unla, note in suan belin na neih uh Moses pen a hong mawhsak ding pa ahih zawkna thu thei ta un." 
John5:46 Moses in keima thu gen belin nei ahih manin Moses um taktak hi le-uhcin kei zong na hong um ding uh hi. 
John5:47 Ahi zongin Moses’ laigelh thute um lo na hih manun kei hong bangci uptheih mah ding na hi uh hiam?” a ci hi. 
John6:1 Tua khit ciangin Tiberias zong a kici Galilee Tuili galkhat lamah Jesuh a pai hi. 
John6:2 Jesuh in cinate damsakin nalamdang lianpipi a bawlte mi tampi in mukhin uh ahih manin mi tampi tak in Jesuh nung a zui uh hi. 
John6:3 Jesuh zong a mualtung lamah kahto-in a nungzuite tawh a tukhawm hi. 
John6:4 Jew mite’ Paisan Pawi hun nai mahmah ta hi. 
John6:5 Jesuh khuadak a, ama lamah mihonpi hong pai muaimuai a muh ciangin Filip kiangah, “Hih mihonpite’ nek ding an koici ngahtheih ding ihi hiam?” ci-in a dong hi." 
John6:6 (Jesuh in a hih ding thei napi-in Filip a ze-etna-in hih bangin a dong lel ahi hi.) 
John6:7 Filip in, “Ngun peek zanih tawh an i lei hangin tawmno bekin cing pan ding uh hi,” ci-in a dawng hi." 
John6:8 Tua laitakin a nungzuite sung panin Simon Peter’ nau Andru in Jesuh kiangah," 
John6:9 “Hih lai-ah mangbuhham kibawl anlum nga le ngasa tawn nih sun-an a pua tangval khat om sam hi; tuate lah mihing hi zah lakah cihtaak ding ahi hiam?” ci hi. 
John6:10 Ahi zongin Jesuh in a nungzuite kiangah, “Mihonte tusak un,” a ci hi. (Tua lai-ah lopa tampi om hi.) Tua ahih manin mihonte tu uh a, pasal tulnga bang pha uh hi." 
John6:11 Jesuh in anlum la-in Pasian tungah lungdamna a kohkhit ciangin mihon a tute lakah a hawm hi. Tua mah bangin ngasa zong hih a, mi khempeuh in a duh zahzah uh a ne ciat uh hi." 
John6:12 Mi khempeuh in a khamkhit uh ciangin a nungzuite kiangah, “A kikhamvalte kaikhawm kik un; bangmah mawk valsak kei ni,” a ci hi." 
John6:13 Tua ahih manin mihonpi in anlum nga a nekkhit uh ciangin a khamvalte uh kaikhawm uh a, paipel sawm le nih dim a pha hi." 
John6:14 Jesuh’ nalamdang bawl a muh uh ciangin tua lai-a om mihonpite in, “Leitungah kamsang hong pai ding a kici pa pen hih pa hi taktak hi,” a ci uh hi." 
John6:15 Mihonte in thatanghat thu tawh kumpi-in amah a koih sawmna thu Jesuh in a theih ciangin mualtung lamah amah guak a kihemkhia hi. 
John6:16 A nitak ciangin tui gei-ah a nungzuite paisuk uh a," 
John6:17 gunkuang tungah tuangin Kapernaum khua lam manawhin a pai uh hi. Khua hong mialta a, ahi zongin amaute kiangah Jesuh hong tung nai lo hi." 
John6:18 Huih nakpi-in hong nung ahih manin tui hong kilokgawp hi. 
John6:19 Tuigei panin tai thum tai li bang gunkuang a hawhkhit uh ciangin tuitungah Jesuh hong pai-in gunkuang lam a hong naih a mu uh hi. Amaute na lau mahmah uh ahih manin 
John6:20 Jesuh in amaute kiangah, “Keimah ka hi hi; lau kei un,” a ci hi." 
John6:21 Tua ciangin amaute nuam mahmah uh a, gunkuang tungah Jesuh kahto sakin, a sawt loin a pai nading mun uh a tungpah uh hi." 
John6:22 A zing ciangin tui galkhatah a omlai mihonte in tui gei-ah gunkuang khat a omlai mu uh a, a zan nitakin gunkuang tungah a tuan uh ciangin a nungzuite lakah Jesuh a om lohna thu zong thei uh ahih manin a nungzuite bek a pai-in a ngaihsun uh hi." 
John6:23 Ahi zongin Tiberias khua panin gunkuang dang tampi hong pai a, Jesuh in lungdamna a kohkhit ciangin an a nekna uh munah hong tung uh hi." 
John6:24 Tua lai-ah Jesuh le a nungzuite a om nawn lohna thu mihonte in a theih uh ciangin gunkuang tungah tuangin Jesuh a zong dingin Kapernaum khua lamah a pai uh hi. 
John6:25 Tui galkhatah Jesuh a muh uh ciangin, “Sia aw, bang hunin hih lai na tung na hi hiam?” a ci uh hi." 
John6:26 Jesuh in, “A mantakin ci lehang: Ka nalamdang bawlte na muh uh ciangin kei hong umin a hong zong na hi kei uh a, an na khamtakun na nek uh manin a hong zong na hi bek uh hi." 
John6:27 A ningthei ante ngaihsutin nei masa kei unla, nuntak tawntungna an kan masa zaw un. Pa Pasian in tua an a pia dingin kei hong sehsa ahih manin keimah in note tungah nuntak tawntungna an ka hong pia ding hi,” ci-in a dawng hi." 
John6:28 Tua ciangin amaute in, “Tua ahihleh Pasian ka lungkimsak theih nadingun bangci gamtat ding ka hi uh hiam?” ci-in a dot uh ciangin" 
John6:29 Jesuh in, “Pasian in a hong sawl pa um le-uhcin Pasian a lungkim nadingin a gamta na hi uh hi,” ci-in a dawng hi." 
John6:30 Tua ciangin amaute in, “Kote in mu-in ka hong uptheih nadingun bang nalamdang hong bawl ding a, bang hong sem ding na hi hiam?" 
John6:31 Lai Siangtho sungah, ‘Amaute’ nek dingin van panin an a pia hi,’ ci-in a kigelh mah bangin ka pu ka pate un gam sungah manna an ne uh hi,” a cih uh ciangin" 
John6:32 Jesuh in, “A mantakin ci lehang: Moses in a piak an pen vantung an hi lo hi. Vantung an taktak pen ka Pa in hong pia hi." 
John6:33 Pasian in a hong piak an pen vantung panin hong pai-in leitung mite a nungtasak pa ahi hi,” a ci hi." 
John6:34 Tua ciangin amaute in, “Sia aw, kote tungah tua an hong pia tawntung in,” a ci uh hi." 
John6:35 Tua ciangin Jesuh in, “Kei pen nuntakna an ka hi hi. Ka kiangah hong paite gilkial ngei nawn lo ding a, kei hong umte dangtak ngei nawn lo ding hi." 
John6:36 Ahi zongin note tungah ka hong gennop thu in: Note in kei hong mukhin napi-in na hong um nuam kei uh hi. 
John6:37 Ka Pa in kei tungah a hong piak mi peuhmah ka kiangah hong pai ding a, ka kiangah a hong pai mi peuhmah ka hawlkhia kei ding hi." 
John6:38 Bang hang hiam cih leh keima ut bangin a sem ding hi loin kei hong sawl pa’ deihna bangin a sem dingin vantung panin a hong pai ka hi hi. 
John6:39 Kei hong sawl pa’ deihna in: Ka khut sungah a hong piak mi khempeuh khat zong khahsuah loin nitawp ni ciangin ka hinsakkik ding ahi hi. 
John6:40 Tua ahih manin Tapa mu-in a um mi khempeuh in nuntak tawntungna ngahin, nitawp ni ciangin ka hinsak ding, ka Pa in hong deih ahi hi,” a ci hi." 
John6:41 Jesuh in, “Kei pen vantung panin a hong pai an ka hi hi,” a cihna hangin mihonte phun ngeingai uh a," 
John6:42 “Hih Jesuh pen a nu le a pa i theih hi a, Josef’ tapa hi lel hi lo ahi hiam? Tua hinapi-in bang hangin, ‘Vantung panin ka hong pai,’ cithei peuhmah ahi hiam?” ci-in a kiphunsan uh hi." 
John6:43 Tua ciangin Jesuh in, “Note khatlekhat kiphunsan kei un." 
John6:44 Kei hong sawl Pa in a kaih loh mite ka kiangah hong pai thei lo ding a, ka kiangah hong pai mite nitawp ni ciangin ka hingsak ding hi." 
John6:45 Kamsangte in a lai gelhna uhah, ‘Pasian in mi khempeuh a hilh ding hi,’ na ci uh hi. Tua ahih manin Pa kiang panin thu za-in a thei mi khempeuh ka kiangah a hong pai ahi hi." 
John6:46 Hih bang ka cih ciangin Pa tawh a kimu khin ngei om hi, ka cihna hi lo hi. Pasian kiang panin hong pai pa bek in Pa a mu ngei ahi hi." 
John6:47 A mantakin kong genin-ah, kei hong umte bek in nuntak tawntungna ngah hi." 
John6:48 Kei pen nuntakna an ka hi hi. 
John6:49 Na pu na pate un gam sungah manna ne uh a, a vekpi-un si veve uh hi." 
John6:50 Ahi zongin vantung panin a hong pai an a ne mi peuhmah si lo ding hi. 
John6:51 Kei pen vantung panin a hong paisuk nuntakna an ka hi hi. Tua an a ne mi peuhmah nungta tawntung ding hi. Leitung mite a nuntak nadingin ka piak ding an pen keima sa ahi hi,” a ci hi." 
John6:52 Hih bangin a thugenna hangin mihonpite khatlekhat kitawng uh a, “Bangci-in hih mipa in nek dingin ama sa hong piathei ding ahi hiam?” a kici uh hi." 
John6:53 Tua ahih manin Jesuh in amaute kiangah, “A mantakin kong genin-ah, Mihing Tapa’ sa na nek kei uh a, a sisan na dawn kei uhleh note sungah nuntakna om lo ding hi." 
John6:54 Ka sa ne-in ka si a dawnte a nungta tawntung hi a, nitawp ni ciangin ka hingsak ding hi." 
John6:55 Bang hang hiam cih leh ka sa, an taktak hi a, ka sisan, dawn ding tui taktak ahi hi." 
John6:56 Ka sa ne-in ka si a dawnte pen kei tawh pumkhat ka hi uh hi. 
John6:57 A nungta Pa Pasian in kei hong sawl ahih manin ama hangin ka nuntak mah bangin keima sa a ne mite zong keima hang mahin nungta ding hi. 
John6:58 Tua ahih manin kei pen vantung panin a hong pai an ka hi a, na pu na pate un ne-in a sih veve-na ante tawh kibang lo hi. Hih kei’ hong piak an a nete ahihleh nungta tawntung ding hi,” a ci hi." 
John6:59 Hih thute pen Kapernaum khua-a kikhopna innsunga a thuhilhna-ah a gen ahi hi. 
John6:60 A nungzuite nangawn un hih thu a zak ciangun, “Hih thugen haksa lua hi. Kua in zuizo ding ahi hiam?” a ci uh hi." 
John6:61 Ahi zongin Jesuh in hih thu-ah a nungzuite’ phunna thei ahih manin, “Hih ka thugenna in note hong lungkiasak ahi hiam?" 
John6:62 Mihing Tapa ama omna ngei-ah a ciahto kik a mu hi le-uhcin bang na ci ding uh hiam? 
John6:63 Nuntakna a piathei pen Pasian’ Kha hi a, mihingte’ hihtheih bangmah om lo hi. Keima hong gen thute pen nuntakna a hong piathei tua Kha thu ahi hi." 
John6:64 Tua hinapi-in note pawlkhat in na um kei uh hi,” a ci hi. (Jesuh in a kipat cil pek a kipanin kuateng in ama thu um ding a, kuateng in amah lehpei ding cih thu thei khinzo hi.)" 
John6:65 Tua ciangin Jesuh in, “Ka Pa in ahi thei dingin bawl kei leh ka kiangah kuamah hong pai thei lo ding hi, ka cihna thu pen hih thu hang mah ahi hi,” ci-in a genthuah lai hi." 
John6:66 Hih bangin a thugenna hangin a nung a zui a thungai mi tampi kileh kikin Jesuh zui nawn lo uh hi. 
John6:67 Tua ahih manin Jesuh in a nungzui sawm le nihte kiangah, “Note zong na ciahkik nuam mai uh hiam?” a cih ciangin" 
John6:68 Simon Peter in, “Topa aw, ciah le ung kua kiang zuan mawk ding ka hi uh hiam? Nangmah in nuntak tawntung nading thu na nei hi." 
John6:69 Tu-in nang ka hong um uh a, Pasian kiang panin a hong pai a Siangtho Pa na hihna thu ka hong thei uh hi,” ci-in a dawng hi." 
John6:70 Tua ciangin Jesuh in, “Note na sawm le nih mahun ka hong teel hinapi-in khat pen dawi na suakmawk uh hi,” a ci hi." 
John6:71 Sawm le nihte sung panin amah a lehpei ding ahih manin Simon Iskariot’ tapa Judas thu a genna ahi hi. 
John7:1 Tua khit ciangin Galilee gam sungah Jesuh zin kawikawi hi. Jerusalem khua-a om Jew mi uliante in amah thatnuam uh ahih manin Judea gam sungah zin nuam nawn lo hi. 
John7:1 Tua khit ciangin Galilee gam sungah Jesuh zin kawikawi hi. Jerusalem khua-a om Jew mi uliante in amah thatnuam uh ahih manin Judea gam sungah zin nuam nawn lo hi. 
John7:2 Jew mite’ Buk Pawi hun hong naita ahih manin," 
John7:3 ama sanggamte in Jesuh kiangah, “Na nung hong zui mihonte in na nasepna a muhtheih nadingun hih lai panin paikhia-in Judea gamah va pai in." 
John7:3 ama sanggamte in Jesuh kiangah, “Na nung hong zui mihonte in na nasepna a muhtheih nadingun hih lai panin paikhia-in Judea gamah va pai in." 
John7:4 Mite’ theih ding a ut pa in a simthamin na sem ngei lo hi. Hih bangin na semsem na hih manin na sepna thu mi khempeuh theisak vet in,” ci-in zahpihna tawh thu gen uh a," 
John7:5 ama sanggamte mahmah in zong Jesuh um lo uh hi. 
John7:6 Ahi zongin Jesuh in, “Kei a dingin pai ding a hunhoih hi nai lo hi; ahi zongin note a dingin a hunhoih hi tawntung hi." 
John7:7 Leitung mite’ gamtatnate hoih lo hi, ci-in gen tawntung ka hih manin amaute in kei hong mudah uh hi; ahi zongin note hong mudah lo uh hi." 
John7:8 Tua ahih manin pawisiim dingin note va pai un. Kei a dingin a hunhoih hi nai lo ahih manin kei ka hong pai kei ding hi,” ci-in dawng a," 
John7:9 amah pai loin Galilee gam sung mahah a omlai hi. 
John7:10 Ahi zongin a sanggamte a dinkhiat khit ciangin Jesuh zong Jerusalem-ah Buk Pawi siim dingin a nungpai hi. Ahi zongin a kilang lua-in pai loin a simpai ahi hi. 
John7:11 Jerusalem-a om Jew mi uliante in tua pawi lak khawng Jesuh zong uh a, “Koi-ah om ahi hiam?” a ci uh hi." 
John7:12 Ama thu hangin mihonte lakah kam kihona tampi om a, “Amah mi hoih mahmah khat hi,” ci uh a, pawlkhat in, “Mi khemin a lam khialhpih ding pa ahih manin mihoih hi het lo hi,” a ci uh hi." 
John7:13 Ahi zongin Jerusalem khua-a Jew mi uliante a kihtakna hangun kuamah in Jesuh thu a kilangin gen ngam lo uh hi. 
John7:14 Pawi kham hunsung alang bang a bei khit ciangin biakinn sungah Jesuh lutin thuhilh ding a kipan hi. 
John7:15 Jew mi uliante in lamdangsa mahmah uh a, “Hih mipa cikmah a sang kah ngei lo kimlai bang hangin thu hih zah thei ahi hiam?” a ci uh hi." 
John7:16 Tua ahih manin Jesuh in, “Ka thugente pen keima thu hi lo a, kei a hong sawl Pasian kiang panin a hong pai thu ahi hi." 
John7:17 Pasian’ deihna bangin a gamta nuam mi peuhmah in, ka thugente pen Pasian’ kiang panin a hong pai thu a gen ka hihna leh keima thu bek tawh a gen ka hihna khenthei ding uh hi." 
John7:18 Amau’ thu bek tawh thu a gente in amau’ minthan nading a zong hi a, ahi zongin a hong sawl pa’ minthan nading a zong keimah in thuman thutak gen ka hih manin zuauthu kihel lo hi." 
John7:19 Moses in note tungah Thukham hong pia napi-in kuamah in na zui kei uh hi. Tua hinapi, bang hangin thah dingin kei hong sawm na hi uh hiam?” a ci hi." 
John7:20 Tua ciangin mihonte in, “Dawivei hi teh! Kua in nang thah hong sawm ahi hiam?” a ci uh hi." 
John7:21 Jesuh in, “Sabbath ni-in cina damsakna nalamdang khat ka bawlna hangin lamdang na sa mahmah uh hi." 
John7:22 Moses in na tapate uh vun na at ding uh thu hong pia a, (a taktakin Moses thupiak mapekin na pu na pate un a palsat thu ahi hi) vun at ni ding le Sabbath ni a kituahkhak ciangin a vun na at veve uh hi." 
John7:23 Moses thupiakna a kipelh loh nadingin Sabbath ni-in vun at na hih uhleh Sabbath ni-in mi khat ka damsak manin bang hangin kei tungah heh na hi uh hiam? 
John7:24 A tungthama kimu nate siksanin thu khen kei unla, thu taktak siksanin thu khenzaw un,” a ci hi." 
John7:25 Jerusalem khuami pawlkhat in, “Thah dingin a sawm pa uh hih pa hi lo ahi hiam?" 
John7:26 Tua hinapi, mihon lakah thu gengen napi-in kuamah in bangmah cih lo uh hi. Uliante in Khrih hi, ci-in theihtelna nei uh hi ding hiam?" 
John7:27 Tua ding lah, hih mipa hong piankhiatna i theih hi a, Khrih hong pai ciangin ama piankhiatna kuamah in a theih ding hi lo hi,” a ci uh hi." 
John7:28 Tua ahih manin biakinn sungah a gen mah bangin mi khempeuh zakin genkhia a, “Kei hong theitel taktak a, ka hong piankhiatna mun a thei takpi mah na hi uh hiam? Keima thu tawh a hong paitawm ka hi kei hi; kei a hong sawl a thuman pa a thei lo na hi uh hi." 
John7:29 Ahi zongin amah in kei hong sawlin, ama kiang panin a hong pai ka hih manin ke’n ka thei hi,” a ci hi." 
John7:30 Tua ciangin amaute in Jesuh mat ding hanciam uh hi; ahi zongin ama hun tung nai lo ahih manin kuamah in va su lo hi. 
John7:31 Ahi zongin mihon lak panin mi tampi mah in amah um uh a, “Khrih hong pai ciangin hih mipa sangin nalamdang tamzaw hong bawl tuan ding ahi hiam?” a ci uh hi." 
John7:32 Hih bangin mihonpite a kihona thu Farisi mite in za uh ahih manin amaute le siampi liante in Jesuh a man dingin biakinncing palikte pawlkhat a sawl uh hi. 
John7:33 Jesuh in tua mite kiangah, “Note lakah tawlkhat ka om lai ding a, tua ciangin kei hong sawl pa kiangah ka pai ding hi." 
John7:34 Keima omna munah note hong pai thei lo ding na hih manun tua hun ciangin kei nong zon uh hangin nong mu kei ding uh hi,” a na ci hi." 
John7:35 Tua ciangin Jew mi uliante khatlekhat kiho uh a, “I muh zawh loh dingin hih mipa koi lai-ah paisawm hi ding ahi hiam? Jew mite omna Grik khuapi tuamtuamte-ah pai-in Grik mite kiangah thu hilhsawm hi ding ahi hiam?" 
John7:36 ‘Kei nong zon uh hangin nong muzo kei ding uh hi,’ a cihna leh ‘Keima omna munah nong pai thei kei ding uh hi,’ a cih ciangin bang a cihnopna hi ding ahi hiam?” ci-in a kikum uh hi." 
John7:37 Pawi bei ni ding pen a thupi pen ni hi a, tua ni-in mihon lakah Jesuh dingin nakpitakin kiko a, “A dangtak na om uhleh ka kiangah hong pai unla tui hong dawn un." 
John7:38 Lai Siangtho sungah, ‘Kei hong um mite sung panin nuntakna tui luangkhia ding hi,’ a cih mah bangin kei hong um mite ka kiangah hong pai-in hong dawn ta un,” a ci hi." 
John7:39 Jesuh in hih bang a gen ciangin amah a umte in a ngah ding Kha Siangtho thu a genna hi a, tua hun laitakin Pasian’ pianzia nei-in sihna panin Jesuh kithokiksak nai lo ahih manin Kha Siangtho kipiakhia nai lo hi." 
John7:40 Hih thu a zak uh ciangin mihon pawlkhat in, “Hih pa pen Kamsangpa taktak hi,” ci uh a," 
John7:41 pawlkhat in, “Hih pa, Khrih ahi hi,” a ci uh hi. Ahi zongin pawlkhat in, “Galilee gam panin Khrih hong piang ding ahi hiam?" 
John7:42 Khrih i cih pen David’ suan hi ding a, David’ suahna Bethlehem khua-ah suak ding hi, ci-in Lai Siangtho sungah kigelh hi lo ahi hiam?” a ci uh hi." 
John7:43 Tua ahih manin Jesuh thu tawh kisai-ah mihonte’ lungsim kituak lo hi. 
John7:44 Mi pawlkhat in Jesuh man nuam uh hi; ahi zongin kuamah in su ngam lo hi. 
John7:45 Tua ciangin siampi liante le Farisi mite kiangah palikte a va ciahkik uh ciangin, “Bang hangin amah hong kai lo na hi uh hiam” a na ci uh hi." 
John7:46 Palikte in, “Hih mipa’ thugen bangin a gen kuamah om nai lo hi,” a cih uh ciangin" 
John7:47 Farisi mite in, “Note zong hong khem khinzo ta ahi hiam?" 
John7:48 Jew mi uliante hitaleh Farisi mite hitaleh sung panin amah a um, na theih uh omnai ahi hiam?" 
John7:49 Hih mihonte in ahihleh Moses Thukham thei lo uh ahih manin Pasian’ samsiatna a thuak dingte hi lel uh hi,” a ci uh hi." 
John7:50 Tua hun ma-in Jesuh kiangah a va hawhsim ngei Nikodemas zong uliante sungah kihel ahih manin 
John7:51 amah in, “Mi khat peuhmah a thu dongin ama gamtatnate i theih masak mateng mawhsakna thu i khen ding pen i Thukham tawh kituak lo hi,” a ci hi." 
John7:52 Tua ciangin amaute in, “Nang zong Galilee gammi na hi hiam? Lai Siangtho sung sim lecin Galilee gam sung panin kamsang khat beek a pian’ ngei lohna thu na thei ding hi,” a ci uh hi." 
John8:1 (Tua ciangin mi khempeuh a inn ciat uhah ciah uh a, Jesuh ahih leh Oliv Mual tungah a paito hi." 
John8:2 Ahi zongin a zing ciang zingsang tungin biakinn-ah paikik a, mihon tampi ama kiangah hong kikhawm uh ahih manin amaute tungah thuhilh ding a kipan hi." 
John8:3 Tua laitakin Thukham hilh siate le Farisi mite in pasal tawh a mawh laitakin a kiman numei khat hong paipih uh a, amaute mai-ah a dingsak uh hi." 
John8:4 Tua ciangin Jesuh kiangah, “Sia aw, pasal tawh a mawh laitakin hih numei a kiman ahi hi." 
John8:5 Hih bang mite pen suang tawh denlup dingin i Thukham sungah Moses in na gen hi. Tu-in nangmah in bangci ngaihsut na hi hiam?” ci-in a dong uh hi. 
John8:6 Hih bangin a dot uh ciangin Jesuh a mawhsak theih nadingun a thangsiahna uh ahi hi. Jesuh zong kunsuk a, a khutme tawh leilak a gelh hi." 
John8:7 Amaute in Jesuh kiangah dong teitei uh ahih manin amah zong dingin amaute kiangah, “Note lakah mawhna a nei het lo pa in deng masa un,” a cih khit ciangin," 
John8:8 kunin leilak a gelh leuleu hi. 
John8:9 Ahi zongin hih kammal a zak uh ciangin amaute a khangham pen panin khat khatin paikhia uh a, a tawpna-ah Jesuh le a mai-ah a ding numei bek a omlai hi." 
John8:10 Tua ciangin Jesuh khuadakto-in numei kiangah, “Numei aw, amaute koilai tungkhin uh ahi hiam? Nang mawhsakin thu hong khen ding kuamah om nawn lo ahi hiam?” a cih ciangin" 
John8:11 numei in, “Topa aw, kuamah in thu hong khen lo hi,” ci-in a dawng hi. Tua ciangin Jesuh in, “Kei zong nang tungah thu kong khen kei hi. Ciah inla, mawhna bawl nawn kei in,” a ci hi.)" 
John8:12 Tua khit ciangin Jesuh in mihonte kiangah a thugenna khatah, “Kei pen leitung khuavak ka hi hi. Kei hong zuite in khuavak nuntakna nei ding uh a, khuamial gamtatna nei lo ding uh hi,” a ci hi." 
John8:13 Tua ciangin Farisi mite in, “Nang le nang a kigentawm na hih manin na thugente a manin kisang thei lo hi,” a cih uh ciangin" 
John8:14 Jesuh in, “Kei le kei a kigentawm ka hih hangin ka thugente a man mah hi veve hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh koi panin hong pai-in koi lai-ah pai ding cih ka kithei a, note in kei ka hong paikhiatna le ka pai nading a thei lo na hizaw uh hi." 
John8:15 Thu a thei lopi-in kei na hong mawhsak uh hi; ahi zongin ke’n kuamah ka mawhsak kei hi. 
John8:16 Mi mawhsakin thu a khen hita mah leng zong, a thukhen pen kei bek hi loin kei a hong sawl Pa Pasian le keimah in a khenkhawm ka hih manun ka thukhennate a man taktak ahi hi." 
John8:17 Na Thukham sung uhah zong, ‘Thu khat peuhpeuhah mi nih in a manna teci pangin a gen leh a genna uh thuman hi,’ ci-in na kigelh ahih mah bangin," 
John8:18 keima a’ ding teci ka pang a, kei hong sawl Pa Pasian in zong keima a dingin teci a pang hi,” ci-in a dawng hi." 
John8:19 Tua ciangin amaute in, “Na pa koi-ah om ahi hiam?” ci-in dong uh a, Jesuh in, “Kei ka hi a, ka Pa ahi zongin na hong thei kei uh hi. Kei hong thei hi le-uhcin ka Pa zong na thei ding uh hi,” ci-in a dawng hi." 
John8:20 Jesuh in hih thute pen sumpi khiatna kuang a kikoihna biakinn dei sungah a gen hi a, ahi zongin ama hun tung nai lo ahih manin kuamah in amah man lo uh hi." 
John8:21 Tua ciangin Jesuh in amaute kiangah, “Kei ka paikhia ding hi. Note in kei na hong zong ding uh a, ahi zongin na mawhna uh na sihpih ding uh hi. Ka paina-ah note na hong pai thei kei ding uh hi,” a ci hi." 
John8:22 Tua ahih manin Jew mi uliante in, “‘Ka paina-ah note na hong pai thei kei ding uh hi,’ ci ahih manin amahmah kithattawm ding a cihna hi ding hiam?” a ci uh hi." 
John8:23 Tua ciangin Jesuh in amaute kiangah, “Note pen nuailam mi na hi uh a, kei pen tunglam mi ka hi hi. Note pen hih leitung mi na hi uh a, kei pen hih leitung mi ka hi kei hi." 
John8:24 Kei pen, ‘Kei ka hihlam na hong up kei uhleh na mawhna uh a sihpih ding na hih manun, na mawhna uh na sihpih ding uh hi,’ ci-in ka hong genna pen hih thu hang ahi hi,” a ci hi." 
John8:25 Tua ciangin amaute in, “Nang kua na hi hiam?” ci-in a dot uh ciangin Jesuh in, “A kipat cil a kipan ka hong gensa mah ka hi hi." 
John8:26 Note’ thu genin, note’ thu ka khen ding tampi tak om hi. Kei a hong sawl pa a thuman a thutak hi a, ama tung panin ka zaksa thute bek leitung mite tungah a pulak ka hi hi,” ci-in a dawng hi." 
John8:27 Jesuh in Pa Pasian’ thu a gengen ahih lamtak amaute in thei lo uh hi. 
John8:28 Tua ahih manin Jesuh in, “Mihing Tapa na khai khit uh ciangin ‘Kei kua ka hi hiam?’ cih thu na hong thei ding uh hi. Tua hun ciangin kei’ thu bek tawh bangmah hih loin, ka Pa’ hong hilhsa teng bek a gen ka hihna thu na thei ding uh hi." 
John8:29 Kei a hong sawl pa’ lungkimna bang bekin gamta tawntung ka hih manin amah in kei guak hong nusia loin, hong ompih tawntung hi,” a ci hi." 
John8:30 Tua bangin Jesuh in thu a gen ciangin mi tampi in amah a um uh hi. 
John8:31 Tua ahih manin amah a um Jew mite kiangah Jesuh in, “Ka thuhilhnate na zuih paisuak nak-uhleh ka nungzui taktakte na hi ding uh hi." 
John8:32 Tua ciangin thuman na thei ding uh a, tua thuman in note hong suaktasak ding hi,” a cih leh" 
John8:33 amaute in, “Kote Abraham’ suanlekhakte ka hi uh a, cikmahin kuama salin ka om ngei kei uh hi. Tua ahih manin bang hangin, ‘Note suakta ding,’ hong cithei na hi hiam?” a ci uh hi." 
John8:34 Tua ciangin Jesuh in, “A mantakin ci lehang mawhna a bawl mi peuhmah mawhna’ sila ahi uh hi." 
John8:35 Silate pen innkuan mite tawh omkhawm paisuak lo a, tapa ahihleh om paisuak hi." 
John8:36 Tua ahih manin Tapa in note hong khah le a suakta takpi na hi uh hi. 
John8:37 Note pen Abraham’ suanlekhakte na hihna uh ka thei hi. Ahi zongin ka thugente hong um lo na hih manun kei thah dingin nong sawm uh hi.
