John8:38 Tua ahih manin keimah in ahihleh ka Pa’ hong lahsa thute bek a gen ka hi a, ahi zongin note ahihleh na pa uh hong sawl bangin a gamta na hi uh hi,” a ci hi." 
John8:39 Amaute in, “Kote’ pa Abraham ahi hi,” ci-in a dawn uh ciangin Jesuh in, “Abraham’ tate taktak hi le-uhcin Abraham’ gamtat bangin na gamta ding uh hi." 
John8:40 A taktakin ci lehang, ka hihna khempeuh Pasian’ kiang panin ka zaksa thuman thu ka hong gen hinapi-in note in kei thah ding na hong sawm uh hi. Hih note’ gamtat bangin Abraham gamta lo hi." 
John8:41 Note pen na pa uh gamtat bangin a gamta na hi uh hi,” a ci hi. Tua ciangin amaute in, “Kote pen zawlta ka hi kei uh a, ka Pa uh Pasian ahi hi,” a cih uh ciangin" 
John8:42 Jesuh in, “Kei pen Pasian kiang panin hong pai-in hih lai-ah hong om ka hih manin, Pasian pen na pa taktak uh hileh kei na hong it ding uh hi. Keima thu-in a hong paitawm ka hi kei a, ama hong sawl ka hi hi." 
John8:43 Bang hangin ka thugente theithei lo na hi uh hiam? Ka thugente na ngaih nop loh man uh ahi hi. 
John8:44 Note pen na pa uh Dawimangpa’ tate na hi uh a, na pa uh deihna bangin a gamta nuam na hi uh hi. A kipat a kipanin na pa uh mi that hi a, thuman gen ngei lo ahih manin thuman tawh kipawl thei lo hi. Amah pen zuauna khempeuh a pianna a zuaugen pa ahih manin zuau a gen ciangin ama ngeina hi lel hi." 
John8:45 Tua ahih manin thuman ka hong gen ciangin na hong um thei kei uh hi. 
John8:46 Note lakah kua in ka mawhna na hong lakthei uh hiam? Hong lak thei lo na hih manun thuman ka gen ciangin bang hangin hong um lo na hi uh hiam? 
John8:47 Pasian kiang panin a paite in Pasian’ thugen za thei hi. Ahi zongin note pen Pasian kiang pan hi lo na hih manun Pasian’ thu na ngai nuam kei uh hi,” ci-in a dawng hi." 
John8:48 Tua ciangin Jew mihonte in, “Nang Samaria mi hi-in, dawivei hi teh, ka hong cih uh a man mah hi lo ahi hiam?” a cih uh ciangin" 
John8:49 Jesuh in, “Kei dawivei ka hi kei hi. Keimah in ka Pa ka zahtakbawl a, ahi zongin note in kei nong simmawhbawl uh hi." 
John8:50 Kei ka minthan’ theih nading ka hanciam kei a, ahi zongin keima minthan nading zongin, kei a hong angvan ding thukhen ding Khat om hi." 
John8:51 A mantakin ci lehang, keima thuhilhna a zui peuhpeuh si nawn lo ding hi,” ci-in a dawng hi." 
John8:52 Tua ciangin mihonte in, “Dawivei taktak na hihna thu tu-in ka hong thei uh hi. Kamsangte khempeuh le Abraham zong si napi-in, ‘Keima thuhilhna a zui peuhpeuh si nawn lo ding,’ na ci lailai hi." 
John8:53 Kote’ pupi Abraham zong si ahih manin amah sangin a lianzaw dingin ki-um na hi hiam? Tua banah kamsangte khempeuh zong si ahih manin nang a kua-in kingaihsun na hi hiam?” a cih uh ciangin 
John8:54 Jesuh in, “Kei le kei a kipahtawi hi leng ka kipahtawina a mawkna hi ding hi. Ahi zongin kei hong pahtawi pa pen ka Pasian uh ahi hi, na cih uh keima Pa ahi hi." 
John8:55 Note in amah na thei ngei kei uh a, ahi zongin ke’n ka thei hi. Amah ka thei kei hi, a ci hi leng, note mah bangin kei zong a zuau ka hi ding hi. Ahi zongin ke’n amah thei ka hih manin ama thu ka mang hi." 
John8:56 Note’ pupi Abraham in keima hun a tun ding lawp mahmah a, amah in tua hun mu-in nuam mahmah hi,” ci-in a dawng hi." 
John8:57 Tua ciangin amaute in, “Nang pen kum sawmnga zong pha nai lo na hih manin Abraham mu ding na hi hiam?” a cih uhleh" 
John8:58 Jesuh in, “A taktakin ci lehang, Abraham a pian’ ma-in kei ka omkhin hi,” ci-in a dawng hi." 
John8:59 Tua bang a cih ciangin amaute in amah a den nading suang tawm uh a, ahi zongin biakinn sung panin Jesuh a gelkhia hi." 
John9:1 Tua bangin Jesuh a paikhiat ciangin a pianpih mittaw mi khat a mu hi. 
John9:2 A nungzuite in, “Sia aw, hih pa a mittawtna ama mawhna hang ahi hiam, a nu a pate’ mawhna hang ahi hiam?” ci-in a dong uh hi." 
John9:3 Jesuh in, “A mittawtna pen ama mawhna le a nu le a pate’ mawhna hang hi lo a, ama tungah Pasian’ vangliatna a kilat theih nadingin a mittaw ahi hi." 
John9:4 Sun khuavak laiteng kei hong sawl pa’ na i sem ding hi. Kuamah in na a sep theih loh zan hun zong hong tung ding hi. 
John9:5 Leitungah ka om laiteng kei pen leitung mite a dingin khuavak ka hi hi,” ci-in a dawng hi." 
John9:6 Tua khit ciangin leilakah a cil sia-in buannawi bawl a, a mipa’ mitah tua buannawi a nuhkawmin," 
John9:7 “Siloam Bual-ah na mai va phiat in,” ci-in a sawl hi. (Siloam a cih ciangin, Sawl, a cihna a hi hi.) Tua ahih manin mittaw pa zong va pai-in a mai va phiat a, khua mutheisa-in hong paikik hi." 
John9:8 Tua hun ma-in amah ngettawm suangin a om a mu a vengte le amah a mu ngei mite in khua a muhtheihna a muh uh ciangin, “Ngettawm suangin a tutu mipa hi lo ahi hiam?” a ci uh hi." 
John9:9 Mi pawlkhat in, “Amah hi mah hi,” ci uh a, ahi zongin pawlkhat in, “Amah hi lo hi; a kisun lel ahi hi,” a ci uh hi. Ahi zongin amah in, “Kei pen tua mipa ka hi hi,” a cih ciangin" 
John9:10 amaute in, “Tua pa na hih leh bangci-in khua mu theikik na hi hiam?” ci-in a dong uh hi." 
John9:11 Amah in, “Jesuh a kici mi khat in a cil tawh buan bawlin ka mitte hong nuhsak a, ‘Siloam Bual-ah pai inla na mai va phiat in,’ hong ci ahih manin kei zong va pai-in ka mai ka phiat leh khua ka mu theikik hi,” ci-in a dawng hi." 
John9:12 Tua ciangin amaute in, “Tua mipa koi-ah om ahi hiam?” ci-in a dot uhleh, “Ka thei kei hi,” ci-in a dawng hi." 
John9:13 Amaute in Farisi mite kiangah tua mittaw ngei pa a paipih uh hi. 
John9:14 Jesuh in buan bawlin a mit a vaksak ni pen Sabbath ni ahi hi. 
John9:15 Farisi mite in tua mipa in khua a muhtheih kikna zia thu dong leuleu uh hi. Amah in, “Tua mipa in ka mitah buan hong nuh a, ka mai ka phiat leh khua ka mu theikik hi,” a ci hi." 
John9:16 Farisi mi pawlkhat in, “Amah in Sabbath ni tang lo ahih manin Pasian kiang panin hong pai mi hi lo ding hi,” a ci uh hi. Ahi zongin pawlkhatte in, “A gamta khial mi in bang hangin hih bangin nalamdang bawlthei ding ahi hiam?” ci leuleu ahih manin mite’ ngaihsutna kituak lo hi." 
John9:17 Tua ahih manin Farisi mite in mittaw pa kiangah, “Ka mit khua hong musak hi, ci na hih manin amah kua hi dingin ngaihsun na hi hiam?” ci-in a dotkik uh ciangin, “Amah kamsang khat hi ding hi,” ci-in a dawng hi." 
John9:18 Jerusalem khua-a om Jew mi uliante in hih mipa a mittaw ngei hinapi-in tu-in khua mukik thei hi, cih pen um thei lo uh ahih manin a mittaw pa’ nu le pate sam uh a," 
John9:19 amaute kiangah, “A pianpih-a mittaw na cih uh na tapa uh hih pa mah ahi hiam? Tua ahih kei leh bangci-in khua mukik thei ahi hiam?” ci-in a dot uh ciangin" 
John9:20 a nu le a pate in, “Hih mipa pen ka tapa uh ahihna le a pianpih mittaw ahihna thu ka thei uh hi." 
John9:21 Ahi zongin bangci-in khua mukik thei hiam cihna le kua in khua mu theisakkik hiam cih thu ka thei kei uh hi. Amah naupang hi nawn lo ahih manin amahmah dong le-uhcin hong gen thei ding hi,” ci-in a dawng uh hi." 
John9:22 Jesuh pen Khrih hi, ci-in a gen peuhpeuh, kikhopna inn panin hawlkhia ni, ci-in Jew mi uliante in thukimna neikhin uh ahih manin, Jew mi uliante a kihtakna uh hangin a nu le a pate in hih bangin a gen uh ahi hi." 
John9:23 Tua ahih manin a nu a pate in, “Amah naupang hi nawn lo ahih manin amahmah dong un,” a ci uh ahi hi." 
John9:24 Tua ciangin a mittaw ngei pa mah samkik leuleu uh a, “Pasian’ mai-ah kiciamin a man taktak hong gen in. Kote in hih mipa thukham palsatin a gamta pa hi, ci-in ka thei uh hi,” a cih uh ciangin amah in," 
John9:25 “Amah a gamta khial ahihleh ahihloh bangmah ka thei kei hi. Keima theih thu in: Nidangin a mittaw kimlai, tu-in khua ka mukik theita hi,” ci-in a dawng hi." 
John9:26 Tua ciangin amaute in, “Amah in nang bang hong cih a, na mit khua hong bangci muhsak ahi hiam?” ci-in a dot uh ciangin," 
John9:27 “A thuteng ka hong gen khitsa hinapi, ka thugen na um kei uh hi. Bang dingin za kikkik nuam na hi uh hiam? Note zong ama nungzui suak nuam na hi uh hiam?” ci-in a dawng hi." 
John9:28 Tua ciangin amaute in mittaw ngei pa kobawlin, “Nang pen ama nungzui na hi a, kote ka hih uhleh Moses’ nungzui ka hi uh hi." 
John9:29 Pasian in Moses a hopihna thu ka thei uh a, hih mipa ahihleh koi lai panin hong piang ahi hiam cih nangawn ka thei kei uh hi,” a ci uh hi." 
John9:30 Tua ciangin mittaw ngei pa in, “Amah in kei khua hong musak thei napi, amah koi pana hong piang ahi hiam cih na theih loh uh lamdang mahmah hi." 
John9:31 Pasian in thukham a palsat mite’ thu ngai lo a, amah bia-in, ama deih bangin a gamta mite’ thu ngai hi, ci-in ko ka thei uh hi." 
John9:32 Leitung pian’ cil a kipanin pianpih mittaw khua a musak thei a omlam kiza ngei nai lo hi. 
John9:33 Tua ahih manin Pasian kiang panin hong pai hikeileh hih bang hih thei lo ding hi,” ci-in a dawng hi." 
John9:34 Tua ciangin amaute in, “Mawhna bulomtang sung panin suakin a khangkhia mipa in kote tungah thu hong hilhsawm na hi hiam?” ci-in tua mittaw ngei pa a hawlkhia uh hi." 
John9:35 Hih mipa a kihawlkhiatna thu Jesuh in za ahih manin amah a muh ciangin, “Mihing Tapa na um hiam?” ci-in a dong hi." 
John9:36 Amah in, “Amah ka uptheih nadingin amah kua ahi hiam?” a ci hi." 
John9:37 Jesuh in, “Amah na mukhin a, nang tawh a kiho mipa ahi hi,” a cih ciangin" 
John9:38 amah in, “Topa aw, ka hong um hi,” ci-in Jesuh a bia hi." 
John9:39 Tua ciangin Jesuh in, “Mittawte in khua a muhtheih nading le khua mu thei a kineite mittaw a battheih nadingin leitungah thukhen dingin a hong pai ka hi hi,” a ci hi." 
John9:40 Ama kiangah a om Farisi mi pawlkhat in hih bangin a thugenna a zak uh ciangin, “Kote zong a mittaw-in hong ngaihsun na hi hiam?” ci-in a dong uh hi." 
John9:41 Jesuh in, “A mittaw hi le-uhcin mawhna tawh na kipelh ding uh hi. Ahi zongin khua mu thei ung, ci na hih manun na mawhna uh a ngei mahin a omlai ahi hi,” ci-in a dawng hi." 
John10:1 Tua ciangin Jesuh in, “A mantakin ci lehang, tuukulh kongah lut loin a mun dang panin kahin a lut mite pen a guta a buluh ahi hi." 
John10:2 Ahi zongin tuukulh kong tawnin a lut mipa ahihleh a tuute a cing pa ahi hi. 
John10:3 Tua ahih manin tuukong cing pa in a kong hon a, a tuute a min ciatin a sap ciangin a tuute in a thu mang a, amah in tuukulh panin a tuute a pusuah khiatpih hi." 
John10:4 A tuute khempeuh a pusuah khiat khit ciangin tuate mai-ah a cing pa pai a, a cing pa’ aw thei uh ahih manin tuute in amah a zui uh hi." 
John10:5 Tuute in midangte’ nung zui lo uh hi; midangte’ aw theithei lo uh ahih manin lau-in taisanzaw uh hi,” a ci hi." 
John10:6 Jesuh in hih thugentehna tawh thu a gen hangin amaute in Jesuh’ gennop thu a theithei tuan kei uh hi. 
John10:7 Tua ahih manin Jesuh in amaute kiangah thu genkik leuleu a, “A mantakin ci lehang, kei pen tuute’ paina kongpi ka hi hi." 
John10:8 Keima hun ma-in a hong pai mite ahihleh guta buluhte ahih manun tuute in amaute don lo uh hi. 
John10:9 Kei, kongpi ka hi hi. Keimah tawnin a pai tuu khempeuh in lauhuaina tuakkha loin, a ututun sungtumin pusuakin lonona mun a mu ding uh hi." 
John10:10 Gutate pen a gu ding, a that ding, le a siasak ding bekin hong pai hi. Kei ka hih leh tuute a nungta maimai bek hi loin nuntakna cingtaak a neihtheih nadingun a hong pai ka hi hi." 
John10:11 “Kei, tuucing hoih ka hi hi. Tuucing hoih in a tuute sihpih ngam hi." 
John10:12 Tuu nei taktak ahi lo, a kicialtawm tuucingpa in ngia khawng a muh ciangin a tuute nusia-in taisan ahih manin ngia in tuute man a, tuute a kithehthang gawp hi." 
John10:13 Amah a kicial tawm ahih manin a tuute khualna lungsim nei loin a taisan ahi hi. 
John10:14 Kei, tuucing hoih ka hi hi. Pa in kei hong thei-in, kei zong Pa ka theih mah bangin keimah in ka tuute ka thei a, ka tuute in zong kei hong thei uh hi. Tua ahih manin ka tuute ka sihpih ngam hi." 
John10:15  
John10:16 Hih tuukulh sungah a om lo tuu dang ka nei lai hi. Tuate zong tuukulh sungah ka khum ding a, amaute in keima thu ngai-in, keima khut sungah ka tuu omsate tawh honkhat suakkhawm ding uh hi." 
John10:17 Ka nuntakkik theih nadingin si ngam ka hih manin ka Pa in kei hong it hi. 
John10:18 Kuamah in ka nuntakna hong laksak thei lo a, keima utthu tawh ka piak hizaw hi. Ka nuntakna piakkhiat theih nading le lakkik theih nading thu ka Pa in kei tungah a hong piak ahi hi,” a ci hi." 
John10:19 Hih bangin thu a gen ciangin Jew mihonte a ngaihsutna uh kituak lo leuleu hi. 
John10:20 Mi tampi tak in, “Hih pa pen dawivei, mihai hi lel ahih manin a thugen ngaih taak lo hi,” ci uh a," 
John10:21 pawlkhat in, “Dawiveite in hih bangin thu gen thei lo hi. Dawi in mittawte khua musak thei ding ahi hiam?” a ci uh hi." 
John10:22 Jerusalem-ah Biakinn Apkikna Pawi bawl hun hong tung a, phalbi hunsung ahi hi." 
John10:23 Biakinn huangsung Solomon’ Talap a kici sungah Jesuh vak kawikawi-in a om laitakin 
John10:24 Jew mihonte ama kiangah hong kikhawm uh a, “Thu kitel loin bang tanvei koih hong sawm na hi hiam? Khrih na hih leh zong teltakin hong gen in,” ci-in a dot uh ciangin" 
John10:25 Jesuh in, “Hong genkhin napi ing-in Topa ka hihna thu na hong um kei uh hi. Ka Pa’ thu tawh na ka septe in hong kilangsak khinzo hi." 
John10:26 Ahi zongin note pen keima tuu hi lo na hih manun Khrih ka hihlam na hong um kei uh hi. 
John10:27 Keima tuute in ka aw za-in thei uh ahih manin kei hong zui uh hi. 
John10:28 Tua ahih manin amaute tungah nuntak tawntungna pia ka hih manin si ngei nawn lo ding uh a, keima khutsung panin kuamah in amaute hong sut zo lo ding uh hi." 
John10:29 Ka khut sungah a hong pia ka Pa sangin a lianzaw kuamah om lo ahih manin ka Pa’ khutsung panin kuamah in lakhia zo lo ding hi. 
John10:30 Kei le ka Pa pumkhat ka hi uh hi,” ci-in a dawng hi." 
John10:31 Tua ciangin Jew mihonte in amah deng dingin suang tawm leuleu uh ahih manin 
John10:32 Jesuh in, “Ka Pa’ hong sawl bangin note’ muhna-ah na hoih tampi ka hong sepna hangin suang tawh den hong sawm na hi uh hiam?” a cih ciangin" 
John10:33 mihonte in, “Nasep hoih na sep manin hong dengnuam ka hi kei uh a, Pasian na simmawhbawl manin hong dengnuam ka hi uh hi. Nang pen mi hi lel hinapi-in Pasian na kineihnuam hi,” ci-in a dawng uh hi." 
John10:34 Tua ciangin Jesuh in, “Na Thukham sung uhah Pasian in, ‘Note pen pasian-te na hi uh hi,’ ci hi." 
John10:35 Lai Siangtho sungah a kigelh thute a tawntungin a thuman hi a, Pasian’ thu a ngah mite pen Pasian in, ‘pasian-te,’ na ci hi." 
John10:36 Tua ahih manin kei pen Pa Pasian in hong teelin leitungah a hong sawl ka hih manin, ‘Pasian’ Tapa ka hi hi,’ ka cih ciangin bang hangin Pasian simmawhbawl hong cithei na hi uh hiam?" 
John10:37 Ka Pa’ na a sem lo hi leng na hong uploh mah ding uh ahi hi. 
John10:38 Ahi zongin keimah in ka Pa’ na sem ka hih manin keima thu na hong um nuam lo uh ahi ta zongin, Pa tawh pumkhat ka hihna thu na theih nadingun ka nasepnate na up dingun kilawm buang hi,” a ci leuleu hi." 
John10:39 Tua ciangin amaute in Jesuh matsawm uh hi; ahi zongin amaute’ khutsung panin Jesuh a suakta hi. 
John10:40 Tua ciangin Jordan Gun kantanin amah pai leuleu a, Johan in mite a tuiphum masakna munah tungin tua lai-ah a om hi." 
John10:41 Ama kiangah mi tampi tak hong kikhawm uh a, “Johan in nalamdang bangmah bawl lo hi. Ahi zongin Johan in hih mipa thu a gen khempeuh a vekpi-in mankim hi,” a ci uh hi." 
John10:42 Tua ahih manin tua lai-ah mi tampi in Jesuh a um uh hi. 
John11:1 Tua laitakin Mary le a unu Martha’ omna Bethany khua-ah Lazaras a kici mi khat a ci na hi. 
John11:2 Mary i cih pen Jesuh sathau nuhin a sam tawh a nulsaknu hi a, Lazaras pen ama u ahi hi." 
John11:3 Tua ahih manin a nau numei tegel in Jesuh kiangah, “Topa aw, na it mipa a ci na hi,” ci-in thu a zasak uh hi." 
John11:4 Ahi zongin Jesuh in tua thu a zak ciangin, “Hih natna pen sihna ding natna hi lo a, Pasian’ Tapa in Pasian’ pianzia a neihna mite in a theih nading, le Pasian a phattheih nadingin a na ahi hi,” a ci hi." 
John11:5 Jesuh in Martha-te unau le Lazaras it mahmah hi. 
John11:6 Tua hinapi-in a cinat a zakkhit ciangin tua lai-ah ni nih taam lai veve hi. 
John11:7 Tua khit ciangin a nungzuite kiangah, “Judea gamah paikik ni,” a cih leh" 
John11:7 Tua khit ciangin a nungzuite kiangah, “Judea gamah paikik ni,” a cih leh" 
John11:8 a nungzuite in, “Sia aw, zan mah deuhin Judea gam mite in nang denlup hong sawm uh ahih manin tua gamah paikik sawm na hi hiam?” a cih uh ciangin" 
John11:8 a nungzuite in, “Sia aw, zan mah deuhin Judea gam mite in nang denlup hong sawm uh ahih manin tua gamah paikik sawm na hi hiam?” a cih uh ciangin" 
John11:9 Jesuh in, “Sun khuavak hun nai sawm le nih sung hi lo ahi hiam? Mi khatpeuh tua khuavak sungah lampai leh pukkha cih om lo hi." 
John11:10 Ahi zongin zan khuamial sungah lampai leh khuavak nei lo ahih manin pukthei hi,” a cih khit ciangin" 
John11:11 a nungzuite kiangah, “I lawmpa Lazaras ihmu zo hi. Ahi zongin amah a phong dingin ka pai ding hi,” a ci hi." 
John11:12 Tua ciangin a nungzuite in, “Topa aw, amah ihmu ahihleh a nuamtuam hita ding hi,” a ci uh hi." 
John11:13 Jesuh in amah si hi, a cinuam hinapi-in, a nuamtuamin a ihmu hi, a ci-in a nungzuite in ngaihsun uh hi." 
John11:14 Tua ahih manin Jesuh in a teltakin gen a, “Lazaras si khinta hi." 
John11:15 Ahi zongin note in na uptheih nadingun tua lai-ah kei om kha lo ka hih manin note kong khualna-in ka nuam mahmah hi. Ahi zongin tu-in ama kiangah va pai ni,” a ci hi." 
John11:16 Tua ciangin, “Unau Peeng,” minno a nei Thomas in, “Ei zong amah tawh a sikhawm dingin va zui ni,” ci-in a nungzuihpihte a zawn hi." 
John11:17 Jesuh a tun ciangin Lazaras a kivui zawh ni li a phak khitna thu a thei hi. 
John11:18 Bethany le Jerusalem kikal tai nih bang bek kigamla ahih manin," 
John11:19 a upa uh Lazaras a sihna hangin Martha le Mary a hehnem dingin Jew mi tampi zong hong pai uh hi. 
John11:20 Jesuh hong paina thu Martha in a zak ciangin a dawn dingin va paikhia a, Mary ahihleh a inn mahah omlai hi." 
John11:21 Martha in Jesuh kiangah, “Topa aw, hih lai-ah a om hi lecin ka u si het lo ding hi." 
John11:22 Tu nangawnin na nget peuhpeuh Pasian in hong piak ding ka thei hi,” a ci hi." 
John11:23 Jesuh in, “Na u hong thokik ding hi,” a cih leh" 
John11:24 Martha in, “Nitawp ni-a thawhkik ni ciangin hong thawhkik ding ka thei hi,” a ci hi." 
John11:25 Tua ciangin Jesuh in, “Keimah in a sisa mite thosakin a hingsak thei pa ka hi hi. Kei hong um mi peuhmah a sih hangin nungta ding hi." 
John11:26 A nungta a kei hong um mite si ngei nawn lo ding hi. Hih thu na um hiam?” a cih ciangin," 
John11:27 “Ka um hi, Topa aw; leitungah a hong pai ding Pasian’ Tapa, Khrih na hihna thu ka um hi,” ci-in a dawng hi." 
John11:28 Tua khit ciangin Martha a inn-ah va tai-in a naunu Mary va huausim a, “Siapa hong pai a, nang hong sam hi,” a ci hi." 
John11:29 Tua thu a zak ciangin Mary dingin Jesuh a dawn dingin a paikhia hi. 
John11:30 Jesuh, khuasung hong tung nai lo a, Martha tawh a kimuhna mun mahah na omlai hi." 
John11:31 Amah hehnemin inn-ah a ompih mite in Mary dingin a paikhiatna a muh uh ciangin, hanah a kap dingin a pai ding hi, ci-in ngaihsun uh ahih manin a zui uh hi." 
John11:32 Jesuh omna munah Mary tungin amah a muh ciangin ama khe mai-ah bok a, “Topa aw, nang hong om hi lecin ka u si het lo ding hi,” ci-in a kap hi." 
John11:33 Jesuh in Mary le amah hong zui Jew mite a kahna a muh ciangin a lungsim nakpitakin sukha-in lunggim mahmah ahih manin," 
John11:34 “Koi-ah vui na hi uh hiam?” a ci hi. Amaute in, “Topa aw, hong pai inla hong en in,” a ci uh hi." 
John11:35 Tua ciangin Jesuh zong a kap hi. 
John11:36 Tua ahih manin amaute in, “Jesuh in zong Lazaras nak it mahmah hi,” a ci uh hi." 
John11:37 Ahi zongin pawlkhatte in, “Mittawte khua a musak thei hih mipa in amah a sih loh nadingin bawl thei lo ahi hiam?” a ci uh hi." 
John11:38 Jesuh a dah hong suak mahmah kik ahih manin leihawm sungah kivui-in suangtum tawh a gong a kihukna hanah a pai hi. 
John11:39 A phual a tun ciangin, “Suangtum likkhia un,” ci-in thu a pia hi. Tua ciangin misi pa’ naunu Martha in, “Topa aw, a kivui zawh ni li phakhin ahih manin uihta ding hi,” a cih leh" 
John11:40 Jesuh in, “Na up nakleh Pasian’ vangliatna na mu ding hi, ci-in hong genkhin hi lo ka hi hiam?” a ci hi." 
John11:41 Tua ahih manin a suangtum a likkhia uh hi. Jesuh zong van lam dakto-in, “Pa aw, ka thungetna hong ngai na hih manin ka nuam mahmah hi." 
John11:42 Ka thungetna na hong ngaih tawntungna thu ka thei a, ahi zongin hih lai-ah a om mite in kei na hong sawlna thu a uptheih nadingun tu-a bangin kam a hong pau ka hi hi,”" 
John11:43 a cih khit ciangin nakpitakin kiko-in, “Lazaras aw, hong pusuak in,” a ci hi." 
John11:44 Tua ciangin a misi pa a khut a khe dial tawh kituamin, a maitang puan tawh a kitunsa-in hong pusuak hi. Jesuh in amaute kiangah, “A dial le a puante phelkhia un,” a ci hi." 
John11:45 Tua ahih manin Mary kiangah hawhin Jesuh’ hihna a mu Jew mi tampi in amah a um uh hi. 
John11:46 Ahi zongin amaute pawlkhat Farisi mite kiangah pai-in Jesuh’ sep nate a va ko uh hi. 
John11:47 Tua ahih manin siampi liante le Farisi mite in thu vaihawm uliante tawh kikupna khat nei uh a, “Hih mipa in nalamdang tampi bawl ahih manin bangcih ding ihi hiam?" 
John11:48 Hih bangin omom sak lehang mi khempeuh in amah um ding uh a, Rom kumpite in i Biakinnpi hong suksiat sakin i minambup zong hong sugawp ding uh hi,” a kici uh hi." 
John11:49 Tua laitakin amaute sung panin tua kumin siampi lianpen a sem Kaiafas a kici mipa in, “Note in bangmah na thei kei uh hi." 
John11:50 I minambup in siatna a thuak sangin i minambup tangin mi khat si leh a hoihzawkna thu phawk lo na hi uh hiam?” a ci hi. 
John11:51 Hih bangin thu a gen ciangin ama lungsim a gen hi lo a, tua kumin siampi lianpen a sem ahihna tawh Jew mite’ tangin Jesuh a si ding ahihna thu a genkhol ahi hi." 
John11:52 Jew mite a’ ding bek hi loin a kithehthang Pasian’ mi khempeuh pumkhat a suah nadingin a kikaihkhop nading thu zong a genkhol ahi hi. 
John11:53 Tua ahih manin tua hun a kipanin Jesuh a thahtheih nadingun a vaihawm uh hi. 
John11:54 Tua ahih manin Judea gam sungah a kilangin Jesuh khualzin nawn lo a, amah paikhia-in sehnel gam gei-a om Efraim a kici khua-ah tungin tua lai-ah a nungzuite tawh a om hi." 
John11:54 Tua ahih manin Judea gam sungah a kilangin Jesuh khualzin nawn lo a, amah paikhia-in sehnel gam gei-a om Efraim a kici khua-ah tungin tua lai-ah a nungzuite tawh a om hi." 
John11:55 Jew mite’ Paisan Pawi hun hong nai ciangin, tua pawi kipatma hun sungin biakna vai-in kisiansuahna a bawl dingin gam sung khuate panin Jerusalem khuapi-ah mi tampi hong pai uh hi." 
John11:56 Biakinn sungah kikhawmin a om laitakun Jesuh a mu dingin amaute khuadak kawikawi-in kiho uh a, “Jesuh hong pai dingin na um hiam?” ci-in khatlekhat kidong uh hi." 
John11:57 Bang hang hiam cih leh siampi liante le Farisi mite in Jesuh a mattheih nadingun, “Jesuh a omna a thei na om uhleh hong ko un,” ci-in thupiakna nei khinzo uh hi." 
John12:1 Paisan Pawi hun a tun ding ni guk in a sap ni-in sihna panin a thawhsak Lazaras a tenna Bethany khua-ah va tung hi. 
John12:2 Amaute in nitak an na vak uh a, Lazaras ahihleh Jesuh tawh an ne-in tukhawmin, Martha pen anpia-in a manlah hi." 
John12:3 Tua laitakin Mary in a manpha mahmah nard sathau namtui thawl khat hong paipih a, Jesuh’ khe a nuhkhit ciangin a sam tawh a nulsak hi. Tua innsung khempeuh sathau namtui gim hong nam hi." 
John12:4 Tua laitakin Jesuh’ nungzuite sung panin amah a lehhek ding Judas Iskariot in," 
John12:5 “Bang hangin hih sathau namtui ngun peek za thumin kizuakin a sumte mizawngte tungah kipiazaw lo ahi hiam?” a ci hi. 
John12:6 Hih bangin kam a pauna pen mizawngte a khualna hang hi lo a, amah sumkem ahih manin a sumte gu-in a ututin a zang zel pa ahihna hang hizaw hi." 
John12:7 Tua ahih manin Jesuh in, “Bangmah cih se dah un! Ama neih laite zong ka kivui cianga dingin kemsak hoh un." 
John12:8 Mizawngte pen note tawh hong omkhawm niloh ding a, kei ka hih leh note tawh ka hong omkhawm tawntung kei ding hi,” a ci hi." 
John12:9 Bethany khua-ah Jesuh a omna thu a zak uh ciangin mihon tampi hong pai uh hi. Jesuh a mu nuamin hong pai hi bek lo uh a, Jesuh in sihna panin a thawhsakkik Lazaras zong a mu nuam kawm uh ahi hi." 
John12:10 Lazaras’ hangin Jew mi tampite in amau’ makaite taisanin Jesuh um uh ahih manin siampi liante in Lazaras zong thah a sawm uh hi. 
John12:11  
John12:12 A zing ciangin Paisan Pawi a siim mihonpite in Jerusalem khua-ah Jesuh hong pai nading thu a za uh hi. 
John12:13 Tua ahih manin amah a dawn dingin Jerusalem panin mihonpi paikhia-in nisuh hiangte tawikawmin, “Pasian phat un! Pasian in Topa’ min tawh hong pai pa thupha pia ta hen! Pasian in Israel Kumpipa thupha pia ta hen!” ci-in a kiko uh hi." 
John12:14 Lai Siangtho sungah, “Zion khua mite aw, lau kei un. En un, na kumpipa uh hong pai a, lano tungah hong tuang hi,” ci-in a kigelh mah bangin Jesuh in lano khat mu ahih manin tua lano tungah a tuang hi." 
John12:15  
John12:16 Tua hun laitakin a nungzuite in hih thu a khiatna thei lo uh hi. Ahi zongin Pasian’ pianzia nei-in Jesuh a thawhkik khit ciangin Lai Siangtho in amah a gen ahihna le ama a dingin hih bangin a piang ahihna thu a nungphawk uh hi. 
John12:17 Jesuh in han sung panin Lazaras samin, sihna panin a thawhsakkik a mu mihonte in tua thu mah gen belin a nei uh hi." 
John12:18 Jesuh in tua bang nalamdang lian a bawlna thu mihonte in za khin uh ahih manin amah a dawn dingin a pai uh hi. 
John12:19 Tua ciangin Farisi mite khatlekhat kiho uh a, “Bangmah i cihzo het kei hi. En un, mi khempeuh in amah a zui khinta uh ahi hi,” a kici uh hi." 
John12:20 Pawi hun sungin Pasian bia dingin Jerusalem khua-ah a hong pai mite lakah Grik mi pawlkhat a om uh hi. 
John12:21 Galilee gam Bethsaida khuami Filip kiangah amaute hong pai-in, “Sia aw, kote in zong Jesuh ka mu nuam uh hi,” ci-in a gen uh ciangin" 
John12:22 Filip in Andru kiangah a gen hi. Tua ciangin Andru le Filip paikhawmin Jesuh kiangah a gen uh hi. 
John12:23 Tua ciangin Jesuh in, “Mihing Tapa in Pasian’ pianzia a ngah ding hun hong tungta hi." 
John12:24 A mantakin ci lehang, mangbuhhum tang khat leilakah kituhin si masa kei leh tang khat bek mah hi ngitnget hi; ahi zongin si masa leh tang tampi tak hong nei thei hi." 
John12:25 Tua ahih manin hih leitung nuntakna a itte in a nuntakna taktak taanlawh ding a, hih leitung nuntakna a it lote in nuntakna taktak nei tawntung ding hi." 
John12:26 Ka nasemte keima omna-ah a omtheih nadingin ka na a sem nuam peuhmah in kei hong zui ding uh a, ka Pa in ka na a sem mite a pahtawi ding hi,” a ci hi." 
John12:27 Tua khit ciangin Jesuh in, “Tu-in ka lunggim mahmah hi. Bangcih ding ka hi hiam? ‘Pa aw, hih hun tawh hong kipelhsak in,’ ci ding ka hi hiam? Tua bang cih ding lah hih bang a thuak ding mahin a hong pai ka hi hi." 
John12:28 Pa aw, nangma min thangsak ta in,” a ci hi. Tua ciangin vantung panin aw khat hong ging a, “Ka thangsakzo a, khatvei ka thangsakkik ding hi,” a ci hi." 
John12:29 Tua kiima ding mihonte in a awging za uh a, “Vanging bang hi,” a ci uh hi. Pawlkhatte in, “Vantung mi in amah hopih hi,” a ci uh hi." 
John12:30 Tua ciangin Jesuh in, “Hih awging pen keima a’ ding ngaihsutna hi lo a, note a’ ding ngaihsutna-in hong ging hizaw hi." 
John12:31 Tu-in leitung thukhen ding hun hong tungta a, hih leitung a ukpa kilawnkhia ding hi." 
John12:32 Leilak panin kei hong kikhai toh ciangin ka kiangah mi khempeuh ka kai ding hi,” a ci hi." 
John12:33 (Hih bangin a gen ciangin ama sihna dingzia a genna ahi hi.) 
John12:34 Tua ciangin mihonte in, “Khrih nungta tawntung ding hi, ci-in Thukham sungah kigen hi. Bang hangin Mihing Tapa kikhaito ding ci na hi hiam? Hih Mihing Tapa kua ahi hiam?” a cih uh ciangin" 
John12:35 Jesuh in, “Note kiangah tawmvei sung khuavak hong omlai ding hi. Khuamial sungah a pai mi in a paina mun thei lo ahih manin khuamial in note hong phak loh nadingin khuavak na neih sungun na gamtat ngei uh zom paisuak un." 
John12:36 Khuavak mite na suahtheih nadingun khuavak na neih hun sungun tua khuavak um un,” a ci hi. Jesuh in hih thuteng a genkhit ciangin paikhia-in amaute kiang panin a bu hi." 
John12:37 Amaute’ muhin Jesuh in hih nalamdang khempeuh a bawl hangin amaute in um lo uh hi. 
John12:38 Kamsang Isaiah in, “Topa aw, kua in ka thugente um a, Topa’ vangliatna kua tungah kilak ahi hiam?” ci-in a genna thu a tun nading ahi hi." 
John12:39 Tua ahih manin amaute in um nuam lo uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Isaiah mah in," 
John12:40 “Amaute’ natna ka damsak loh nadingin a mit un mu loin, a lungsim un a theihtheih loh nadingun amaute’ mit ka tawsak a, a lungsim uh ka mawlsak hi, Pasian in ci hi,” ci-in zong na gen lai hi." 
John12:41 Isaiah in Jesuh’ neih Pasian’ pianzia mu ahih manin hih bangin thu a gen ahi hi. 
John12:42 Tua bang hitaseleh Jew mi ulian tampi in Jesuh a um uh hi. Ahi zongin Farisi mite in kikhopna inn panin a hawlkhiat ding lau uh ahih manin a kilangin genkhia ngam lo uh hi. 
John12:43 Pasian’ pahtak ding sangin mite’ pahtak ding utzaw uh ahih manin a tuaci om ahi uh hi. 
John12:44 Tua ciangin Jesuh nakpitakin kiko a, “Kei hong um khempeuh in kei bek hong um hi loin kei hong sawl pa zong a um ahi hi." 
John12:45 Kei hong mu khempeuh in kei hong sawl pa zong a mu ahi hi. 
John12:46 Kei hong um mi khempeuh, khuamial sungah a om nawn loh nadingun leitung khuavak bangin ka hong pai hi." 
John12:47 Ka thugenna za napi-in a zui lo mite tungah thu ka khen kei ding hi. Leitung mite mawhsakin thukhen dingin a hong pai ka hi kei a, a honkhia dingin a hong pai ka hizaw hi." 
John12:48 Kei hong nialin ka thugen a sang lo mite in thukhen ding khat nei uh hi. Nitawp ni ciangin keima thugente pen amaute’ thukhen ding ahi hi. 
John12:49 Bang hang hiam cih leh keima utthu tawh thu a mawkgen ka hi kei a, kei hong sawl Pa Pasian in ka gen ding thuteng a hong piak ahi hi." 
John12:50 Gen dingin a hong sawl thute in nuntak tawntung a piangsak thei ahihna thu ka thei hi. Tua ahih manin Pa in gen dingin a hong sawlteng bek a gen ka hi hi,” a ci hi." 
John13:1 Tu-in Paisan Pawi hun ding ni khat bek in sam a, Jesuh in hih leitung nusia-in a Pa kiangah a pai ding hun a tunna thu a thei hi. Hih leitungah a om ama mite it mahmah ahih manin a hih theihna zah ciang tawh a itna a lak hi." 
John13:2 Jesuh le a nungzuite nitak an ne-in a tukhawm uh hi. Tua hun laitakin dawimangpa in Simon Iskariot’ tapa Judas’ lungsim sungah Jesuh lehhek nading ngaihsutna koih khinzo hi. 
John13:3 A Pa in ama khut sungah vangliatna khempeuh a piakna le Pasian in amah a sawl mah bangin tu-in Pasian kiangah a paikik ding ahihna thu zong a thei hi. 
John13:4 Tua ahih manin a annekna sabuai panin Jesuh dingkhia-in a puantungsilh suahkhia a, a kawngah a mainulpi a teeng hi." 
John13:5 Tua ciangin kuangpi sung khatah tui sung a, a nungzuite’ khe silsakin a kawngah a teen a mainulpi tawh a nul keusak dingin a kipan hi." 
John13:6 Simon Peter’ khe silsak dingin a kipat ciangin Peter in, “Topa aw, ka khe hong silsak zenzen ding na hi hiam?” a na ci hi." 
John13:7 Jesuh in, “Tu-a ka gamtatna thu na theih loh hangin nidang ciangin na thei ding hi,” a ci hi." 
John13:8 Peter in, “Nang peuhmah ka khe ka hong silsak ngei buang kei ding hi,” a cih ciangin, “Na khe hong silsak kei leng, kei tawh na kipawl thei nawn kei ding hi,” a ci hi." 
John13:9 Tua ciangin Simon Peter in, “Topa aw, tua bang ahihleh ka khe bek hong silsak kei inla, ka khutte le ka lu zong hong silsak in,” a na ci leuleu hi." 
John13:10 Jesuh in, “A kipumsil khinsa mite siangthota ahih manin a khe simloh silkik ding kisam nawn lo hi. Note sung panin khat simloh na vekpi-un na siang khin uh hi,” a ci hi." 
John13:11 Jesuh in amah a lehhek ding pa theikhin ahih manin, “Note sung panin khat simloh na siangkhin uh hi,” a ci ahi hi." 
John13:12 Jesuh in amaute’ khe a silsak khit ciangin a puan silhkik a, annek sabuai-ah a tutnasa mun hong zuanin, “Tu-a note tungah ka hong gamtatna thu na thei uh hiam?" 
John13:13 Note in kei pen Siapa, le Topa, na hong ci uh hi. Na hong cih uh mah bangin a man ka hi hi." 
John13:14 Note’ Topa le Siapa in na khe uh hong silsak ka hih leh note khatlekhat na kisilsak kan ding uh kilawm hi. 
John13:15 Note tungah ka hong gamtat bangin note na gamtat theih nadingun a lim a hong lak ka hi hi. 
John13:16 A mantakin ci lehang, sila pen a topa sangin lianzaw ngei lo a, a kisawlpa zong a sawl pa sangin lianzaw ngei lo hi." 
John13:17 Hih thu thei-in na zuih uhleh na lung uh nuam mahmah ding hi. 
John13:18 “Hih bangin ka hong genna in note khempeuh hong huam kim lo hi. Ka teelsa mite ka thei hi. Lai Siangtho in, ‘Ka an a ne pa in kei hong langpang hi,’ a cihna thu a tun ding kisam hi." 
John13:19 Hih thu hong tun taktak ciangin, ‘Kei kua ka hihna,’ na hong theih nadingun a hun ma-in a hong ma gen ka hi hi." 
John13:20 A mantakin ci lehang, keima hong sawl mite a sangte in kei zong a hong sang ahi uh a, kei a hong sangte in kei a hong sawl pa zong a sang ahi uh hi,” a ci hi." 
John13:21 Jesuh in hih thuteng a genkhit ciangin lungkham mahmah ahih manin, “A mantakin ci lehang, note khat in kei nong lehhek ding uh hi,” ci-in a kilangin a genkhia hi." 
John13:22 Kua a cihnopna hi ding ahi hiam, ci-in a nungzuite khatlekhat a ki-en uh hi." 
John13:23 Jesuh in a itdiak a nungzuite khat ama kiangah tu ahih manin," 
John13:24 Simon Peter in a mitheek tawh amah hopih a, “Kua a cihnopna ahi hiam?” dong in, ci-in a sawl hi." 
John13:25 Tua ahih manin tua nungzui pa in zong Jesuh nehphei lai deuhin, “Topa aw, kua ahi hiam?” ci-in a dong hi." 
John13:26 Jesuh in, “Anlum, meh sungah diahin ka piak ding pa ahi hi,” a cih khit ciangin a anlum diahin Simon Iskariot’ tapa Judas a pia hi." 
John13:27 Judas in tua an a nek khit phetin ama sungah Satan hong lutpah hi. Tua ahih manin Jesuh in ama kiangah, “Na hih ding peuhpeuh hihpak in,” a ci hi." 
John13:28 Ahi zongin sabuai-ah a tutkhawmpih mite in hih bangin a cihna thu thei lo uh hi. 
John13:29 Amah sumkem ahih manin hih pawi a zat ding a kisam na pawlkhat a lei dingin a sawl hi ding hi; tua ahih kei leh zong mizawngte pawlkhat tungah sum a pia dingin a sawl hi ding hi, ci-in nungzui pawlkhat in a ngaihsun uh hi." 
John13:30 Tua hi a, Judas in a an a sankhit ciangin a paikhia pah hi. Tua hunin khua mial khinta hi." 
John13:31 Judas a paikhiat khit ciangin Jesuh in, “Tu-in Mihing Tapa in Pasian’ pianzia a neihna hong kilang ding hita hi; ama hangin Pasian in minthanna a ngah ding ahi hi." 
John13:32 Ama hangin Pasian in minthanna a ngah mah bangin Pasian in zong ama pianzia amah ngahsak ding a, a sawt loin ngahsak pah ding hi." 
John13:33 Ka tate aw, note tawh sauvei ka hong omkhawm nawn kei ding hi. Note in kei na hong zong ding uh a, ahi zongin Jerusalem khua-a Jew uliante kiangah, ‘Ka paina munah na hong pai thei kei ding uh hi,’ ci-in ka gen mah bangin note kiangah zong tu-in ka hong gen hi." 
John13:34 Note tungah ka hong piak thak thu in: Note khatlekhat na ki-it ding uh ahi hi. Note ka hong it mah bangin note khatlekhat na ki-it un. 
John13:35 Note khatlekhat ki-it le-uhcin keima nungzuite na hihna uh mi khempeuh in hong thei ding uh hi,” a ci hi." 
John13:36 Tua ciangin Simon Peter in, “Topa aw, koi-ah pai ding na hi hiam?” ci-in a dot ciangin Jesuh in, “Ka paina dingah tu-in na hong zui thei nai kei ding hi; ahi zongin nidang ciangin na hong zui ding hi,” ci-in a dawng hi." 
John13:37 Peter in, “Bang hangin tu-in hong zui thei lo ding ka hi hiam? Nang ka hong sihpih ding hi,” a cih ciangin" 
John13:38 Jesuh in, “Kei hong sihpih ngam ding na hi hiam? A mantakin kong genin-ah, kei thumvei na hong nialkhit matengin ak khuang lo ding hi,” ci-in a dawng hi." 
John14:1 Tua ciangin Jesuh in a nungzuite kiangah, “Note lunghimawh kei un. Pasian um unla, kei zong hong um un." 
John14:2 Note’ om nading mun a bawlkhol dingin a pai ding ka hi hi. Ka Pa’ inn sungah om nading mun tampi om hi. A om lo ding hileh hih bangin thu ka hong gen kei ding hi. 
John14:3 Kei va pai-in note’ om nading mun ka va bawlkholh khit ciangin keima omna munah note na hong om theih nadingun note a hong la dingin ka hong paikik ding hi. 
John14:4 Ka pai nading mun tuntheih nading lampi na thei uh hi,” a ci hi." 
John14:5 Tua laitakin Thomas in, “Topa aw, na pai nading mun thei lo ka hih manun a lampi ding bangci theih ding ka hi uh hiam?” a cih ciangin" 
John14:6 Jesuh in ama kiangah, “Keimah in Lampi ka hi a, Thuman, le Nuntakna zong ka hi hi. Kei hong suang loin Pa kiangah kuamah tung thei lo ding hi." 
John14:7 Note in kei na hong theih nak-uhleh ka Pa zong a thei na hi uh hi. Tua ahih ciangin tu a kipanin Pa thei-in a mu khinta na hi uh hi,” a ci hi." 
John14:8 Tua ciangin Filip in, “Topa aw, Pa hong lak lecin ka lung uh kim pah ding hi,” a cih leh" 
John14:9 Jesuh in, “Filip aw, hih tanvei omkhawm khin napi kei hong thei nai lo lai na hi hiam? Kei a hong mu khinte in Pa a mu khin ahih manin bang hangin, ‘Pa hong lak in,’ ci thei na hi hiam?" 
John14:10 Kei pen Pa tawh pumkhat ka hih lamtak um lo na hi hiam? Note tungah ka hong gen thute keima thu bek tawh a hong gen ka hi kei a, kei tawh a om Pa Pasian in na semin a hong gen ahi hi." 
John14:11 Pa tawh pumkhat ka hihna thu hoihtakin hong um un. Na hong up nai kei uhleh zong ka nalamdang bawlnate hangin hong um beek un. 
John14:12 A mantakin ka hong genin-ah, kei hong umte in keima sep nate mah sem ding hi. Pa kiangah kei ciah ding ka hih manin keima sep sangin zong a lianzaw sem lai ding uh hi." 
John14:13 Tapa’ hangin Pasian’ pianzia a kilat theih nadingin keima min paulamin na hong nget khempeuh uh ka hong pia ding hi. 
John14:14 Keima min paulamin na hong nget nak-uhleh ka hong pia ding hi,” a ci hi." 
John14:15 Tua ciangin Jesuh in, “Kei na hong it uhleh ka thupiakte zong na zui ding uh hi." 
John14:16 Keimah in Pa kiangah ka ngen ding a, note tawh a omkhawm tawntung dingin Thuman a hong lak Kha Siangtho, note hong Huhpa ding a hong pia ding hi." 
John14:17 Leitung mite in tua Kha Siangtho mu thei lo, theithei lo uh ahih manin sang thei lo ding uh hi. Ahi zongin note sungah tua Kha Siangtho hong om ding ahih manin note in na thei ding uh hi." 
John14:18 “Note a cimawh dingin ka hong nusia kei ding hi. Note kiangah ka hong paikik ding hi. 
John14:19 Tawlkhat khit ciangin leitung mite in kei hong mu nawn lo ding uh hi. Ahi zongin kei ka nuntak mah bangin note zong nungta ding na hih manun note in kei na hong mu ding uh hi. 
John14:20 Tua hun ciangin Pa sungah kei ka omna thu, le note sungah ka hong om mah bangin keima sungah na omna thu uh na thei ding uh hi." 
John14:21 Keima thupiakte sangin a zuite in keimah hong it ahi uh hi. Kei hong it mite pen ka Pa in zong it ding a, keimah in zong itin amaute tungah ka kilang ding hi,” a ci hi." 
John14:22 Tua ciangin Judas Iskariot ahi lo Judas dang khat in, “Topa aw, leitung mite tungah kilang loin kote tungah bangci-in hong kilangtuam thei ding na hi hiam?” ci-in a dot ciangin" 
John14:23 Jesuh in, “Kei hong itte in ka thu zui ding uh hi. Ka Pa in zong it ding a, ka nihun tua mite kiangah pai-in amaute tawh ka omkhawm ding uh hi." 
John14:24 Kei hong it lote in ka thugente zui lo ding uh hi. Tu-a na zak uh thute pen keima thu hi lo a, kei hong sawl Pa Pasian kiang panin a hong pai thu ahi hi." 
John14:25 “Note tawh ka hong omkhawm hun sungin hih thute a hong gen ka hi hi. 
John14:26 Ahi zongin Pa in keima tangin a hong sawl ding Huhpa Kha Siangtho a hong tun ciangin note tungah thu khempeuh hong hilh ding a, note tungah ka hong gensa thu khempeuh zong hong phawksakkik ding hi." 
John14:27 Note tungah keima neih bang lungnopna ka hong pia ding hi. Tua ka hong piak ding lungnopna pen leitung mite in a piaktheih a kip lo lungnopnate pawl hi lo hi. Tua ahih manin lau kei unla, zong lungkham kei un." 
John14:28 ‘Ka va paikhia ding a, ahi zongin note kiangah ka hong paikik ding hi,’ ka cihna thu na za khin uh hi. Kei sangin a lianzaw Pa Pasian kiangah a va pai ding ka hih manin kei na hong it nak-uhleh ama kiangah ka paina hangin na nuamzaw ding uh hi." 
John14:29 A thu hong pian’ taktak ciangin ka thugente na uptheih nadingun a pian’ ma-in a hong genkhol ka hi hi. 
John14:30 Tu-in hih leitung a ukpa hong tungta ahih manin note kiangah thu kong gen man nawn kei ding hi. Amah in keima tungah aana nei lo hi. 
John14:31 Ahi zongin leitung mite in Pa Pasian ka itna thu a theih nadingun Pa’ vaihawmna bangbangin a gamta ding ka hi hi. Tua ahih manin kithawi un; hih lai mun panin paikhia ta ni,” a ci hi." 
John15:1 Tua ciangin Jesuh in, “Kei pen leenggui taktak ka hi a, ka Pa pen leenggui lonei pa ahi hi." 
John15:2 Amah in gah a nei lo ka hiang khempeuh satkhia a, gah a nei hiangte ahihleh a gah semsem theih nadingin a puah hi." 
John15:3 Note tungah ka hong thugennate hangin note a siang na suak khinzo uh hi. 
John15:4 Kei tawh hong kizom paisuak le-uhcin kei zong note tawh a kizom paisuak ka hi ding hi. A hiang pen a gui tawh kizom kei leh gah a gah theih loh mah bangin note zong kei tawh na kizop kei uhleh gah na gah thei kei ding uh hi. 
John15:5 “Kei pen leenggui ka hi a, note pen a hiang na hi uh hi. Note in kei tawh loin bangmah hih thei lo ding na hih manun kei tawh a kizomte in gah tampi na gah ding uh hi." 
John15:6 Kei tawh a kizom lo mite pen leenggui hiang bangin kipaai khia-in keutum hi. Tua bang hiangte meikhuk sungah kilawnin a kangtum hi. 
John15:7 Kei tawh na hong kizop uh a, note sungah ka thu a om nakleh na deih peuhpeuh uh hong ngen le-uhcin hong kipia ding hi." 
John15:8 Gah tampi gah le-uhcin ka Pa’ minthanna a kilangsak na hi ding uh a, keima nungzui na hihna uh kilang ding hi." 
John15:9 Ka Pa in kei hong it zahin note hong it ka hih manin keima hong itna sungah om un. 
John15:10 Ka Pa’ hong thupiakte zui-in ama itna sungah ka om mah bangin note in zong ka thupiaknate na hong zuih uhleh ka itna sungah a om na hi ding uh hi. 
John15:11 Note hangin kei ka lungdam theih nading le note’ lungdamna a cingtaak a suahtheih nadingin hih thute a hong gen ka hi hi. 
John15:12 “Note tungah ka hong piak thu in: Note ka hong it zahin note khatlekhat na ki-it un. 
John15:13 Lawmte’ tang ding sih ngamna sangin lawmte itna a lianzaw om nawn lo hi. 
John15:14 Ka hong thupiak bangin na gamtat uhleh ka lawmte na hi uh hi. 
John15:15 Nasemte in a tote’ nasepna bangmah thei lo ahih manin note pen nasemte ka hong ci nawn kei ding hi. Ka Pa’ tung panin ka zak thu khempeuh note kiangah hong genkhin ka hih manin note, lawm, ka hong ci zaw ding hi." 
John15:16 Note in kei na hong teel kei uh a, ahi zongin keimah in note ka hong teel a, note va pai-in a kimang tawntung ding gah a gah dingin ka hong seh hi. Tua ahih manin keima min suangin Pa kiangah na nget peuhpeuh uh hong pia ding hi." 
John15:17 Tua hi a, note ka hong thupiak in: Khatlekhat na ki-it un, cihna ahi hi." 
John15:18 “Leitung mite in note hong muhdah leh kei a hong mudah masa ahihna thu na thei un. 
John15:19 Hih leitung mite tawh a kipawl hi le-uhcin leitung mite in amau pawlte hong it ding hi. Ahi zongin hih leitung mite lak panin note ka hong teelkhia a, amaute tawh kipawl nawn lo na hih manun a hong mudah ahi uh hi." 
John15:20 ‘Sila pen a topa sangin lianzaw lo hi,’ ci-in ka hong thugenna phawk un. Amaute in kei hong bawlsiat uhleh note zong hong bawlsia ding hi. Ka thugente hong zuih uhleh note’ thugente zong hong zui ding hi." 
John15:21 Ahi zongin amaute in kei hong sawl pa thei lo uh ahih manin keima mi na hihna uh hangin amaute in hih bangin hong bawl ding uh ahi hi. 
John15:22 Kei hong pai kei-in amaute tungah thu a gen lo hi leng amaute in mawh pualo ding uh hi. Ahi zongin tu-in ahihleh a mawhna thu uhah kiphel nading a paulap ding uh bangmah om nawn lo hi. 
John15:23 Kei hong mudahte in ka Pa zong a mudah ahi hi. 
John15:24 Kuamah in a bawl ngei loh na lamdangte amaute lakah a bawl lo hi leng amaute in mawh pualo ding uh hi. Ahi zongin amaute in ka nalamdang bawlte mu khin uh ahih manin kei le ka Pa a hong mudah khawm uh ahi hi. 
John15:25 Amaute’ Thukham sungah, ‘Thu om lopi-in kei hong mudah uh hi,’ ci-in a kigelhna thu a tuntheih nadingin a hici mah ding ahi hi." 
John15:26 “Ahi zongin Thuman a hong lak ding Huhpa ahi Kha Siangtho ka Pa kiang panin ka hong sawl ding hi. Amah hong tun ciangin keima thu hong gen ding hi. 
John15:27 A kipat cil a kipanin kei tawh omkhawm na hih manun note in zong keima thu na gen ding uh hi. 
John16:1 “Note na pukkhak loh nadingun hih thute a hong gen ka hi hi. 
John16:2 Amaute in a kikhopna uh innte panin note hong hawlkhia ding uh hi. Note hong that mite pen Pasian’ nasemin a kingaihsut ding uh hun hong tung ding hi. 
John16:3 Amaute in ka Pa ahi a, kei ahi zongin hong thei lo uh ahih manin tu-a bangin note a hong bawl ding uh ahi hi." 
John16:4 Hih bangin a hong gamtat hun uh hong tun ciangin ka hong gen thute na phawk theih nadingun a hong genkhol ka hi hi. “Note tawh hong omkhawm ngawn ka hih manin a kipattung lamin hih thute ka hong gen kei hi. 
John16:5 Tu-in ahihleh kei hong sawl pa kiangah a ciahkik ding ka hi hi. Tua hinapi-in, ‘Koi-ah pai ding na hi hiam?’ ci-in kuamah in na hong dong kei uh hi." 
John16:6 Ahi zongin hih thute ka hong gen ciangin na lungsim uh dah mahmah hi. 
John16:7 A taktakin ci lehang, kei paikhia kei leng note hong Huh ding pa hong pai lo ding a, kei paikhia leng note hong Huh ding pa hong sawl ding ka hih manin kei va paikhia leng note a dingin hoihzaw tham hi." 
John16:8 Amah hong tun ciangin leitung mite tungah mawhna thu, thuman thu leh thukhenna thu laktel ding hi." 
John16:9 Amaute in kei hong uploh manun a mawhna uh lak ding a," 
John16:10 Pa kiangah pai ding ka hih manin kei na hong mu nawn kei ding uh hi, ka cihna thu a manna lak ding a," 
John16:11 hih leitung a ukpa pen thukhenna a thuakkhin ahihna thu zong lak ding hi. 
John16:12 “Ka hong gen ding tampi tak omlai hi; ahi zongin hong gen lai leng note a dingin tamlua ding hi. 
John16:13 Tua ahih manin thuman hong lak ding Kha Siangtho hong tun ciangin thu khempeuh a manin hong hilh ding hi. Ama ngaihsuttawm thu hong gen ding hi lo a, ama tungah a kigen thute le a hong tung ding thute a hong gen ding ahi hi." 
John16:14 Amah in keima gen ding thute note tungah hong gen ding ahih manin Pasian’ pianzia ka neihna hong kilangsak ding hi. 
John16:15 Ka Pa’ neihsa khempeuh keima-a’ suakkhin ahih manin keima gen ding thute le a gen dingin ka sawlteng Kha Siangtho in note kiangah hong gen ding hi,” a ci hi." 
John16:16 “Tawlkhat khit ciangin na hong mu nawn kei ding uh a, tawlkhat khit ciangin na hong mukik ding uh hi,” a cih ciangin," 
John16:17 a nungzuite pawlkhat kidong uh a, “Tawlkhat khit ciangin kei na hong mu nawn kei ding uh a, tawlkhat khit ciangin na hong mukik ding uh hi, a cihna le Pa kiangah a ciahkik ding ka hi hi, a cihnate bang a cihnopna ahi hiam?” a kici uh hi." 
John16:18 Tawlkhat a cihcih pen bang a cihnopna ahi hiam, i thei kei hi, a kici uh hi." 
John16:19 Jesuh in amaute’ theihnop lamtak phawk ahih manin amaute kiangah, “Note khatlekhat na kidot uh, ‘Tawlkhat khit ciangin na hong mu nawn kei ding uh a, tawlkhat khit ciangin na hong mukik ding uh hi,’ ka cihnopna a kidong na hi uh hiam?" 
John16:20 A taktakin ka hong genin-ah, note dahin na kap ding uh a, ahi zongin leitung mite lungdam ding uh hi. Note na dah ding uh a, ahi zongin na dahna uh lungdamna hong suak ding hi." 
John16:21 Numei in a ta a suahhun a tun ciangin na sa ahih manin a dah hi. Ahi zongin a ta a suahkhit ciangin leitungah naungek khat a piangsak khin ahihna hangin lungdamin a natna teng a mangngilh ta hi. 
John16:22 Note zong tua mah tawh na kibang ding uh hi. Note zong tu-in na dah uh hangin note tawh kimukik ding ihih manin na lung uh dam mahmah ding a, tua na lungdamna uh kuamah in hong beisak thei lo ding hi." 
John16:23 “Tua hun ciangin kei kiangah bangmah nong ngen nawn kei ding uh hi. A mantakin kong genin-ah, keima min suangin na nget peuhpeuh uh Pa in hong pia ding hi." 
John16:24 Tuni ciang dong keima min suangin bangmah na ngen nai kei uh hi. Tua ahih manin ngen le-uhcin hong kipia ding ahih manin na lungdamna uh hong cingtaak ding hi. 
John16:25 “Tuhun ciang dong hih thute thugentehna zangin ka hong gen hi. Ahi zongin thugentehna ka hong zat nawn loh hun hong tung ding a, tua hun ciangin a teltakin Pa Pasian’ thu ka hong gen ding hi." 
John16:26 Tua hun hong tun ciangin, Pa Pasian kiangah ka hong ngetsak ding hi, ka hong ci nawn kei ding a, nomau mahmah in ka min suangin Pa kiangah na ngenpah ding uh hi." 
John16:27 Bang hang hiam cih leh note in kei hong itin, Pa kiang panin a hong pai ka hihna thu um na hih manun Pa mahmah in note hong it ahihna hang ahi hi." 
John16:28 Pa kiang panin hong pai-in leitung a hong tung ka hi a, tu-in leitung nusia leuleu-in Pa kiang a zuankik ding ka hi hi,” a ci hi." 
John16:29 Tua ciangin a nungzuite in, “Tu-in thugentehna zang nawn loin a kitel takin thu na hong gen hi." 
John16:30 Tu-in na khempeuh na theihkhitna thu ka phawk uh a, ka theihnop uh thute kote in ka hong dot ding uh zong kisam nawn lo ahih manin Pa kiang panin a hong pai na hihna thu ka hong um uh hi,” a ci uh hi." 
John16:31 Jesuh in, “Tu-in hong umta na hi uh hiam?" 
John16:32 Note khempeuh kithehthangin na inn ciat uh zuanin kei bek na hong nusiat ding uh hun a hong tung ding hi bek loin tu-in a hong tung hita hi. Ahi zongin kei guak a hong kinusia hi lo a, Pa in kei hong ompih hi." 
John16:33 Keimah tawh na hong kipawlna uh hangin lungnopna na neihtheihna dingun hih thu a hong gen ka hi hi. Leitung gimna na thuak ding uh hi. Ahi zongin keimah in leitung nate zo khinta ka hih manin lungnuamin om un,” a ci hi." 
John17:1 Jesuh in hih thute a genkhit ciangin vantung lam ento-in, “Pa aw, a hun hong tungta ahih manin na Tapa in na pianzia hong kilatsak theih nadingin tu-in na Tapa’ pianzia hong kilangsak ta in." 
John17:2 Bang hang hiam cih leh Tapa tungah na piak mi khempeuh tungah Tapa in nuntak tawntungna a piaktheih nadingin mi khempeuh tungah ukna aana a neih nadingin Tapa tungah na hong piaksa ahi hi. 
John17:3 Nang bek a man Pasian na hihna thu le nangmah in na hong sawl Jesuh Khrih hong theihna pen amaute a dingin nuntak tawntung ngah nading lampi ahi hi. 
John17:4 Nangmah in sep dingin na hong piak nasep khempeuh sem khinta ka hih manin leitungah na min a thangsak ka hi hi. 
John17:5 Pa aw, leitung a kipiansak ma-in nang tawh i neihkhawm na pianzia mah tu-in nangma omna munah hong pia ta in." 
John17:6 “Leitung mite sung panin keima khut sungah na hong piak mite tungah nangma min ka pulak khinzo ta hi. Tua mite in nangma thu mangin nangma mi hi uh a, ahi zongin keima khut sungah amaute na hong pia hi." 
John17:7 Tu-in amaute in keima neih khempeuh nangma hong piak ahihna thu a thei uh hi. 
John17:8 Bang hang hiam cih leh gen dingin na hong sawl thu khempeuh amaute kiangah ka gen ciangin um uh a, nangma kiang panin a pai ka hihna thu hong thei uh a, nangma hong sawl ka hihna thu zong hong um uh hi." 
John17:9 “Amaute a dingin thu ka hong ngetsak hi. Leitung mite a dingin a hong ngetsak hi loin keima khut sungah na hong piak mite nangma mi ahih manin tua mite a dingin a hong ngetsak ka hi hi. 
John17:10 Keima neih khempeuh nangma a’ hi a, nangma neih khempeuh keima-a’ ahih manin, tua mite’ hangin nangma pianzia ka neihna hong kilang hi." 
John17:11 Tu-in nangma kiangah kei a hong paita ding ka hih manin leitungah ka om nawn kei ding a, ahi zongin amaute a omlai ding uh ahi hi. Tua ahih manin a Siangtho ka Pa aw, nang le kei pumkhat ihih mah bangin amaute zong pumkhat ahih nadingun na vangliatna tawh hoihtakin na kem in." 
John17:12 Amaute tawh ka omkhawm hun lai-in nangma hong piak na min vangliatna tawh amaute ka kem hi. Amaute ka hu a, a maimang ding pa simloh khat zong ka kisamsak kei hi. Tua a maimang pa lah Lai Siangtho sung thu a tun nading ahi hi." 
John17:13 Tu-in nangma kiangah a hong paita ding ka hih manin keimah bangin amaute in lungdamna cingtaak a neihtheih nadingun leitungah ka om lai-in hih thute a gen ka hi hi. 
John17:14 Amaute tungah na thu ka gen khin hi. Ahi zongin keimah bangin amaute zong hih leitung mite tawh kipawl lo uh ahih manin leitung mite in a mudah uh hi. 
John17:15 Leitung panin amaute na lakkhiat ding a hong ngetsak ka hi kei a, a Gilopa’ bawlsiat nading panin na kep ding a hong ngen ka hi hi." 
John17:16 Hih leitung tawh kei ka kipawl loh mah bangin amaute zong a kipawl lo uh ahi hi. 
John17:17 Nangma thuman hilhna tawh amaute a siangtho nangma zat dingin na bawl in. 
John17:18 Leitungah kei na hong sawl mah bangin kei zong leitung mahah amaute ka sawl hi. 
John17:19 Nangma tungah thuman takin amaute zong hong ki-ap theih nadingun amaute ka khualna-in nangma tungah kei ka hong ki-ap hi. 
John17:20 “Hih mite a’ ding bek thu a hong ngetsak ka hi kei a, amaute’ thugenna hangin kei hong um mite a’ ding zong a hong ngetsak ka hi hi." 
John17:21 Pa aw, amaute khempeuh pumkhat a suahtheih nadingun ka hong ngetsak hi. Nangmah in kei na hong sawlna thu leitung mite in a uptheih nadingun ei tegel pawlkhat ihih mah bangin amaute zong eite tawh pawlkhat hong hi tahen." 
John17:22 Nang le kei pumkhat ihih mah bangin amaute zong pumkhat a suah theih nadingun keima tungah na hong piak pianzia mah amaute tungah ka pia hi. 
John17:23 Leitung mite in kei na hong sawlna thu a theih nading le kei na hong it mah bangin amaute na itna thu a theihna hangun amaute pumkhat a suah taktak theih nadingun amaute lakah kei ka om a, kei tawh nang na hong omkhawm hi." 
John17:24 Pa aw, leitung a pianma pekin kei na hong itna hangin na hong piak pianzia a mu dingin keimah na hong piak mite zong ka omna-ah a hong pai theih nading ka deihsak hi." 
John17:25 A Thuman ka Pa aw, leitung mite in nang hong thei lo uh hi. Ahi zongin keimah in nang ka hong thei a, kei na hong sawlna thu hih mite in zong a thei uh hi." 
John17:26 Kei na hong itna zah itna mah amaute sungah omin, amaute tawh kei ka omkhawm theih nadingin amaute tungah nangma min ka gen khin a, mai lamah zong ka gen lailai ding hi,” ci-in thu a ngen hi." 
John18:1 Jesuh in tu-a bangin thu a nget khit ciangin a nungzuite tawh Kidron lui kantanin a pai hi. Tua lai-ah huan khat om a, tua huan sungah a nungzuite tawh a lut hi." 
John18:2 Jesuh le a nungzuite tua munah pai zelzel uh ahih manin Jesuh a lehhek Judas in zong tua mun a thei hi. 
John18:3 Tua ahih manin Judas zong, siampi liante le Farisi mite in a sawl galkap honkhat le biakinncing palik pawlkhat tawh hiam tawi-in lalcin leh meilah de-in tua huanah a hong pai uh hi." 
John18:4 Jesuh in zong ama tungah a piang ding thu khempeuh theikhin ahih manin hong paikhia-in amaute kiangah, “Kua zong na hi uh hiam?” ci-in a dong hi." 
John18:5 Amaute in, “Nazareth khuami Jesuh a zong ka hi uh hi,” a ci hi. Jesuh a lehhek Judas zong tua mihonte tawh hong dingkhawm hi." 
John18:6 Jesuh in, “Keimah ka hi hi,” a cih ciangin amaute nungkinin a puk uh hi." 
John18:7 Jesuh in, “Kua zong na hi uh hiam?” ci-in a dotkik ciangin amaute in, “Nazareth khuami Jesuh a zong ka hi uh hi,” a ci leuleu uh hi." 
John18:8 Tua ciangin Jesuh in, “Keimah ka hi hi, ci-in ka hong gen khinzo hi. Kei hong zong na hih uhleh hih adangte khah lel un,” a ci hi." 
John18:9 Hih bang a cihna pen, “Kei na hong piaksate khat zong ka kisamsak kei hi,” ci-in a thugenna a tun nading ahi hi." 
John18:10 Simon Peter in namsau kuah ahih manin a namsau dokin siampi lianpen pa’ silapa a sat leh a taklam bil a satkhia hi. Tua silapa’ min Malkhus ahi hi. 
John18:11 Tua ciangin Jesuh in Peter kiangah, “Na namsau a paai-ah siat in. Ka Pa in thuak dingin a hong piak thu thuak lo ding ka hi hiam?” a ci hi." 
John18:12 Tua ahih manin galkapte le a bute le Jew mi palikte in Jesuh manin hen uh a," 
John18:13 tua kumin siampi lianpen a sem Kaiafas’ sungpa Annas kiangah a paipih masa uh hi. 
John18:14 Mihonte’ tangin mi khat a sih ding kilawm zaw hi, ci-in Jerusalem khua-a Jew mi uliante kiangah thu a gen pa Kaiafas ahi hi." 
John18:15 Simon Peter le a nungzui dang khat in zong Jesuh a zui uh hi. Hih a nungzui dang khat pa le siampi lianpen pa kithei uh ahih manin siampi lianpen pa’ inntual dongah Jesuh tawh a lutkhawm hi. 
John18:16 Ahi zongin Peter ahihleh kong pualamah a khawl hi. Tua ahih manin siampi lianpen pa tawh a kithei nungzui dang khat pa zong va pai kikin kongcing numei a hopih khit ciangin Peter zong a tumpih hi. 
John18:17 Kongcing numei in Peter kiangah, “Hih mipa’ nungzuite khat hi lo na hi hiam?” a cih leh, “Ka hi kei hi,” ci-in a dawng hi." 
John18:18 Khua dam mahmah ahih manin nasemte le palikte in meihol cih a, tua mei awi-in a kiimah ding uh ahih manin Peter zong va pai-in mei awi-in amaute tawh a dingkhawm hi." 
John18:19 Siampi lianpen pa Annas in Jesuh kiangah ama nungzuite thu le a thuhilhna tawh kisai thu a dong hi. 
John18:20 Jesuh in, “Mi khempeuh’ theihin thu ka gen tawntung hi. Jew mihonpi a kikhopna innte le Biakinn sungah thu ka hilh a, thu ka sim genna om ngei lo hi." 
John18:21 Tua ahih manin bang hangin kei kiangah hong dong se na hi hiam? Ka thugen a za mite kiangah dong lecin ka genteng amaute in hong genthei ding uh hi,” ci-in a dawng hi." 
John18:22 Hih bangin Jesuh a pau ciangin biakinncing palikte khat in Jesuh beeng a, “Bang hangin hih bangin siampi lianpen pa tungah kampau ngam na hi hiam?” a ci hi." 
John18:23 Ahi zongin Jesuh in, “A man loin kampau khial ka hih leh ka khialhna hong lak in. Ka thugen a man ahih manin bang hangin hong beeng zenzen na hi hiam?” ci-in a dawng hi." 
John18:24 Tua ciangin Annas in Jesuh a kikhihsa mahin siampi lianpen pa Kaiafas kiangah a puak hi. 
John18:25 Tua bangin mei awi-in Simon Peter a din laitakin a kiima om midangte in, “Nang, hua mipa’ nungzuite khat hi lo na hi hiam?” a cih uhleh Peter in, “Ka hi kei hi,” ci-in a nial leuleu hi." 
John18:26 Tua ciangin siampi lianpen pa’ nasem, Peter in a bil a sat khiatsak pa’ behte khat in, “Huan sungah amah tawh na omkhawm lai-un hong mu hi lo ka hi hiam?” a cih ciangin," 
John18:27 Peter in nialkik leuleu a, tua khit phetin ak a khuang hi." 
John18:28 Tua ciangin Kaiafas’ inn panin gam ukpa Pilat’ omna kumpi inn-ah Jesuh a paipih uh hi. Tua hun pen zingsang tung ahi hi. Jew mite ahihleh Paisan Pawi annekna sungah kihel nuam uh ahih manin biakna vai-in a siang a suahtheih nadingun kumpi inn huang sungah lut lo uh hi. 
John18:29 Tua ahih manin amaute kiangah Pilat hong pusuakin, “Hih mipa na mawhsakna uh bang ahi hiam?” ci-in a dot ciangin" 
John18:30 amaute in, “Hih mipa a gamtat a sialo hileh nang kiangah ka hong paipih kei ding uh hi,” ci-in a dawng uh hi." 
John18:31 Tua ciangin Pilat in, “Jerusalem khua-a om no Jew mi uliante mah in paikhiatpih unla, nomau Thukham tawh kizui-in ama tungah thu khen un,” ci-in a gen ciangin Jew mite in ama kiangah, “Kote in mi thahtheih nading thu ka nei kei uh hi,” ci-in a dawng uh hi." 
John18:32 (Jesuh in ama sihna dingzia a gensa thu a tuntheih nadingin hih bangin a piang ahi hi.) 
John18:33 Tua ciangin kumpi huang sungah Pilat ciahkik a, Jesuh samin, “Nang Jew mite’ kumpi na hi hiam?” ci-in a dot leh" 
John18:34 Jesuh in, “Nang’ lungsimah a piangtawm hong dong na hi hiam, tua ahih kei leh midangte in keima thu hong gen ahi hiam?” ci-in a dawng hi." 
John18:35 Pilat in, “Kei, Jew mi hong sa na hi hiam? Na Jew mipihte le na siampi liante un kei kiangah nang hong ap uh hi. Bang gamta khial na hi hiam?” a ci hi." 
John18:36 Tua ciangin Jesuh in, “Keima ukna pen hih leitung gam hi lo hi. Keima ukna hih leitung gam hileh Jerusalem khua-a Jew mi uliante’ khut sungah hong kipiak loh nadingin ka nungzuite in a do ding uh hi. Tua ahih manin keima ukna pen hih leitung tawh kizom lo hi,” a ci hi." 
John18:37 Tua ciangin Pilat in, “Tua ahihleh nang kumpi hi lo na hi hiam?” a cih leh Jesuh in, “Kumpi hi, nangmah in na hong ci hi. Hih thuman a genkhia dingin mi hong suakin leitungah a hong pai ka hi hi. Hih thuman tawh a kizom mi peuhmah in keima thugen hong zui uh hi,” a cih ciangin" 
John18:38 Pilat in, “Thuman na cih bang ahi hiam?” ci-in a dong hi. Tua ciangin Jew mihonte kiangah Pilat va paikhia kikin amaute kiangah, “Ama khialhna bangmah ka mu kei hi." 
John18:39 Tua ahih manin na Paisan Pawi hun uh ciangin note a dingin mi khat ka khahkhiat a ngeina ahih manin note a dingin hih Jew kumpipa hong khahkhia leng na ut uh hiam?” ci-in a dot ciangin," 
John18:40 amaute awng gawpin, “Hih mipa khah kei in! Barabbas hong khah in!” ci-in a dawng uh hi. (Barabbas pen mi suamin thongkia khat ahi hi.)" 
John19:1 Tua ciangin Pilat in ama kiangah Jesuh paipih sakin a satsak hi. 
John19:2 Galkapte in a kumpi lukhu dingin ling vialin Jesuh khusak uh a, a kumpi puan dingin puansan a silhsak khit uh ciangin" 
John19:3 ama kiangah nehin, “Jew mite Kumpipa, na khansau ta hen!” ci-in hopihin a khut uh tawh a beeng uh hi." 
John19:4 Pilat zong khatvei hong pusuak kikin mihonte kiangah, “Ama khialhna bangmah a mu lo ka hihna thu na theih nadingun note kiangah Jesuh ka hong paikhia sak hi,” a ci hi." 
John19:5 Tua ahih manin Jesuh zong ling lukhu khukawm leh puansan silhkawmin hong pusuak a, Pilat in mihonte kiangah, “En un, hih lai-ah na mipa uh om hi,” a ci hi." 
John19:6 Siampi liante le biakinncing palikte in a muh uh ciangin “Singlamteh tungah that in, singlamteh tungah that in!” ci-in a kiko uh hi. Pilat in amaute kiangah, “Na ut uhleh paipih unla, singlamteh tungah that un! Ke’n ama khialhna ka mu kei hi,” a cih ciangin" 
John19:7 Jew mihonte in, “Amah Pasian’ Tapa-in kigen ahih manin a kithah theih nading Thukham ka nei uh hi,” ci-in a genna uh" 
John19:8 Pilat in a zak ciangin a lunghimawh semsem hi. 
John19:9 Tua ahih manin kumpi inn huang sungah lutkikin Jesuh kiangah, “Koi lai panin a hong pai na hi hiam?” ci-in a dong hi. Ahi zongin Jesuh in dawng lo ahih manin," 
John19:10 “Hong dawng lo ding na hi hiam? Nang thahtheih nading le khahtheih nading thu ka neihlam phawk lo na hi hiam?” a cih ciangin 
John19:11 Jesuh in, “Pasian in nang tungah hong pia lo hileh kei tungah thu na nei het kei ding hi. Tua ahih manin nangma khut sungah kei hong apte’ mawhna lianzaw hi,” ci-in a dawng hi." 
John19:12 Pilat in hih thu a zak ciangin Jesuh a khahtheih nading lampi zongin a hanciam hi. Ahi zongin Jew mihonte awngin kiko uh a, “Hih mipa na khah peuhmah leh Rom gam khempeuh a uk Kumpipa tawh a kipawl lo na hi ding hi. Kumpi hi’ng, a ci khempeuh pen gam khempeuh a uk Kumpipa a langpang ahi hi,” a ci uh hi." 
John19:13 Pilat in hih bangin mite’ kikona a zak ciangin Jesuh paikhiatpih a, Hebru pau-in Gabbatha a kici Suangphahpek tunga thukhenna tokhom tungah a tu hi." 
John19:14 Tua ni pen Paisan Pawi hun ding Kigin’ ni hi a, sunkim laitak hun ahi hi. Pilat in Jew mihonte kiangah, “Hih lai-ah na Kumpipa uh om!” a cih ciangin" 
John19:15 amaute in, “That in, that in, singlamteh tungah that in,” ci-in a kiko uh hi. Pilat in, “Na Kumpipa uh that mawk ding ka hi hiam?” a cih ciangin siampi liante in, “Rom gam khempeuh a uk Kumpipa simloh kumpi dang ka nei kei uh hi,” ci-in a dawng uh hi." 
John19:16 Tua ahih ciangin singlamteh tungah thah dingin amaute’ khut sungah Jesuh a pia ta hi. 
John19:17 Tua ahih manin amaute in Jesuh la-in paikhiatpih uh a, ama kikhai nading singlamteh mah puasakin Hebru pau-in Golgotha a kici Lutang Guh mualah a paipih uh hi." 
John19:18 Tua lai mun panin singlamteh tungah khai uh a, ama langtuakah zong midang khat tuak mah khai-in a laizangah Jesuh a kikhai hi." 
John19:19 Pilat in lai khat gelhsakin, “Jew mite’ Kumpipa, Nazareth khuami Jesuh,” cisak a, singlamteh tungah a suangsak hi." 
John19:20 Jesuh a kikhaina mun pen Jerusalem khuapi tawh kinai ahih manin Judea gammi tampi in hih lai kigelh a sim uh hi. Tua lai pen Hebru lai, Latin lai, le Grik lai-in a kigelh hi." 
John19:20 Jesuh a kikhaina mun pen Jerusalem khuapi tawh kinai ahih manin Judea gammi tampi in hih lai kigelh a sim uh hi. Tua lai pen Hebru lai, Latin lai, le Grik lai-in a kigelh hi." 
John19:21 Tua ciangin Jew siampi liante in Pilat kiangah, “‘Jew mite’ Kumpipa,’ ci-in gelh kei inla, ‘Hih mipa in Jew mite’ kumpi ka hi hi, ci hi,’ ci-in gelh in,” a cih uhleh" 
John19:22 Pilat in, “Ka gelhsa pen ka gelhsa bangbangin kip hi,” ci-in a dawng hi." 
John19:23 Galkapte in singlamteh tungah Jesuh a khai khit uh ciangin a puante la uh a, khenkhat ciatin a ngah dingun khen li a suah uh hi. Mong a nei lo, a kiphan a puantualpi zong a la uh hi." 
John19:24 Ahi zongin amaute in, “Hih puan balkek kei ni. A ngah ding i theih nadingin ai san ni,” a kici uh hi. Lai Siangtho sungah, “Amaute in ka puante hawm uh a, ka puantualpi ngah nadingin ai a san uh hi,” ci-in a kigelhna a tun nadingin hih bangin galkapte a gamta ahi uh hi." 
John19:25 Jesuh’ singlamteh gei-ah ama nu; ama nuno ahi, Klopas’ zi Mary; le Magdala khuami Mary a ding uh hi." 
John19:26 Jesuh in ama nu le a it a nungzui pa a dingkhawm a muh ciangin a nu kiangah, “Nu aw, tua lai-ah na tapa om hi,” a ci hi." 
John19:27 Tua ciangin a nungzui pa kiangah, “Na nu tua lai-ah om hi,” a ci leuleu hi. Tua ahih manin tua hun a kipanin nungzui pa in ama inn-ah Jesuh’ nu Mary a kem hi." 
John19:28 Tua hun ciangin Jesuh in na khempeuh kicingta hi, ci-in thei ahih manin Lai Siangtho sungah a kigelh thu a tuntheih nadingin, “Ka dangtak hi,” a ci hi." 
John19:29 Tua lai-ah beel khat dimin leenggahzu-hau om ahih manin amaute in tua sungah tuihupna diahin puknah hiang dawnah a koih khit uh ciangin Jesuh’ kamah a va tahto uh hi. 
John19:30 Jesuh in tua leenggahzu-hau ciamin, “Man khinta hi,” a cih khit ciangin a lu puksukin a si ta hi." 
John19:31 Tua ni pen Kigin’ ni hi a, a zing ciang Sabbath ni thupi diak ahih manin tua ni-in singlamteh tungah a luangte a omlai ding deih lo uh ahih ciangin Jerusalem khua-a Jew mi uliante, Pilat kiangah va pai-in a khete uh kuaitanin a luangte a lakkhiat nadingun a ngen uh hi." 
John19:32 Tua ahih manin galkapte hong pai uh a, a tuah masak pa uh a khe a kuaihtansak khit uh ciangin a langkhat a om pa a’ zong a kuaihtansak uh hi." 
John19:33 Ahi zongin Jesuh’ khe kuaitan dingin a kithawi uh ciangin amah a na sihkhitna thei uh ahih manin a khe a kuaihtansak nawn kei uh hi. 
John19:34 Ahi zongin galkapte khat in a teipi tawh Jesuh’ pangpi a sut leh sisan le tui hong leengkhia hi. 
John19:35 (Note in na uptheih nadingun hih thupiang a mu pa in ama muhna bang a hong gen ahi hi. Ama thugente a man thu hi a, a gen pa in a mantaktak a gen ahihna thu zong a thei hi.)" 
John19:36 Lai Siangtho sungah, “Ama guhte khat zong kitan lo ding hi,” ci-in a genna thu a tuntheih nadingin hih bangin a piang ahi hi." 
John19:37 Tua banah Lai Siangtho mun dang khatah, “Teipi tawh a sut pa uh a en ding uh hi,” na kici lai hi." 
John19:38 Tua ciangin Arimathea khuami Josef in Jesuh’ luang a lakkhiat theih nadingin Pilat kiangah va pai-in a ngen hi. (Josef i cih pen Jesuh’ nung a zui khat hi a, ahi zongin Jerusalem khua-a Jew uliante a kihtakna hangin a simzuih khat ahi hi.) Josef in Jesuh’ luang a lakkhiat theih nadingin thu ngah ahih manin va pai-in Jesuh’ luang a lakhia hi." 
John19:39 Jesuh kiangah a zan hawh ngei Nikodemas zong hong pai a, Jesuh’ luang a siatloh nadingin a bawl nading myrrh le aloes paknamtui kigawm tawi sawmnih bang a gik a hong pua hi." 
John19:40 Tua mi nihte in si a vui uh ciangin a bawl ngeina bangun a paknamtuite nuhin puan tawh a tun uh hi. 
John19:41 Jesuh, singlamteh tungah a kithahna mun tawh kinai-ah huan khat om a, tua huan sungah kuamah a kivui ngei nai lohna hankhuk thak khat a om hi." 
John19:42 Tua ni pen Kigin’ ni hi a, Jew mite’ Sabbath ni hong naita ahih manin, tua hankhuk a nai ahihna hangin nawhsa thu-in tua lai munah Jesuh a vui uh hi." 
John20:1 Nipi ni zingsang khuavak ma-in Magdala khuami Mary zong hanah va pai-in a et ciangin hankhuk kihukna suangtum a kilikkhia khin a mu hi. 
John20:2 Amah zong tai-in Simon Peter le Jesuh in a it a nungzui pa kiangah, “Amaute in hankhuk panin i Topa lakhia khin uh a, koi lai-ah koih ahi uh hiam, cih ka thei kei uh hi,” a ci uh hi." 
John20:3 Tua ciangin nungzui dang khat pa tawh Peter zong paikhia-in han lam a manawh uh hi. 
John20:4 A nih tuakun taikhawm uh a, ahi zongin nungzui dang khat pa in Peter makhelhin hanah a tung masa hi." 
John20:5 Hankhuk sung a etsuk ciangin a kitunna puante a om mu a, ahi zongin lutsuk lo hi." 
John20:6 Ama nungah Simon Peter hong tungin han sungah a lutsukpah hi. A luang tunna puan mu a," 
John20:7 a lu tunna puan pen a luang tunna tawh omkhawm loin a tuamin a kizialin a om a mu hi. 
John20:8 Tua ciangin han a tung masa nungzui dang pa zong lutsukin a thupiangte mu ahih manin a um hi. 
John20:9 (Sihna panin thokik ding hi, ci-in Lai Siangtho in a genna thu a theithei nai lo uh ahi hi.)" 
John20:10 Tua ciangin nungzuite a inn uhah a ciah uh hi. 
John20:11 Ahi zongin han pualamah Mary kap a, a kahkawmin hankhuk sung lamah kunin en a," 
John20:12 Jesuh’ luang a kisialna a lu lamah khat, a khe lamah khat, puanpak silhin a tu vantungmi nih a mu hi." 
John20:13 Tua vantung mite in Mary kiangah, “Bang hangin kap na hi hiam?” ci-in a dot uh ciangin amah in, “Amaute in ka Topa paikhiatpih uh a, koi lai-ah koih ahi uh hiam, cih ka thei kei hi,” ci-in a dawng hi." 
John20:14 Tua khit ciangin a kihei leh Jesuh mu a, ahi zongin Jesuh ahihlam thei lo hi." 
John20:15 Jesuh in, “Numei aw, bang hangin kap na hi hiam? Kua zong na hi hiam?” ci-in a dot ciangin Mary in huan cing pa sa ahih manin, “Sia aw, amah na puakkhiat leh koi lai-ah koih na hi hiam hong gen in. A luang ka la nuam hi,” a ci hi." 
John20:16 Tua ciangin Jesuh in, “Mary!” a cih leh Mary zong ama lamah kihei a, “Rabboni,” ci-in a dawng hi. (Rabboni pen Hebru pau hi a, “Siapa,” a cihna ahi hi.)" 
John20:17 Tua ciangin Jesuh in, “Kei hong lenlen nawn kei in. Ka Pa kiangah a paito nai lo ka hi hi. Ka sanggamte kiangah va pai inla, ‘Keima Pa le note’ Pa, keima Pasian le note’ Pasian’ kiangah ka pai ding hi,’ ci hi, ci-in va gensak zaw in,” a ci hi." 
John20:18 Tua ahih manin Magdala khuami Mary zong nungzuite kiangah pai-in Topa a muh khitna thu va gen a, hih a kam vaikhakte zong a zasak hi." 
John20:19 Tua ni pen Nipi ni nitak lam hi a, nungzuite zong a nitakin innsung khatah a kikhop laitakun Jerusalem khua-a Jew mi uliante a kihtakna uh hangin inn a kikalhnelh uh hi. Tua bang hinapi-in amaute lakah Jesuh hong ding a, “Nopna ngah ta un,” ci-in a hopih hi." 
John20:20 Tua bangin a hopih khit ciangin a khutte le a pangpi zong a lak hi. Topa a muhna hangun nungzuite a nuam mahmah uh hi. 
John20:21 Tua ciangin Jesuh in amaute kiangah, “Note in nopna ngah ta un. Pa in kei a hong sawl bangin note zong ka hong sawl hi,” ci-in a vaikhak leuleu hi." 
John20:22 Tua khit ciangin amaute lamah a hu sang a, “Kha Siangtho na sang un." 
John20:23 Mite’ mawhna na maisak uhleh amaute’ mawhna a mai hi ding a, na maisak kei uhleh amaute’ mawhna a mai lo hi ding hi,” a ci hi." 
John20:24 Nungzuite kiangah Jesuh a kilah laitakin sawm le nihte sung panin Unau Peeng minno a nei Thomas om lo hi. 
John20:25 Tua ahih manin nungzui dangte in ama kiangah, “Topa ka mu uh hi,” a cih uhleh amah in, “A khut, siktukkilh tawh a kikilhna mate mu-in, tua a siktukkilh ma vangah ka khutmete ka va khum teek kei a, ama pangpi zong ka khut tawh ka lawn’ teek kei leh ka um kei ding hi,” a ci hi." 
John20:26 Tua zawh nipikal khat ciangin nungzuite zong innsung khatah kikhawm leuleu uh a, tua hunin Thomas zong a om hi. Amaute kong kikhaknelh uh hinapi-in Jesuh hong pai-in amaute lakah hong ding a, “Nopna ngah ta un,” ci-in a hopih khit ciangin" 
John20:27 Thomas kiangah, “Na khutme tawh hong lawng inla ka khutte en in. Na khut zan inla ka pangpi zong lawng in. Umlah nawn kei inla, um taktak in,” a ci hi." 
John20:28 Thomas in zong, “Ka Topa, ka Pasian!” ci-in a dawn ciangin" 
John20:29 Jesuh in, “Kei na hong muhkhit ciang bekin hong um pan na hi hiam? Kei hong mu lo napi-in hong umte a dingin lungdamhuai mahmah zaw ding hi,” a ci hi." 
John20:30 Jesuh in a nungzuite’ muhna-ah nalamdang lian tampi bawl a, ahi zongin hih laibu sungah a kigelh lo tampi tak omlai hi." 
John20:31 Hih laibu sungah a kigelh thute pen Jesuh, Pasian’ Tapa, Khrih ahihna thu na uptheih nading uh le ama min hangin tua upna tawh nuntakna na ngahtheih nading uh deihna tawh a kigelh ahi hi." 
John21:1 Tua khit ciangin a nungzuite omna Tiberias Tuili gei-ah Jesuh kilang leuleu a, a thu pianzia hih bang ahi hi:" 
John21:2 Simon Peter, Unau Peeng minno a nei Thomas, Galilee gam Kana khuami Nethanel, Zebedi’ tapate, le nungzui dang nihte mun khatah a omkhawm uh hi." 
John21:3 Simon Peter in a lawmte kiangah, “Kei, ngasa bengin kuan ning,” ci-in a gen leh a lawmte in, “Ko zong hong kuan nung,” ci uh ahih manin, amaute kuankhia-in gunkuang tungah a tuang uh hi. Ahi zongin tua zanin ngasa khat zong man lo uh hi." 
John21:4 Zingsang khua a vak ciangin tui gei-ah Jesuh ding a, ahi zongin a nungzuite in amah ahihlam thei lo uh hi." 
John21:5 Jesuh in amaute kiangah, “Tangvalte aw, ngasa na man uh hiam?” ci-in a dot leh amaute in, “Bangmah ka man kei uh hi,” ci-in a dawng uh hi." 
John21:6 Tua ciangin amah in, “Na gunkuang taklam pang uhah na ngen uh paai le-uhcin na man ding uh hi,” a ci hi. Amaute in zong a ngen uh paai uh a, ngasa tam awk lua ahih manin a ngen uh a kaizo kei uh hi." 
John21:7 Tua ciangin Jesuh in a it nungzui pa in Peter kiangah, “Topa hi!” a ci hi. Simon Peter in Topa ahihna thu a zak ciangin (a nga betna uhah a puante uh suahkhia uh ahih manin) a puan silh buatbuatin tui sungah a leengkhia hi." 
John21:8 Nungzui dangte ahihleh gunkuang mahah tuangin a ngen uh tawh ngasa a dimtakin a hong kai uh hi. Tua lai mun le a tui gei pen pi zathum bang bek kigamla hi. 
John21:9 Tui gei a tun uh ciangin mei-am tungah ngasa le anlum a ki-em a mu uh hi. 
John21:10 Jesuh in amaute kiangah, “Tu-a na ngasa matte uh pawlkhat hong paipih un,” ci-in a gen ciangin" 
John21:11 Simon Peter zong gunkuang tungah va kahin ngasa a dimin a om ngen va kai a, ngasa a vekpi-in za le sawmnga le thum pha-in tam mahmah napi-in a ngen uh themkhat zong kikeek lo hi." 
John21:12 Tua ciangin Jesuh in amaute kiangah, “Hong pai un; zing an ne ni,” a ci hi. Amah pen Topa ahih lamtak thei uh ahih manin, “Nang kua na hi hiam?” ci-in a nungzuite khat beek in dong ngam lo uh hi." 
John21:13 Jesuh hong pai-in anlum la-in amaute tungah pia a, tua mah bangin ngasa zong a pia hi." 
John21:14 Hih pen sihna panin Jesuh a kithawhkiksak khitzawh nungzuite tungah a kilah a thum veina hita hi. 
John21:15 An a nekkhit uh ciangin Jesuh in Simon Peter kiangah, “Johan’ tapa Simon aw, hih adang khempeuhte’ hong it sangin kei na hong nak itzaw hiam?” ci-in a dot ciangin amah in, “Topa aw, ka hong itzaw hi. Nang ka hong itna na thei hi,” ci-in a dawng hi." 
John21:16 Tua ciangin Jesuh in, “Ka tuunote na kem in,” a ci hi. Tua ciangin Jesuh in a nihveina dong leuleu a, “Johan’ tapa Simon aw, kei na hong it hiam?” ci-in a dot ciangin, “Topa aw, nang ka hong it a, ka hong itna thu na thei hi,” a cih ciangin, “Ka tuute na kem in,” a ci leuleu hi." 
John21:17 Jesuh in a thumveina dong leuleu a, “Johan’ tapa Simon aw, kei na hong it hiam?” a cih ciangin, “Kei na hong it hiam?” ci-in thumvei tak a dotna hangin Peter zong a dah suak hi. Tua ahih manin, “Topa aw, nangmah in na khempeuh na thei a, nangmah ka hong itna thu zong na thei hi,” ci-in a dawn ciangin Jesuh in, “Ka tuute na kem in." 
John21:18 A mantakin ci lehang, na khangno lai-in na kawnggak gakin na utna peuhah na pai zialzial thei hi. Ahi zongin na khangham ciangin na khutte na zan ding a, midangte in na khutte hong henin na ut loh napi ah hong paipih ding uh hi,” a ci hi." 
John21:19 (Hih bangin a thugenna pen Peter a sih nading zia le Pasian’ min a thansak nading thu a gen nopna ahi hi.) Tua ciangin Jesuh in Peter kiangah, “Hong zui un,” a ci hi." 
John21:20 Peter a kihei ciangin, nitak an a nek lai-un Jesuh’ gei-ah tu-in, “Topa aw, nang kua in hong lehhek ding ahi hiam?” ci-in a dong, Jesuh’ it a nungzui pa ama nungah a om a mu hi." 
John21:21 Peter in amah a muh ciangin Jesuh kiangah, “Topa aw, hih mipa bangci ding ahi hiam?” ci-in a dot leh" 
John21:22 Jesuh in, “Ka hong paikik mateng amah a nungta dingin ka deih nakleh nang bang phamawh sa na hi hiam? Nangmah in ka nung hong zui peuh in,” ci-in a dawng hi." 
John21:23 Tua ahih manin hih nungzui pa si lo ding hi, ci-in a nungzuite lakah a kigen hi. Ahi zongin Jesuh in, “Amah si lo ding hi,” a ci hi loin, “Ka hong paikik mateng amah a nungta dingin ka deih nakleh nang bang phamawh sa na hi hiam?” a ci bek ahi hi." 
John21:24 Jesuh in tua a cih nungzui pa pen hih thute genin lai sungah a gelh pa hi a, ama thugente a mantaktak hi, ci-in ka thei uh hi." 
John21:25 Jesuh in a sep thute tampi tak omlai hi. A sep khempeuh a ban banin laibu sungah a kigelh hileh a laibute pen leitungah ta zo lo ding hi, ci-in ka um hi." 
Acts1:1 Lawm Theofilas aw, Lai ka hong gelh masakna sungah Jesuh in nasep a kipat tung a kipanin vantungah amah a kilaktoh hun ciang dong, a thuhilhna le a septe khempeuh cingtakin ka gelh hi. Ama sawltak dingin a teelsa mite, Kha Siangtho tungtawnin thu a vaikhak khit ciangin vantungah amah kilato hi." 
Acts1:2  
Acts1:3 Ama sih khitzawh ni sawmli sung amaute tungah tam veipi kilang a, amah a nungta taktak ahihna teltakin a kithei ahi hi. Amaute in amah mu uh a, Pasian’ Ukna thu amaute tungah a gen hi." 
Acts1:4 Amaute tawh a omkhawm laitakin amah in amaute kiangah, “Jerusalem khua panin paikhia kei unla, note kiangah ka hong gensa ka Pa’ hong kamciam thu na ngak un." 
Acts1:5 Johan in tui sungah mite phum a, ahi zongin a sawt loin Pasian in Kha Siangtho tawh note hong kidimsak ding hi,” ci-in thu a pia hi." 
Acts1:6 Tua bangin Jesuh tawh a omkhawm laitakun sawltakte in Jesuh kiangah, “Topa aw, tutungin Israel minamte tungah ukna aana na piakik ding hiam?” ci-in a dot uh ciangin" 
Acts1:7 Jesuh in, “Ka Pa in ama thu tawh a sehsa hun le nite, cik ciangin hong tung ding cih thu note’ theih ding thu hi lo hi." 
Acts1:8 Ahi zongin note tungah Kha Siangtho hong tun ciangin vangliatna tawh na kidim ding uh a, Jerusalem khuasung, Judea gam sung, Samaria gam sung, le leimong dongin note in keima thu na gen ding uh hi,” ci-in a dawng hi." 
Acts1:8 Ahi zongin note tungah Kha Siangtho hong tun ciangin vangliatna tawh na kidim ding uh a, Jerusalem khuasung, Judea gam sung, Samaria gam sung, le leimong dongin note in keima thu na gen ding uh hi,” ci-in a dawng hi." 
Acts1:9 Hih thu a genkhit ciangin amaute’ muhtangpi mahin vanah Jesuh kilato a, meiipi in liah ahih manin amah mu thei nawn lo uh hi." 
Acts1:10 Tua bangin Jesuh a kilaktoh ciangin amaute in vantung lam enenin a om laitakun amaute kiangah puanpak a silh mi nih hong dingvat a," 
Acts1:11 “Galilee mite aw, bang hangin vantung lam enin ding niloh na hi uh hiam? Note kiang panin vantungah a kilato hih Jesuh pen, vantungah a paitoh na muh uh bang teekteek mahin khatvei hong paisuk kik ding hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Acts1:12 Tua ciangin Jerusalem pan tai lang bang a gamla tua Oliv Mual tung panin Jerusalem-ah sawltakte a ciahkik uh hi. 
Acts1:13 Jerusalem a tun uh ciangin amauteng, Peter, Johan, James le Andru, Filip le Thomas, Bartholomew le Matthai, Alfeas’ tapa James, Simon (gam khual pa), le James’ tapa Judas a tunna uh inn dei-ah a kahto uh hi." 
Acts1:13 Jerusalem a tun uh ciangin amauteng, Peter, Johan, James le Andru, Filip le Thomas, Bartholomew le Matthai, Alfeas’ tapa James, Simon (gam khual pa), le James’ tapa Judas a tunna uh inn dei-ah a kahto uh hi." 
Acts1:14 Numeite, Jesuh’ nu Mary, le Jesuh’ naute tawh thungen khawm dingin a kikhawm zelzel uh hi." 
Acts1:15 Tua khit a sawt loin thu um mi zakhat le sawmnih bang a kikhop khawm laitakun Peter hong dingin thu hong gen a," 
Acts1:16 “Lawmte aw, Jesuh a mante lam a lak Judas thu, Kha Siangtho in David’ kam panin a genkholhna Lai Siangtho sung thu a tun ding kisam hi." 
Acts1:17 Judas pen eite tawh na a semkhawm dingin a kiteelkhia ahih manin eima pawl mi ahi hi. 
Acts1:18 (“Tu-in hih mipa in a gitloh gamtatna thamanin a ngah sum tawh amah in lo khat lei a, tua lo sungah kia-in a si hi. Amah kitamzan a, a sungkua khempeuh kithehkek hi." 
Acts1:19 Jerusalem khuasunga teng mi khempeuh in hih thu za uh a, amau’ pau-in tua lo pen ‘Akeldama,’ ci uh hi. Akeldama a khiatna in, ‘Mi Thahna Lo,’ a cihna ahi hi.)" 
Acts1:20 “Bang hang hiam cih leh Late Laibu sungah, ‘Ama tenna mun gamdai hen la, tua munah kuamah teng kei hen,’ kici a, tua banah, ‘Ama nasep midang khat in sem ta hen,’ ci-in kigelh hi."
