Acts1:21 “Tua ahih ciangin Topa Jesuh’ thawhkikna thu teci pangin a hong genpih dingin Judas tangin mi khat i lak ding kisam hi. Tua mipa pen Johan’ tuiphum kipat hun a kipanin Jesuh vanah a kilaktoh hun ciang dong, Jesuh’ nasepna khempeuhah eite tawh a omkhawm mi khat ahih ding kisam hi,” a ci hi." 
Acts1:22  
Acts1:23 Tua ciangin amaute in Josef (min dang nih a nei, Barsabbas le Justas zong a kici pa) le Matthias a pulak uh hi." 
Acts1:24 Tua ciangin amaute in thu ngen uh a, “Mihing khempeuh’ lungsim sung thu a thei Topa aw, ama om nadingin a kilawm munah a om dingin sawltak nasep panin a hong paisan Judas tang dingin, hih mi nih sung panin na teel penpen hong hilh in,” a ci uh hi." 
Acts1:25  
Acts1:26 Tua ciangin a teel nadingun lai ai san uh a, Matthias in ngah ahih manin sawltak sawm le khatte tawh a kisim khawm pah hi." 
Acts2:1 Pentekos ni hong tun ciangin Jesuh a um mi khempeuh mun khatah kikhawm uh hi. 
Acts2:2 Tua laitakin huihpi nung bangin huging khat hong tungvat a, amaute’ kikhopna innsung khempeuh hong dim hi." 
Acts2:3 Tua ciangin leii tawh a kibang meikuang bang pian amaute lakah hong kithehthang a, tuate in mi khempeuh sukha kim hi." 
Acts2:4 Amaute khempeuh Kha Siangtho tawh kidim uh a, tua Kha in minam dangte’ pau tawh amaute a pau theisak hi." 
Acts2:5 Tua laitakin biakna pawi siim dingin gam tuamtuam panin a hong pai Jew mi biakna hahkat mi tampi tak, Jerusalem khua sungah a om uh hi." 
Acts2:6 Hih huging a zak uh ciangin mihon tampi tak hong kikhawm uh a, hih Jesuh a um mite’ thugen pen amau’ pau ciatin za uh ahih manin lamdang a sa mahmah uh hi." 
Acts2:7 Amaute in hih thu lamdangsa mahmah uh ahih manin, “Hih thugen mite pen Galilee mi vive hi lo ahi hiam?" 
Acts2:8 Tua hinapi-in bang hangin amaute’ thugen pen eima pau ciatin za ihi hiam? 
Acts2:9 Eite pen Parthia gam, Media gam, Elam gam, Mesopotamia gam, Judea gam, Kappadosia gam, Pontas gam, Asia gam," 
Acts2:9 Eite pen Parthia gam, Media gam, Elam gam, Mesopotamia gam, Judea gam, Kappadosia gam, Pontas gam, Asia gam," 
Acts2:10 Frigia gam, Pamfilia gam, Egypt gam, le Sairin khuapi gei-a om Libya gamte pan ihi a, pawlkhatte Rom gam pan ihi hi." 
Acts2:11 Jew mite le Gentail mi Jew biakna a zuite ihi a, pawlkhatte pen Krete gam le Arabia gam pan ihi hi. Tua bang hinapi-in, Pasian’ sep na lamdang liante a kigenna eima pau ciatin i za hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Acts2:12 Amaute in lamdangsa-in lungmang mahmah uh a, “A bangci thu ahi hiam?” ci-in khatlekhat a kidong uh hi." 
Acts2:13 Ahi zongin mi pawlkhatte in hih Jesuh a umte simmawhbawl uh a, “Zukham ahi uh hi,” ci-in a zahko uh hi." 
Acts2:14 Tua ciangin sawltak sawm le khatte tawh a omkhawm Peter hong dingto-in, mihonte tungah nakpitakin thu hong gen a, “Ka mipih ahi Jew mite le Jerusalem khuasunga om mi khempeuhte aw, hih thupiang hong gen ding ka hih manin limtakin na ngai un." 
Acts2:15 Tuhun pen zingsang nai kua hi pan ahih manin, note’ ngaihsut bangin hih mite zukham hi lo uh hi." 
Acts2:16 Hih thupiang pen kamsang Joel in a gensa thu hi a, tua sungah," 
Acts2:17 ‘Pasian in hih bangin gen hi: Nitawp ni ciangin, mi khempeuh tungah ka Kha ka sung ding a, na tanute uh le na tapate un keima thu taangko ding uh hi; na tangvalte un maang mu ding uh a, na puteekte un mang man ding uh hi." 
Acts2:18 Tua ni ciangin ka nasem numeite le ka nasem pasalte’ tung nangawnah ka Kha ka sung ding a, amaute in keima thu gen ding uh hi." 
Acts2:19 Tua ciangin vantung le leitungah hilhkholhna lim le nalamdang ka bawl ding hi. Sisan kiluansakna, meikatna le meikhu sahpi hong om ding hi." 
Acts2:20 Topa’ ni, a lian thupi ni, hong tunma-in ni hong mialin, kha, sisan hong bang ding hi." 
Acts2:21 Ahi zongin Topa tungah huhna a ngen khempeuh in hotkhiatna ngah ding uh hi,’ ci-in a kigelh hi." 
Acts2:22 “Ka mipih Israel-te aw, hih ka thugen na ngai un: Nazareth khuami Jesuh tungtawnin Pasian in lim le na lamdangte bawlin na hong sem ahih manin, Jesuh pen Pasian’ sawl nasem ahihna teltakin na thei uh hi. Hih thu pen note lakah a piang thu ahih manin nomau mahmah in na thei uh hi." 
Acts2:23 Pasian in thu a ma theihkholhna le ama geelna tawh kizui-in note’ khut sungah tua Jesuh a hong piak ding a ngaihsutsa hi a, note in singlamteh tungah khai-in migilote’ khut tawh amah na that uh hi." 
Acts2:24 Ahi zongin Pasian in misite lak panin amah hingkiksak a, sihna in amah lencip zo lo ahih manin sihna hanga gimna panin amah a suaktasak hi." 
Acts2:25 Bang hang hiam cih leh David in ama thu a genna-ah, “‘Topa ka maingat tawntung a, ka taklamah amah om ahih manin lungkhamna ka thuak kei ding hi." 
Acts2:26 Tua ahih manin ka lungdam a, kei ka nuam hi. A si thei mihing ka hih lel hangin lungmuang takin ka om ding hi." 
Acts2:27 Bang hang hiam cih leh misite’ gamah kei nong nusiacip kei ding a, na nasem keimah muatna nong thuaksak kei ding hi." 
Acts2:28 Nangmah in nuntakna lampi na hong lak khin a, nong ompihna tawh kei nong lungdamsak hi,’ ci hi." 
Acts2:29 “Sanggamte aw, note’ theih dingin i pupi David’ thu a teltakin kong gen ding hi. Amah si-in kivui a, a han zong tu mahmahin eite kiangah omlai hi." 
Acts2:30 David pen kamsang hi a, ama tunga Pasian’ thuciam a thei hi. Ama suante khat, amah bang teek mahin kumpi-in a bawl nading Pasian in thu a ciam hi." 
Acts2:31 Pasian in a sep ding thu David in mukhol ahih manin, ‘Mi site gam sungah amah kinusia lo a, a sa a muat kei hi,’ ci-in a gen ciangin, Khrih’ thawhkik nading thu a gengen ahi hi." 
Acts2:32 Pasian in sihna panin hih Jesuh hingkiksak a, kote khempeuh pen hih thu a thei teci vive ka hi uh hi." 
Acts2:33 Amah in Pasian’ taklamah omna dongin liatna ngah a, ama tungah Pasian in a ciamsa Kha Siangtho zong a ngahkhin hi. Tu laitak a na muh na zak uh nate pen kote tungah a hong piak tua Kha Siangtho ahi hi." 
Acts2:34 David pen vantungah a kahtoh loh hangin amah in, ‘Topa in keima Topa kiangah: Na khe nuai-ah na galte kong koihsak matengin ka taklamah na tu in, ci-in gen hi,’ ci hi." 
Acts2:35  
Acts2:36 “Tua ahih ciangin singlamteh tungah na thah uh hih Jesuh pen Pasian in Topa le Khrih in a bawl khitna thu, Israel mi khempeuh in teltakin thei ta un,” a ci hi." 
Acts2:37 Amaute in hih thu a zak uh ciangin a lungsim uh nakpitakin sukha a, Peter le sawltak dangte kiangah, “Sanggamte aw, bangci gamtat ding ka hi uh hiam?” ci-in a dong uh hi." 
Acts2:38 Tua ciangin Peter in amaute kiangah, “Na mawhna uh kisik unla, na mawhna uh hong kimaisak theih nadingin Jesuh Khrih min tawh tui kiphum ciat un. Tua hileh Pasian’ piakkhong Kha Siangtho na ngah ding uh hi." 
Acts2:39 Bang hang hiam cih leh Pasian in ama kamciamna pen note tung, na suan na khakte uh tung le gamlapi-a om mi khempeuh, i Topa Pasian in a sap mi khempeuh tungah a hong bawl ahi hi,” ci-in a dawng hi." 
Acts2:40 Tua ciangin Peter in amaute tungah thu tampi genthuahin hanthawn a, “Hih migilote’ gimthuak ding na tuahkhak loh nadingun nomau mah in na suahtak nading uh lampi zong ciat un,” a ci hi." 
Acts2:41 Mi tampi in ama thugen umin tui kiphum uh a, tua ni-in mihing tulthum bang kibehlap uh hi." 
Acts2:42 Amaute in sawltakte tung panin thu sinin amaute tawh kikhawl uh a, amaute tawh an nekhawmin, thu zong a ngenkhawm uh hi." 
Acts2:43 Sawltakte in lim le nalamdang tampi bawl uh a, mi khempeuh in lamdang sa mahmah uh hi." 
Acts2:44 Thu um khempeuh kikhawlin omkhawm uh a, a neihsate uh zong a neikhawm uh hi." 
Acts2:45 Amaute in a neih a lamteng uh zuak uh a, a sumte pen amau kisapna tawh kizui-in amaute lakah a hawm uh hi." 
Acts2:46 Nisimin biakinn-ah kikhawm uh a, a innte uhah an nekhawmin, lungdamna le kiniamkhiatna tawh a ne ciat uh hi." 
Acts2:47 Pasian phat uh a, khatlekhat thupha kideihsakin a om uh hi. Pasian in nisimin hotkhiatna a ngah mi kibehlapsak tawntung hi." 
Acts3:1 Nikhat, thunget hun nitak nai thum laitakin biakinn-ah Peter le Johan a pai uh hi." 
Acts3:2 Kongpi Hoih a kici gei-ah a suahtung a kipan a khebai mi khat na om hi. Biakinn-ah a pai mite tung panin sum a ngen dingin nisimin hih kongpi gei-ah amah hong kikoih zel hi. 
Acts3:3 Peter le Johan, biakinn-ah a hong pai a muh ciangin sum a na ngen hi." 
Acts3:4 Amau tegel in tua mipa limtakin en uh a, Peter in, “Kote hong en dih in,” a ci hi." 
Acts3:5 Bang khat peuhpeuh ngah ding, ci-in kilamen ahih manin amaute a en hi." 
Acts3:6 Peter in ama kiangah, “Sum ka nei peuhmah kei hi; ahi zongin ka neih kong pia ding hi. Nazareth khuami Jesuh Khrih min tawh, dingin lam na pai nadingin thu ka hong pia hi,” a cih khit ciangin," 
Acts3:7 a taklam khutin lenin kaito a, thakhat thu-in a khe le a siakmitte hong khauhpah hi." 
Acts3:8 Tua ciangin amah hong diangin dingto a, lam a pai kawikawi hi. Tua ciangin biakinn-ah amaute zui a, lam paikawm diangkawmin Pasian a phat hi." 
Acts3:9 Mi khempeuh in amah lam pai-in Pasian a phatna mu uh a," 
Acts3:10 biakinn Kongpi Hoih gei-ah sum ngenin a tupa hi, ci-in a thei uh hi. Ama tunga thupiang a muh uh ciangin lamdang a sa mahmah uh hi." 
Acts3:11 Tua mipa in Peter le Johan beel cinten a, mi khempeuh in hih thupiang lamdangsa uh ahih manin amaute’ omna Solomon’ Talap a kici-ah mite a hong tai uh hi." 
Acts3:12 Peter in hih mite a muh ciangin amaute kiangah, “Ka mipih Israel mite aw, bang hangin hih thupiang lamdangsa a, bang hangin ko hong hici et na hi uh hiam? Hih mipa lam ka paisak theihna uh, komau’ vang le komau’ hoihna hang sa na hi uh hiam?" 
Acts3:13 I pupite Abraham, Isaac, le Jakob Pasian in a nasem Jesuh tungah ama vangliatna a pia hi. Note in aana neite khut sungah tua Jesuh na pia uh a, Pilat mangpa in amah khah dingin a ngaihsut khit ciang nangawnin Pilat’ maitang mahah amah na nial teitei uh hi." 
Acts3:14 Amah mi hoih mi siangtho hinapi-in, amah na nial zawsop uh a, mi that khat a khahkhiat nadingin Pilat kiangah na ngen uh hi." 
Acts3:15 Tua ahih ciangin mite tungah nuntakna a piapa na that uh a, ahi zongin sihna panin Pasian in amah hingkiksak hi. Ko tegel pen hih thu a thei teci ka hi uh hi." 
Acts3:16 Hih Jesuh min’ vangliatna in hih khebai mipa tungah thahatna a pia ahi hi. Note khempeuh in na theih uh mah bangin hih mipa bangzah takin khebai ahih hangin Jesuh upna le ama min hangin hih mipa in dam sianthona a ngah ahi hi. 
Acts3:17 “Tua ahih ciangin sanggamte aw, note le na makaite uh hih bangin Jesuh tungah na gamtatna uh na theih lohna hang uh hi, ci-in ka thei hi." 
Acts3:18 Ama Khrih in a thuak nading thu, Pasian in tanglai pekin kamsangte khempeuh tungtawnin genkhol a, tu-in hih bangin a thugen kholhna a hong tungsak ahi hi." 
Acts3:19 Tua ahih ciangin na mawhnate uh hong sawpsiangsak theih nading, Topa kiang panin a hong pai lungsim nopna hun na ngah theih nading uh le note a dingin a sehsa Jesuh Khrih a hong sawltheih nadingin na mawhna uh kisik unla, Pasian kiang zuan un." 
Acts3:20  
Acts3:21 Pasian in ama kamsang mi siangthote tungtawnin tanglai-in a genkholhsa bangin, na khempeuh a thakin a kibawl hun dong mateng vantungah Jesuh a om ding ahi hi." 
Acts3:22 Bang hang hiam cih leh Moses in, ‘Kei a hong sawl mah bangin note sung mah panin note a’ ding kamsang khat Topa na Pasian un note kiangah hong sawl ding hi. Ama hong thugen khempeuh na mang ding uh hi." 
Acts3:23 Tua kamsangpa’ thugen a mang lo khempeuh, a Jew mipihte kiang panin kikhen khia-in kisusia ding hi,’ ci hi." 
Acts3:24 Samuel a kipan ama nunga hong piang kamsang khempeuh in tu laitak a thupiangte mah genkhol ciat uh hi. 
Acts3:25 Pasian in Abraham kiangah, ‘Na suan na khakte thupha ka piak bangin leitung mi khempeuh thupha ka pia ding hi,’ ci ahih manin, Pasian in ama kamsangte tungtawnin a thuciamte khempeuh eite a’ ding hi a, Pasian in i pu i pate tawh a thuciamte, eite in zong a ngah ding ihi hi." 
Acts3:26 Eite khempeuh i gitlohna panin kikheelin thupha a hong piaktheih nadingin Pasian in a Nasem dingin Jesuh teelin, eite kiangah a hong sawl masa ahi hi,” ci-in thu a gen hi." 
Acts4:1 Peter le Johan omkhawmin, tua bangin Peter in mite kiangah thu a gen laitakin siampite, biakinn upate, le Saddusi mite hong pai uh hi." 
Acts4:2 Hih sawltak nihte in misite thokik ding hi, cih a lahtel nadingun sihna panin Jesuh thokik hi, ci-in mite kiangah thu hilh uh ahih manin nawngkai a sa uh hi." 
Acts4:3 Tua ahih manin amau tegel man uh a, ni tum kuanta ahih manin a zing ciang dong thong sungah a khum uh hi." 
Acts4:4 Ahi zongin amaute’ thugen a za mi tampi in um uh a, thu um mi tulnga bang a pha ta uh hi." 
Acts4:5 A zing ciangin Jew mi makaite, upate, le Thukham hilh siate, Jerusalem-ah hong kikhawm uh hi." 
Acts4:6 Siampi lianpen a semngei Annas, siampi lianpen a sem Kaiafas, Johan, Alexander, le siampi lianpente beh mi khempeuh tawh kikhopna khat a bawl uh hi." 
Acts4:7 Amaute’ mai-ah sawltak tegel dingsak uh a, “Kua’ vangliatna le kua’ min tawh hih bangin na sem na hi uh hiam?” ci-in a dong uh hi." 
Acts4:8 Tua ciangin Kha Siangtho tawh kidimin Peter in dawng a, “Makaite le upate aw," 
Acts4:9 hih khebai mipa tungah thuhoih a kibawlna le ama damna thu tawh kisai-in kote thu hong sit na hih uhleh," 
Acts4:10 note in singlamteh tungah na thah uh, Pasian in sihna panin a thawhkiksak Nazareth khuami Jesuh Khrih min vangliatna tawh hih mipa a ci damin hih lai-ah ding ahihna thu, note le Israel mi khempeuh in na theih dingun a kilawm thu khat ahi hi." 
Acts4:11 Lai Siangtho in, ‘No innlamte in na nilkhiat uh suangtum pen innkiu suang bulpi a suak hi,’ ci-in a gen pen hih Jesuh ahi hi." 
Acts4:12 Ama hang bek tawh hotkhiatna kingah thei ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh eite in hotkhiatna i ngahtheih nadingin leitung khempeuhah Pasian in hong piak min dang khat zong om lo hi,” ci-in a gen hi." 
Acts4:13 Uliante in Peter le Johan a han’ mahmahna thu le amaute pilna sang a nei lo mi mawkmawk ahihna thu a theih uh ciangin lamdang a sa mahmah uh hi. Tua ciangin Jesuh tawh a kikhawl khin ngeite ahihna uh a phawk uh hi. 
Acts4:14 Ahi zongin a kidamsak mipa pen Peter le Johan-te gei-ah om gige ahih manin a nial nading uh thu mu zo lo uh hi. 
Acts4:15 Tua ahih manin tua innsung panin amaute pusuaksak phot uh a, tua khit ciangin amaute thu kikumin," 
Acts4:16 “Hih mite bangcih ding ihi hiam? Jerusalem khuasunga om mi khempeuh in hih mite’ bawl a lamdang mahmah nate thei ciat uh a, i nial theih nading bangmah om lo hi." 
Acts4:17 Ahi zongin mite lakah hih thute a kitheihthang thuah loh nadingin, Jesuh’ min tawh kuama kiangah thu a gen ngei nawn loh nadingun taii ni,” a kici uh hi." 
Acts4:18 Tua ciangin sawltakte samkik uh a, Jesuh’ min tawh thugen ahi a, thuhilh ahi zongin a hih nawn hetloh nadingun thu a pia uh hi." 
Acts4:19 Ahi zongin Peter le Johan in, “Note’ thu manzawk ding le Pasian’ thu manzawk ding, Pasian’ muhna panin koi pen manzaw ding cih thu nomau mah in zong ngaihsun ciat un." 
Acts4:20 Tua ahih manin kote in ka muhsa uh le ka zaksa uh thute gen loin ka om thei kei ding uh hi,” ci-in a dawng uh hi." 
Acts4:21 Ahi zongin uliante in a khauhzaw-in thu a gen khit uh ciangin a khah uh hi. Hih thupiang hangin mi khempeuh in Pasian phat uh ahih manin hih mite gim a piak nading uh a thu mu thei lo uh hi. 
Acts4:22 Bang hang hiam cih leh hih nalamdang a kibawlna mipa pen a khan kum sawmli val a pha khinsa mi khat ahi hi. 
Acts4:23 Peter le Johan a kikhahkhiat khit phetin a lawmte uh kiangah pai-in siampi liante le upate in amaute tungah a thugente khempeuh a zasak uh hi. 
Acts4:24 A lawmte un hih thu a zak uh ciangin a vekpi-un lungsim kikhatin Pasian’ kiangah thu ngen uh a, “Van le lei, tuipi tuineu le a sunga om khempeuh a piangsak Topa aw," 
Acts4:25 kote’ pupi, na nasempa David tungah na Kha Siangtho tawh thu na gen a, amah in, ‘Bang hangin Gentail mite heh mahmah a, a tangtung lo dingpi vaihawm uh ahi hiam?" 
Acts4:26 Topa le ama Khrih a do dingin leitung kumpite kithawi uh a, gam ukte kikaikhawm uh hi,’ ci hi." 
Acts4:27 A cih mah bangin Herod le Pontias Pilat in hih khuapi sung teek mahah Gentail mite le Israel mite tawh kikupna nei uh a, nangmah in Khrih dingin na bawl, a siangtho na Nasempa Jesuh thah dingin a vaihawm uh hi." 
Acts4:28 Nangmah in na deihna bangin a piang dingin na vangliatna tawh na khensatsa thu khempeuh a sem dingin amaute kikhawm uh hi. 
Acts4:29 Tua ahih ciangin Topa aw, amaute in kote hong tawnnate thei inla, nangma nasem kote in lungsim han’ mahmahna tawh nangma thu ka gentheih nadingun hong huh in." 
Acts4:30 Cinate damsak theih nading vangliatna hong pia inla, a siangtho na Nasempa Jesuh’ min tawh nalamdang kibawl ta hen,” a ci uh hi." 
Acts4:31 Tua bangin thu a nget khit uh ciangin amaute’ kikhopna mun hong kilinggawp hi. Amaute khempeuh Kha Siangtho tawh kidim uh a, hang takin Pasian’ thu gen ding a kipan uh hi." 
Acts4:32 Thu um mi khempeuh a lungsim uh le a ngaihsutna uh kikhat uh a, kuamah in ama neihsa kei-a’ tuam ci loin, a neih khempeuh uh a neikhawm ciat uh hi." 
Acts4:33 Topa Jesuh’ thawhkikna thu, sawltakte in vangliatna tawh teci pang uh a, Pasian in amaute khempeuh tungah thupha tampi a pia hi." 
Acts4:34 Inn ahi a, lo ahi zongin a neite in zuak uh a, a sum ngahte uh sawltakte kiangah a ap uh hi. Mi khempeuh tungah a kisapna bang ciat un a sumte hawm uh ahih manin amaute lakah sum kitangsam kuamah om lo uh hi." 
Acts4:35  
Acts4:36 Tua hi a, Saipras tuikulh-a suak, Levi mi Josef, sawltakte in Barnabas (Hanthawn Siampa a cihnopna) min a phuah pa in," 
Acts4:37 ama neih a lo zuak a, a sum hong paipihin sawltakte khut sungah a ap hi." 
Acts5:1 Ahi zongin Ananias a kici pasal khat le a zi Sapfira a kici, nupa kop khat om uh hi. A neihsa uh pawlkhat zuak uh a," 
Acts5:2 ahi zongin a zi tawh thukimin a sumte pawlkhat im-in, a dangteng sawltakte kiangah a va ap hi." 
Acts5:3 Peter in, “Ananias aw, bang hangin Satan’ thu-in gamta a, na lo zuak man sumte pawlkhat kem simin, Kha Siangtho khem na hi hiam?" 
Acts5:4 Tua lo na zuakma-in nangma a’ hi a, na zuakkhit ciangin a sum zong nangma a’ mah ahi hi. Tua hinapi-in bang hangin tua bangin gamtat ding ngaihsun peuhmah na hi hiam? Mite a khem hi loin Pasian a khem na hi hi,” a ci hi." 
Acts5:5 Ananias in hih thu a zak phetin thakhatin si-in puksukpah a, hih thu a za mi khempeuh a lau mahmah uh hi." 
Acts5:6 Tua ciangin tangvalte hong kipanin puan tawh a luang tun uh a, puakhia-in a va vui uh hi." 
Acts5:7 Tua khit nai thum bang ding ciangin a zi hong pai a, ahi zongin tua lai-a thupiang bangmah thei lo hi." 
Acts5:8 Peter in tua nu kiangah, “Nang le na pasal in na lo zuak man uh sum pen a vekpi-in hih zah mah ahi hiam, hong gen dih in,” ci-in a dong hi. Amah in, “Hi hi, tua zah mah hi,” ci-in a dawng hi." 
Acts5:9 Tua ciangin Peter in tua nu kiangah, “Bang dingin na nupa-un Topa’ Kha Siangtho ze-et ding thukim khawm na hi uh hiam? En in, na pasal a vuite kongkhak gei mahmahah om uh a, nang zong hong puakhia ding uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Acts5:10 Amah zong thakhat thu-in si-in Peter khe kiangah a puksuk hi. Tua ciangin tangvalte hong lut uh a, a sih khitlam a muh uh ciangin puakhia-in a pasal’ gei-ah a phum uh hi." 
Acts5:11 Pawlpi mi khempeuh le hih thu a za mi khempeuhte nakpitakin a lau uh hi. 
Acts5:12 Sawltakte in mite lakah lim le nalamdang tampi a bawl uh hi. Thu um mi khempeuh Solomon’ Talap-ah kikhawmin a om uh hi. 
Acts5:13 Midangte in thupi sa-in hoihsa mahmah uh a, ahi zongin amaute pawlpih taktak ngam lo uh hi." 
Acts5:14 Topa’ thu a um numei pasal tampi tak hong kibehlaplap uh hi. 
Acts5:15 Hih bangin sawltakte’ nasepna hangin kongzingah cinate hong kipua a, Peter hong pai ciangin a liim in cinate a liahkhak theih nading deihin a lupna le a lupna pheekte uh tawh lam gei-ah a koih uh hi." 
Acts5:16 Jerusalem khua kiima om khuapite panin mite hong pai-in, cinate le dawivei mite hong paipih uh a, a vekpi-in damna a ngah uh hi." 
Acts5:17 Tua ciangin siampi lianpen pa le amah tawh a kipawl tua lai-a Saddusi mite in sawltakte haza-in thangpai uh ahih manin thu bawl ding a ngaihsun uh hi. 
Acts5:18 Tua ahih manin sawltakte manin thong sungah a khum uh hi. 
Acts5:19 Ahi zongin tua zanin Topa’ vantungmi khat in thong kongkhakte hong a, sawltakte a paikhiatpih khit ciangin amaute kiangah," 
Acts5:20 “Biakinn-ah pai unla, hih nuntak thakna thu mite kiangah va gen un,” ci-in a vaikhak hi." 
Acts5:21 Ama gen mah bangin sawltakte zong zingsang ciangin biakinn-ah pai-in thuhilh ding a kipan uh hi. Siampi lianpen pa le ama kikholhpihte in ulian kikhopna a cingtaak khat a omtheih nadingin Jew mi upa khempeuh a kikhop nadingun a sam uh hi. Tua khit ciangin thong panin sawltakte va kai-in uliante mai-ah a hong paipih nadingun palikte a sawl uh hi. 
Acts5:22 Ahi zongin thongah palikte a va tun uh ciangin sawltakte na om lo hi. Tua ahih manin uliante kiangah kileh kikin," 
Acts5:23 “Thongah ka tun uh ciangin a kongkhakte limtak mahin tawh kikalh a, thongcingte in zong kongpi-ah limtak mahin a na cing ka mu uh hi. Ahi zongin thong kong ka hon uh ciangin a sungah kuamah na om lo hi,” ci-in a zasak uh hi." 
Acts5:24 Biakinn ukpa le siampi liante in hih thu a zak uh ciangin hih sawltakte a bangci thu hi ding hiam, ci-in lamdang a sa mahmah uh hi." 
Acts5:25 Tua laitakin mi khat hong pai-in amaute kiangah, “Thong sungah na khum uh mite in tu mahmahin biakinn sungah thuhilhin om uh hi,” ci-in a hong gen hi." 
Acts5:26 Tua ciangin biakinn ukpa le a mite va pai-in sawltakte hong paipih kik uh hi. Mihonte in suang tawh amaute a dengawp khak ding lau uh ahih manin sawltakte ngongbawl loin thudam tawh a paipih uh hi. 
Acts5:27 Tua ciangin uliante mai-ah sawltakte dingsak uh a, siampi lianpen pa in sawltakte kiangah thu genin," 
Acts5:28 “Hih mipa’ min tawh thu na hilh nawn loh nadingun khauhtakin thu kong pia uh hi. Tu-in na gamtatnasate uh thei un. Jerusalem khuasung khempeuhah thu na genthang uh a, ama sihna pen kote nong ngawh nuam uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Acts5:29 Ahi zongin Peter le sawltak dangte in, “Mite’ thu sangin Pasian’ thu ka mangzaw ding uh hi." 
Acts5:30 Note in singlamteh tungah Jesuh khai-in na thah khit uh ciangin i pu i pate’ Pasian in sihna panin amah hingkiksak khinzo hi. 
Acts5:31 Israel mite kisik kikin Pasian in a mawhna uh a maisak theih nadingin Ukpi le Honpa-in tua Jesuh bawlin ama taklamah a tusak hi. 
Acts5:32 Hih thute thei-in teci a pangte pen ko sawltakte bek hi loin Kha Siangtho tawh zong ka hi uh a, tua Kha Siangtho pen amah a um mite tungah Pasian in a khongin a piak ahi hi,” ci-in a dawngkik uh hi." 
Acts5:33 Uliante in hih thu a zak uh ciangin heh mahmah uh ahih manin sawltakte thah dingin a ngaihsun uh hi. 
Acts5:34 Ahi zongin amaute sung panin Farisi mi Gamaliel, Thukham hilh sia khat ahi, mi khempeuh in zong a zahtakbawl mipa khat hong ding a, tawlkhat sung sawltakte a kipusuahpih nadingin thu pia a," 
Acts5:35 tua khit ciangin a lawm uliante kiangah, “Israel mite aw, hih mite na bawl nading uh tawh kisai-in limtakin kidawm un." 
Acts5:36 Tuma lam tawlkhat lai-in Thudas a kici mi khat hong khang hi. Mi lian khat ka hi hi, ci-in gen a, mihing zali ding bang in amah pawlpih uh hi. Ahi zongin amah kithatin, a nungzui khempeuh kithehthang a, ama vai beita hi." 
Acts5:37 Hih thu a pian’ khit ciangin, mi bangzah pha hiam, ci-in gam sung mi khempeuh a kisim laitakin Galilee mi Judas a kici mi khat hong khang leuleu a, amah in zong nungzui mihonpi mah a nei hi. Amah zong kithat leuleu a, a nungzuite kithehthangin maimang hi." 
Acts5:38 Tu-in zong tua bangmahin thu hong piang leuleu hi. Note kiangah kong gennop thu in: Hih mite bangmah cih kei unla, hici omsak lel un. Mihingte’ bawltawm vaihawmna ahihleh ama thu-in hong bei lel ding hi." 
Acts5:39 Ahi zongin Pasian kiang panin a hong pai thu ahihleh na zo zo ngei kei ding uh hi. Pasian tawh a kido na hi ding uh hi,” ci-in a gen hi." 
Acts5:40 Tua ahih manin uliante in Gamaliel’ thugen a mang uh hi. Sawltakte samkik sak uh a, a sat khit uh ciangin Jesuh’ min tawh thu a hilhkik ngei loh nadingun thu a pia uh hi. Tua khit ciangin sawltakte a khah uh hi." 
Acts5:41 Uliante omna panin sawltakte paikhia uh a, Jesuh’ hangin mindaina a thuak dingin Pasian in kilawm hong sa hi, ci-in ngaihsun uh ahih manin a lungdam mahmah uh hi." 
Acts5:42 Nisimin biakinn sung le mite inn-ah thu hilh uh a, Jesuh, Khrih hi, cih Lungdamna Thu a gengen uh hi." 
Acts6:1 Tua khit ciangin thu um mi hong tam tektek a, Jew mite le Grik pau a zang Jew mite kikalah kiphunsanna thu hong om hi. Grik pau a zang Jew mite in, “Annek tuidawn, sumlepai hawmna-ah ka meigong numeite uh hong kipiaksak lo hi,” ci-in lungkim lo uh hi." 
Acts6:2 Tua ahih manin sawltak sawm le nihte in thu um mi khempeuh samin kaikhawm uh a, “Kote in Pasian’ thu hilh ding don man lo liangin annek tuidawn sumlepai vai-ah kong manlah ding uh kilawm lo hi." 
Acts6:3 Tua ahih ciangin sanggamte aw, note lak panin pilna le Kha Siangtho a nei mihing sagih hong kitengkhia unla, hih thute a vaihawm dingin i koih ding hi." 
Acts6:4 Tua hileh kote in ka hun khempeuh uh thungetna le thuhilhna-in kong zang thei ding uh hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Acts6:5 A vekpi-un sawltakte’ thugente thukimpih uh ahih manin, Kha Siangtho tawh kidimin upna a nei Stefen, Filip, Prokhoras, Nikanor, Timon, Parmenas, le Antiok khua pan Gentail mi ahi Jew biakna a zui Nikolas a teel uh hi." 
Acts6:6 Amaute in sawltakte kiangah hih mite paipih uh a, sawltakte in a lu tung uhah a khut uh nga-in thu a ngetsak uh hi." 
Acts6:7 Tua bangin Pasian’ thu kizelin hong khang semsem hi. Jerusalem khua sungah thu um mi tampi tak hong kibehlap a, siampi tampi tak in zong Lungdamna Thu a hong um uh hi." 
Acts6:8 Pasian in Stefen’ tungah thupha tampi tak pia-in vangliatna lianpi neisak a, amah in mite lakah lim le nalamdang lianpipi a bawl hi." 
Acts6:9 Ahi zongin mi pawlkhat in Stefen langpan’ uh hi. Tua mite pen mite in, “Sal Suakta Mite,” a cihte pawl uh hi a, Sairin khua le Alexandria khua panin a hong pai Jew mite ahi uh hi. Hih Jew mite, Silisia le Asia gam pan a hong pai Jew mite tawh kipawlin Stefen tawh thu kisel dingin hong kipan uh hi." 
Acts6:10 Ahi zongin Kha Siangtho in Stefen tungah pilna guan ahih manin amaute in thusel zo lo uh hi. 
Acts6:11 Tua ciangin amaute in mi cialin sumgolh pia uh a, “Moses le Pasian langpangin thu a genna ka za uh hi,” cisak uh hi." 
Acts6:12 Amaute in hih bangin zuauna tawh mihonte, upate, le Thukham hilh siate a holhthawh uh hi. Tua ahih manin amaute hong pai-in Stefen man uh a, uliante mai-ah a hong paipih uh hi." 
Acts6:13 Tua ciangin zuauthu a gen dingin mi pawlkhat hong paipih uh a, “Hih mipa in a siangtho i biakinnpi le Moses Thukham gensia tawntung hi." 
Acts6:14 Hih Nazareth khuami Jesuh in biakinnpi phelgawpin, Moses tung pek panin a hong kipan ngeina khempeuh khelmang ding hi, ci-in a thuhilhna ka za uh hi,” a cisak uh hi." 
Acts6:15 Ulian kikhopna sunga a kihel mi khempeuh in Stefen en uh a, a maitang pen vantungmi maitang tawh kibang hi, ci-in a mu kim uh hi." 
Acts7:1 Tua ciangin siampi lianpen pa in Stefen kiangah, “Tu-a amaute’ gen bang takpi mah ahi hiam?” ci-in a dot ciangin" 
Acts7:2 Stefen in, “Ute pate aw, ka thugen hong ngai un. I pupi Abraham, Haran khua-ah a tenma, Mesopotamia gamah a om lai-in, ama kiangah a minthang Pasian kilang a," 
Acts7:3 ‘Na gam na lei, na beh na phungte kiang panin paikhia inla, nangma tungah kong lah ding gamah pai in,’ ci hi." 
Acts7:4 Amah zong Khaldea gam panin paikhia-in Haran khua-ah teng hi. A pa a sih khit ciangin Pasian in tu-a na tenna uh hih gamah amah na lalsak leuleu hi. 
Acts7:5 Pasian in Abraham tungah ama aituam dingin leitang khutpeek cia nangawn pia lo napi-in, amah le a suan a khakte tungah hih gam a piak nading thu a ciam hi. Pasian in tua thuciamna a piak laitakin Abraham in ta nei nai lo hi." 
Acts7:6 Tua bang hinapi-in, Pasian in Abraham kiangah, ‘Na suan na khakte gam dangah tengin salin om ding uh a, kum zali sung nakpitakin gimna thuak ding uh hi." 
Acts7:7 Ahi zongin sila-in a nei gam mite tungah thu ka khen ding a, na suan na khakte tua gam panin paikhia-in hih lai gamah kei hong bia ding uh hi,’ ci hi." 
Acts7:8 Tua ciangin Pasian in Abraham tungah kiciamna limin vun-atna ngeina na pia hi. Tua ahih manin Abraham in a tapa Isaac a suahzawh nipikal khat khit ciangin a vun at a, Isaac in a tapa Jakob’ vun at leuleu a, Jakob in eite’ pupite ahi a tapa sawm le nihte’ vun na at leuleu hi." 
Acts7:9 “I pupi dangte in Josef na haza uh a, mi tungah na zuakin, a leite in Egypt gamah sal dingin a na zuaksawn uh hi. Ahi zongin Pasian in i pupi Josef na huh a," 
Acts7:10 a thuakna khempeuh panin na honkhia hi. Egypt kumpipa Faro’ mai-ah Josef a tun ciangin Pasian in ama tungah pilna le a deihhuai gamtat hoih na guan hi. Tua ahih manin Faro in ama khutnuai-ah a gam a uksawn ding le a kumpi innsung khempeuh a van dingin a koih hi. 
Acts7:11 Tua ciangin Egypt gam le Kanaan gam khempeuhah kialpi tung a, mi khempeuh in haksatna thuak uh ahih manin i pupite in zong annek ding muzo nawn lo uh hi." 
Acts7:12 Tua ahih manin Egypt gamah an om hi, ci-in Jakob in thu a zak ciangin i pupite ahi a tapate a khatveina na na paisak hi." 
Acts7:13 A nihveina a pai uh ciangin a sanggamte tungah i pupi Josef na kipulak a, tua hun a kipanin Faro in zong Josef innkuansung thu na thei hi." 
Acts7:14 Tua ciangin Josef in a pa Jakob kiangah mi sawl a, amah a kipan a innkuan mi khempeuh Egypt-ah a pai nadingun a gensak hi. Tua hun laitakin Jakob innkuan mi sawmsagih le nga pha uh hi." 
Acts7:15 Tua ahih manin Jakob zong Egypt gamah pai a, amah a kipan i pupite khempeuh tua gamah a si uh hi." 
Acts7:16 Amau’ luanghawmte, Shekhem khua-ah kipua a, Abraham in Hamor-te beh tung panin han dingin sum tawh a lei leitangah kiphum hi." 
Acts7:17 “Pasian in Abraham tungah a thuciamna a tunsak ding a nai kuan ciangin Egypt gamah ei mite tampi tak na pha ta uh hi. 
Acts7:18 A tawpna-ah Josef a thei lo kumpi dang khat, Egypt gam sung a uk dingin hong kipan hi." 
Acts7:19 I mipihte na khemgawpin na khelbawl a, a ta ngeekte uh a sih nadingin inn panin mun dangah a koihkhia sak hi." 
Acts7:20 Hih hunin naungek melhoih mahmah khat na suak hi. Inn-ah kha thum sung kikem a," 
Acts7:21 inn panin a kikoihkhiat ciangin Faro’ tanu in a ta dingin la a, ama tapa bang teekteek mahin bawlin a khansuah hi." 
Acts7:22 Egypt gam sunga pilna om khempeuh ama tungah kihilh a, thugenna le nasepna-ah milian mahmah khat a suak hi." 
Acts7:23 “Amah kum sawmli a phak ciangin Israel’ suan a mipihte lakah painopna lungsim a nei hi. 
Acts7:24 Tua bangin a mipihte lakah a va pai ciangin Egypt mite khat in a Israel mipihte khat a bawlsiatna mu a, a mipih pa a hutna-in Egypt mipa a satlum hi." 
Acts7:25 Amah pen eite hong honkhia dingin Pasian in a zat ding mipa hi, ci-in a mipihte in a thei ding sa a, ahi zongin a mipihte in na thei lo uh hi." 
Acts7:26 A zing ciangin Israel mi nih a kilai mu leuleu a, amaute a phelh dingin kipanin, ‘Lawmte aw, minam khat hi lo na hi uh hiam? Bang hangin khatlekhat tuaci kibawl na hi uh hiam?’ ci hi." 
Acts7:27 A lawmpa a bawlsia pa in Moses sawnkhia-in, ‘Kote a hong uk ding le thu a hong khen dingin kua in nang hong koih ahi hiam?" 
Acts7:28 Zan-a Egypt mipa na thah bangin kei zong a hong thatnuam na hi hiam?’ a na ci hi. 
Acts7:29 Moses in hih thu a zak ciangin Egypt gam panin taikhia-in Midian gamah ten ding kipan a, tua gamah tapa nih a nei hi." 
Acts7:30 “Tua gamah kum sawmli a ten khit ciangin, Sinai Mual tung gamlakah sawlpang lak a meikuang sungah vantungmi khat ama kiangah hong kilang hi." 
Acts7:31 Moses in a muh ciangin lamdangsa a, a nai takin a muhtheih nadingin sawlpang kuang kiangah a va pai hi. Ahi zongin Topa’ awging za a," 
Acts7:32 ‘Kei pen na pu na pate uh ahi Abraham, Isaac, le Jakob-te’ Pasian ka hi hi,’ a na ci hi. Moses zong lau-in linggawp a, en ngam lo hi." 
Acts7:33 Tua ciangin Topa in Moses kiangah, ‘Na dinna mun pen a siangtho leitang ahih manin na khedap suah in." 
Acts7:34 Ka mite in Egypt gamah bawlsiatna a thuaknate teltakin ka mukhin hi. Amaute’ tauna awging ka za a, amaute a honkhia dingin a hong paisuk ka hi hi. Hih lai-ah hong pai in; Egypt gamah nang ka hong paisak ding hi,’ na ci hi." 
Acts7:35 “Moses pen Israel mite in deih loin, ‘Kote a hong uk ding le thu a hong khen dingin kua in hong koih ahi hiam?’ a cih pa uh ahi hi. Ahi zongin Moses pen sawlpang kuang sung pan ama kiangah a kilang vantungmi’ huhna tawh ukpa le honkhia pa ahi dingin Pasian in a sawl pa ahi hi." 
Acts7:36 Amah in Egypt gam le San Tuipi-ah lim le na lamdangte bawlin, Egypt gam panin Israel mite paikhiatpih a, gamlakah kum sawmli sung amaute a makaih hi." 
Acts7:37 Hih Moses pen Israel mite tungah, ‘Pasian in kei hong sawl mah bangin, i mipihte sung mah panin note a’ ding kamsang khat hong sawl ding hi,’ a ci pa ahi hi." 
Acts7:38 Amah pen Israel mite tawh gamlakah a om pa hi a, Sinai Mual tunga ama kiangah thu a gen vantungmi le i pute tawh a kikhawlpa ahi hi. Eite tungah hong gensawn dingin Pasian kiang panin a tul ngei lo thu a ngah ahi hi." 
Acts7:39 “Ahi zongin i pute in ama thu na mang nuam loin, amah na nawlkhin uh a, Egypt gamah ciahkik nopna lungsim na nei uh hi." 
Acts7:40 Tua ahih manin amaute in Aaron kiangah, ‘Egypt gam panin eite a hong paikhiatpih tua Moses tungah bang thu piang hiam cih thei lo ihih manin, eite’ mai-ah i paisak ding milim pasian pawlkhat hong bawlsak in,’ ci uh hi." 
Acts7:41 Tua ahih manin amaute in bawngno tawh a kibang lim khat bawl uh a, ganhing tawh tua milim bia-in, amaute’ bawltawm pasian hangin lungdamin pawi a na bawl uh hi." 
Acts7:42 Tua ahih manin kamsangte laibu sungah, ‘Israel mite aw, gamlakah kum sawmli sung, gan go-in biakna na piakte uh kei tunga nong piak uh hi lo hi. Note in na puak uh puanbuk pen Molok pasian milim puanbuk le note’ aksi pasian Refan’ puanbuk ahi hi. Tuate pen na biak dingun note’ bawltawm milim ahih manin Babylon khuapi khen pekah salin ka hong paisak ding hi,’ ci-in a kigelh mah bangin Pasian in amaute nungngat a, vana om aksite a bia dingin amaute a sawlkhia hi." 
Acts7:43  
Acts7:44 “Gamlakah a omlai-un i pute in Pasian’ ompihna puanbuk nei uh a, Pasian in Moses tungah a gensa, a lim ding a lahsa bang teekteekin a kibawl ahi hi." 
Acts7:45 Tua khit ciangin i pute in amau’ pate tung panin a ngah uh tua puanbuk pen amau’ ten nading gam a la dingin a kuan uh ciangin na pua uh a, Pasian in amaute’ mai-ah tua gam mite hawlkhiatsak ahih manin tua gam a luah uh ciangin a puanbuk zong a na tunpih uh hi. Tua ahih manin David’ hun ciang dong tua puanbuk na om hi." 
Acts7:46 David in Pasian’ maipha ngah ahih manin, Jakob Pasian a dingin biakinn khat a vaihawm sak nadingin Pasian kiangah a ngen hi." 
Acts7:47 Ahi zongin Pasian a dingin biakinn a lamsak pen David hi loin a tapa Solomon ahi hi. 
Acts7:48 Ahi zongin kamsangpa in, ‘Topa in hih bangin ci hi: Vantung pen keima tokhom hi a, leitung zong ka khe ngakna mun ahi hi. Kei a’ ding bang biakinn hong lamsak thei ding a, ka om nading koi lai mun hi thei ding ahi hiam? Hih nate khempeuh keima bawlsa hi lo ahi hiam, ci hi,’ ci-in a gen mah bangin mihingte’ lamsa inn sungah a Lianpen Pasian a teng hi lo hi." 
Acts7:49  
Acts7:50  
Acts7:51 “Na lungsim uh khauh mahmah a, lawki lungsim paii-in, Pasian’ thu-ah bilngong na bang uh hi. I pu i pate mah bangin Kha Siangtho thu na mang nuam kei uh hi." 
Acts7:52 I pu i pate in kamsang a bawlsiat loh khat beek om lo hi. Pasian’ deihna bangin a gamta a Nasempa a hong pai nading thu a genkhol Pasian’ kamtaite na that uh a, tu-in note in tua nasempa lehhekin na that leuleu uh hi." 
Acts7:53 Note in vantungmi tungtawnin Pasian’ hong piak thukham ngah napi-in na mang nuam kei uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Acts7:54 A kikhawm uliante in Stefen’ thugen a zak uh ciangin nakpitakin heh uh a, a ha uh gawisan uh hi." 
Acts7:55 Ahi zongin Stefen ahihleh Kha Siangtho tawh kidimin vantung lam ento a, Pasian’ minthanna vang le Pasian’ taklamah Jesuh a ding mu ahih manin," 
Acts7:56 “En un! Vantung kihong a, Pasian’ taklamah Mihing Tapa a ding ka mu hi,” a ci hi." 
Acts7:57 Ahi zongin amaute in a bil uh humsanin nakpitakin kiko-in Stefen bawhhuan uh a," 
Acts7:58 khua pualamah kaikhia-in suang gol pipi a khiat uh hi. Hih thu-ah teci pangin Stefen a deng mite in a puantungsilh uh suahin Saul a kici tangval khat kiangah lawnin a kemsak uh hi. 
Acts7:59 Tua bangin suang a khiat thuahthuah laitakun Stefen in thu ngen a, “Topa Jesuh aw, ka kha hong la in,” a ci hi." 
Acts7:60 Tua ciangin amah kunin nakpitakin kiko a, “Topa aw, hih mite’ mawhna na maisak in,” a cih khit ciangin a si ta hi." 
Acts8:1 Hih Stefen thahna thu-ah Saul in zong thukimpih hi. Tua ni a kipanin Jerusalem khua-a om pawlpite in nakpitakin bawlsiatna thuak ding kipan uh hi. Sawltakte simloh, thu um midang khempeuh, Judea gam le Samaria gamah kithehthang gawp uh hi." 
Acts8:1 Hih Stefen thahna thu-ah Saul in zong thukimpih hi. Tua ni a kipanin Jerusalem khua-a om pawlpite in nakpitakin bawlsiatna thuak ding kipan uh hi. Sawltakte simloh, thu um midang khempeuh, Judea gam le Samaria gamah kithehthang gawp uh hi." 
Acts8:2 Thu um mi pawlkhat in Stefen vui uh a, nakpitakin dahin a kap uh hi." 
Acts8:3 Ahi zongin Saul in pawlpi suksiat ding hanciam a, inn khat pan inn khatah pai kawikawi-in, thu um numei le pasalte kai-in thong sungah a khia hi." 
Acts8:4 Tua bangin a kithehthang mite pai kawikawi-in thu a hilh uh hi. 
Acts8:5 Filip zong Samaria gam khuapi-ah pai-in Khrih thu a hilh hi. 
Acts8:6 Mihonte in Filip’ thugen le a nalamdang bawlte a muh uh ciangin a thugen khempeuh limtakin a ngai uh hi. 
Acts8:7 Mi tampite sung panin dawite nakpitakin kiko-in paikhia uh a, khutzaw khezaw mite zong kidamsak hi." 
Acts8:8 Tua ahih manin tua khuapi sunga om mite lungdam mahmah uh hi. 
Acts8:9 Tua khua sungah Simon a kici mi khat om a, amah mitphial bawl siampi hi a, Samaria mite in lamdangsa mahmah uh hi. Amah milian mahmah khatin kigen a," 
Acts8:10 tua khuasunga om milian mineu a om khempeuh in a thu limtakin ngai-in, “Vang Lianpa,” a kici Pasian pen amah ahi hi, a ci uh hi." 
Acts8:11 Amah in sauveipi sung mitphial bawl a, mite in lamdangsa mahmah uh ahih manin a thu a um uh hi." 
Acts8:12 Ahi zongin Pasian’ Ukna Lungdamna Thu le Jesuh Khrih thu, Filip’ gente a up uh ciangin, numei pasal a um khempeuh tui a kiphum uh hi." 
Acts8:13 Simon mahmah in zong um a, tui a kiphum khit ciangin Filip zui tawntung a, lim le nalamdang lianpipite a bawl a muh ciangin lamdang a sa mahmah hi." 
Acts8:14 Samaria mite in Pasian’ thu a sankhitna uh, Jerusalem-a om sawltakte in a zak uh ciangin amaute kiangah Peter le Johan a paisak uh hi." 
Acts8:15 Amaute a tun uh ciangin tua lai-a om thu um mite in Kha Siangtho a ngah nadingun thu a ngetsak uh hi. 
Acts8:16 Bang hang hiam cih leh amaute pen Topa Jesuh min tawh a kituiphum hi pan bek uh a, amaute khat beek in Kha Siangtho ngah nai lo uh hi." 
Acts8:17 Peter le Johan in amaute lu tungah a khut uh a ngak khit uh ciangin Kha Siangtho a ngah uh hi. 
Acts8:18 Sawltakte in amaute tungah a khut uh a ngak ciangin Kha Siangtho a ngahna uh mu ahih manin Simon in Peter le Johan kiangah sum pia a," 
Acts8:19 “Kei zong ka khut ka ngakna mi peuhpeuh in Kha Siangtho a ngahtheih nadingin hih bang vangliatna kei zong hong pia un,” a ci hi." 
Acts8:20 Ahi zongin Peter in, “Pasian’ piakkhong na pen sum tawh lei theih dingin ngaihsun na hih manin na sumteng tawh sikhawm in." 
Acts8:21 Pasian in na lungsim man hong sa lo ahih manin kote’ nasepna-ah nang nong kihel thei kei ding hi. 
Acts8:22 Tua ahih manin na ngaihsut hoih lohna panin kisikkik inla, hih bang na ngaihsutna thu-ah na mawhna hong maisak theih nadingin Topa kiangah thu ngen in." 
Acts8:23 Bang hang hiam cih leh nangmah in enluatna lungsim nei-in, mawhna in hong valhcip mi khat na hih lamtak ka hong thei hi,” a ci hi." 
Acts8:24 Tua ciangin Simon in Peter le Johan kiangah, “Tu-a na thugente uh kei tungah khat beek hong tun loh nadingin thu hong ngetsak un,” a ci hi." 
Acts8:25 Amaute in Jesuh Khrih thu a theihte uh genin Topa’ thugente a hilh khit uh ciangin Jerusalem khua-ah a ciahkik uh hi. A ciahkik kawmun Samaria khuaneu lampite-ah Lungdamna Thu a hilh uh hi. 
Acts8:26 Topa’ vantungmi khat in Filip kiangah, “Kithawi inla, Jerusalem khua panin Gaza khua paina lampi zuan dingin leitaw lam manawhin pai in,” a ci hi. (Tua lampi tu-in kizang pha nawn lo hi.)" 
Acts8:27 Filip zong kithawi-in a pai hi. Lampi-ah Ethiopia mi mang lian khat tawh kituak hi. Tua mangpa pen Ethiopia kumpinu Kandeis khutnuai-a mang lian khat hi a, kumpinu neihsa khempeuh a ukpa ahi hi. Jerusalem khua-ah Pasian bia dingin a va pai hi a," 
Acts8:28 inn zuan dingin leeng sungah a tuan kawmin kamsang Isaiah laibu a sim hi. 
Acts8:29 Tua laitakin Kha Siangtho in Filip kiangah, “Pai inla tua leeng mai-ah va om in,” ci-in a sawl hi." 
Acts8:30 Filip zong ama kiangah va tai a, kamsang Isaiah laibu a simna za ahih manin, “Na laisim a khiatna na thei hiam?” ci-in a dong hi." 
Acts8:31 Amah in, “Mi khatpeuh in hong hilhtel lohpi-in bangci theih ding ka hi hiam?” ci-in dawng a, ama leeng tungah Filip a tuang dingin a sam hi." 
Acts8:32 Tua a sim Lai Siangtho mun pen, “A kigo dingin a kikai tuuno ham lo a, a mul a kimeetsak tuuno a ham loh mah bangin, amah kam khat beek pau lo hi." 
Acts8:33 Mite in amah simmawhbawl gawp a, amah a huh kuamah om lo hi. Ama nuntakna leitungah bei ahih manin, a suan a khakte’ thu, ci-a gen ding om lo hi,” ci-in a kigelhna mun ahi hi." 
Acts8:34 Tua ciangin mangpa in Filip kiangah, “Hih kamsangpa in amah a kicihna ahi hiam, tua ahih kei leh midang khatpeuh a cihna ahi hiam, hong gen dih in,” a ci hi." 
Acts8:35 Filip zong a kam ka-in thugen ding kipan a, tua a Lai Siangtho simna mun a kipanin Jesuh thu ciang dong a gen hi." 
Acts8:36 Lampi-ah a pai laitakun tui omna mun tung uh a, mangpa in, “Hih lai-ah tui om hi. Tui kiphum nuam peuh leng kua’n hong kham thei ding ahi hiam?” a ci hi." 
Acts8:37 Filip in, “Na lungsim takpi tawh na up nakleh tui na kiphum thei ding hi,” a cih ciangin, “Jesuh Khrih pen Pasian’ Tapa hi, ci-in ka um hi,” ci-in a dawng hi." 
Acts8:38 Tua ciangin a leeng a khawlsak nadingin mangpa in thu pia a, Filip tawh a nihun tui phualah pai-in Filip in amah a tuiphum hi." 
Acts8:39 Tui sung panin a paikhiat khit uh ciangin Topa’ Kha Siangtho in Filip paikhiatpih hi. Mangpa in Filip mu nawn lo hi; ahi zongin lungdam takin a lampai a zom hi. 
Acts8:40 Tua ciangin Filip pen Azotas khua-ah a om ahih lamtak amah kiphawk a, tua khua a kipanin Sisaria khua a tun dongin khua khempeuhah Lungdamna Thu a hilh hi." 
Acts9:1 Tua hun sungteng Saul in Topa’ thu a um mite thah dingin a hanciamna zomlai hi. Siampi lianpen pa kiangah pai a," 
Acts9:2 Topa’ thu a zui mi numei pasal a muh peuhpeuh manin Jerusalem khua-ah a ciahpih theih nadingin Damaskas khua-a Jew mi kikhopna inn ukte kiangah a lah dingin lai a ngen hi. 
Acts9:3 Damaskas khua a zuan dingin pai a, a tun dektak ciangin thakhat thu-in van panin ama kimkotah a hong taangzaih khat a om hi." 
Acts9:4 Saul, leilakah puksuk a, tua laitakin awging khat in ama kiangah, “Saul, Saul aw, bang hangin kei hong bawlsia na hi hiam?” a ci hi." 
Acts9:5 Saul in, “Topa aw, kua na hi hiam?” ci-in a dot ciangin, “Nangmah in na hong bawlsiat Jesuh ka hi hi." 
Acts9:6 Ahi zongin tho-in khuapi sungah lut in; tua lai panin na gamtatna dingteng hong kigen ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Acts9:7 Saul tawh a tonkhawm mite in a awging a zak uh hangin kuamah mu lo uh ahih manin lamdangsa lua-in pau thei lo liangin a om uh hi. 
Acts9:8 Saul zong leilak panin thoto a, a mit a hah hangin khua mu thei lo hi. Tua ahih manin a kikholhpihte in a khutin lenin Damaskas khua-ah a paipih uh hi." 
Acts9:9 Ni thum sung khua mu thei loin, anletui zong a ne kei hi." 
Acts9:10 Tua laitakin Damaskas khua-ah Ananias min nei thu um mi khat a om hi. Amah in maang mu a, a maang sungah Topa in, “Ananias aw,” ci-in a sam hi. Ananias in, “Topa aw, ka om hi,” ci-in a dawng hi." 
Acts9:11 Tua ciangin Topa in Ananias kiangah, “Kithawi-in Kongzing Tang gei-a Judas inn-ah va pai inla, Tarsas khuami Saul min nei mi khat va kan in. Tua Saul in thu ngen a," 
Acts9:12 khua a muhkik theih nadingin Ananias min nei mi khat hong pai-in ama lu tungah a khut a ngakna thu, a maang muhna sungah a mu hi,” a ci hi." 
Acts9:13 Ahi zongin Ananias in, “Topa aw, hih mipa in Jerusalem khua-a om nangma mite a bawlsiatna thu khempeuh, mi tampi tak in kei tungah hong gen khinzo uh hi." 
Acts9:14 Tu-in zong nangmah a hong bia mi khempeuh a mattheih nadingin siampi liante tung panin thu a ngahkhit ciangin Damaskas khua-ah a hong tung ahi hi,” a ci hi." 
Acts9:15 Ahi zongin Topa in Ananias kiangah, “Gentail mite, kumpite, le Israel mite tungah keima min a kitheisak ding, keima na a sem dingin teelkhin ka hih manin ama kiangah va pai in." 
Acts9:16 Keima hangin a thuak ding thu khempeuh zong, kei mahmah in ama tungah ka gen ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Acts9:17 Tua ahih manin Ananias zong pai a, inn sungah a lutkhit ciangin Saul lu tungah a khut nga a, “Sanggam Saul aw, hih lai-ah nong pai lai-in nangma tungah a hong kilang Jesuh mahmah in kei hong sawl hi. Nangmah in khua muthei kikin, Kha Siangtho tawh na kidim theih nadingin nangma kiangah a hong paisak ahi hi,” a ci hi." 
Acts9:18 Tua laitakin Saul’ mit panin ngasalip tawh a kibang na pawlkhat kia a, khua a mukik thei hi. Saul zong tui kiphumpah a," 
Acts9:19 an a nekkhit ciangin a tha hong hatkik hi. Damaskas khua-ah a om thu um mite tawh tawlkhat sung a omkhawm hi. 
Acts9:20 Kikhopna innte-ah va pai-in, “Jesuh pen Pasian’ Tapa ahi hi,” ci-in thu hilh ding a kipan hi." 
Acts9:21 Ama thuhilh a za mi khempeuh in lamdangsa uh a, “Pasian a bia mi peuhpeuh, Jerusalem khua sungah a that pa hi lo ahi hiam? Hih lai-ah zong thu um mite manin siampi liante kiangah a ciahpihkik dingin a hong pai hi lo ahi hiam?” a ci uh hi." 
Acts9:22 Ahi zongin a thuhilhna-ah Saul hong siam semsem a, Jesuh pen Khrih hi, ci-in teltakin lakthei ahih manin, Damaskas khua-a om Jew mite in a nial nading uh om thei lo hi." 
Acts9:23 Tuazawh ni tampi khit ciangin Jew mite kikaikhawmin Saul thahsawm uh a," 
Acts9:24 ahi zongin Saul in amah a kisawm lamtak na phawk hi. Jew mite in Saul a thahtheih nadingun a sun a zanin khua kongpi-ah a pang uh hi. 
Acts9:25 Ahi zongin Saul’ nungzuite in zanin khuakulh tungah kahtohpihin kulh pualamah bawm tawh a khaisuk uh hi. 
Acts9:26 Jerusalem khua-ah Saul pai a, thu um mite tawh kipawl dingin a vaihawm hi. Ahi zongin amaute in Saul pen thu um dingin na ngaihsun zo lo uh ahih manin na kihta mahmah uh hi." 
Acts9:27 Tua ciangin Barnabas in Saul hong huh a, sawltakte kiangah Saul a va paipih hi. Lam a pai laitakin Saul in Topa a muhna thu, Topa in Saul kiangah a thugennate, le Damaskas khua-ah Saul in hangtakin Jesuh’ min tawh thu a hilhnate khempeuh sawltakte kiangah a gensak hi." 
Acts9:28 Tua ahih manin Saul zong sawltakte tawh kikhawl a, Jerusalem khua sungah vak kawikawi-in, Topa’ min tawh hangtakin thu a hilh hi." 
Acts9:29 Grik pau a zang Jew mite tawh zong thu genkhawmin kisel uh a, amaute in Saul thah dingin a vaihawm uh hi." 
Acts9:30 A lawmte in hih thu a phawk uh ciangin Sisaria khua-ah Saul paipihsuk uh a, tua lai panin Tarsas khua-ah a ciahsak uh hi." 
Acts9:31 Tua ahih manin Judea gam, Galilee gam, le Samaria gam sunga om pawlpite in bawlsiatna thuak nawn loin nuamtakin om uh a, Topa zahtakna tawh gamta uh ahih manin Kha Siangtho huhna tawh a mi khangin a kibehlap uh hi." 
Acts9:31 Tua ahih manin Judea gam, Galilee gam, le Samaria gam sunga om pawlpite in bawlsiatna thuak nawn loin nuamtakin om uh a, Topa zahtakna tawh gamta uh ahih manin Kha Siangtho huhna tawh a mi khangin a kibehlap uh hi." 
Acts9:32 Peter khualzinin pai kawikawi a, khatvei Lydda khua-a teng Pasian’ mite kiangah a hawh hi." 
Acts9:33 Tua khua a tun ciangin a khutlekhe a zaw, kum giat sung tawntung lupna ngakin a om, Aineas kici mi khat a mu hi." 
Acts9:34 Peter in tua pa kiangah, “Aineas aw, Jesuh Khrih in nang hong damsak hi; tho-in na lupna zial in,” a ci hi. Amah zong thakhatin thoto pah hi." 
Acts9:35 Tua khua-a teng mi khempeuh le Sharon zanglei-a teng mi khempeuh in Aineas mu uh ahih manin Topa a um uh hi. 
Acts9:36 Joppa khua-ah Pasian’ thu a um, Tabitha min nei numei khat a om hi. (Tua nu’ Grik min pen Dorkas hi a, sakhi a cihnopna ahi hi.) Tua nu a tawntungin a hoihin gamta-in mizawngte a huh hi." 
Acts9:37 Tua laitakin amah a ci na-in a si hi. Amah a silkhit uh ciangin inndei tungnungah a sial uh hi. 
Acts9:38 Joppa khua le Lydda khua kigamla lo ahih manin, Joppa khua-a teng thu um mite in Lydda khua-ah Peter om hi, ci-in thu a zak uh ciangin Peter kiangah mi nih sawl uh a, “A manlang theithei-in ko kiangah hong pai in,” ci-in a samsak uh hi." 
Acts9:39 Peter zong kithawi-in a samte tawh paikhawm pah a, tua khua a tun ciangin inndei tungnungah a na paipihto pah uh hi. Tua lai-ah a na om meigong numei khempeuh in Peter na umcih uh a, Dorkas a hin lai-in amaute a dingin a bawlsak puanakte le puantungsilhte, a kahkawmun Peter kiangah a lak uh hi." 
Acts9:40 Peter in innsung panin amaute khempeuh a pusuahsak khit ciangin khukdinin thu a ngen hi. Tua ciangin misi nu lamah kihei a, “Tabitha aw, tho in,” a cih ciangin a mit hong hak a, Peter a muh ciangin a tuto hi." 
Acts9:41 Peter in a khut khakin a dingtosak hi. Tua ciangin thu um meigong numeite a kipanin thu um khempeuh samkikin amaute kiangah Dorkas a nungta-in a lak hi. 
Acts9:42 Joppa khuasung khempeuhah hih thu kitheikim a, mi tampi in Topa a um uh hi." 
Acts9:43 Joppa khua-ah ni tampi sung Peter tamlai a, savunnim nasepin a nei Simon a kici mipa tawh a omkhawm hi." 
Acts10:1 Sisaria khua-ah Kornelias a kici mi khat om a, Rom galkap honte sung panin “Italy Galkapte,” a kici sungah galkapbu a sem ahi hi." 
Acts10:2 Amah biakna a hahkat mahmah mi khat hi a, a innkuan bupun Pasian bia uh hi. Amah in Jew mizawngte huh nadingin nakpitakin na sem a, Pasian kiangah thu a ngen tawntung mi khat ahi hi." 
Acts10:3 Khatvei nitak nai thum pawlin maang mu a, Pasian’ vantungmi khat hong pai-in ama kiangah, “Kornelias aw,” ci-in a sapna teltakin a thei hi." 
Acts10:4 Amah in zong laukawmin vantungmi en a, “Topa aw, bang thu ahi hiam?” a cih ciangin, “Pasian in na thungetna hong za a, mizawngte na huhna zong hong thei-in nang hong phawk hi." 
Acts10:5 Tu-in Joppa khua-ah mi sawl inla, Simon Peter a kici mipa samsak in." 
Acts10:6 Tua mipa pen, tuipi gei-a teng savunnim nasepin a nei Simon inn-ah zin tungin a om ahi hi,” a ci hi." 
Acts10:7 Tua khit ciangin ama kiangah thu a gen vantungmi paikhia a, Kornelias in zong ama innsung nasemte nih le biakna a hahkat mahmah, ama sawltakin a neih galkapte khat sam a," 
Acts10:8 a thupiang khempeuh amaute kiangah a genkhit ciangin Joppa khua-ah a paisak hi. 
Acts10:9 A zing ciangin Joppa khua-ah amaute a tun dektak laitakun, thungen dingin sun laitakin innkhumzangah Peter a kahto hi." 
Acts10:10 Peter a gil kialin an duh mahmah hi. A zinte in an a huanhuan laitakin Peter in maang a mu hi. 
Acts10:11 Vantung kihong a, sikli a nei a peek deda khat a kiu ciatah khau kivawhin leitungah a hong kikhaisuk a mu hi." 
Acts10:12 Tua a peek tungah ganhing namkim, a bokvak namkim, le vasa namkim a om hi." 
Acts10:13 Awging khat in ama kiangah, “Peter aw, tho inla tuate go-in ne in,” a ci hi." 
Acts10:14 Ahi zongin Peter in, “Topa aw, tuate go-in ka ne het kei ding hi. A ninin a kingaihsun peuhmah ka ne ngei het kei hi,” ci-in a dawng hi." 
Acts10:15 A awging in ama kiangah, “Pasian in a siangin a gensa khat peuhpeuh a ninin ngaihsun kei in,” a ci leuleu hi." 
Acts10:16 Tu-a bangin a thumveina dong a cihkhit ciangin vantung lamah tua a peek deda a kilato kik hi. 
Acts10:17 Peter in tua a maangmuhna bang a cihnopna hi ding ahi hiam, ci-in lamdangsa-in a om laitakin, Kornelias in a sawl mite in Simon’ inn hong kan kawikawi uh a, a inn hong thei uh ahih manin a kongbiang hong tungta uh hi." 
Acts10:18 Amaute in, “Simon Peter a kici mi khat, hih lai-ah zin hong tung kha hiam,” ci-in a hong dong uh hi." 
Acts10:19 Tua bangin Peter in a maang muh lungngaingai-in a om laitakin Kha Siangtho in, “En in, mihing thum in nang hong zong uh hi." 
Acts10:20 Amaute nang kiangah a hong pai dingin ka hong sawl ahih manin kithawi-in kumsuk inla, lunghiang loin amaute zuipah in,” a ci hi." 
Acts10:21 Tua ciangin Peter zong amaute kiangah paisuk a, “Kei pen na zon pa uh ka hi hi. Bang thu ahi hiam?” ci-in a dong hi." 
Acts10:22 Amaute in, “Galkap bupa Kornelias in nang kiangah kote hong sawl hi. Amah pen Pasian a bia mihoih mahmah khat hi a, Jew mi khempeuh in zong a zahtak mahmah khat uh ahi hi. Amah in nangma thugente a zaktheih nadingin a inn-ah nang a hong sap nadingin Pasian in a vantung mite khat ama kiangah gensak hi,” ci-in a dawng uh hi." 
Acts10:23 Tua ahih manin amah tawh a giakkhawm dingin Peter in amaute a sam hi. A zing ciangin Peter zong kithawi-in amaute tawh paikhawm a, Joppa khua-a om thu um mi pawlkhatte in zong a zui uh hi." 
Acts10:24 A zing ciangin Sisaria khua a tung uh hi. Kornelias in zong amaute’ tun ding lamen ahih manin, a beh a phungte le a lawm itteng a inn-ah a na samkhol hi." 
Acts10:25 Peter hong tun ciangin Kornelias in na dawn a, a khe kiangah bokin a bia hi." 
Acts10:26 Ahi zongin Peter in amah kaito a, “Ding in; kei zong mihing mah ka hi lel hi,” a ci hi." 
Acts10:27 Tua bangin a kiho kawmin Peter zong inn sungah tum a, mi tampi tak a na om a muh ciangin" 
Acts10:28 amaute kiangah, “Note mahmah in zong limtakin na theih ciat uh mah bangin Jew mite pen minam dangte kiangah hawhin a kikholh ding a ngeina hi lo hi. Ahi zongin mi khat peuhpeuh a nin hi, ci-in ka ngaihsut loh nadingin Pasian in kei tungah a thu hong lakkhin zo hi." 
Acts10:29 Tua ahih manin kei nong sap uh ciangin nial loin kong pai hi. Tu-in bang thu-a hong sam na hi uh hiam?” ci-in a dong hi. 
Acts10:30 Kornelias in, “Tuni tawh sim tuma ni li lai-in tubang hun nitak nai thum laitakin ka inn-ah thungenin ka om hi. Tua bangin thungenin ka om laitakin puanpak mahmah a silh mi khat ka mai-ah hong dingvat a," 
Acts10:31 ‘Kornelias aw, Pasian in na thungetnate hong za a, mizawngte na huhnate zong a hong thei hi." 
Acts10:32 Simon Peter a kici mipa a sam dingin Joppa khua-ah mi sawl in. Amah pen savunnim nasepin nei-in tuipi gei-ah a teng Simon’ inn-ah zin tungin a om hi,’ hong ci hi." 
Acts10:33 Tua ahih manin nang kong samsakpah a, midik na hih manin hih lai ciang a hong tung na hi hi. Topa in na gen dingin a hong sawl thu khempeuh na hong gen ding ngakin Pasian’ omna hih lai munah a om ka hi uh hi,” ci-in a dawng hi." 
Acts10:34 Tua ciangin Peter a kam ka-in thu hilh ding kipan a, “Pasian in kuamah angvan’ tuam nei loin," 
Acts10:35 kua mi kua mi hitaleh amah zahtakin a manin a gamta mi khempeuh a sanna thu teltakin ka thei hi. 
Acts10:36 Mi khempeuh’ Topa ahi Jesuh Khrih hangin a kingah Lungdamna Thu, Israel mite tungah Pasian in a puakna thu na thei uh hi." 
Acts10:37 Johan in tuiphumna thu a hilh khit a kipanin Galilee gam a kipan Judea gam khempeuhah a piang thu lianpite na thei uh hi. 
Acts10:37 Johan in tuiphumna thu a hilh khit a kipanin Galilee gam a kipan Judea gam khempeuhah a piang thu lianpite na thei uh hi. 
Acts10:38 Nazareth khuami Jesuh tungah Pasian in Kha Siangtho le vangliatna pia a, Pasian in a ompihna hangin tua Jesuh in a paina khempeuhah na hoih semin, Dawimangpa in a gimsak mite khempeuh a damsakna thu zong na thei uh hi." 
Acts10:39 Amah in Jerusalem khua le Jew mite omna mundang khempeuhah a septe khempeuh a thei tecite ka hi uh hi. Jew mite in sing tungah amah khai-in a that uh hi. 
Acts10:40 Ahi zongin Pasian in a ni thum ni-in amah hingkik sakin hong kilangsakkik hi. 
Acts10:41 Mi khempeuh tungah kilangsak loin, a thei teci dingin Pasian in a hong teelsa kote bek tungah hong kilangsak hi. Sihna panin a hinkik khit ciangin kote in amah tawh an nekhawm tui dawnkhawmin ka om uh hi." 
Acts10:42 Kote in mite kiangah thu ka hilh nading uh le mihing le misite tungah thu a khen dingin Pasian in amah a sehna thu teci a pang dingin a hong sawl hi. 
Acts10:43 Amah a um mite khempeuh in ama min hangin a mawhna uh a mai nading thu, kamsangte khempeuh in zong gen belin a neih khat uh ahi hi,” a ci hi." 
Acts10:44 Tua bangin Peter in thu a hilh laitakin tua thuhilhna a ngai mite khempeuh tungah Kha Siangtho hong tungsuk hi. 
Acts10:45 Gentail mite tungah zong Pasian in a Kha Siangtho a piakkhongna thu a muh uh ciangin Joppa khua panin Peter tawh a hong paikhawm Jew mi thu umte in lamdang a sa mahmah uh hi. 
Acts10:46 Bang hang hiam cih leh amaute in pau lamdang pau-in Pasian’ liatna a phatnate uh amau bil mahmah tawh a za uh hi. Tua ciangin Peter in," 
Acts10:47 “Eite mah bangin hih mite in zong Kha Siangtho ngah uh hi. Tui sungah a kiphum ding uh kua’n kham thei ding ahi hiam?” ci-in a gen khit ciangin," 
Acts10:48 Jesuh Khrih min tawh amaute tui a kiphum nading uh a sawl hi. Tua ciangin amaute kiangah Peter a tam lai nadingin a thum uh hi. 
Acts11:1 Gentail mite in zong Pasian’ thu a upna uh, Judea gam sunga om sawltakte le thu um mite in a za uh hi." 
Acts11:1 Gentail mite in zong Pasian’ thu a upna uh, Judea gam sunga om sawltakte le thu um mite in a za uh hi." 
Acts11:2 Tua ahih manin Jerusalem khua-ah Peter a pai ciangin Gentail mite zong vun a ki-at ding uh ahi hi, ci-in a ngaihsun mite in Peter mawhsak uh a," 
Acts11:3 “Bang hangin vun a ki-at lo Gentail mite’ inn-ah tung a, amaute tawh an nangawn nekhawm na hi hiam?” a ci uh hi." 
Acts11:4 Tua ahih manin Peter in a thupiang khempeuh a patna panin a ban banin gen a," 
Acts11:5 “Joppa khua-ah thungenin ka om laitakin maang ka mu hi. A peek deda khat a kiu li-ah khau kivawhin vantung panin hong kikhaisuk ka mu a, keima mai sanah hong khawl hi." 
Acts11:6 Tua a peek deda tung, limtakin ka et ciangin ganhing, gamsa, a bokvak ganhing le vasate ka mu hi." 
Acts11:7 Tua ciangin awging khat in kei kiangah, ‘Peter aw, tho inla tuate go-in ne in,’ hong cihna ka za hi." 
Acts11:8 Ahi zongin keimah in, ‘Topa aw, tuate go-in ka ne het kei ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh a ninin a kingaihsun an peuhmah ka kam ka tun ngei kei hi,’ ka ci hi." 
Acts11:9 Ahi zongin van panin a awging in, ‘Pasian in a siangin a gensa khat peuhpeuh a nin na ci kei ding hi,’ hong ci kik hi." 
Acts11:10 Tu-a bangin a thumveina dong hong cih khit ciangin vantungah tua a peek deda kilato kik hi. 
Acts11:11 Tua laitakin Sisaria khua panin kei kiangah a hong kisawl mihing thumte, ka zintunna inn-ah hong tung uh hi." 
Acts11:12 Lunghiang loin amaute ka zuihpah nadingin Kha Siangtho in kei tungah hong gen khinzo hi. Joppa khua panin hih i sanggam gukte in zong Sisaria khua-ah hong zui uh a, ka vekpi-un Kornelias inn-ah ka lut uh hi." 
Acts11:13 Tua ciangin amah in vantungmi khat a inn sungah a ding mu-in, tua vantungmi in ama kiangah, ‘Simon Peter a kici mipa a sam dingin Joppa khua-ah mi sawl in." 
Acts11:14 Amah in nang le na innkuan khempeuh un hotkhiatna na ngah nading uh thu hong gen ding hi,’ a cihna thu a hong gen hi." 
Acts11:15 Tua thu gen dingin ka kipat laitakin eite in Kha Siangtho i ngah cil huna mah bangin amaute tungah Kha Siangtho hong tung hi. 
Acts11:16 Tua ciangin Topa in, ‘Johan in tui sungah hong phum a, ahi zongin Pasian in Kha Siangtho tawh note hong kidimsak ding hi,’ a cihsa thu ka phawkkik hi." 
Acts11:17 Eite in Topa Jesuh Khrih i up ciangin eite tungah hong piak mah bangin Pasian in hih Gentail mite tungah zong a kibangin a piakna teltakin kithei ahih manin, hih Pasian’ nasepna a khaktanzo dingin kei kua ka hi hiam?” ci-in a gen hi." 
Acts11:18 Amaute in hih thu a zak uh ciangin mawhsakna thu gen nawn lo uh a, “Gentail mite zong kisikin a nuntak theih nadingun Pasian in hunhoih pia hi,” ci-in Pasian a phat uh hi." 
Acts11:19 Stefen a kithah huna bawlsiatna hangin thu um mite tampi kithehthang uh hi. Mi pawlkhatte Foenisia gam, Saipras gam, le Antiok khua ciang dong tung uh a, Jew mite kiang bekah Pasian’ thu a hilh uh hi." 
Acts11:20 Ahi zongin Saipras gammi le Sairin khuami thu um mi pawlkhatte Antiok khua-ah pai uh a, Topa Jesuh hanga Lungdamna Thu, Gentail mite kiangah zong a gen uh hi." 
Acts11:21 Topa in nakpitakin amaute huh ahih manin mi tampi in thu umin Topa lamah a kihei uh hi. 
Acts11:22 Jerusalem-a om pawlpite in hih thu a zak uh ciangin Antiok khua-ah Barnabas a paisak uh hi. 
Acts11:23 Barnabas a tun ciangin Pasian in amaute thupha a piakna mu-in lungdam mahmah a, amaute citakin a lungsim khempeuh uh tawh Topa tungah a thuman nadingun a hanthawn hi." 
Acts11:24 Barnabas pen mihoih mahmah, upna nei-in, Kha Siangtho tawh a kidim mi khat ahi hi. Mi tampi in Pasian a um uh hi." 
Acts11:25 Tua ciangin Saul a zong dingin Barnabas pai a, Tarsas khua-ah a tung hi." 
Acts11:26 Saul a muh ciangin Antiok khua-ah a paipih hi. Kum khat sung tawntung tua lai-a om pawlpi mite tawh amau tegel omkhawm uh a, mi tampi tak thu a hilh uh hi. Thu um mite pen Khristian ci-in min a kiphuah masakna mun in Antiok khua ahi hi." 
Acts11:27 Tua hun pawl laitakin Jerusalem khua panin Antiok khua-ah kamsang pawlkhat paisuk uh hi. 
Acts11:28 Amaute sung panin Agabas a kici kamsangpa hong ding a, leitung khempeuhah kialpi hong tung ding hi, ci-in Kha Siangtho sawlna tawh a genkhol hi. (Tua kialpi pen Klaudias in Gam uk Kumpi a sep laitakin a tung hi.)" 
Acts11:29 Tua lai-a om thu um mite in amau hihzawh zah ciat hanciamin Judea gam a om thu um mite kiangah huhna a puak nading uh a vaihawm uh hi. 
Acts11:29 Tua lai-a om thu um mite in amau hihzawh zah ciat hanciamin Judea gam a om thu um mite kiangah huhna a puak nading uh a vaihawm uh hi. 
Acts11:30 Amaute in huh nading sum a kaihkhop khit uh ciangin pawlpi upate tungah a na piak dingun Barnabas le Saul a puasak uh hi. 
Acts12:1 Hih hun pawl laitakin Herod Kumpipa in pawlpi mite pawlkhat bawlsiat ding kipan hi. 
Acts12:2 Johan’ u James pen namsau tawh thatsak hi. 
Acts12:2 Johan’ u James pen namsau tawh thatsak hi. 
Acts12:3 Hih bangin thahna hangin Jew mite a lungdamna a theih ciangin Peter zong mansak leuleu hi. (Hih pen Silngo Sawh loh Anlum Pawi hunsung ahi hi.) 
Acts12:4 Peter a kimat khit ciangin thongah kikoih a, galkap li ciat a om galkap pawl lite in a cin dingin ki-ap hi. Herod in Paisan Pawi a ven’ ciangin mipi mai-ah Peter thu sit dingin a ngaihsut ahi hi." 
Acts12:5 Tua ahih manin thong sungah Peter kikhum a, ahi zongin pawlpi mite in lungsim takpi tawh ama a dingin Pasian kiangah thu a ngetsak uh hi." 
Acts12:6 Herod in Peter thu sit dingin a lakkhiat ding ma a zan sungin, Peter a khut nih tuakin sikkhau kikhihin a langtuakah galkapte in lenin tua galkap nih kikalah kilumsak a, tua banah thongcingte in a kongah cing lai uh hi." 
Acts12:7 Thakhatthu-in Peter gei-ah Topa’ vantungmi khat hong omin thong sung khempeuh khua a vak hi. Vantung mi in Peter’ liangko lokin phong a, “Manlangin tho in,” a ci hi. Thakhatin Peter’ khut panin a sikkhaute kitolkhia hi." 
Acts12:8 Tua ciangin vantungmi in, “Na kawng hoihtakin gakin na khedap bulh in,” ci-in a gen bangin Peter zong a gamta hi. Tua ciangin vantungmi in, “Na puan silh inla hong zui in,” a cih mah bangin," 
Acts12:9 thong sung panin Peter in amah zui-in a paikhia hi. Ahi zongin tua vantungmi’ gamtatna pen ahi takpi mah ahi hiam cih thei lo ahih manin maang a mu-in kingaihsun hi. 
Acts12:10 Thongcingte’ vilna mun a khatna le a nihna a khenkhit uh ciangin khuapi sung lut nading sik kibawl thong kongpi a tung uh hi. Tua kongpi pen ama thu-in hong kihongtawm a, amaute a paikhia uh hi. Khuasung lampi-ah a pai laitakun thakhatin vantungmi in Peter guak a nusia hi." 
Acts12:11 Tua ciangin Peter in khua phawk a, “Maang a mu ka kisak leh a takpi na hi mawk! Topa in a vantungmi kei kiangah hong sawl a, Herod in hong gimsak nading le Jew mite in gimna hong thuaksak nading panin kei hong honkhia hi,” a ci hi." 
Acts12:12 Hih thu a phawk khit ciangin Johan Marka nu Mary’ inn-ah a pai hi. Tua lai-ah mi tampi kikhawmin thu a na ngen uh hi. 
Acts12:12 Hih thu a phawk khit ciangin Johan Marka nu Mary’ inn-ah a pai hi. Tua lai-ah mi tampi kikhawmin thu a na ngen uh hi. 
Acts12:13 Peter in inntual kongpi hong kiu a, a en dingin nasem numei Roda va pai hi." 
Acts12:14 Peter hi, ci-in a aw-in a theih ciangin nuamlua ahih manin inntual kong nangawn hong loin inn sungah va tai a, inntual kongah Peter ding hi, ci-in a va gen hi." 
Acts12:15 Amaute in, “A hai hi teh!” na cihsan lel uh hi. Ahi zongin amah in, “Peter a om taktak mah hi,” a cih teitei ciangin amaute in, “Amah a cing vantungmi hi ding hi,” ci-in a dawng uh hi." 
Acts12:16 Tua sungtengin Peter in a kong mah hong kiukiu lai a, a tawpna-ah a hon uh ciangin Peter ahihlam thei uh ahih manin lamdang a sa mahmah uh hi." 
Acts12:17 Amaute a pau nawn loh nadingun Peter in a khut van a, thong sung panin Topa in amah a paikhiatpihna zia teng a gen hi. Tua ciangin, “James le pawlpi midangte kiangah hih thu na gen un,” ci-in a vaikhak khit ciangin mundangah a paikhia hi." 
Acts12:17 Amaute a pau nawn loh nadingun Peter in a khut van a, thong sung panin Topa in amah a paikhiatpihna zia teng a gen hi. Tua ciangin, “James le pawlpi midangte kiangah hih thu na gen un,” ci-in a vaikhak khit ciangin mundangah a paikhia hi." 
Acts12:18 Zingsang khua a vak ciangin Peter bangci ahi hiam, ci-in thongcingte lakah buaina lianpi hong om hi." 
Acts12:19 Peter a zon nadingun Herod in thu pia a, ahi zongin mu zo lo uh hi. Tua ahih manin thongcingte thu kisit a, thah dingin thu a khen nadingun thu a pia hi. Tua ciangin Judea gam panin Sisaria khua-ah Herod paisuk a, tua lai-ah tawlkhat sung a om hi." 
Acts12:19 Peter a zon nadingun Herod in thu pia a, ahi zongin mu zo lo uh hi. Tua ahih manin thongcingte thu kisit a, thah dingin thu a khen nadingun thu a pia hi. Tua ciangin Judea gam panin Sisaria khua-ah Herod paisuk a, tua lai-ah tawlkhat sung a om hi." 
Acts12:20 Taia khuamite le Sidon khuamite tungah Herod heh mahmah ahih manin Herod tawh a kimu dingin hih khua nih mite hong paikhawm uh hi. A masa-in kumpi innsunga ulian nasem ahi Blastus a pawlmat phot uh hi. Hih khua nihte’ annek tuidawn pen hih kumpipa’ gam panin a ngah uh ahih manin Blastus makai sakin Herod kiangah va pai-in kilem nading thu a va gen uh hi. 
Acts12:21 Kumpipa in a thugen hun ding a ciamkholh ni a tun ciangin a kumpi puan silhin a kumpi tokhom tungah tu a, mite tungah thu a gen hi." 
Acts12:22 Mite in a thugen a zak uh ciangin, “Hih thugen pen mihing hi loin pasian ahi hi,” ci-in a awng uh hi." 
Acts12:23 Herod in mite, Pasian phatsak loin amah phatsak ahih manin thakhatin Topa’ vantungmi in Herod cinasak a, a hut in amah netumin a si hi." 
Acts12:24 Ahi zongin Pasian’ thu kizelin a khang semsem hi. 
Acts12:25 Barnabas le Saul in a nasep a man khit uh ciangin Jerusalem khua panin ciahkik uh a, Johan Marka zong a ciahpih uh hi." 
Acts12:25 Barnabas le Saul in a nasep a man khit uh ciangin Jerusalem khua panin ciahkik uh a, Johan Marka zong a ciahpih uh hi." 
Acts13:1 Antiok khua pawlpi sungah kamsang pawlkhat le sia pawlkhat om uh hi. Tuate pen Barnabas, Mi Vom pa zong a kici Simon, Sairin khuami Lusias, gam ukpipa khutnuai-ah gam a uksawn Herod tawh a khangkhawm Manaen, le Saul ahi uh hi." 
Acts13:2 Amaute in an tangin Pasian bia-in a om laitakun Kha Siangtho in amaute kiangah, “Keima na a sem dingin ka sapsa ahih manin kei a dingin Barnabas le Saul hong piakhia un,” a ci hi." 
Acts13:3 Amaute in zong an tangin, a lu tung uhah a khut uh nga-in thu a ngetsak khit uh ciangin a kuankhia sak uh hi." 
Acts13:4 Kha Siangtho’ sawlna mah bangin Seleusia khua-ah paisuk uh a, tua khua panin teembaw tuangin Saipras tuikulh-ah a pai uh hi." 
Acts13:5 Saipras tuikulh-a om Salamis khua a tun uh ciangin Jew mite’ kikhopna innte-ah Pasian thu a hilh uh hi. Tua a nasepna uhah a huh dingin Johan Marka zong amaute tawh a omkhawm hi. 
Acts13:5 Saipras tuikulh-a om Salamis khua a tun uh ciangin Jew mite’ kikhopna innte-ah Pasian thu a hilh uh hi. Tua a nasepna uhah a huh dingin Johan Marka zong amaute tawh a omkhawm hi. 
Acts13:6 Tua tuikulh tung khempeuhah zin kawikawi-in Pafos khua a tun uh ciangin mitphial a bawl, kamsang a kineih, Barjesuh min nei Jew mi khat a tuak uh hi." 
Acts13:7 Tua mipa pen tua tuikulh a uksawn, a pil mahmah Sergius Paulus tawh a kithei mahmah mi khat ahi hi. Tua gam ukpa in Pasian’ thu zanuam ahih manin Barnabas le Saul a sam hi." 
Acts13:8 Ahi zongin tua mitphial siampa Elymas (a Grik min) in Barnabas le Saul na nial a, gam ukpa in Pasian’ thu a up theih loh nadingin a na hanciam hi." 
Acts13:9 Tua ciangin Saul (Paul zong a kici pa) Kha Siangtho tawh kidimin tua mipa limtakin en a," 
Acts13:10 “Dawimangpa tawh a kibang mipa aw, thuhoih khempeuh nialin, gitlohna ngian tuamtuam na nei a, Topa’ thuman pen zuau suahsak ding na hanciam tawntung hi." 
Acts13:11 Tu-in Topa in nang hong su ding a, na mit taw-in tawlkhat sung khua na mu kei ding hi,” a cih khit phetin, meii vom in Elymas’ mit tuamcip a, a khut lenin amah a paipih ding mi a zawt kawikawi hi." 
Acts13:12 Gam ukpa in hih thupiang a muh ciang le Topa thu a kigente a zak ciangin lamdangsa mahmahin Pasian a um hi. 
Acts13:13 Tua ciangin Pafos khua panin Paul le a lawmte teembaw tuangin Pamfilia gam Perga khua a tung uh hi. Tua khua panin Johan Marka in amaute nusia-in Jerusalem khua-ah a ciahkik hi. 
Acts13:13 Tua ciangin Pafos khua panin Paul le a lawmte teembaw tuangin Pamfilia gam Perga khua a tung uh hi. Tua khua panin Johan Marka in amaute nusia-in Jerusalem khua-ah a ciahkik hi. 
Acts13:14 Ahi zongin Perga khua panin amaute paisuak uh a, Pisidia gam Antiok khua a tung uh hi. Sabbath ni-in kikhopna inn-ah pai-in a tu uh hi." 
Acts13:15 Kikhopna inn ukte in Moses Thukham Laibu sung le kamsangte’ laibute a sim khit uh ciangin amaute kiangah, “Sanggamte aw, mihonte tungah hanthotna kam na gennop uhleh thu nong gen ding uh ka deih uh hi,” a cisak uh hi." 
Acts13:16 Tua ahih manin Paul hong ding a, a khut vanin thugen ding hong kipan a, “Israel mipihte le hih lai-ah Pasian a bia Gentail mite aw, ka thugen na ngai un." 
Acts13:17 Hih Israel mite’ biak Pasian in ko Israel mite’ pu le pate na na teel a, Egypt gamah peemta-in a om sungun minam lian khatin a na bawl hi. Pasian in ama vangliatna tawh Egypt gam panin amaute na paikhiatpih a," 
Acts13:18 kum sawmli sung gam sungah amaute na ompih kenkon hi. 
Acts13:19 Pasian in Kanaan gam sungah mi nam sagih a suksiat khit ciangin kum zali le kum sawmnga sung bang ama mite a luahsak hi. 
Acts13:20 “Tua khit ciangin kamsang Samuel hun ciang dong amaute’ vai a hawm dingin ukpite a pia hi. 
Acts13:21 Amaute in kumpi ding a nget uh ciangin Pasian in Benjamin minam sung pan Kish’ tapa Saul, kum sawmli sung amaute’ kumpi dingin a pia hi." 
Acts13:22 Pasian in kumpi dingin Saul a zat nawn loh ciangin amaute’ kumpi dingin David a semsak hi. Pasian in David’ thu genin, ‘Ka sawl khempeuh a sem ding, ka deih bang mi khat, Jessi’ tapa David ka mukhin hi,’ a cihsa thu ahi hi." 
Acts13:23 Pasian in ama ciamsa bangin Israel mite a honkhia dingin hih David’ suan sung pan Jesuh a bawl hi. 
Acts13:24 Jesuh in nasep a kipat ma-in, a mawhna panun kisikin tui a kiphum nadingun Johan in Israel mi khempeuh tungah thu a hilh hi." 
Acts13:25 Johan in ama nasep a zawh kuan ciangin mite kiangah, ‘Kei kua hi hong ci na hi uh hiam? Kei pen note’ ngak pa ka hi kei hi. En un, kei nungah na ngak pa uh hong pai a, ama khedap khau a sutsak ding nangawnin ka kilawmzo nai kei hi,’ ci hi." 
Acts13:26 “Abraham’ suan ka behte le Pasian a bia Gentail mi khempeuh aw, hih hotkhiatna thu pen eite a dingin Pasian in a hong puak ahi hi." 
Acts13:27 Jerusalem khua-a a teng mite le a makaite un Jesuh pen Honpa ahih lamtak na thei lo uh a, Sabbath nisimin a kisim niloh kamsangte’ thu zong na tel lo uh hi. Amaute in Jesuh na mawhsak uh ahih manin kamsangte’ thugente a manin hong tung hi." 
Acts13:28 Amaute in Jesuh in sihna a thuak nadingin thukhenna a ngah nading thu mu zo lo napi uh, Pilat in thah nading thu a piak nadingin na ngen teitei uh hi." 
Acts13:29 Lai Siangtho in Jesuh’ thu a gen bang teekteekin a bawlkhit uh ciangin singlamteh tung panin lakhia sukin han sungah a koih uh hi. 
Acts13:30 Ahi zongin Pasian in sihna panin amah hingkiksak a," 
Acts13:31 Galilee gam le Jerusalem khua kikalah amah tawh khual a zinzin khawm ngei mite tungah tam veipi a mun tuamtuamah na kilang hi. 
Acts13:32 Kote pen note kiangah Lungdamna Thu a puak dingin hih lai-ah a hong om ka hi uh hi. Tua thu in: Pasian in i pu i pate tungah a ciam thu pen Jesuh a hinkik sakna tawh, Israel’ suan ahi eite le midang khempeuh a dingin tu-in a hong tungsak ahi hi. Late a lian nihna sungah, ‘Nang pen ka Tapa na hi a, tuni-in nangma Pa ka suak hi,’ a cihna thu hong tungsak hi." 
Acts13:33  
Acts13:34 Muatna a thuakkik ngei nawn lo dingin sihna panin amah a hinkiksakna tawh kisai-in Pasian in a thugenna-ah, ‘David tungah ka ciamsa mah bangin note tungah thupha siangtho kong pia takpi ding hi,’ ci hi." 
Acts13:35 Tua mah bangin Late a gelh pa in zong, ‘Nang tungah a hong thuman na nasempa muatna na thuaksak kei ding hi,’ a ci hi." 
Acts13:36 David in ama hun lai-in Pasian’ deihna bangin na sem a, a sih ciangin a pu a pate gei mahah kisialin muatna a thuak hi." 
Acts13:37 Ahi zongin Pasian in sihna panin a hinkiksak Jesuh in muatna thuak lo hi. 
Acts13:38 Tua ahih ciangin sanggamte aw, hih Jesuh hangin mawhmaisakna thu note tungah hong kihilh ahihna teltakin na theih ding uh ahi hi." 
Acts13:39 Tua tham loin Jesuh a um mite khempeuh pen Moses Thukham in a suahtaksak zawh loh mawhna khempeuh panin a suakta ahihna thu na theih ding uh ahi hi. 
Acts13:40 Tua ahih manin kamsangte in, ‘Pasian a thusim lo mite aw, lamdangsa lua-in na si ding uh hi. Na nuntak sungun note lakah ka sepkhiat ding uh thu pen mi khatpeuh in hong gen hileh na up hetloh ding uh thu ahi hi,’ ci-in a gen uh thute, note tungah hong pian’ khak loh nadingin kidawm un,” a ci hi." 
Acts13:41  
Acts13:42 Kikhopna inn panin Paul le Barnabas a ciah ding uh ciangin, Sabbath ni kik ciangin hih thute mah hong gen lai un, ci-in mite in a vaikhak uh hi." 
Acts13:43 Kikhopna inn panin a ciahkhiat uh ciangin Jew mi tampite le Jew biakna a zui Gentail mi tampite in Paul le Barnabas zui uh a, amau tegel in zong tua mite hanthawnin, Pasian’ hehpihna suangin kiptakin a om nadingun a gen uh hi." 
Acts13:44 A Sabbath ni kik ciangin Pasian’ thu a ngai dingin a khuazang phialun hong kikhawm uh hi. 
Acts13:45 Jew mite in mi tampi tak a hong kikhawm a muh uh ciangin Paul le Barnabas haza uh ahih manin Paul’ thugente a man lopi hi, ci-in Paul a gensia uh hi." 
Acts13:46 Tua ciangin Paul le Barnabas in hangtakin thu gen uh a, “No Jew mite tungah Pasian’ thu kong gen masak ding mah uh ahi hi. Ahi zongin note in Pasian’ thu nialin, nuntak tawntungna a ngah dingin kilawmzo kisa lo na hih manun, note kiang panin paikhia-in Gentail mite kiangah ka pai ding uh hi." 
Acts13:47 Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa in kote kiangah thu hong pia khinzo a, ‘Leitung mi khempeuh in hotkhiatna a ngahtheih nadingin Gentail mite’ khuavak ahi dingin ka hong koih hi,’ hong ci hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Acts13:48 Gentail mite in hih thu a zak uh ciangin lungdam mahmah uh a, Pasian’ thu hoih mahmah hi, ci-in a phat uh hi. Nuntak tawntungna a ngah dingin Pasian in a teelsa mite in Pasian’ thu hong um uh hi." 
Acts13:49 Tua gam kiim khempeuhah Topa’ thu kizel hi. 
Acts13:50 Ahi zongin Jew mite in tua khuasung uliante le Gentail mi numei citheite holhthawh uh a, Paul le Barnabas bawlsiat ding kipanin, tua gam panin a taikhia sak uh hi." 
Acts13:51 Sawltakte in zong a khe uha leivui bangte sinkhiat sanin Ikonium khua-ah a pai uh hi. 
Acts13:52 Antiok khua-a om thu um mite ahihleh Kha Siangtho tawh kidimin lungdam mahmahin a om uh hi. 
Acts14:1 Ikonium khua a tun uh ciangin Paul le Barnabas zong Jew mite kikhopna inn-ah pai uh a, amaute’ thuhilhna hangin Jew mi le Gentail mi tampi tak in Pasian thu um uh hi." 
Acts14:2 Ahi zongin thu um lo Jew mite in Gentail mite holhthawh uh a, thu um mite a mudahsak uh hi." 
Acts14:3 Tua lai-ah sawltakte sauveipi tam uh a, Topa Jesuh thu hangtakin a hilh uh hi. Ama dikna thu a hilhnate uh man hi, ci-in a lah nadingin Topa in amaute tungah lim le nalamdang bawltheih nading vangliatna a pia hi." 
Acts14:4 Tua khuasunga om mite pawl nih pha uh a, pawlkhat in Jew mite panpihin, pawlkhat in sawltakte a panpih uh hi." 
Acts14:5 Gentail mi le Jew mite in a uliante uh tawh kopin sawltakte bawlsia-in suang tawh den ding a vaihawm uh hi. 
Acts14:6 Sawltakte in tua thu a theih uh ciangin Likaonia gam sunga om Lystra khua, Derbe khua, le tua gam kiima om khuate-ah tai uh a," 
Acts14:7 tua a taina uh khuate-ah Lungdamna Thu a hilh uh hi. 
Acts14:8 A suahtung a kipanin lam a pai thei lo khezaw mi khat Lystra khua-ah a om hi. 
Acts14:9 Amah in Paul’ thuhilhte limtakin a ngai hi. Tua mipa in damna a ngahzawh nading zahin upna nei hi, ci-in Paul in a muh ciangin limtakin amah en a," 
Acts14:10 “Na khe-in dingto in!” nakpitakin a ci hi. Tua mipa zong dingin lam pai kawikawi dingin a kipan hi. 
Acts14:11 Mihonte in Paul’ nasepna a muh uh ciangin amau’ Likaonia pau tawh, “Mihing mel pua-in pasian-te i kiangah hong pai hi,” ci-in a kiko uh hi." 
Acts14:12 Barnabas pen Zeus ci-in min phuah uh a, Paul pen a thugenpi pen ahih manin Hermes ci-in min a phuah uh hi." 
Acts14:13 Zeus pasian biakna inn tua Lystra khua nawl ah a om hi. Tua Zeus pasian’ na a sem siampipa in khuapi nawla a biakinn kongah bawngtalte le pakkualte hong paipih hi. Amah le mihonte in sawltakte a biak nadingun tua bawngte go-in pakkualte a pianuam uh hi. 
Acts14:14 Ahi zongin Barnabas le Paul in hih thu a zak uh ciangin mihonte’ vaihawmna a nialna limun a puan uh balkekin mihon lakah tai-in kiko uh a," 
Acts14:15 “Lawmte aw, bang hangin hih bangin gamta na hi uh hiam? Kote pen note mah bangin mihing ka hi lel uh hi. Bangmahin a kimang lo hih milimte na biakna uh panin kihei-in, vantung, leitung, tuipi le tuate tung le a sunga om khempeuh a bawl a nungta Pasian na biak nadingun Lungdamna Thu note kiangah a gen dingin hih lai-ah a hong om ka hi uh hi." 
Acts14:16 A beisa hun sungah Pasian in mi khempeuh amau utbang ciatin hong gamtasak hi. 
Acts14:17 Ahi zongin amah in a bangci Pasian hiam cih hong lahna-in mite a dingin na hoihnono a hong pia hi. Amah in van panin guah hong zusakin, a hun hunin anlak hun ding hong tungsak hi. Amah in note’ nek ding an hong pia a, lungdamin a hong omsak hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Acts14:18 Hih bangin thu a genna uh tawh mihonte in amaute a biak loh nadingun a khozo liailiai uh ahi hi. 
Acts14:19 Ahi zongin Pisidia gam a om Antiok khua le Ikonium khua panin Jew mite hong pai uh a, mihonte hong holhthawh gawpin suang tawh Paul denggawp uh a, si khin hi, ci-in ngaihsun uh ahih manin khuanawlah a kaikhia uh hi." 
Acts14:20 Ahi zongin thu um mite in amah umcihin a om laitakun amah hong tho-in khua sungah a lutkik hi. A zing ciangin Barnabas tawh Derbe khua-ah a pai uh hi. 
Acts14:21 Paul le Barnabas in Derbe khua-ah Lungdamna Thu hilh uh a, mi tampi in Pasian a um uh hi. Tua lai panin kileh kikin Lystra khua, Ikonium khua, le Pisidia gam a om Antiok khua-ah a pai uh hi." 
Acts14:22 Thu um mite a upna uhah citakin a om nadingun hanthawnin tha pia uh a, “Pasian’ Ukna sungah i omtheih nadingin haksatna tampi thuak ding hi hang,” ci-in a hilh uh hi." 
Acts14:23 Khua pawlpi simah pawlpi upa ding sehsak uh a, an tangin thungetna tawh amaute’ muan ahi Topa’ khut sungah tua mite a ap uh hi." 
Acts14:24 Pisidia gam a khenkhit uh ciangin Pamfilia gam a tung uh hi. 
Acts14:25 Tua gam sunga om Perga khua-ah thu hilh uh a, tua khua panin Attalia khua-ah a paisuk uh hi." 
Acts14:26 Attalia khua panin teembaw tuang uh a, tu-a a zawh uh nasep a kipat nadingun Pasian’ khut sungah amaute a ki-apna Antiok khua a zuankik uh hi." 
Acts14:27 Antiok khua a tun uh ciangin amaute in pawlpi mite khawm uh a, a khualzinna uhah Pasian in na a seppihna khempeuh le Gentail mite in zong thu a uptheih nadingun Pasian in lam a honsaknate khempeuh a gen uh hi." 
Acts14:28 Tua khua-ah thu um mite tawh sauveipi sung a omkhawm uh hi. 
Acts15:1 Judea gam panin Antiok khua-ah mi pawlkhat hong pai uh a, innkuan khat bangin a om thu um mite kiangah, “Moses Thukham sungah a kigen bangin na vun uh na at kei uhleh hotkhiatna na ngah kei ding uh hi,” ci-in thu hilh ding hong kipan uh hi."
