Acts15:1 Judea gam panin Antiok khua-ah mi pawlkhat hong pai uh a, innkuan khat bangin a om thu um mite kiangah, “Moses Thukham sungah a kigen bangin na vun uh na at kei uhleh hotkhiatna na ngah kei ding uh hi,” ci-in thu hilh ding hong kipan uh hi." 
Acts15:2 Hih thu huhau-in Paul le Barnabas, le hih mite kikalah nakpitakin thu kinialna omin thu kisel uh ahih manin, Paul le Barnabas le Antiok khua-a a om mi pawlkhatte Jerusalem khua-ah va pai-in, hih thu tawh kisai-in tua lai-a om sawltakte le upate tawh a kimuh nadingun a vaihawm uh hi." 
Acts15:3 Amaute a pai uh ciangin pawlpi mite in khuanawl ciang va kha uh a, Gentail mite zong Pasian lamah a kiheina thu, a nawkna uh Foenisia gamah gen kawikawi uh ahih manin thu um mite khempeuh a nuam mahmah uh hi." 
Acts15:4 Jerusalem khua a tun uh ciangin sawltakte, upate, le pawlpite in limtakin zin na do uh a, Pasian in na a seppihna thu, amaute kiangah a gen uh hi." 
Acts15:5 Ahi zongin Farisi mite sung panin thu um mi pawlkhat in, “Amaute in Moses Thukham zui-in, a vun uh a ki-at nading uh gen ding kisam hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Acts15:6 Tua ahih manin hih thu a kikum dingin sawltakte le upate a kikhawm uh hi. 
Acts15:7 Sauveipi a kisel khit uh ciangin Peter hong ding a, “Lawmte aw, Gentail mite in Pasian’ thu za-in a uptheih nadingun amaute tungah Lungdamna Thu a hilh dingin sawtpi lai pekin note lak panin Pasian in kei hong teelkhiatna thu na thei uh hi." 
Acts15:8 Mihingte’ lungsim sungthu a thei Pasian in Gentail mite in zong thu a uptheih ding mah hi, cih a lahna-in eite tungah a hong piak mah bangin amaute tungah zong Kha Siangtho a pia hi." 
Acts15:9 Pasian in eite le Gentail mite deidanna hong nei lo a, amaute in zong a up manun mi siangtho-in a bawl hi." 
Acts15:10 Tua ahih ciangin i pute i pate a kipan ei mahmah in i puak zawh loh vangik pen Pasian’ heh theihtheih nadingin bang hangin thu um mite tungah suan ding ihi hiam? 
Acts15:11 Tua bangin i gamta het kei ding hi. Amaute mah bangin eite in zong i up manin Topa Jesuh hehpihna tawh hotkhiatna i ngah hi,” ci-in thu a gen hi." 
Acts15:12 Tua ciangin Barnabas le Paul in Gentail mite lakah amau tungtawnin Pasian in lim le nalamdang a bawlnate khempeuh a gen laitakun mi khempeuh pau loin a om uh hi. 
Acts15:13 A thugen uh a man khit ciangin James in thu hong gen a, “Lawmte aw, ka thugen hong ngai dih un." 
Acts15:13 A thugen uh a man khit ciangin James in thu hong gen a, “Lawmte aw, ka thugen hong ngai dih un." 
Acts15:14 Pasian in Gentail mite lak panin ama mi dingin mi pawlkhat a lakna tawh Gentail mite a kin ahih lamtak a hong lahna thu, Simon’ genna i za zo hi." 
Acts15:15 Kamsangte’ thugente zong tu-a tawh kituak mahmah hi. Lai Siangtho sungah," 
Acts15:16 ‘Tanglai pek panin hih thu a hong theisak Topa in hih bangin a gen hi: Keima mi ahi dingin ka sapsa Gentail mite le midangte khempeuh in Topa a zontheih nadingun a nung ciangin ka hong paikik ding a, a kisiasa David’ ukna gam ka puahkik ding hi. A siate a ngei bangsakkikin ka dingsakkik ding hi, ci hi,’ ci-in kigelh hi."

Acts15:18  
Acts15:19 Tua ahih ciangin keima ngaihsutna-ah, Pasian’ lamah a kihei hih Gentail mite nawngkaisak lo zaw-in," 
Acts15:20 milim biakna-a kizang an khempeuh a siang lo suak ahih manin a nek loh nading uh, numei tawh khialhnate panin a kikep nading uh, a si luangkhiasak loin a kigawlmek sate, le sasi khat peuhpeuh a nekloh nadingun lai i gelhzawk ding hoih ka sa hi." 
Acts15:21 Bang hang hiam cih leh Sabbath nisimin kikhopna innte-ah Moses Thukhamte kisim ngitnget a, khua khempeuhah Moses thugente mah hilh belin kinei hi,” a ci hi." 
Acts15:22 Tua ciangin sawltakte, upate, le pawlpi buppi in amau sung panin mi pawlkhat teelin Paul le Barnabas tawh Antiok khua-ah a paikhawmsak ding uh a vaihawm uh hi. Amaute tawh a paikhawm dingin thu um mite in a zahtakbawl mahmah mi nih, Barsabbas Judas le Silas teelkhia uh a," 
Acts15:23 a nuai-a kigelh bangin lai a puasak uh hi. Tua a lai puaksak uh sungah, “Sawltakte le upate ahi ko na sanggamte un, Antiok khua, Syria gam, le Silisia gam a om thu upna sungah sanggam ahi Gentail mite tungah hopihna kam kong khak uh hi." 
Acts15:24 Kote’ hong sawl lohpi-in ko kiang panin mi pawlkhat hong pai-in a thugenna uh tawh note hong buaisakin hong lung-amsak hi, ci-in ka za uh hi." 
Acts15:25 Tua ahih manin kote kikhawmin thu ka kikum uh a, mi pawlkhat teelin no kiangah kong paisak ding uh ka kithukim uh hi. Tua ka teel uh mite pen i Topa Jesuh Khrih nasepna-ah a nuntakna uh a pia ngam i sanggam it Paul le Barnabas tawh kong paisak uh hi." 
Acts15:26  
Acts15:27 Tua ahih manin ka teel uh Judas le Silas kong paisak uh a, hih lai sunga ka gelh uh thute mah amau kam mahmah tawh hong gen ding uh hi." 
Acts15:28 A kisam mahmah hih a nuai-a thute simloh, note tungah vangik dang suat ding pen Kha Siangtho le kote ka thukim kei uh hi." 
Acts15:29 Tua a kisam thute in: Milim biakna-in a kipiasa an khat peuhpeuh na nek loh nading uh, sasi na nek loh nading uh, a si luangkhiasak loin a kigawlmek sa khat peuhpeuh na nek loh nading uh, le numei tawh khialhna panin na kikep nading uh ahi hi. Hih thute hoihtakin zui le-uhcin note a dingin hoih ding hi. Na cidam ta un,” ci-in kigelh hi." 
Acts15:30 Tua bangin amaute paisak uh a, Antiok khua a tun uh ciangin thu um mi khempeuh khawmin amaute tungah a lai puak uh a pia uh hi." 
Acts15:31 Mite in tua laikhak a sim uh ciangin a thu kigelhte hangin amaute thanuamin lungdam mahmah uh hi. 
Acts15:32 Judas le Silas zong kamsangte mah hi uh a, thu um mite tawh sauveipi thu kikum uh a, amaute’ lungsim thanuam sakin a thahatsak uh hi." 
Acts15:33 Tua lai-ah tawlkhat a taam khit uh ciangin thu uppih lawmte in lungdam takin Judas le Silas, amau a sawlte kiangah a ciahkik sak uh hi." 
Acts15:34 Ahi zongin Antiok khua-ah Paul le Barnabas taam lai uh a, midang tampite tawh kopin Topa’ thu a hilh uh hi." 
Acts15:35  
Acts15:36 Tawlkhat khit ciangin Paul in Barnabas kiangah, “Topa’ thu i hilhnasa khua tuamtuama i sanggamte kiangah va hawhkikin bang a cici uh hiam cih va en ni,” a ci hi." 
Acts15:37 Tua bangin a pai ding uh ciangin Barnabas in Johan Marka tonpih nuam a," 
Acts15:37 Tua bangin a pai ding uh ciangin Barnabas in Johan Marka tonpih nuam a," 
Acts15:38 ahi zongin Johan Marka in a khualzin masakun a tawp dongin zui loin Pamfilia gam panin ciahsan ahih manin Paul in hoihsa lo hi. 
Acts15:38 ahi zongin Johan Marka in a khualzin masakun a tawp dongin zui loin Pamfilia gam panin ciahsan ahih manin Paul in hoihsa lo hi. 
Acts15:39 Hih thu hangin amau tegel nakpitakin kinial uh ahih manin kikhenlawh uh a, Barnabas in Johan Marka zawnin Saipras tuikulh gam a zuan dingin teembaw tawh a pai hi." 
Acts15:39 Hih thu hangin amau tegel nakpitakin kinial uh ahih manin kikhenlawh uh a, Barnabas in Johan Marka zawnin Saipras tuikulh gam a zuan dingin teembaw tawh a pai hi." 
Acts15:40 Paul in zong Silas teel a, thu um mite in Topa’ khut sungah a ap khit uh ciangin," 
Acts15:41 Syria gam le Silisia gam nawkin pai-in pawlpite hanthawnin a thahatsak hi. 
Acts16:1 Paul paisuak lai-in Derbe khua tung a, tua panin Lystra khua a tung hi. Tua Lystra khua-ah Timoti a kici thu um mi khat om a, a nu zong thu um Jew mi hi a, a pa pen Grik mi ahi hi." 
Acts16:2 Lystra khua le Ikonium khua-a om thu um mite in Timoti pen a zahtak mahmah uh mi khat ahi hi. 
Acts16:3 Paul in Timoti tonpih nuam ahih manin a vun a atsak hi. Tua gam a om Jew mi khempeuh in Timoti’ pa pen Grik mi ahih lamtak theikim uh ahih manin tua bangin a atsak ahi hi. 
Acts16:4 Thuhilhin a paina uh khua khempeuha thu um mite kiangah Jerusalem khua-a om sawltakte le upate in zuih dingin a khensat uh ngeinate gen kawikawi uh a, tua ngeinate a zuih nadingun a hanthawn uh hi." 
Acts16:5 Tua ahih manin pawlpi mite a upna uhah kip semsemin, a nini-in mi a kibehlaplap hi." 
Acts16:6 Asia gam sungah thu a hilh ding uh Kha Siangtho in phal lo ahih manin Frigia le Galatia gam sungtengah a zin uh hi. 
Acts16:7 Mysia gamgi a tun uh ciangin Bithynia gam sungah lut dingin kithawi uh a, ahi zongin tua gamah a pai ding uh Jesuh’ Kha Siangtho in phal lo hi." 
Acts16:8 Tua ahih manin Mysia gam nawkin pai uh a, Troas khua-ah a tung uh hi." 
Acts16:9 Troas khua-ah a tunni zanin Paul in maang mu a, Masedonia gammi khat in ama kiangah, “Masedonia gamah hong pai inla, kote hong huh in,” ci-in a thum hi." 
Acts16:10 Paul in maang a muhkhit phetin, tua lai-a om mite kiangah Lungdamna Thu a hilh dingin Pasian in eite hong sam hi, ci-in ngaihsun ka hih manun Masedonia gamah a pai dingin ka kithawi pah uh hi." 
Acts16:11 Tua ahih manin Troas khua panin teembaw tuangin Samothrasia tuikulh ka tung uh a, a zing ciangin Neapolis khua ka tung uh hi." 
Acts16:12 Tua khua panin khe tawh pai-in Masedonia gam sunga om Rom mite a tenna Filippi khua ka tung uh a, tua khua-ah ni tampi sung ka taam uh hi." 
Acts16:13 A Sabbath ni ciangin Jew mite’ thungetna mun om ding hi, ci-in ka upna uh khua pualama gun gei-ah ka pai uh a, tua lai-ah tu-in a kikhawm numeite tungah thu ka hilh uh hi." 
Acts16:14 Tua ka thuhilhna uh a za mite lakah Thiatira khuami, a manpha mahmah puansan a zuak, Lydia kici numei khat a om hi. Tua nu pen Pasian a bia numei khat hi a, Paul’ thugente a sangthei dingin Pasian in a lungsim a honsak hi." 
Acts16:15 Amah le a innsunga om mi khempeuh tui kiphum uh a, “Topa thu a um mi taktak hi, ci-in na hong ngaihsut nak-uhleh hong pai unla, ka inn-ah hong tung un,” ci-in hong samin a hong zol hi." 
Acts16:16 Nikhat, thungetna mun a zuan dingin ka pai laitakun mailam thu a genthei dawivei nasem numei khat in kote hong dawntuah hi. Tua numei in mailam thu a genna tawh a tote a dingin sum tampi a ngahsak hi." 
Acts16:17 Tua numei in Paul le kote hong zui-in, “Hih mite, A Lianpen Pasian’ nasemte ahi uh hi. Note a hong kihotkhiat theih nading thu a hong gen uh ahi hi,” ci-in a kiko hi." 
Acts16:18 Tua bangin ni tampi sung awng ngitnget ahih manin a sawtna ciangin Paul in nawngkaisa ahih manin kihei-in a dawi kiangah, “Hih numei sung panin na paikhiat nadingin Jesuh Khrih min tawh thu kong pia hi,” a cihkhit phetin, tua numei sung panin dawi a paikhia pah hi." 
Acts16:19 Tua numei’ tote in a sumngah nading uh beita hi, ci-in a phawk uh ciangin Paul le Silas man uh a, thukhente omna sumbuk tualah a kai uh hi." 
Acts16:20 Rom ulian thukhente kiangah paipih uh a, “Hih mite, Jew mi hi a, i khua sungah nawngkaina hong piangsak hi." 
Acts16:21 Amaute in kote’ ngeina tawh kituak lo thute hong hilh uh a, kote Rom mi ka hih manun amau thugente ka sang thei kei uh a, ka zui thei kei uh hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Acts16:22 Mihonte in zong amau tegel vuakpih ngeingai uh a, uliante in Paul le Silas’ puan balkeksak uh a, tua mi tegel a sat nading uh thu a pia uh hi." 
Acts16:23 Nakpi takin a kisat khit ciangin thong sungah koihsak uh a, limtakin tawh a kalh nadingin thongcing pa kiangah thu a pia uh hi." 
Acts16:24 Tua bangin thu a ngah ciangin thongcing pa in thong sung tawngnungah amaute koihin, singkol lianpi sungah a khe uh a gakcipsak hi." 
Acts16:25 Zankim laitakin Paul le Silas in Pasian kiangah thu ngenin la sa uh a, thongkia dangte in amau’ thungetna le lasaknate a ngai uh hi." 
Acts16:26 Thakhatin nakpitakin zin hong ling a, thonginn a bulpi dongin a lokgawp hi. Thakhatthu-in thong kongkhak khempeuh kihong a, thongkiate a kikhihna sikkhau khempeuh a kiphelkhia hi." 
Acts16:27 Thongcing pa zong khanglo a, thong kongkhakte a kihong a muh ciangin thongkia mi khempeuh taikhia mangkhin hi, ci-in ngaihsun ahih manin a namsau dokin amahmah a kithat dingin a kithawi hi." 
Acts16:28 Ahi zongin a aw neihzah tawh Paul kiko a, “Bangmah kicih kei in! Ka vekpi-un kim ung!” a ci hi." 
Acts16:29 Thongcing pa in zong meivak a la dingin mi khat sawl a, thong sungah tai-in laukawm lingkawmin Paul le Silas khe kiang va kidenna-in a va boksuk hi." 
Acts16:30 Tua ciangin amaute pusuahpih a, “Tote aw, hotkhiatna ka ngah nadingin bangci gamtat ding ka hi hiam?” ci-in a dong hi." 
Acts16:31 Amaute in, “Topa Jesuh um in. Tua hileh nang le na innkuanpihte in hotkhiatna na ngah ding uh hi,” ci-in a dawng uh hi." 
Acts16:32 Tua ciangin amaute in amah le a innsunga om mi khempeuh tungah Topa’ thu a hilh uh hi. 
Acts16:33 Tua zankim laitakpi mahin thongcing pa in amaute’ liammate sawpsiangsak a, amah le a innkuanpih mi khempeuh a kituiphum pah uh hi." 
Acts16:34 Tua ciangin a inn-ah amaute ciahpihin an a pia hi. Tu-in Pasian thu um uh ahih manin amah a kipan a innkuanpih khempeuh a lungdam mahmah uh hi. 
Acts16:35 A zingsang ciangin Rom thukhen uliante in palikbute samin, “Tua mite va khah un,” a ci uh hi." 
Acts16:36 Tua ahih manin thongcing pa in zong Paul kiangah, “Thukhen uliante in nang le Silas kong khah nading uh thu hong piakhin ahih manin lungnuam takin na ciahkhia theita ding uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Acts16:37 Ahi zongin Paul in palikbute kiangah, “Kote in khialhna bangmah gamta lo napi-in mihon mai-ah hong kisatgawp hi. Kote pen Rom gammi hi ung! Hong kisat khit ciangin thong sungah hong kikoih lai hi. Tu-in kuama theih lohin kote hong khahsim nuam ahi uh hiam? Tua bang mawk hithei peuhmah lo ding hi. Rom thukhen uliante mahmah hih lai-ah hong pai uh hen la, kote hong khahkhia ta hen,” a ci hi." 
Acts16:38 Palikbute in zong Rom thukhen uliante kiangah hih thu va ko uh hi. Paul le Silas pen Rom gammi ahih lamtak a phawk uh ciangin lunghimawh uh a," 
Acts16:39 amau mahmah va pai-in a va thum khit uh ciangin thong sung panin khahkhia uh a, tua khua panin a paikhiat nadingun a thum uh hi." 
Acts16:40 Paul le Silas zong thong panin paikhia-in Lydia’ inn a zuan uh hi. Tua lai-ah thu um mite tawh kikhawm uh a, hanthotna kam a genkhit uh ciangin tua khua panin a ding khia uh hi." 
Acts17:1 Amfipolis khua le Apollonia khua nawkin amaute zin uh a, Jew mite kikhopna inn a omna Thesalonika khua a tung uh hi." 
Acts17:2 A pai ngei zel mah bangin Paul zong kikhopna inn-ah pai a, Sabbath ni thum sung Lai Siangtho siksanin mite tawh thu kikum a," 
Acts17:3 Khrih in sihna thuakin, sihna panin a thawhkik ding a kisam ahi hi, ci-in a laktel hi. Tu-a note kiangah kong pulak Khrih pen Lai Siangtho sunga kigen Khrih ahi hi, ci-in Paul in a gen hi." 
Acts17:4 Mi pawlkhat in a thugen uh man sa uh ahih manin Paul le Silas pawlpih uh a, tua mah bangin Pasian a bia mi tampi tak le uliante’ zi tampi mah in zong a pawlpih uh hi." 
Acts17:5 Tua bangin mi tampi in Paul’ thugen a up uh ciangin Jew mite thangpai uh a, kongzing lakah a vakvai migilo honkhat kaikhawmin a pawlmat uh hi. Khuasung khempeuh buaisak henhanin, mihonte lakah Paul le Silas a kaihkhiat theih nadingun Jason’ inn a va simgawp uh hi." 
Acts17:6 Tua inn-ah Paul le Silas a muh loh uh ciangin a innteek pa Jason le midang pawlkhat kaikhia-in uliante kiangah paipih uh a, “Hih mite in mun khempeuhah buaina piangsak uh hi. Tu-in i khuasung hong tung uh a," 
Acts17:7 Jason in a inn-ah amaute tungsak hi. Amaute in gam khempeuh a uk Kumpipa’ thu palsat uh a, Jesuh kici kumpi dang khat om hi, ci-in gen uh hi,” ci-in a awnggawp uh hi." 
Acts17:8 Hih thu a zak uh ciangin mihonte le khuasung uliante heh mahmah uh a," 
Acts17:9 Jason le a lawmte a kitat nading uh sum a piaksak khit uh ciangin tua khuasung uliante in amaute a khah pan uh hi. 
Acts17:10 Tua zan ciangin thu um mite in Berea khua-ah Paul le Silas a paisak uh hi. Tua khua a tun uh ciangin Jew mite kikhopna inn-ah a pai uh hi. 
Acts17:11 Thesalonika khuamite sangin Berea khuamite in mipi lungsim neizaw uh hi. Amaute in lawp mahmahna tawh Paul’ thugente ngai uh a, Paul’ thugente man taktak hiam ci-in a theih nadingun nisimin Lai Siangtho a sim uh hi." 
Acts17:12 Mi tampi in Pasian’ thu um a, tuate sungah a cithei Grik numei tampi le Grik mi pasal tampi a kihel uh hi." 
Acts17:13 Berea khua-ah zong Paul in Pasian thu a hilhna a zak uh ciangin Thesalonika khua panin Jew mite hong pai-in Berea khua-ah zong mite hong holhthawh gawp uh hi. 
Acts17:14 Tua ciangin thu um mite in tuipi gei-ah Paul paikhiatpih uh a, ahi zongin Silas le Timoti pen Berea khua-ah a taam lai uh hi." 
Acts17:15 Tuipi gei-ah Paul a paipih thu um mite in Athen khua ciang dong a va zui uh hi. Athen khua panin Berea khua-ah hong ciahkik uh ciangin, Silas le Timoti in a manlang theithei-in hong delh uh hen, ci-in Paul’ kam vaikhak thu a hong pua uh hi." 
Acts17:16 Paul in Athen khua-ah Silas le Timoti ngakin a om laitakin tua khua sungah milim a dimin a om lamtak mu ahih manin a lungsim ommawk thei lo hi. 
Acts17:17 Tua ahih manin Pasian a bia Jew mite le Gentail mite tawh kikhopna inn sungah thu kikupna nei uh a, mihon kikhopna munah hong pai mi khempeuh tawh zong nisimin a kikum uh hi." 
Acts17:18 Epikuras thu ngaihsutzia le Stoik thu ngaihsutzia a um mite pawlkhat, Paul tawh thu kinial uh a, “Hih mi kipilsak thu mawk gengen pa in bang gennuam ahi hiam?” cihsan uh a, pawlkhat in, “Minam dangte’ pasian thu a gen tawh kibang hi,” a ci uh hi. Paul in Jesuh thu le a thawhkikna thu hilh ahih manin hih bangin a gen uh ahi hi." 
Acts17:19 Tua ahih manin amaute in Paul samin, Areopagas mualbo-ah paipih uh a, “Tu-a na gengen thuthakte ka theinuam uh hi." 
Acts17:20 Tu-a na gengen ka zak uh thu pawlkhatte, ko a dingin a lamdangpi khat hi a, a thu a cingin ka theinuam uh hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Acts17:21 (Athen khuamite le tua khua-a om gamdang mite in thu thak la thak ngaihsunin kikup ding simloh thudang ngaihsutin nei lo uh hi.) 
Acts17:22 Tua ahih manin Paul zong kikhopna mun Areopagas a kici mualbo tungah dingin, “Athen khua mite aw, biakna a hahkat mahmah mite na hihna uh ka thei hi." 
Acts17:23 Na khuasung uhah ka pai kawmin na biakna munte uh ka et ciangin, ‘A Kithei lo Pasian a’ ding,’ ci-in biakna tau tungah lai a kigelh nangawn ka mu hi. Tu laitakin kei’ hong pulak Pasian pen, thei lo napi-in na biakbiak uh Pasian ahi hi." 
Acts17:24 Tua Pasian pen leitung buppi le a tunga om khempeuh a piangsak Pasian hi a, van le lei a uk Topa ahih manin mihingte’ lamsa biakinn sungah teng lo hi." 
Acts17:25 Amah pen mi khempeuh tungah nuntakna le na khempeuh a piapa ahih manin mihingte in ama a dingin na khat peuhpeuh a sepsak ding a kisam ahi kei hi. 
Acts17:26 Mihing khat tung panin leitung minam khempeuh hong piangsakin, leitung khempeuhah a omsak hi. Amah in mihingte a piansakma pekin, mihingte’ nuntak tanvei ding le a ten nading uh mun a sehsa ahi hi." 
Acts17:27 Hih bangin a hihna pen mite in amah zongin a muhtheih nading uh a deihna ahi hi. Ahi zongin eite kiang panin Pasian gamla om het lo hi. 
Acts17:28 Mi khat in, ‘Pasian hangin eite piangin, hingin i gamtang hi,’ ci-in gen a, note sung panin laphuah siampa khat in zong, ‘Eite zong ama tate ihi hi,’ na na ci hi." 
Acts17:29 Eite pen Pasian’ tate ihih manin, mihing khutsiamte in bawlin a zep ngunte, khamte, suang milimte tawh a kibang dingin Pasian i ngaihsun kei ding hi." 
Acts17:30 Pasian in mihingte’ theih loh hun lai-a a gamtatnate uh phamawh a sak loh hangin, tu-in mun khempeuha om mi khempeuhte a gamtat siatna panun a kihei nadingun thu a hong pia khinzo hi." 
Acts17:31 Amah in leitung mi khempeuh thu a mantakin ama teel mipa a hong khensak nading ni a sehkhol khinzo hi. Tua a ngaihsutna a man taktak hi, ci-in mi khempeuh tungah a hong lah nadingin a teel mipa, sihna panin a hingkiksak zo hi,” ci-in thu a hilh hi." 
Acts17:32 Sihna panin thawhkikna thu Paul in a gen a zak uh ciangin mi pawlkhat in zahpihbawl uh a, ahi zongin mi pawlkhat in, “Hih thu khatvei zakik nuam lai ung,” a ci uh hi." 
Acts17:33 Tua ciangin tua kikhopna panin Paul a paikhia hi. 
Acts17:34 Mi pawlkhat in thu umin Paul pawlpih uh a, tuate lakah Areopagas mualbo a thu vaihawm pawl sungah a kihel Dionisias, le Damaris a kici numei khat, le mi pawlkhat ahi uh hi." 
Acts18:1 Tua khit ciangin Athen khua panin Paul paikhia-in Korin khua-ah a tung hi. 
Acts18:2 Tua lai-ah Pontas gam a suak, Jew mi Aquila a kici mi khat tawh a kimu hi. Gam uk Kumpipa in Jew mi khempeuh Rom khua panin a taikhiat nadingun thu pia ahih manin Aquila le a zi Prisilla pen Italy gam panin Korin khua a hong tun uh a sawt nai lo ahi hi. Tua nupate tawh a kimu dingin Paul zong a inn uhah va hawh a," 
Acts18:3 tua nupate mah bangin Paul zong puanbuk bawl nasep tawh a nungta ahih manin amaute tawh omkhawmin na a semkhawm uh hi. 
Acts18:4 Sabbath ni simin kikhopna inn-ah limtakin thu gen a, Jew mi le Grik mite in thu a up nadingun a hanciam hi." 
Acts18:5 Masedonia gam panin Silas le Timoti hong tun ciangin Paul in a hun neih khempeuh thuhilhna-in zang a, Jesuh pen Khrih ahi hi, ci-in Jew mite kiangah teltakin a gen hi." 
Acts18:6 Jew mite in ama thuhilhna nialin a gensiat uh ciangin Paul in a puan tunga leivui bangte sinsanin, “Pasian tawh kikhenin siatna na tuah uhleh nomau khialhna hi a, kei nong ngawh nading uh om lo hi. Tu a kipanin Gentail mite kiangah thu ka hilh ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Acts18:7 Tua ahih ciangin Paul in tua Jew mite nusia-in Pasian a bia Gentail mi Titus Justas’ inn-ah a tung hi. Tua mipa’ inn pen kikhopna inn gei mahmah ahi hi. 
Acts18:7 Tua ahih ciangin Paul in tua Jew mite nusia-in Pasian a bia Gentail mi Titus Justas’ inn-ah a tung hi. Tua mipa’ inn pen kikhopna inn gei mahmah ahi hi. 
Acts18:8 Kikhopna inn ukpa Krispas le a innsunga om mi khempeuh in Topa thu um uh a, Korin khua-a om midang tampite in zong thuhilhna ngai-in um uh a, tui a kiphum uh hi." 
Acts18:9 Zan khat, Paul in maang mu a, a maang sungah Topa in, “Lau kei in. Lungkia kei inla, na thugen zom in." 
Acts18:10 Hih khua sungah keima mi tampi om a, nang hong ompih ka hih manin kuamah in nang bangmah hong cih lo ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Acts18:11 Tua ahih manin tua khua-ah kum khat le alang sung omlai-in mite kiangah Pasian thu a hilh hi. 
Acts18:12 Rom khutnuai-ah Akhaia gam sung a uk dingin Gallio a kikoih ciangin Jew mite hong kikaikhawm uh a, Paul manin zumah a paipih uh hi." 
Acts18:13 Amaute in, “Hih mipa in ngeina om lopi-in mite in Pasian a biak nadingin zol ding hanciam hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Acts18:14 Paul in a kam ka-in thugen dingin a kipat laitakin Gallio in Jew mite kiangah, “Hih thu pen gamtat khialhna ahi a, gitloh tatna ahi zongin a gamtatna hang hileh no Jew mite’ thugente limtakin kong ngaih ding a kilawm mah ahi hi." 
Acts18:15 Ahi zongin hih thu pen kam zatzia, min le na ngeina uh a kituh na hih manun nomau mah in khentawm un. Tua bang thute keimah in ka hong khen kei ding hi,” a cih khit ciangin," 
Acts18:16 zum panin amaute a hawlkhia hi. 
Acts18:17 Amaute in kikhopna inn ukpa Sosthenes manin, zum mai-ah satgawp uh a, ahi zongin Gallio in themkhat zong phamawh sa lo hi." 
Acts18:18 Korin khua-ah ni tampi sung thu um mite tawh Paul omkhawm lai a, tua khit ciangin amaute mangpha khakin Syria gam a zuan dingin Prisilla le Aquila tawh teembaw a tuang uh hi. Paul in Pasian tungah thuciamnasa nei ahih manin teembaw a tuan ma-un Korin khuapi teembaw khawlna Kenkhrea munah a sam a metsak hi." 
Acts18:19 Tua bangin a pai uh ciangin Efesa khua tung uh a, Paul zong kikhopna inn-ah pai-in Jew mite tawh thu a kisel uh hi. Tua khua-ah Prisilla le Aquila-te nupa a taam lai nading Paul in a gen hi." 
Acts18:20 Thu um mi pawlkhatte in ni tampi sung Paul a taam nadingin gen uh a, ahi zongin amah taam nuam lo hi;" 
Acts18:21 a dinkhiat ding ciangin, “Pasian deihna ahih nakleh note kiangah ka hong hawhkik ding hi,” ci-in vaikhakin, Efesa khua panin teembaw tawh a ding khia hi." 
Acts18:22 Sisaria khua a tun ciangin Jerusalem khua-ah pai-in pawlpite va hopih a, tua ciangin Antiok khua-ah a pai hi." 
Acts18:23 Antiok khua-ah tawlkhat a taam khit ciangin Galatia gam le Frigia gam sungah pai-in thu um mi khempeuh a va thakhauhsak hi. 
Acts18:24 Alexandria khuami Apollos a kici Jew mi khat, Efesa khua-ah hong pai hi. Amah thugen siam mahmah a, Lai Siangtho zong a thei mahmah khat ahi hi." 
Acts18:25 Amah in Topa’ zia thei a, lawp mahmahna tawh Jesuh’ thu a mantakin a hilh hi. Ahi zongin amah in Johan’ tuiphumna thu bek a thei hi." 
Acts18:26 Amah in kikhopna inn sungah hangtakin thu hilh ding kipan a, Prisilla le Aquila in ama thuhilhna a zak uh ciangin a omna uh inn-ah Apollos ciahpihin, Pasian’ thu paiziate a mantakin a hilhtel uh hi." 
Acts18:27 Akhaia gamah Apollos pai ding a sawm ciangin, Akhaia gam a om thu um mite in limtakin a na pawlbawl nading uh deihna tawh Efesa khua-a om thu um mite in lai a khak uh hi. Amah a tun ciangin Pasian hehpihna hangin Jesuh thu a um tua lai-a om mite a dingin nuamtuam mahmah hi." 
Acts18:28 Bang hang hiam cih leh amah in Lai Siangtho sung siksanin Jesuh pen Khrih ahi hi, ci-in mihon lakah Jew mite tawh thu kiselin a zogawp hi." 
Acts19:1 Korin khua-ah Apollos a om laitakin Paul khual hong zinin Efesa khua hong tung hi. Tua khua-ah thu um mi pawlkhat tawh kimu a," 
Acts19:2 “Thu na up uh ciangin Kha Siangtho na ngah uh hiam?” ci-in a dot leh, “Kha Siangtho a omlam nangawn ka za nai kei uh hi,” ci-in a dawng uh hi." 
Acts19:3 Tua ciangin Paul in, “Tua ahihleh na kituiphumna dan uh bangci bang ahi hiam?” ci-in a dot ciangin, “Tuiphumpa Johan’ thugen bang pawl ahi hi,” ci-in a dawng uh hi." 
Acts19:4 Tua ciangin Paul in, “Johan’ hilh tuiphumna pen mawhna a kisik mite a’ ding ahi hi. Amah in Israel mite kiangah, ‘Keima nunga hong pai ding pa Jesuh um un,’ ci-in gen hi,” a ci hi." 
Acts19:5 Amaute in hih thu a zak uh ciangin Topa Jesuh’ minin tui a kiphum uh hi. 
Acts19:6 Paul in amaute tungah a khut a ngakkhit ciangin amaute tungah Kha Siangtho hong tung hi. Amaute in pau lamdang hong paupah uh a, Pasian’ thu zong a gen uh hi." 
Acts19:7 Tua mite sawm le nih a pha uh hi. 
Acts19:8 Tua ciangin Paul in kikhopna inn sungah hangtakin kha thum sung thu hilh a, mite in Pasian’ Ukna thu a upzawh nadingun nakpitakin a gen hi." 
Acts19:9 Ahi zongin mi pawlkhat in kin hetloin um nuam lo uh a, mipi’ zakin Topa’ thu paiziate gensia gawp uh ahih manin Paul in amaute nusia-in thu um mite paikhiatpih a, Tirannas in thugenna-in a neih innpi sungah nisimin thugenna hun a zang hi." 
Acts19:10 Hih bangin kum nih sung tawntung thu gen niloh ahih manin Asia gam sunga om Jew mi le Gentail mi khempeuh in Topa’ thu a za uh hi. 
Acts19:11 Pasian in Paul’ tungtawnin nalamdang lianpipi a bawl hi. 
Acts19:12 Ama zat mainul ahi a, a puante ahi zongin cinate kiangah a kipaipih ciangin a natnate uh damin, a sunga om dawite zong a taikhia uh hi." 
Acts19:13 Dawi hawlkhia-in a vak kawikawi Jew mi aitawi pawlkhat in zong Topa Jesuh’ min zangin dawi hawlkhiat ding a sawm uh hi. Amaute in dawite kiangah, “Paul in a gengen Jesuh’ min tawh thu kong pia uh hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Acts19:14 Siampi lianpen Skeva’ tapa sagihte in tu-a bang danin na sem uh hi. 
Acts19:15 Ahi zongin dawite in amau kiangah, “Jesuh ka thei uh a, Paul zong ka thei uh hi. Note kua na hi uh hiam?” a cihkhit uh ciangin," 
Acts19:16 dawilutna mipa in amaute buan gawpin zogawp ahih manin, a liam a bai, puan keksa-in tua mipa’ inn panin a taikhia uh hi." 
Acts19:17 Efesa khua-a om Jew mi le Gentail mi khempeuh in hih thu za-in lau mahmah uh a, Topa Jesuh’ min nakpitakin a kiphat semsem hi." 
Acts19:18 Thu a um midang tampi tak zong hong pai uh a, mipi’ zakin a gamtatnasate khempeuh uh hong pulak uh hi." 
Acts19:19 Ai a san ngei mi tampi tak in zong a aisanna laibute uh hong paipih uh a, mi khempeuh’ muhin a haltum uh hi. Tua laibu mante a gawm uh ciangin ngun peek then nga man bang ahi hi." 
Acts19:20 Tu-a bang danin Topa thu nakpitakin hong khangin hong kizel semsem hi. 
Acts19:21 Hih bang thuteng a piankhit ciangin Masedonia gam le Akhaia gamah Paul zinin Jerusalem-ah paisuak ding a ngaihsun hi. Tua khit ciangin Rom khua-ah zong pai ning, a ci hi." 
Acts19:22 Tua ahih manin amah a huh Timoti le Erastas, Masedonia gamah paisak a, amah in Asia gam sungah tawlkhat hun a zang hi." 
Acts19:23 Tua hun laitakin Topa’ thu hangin Efesa khua-ah buaina lianpi khat a hong piang hi. 
Acts19:24 Demetrias min nei ngunseek mipa khat in Artemis nusian biakna inn lim ngun tawh bawl a, tua nasepna in amah le a naseppih mite a dingin hauhna lianpi a piangsak hi." 
Acts19:25 Tua ahih manin amaute’ sep bang a sem midang khempeuh kaikhawmin, “Lawmte aw, hih nasepna hangin a hau ihihna thu na thei uh hi." 
Acts19:26 Nomau mahmah in hih Paul’ thugen khempeuh za-in na thei uh hi. Amah in mihingte’ bawl pasian-te pen pasian hi het lo hi, ci-in thu hilh a, hih Efesa khua le Asia gam sung khempeuhah mi tampi tak a umsak hi." 
Acts19:27 Tua ahih manin i nasepna a siatkhak ding lauhuai hi. Tua bek hi loin, Asia gam sung mi le leitung mi khempeuh in a biak Artemis nusian biakna innpi a mawkna hong suahkhak ding, le a liatna teng a maimankhak ding nak lauhuai mahmah hi,” a ci hi." 
Acts19:28 Mihonte in hih thu a zak uh ciangin heh mahmah uh a, “Efesa khuamite’ Artemis lianpen hi,” ci-in awngkekgawp uh hi." 
Acts19:29 Khuasung khempeuhah tua buaina hong kizel a, mihonte in Paul tawh a kikhawl Masedonia mi Gaias le Aristarkhas manin mihon kikhopna innpi-ah a kai uh hi." 
Acts19:30 Paul zong tua innsung mihonte mai-ah thugen dingin painuam a, ahi zongin thu um mite in a pai ding a phal kei uh hi." 
Acts19:31 Paul’ lawm ahi tua gam a ulian pawlkhatte in Paul kiangah kamtai paisak uh a, hih kikhopna munah hong kilak het kei in, ci-in nakpitakin a khosak uh hi." 
Acts19:32 Tua innpi sungah mihonpi buai ngeingai uh a, mi a tamzaw in a paina thu uh thei lo uh ahih manin, pawlkhat in thu khat genin awnggawp uh a, adang pawlkhat in a thu tuampi khat na awng leuleu uh hi." 
Acts19:33 Jew mite in mihonpi mai-ah Alexander hong dingsak uh ahih manin, mi pawlkhat in hih thupiang ama hang hi, ci-in ngaihsun uh hi. Alexander in mihonte a gamdaih nadingin a khut hong van a, a mawh lohna uh thu a gen dingin hong kipan hi." 
Acts19:34 Ahi zongin Jew mi ahih lamtak a theih uh ciangin, “Efesa khuamite’ Artemis lianpen hi,” ci-in a kituakin nai nih sung a awng uh hi." 
Acts19:35 A tawpna ciangin khuasung lai-at pa in mihonte a gamdaih nadingin khozo a, “Efesa khuapi mite aw, Efesa khuapi pen, a lian mahmah Artemis biakna innpi le van panin a hong kia biakna suang a kem khuapi ahihna thu mi khempeuh in a theihsa ahi hi." 
Acts19:36 Hih thu pen kuamah in hong nial thei lo ding hi. Tua ahih manin gamdai takin om unla, a kilawm lo na khat peuhpeuh gamta kei un." 
Acts19:37 Hih mite in i biakna inn lah bangmah cih lo, i nusian zong bangmah gensiatna nei lo napi-in hih lai-ah na hong paipih uh hi." 
Acts19:38 Tua ahih ciangin Demetrias le a pawlte in mi khatpeuh tungah lungkim lohna nei uh ahihleh thu sit ni ding hun om a, thukhen uliante zong om uh ahih manin tuate mai-ah thu kineih ta uh hen." 
Acts19:39 Ahi zongin hih thu-ah lungkimzo nai lo na hih uhleh zong a ngeina cingin a kikhop uh ciangin gen ding ahi hi. 
Acts19:40 Tuni-a thupiang hangin eite buaina piangsak, ci-in hong kimawhsak khak ding lauhuai hi. Hih bangin buaina a om nading bangmah a thu om lopi hi a, i siksan ding bangmah thu om het lo hi,” a ci hi." 
Acts19:41 Hih thuteng a genkhit ciangin mihonte a ciahsak hi. 
Acts20:1 Hih buaina thu a ven’ ciangin Paul in thu um mite kaikhawmin, hanthotna kam genin amaute mangpha khak a, Masedonia gam a zuan dingin ding khia hi." 
Acts20:2 Hih gam sungah khualzinin hanthotna tampi a genkhit ciangin Grik gamah pai a," 
Acts20:3 tua gamah kha thum sung a tam hi. Syria gam manawh dingin a kithawi laitakin tua gam a om Jew mite in lamkalah amah a thahsawmna thu za ahih manin Masedonia gam tawn kikin khualzin ding a ngaihsun hi. 
Acts20:4 Berea khuami Pirras’ tapa Sopater, Thesalonika khuami Aristarkhas le Sekundus, Derbe khuami Gaias, Timoti, le Asia gam sung panin Tikhikas le Trofimas-te in zong a zui uh hi." 
Acts20:5 Amaute na mapai uh a, Troas khua-ah kote hong ngak uh hi." 
Acts20:6 Silngo Sawh loh Anlum Pawi a ven’ khit ciangin Filippi khua panin teembaw tawh ka ding uh a, ni nga khit ciangin Troas khua tungin amaute tawh ka kimu uh a, tua lai-ah nipikal khat sung ka taam uh hi." 
Acts20:7 Sani nitakin an nekhawm dingin ka kikhawm uh a, a zing ciangin a ding khia ding ahih manin Paul in a thuhilh zankim ciang dong a zomsuak hi." 
Acts20:8 Ka kikhopna uh inn dawl tungnung sungah meivak tampi a kivak hi. 
Acts20:9 Tawlet gei-ah Eutikhas a kici tangval khat tu a, Paul in a thugen zomzom ahih manin tua tangvalpa a ihmut suakin lusu a, a sawtna ciangin ihmusip kha-in inn dawl thumna panin leilakah a kiasuk hi. Amaute in a va phot uh ciangin amah na si khinta hi." 
Acts20:10 Paul zong va kumsukin tangvalpa tungah bokin kikhuangin kawi a, “Lunghimawh kei un, hinglai hi,” a ci hi." 
Acts20:11 Tua ciangin inn dawl tungnungah kahto kikin anlum balnenin thu um mite tawh a nekhawm hi. Zingsang khuavak dong amaute tawh thu kikum uh a, tua ciangin a ding khia hi." 
Acts20:12 Amaute in tua tangvalpa a inn-ah va kha uh a, a lungsim uh nuamkik mahmah hi." 
Acts20:13 Tua ciangin Paul in, Assos khua ciang dong khe-in pai ning, ci-in ko kiangah hong gen ahih manin, Troas khua panin teembaw tuangin Assos-ah ka pai uh a, tua khua-ah Paul tawh a kituah ding ka hi uh hi." 
Acts20:14 Assos khua ka tun uh ciangin Paul in zong teembaw hong man a, Mitylene khua-ah ka paisuak uh hi." 
Acts20:15 Tua panin ding leuleu-in a zing ciangin Khios tuikulh khengin Samos tuikulh ka tung uh hi. Tua panin a zing ciangin Miletas khua ka tung uh hi. 
Acts20:16 Paul in Jerusalem khua-ah Pentekos Pawi hun lapnuam ahih manin Asia gam sungah ban man dingin ngaihsun lo a, Efesa khua-ah taam sawm lo hi." 
Acts20:17 Paul in Miletas khua panin Efesa khua-ah thu puak a, Efesa pawlpi upate in a na dawntuah nadingin a vaikhak hi." 
Acts20:18 Efesa pawlpi upate hong tun ciangin Paul in amaute kiangah, “Asia gam sung kong tun ni a kipanin note tawh ka om sungteng ka nasepna khempeuh note in na thei uh hi." 
Acts20:19 Jew mite in kei hong thahsawmna hangin kiniamkhiatna le khitui naptui tawh haksapi-in Topa’ na ka sem hi. 
Acts20:20 Mihon lak ahi a, note’ inn sungah ahi zongin ka hong thuhilhna khempeuhah note’ phattuam nading a om khempeuh siit nei loin kong gen khin hi." 
Acts20:21 Jew mi le Gentail mite a mawhna panun Pasian’ lamah kihei-in i Topa Jesuh a up nadingun thu ka gen khinzo hi. 
Acts20:22 Tu-in ahihleh Kha Siangtho’ hong sawlna mangin, kei tungah bang thu hong piang ding hiam, cih thei lopi-in Jerusalem khua-ah a pai ding ka hi hi." 
Acts20:23 Thongkiatna le gimna ka thuak nading thu bekbek, ka omna khua khempeuhah Kha Siangtho in hong gen tawntung hi." 
Acts20:24 Ahi zongin Topa Jesuh in kei sep dingin a hong piak, Pasian hehpihna hangin Lungdamna Thu, mite kiangah gen ding nasep ka tangtut zawh nakleh kei nuntakna-ah bangbang hong piang taleh a thupi-in ka ngaihsun kei hi." 
Acts20:25 “A beisa hunah Pasian’ Ukna thu a hilhin note lakah kong vak kawikawi a, ahi zongin tu-in kuamah in nong muhkik nawn loh ding uh ka thei hi." 
Acts20:26 Tua ahih ciangin tuni mahmahin note tungah limtakin kong gennop thu in: Note khat peuhpeuh Pasian tawh kikhenin siatna na tuah uhleh kei’ tavuan hi nawn lo hi. 
Acts20:27 Bang hang hiam cih leh note tungah Pasian’ thu kong gen loh khat zong om nawn lo hi. 
Acts20:28 Kha Siangtho in note’ khut sungah a hong koih pawlpi mite le nomau pumpi mahmah limtakin na kem un. Pasian in a Tapa a sihna tawh a ngah a pawlpi hoihtakin a kemte na hi ta un. 
Acts20:29 Kei ka om nawn loh ciangin, sa gilote in gannote a phialgawp bangin, mi pawlkhat in thu um mite hong phialgawp ding lamtak ka thei hi." 
Acts20:30 Note sung mahmah panin zong mi pawlkhat in thu um mite khemin a zolkhiat hun hong tung ding hi. 
Acts20:31 Tua ahih ciangin limtakin kiging unla, kum thum sung tawntung khitui naptui tawh note khempeuh ka hong thuhilhna na ciamteh un." 
Acts20:32 “Tu-in Pasian’ khutsung le ama dikna thu sungah note ka hong ap hi. Amah in note hong khangtosak thei-in, ama mite khempeuh a dingin a koih thuphate note tungah hong pia thei hi." 
Acts20:33 Kuama neihsa, ngun, kham, le puante en’ dingin ka ngaihsun ngei kei hi." 
Acts20:34 Kei le ka kithuahpihte’ kisapna khempeuh ka ngahtheih nadingin keima khut mahmah tawh na ka sepna thu note in na thei uh hi. 
Acts20:35 Topa Jesuh mahmah in, ‘Ngahna sangin piak khiatna-ah lungdamna lianzaw hi,’ a cihna phawkkawmin nakpitakin nasepna tawh na khempeuhah a zawngkhalte huh ding hi hang, ci-in note kiangah kong lak khinzo hi,” ci-in a vaikhak hi." 
Acts20:36 Paul in hih bangin a kam vaikhak a man khit ciangin a vekpi-un khukdin uh a, Paul in thu a ngen hi." 
Acts20:37 Amaute a kikhen dingin mangpha a kikhak uh ciangin khatlekhat kilen kikawi-in a kap uh hi. 
Acts20:38 Paul in, “Kuamah in nong mukik nawn kei ding uh hi,” a cihna hangin a dah mahmah uh hi. Amaute in teembaw tung ciang dong Paul a hong kha uh hi." 
Acts21:1 Amaute tawh ka kikhen khit uh ciangin teembaw tawh paisuakin Kos tuikulh ka tung uh hi. A zing ciangin Rods tuikulh ka tung uh a, tua lai panin a zing ciangin Patara khua ka tung uh hi." 
Acts21:2 Tua lai panin Foenisia gamah a pai ding teembaw khat na om ahih manin tua teembaw tuangin ka pai uh hi. 
Acts21:3 Saipras tuikulh a kigal muhna mun ka tun uh ciangin tua tuikulh leitaw lampang kantanin Syria gam lam manawhin ka paisuak uh a, Taia khua ka tun uh ciangin teembaw in a van puakte suah ahih manin teembaw tung pan ka tuakkhia uh hi." 
Acts21:4 Tua khua-ah ka kan uhleh thu um mi pawlkhat na om uh a, amaute kiangah nipikal khat sung ka taam uh hi. Jerusalem khua-ah Paul a pai loh nadingin Kha Siangtho’ lamlahna tawh amaute in a gen uh hi." 
Acts21:5 Amaute kiang panin ka ciahkhiat ding uh hun hong tun ciangin ka ding khia uh a, a zite a tate uh tawh a vekpi-un khuanawl ciang hong zui uh hi. Tuipi gei ka tun uh ciangin khukdinin thu ka ngen uh hi." 
Acts21:6 Tua ciangin khatlekhat mangpha kikhakin teembaw tungah ka tuang uh a, amaute zong a inn uhah a ciah uh hi." 
Acts21:7 Taia khua panin teembaw tawh pai-in Tolemais khua ka tung uh a, tua lai-ah thu um mite kiangah sun khat kulhin amaute tawh ka kiho uh hi." 
Acts21:8 A zing ciangin ding leuleu-in Sisaria khua ka tung uh a, Pasian thu a hilh Filip’ inn-ah tungin tua lai-ah ka taam uh hi. Tua pa pen Jerusalem khua-a a kiteel mi sagihte sungah a kihel ahi hi." 
Acts21:9 Amah in Pasian thu a hilh tanu-ngak li nei hi. 
Acts21:10 Tua lai-ah tawlkhat ka taam khit uh ciangin Judea gam panin Agabas min nei kamsang khat hong tung hi. 
Acts21:10 Tua lai-ah tawlkhat ka taam khit uh ciangin Judea gam panin Agabas min nei kamsang khat hong tung hi. 
Acts21:11 Kote’ kiangah amah hong pai-in Paul’ kawnggak hong laksak a, tua kawnggak tawh ama khut le a khete a gakcip khit ciangin, “Kha Siangtho in, ‘Jerusalem khua sungah hih bangin Jew mite in hih kawnggak nei pa hencip ding a, Gentail mite’ khut sungah pia ding hi,’ ci hi,” a hong ci hi." 
Acts21:12 Hih thu ka zak uh ciangin kote le tua lai-a om thu um mite in Jerusalem-ah Paul a pai loh nadingin ka thum uh hi. 
Acts21:13 Ahi zongin Paul in, “Bang hangin hih bangin kapin ka lungsim a tapkhap nadingin gamta na hi uh hiam? Jerusalem khua-ah khihcipna a thuak ding bek hi loin, Topa Jesuh hangin a si ding ciang dongin a kithawisa ka hi hi,” ci-in a hong dawng hi." 
Acts21:14 Thu ka genpihpih uh hangin hong mang zo lo ahih manin, ka cih nading uh thei nawn loin, “Topa’ deihna bangbang hi ta hen,” ci-in ka omta uh hi." 
Acts21:15 Tua lai-ah tawlkhat ka taam khit uh ciangin ka vante uh kithawi-in Jerusalem khua a zuan dingin ka dinkhiat uh ciangin," 
Acts21:16 Sisaria khua panin thu um mi pawlkhat in zong hong zui uh a, ka tun nading uh Mnason’ inn-ah hong paipih uh hi. Mnason pen Saipras tuikulh gammi hi a, sawt pek a kipanin thu um mi a na hi khinsa ahi hi." 
Acts21:17 Jerusalem khua ka tun uh ciangin thu um mite in lungdam mahmahin a hong hopih uh hi. 
Acts21:18 A zing ciangin James kiangah Paul tawh ka hawh uh a, tua lai-ah pawlpi upa khempeuh a na om uh hi." 
Acts21:18 A zing ciangin James kiangah Paul tawh ka hawh uh a, tua lai-ah pawlpi upa khempeuh a na om uh hi." 
Acts21:19 Paul in amaute hopih a, Pasian in amah Paul tungtawnin Gentail mite lakah na a sepna khempeuh a banbanin a cingtakin a gen hi." 
Acts21:20 Ama thugen teng a zakkhit uh ciangin a vekpi-un Pasian a phat uh hi. Tua ciangin Paul kiangah, “Sanggam aw, hih lai-ah na theih ding thu khat om hi. Hih lai-ah thu um Jew mi tampi tak om a, amaute in thukham nakzuih mahmah uh hi." 
Acts21:21 Gentail mite lak a om Jew mi khempeuh tungah na thuhilhna, amaute in Moses thukham zui loin, Jew ngeina zui nawn loin, a tate uh zong vun a at loh nadingun na thugente khempeuh, hih lai-a om Jew mite tungah kigen hi." 
Acts21:22 Hih lai nong tunkhitna thu amaute in pel loin zakhin ding uh ahih manin bangcih ding ihi hiam? 
Acts21:23 Tua ahih manin kong gen bangun gamta in. Pasian tungah thuciamna a bawl khinsa mihing li om hi. 
Acts21:24 Tua mite tawh va kipawl inla, a kisiansuahna uhah nang zong va kihelin, a sum beiteng khempeuh nangmah in sik in. A kisiansuah khit uh ciangin amaute in a sam uh met thei ta ding uh hi. Hih bangin gamta lecin a beisa huna nangma thu a kigente khempeuh a man khat zong om loin, nangmahmah zong Moses Thukham a zui na hihna thu mi khempeuh in hong thei ding uh hi." 
Acts21:25 Thu um Gentail mite tawh kisai-in ahihleh, amaute in milim biakna an khat peuhpeuh, sasi, le a si kiluangkhiasak loin gawlmek a kigo sate a nek loh nading uh, le numei tawh khialhna panin a kikep nading uh hoih hi, ci-in thu khensatin lai ka khak khinzo uh hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Acts21:26 Tua ahih ciangin Paul, a zing ciangin tua mi lite tawh va pai khawmin kisiansuahna a va bawl uh hi. Tua ciangin biakinn sungah amah va pai a, a kisiansuah hun sung uh a hun sawt ding tan, tua mi lite a dingin biakna a kipiak ding ni a va zasak hi." 
Acts21:27 Tua ni sagih hunsung a bei dektak ciangin Asia gam panin a hong pai Jew mite pawlkhat in, biakinn sungah Paul a omna a mu uh hi. Amaute in mihonte sosuahin Paul man uh a," 
Acts21:28 “Israel mite aw, hong huh un. Mun khempeuhah thu hilh kawikawi-in, Moses Thukham, le hih biakinn langpangin mi khempeuh kiangah Israel mite a hong gensia pa ahi hi. Tu-in Gentail mite nangawn biakinn sungah hong paipihin hih biakinn siangtho a ninsak hi,” ci-in a awng uh hi." 
Acts21:29 (Hih bang a cih theihna uh pen khua sungah Paul le Efesa khuami Trofimas a kikhawl mu uh a, Paul in biakinn sungah tua mipa a lutpih a sa kha uh ahi hi.)" 
Acts21:30 Tua ciangin hih thu in khuasung khempeuh hong zel a, mite hong tai-in hong kikhawmin Paul man uh a, biakinn pualamah kaikhia-in, biakinn kongkhakte a khakpah uh hi." 
Acts21:31 Mihonte in Paul that dingin a kithawi laitakun Jerusalem khuasung buai mahmah hi, ci-in Rom galkap mangpa kiangah thu na kipuak hi." 
Acts21:32 Galkap mangpa in zong thakhatin galkapbute le galkapte samin mihonte lak a va kidenna uh hi. Mihonte in galkapte tawh hong pailam a muh uh ciangin Paul a sat nawn kei uh hi. 
Acts21:33 Paul kiangah galkap mangpa hong pai-in man a, sikkhau nih tawh Paul a khih nadingun thu a pia hi. Tua ciangin, “Hih mipa kua hi a, bang gamta ahi hiam?” ci-in a dot ciangin," 
Acts21:34 mihonte sung panin pawlkhat in thu khat genin, pawlkhat in adang khat a gen hi. Mihon kibuai lua a, bang teng taktak hiam, cih theikhia zo lo ahih manin galkap inn-ah a paipih nadingun a mite thu a pia hi." 
Acts21:35 Galkap huangsung lutna kahlei a tun uh ciangin mihonte in nehcip lua uh ahih manin galkapte in Paul laamto-in a paipih uh hi. 
Acts21:36 Bang hang hiam cih leh mihonte in hong nungzuihin, “Amah that un,” ci-in a awng uh hi." 
Acts21:37 Amaute in galkap huang sungah Paul a lutpih dektak laitakun Paul in galkap mangpa kiangah, “Nang tung thu tawmkhat kong genthei ding hiam?” ci-in a dot ciangin galkap mangpa in, “Grik pau siam hi lo na hi hiam?" 
Acts21:38 Tua ahih manin tuma lamin kumpi lehdo dingin mihing tulli tawh gam sungah a pai Egypt mipa hi buang kei ni teh maw?” a ci hi. 
Acts21:39 Paul in, “Kei pen Silisia gam Tarsas khua-a suak Jew mi ka hi a, khua thupi sungah a teng mi ka hi hi. Nong hehpihna-in hih mihonte tungah thu hong gensak in,” a ci hi." 
Acts21:40 Galkap mangpa in zong thu a gen ding phal ahih manin kahlei cial tungah Paul ding a, mite a gamdaih nadingin a khut a van hi. Mite a gamdaih khit ciangin Paul in Hebru pau-in mite tungah thu gen a," 
Acts22:1 “Pate, ute, khangualte aw, hih thu-ah bangmah ka mawh lohna thu kong gen laitakin na ngai un,” a ci hi." 
Acts22:2 Hebru pau-in thu a genna mihonte in a zak uh ciangin amaute gamdaizaw kan uh ahih manin Paul in a thugen zomin," 
Acts22:3 “Kei pen Silisia gam Tarsas khua-a suak Jew mi ka hi a, ahi zongin hih lai Jerusalem khua-ah Gamaliel’ khut sungah sangnaupang hi-in a khangto ka hi hi. I pu i pate’ Thukham limtakin hong kihilh a, tu-a note zah mahin Pasian tungah a kipia mi khat ka hi hi." 
Acts22:4 Hih Thu a zui numei pasal a kuamah peuh manin thong sung ka denna a, sihna ciang dongin amaute ka bawlsia hi." 
Acts22:5 Hih ka thugente a man ahihna thu, siampi lianpen pa le upa khempeuh in hong genthei ding uh hi. Damaskas khua-a om i Jew mipihte ka lah dingin amaute in lai hong pia uh ahih manin, upate in gim a piaktheih nadingun tua khua-a om thu um mite manin sikkhau khihin Jerusalem khua-ah a ciahpih dingin ka va pai hi." 
Acts22:6 “Damaskas khua a zuan dingin pai-in ka tun dektak sunkim pawl laitakin, thakhatthu-in van panin ka kimkot hong taangzaih hi." 
Acts22:7 Leilakah pukin ka om laitakin awging khat ka za a, ‘Saul, Saul! Bang hangin kei hong bawlsia na hi hiam?’ hong ci hi." 
Acts22:8 Kei zong, ‘Topa aw, kua na hi hiam?’ ci-in ka dot ciangin, ‘Nangmah in na hong bawlsiat, Nazareth khuami Jesuh ka hi hi,’ a hong ci hi." 
Acts22:9 Ka tonpih mite in a khuavak taang mu uh a, ahi zongin kei’ tungah thu hong gen pa’ awging za lo uh hi." 
Acts22:10 Tua ciangin kei zong, ‘Topa aw, bangci gamtat ding ka hi hiam?’ ci-in ka dot ciangin amah in, ‘Tho inla, Damaskas khua-ah pai in. Nang’ hih dingin Pasian in a sehsa thu khempeuh, tua khua panin hong kigen ding hi,’ a hong ci hi." 
Acts22:11 Tua khuavak taanglua hangin khua muthei nawn lo ka hih manin ka tonpihte in ka khutin hong lenin Damaskas khua-ah a hong paipih uh hi. 
Acts22:12 “Tua khua-ah Ananias min nei, Thukham limtakin zui-in biakna hahkat mahmah, Damaskas khua-a om Jew mite in a zahtak mahmah mi khat a na om hi." 
Acts22:13 Amah hong pai-in ka kiangah hong ding a, ‘Sanggam Saul aw, khua mukik in,’ hong cih phetin ka mit hong vakin amah ka muthei pah hi." 
Acts22:14 Tua ciangin amah in, ‘I pu i pate’ Pasian in ama deihna a thei ding, a thuman a Nasempa a mu ding, le ama kam mahmah tawh a thugen a za dingin nang hong teel khinzo hi." 
Acts22:15 Tua ahih manin na muhsa le na zaksa thu khempeuh, mi khempeuh tungah genin teci a pang ding na hi hi." 
Acts22:16 Tu-in bang ngak lai ding na hi hiam? Tho inla, Pasian kiangah thu ngenin kituiphum inla, na mawhnate silsiangsak in,’ hong ci hi." 
Acts22:17 “Tua ciangin Jerusalem khua-ah ka ciahkik a, biakinn sungah thu ngenin ka om laitakin maang ka mu hi." 
Acts22:18 Tua ka maang sungah Topa in kei kiangah, ‘Hih lai-a om mite in keima thu na gennate hong um lo ding uh ahih manin Jerusalem khua panin kuankhia mengmeng in,’ hong ci hi." 
Acts22:19 Kei zong, ‘Kikhopna innte-ah pai kawikawi-in nangma thu hong um mite manin ka satgawpna thu amaute mahmah in teltakin hong thei uh hi." 
Acts22:20 Nangma thu a gen Stefen a kithah laitakin kei mahmah zong ka om a, tua a kithahna thukimpihin a thatte’ puante nangawn ka kepsak hi,’ ci-in ka dawng hi." 
Acts22:21 Tua ciangin Topa in kei kiangah, ‘Gentail mite omna gamlapi-ah hong sawl ding ka hih manin pai peuh in,’ hong ci hi,” a ci hi." 
Acts22:22 Paul in Gentail mite kianga pai nading thu a gen matengin mite in limtakin a ngai uh hi. Ahi zongin tu-a thu a pulak ciangin a aw neihzah uh tawh mite kiko-in, “Leitungah hih bang mi omsak kei un! That un! A hing dingin kilawm lo!” ci-in a awng uh hi." 
Acts22:23 Mihonte hehlua-in awngkekgawp uh a, a puan uh suahin vanah lawnin, leivui zong van lamah a lawn uh hi." 
Acts22:24 Tua ciangin Rom galkap mangpa in galkap huang sungah Paul a paipih nadingun thu pia a, bang hangin Jew mite hih bangin ama tungah hehin awngkekgawp uh ahi hiam, ci-in a theih nadingin a satsak hi." 
Acts22:25 Amaute in sat dingin a hen khit uh ciangin Paul in a gei-a ding galkap bupa kiangah, “Khial hi, ci-in thu nangawn a kisit nai lo Rom mi khat na sat ding uh ngeina ahi hiam?” a ci hi." 
Acts22:26 Galkap bupa in hih thu a zak ciangin galkap mangpa kiangah pai-in, “A bangci na hi hiam? Hua mipa, Rom gammi ahi hi,” a cih ciangin," 
Acts22:27 galkap mangpa zong Paul kiangah va pai-in, “Rom gammi na hi hiam, hong gen dih in,” a cih leh Paul in, “Ka hi mah hi,” ci-in a dawng hi." 
Acts22:28 Tua ciangin galkap mangpa in, “Hih Rom gammi suah nadingin sum tampi tawh ka lei hi,” a ci hi. Paul in, “Kei ka pianin Rom mi-a piang ka hi hi,” a ci hi." 
Acts22:29 Tua ahih manin Paul thu a dong dingin a gei-a om mite a paikhia uh hi. Sikkhau tawh a khih khit ciangin Paul pen Rom gammi ahihna a phawk ciangin galkap mangpa zong lau-in a lunghimawh hi. 
Acts22:30 Jew mite in bang hangin Paul mawhsak ahi uh hiam, ci-in teltakin galkap mangpa in theinuam ahih manin a zing ciangin Paul a khihsakna sikkhaute sutsak a, siampi liante le upate thu kikupna a nei dingin a samsak hi. Tua ciangin Paul paikhiatpihin uliante mai-ah a dingsak hi." 
Acts23:1 Paul in ulian kikhawmte limtakin enin, “Lawmte aw, tuni ciang dong ka nuntak sung tawntung, Pasian mai-ah kisuanna ka nei het kei hi,” a cih leh" 
Acts23:2 siampi lianpen pa Ananias in Paul gei-a omte kiangah, “A muk na betsak un,” a ci hi." 
Acts23:3 Paul in, “Leikang tawh a kizut kulh tawh a kibang pa aw, Pasian in nang hong beenggawp taktak ding hi. Keimah thusitna-ah Thukham a zui ding pa hinapi-in Thukham zui loin kei hong kibet nadingin thu na pia hi,” a ci hi." 
Acts23:4 Paul gei-a om mite in, “Pasian’ siampi lianpen pa na zahko hi,” a cih ciangun" 
Acts23:5 Paul in, “Lawmte aw, siampi lianpen pa ahihlam ka thei kei hi. Lai Siangtho in, ‘Na mite uh a ukpa na gensia kei ding uh hi,’ ci hi,” ci-in a dawng hi." 
Acts23:6 Paul in tua uliante lakah Saddusi mi le Farisi mi a omlam a muh ciangin amaute kiangah, “Lawmte aw, kei pen Farisi mite’ suan ahi Farisi mi ka hi hi. Mi site hingkik ding hi, ci-in lamenin upna ka neih manin hih lai-ah thusitna ka thuak hi,” a ci hi." 
Acts23:7 Tua thu a gen khit phetin Saddusi mite le Farisi mite kitawngpah uh a, tua uliante khen nih a pha uh hi." 
Acts23:8 (Bang hang hiam cih leh Saddusi mite in mi a sih khit ciangin hingkik nawn lo ding hi. Vantung mi ahi a, kha ahi zongin om lo hi, ci uh hi. Ahi zongin Farisi mite in hih thu thumte om hi, ci-in a um uh hi.)" 
Acts23:9 Amau’ kitotna awging hupha semsem a, Farisi mite pawlsung a om Thukham hilh siate pawlkhat hong dingin nakpitakin hong pau uh a, “Hih mipa tungah khialhna themkhat zong om lo hi. Vantung mi ahi a, Pasian’ sawl khat peuhpeuh in ahi zongin ama tungah thu a gen hi khathei ding hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Acts23:10 Amaute’ kitotna hong husia semsem ahih manin amaute in Paul balthanggawp kha ding hi, ci-in galkap mangpa lunghimawh hi. Tua ahih manin galkapte in Paul va kaikhia-in galkap inn-ah a paipih nadingun thu a pia hi." 
Acts23:11 Tua zanin Paul kiangah Topa hong ding a, “Hang takin om in. Hih Jerusalem khua sungah keima thu genin teci na pan’ mah bangin Rom khuapi-ah zong keima thu genin teci na pang ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Acts23:12 A zing ciangin Jew mite pawlkhat kikhawm uh a, Paul i thahkhit ciang bekin anne tuidawn pan ding hi hang, ci-in kiciamna a nei uh hi." 
Acts23:13 Hih bangin a vaihawm mihing sawmli val bang a pha uh hi. 
Acts23:14 Siampi liante le upate kiangah pai uh a, “Paul ka thahkhit mateng uh anletui ka nekloh nadingun khauhtakin thuciamna khat ka nei khin uh hi." 
Acts23:15 Tu-in note le uliante in galkap mangpa tungah thu zasak unla, Paul’ thu a cingin a theinuam kineihin, note kiangah Paul hong paipihsak nadingin na ngen un. Hih lai mun hong tunma-in kote in lamkalah ka na that ding uh hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Acts23:16 Ahi zongin hih a thahsawmna thu uh, Paul sanggamnu’ tapa in za ahih manin galkap inn-ah va pai-in Paul kiangah a va gen hi." 
Acts23:17 Tua ciangin Paul in galkapbute khat samin ama kiangah, “Galkap mangpa kiangah hih tangvalpa va paipih in. Amah in thugen ding khat a nei hi,” a ci hi." 
Acts23:18 Galkap bupa in zong galkap mangpa kiangah va paipih a, “Hih tangvalpa in nang tungah gennop khat hong nei ahih manin nang kiangah kong paipih nadingin thongkia Paul in a hong sawl hi,” a ci hi." 
Acts23:19 Galkap mangpa in zong a khutin tua pa lenin amau gel guak paikhia uh a, “Bang hong gennuam na hi hiam?” ci-in a dong hi." 
Acts23:20 Tangvalpa in, “Uliante in Paul’ thu a cingin a theinuam kineihin, zing ciangin amaute kiangah Paul na paisak nadingin Jew mi aana neite in nget ding a thukim uh hi." 
Acts23:21 Ahi zongin lamkalah Paul a pangsim dingin mihing sawmli val bang om uh ahih manin amaute’ hong ngetna pia kei in. Tua mihing sawmlite in Paul a thahkhit mateng uh anletui a nekloh nadingun kiciamna khat bawlkhin uh hi. Amaute a kithawisa-in om uh a, nangma thupiak ding bek a ngak uh ahi hi,” a ci hi." 
Acts23:22 Tua ciangin galkap mangpa in tangvalpa kiangah, “Kei kiangah hih thu nong kohna thu kuamah theisak kei in,” ci-in a vaikhak khit ciangin a ciahsak hi." 
Acts23:23 Tua ciangin galkap mangpa in galkapbute nih samin, “Sisaria khua-ah a pai ding galkap zanih sam unla, sakol tung tuang galkap sawmsagih le teitawi galkap zanih tawh zong pai unla, tuzan nai kua hunin ding khia un." 
Acts23:24 Paul’ tuan nading sakol pawlkhat zong keng unla, Menzipa Feliks kiangah hoihtakin va tunpih un,” a ci hi." 
Acts23:25 Tua ciangin galkap mangpa in hih a nuai-a bangin lai khat gelh hi: 
Acts23:26 “A Lian Menzipa aw, Keimah Klaudias Lysias in hopihna lai ka hong gelh hi." 
Acts23:27 Jew mite in hih mipa manin that dektak uh hi. Rom gammi ahihlam ka theih ciangin ka galkapte tawh pai-in ka va honkhia hi. 
Acts23:28 Amaute’ mawhsakna bang thu ahi hiam, ci-in theinuam ka hih manin thusit dingin amau’ uliante kiangah ka paipih hi." 
Acts23:29 Thong khiat nading le sihna thuak nadingin khialhna a bawlna bangmah ka mu kei hi. A mawhsaknate uh amau’ thukham ngeina tawh kisai hi lel hi. 
Acts23:30 Jew mite pawlkhat in amah a thahsawmna thu hong kikoh ciangin nangma kiangah puak dingin ka ngaihsun hi. Amah a mawhsakte in nangma mai-ah thu a hong gen nadingun amaute kiangah ka gen hi,” ci-in a gelh hi." 
Acts23:31 Galkapte zong a thu ngahna bangun gamta uh a, tua zanin Paul paikhiatpihin Antipatris khua dong a paipih uh hi." 
Acts23:32 A zing ciangin khe galkapte kilehkik uh a, sakol tung tuang galkapteng bek a kha suaksak uh hi." 
Acts23:33 Amaute in Sisaria khua-ah Paul tunpih uh a, menzipa kiangah a lai puak uh pia-in, ama tungah Paul a ap uh hi." 
Acts23:34 Menzipa in tua laikhak sim a, koi lai gammi na hi hiam, ci-in Paul a dong hi. Amah in Sisaria gammi ahihlam a theih ciangin," 
Acts23:35 “Na langte hong tun ciangin thu kong sit ding hi,” ci-in a gen khit ciangin, Herod in a lam inn sungah Paul koihin a cin nadingun thu a pia hi." 
Acts24:1 Tua khit ni nga ciangin siampi lianpen pa Ananias le upate, amau’ thu a gensak ding Tertullas a kici mipa tawh Jerusalem khua panin Sisaria khua-ah hong tung uh a, menzipa Feliks kiangah pai-in Paul a mawhsakna uh thute a va gen uh hi." 
Acts24:2 Thugen dingin Tertullas a kisawl ciangin hih a nuai-a bangin mawhsakna thu a gen hi: “A Lian Menzipa! Nangma hong makaih siamna hangin hun saupi sung nuamtakin ka omkhin uh a, kote’ gam sung a hoih nadingin puahphatna zong tampi tak kibawl khin hi." 
Acts24:3 Hih thute hangin nang tungah mi khempeuh ka lungdam mahmah uh hi. 
Acts24:4 Na hun tampi tak hong beisak nuam lo ka hih manun thu a tom theithei a kong gennate uh hehpihna tawh nong ngaih nadingin ka hong thum uh hi. 
Acts24:5 Hih mipa, buaina a piangsak, a kihtakhuai mi ahihna ka mu uh hi. Mun khempeuha om Jew mite lakah buaina piangsak a, Nazareth mi pawl a kicite a makai pa ahi hi." 
Acts24:6 Biakinn nangawn thusim loin min siatsak sawm ahih manin amah ka man uh hi. (Komau’ thukham tawh kizui-in ama tungah thu khen ka sawm uh hi. 
Acts24:7 Ahi zongin galkap mangpa Lysias hong pai-in kote kiang panin amah hong kaikhia hi. 
Acts24:8 Tua ciangin amah a mawhsakte, nangma kiangah hong pai nadingin Lysias in thu a pia hi.) Tu-in hih mipa thu sit lecin, ka mawhsakna uh thu khempeuh nangmah in na thei ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Acts24:9 Jew mite in zong panpih uh a, hih a gen khempeuh a man mah ahi hi, ci-in a gen uh hi." 
Acts24:10 Paul in thu a gen nadingin menzipa in a khut tawh a lah ciangin Paul in, “Hih minamte tungah thukhenin sauveipi na omkhitna thu ka hong thei hi; kei hong kimawhsaknate nangma mai-ah pheltheih nading hun ngah ka hih manin ka nuam mahmah hi." 
Acts24:11 Nangmahmah in na theih ding mah bangin, Jerusalem khua-ah Pasian bia dingin ka paina pen ni sawm le ni nih khawng pha pan hi." 
Acts24:12 Biakinnsung ahi a, kikhopna innsung ahi a, khuasung mun khat peuhpeuhah ahi zongin mi khat peuhpeuh tawh ka kitotna ahi a, mihon in thusia a bawl nadingin ka hanthotna ahi zongin, hih Jew mite in hong mu het lo ding uh hi." 
Acts24:13 Tu-a kei hong mawhsaknate uh zong a manna thu hong lakthei het lo ding uh hi. 
Acts24:14 Ahi zongin nangma kiangah kong pulaknop thu in: Amaute in man lo hi, a cih uh tua Thu zui-in kote’ pu le pate’ Pasian ka bia hi. Moses’ Thukham laibu sunga a kigelh thu khempeuh le kamsangte’ laibu sunga a kigelhte khempeuh zong ka um hi." 
Acts24:15 Amaute’ up le lamet mah bangin, Pasian in miphate le misiate a kibangin sihna panin hingkiksak khawm ding hi, ci-in umin ka lamen hi." 
Acts24:16 Tua ahih manin Pasian mai le mite mai-ah lungsim kisuanna a om het lo dingin a tawntungin ka gamta hi. 
Acts24:17 “Jerusalem panin kum tampi sung ka paikhiat khit ciangin ka mipihte a kihuhna sumte a puak ding le gan go-in Pasian a bia dingin Jerusalem-ah ka pai hi. 
Acts24:18 Biakinn sungah keimah kisiansuahna ka bawlkhit hun ciangin amaute in kei hong mu uh a, buaina zong bangmah om lo hi." 
Acts24:19 Tua laitakin Asia gam panin a hong pai Jew mite pawlkhat om uh hi. Kei mawhsak nading thu a neih uhleh amaute mahmah hong pai-in nangma mai-ah hong gen ding uh a kilawm ahi hi. 
Acts24:20 Tua ahih kei leh zong, uliante mai-ah thusitna thuakin ka om laitakin ka mawhna bang mu uh ahi hiam, cih thu hih mite gensak in." 
Acts24:21 Amaute’ mai-ah, ‘Mi site hingkik ding hi, ci-in ka upna hangin kei tungah thu nong khen uh hi,’ ci-in ka gen simloh amaute’ heh nading bangmah om lo hi,” ci-in thu a gen hi." 
Acts24:22 Tua ciangin tua Thu paizia teltakin a thei Feliks in a thusitna hialbawl a, “Galkap mangpa Lysias hong tun ciangin na thu uh kong khensak ding hi,” ci-in a genkhit ciangin," 
Acts24:23 Paul cin ding tavuan a la bupa kiangah thu pia a, “Paul hoihtakin cingsak inla, ahi zongin a lawmte in a kisapna peuhpeuh a piaktheih nadingun kimuh theih nading hun pia zel in,” ci-in a vaikhak hi." 
Acts24:24 Tua zawh a sawt loin Feliks le Jew mi ahi a zi Drusilla, Paul a kikhumna-ah hong pai-in amah samkhiasak uh a, Paul in Jesuh Khrih upna thu a gennate a nupa-un a ngai uh hi." 
Acts24:25 Ahi zongin Paul in thu gengenin, a hoihin a gamtat nading, pumpi ki-uk zawh nading, le hong tung ding Thukhenna Hunte a gen tohtoh ciangin, Feliks hong lau a, “Va paikik phot in. Hun ka ngah ciangin kong samkik ding hi,” ci-in a gen hi." 
Acts24:26 Paul in sumgolh zong hong pia thei leh ci-in ngaihsunkawm ahih manin Paul kiangah va pai zelin a kiho zelzel uh ahi hi. 
Acts24:27 Ahi zongin tua zawh kum nih hong bei ciangin Feliks sepna pen Porsias Festas in hong laih hi. Feliks in Jew mite’ pahtak ding ut ahih manin thong sungah Paul a omsak suak hi. 
Acts25:1 Tua gam a uk dingin Festas hong tunzawh ni thum ciangin Sisaria khua panin Jerusalem khua-ah a va zin hi. 
Acts25:2 Tua lai panin siampi liante le Jew upate in Paul a mawhsakna thu uh ama kiangah na gen uh hi. Amaute in lamkalah Paul thatlum nuam uh ahih manin Jerusalem khua-ah Paul a paisak nadingin Festas kiangah nakpitakin a thum uh hi. 
Acts25:3  
Acts25:4 Festas in, “Sisaria khua-ah Paul kikhum a, kei zong ciahkik baih ding ka hih manin," 
Acts25:5 Paul in khialhna khat peuhpeuh gamta kha ahihleh zong ama khialhna thu a gen dingin na makaite un kei hong zui uh hen,” ci-in a dawng hi." 
Acts25:6 Tua lai-ah Festas ni giat, ni sawm bang a taam khit ciangin Sisaria khua-ah a ciah hi. A zing ciangin thukhen tokhom tungah tu a, ama mai-ah Paul a kipaipih nadingin thu a pia hi." 
Acts25:7 Paul hong kipaipih ciangin Jerusalem khua panin a hong pai Jew mite in amah umcih a, thu lianpipi tawh Paul a mawhsakna uh tampi gen uh a, ahi zongin a mawhsaknate uh man hi, ci-in a lahtel theih uh bangmah om lo hi." 
Acts25:8 Paul in, “Jew mite’ Thukham ahi a, Rom gam uk kumpipa tungah ahi zongin ka khialhna bangmah om het lo hi,” ci-in a kisut hi." 
Acts25:9 Jew mite’ pahtak ding ut ahih manin Festas in Paul kiangah, “Jerusalem khua-ah va pai-in, keima mai mahah hih thute tawh kisai-in thusitna hong kinei leh na ut hiam?” ci-in a dot ciangin" 
Acts25:10 Paul in, “Keimah thu hong kisit nading munin a kilawmna, gam uk kumpipa thukhenna mai-ah ka va ding ding hi. Nangmahmah in zong teltakin na theih ding bangmahin Jew mite tungah bangmah siatna ka bawl kei hi." 
Acts25:11 Thukham palsatin sihna thuak nading thu khat peuhpeuh a gamta hi leng, suahtak nading thu ka gen het kei ding hi. Hih amaute’ hong mawhzonnate a man lo ahihleh zong kuamah in amaute’ khut sungah hong ap zo lo ding uh hi. Gam uk kumpipa tungah a zu ka khan hi,” ci-in a dawng hi." 
Acts25:12 Tua ciangin Festas in, “Gam uk kumpipa tungah a zu khan khin na hih manin ama kiangah na pai ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Acts25:13 Tua zawh tawlkhat khit ciangin gam uk kumpipa’ khutnuai mahah a uksawn Agrippa le a sanggamnu Bernis, a hong tung thak Festas kiangah a hawh dingin Sisaria khua-ah a hong pai uh hi." 
Acts25:14 Tawlkhat a taam khit uh ciangin Festas in tua kumpipa’ kiangah Paul’ thu gen a, “Feliks in thong sunga a na nusiat mi khat hih lai-ah a om hi." 
Acts25:15 Jerusalem khua-ah ka va pai ciangin Jew siampi liante le upate in amah a mawhsakna uh thu tampi gen uh a, amah mawhsakin thu ka khen nading hong gen uh hi." 
Acts25:16 Ahi zongin ke’n ka dawnna-ah, ‘Mi khat peuhpeuh in mawhsakna a thuak ciangin, mawhsakna a thuak pa le a mawhsakte maitang kimu-in thu kisel a, mawhsakna a thuak pa in amah a kiphel theih nading thugenna hun a ngah matengin, mawhsak thukhenna piak ding pen Rom ngeina hi lo hi,’ ka ci hi." 
Acts25:17 Ka cih mah bangin hih lai-ah amaute a hong tun uh a zing ciangin thukhenna tokhom tungah tu pahin, a mipa hong kipaipih nadingin thu ka pia hi." 
Acts25:18 Alangte hong ding uh a, a mawhna a lianpipi hong gen ding uh hi, ci-in ka up leh, tua bang hong hi lo hi." 
Acts25:19 Amau’ thu kituhna pen amau’ biakna thu, le a si khinsa hinapi-in Paul in, ‘Hing hi,’ a cih Jesuh’ thu peuh na hi lel hi." 
Acts25:20 Hih bang thu ka kankhiatna dingzia thei lo ka hih manin Paul kiangah, ‘Hih thute tawh kisai-in thu kisit dingin Jerusalem-ah va pai lecin na ut hiam?’ ci-in ka dot leh amah ut lo hi." 
Acts25:21 Amah in a zu khan a, thong mahah kikoih lai-in gam uk kumpipa in ama thu a khensak nading a ngen hi. Tua ahih manin gam uk kumpipa kiangah ka puakkhiat theih mateng thong sungah a khum nadingun thu ka pia hi,” a ci hi." 
Acts25:22 Tua ciangin Agrippa in Festas kiangah, “Kei mahmah in hih mipa’ thugen zanuam ing,” a cih ciangin, “Zing ciangin na za ding hi,” ci-in a dawng hi." 
Acts25:23 Tua ahih manin a zing ciangin a thupi takin lian bawl mahmahna tawh Agrippa le Bernis hong pai uh a, galkapmangte le khuasung uliante tawh kikhopna inn lianpi sungah a hong lut uh hi. Tua ciangin Festas in Paul hong kitumpih nadingin thu a pia hi." 
Acts25:24 Tua ciangin Festas in, “Kumpi Agrippa le hih lai-a om mi khempeuh aw, hih lai khua hitaleh Jerusalem khua-ah hitaleh Jew mi khempeuh in kei tungah amah mawhsakna thu hong gen uh hih mipa na mu uh hi. Hih mipa hinkhawi ding kilawm lo hi, ci-in amaute awnggawp uh hi." 
Acts25:25 Ahi zongin sihna thuak nadingin ama gamtat khialhna bangmah ka mu het kei hi. Amahmah in gam uk kumpipa tungah a zu khan khin ahih manin kumpipa kiangah puak dingin ka ngaihsutsa ahi hi. 
Acts25:26 Ahi zongin kumpipa tungah bangteng taktak gelh ding cih ka thei kei hi. Tua ahih manin ama thu a kikan khit ciangin ka gelh ding thu ka theih nadingin note mai-ah, a diakdiakin kumpipa Agrippa mai-ah amah kong paipih hi." 
Acts25:27 Bang hang hiam cih leh ama mawhna hih bangteng hi, ci-in gentelna om lopi-in thongkia mi khat, kumpipa kiangah ka puak ding, a thu kicing ka sa zo kei hi,” a ci hi." 
Acts26:1 Tua ciangin Agrippa in Paul kiangah, “Tu-in thugen theih nading hun na nei hi,” ci-in a gen ciangin Paul in a khut zanin a kiphel nading thu hong gen a," 
Acts26:2 “Kumpi Agrippa aw, Jew mite in kei hong mawhsakna thu ka kiphelna dingin nangma mai-ah tuni-in hun ngah ka hih manin hampha ka kisa mahmah hi." 
Acts26:3 Nangmah in Jew mite’ nuntakzia le amau’ thu kituh theihna thute khempeuh limtakin na theih khitsa ahih manin hampha ka kisa diak hi. Tua ahih manin lungduai takin ka thugente nong ngaih nadingin ka hong thum hi. 
Acts26:4 “Jew mite khempeuh in ka neutung a kipan, keima pianna gam le Jerusalem khua-a ka omzia khempeuh hong thei uh hi." 
Acts26:5 Kote’ biakna sungah a hahkat phadiak Farisi pawl a kicite sunga ka om cil a kipanin ka nuntakzia khempeuh, a gennop nak-uhleh hong genthei ding uh hi." 
Acts26:6 Ko Israel minam sawm le nihte in Pasian’ thuciam ngah ding lametna tawh a sun a zanin Pasian ka biabia uh a, ka pu ka pate uh tungah Pasian in a thuciamna ngah ding lamenin ka omna hangin hih lai-ah thusitna thuakin a ding ka hi hi. Kumpipa aw, hih thu ka lametna hangin Jew mite in kei hong mawhsak ahi uh hi." 
Acts26:7  
Acts26:8 Bang hangin no Jew mite in Pasian in misite a thawhkik sakna thu um thei lo na hi uh hiam? 
Acts26:9 “Nazareth khuami Jesuh’ min a siattheih nadingin langpangin nial ding hi, ci-in kei mahmah in ka ngaihsun ngei hi." 
Acts26:10 Tua mah bangin Jerusalem khua sungah ka sempah a, siampi liante tung panin thu ngahna tawh Pasian’ mi tampi thong sungah ka khum hi. Tua mite a sih nadingun thu a kikhen ciangin zong a thukimpih pawl ka hi hi." 
Acts26:11 Kikhopna inn khempeuhah amaute gim ka thuaksak zelzel a, a thu upnate uh ka khawlsak hi. Amaute tungah hehlua mahmah ka hih manin gamdang nangawnah pai-in thu umte ka bawlsia hi." 
Acts26:12 “Hih thu hang mahin siampi liante tung panin thu ngahna lai tawh Damaskas khua-ah ka va pai hi. 
Acts26:13 Tua hi a, kumpipa aw, Damaskas khua ka tunma sun laitakin kei leh ka tonpih mite’ kiimah sun sangin a taangzaw khuavak khat vantung panin hong taangzaih hi." 
Acts26:14 Ka vekpi-un leilakah ka puk uh a, tua laitakin kei kiangah Hebru pau tawh thu hong kigen a, ‘Saul, Saul aw, bang hangin kei hong bawlsia na hi hiam? Bawngtal in a hawlte’ ciangzum peek le na a sakzawk bangin kei’ thu nong nial manin nang a dingin nazaw hi,’ hong ci hi." 
Acts26:15 ‘Topa aw, kua na hi hiam?’ ci-in ka dot ciangin Topa in, ‘Na hong bawlsiat Jesuh ka hi hi." 
Acts26:16 Tu-in tho-in na khe-in ding in. Keima na a sem dingin a hong sawl dingin nang tungah a hong kilang ka hi hi. Tuni-a kei nong muhna thuteng le nang tungah ka hong lah lai ding thu khempeuh, midangte tungah a gen ding na hi hi." 
Acts26:17 Israel mite le Gentail mite lakah nang kong sawl ding a, amaute in nang hong suksiat loh nadingun ka hong kem ding hi." 
Acts26:18 Pasian’ teel mite’ omna mun a amau om nading mun sanah hong om theih nadingun keimah hong upna uh tawh a mawhna uh a kimaisak theihna dingin Satan’ khutsung panin Pasian’ khut sungah a heikhia ding le khuamial panin khuavak lamah hei-in a mit uh khua a musak ding pa na hi hi,’ a hong ci hi." 
Acts26:19 “Tua bang hi a, kumpi Agrippa aw, ka maangmuhna sunga vantung pana hong pai pa’ thugen ka mang hi." 
Acts26:20 Mite a mawhna uh panin kisikin Pasian kiang a zuat nading uh le a kisikna uh a kilatsak nadingun a gamtat ding uh a masa-in Damaskas khua-ah thu hilhin, a zomin Jerusalem khua-ah, tua ciangin Jew mite omna gam khempeuh le Gentail mite lakah thu ka hilh hi." 
Acts26:21 Hih bangin ka thuhilhna hangin biakinn sungah ka om laitakin Jew mite in hong manin thah hong sawm uh hi. 
Acts26:22 Ahi zongin Pasian in tuni ciang dong hong huh ahih manin milian mineu, a kuamah peuh tungah thu a hilh ka hi hi. Keima thuhilhte pen kamsangte le Moses in hong tung ding hi, ci-in a gen thute mah ahi hi." 
Acts26:23 Tua thu in: Khrih pen sihna thuakin a hingkik masa pa hi ding a, Jew mite le Gentail mite tungah hotkhiatna khuavak thu a hong gen pa hi ding hi, cihna thu ahi hi,” a ci hi." 
Acts26:24 Hih bangin amah kiphelna thu Paul in a gen ciangin Festas in, “Paul aw, mihai na hita hi. Na pil sinnateng in mihai hong suaksak ta hi,” ci-in nakpitakin a kiko hi." 
Acts26:25 Ahi zongin Paul in, “Menzi Festas aw, mihai ka hi kei a, lungsim pilin thuman a gen ka hi hi,” ci-in a dawn khit ciangin," 
Acts26:26 “Kumpi Agrippa aw, hih thu khempeuh na theihsa ahih manin nangma mai-ah hangtakin thu ka gen ngam hi. Hih thu pen kuama theih lohna munsimtham a thupiang hi lo ahih manin, a vekpi-in theikhin dingin ka hong um hi." 
Acts26:27 Kumpi Agrippa aw, kamsangte’ thugente um hi lo na hi hiam?” a ci hi." 
Acts26:28 Tua ciangin Agrippa in Paul kiangah, “Hih hun tomno sungin Khristian hong suaksakzo dingin kingaihsun na hi hiam?” a cih ciangin" 
Acts26:29 Paul in, “Nangmah a kipan tuni-a ka thugen a za mi khempeuh hun tomno sung ahi a, hunsau sungin ahi zongin, hih bangin sikkhau hong kikhihna simloh, keimah nong batkim nadingun Pasian kiangah thu ka ngen hi,” a ci hi." 
Acts26:30 Tua ciangin kumpi Agrippa le menzi Festas hong ding uh a, Bernis le a tutpih midangte zong hong ding khia uh hi." 
Acts26:31 Amaute a paikhiat khit uh ciangin, “Hih mipa in thongkiat nading ahi a, sih nading ahi zongin a thuak nadingin bangmah om lo hi,” a kici uh hi." 
Acts26:32 Tua ciangin Agrippa in Festas kiangah, “Gam uk kumpipa Sisar’ tungah a zu na khan khin hikeileh khah ding hi lel hi,” a ci hi." 
Acts27:1 Italy gamah teembaw tawh ka pai ding uh thu a khenkhit uh ciangin Paul le thongkia dangte pawlkhat, “Kumpipa’ Galkapte,” a kici Rom galkapte a uk bu Julias’ khut sungah a ap uh hi." 
Acts27:2 Adramittium khua teembaw khawlna panin Asia gam lam manawh dingin a kithawi teembaw-ah tuangin ka ding khia uh hi. Masedonia gam Thesalonika khuami Aristarkhas in zong kote hong zui hi. 
Acts27:3 A zing ciangin Sidon khua ka tung uh a, Paul tungah bu Julias dik mahmah ahih manin a lawmte tawh a kimu ding le a lawmte in a kisapnate a piaktheih nadingin a paikhiasak hi." 
Acts27:4 Tua lai panin ka ding leuleu uh a, huih in hong maiphut ahih manin Saipras tuikulh pang beelin ka pai uh hi." 
Acts27:5 Silisia le Pamfilia gam tawh a kizom tuipi kantanin ka pai uh a, Lysia gam Myra khua ka tung uh hi." 
Acts27:6 Tua lai panin bupa in Alexandria khua pan Italy gam a manawh ding teembaw khat hong mu ahih manin tua teembaw tungah kote hong tuangsak hi. 
Acts27:7 Tua lai panin ni tampi sung damdamin ka pai uh a, haksapipi-in Nidas khuapi santak ka tung uh hi. Tua lai panin ka paisuaknop uh hangin huih kiphuzo nawn lo ahih manin Krete tuikulh beelin ka sukpai uh a, Salmone leidawk gei tawnin ka paisuak uh hi." 
Acts27:8 Tuipi gei neh cintenin ka pai uh a, Lasia khua tawh a kigamla lo, Khawlmun Nuam a kici khua khat, haksapipi-in ka tung leuleu uh hi." 
Acts27:9 Tua lai-ah ni tampi sung taam ka hih manun Mawhmaisak Ni hun nangawn khengkhin ahih manin teembaw tawh pai lai ding lauhuai ta hi. Tua ahih manin Paul in amaute kiangah," 
Acts27:10 “Lawmte aw, tu-in teembaw tawh khualzin ding lauhuai ta a, teembaw le a vanpuakte a siat gen loh, mihing mahmah in zong i sihlawh ding lauhuai hi,” ci-in a ngaihsutna a gen hi." 
Acts27:11 Ahi zongin galkap bupa in Paul’ thugen sangin teembaw ukpa le teembaw nei pa’ thugen umzaw hi. 
Acts27:12 Phalbi hun sungteng tua ka khawlna mun uh belh dingin hoih lo ahih manin, mi tampite’ ngaihsutna-ah, paikhia-in ahih theih le Foenik teembaw khawlna ciang tunzawh nading hanciam ding hoihsa uh hi. Tua lai mun pen Krete tuikulh-ah teembaw khawlna khat hi a, khang nitumna pan sak nitumna lam a nga teembaw khawlna ahih manin phalbi hun sungteng nuamtakin tua lai-ah a ki-om thei ding ahi hi." 
Acts27:13 Leitaw lam panin huih hong nun’ hiauhiau ciangin ei’ deihna bang hi, ci-in ngaihsun uh ahih manin teembaw khihna sikkawipi kaikhiato uh a, Khawlmun Nuam panin Krete tuikulh a kineh thei zahzahin nehkawmin ka pai uh hi." 
Acts27:14 Ahi zongin a sawt kihal loin, “Leilu Nisuahna Huihpi,” a kici huihpi hat mahmah khat tuikulh lam panin hong nung hi." 
Acts27:15 Teembaw hong mutgawpsak ahih manin nangzo nawn lo a, cih nading kithei nawn lo ahih manin ama hong mutna tuipi lamah ka zui lel uh hi." 
Acts27:16 Kauda tuikulh leitaw lampang san ka tun uh ciangin tua tuikulh in huihpi tawm khat hong dal ahih manin, teembaw tawh a kikhihkhawm gunkuang a siatloh nadingin haksapipi-in ka huzo uh hi." 
Acts27:17 Teembaw tungah gunkuang a koih khit uh ciangin, teembaw a kitapkhak leh cihna-in a kimkotah khauhual tawh a gak uh hi. Libya gam tui daina sehnel lakah awk kha ding, ci-in lau uh ahih manin teembaw puanzaak khiasuk uh a, huih mutna tawh damdamin a paisak uh hi." 
Acts27:18 Huihpi dai thei tuan lo ahih manin a zing ciangin teembaw puak vante tui sungah a lawnkhia uh hi. 
Acts27:19 A thai ciangin teembaw vanzatte pawlkhat, a khut mahmah uh tawh tui sungah khia leuleu uh hi." 
Acts27:20 Ni tampi sung ni ahi a, aksi ahi zongin mu loin huihpi nakpitakin hong nung tawntung ahih manin suahtak zawh nading lametna peuhmah om nawn lo hi." 
Acts27:21 Teembaw hawlte an ne loin sauveipi a omkhit uh ciangin amaute mai-ah Paul hong ding a, “Lawmte aw, keima thugen hong mangin Krete tuikulh panin a paikhia lo hi lehang, hih siatna le supna khempeuh tawh i kipelh ding hi." 
Acts27:22 Ahi zongin tu-in note lunghimawh kei un. Teembaw sia bek ding a, mihing a si kuamah om lo ding hi." 
Acts27:23 Bang hang hiam cih leh kei tawh a kipawl ka biak Pasian’ vantungmi, tuzanin ka kiangah hong pai a," 
Acts27:24 ‘Paul aw, lunghimawh kei in. Gam uk kumpipa mai-ah na ding ding a, Pasian in nang hong hehpih ahih manin nang le na khualzinpihte khempeuh na suakta ding uh hi,’ hong ci hi." 
Acts27:25 Tua ahih manin lawmte aw, kuamah lunghimawh kei un. Kei tungah hong gen bangin hong piangsak ding hi, ci-in Pasian ka muang hi." 
Acts27:26 Tuikulh gei khat peuhpeuhah huih in hong tun hamtang ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Acts27:27 Tua bangin huihpi’ mutin Mediterranean tuipi tungah teembaw tawh ka laam zawh uh a zan sawm le li zankim laitakin lei tawh kinaita hi hang, ci-in teembaw hawlte in a ummawh uh hi." 
Acts27:28 Khau mongah sik khihin tui thukna a teh uh ciangin pi za le sawmnih thuk a, a den zek ciangin teh leuleu-in pi sawmkua a thuk hi." 
Acts27:29 Ka teembaw uhleh suang a kitahkhak ding lau uh ahih manin teembaw nunglam panin teembaw khawlsakna sikkawipi li khiasuk uh a, khuavak ding ngakin ka om uh hi." 
Acts27:30 Teembaw panin teembaw hawlte taikhiat sawm uh ahih manin teembaw tung panin gunkuang khiasuk uh a, teembaw mailam panin a khawl nading sikkawipi a khiasuk ding kineih uh hi." 
Acts27:31 Ahi zongin Paul in galkap bupa le galkapte kiangah, “Teembaw hawlte teembaw tungah hong om nawn kei leh na suaktazo kei ding uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Acts27:32 Tua ahih manin galkapte in gunkuang a kikhihna khau sattatin a khahkhia uh hi. 
Acts27:33 Khua a vak kuan ciangin mite in an a nek nadingun Paul in hanthawn a, “An ne lo tui dawn loin lungkhamin na omzawh uh tu-in ni sawm le li a phak ni hi ta hi." 
Acts27:34 An na nek nadingun ka hong thum hi. An ne loin na nungta zo kei ding uh hi. Tutungin bangmah na ci peuhmah kei ding uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Acts27:35 Hih bangin thu a gen khit ciangin Paul in anlum la a, amaute khempeuh mai-ah Pasian tungah a lungdamna ko-in a anlum balnenin ne dingin a kipan hi." 
Acts27:36 Amaute khempeuh zong a lungsim uh hong nuam a, an a ne ciat uh hi." 
Acts27:37 Tua teembaw sunga om mi a vekpi-in zanih le sawmsagih le guk ka pha uh hi. 
Acts27:38 Mi khempeuh in an a kinek khit ciangin teembaw a zan nadingin a sunga mangbuhte a lawnkhia uh hi. 
Acts27:39 Khua hong vak ciangin koi lai gam hiam, cih teembaw hawlte in thei tuan lo uh hi. Ahi zongin tuidawk le a gei-a leilak mu uh a, ahih theih leh tua lai-ah teembaw khawlsak dingin a ngaihsun uh hi." 
Acts27:40 Tua ahih ciangin teembaw khihna sikkawipi khaute sattatin tui sungah khiasuk uh a, teembaw heina a kizang sing peekpi khihna khaute zong a sut uh hi. Tua ciangin huih in hong mutin tui gei lamah ka pai theih nadingun a mailam a teembaw puan a sang khai uh hi." 
Acts27:41 Ahi zongin teembaw in sehnel hong phukha-in a tum hi. Teembaw mailam lei sungah tumin taang thei nawn lo a, teembaw nunglam pen tuihual in hong satkham gawp hi." 
Acts27:42 Thongkia mi khempeuh tui peekin a taimang ding uh lau uh ahih manin galkapte in thongkiate thah a sawm uh hi. 
Acts27:43 Ahi zongin galkap bupa in Paul suaktasak nuam ahih manin tua bangin a thah ding uh a kham hi. Tua ahih manin tuipeek thei khempeuh in teembaw panin a nawlah tui va peekin," 
Acts27:44 adangte in teembaw sing kitamte lenin a om nadingin thu a pia zaw hi. Tua bangin ka vekpi-un tui gei-ah ka suakta uh hi. 
Acts28:1 Leilak ka tunkim khit uh ciangin tua mun pen Malta tuikulh ahihna thu ka thei uh hi. 
Acts28:2 Tua lai-a teng mite ko tungah hong nuam mahmah uh hi. Guahzu-in khua dam mahmah ahih manin meiphualpi hong cihsak uh a, limtakin zin hong do uh hi." 
Acts28:3 Paul in singkang pawlkhat khawmin meipi tungah hong koih a, a mei sa sa ahih manin gul khat hong taikhia-in Paul’ khut a vial hi." 
Acts28:4 Tua lai-a teng mite in Paul’ khut tunga gul kivial a muh uh ciangin, “Hih mipa pen mi that hi takpi ding hi. Hih tuipi lauhuai panin a suahtak hangin a thuman pasian in hingsak tuan lo ding hi,” ci-in khatlekhat a kikum uh hi." 
Acts28:5 Ahi zongin Paul in meikhuk sungah tua gul singkhia a, bangmah a ci kei hi." 
Acts28:6 Paul pen a ci hong bawkgawp ding hi. Tua ahih kei leh zong hong si-in pukgawp ding hi, ci-in um uh ahih manin a en gige uh hi. Ahi zongin sauveipi enenin, Paul tungah thu lamdang a piang bangmah a muh loh uh ciangin a lungsim uh kikheel a, “Hih mipa pen pasian ahi hi,” a ci leuleu uh hi." 
Acts28:7 Tua lai panin a gamla lo mun khatah tua tuikulh hausa pa Publias’ lo a om hi. Amah in limtakin kote zin hong do a, ni thum sung ama zinin ka om uh hi." 
Acts28:8 Publias’ pa cisa nat leh gilsan thuahin cina-in lupna tungah a lum hi. Paul zong ama lupna-ah va pai-in thu ngetsak a, a tungah a khut nga-in a damsak hi." 
Acts28:9 Hih bangin a damsak khit ciangin tua tuikulh tunga om cina dang khempeuh zong hong paipih uh a, Paul in amaute a damsak hi." 
Acts28:10 Amaute in na tampi tak hong pia uh a, teembaw tungah ka tuankik uh ciangin lamkal a zat ding a kisam khempeuh hong puak uh hi." 
Acts28:11 Tua lai-ah kha thum ka omkhit uh ciangin Alexandria khua panin a hong pai, tua tuikulh tungah phalbi sung a taam, “Pasian Nih,” lim a kisuang teembaw tungah ka tuang leuleu uh a," 
Acts28:12 Sirakus khua ka tun uh ciangin tua lai-ah ni thum sung ka taam uh hi. 
Acts28:13 Tua panin pai leuleu-in Regium khua ka tung uh hi. A zing ciangin leitaw lam panin huih nun ding hong kipan a, ni nih sungin Puteoli khua ka tung uh hi." 
Acts28:14 Tua khua-ah thu um mi pawlkhat tawh ka kimu uh a, nipikal khat sung hong taam un, ci-in hong kho uh hi. Tua bang danin Rom khua ka tung uh hi." 
Acts28:15 Rom khua-a om ulenaute in kote’ thu na za uh ahih manin pawlkhat in, “Appias Sumbuk,” ciang dong hong dawn uh a, pawlkhat in “Ansai Thumna,” ciang hong ban uh hi. Paul in amaute a muh ciangin Pasian tungah a lungdamna ko a, a lungsim hong nuam mahmah hi." 
Acts28:16 Rom khua ka tun khit uh ciangin Paul pen ama ututna-ah a om theih nadingin thu kipia a, a taikhak loh nadingin galkap khat bek kicingsak hi." 
Acts28:17 A tunzawh ni thum khit ciangin Paul in Jew makaite sam a, amaute hong kikhop ciangin amah in, “Ute naute aw, i mipihte tung ahi a, i pu i pate’ ngeina tawh kisai-in ahi zongin khialhna bangmah nei lo napi-in Jerusalem khua-ah hong kimanin thongah hong kikoih a, Rom kumpite’ khut sungah hong ki-ap hi."
