Acts28:18 Kei thu hong sit uh ciangin sihna ka thuak nading thu bangmah om lo ahih manin hong khahkhia nuam uh hi. 
Acts28:19 Ahi zongin kei hong kikhah ding thu-ah i Jew mipihte a lungkim loh uh ciangin i mipihte tungah mawhsak nading thu bangmah ka neih loh hangin gam uk kumpipa Sisar tungah a zu ka khan loh hong phamawh hi. 
Acts28:20 Israel mite in a lamet uh mipa’ hangin sikkhau khihna thuakin thongkia mi ka suak hi. Hih thute khempeuh note kiangah hong gennuam ka hih manin a hong samsak ka hi hi,” a ci hi." 
Acts28:21 Tua ciangin amaute in, “Judea gam panin nangma thu tawh kisai-in lai bangmah ka ngah kei uh a, tua gam panin a hong pai i mipihte tung panin zong nang hong kimawhsakna kam ahi zongin bangmah ka za kei uh hi." 
Acts28:21 Tua ciangin amaute in, “Judea gam panin nangma thu tawh kisai-in lai bangmah ka ngah kei uh a, tua gam panin a hong pai i mipihte tung panin zong nang hong kimawhsakna kam ahi zongin bangmah ka za kei uh hi." 
Acts28:22 Ahi zongin tu-a nangma kipawlna mite’ thu pen a koimah peuhah mi khempeuh in gensia uh ahih manin nangma ngaihsutna taktak ka zanuam uh hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Acts28:23 Tua ahih manin Paul tawh a kimuh nading uh a ni khat seh uh a, tua a kiciam ni-un Paul a zintunna munah Jew mite tampi tak a kikhawm uh hi. Paul in zingsang a kipan nitak dongin amaute tungah Pasian’ Ukna thu gentel a, Jesuh’ thu man hi, ci-in a uptheih nadingun Moses Thukham le kamsangte’ laigelhte siksanin a gen hi." 
Acts28:24 Pawlkhatte in Paul’ thugente um uh a, ahi zongin pawlkhat in um lo uh hi." 
Acts28:25 Tua ciangin Paul in, “Kha Siangtho in kamsang Isaiah tungtawnin na pu na pate uh tungah a thugen man mahmah hi. Tua a genna-ah, ‘Pai inla, hih mite tungah hih bangin va gen in: Thu na ngaihngaih uh hangin na tel kei ding uh a, na etet uh hangin na mu kei ding uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh hih mite lungsim mawk a, a bil uh humcip uh a, mitsicip uh hi. Tua bang hi kei le-uh, a mit un khua mu ding a, a bil un khua za ding a, a lungsim un thu mu thei ding hi. Tua bang hileh kei lamah hong kihei ding uh a, keimah in amaute ka damsak ding hi,’ ci-in a gen hi,” a cih khit ciangin amaute khatlekhat kithutuak loin a paikhia uh hi." 
Acts28:26  
Acts28:27  
Acts28:28 Tua ciangin Paul in, “Tua ahihleh tu-in Gentail mite tungah Pasian’ hotkhiatna thu kigen ta ding hi. Amaute in um ding uh hi. Hih thu hoihtakin thei un,” ci-in a thugenna a khum hi." 
Acts28:29 (Paul in hih thu a gen khit ciangin Jew mite khatlekhat kitawng gawpin a ciah uh hi.) 
Acts28:30 Paul kum nih sung ama saptawm inn sungah amah bekin om a, ama kiangah a hawh khempeuh tawh thu a kikum hi." 
Acts28:31 Amah in Pasian’ Ukna thu le Topa Jesuh Khrih’ thu, hangtakin a ututin genin a hilh hi." 
Romans1:1 Pasian kiang panin a hong pai Lungdamna Thu a hilh dingin Pasian’ teelna tawh sawltak ahi, Jesuh Khrih’ sila keimah Paul in lai ka hong khak hi." 
Romans1:2 Pasian in kamsangte tungtawnin hih Lungdamna Thu a gensa hi a, Lai Siangtho sungah a omsa thu ahi hi." 
Romans1:3 Tua thu pen eite’ Topa Jesuh Khrih ahi ama Tapa’ thu ahi hi. Tua Tapa pen leitung silesa lam panin David’ suan hi a," 
Romans1:4 Kha Siangtho thu lamsangah ci lehang misite lak panin vangliatna tawh a thawhsakkikna hangin Pasian’ Tapa ahihna thu Pasian in a kilangsak hi. 
Romans1:5 Minam khempeuh in ama thu umin a zuihtheih nadingun Khrih hangin sawltak nasep sep theih nading hamphatna thu Pasian in Khrih’ na sep nadingin kote a hong pia hi. 
Romans1:6 Pasian’ sapna za-in Jesuh Khrih tawh a kipawl Rom khua-a a om note khempeuh zong tua minamte sungah a kihel na hi uh hi. 
Romans1:7 Tua ahih manin Pasian in hong it a, ama mi dingin a hong sap, no Rom khua-a a om Khristiante khempeuh tungah lai ka hong khak hi. I Pa Pasian le Topa Jesuh Khrih in note tungah dikna le nopsakna thupha hong tungsak tahen." 
Romans1:8 Jesuh na upna thu uh leitung mi khempeuh in gen belin nei uh ahih manin tua Jesuh hangin Pasian tungah ka lungdamna thu koh belin ka nei hi. 
Romans1:9 Ama Tapa hangin Lungdamna Thu ka lungsim khempeuh tawh hilhin a na ka sep Pasian in hih ka thugente a man taktak ahihna thu hong thei hi. 
Romans1:10 Thu ka nget simin note ka hong phawk tawntungna le ama deihna ahih nakleh khatvei teitei ciangin note kiangah ka hong paitheih nading ka utna thu Pasian in a thei hi. 
Romans1:11 Kha thu-ah note na thahat theih nadingun Pasian in a hong piak thuphate hong genpih nuam ka hih manin note tawh kimuh ding ka ut mahmah hi. 
Romans1:12 Tua bang ka cih ciangin kei’ upna in note hong thakhauh sakin, note’ upna in zong kei hong thakhauh sakin, phattuamna i ngah tuak theih nading ka deihna ahi hi." 
Romans1:13 Khrih sungah sanggamte aw, Gentail midangte lakah thu um mi ka ngah mah bangin note lakah zong ngah ding lametna tawh note kiangah pai ding tam veipi ka geel zel hangin ka hong pai theih lohna thu nong theih ding uh ka ut hi." 
Romans1:14 Nuntakna sang mite le nuntakna niam mite, mipilte le mihaite, a kuamah peuh ka huh ding ka tavuan ahih manin," 
Romans1:15 Rom khua-a a om note tungah zong Lungdamna Thu hilh ding ka lawp mahmah hi. 
Romans1:16 Lungdamna Thu ka muang mahmah hi. Tua thu pen a masa-in Jew mi, tua zomin minam dangte, thu um mi khempeuh a honkhiazo Pasian’ vangliatna ahi hi." 
Romans1:17 Lai Siangtho sungah, “Pasian a upna hangin amah tawh pawlkhat ahi mite nungta ding hi,” ci-in a kigelh mah bangin Pasian in amah tawh a kipawl theih nadingin mite a bawlna zia, lungdamna thu in hong kilangsak hi. Tua pen, a patna panin a tawp dongin upna hang bek tawh ahihna thu hong laktel hi." 
Romans1:18 Mihingte in a mawhna le a gitlohna hangun Pasian’ thuman seelcip uh ahih manin van panin a hehna hong kilang sakin a gimpiakna dingzia hong kilangsak hi. 
Romans1:19 Pasian mahmah in amaute tungah limtakin laktel ahih manin Pasian’ thu teltakin a theih khit uh ciangin a gamtatna uh ahih manin Pasian in gim a pia ahi hi. 
Romans1:20 Pasian in leitung a piansak cil a kipanin a kimu thei lo ama pianzia ahi tawntung vanglianpa le Pasian ahihna thute ama bawlsa nate tung panin teltakin hong kilang hi. Tua ahih manin, “Thei kei ing,” ci-in paulap a zontheih nading uh om lo hi." 
Romans1:21 Amaute in Pasian thei napi-in a zahtak dingun a kilawm bangin zahtak loin, a tungah a lungdam dingun a kilawm bangin lungdam lo uh hi. Amaute in thuhoih ngaihsun nuam lo uh a, a ngaihsutnate uh a mawknapi a suak hi." 
Romans1:22 Amaute pil a kisak mahmah uh hangin a hai mahmah uh ahi hi. 
Romans1:23 A hing tawntung Pasian bia loin, mi, vasa, ganhing, ahih kei leh a bokvak ganhingte tawh a kibang limte a bia zawsop uh hi." 
Romans1:24 Mihingte tua zahta-in hailua uh ahih manin amau ututin a gamtat theih nadingun Pasian in khahkhong vet a, a zumhuai mahmahpi-in a gamta uh hi." 
Romans1:25 Amaute in a man ahi Pasian’ thu um nuam lo uh a, a tawntungin phat dingin a kilawm a Piangsak pa bia loin, Pasian’ bawlsa nate bia-in a zui uh hi. Tu-a bangin hi takpi uh hi." 
Romans1:26 Tua ahih manin amau utna bangin a zumhuaipi-in a gamtat theih nadingun Pasian in a khahkhong hi. A numeite un pasal tawh lupkhop ngeina zang loin a numeipihte mah uh lunggulhin lumkhawm uh a," 
Romans1:27 a pasalte uh zong numei tawh lumkhawm loin pasalte mah lunggulhin lumkhawm uh a, a zumhuaipi-in a gamta uh hi. Tua ahih manin amaute’ gamtatsiatna tawh kituakin Pasian in gim a pia hi." 
Romans1:28 Mite in a man ahi Pasian’ thu ngaihsutin nei nuam lo uh ahih manin amaute’ ngaihsut hoih lo bangin a gamtat theih nadingun Pasian in a khahkhia hi. Tua ahih manin a gamtat dingun a kilawm lopipi-in a gamta uh hi. 
Romans1:29 Siatna nam khempeuh ahi, hoih lohna, huaihamna, khatlekhat kisiatsak nopna, hazatna, mi thahna, kitotna, khemna, a sialam bekbek ngaihsutna, zuau genna," 
Romans1:30 mi gensiatna, Pasian muhdahna, midangte a heh theih a maizum theih nadingin gamtatna, kiphatsakna, kisialhna, thusia bawlna, nu le pate’ thu man lohna," 
Romans1:31 gamtatsiatna, ciampelna, midangte khual lo, hehpihna nei loin, a sia namkim a gamta uh hi." 
Romans1:32 Tua bangin a gamtate in sihna thuak ding hi, ci-in Pasian’ thukhenna thei napi-in, tua bangin amaute a gamtat uh banah, tua bangin a gamtate pakta-in a awi zawsop lai uh hi." 
Romans2:1 Tua ahih ciangin midangte’ thu a khen note pen kuakua hita le-uh cin na suakta tuan kei ding uh hi. Midangte na mawhsakna uh thute mah note zong gamta veve na hih manun, no zong a mawh mah na hi uh hi." 
Romans2:2 Tua bang mawhna a gamtate, Pasian in gim a piak pen a man mah ahihna i thei ciat hi." 
Romans2:3 Midangte a mawhna hangin thu khenin, no zong tua amau mawhnate mah na bawl veve uh ciangin Pasian’ thukhenna tawh kipelh tuan dingin ki-um peuhmah na hi uh hiam?" 
Romans2:4 Pasian migi-in thu a diah hithiatna pen na kisikkik theih nading uh a deihna ahih lamtak phawkkha loin, a migitna, a lungduaina, a hong thuaknate neu ngaihsutkha na hi uh hiam?" 
Romans2:5 Lungsim khauhin na kisik nop lohna hangun Pasian’ hehna le a manin a thukhenna a hong kilat Ni ding ciangin na gimthuak ding uh a nasia semsem dingin a bawl na hi uh hi. 
Romans2:6 Bang hang hiam cih leh Pasian in mi khempeuh a gamtatna uh tawh kizui-in thukkik ding hi. 
Romans2:7 Pahtakna, minthanna, le hin tawntungna deihin a gamtat hoih tawntung mite tungah Pasian in nuntak tawntungna pia ding a," 
Romans2:8 ahi zongin ama deihna bek zui-in, a gamtat dingin a kilawm bangin gamta loin, a man loin a gamta mite tungah Pasian in ama hehna hangin gimna tungsak ding hi." 
Romans2:9 Jew mi a kipan Gentail mi dongin a gamtat sia mi khempeuh in gimna le lungkhamna thuak ding uh hi. 
Romans2:10 Tua mah bangin Jew mi a kipanin Gentail mi dongin a gamtat hoih mi khempeuh in minthanna, pahtawina, le nopsakna ngah ding uh hi." 
Romans2:11 Bang hang hiam cih leh Pasian in kuamah deidan loin mi khempeuh tungah a kibangin thu a khen hi. 
Romans2:12 Moses Thukham a nei lo Gentail mite a khialh uh ciangin thukham nei lopi mahin siatna thuak uh a, Moses Thukham a nei Jew mite a khialh uh ciangin tua thukham tawh kizui-in amaute tungah thu kikhen hi." 
Romans2:13 Thukham zakna bek hangin Pasian tawh kipawlna a piang hi lo a, thukham sunga Pasian’ genna bangin a gamtate bek Pasian tawh a kipawl thei ahi hi." 
Romans2:14 Gentail mite in thukham a neih loh uh hangin amau’ ngaihsut tawmna tawh thukham’ deihna bang a gamtat uh ciangin tua thukham’ deihna a zui uh hi a, thukham a neih loh uh hangin a gamtat dingun a kilawm amau mahmah in a thei tawm uh ahi hi." 
Romans2:15 Amau’ lungsim sungah thukham’ deihnate omkhin ahihna thu a gamtatna un hong kilangsak hi. Amau mahmah zong khat veivei hoih kisa, khat veivei sia kisa uh ahih manin, amau’ lungsim sungah thukham’ deihnate theihna omkhin ahihna thu, hih amau’ kiphawk tawmna lungsim in nakpitakin hong kitelsak hi." 
Romans2:16 Tua ahih ciangin Pasian in mihingte lungsim sunga a ngaihsutnate uh, Jesuh Khrih thu a khensak Ni ciangin, tu-a ka hong gen bang teekteekin a hong piang ding ahi hi." 
Romans2:17 Tu-in Jew mi ka hi uh, a ci note in thukham suan belin nei-in Pasian na theihna uh na kisialhpih uh hi." 
Romans2:18 Thukham thei na hih manun Pasian’ deihnate na thei uh a, a man le a man lo na khenthei uh hi." 
Romans2:19 Mittawte lam a lak ding, khuamial sunga om mite khuavak a musak ding," 
Romans2:20 mihaite a hilh ding, naupangte a hilh dingte ihi a, thukham sunga om thu khempeuh thei-in i gen khempeuh man mahmah hi, ci-in na kimuang uh hi." 
Romans2:21 Midangte a hilh note in, nomau mah kihilh lo ding na hi uh hiam? “Guta kei un,” ci-in mi hilh napi-in nomau mahmah guta hi lo na hi uh hiam?" 
Romans2:22 “Numei tawh mawh kei un,” ci-in mi hilh napi-in nomau mahmah mawh hi lo na hi uh hiam? Milimte mudah napi-in milim biakna inn sunga nate gu hi lo na hi uh hiam?" 
Romans2:23 Note in thukham kisaktheihpih napi-in thukham palsatin Pasian’ min na daisak uh hi. 
Romans2:24 Tua ahih manin Lai Siangtho sungah, “No Jew mite’ hangin Gentail mite lakah Pasian kigensia hi,” ci-in kigelh hi." 
Romans2:25 Thukham zui le-uhcin na vun atna uh man nei takpi mah hi. Ahi zongin thukham na zuih kei uhleh na vun atna uh a mawkna a suak ahi hi. 
Romans2:26 Tua ahih manin vun ki-at lo Gentail mite in thukham a zuih nak-uhleh Pasian in vun at mah bangin ngaihsun ding hi lo ahi hiam? 
Romans2:27 Tua ahih manin thukham nei-in vun ki-at napi-in tua thukham a zui lo no Jew mite pen vun ki-at lo thukham a zui Gentail mite in thu hong khen ding hi lo ahi uh hiam? 
Romans2:28 Bang hang hiam cih leh a pualam beka Jew mi hihna le a pualam vun ki-atna lel bek in Jew mi taktak suaksak zo lo hi. 
Romans2:29 Jew mi taktak i cihte pen, a sunglamah Jew mi ahite ahi hi. A vun ki-atna uh lungsim vun atna hi a, kha thu tawh a kisai ahi hi. Thukham zui-in pumpi tung vun atna pawl hi lo hi. Hih bang mite pen mihingte in phat loin Pasian in phatin a pakta hi." 
Romans3:1 Tua ahihleh Jew mite in Gentail mite sangin bang hamphatna neizaw a, vun ki-atna in bang phattuamna nei ahi hiam?" 
Romans3:2 Lam tampi-ah a phattuamna a om hi. A masa penin, Pasian in Jew mite tungah ama thute a gen hi." 
Romans3:3 Ahi zongin Jew mi pawlkhatte in Pasian’ thuciamna zui lo uh hi. Hih mi pawlkhatte’ thu palsatna hangin Pasian in a thuciamna maimangsak dingin ngaihsun na hi uh hiam? 
Romans3:4 Tua bang hi het lo hi. Lai Siangtho sungah, “Thu na gen peuhmah ciangin a man na genna thu mite in hong thei ding uh a, mite in nang hong mawhsakna na genkik ciangin na kiphellah ding khat beek om lo ding hi,” ci-in a kigelh mah bangin mi khempeuh in zuau a gen zongin Pasian in thuman gen veve ding hi." 
Romans3:5 Pasian a manin gamta ahihna eite’ gamtat khialhna in kilangsak semsem ahih ciangin eite in bang gen ding nei nawn ihi hiam? Pasian in eite gim a hong piak ciangin a thuman lo ahi hiam? (Hih bangin thu ka gen ciangin leitung mihingte’ kammal zat ngeite a zang ka hi hi.) 
Romans3:6 Gim hong piakna-ah a thuman lo hi het lo hi. A thuman lo hi zenzen leh bangci-in leitung mi khempeuh’ thu khenthei ding ahi hiam? 
Romans3:7 Keima zuautatna in Pasian a thumanna kilangsakin a min thangsak semsem ahihleh bang hangin mawhnei-in kei hong kiseh lailai ahi hiam? 
Romans3:8 Thupha a pian nadingin gamtat sia gamta ni, ci ding ihi hiam? Mi pawlkhatte in tu-a bang teek mahin gen hi, ci-in hong mawhsak uh a, ka heh theihtheih nadingin kam a pau se uh hi. Tua bang mite in amau thuak dingin a kilawm gimna a thuak ding uh hi." 
Romans3:9 Tua ahihleh Gentail mite sangin ko Jew mite hamphazaw ka hi uh hiam? Bangmah hamphatna nei tuan lo hi ung. Jew mite le Gentail mite a kibangin mawhna khut sungah om uh hi, ci-in ka gen khinzo hi." 
Romans3:10 Lai Siangtho sungah zong, “Pasian’ muhna-ah mi man kuamah om lo a," 
Romans3:11 a man a thei kuamah om lo a, Pasian tawh kipawl ding a hanciam kuamah om lo hi." 
Romans3:12 Kuamah in Pasian ngaihsutna nei lo uh a, na-a kimang kuamah om lo a, a hoih gamtat kuamah om lo hi." 
Romans3:13 A kam uh tawh mi that uh a, a kam uh tawh zuauthu gen uh a, a kampaute uh gulgu tawh kibang hi." 
Romans3:14 A kam uh tawh mi samsia uh a, gitlohna bek tawh a kidim uh hi." 
Romans3:15 Mi that pakpak uh a," 
Romans3:16 a paina khempeuh uhah lungkhamna a piangsak uh hi. 
Romans3:17 Nopna a pian nadingin gamta ngei lo uh a," 
Romans3:18 Pasian zahtak ding ngaihsutin nei lo uh hi,” ci-in a kigelh hi." 
Romans3:19 Tua ahih manin kuamah in paulap a zon theih loh nading le mi khempeuh in Pasian’ thukhenna a thuak theih nadingin Thukham a nei mite khempeuh in tua Thukham a zuih ding uh ahihna thu i thei hi. 
Romans3:20 Thukham in mihingte a mawhna kilangsak thei bek ahih manin thukham zuihna hangin kuamah in Pasian tawh kipawl theihna ngah zo lo hi. 
Romans3:21 Ahi zongin tu-in thukham zuihna hang hi loin thudang khat hangin Pasian tawh kipawl theih nading lampi hong kilangzo a, Thukham le kamsangte in zong hih thu-ah teci a pang uh hi." 
Romans3:22 Tua thu in: Jew mi le Gentail mi kuamah a kilamdanna om loin Jesuh Khrih upna hangin mi khempeuh in Pasian tawh kipawl theihna a ngah hi. 
Romans3:23 Mi khempeuh mawh ciat uh a, a hong honkhia Pasian tawh kigamla uh hi." 
Romans3:24 Ahi zongin Pasian in a hong hehpihna hangin Khrih Jesuh tawh hong tatkhiat manin amah tawh i kipawlthei kik hi. 
Romans3:25 Ama hong sihna hangin mawhna a kimaisak theih nadingin Pasian in Jesuh hong pia a, amah a umte in mawhmaisakna a ngah uh hi. Amah tawh i kipawl theih nading zia hong lahna-in hih bangin Pasian a hong gamta ahi hi. Pasian a lungduaina hangin a beisa hunah i mawhnate hong en khong phot hi." 
Romans3:26 Ahi zongin tuhun ciangin Jesuh a um mi khempeuh Pasian tawh a kipawl theih nading le amah thuman ahihna a kilatsak nadingin mihingte’ mawhna tawh kisai-in na hong sem hi. 
Romans3:27 Tua ahihleh mihingte in i kisialhpih ding bang om ahi hiam? Bangmah om lo hi. Bang bulphuh ding ihi hiam? Thukham zuihna bulphuh ding ihi hiam? Hi lo hi. I upna a bulphuh ding ihi hi. 
Romans3:28 Bang hang hiam cih leh mi khatpeuh Pasian tawh a kipawl theihna pen Thukham zuihzawhna hang hi loin upna hang hi, ci-in i genzo hi." 
Romans3:29 Pasian, Jew mite’ Pasian bek hi a, Gentail mite’ Pasian hi lo ahi hiam? Gentail mite’ Pasian zong hi veve hi." 
Romans3:30 Pasian khat bek hi a, a upna uh hangin Jew mite amah tawh a kipawl thei-in a bawl mah bangin Gentail mite zong a upna uh hang mah tawh amah tawh a kipawl thei-in a bawl hi." 
Romans3:31 Tua ahihleh hih upna thu i gen ciangin Thukham a phiat ihi hiam? Hi lo hi; a kipsak semsem ihi hi. 
Romans4:1 Tu-in eite’ pianna i pupi Abraham’ thu ngaihsun ni. Ama tunga thupiang hih bang ahi hi: 
Romans4:2 Abraham in a sepna hangin amah tawh a kipawl dingin Pasian in sang hileh Abraham in kisialhpih ding thu a nei ahi hi. Ahi zongin Pasian’ mai-ah Abraham a kisialh nading bangmah thu om lo hi. 
Romans4:3 Bang hang hiam cih leh Lai Siangtho sungah, “Abraham in Pasian um a, tua a upna hangin Pasian in mihoihin a sang hi,” ci-in kigelh hi." 
Romans4:4 Na a sem mipa a sep thaman kipia hi. Tua a nasepna thaman pen a thalawhsa ahih manin piakkhongin kingaihsutsak lo hi. 
Romans4:5 Ahi zongin Pasian’ maipha ngah nadingin nasepna suang loin upna a suang mipa pen Pasian in mimawh kimlai midik hi, ci-in sang ahih manin, amah tawh a kipawl theih nadingin Pasian in tua mipa’ upna thupi san hi." 
Romans4:6 Tua ahih manin nasepna hang tawh hi loin Pasian in mi khat midikin a sanna hangin David in zong a lungdamna thu na gen a," 
Romans4:7 “Pasian in a mawhnate maisakin a khialhnate a seelcipsak mite thupha ngah ahi uh hi. 
Romans4:8 Topa in a mawhnate a ciamtehsak loh mipa, thupha ngah ahi hi,” a ci hi." 
Romans4:9 David in a gen hih thupha pen vun ki-atte bek in ngahthei ahi hiam? Hi lo hi; vun ki-at lote in zong ngahthei uh hi. Lai Siangtho in, “Abraham in Pasian um a, tua a upna hangin Pasian in mihoihin a sang hi,” ci hi, ci-in i gen khinzo hi." 
Romans4:10 Hih mihoihin a san bang hun ahi hiam? Abraham a vun a ki-at ma ahi hiam, a ki-at zawh ahi hiam? A vun a ki-at khit hi loin a ki-at ma ahi hi." 
Romans4:11 Abraham a vun a ki-at ma-in a upna hangin Pasian in mihoihin a sanna lahtel nadingin a vun a kinung-at ahi hi. Tua ahih manin vun a ki-at loh hangin a upna uh hangin mihoihin a kisang mite khempeuh a dingin Abraham pen kha thu lamah pupi ahi hi. 
Romans4:12 A vun a ki-at ma-in i pupi Abraham a upna hangin a gamtat mah bangin a gamta, a vun a ki-at mite a dingin zong Abraham pen pupi mah ahi hi. Tua pen vun ki-at lelna hang hi loin upna hang ahi hi." 
Romans4:13 Abraham le a suan a khakte in leitung luah ding hi, ci-in Pasian in thu a ciamna pen Abraham in Thukham a zuihna hang hi loin, a upna hangin Pasian in mihoihin a sanna hang ahi hi." 
Romans4:14 Thukham zuihna hangin Pasian’ thuciamnate a kingah ding hileh mite’ upna pen a kimanna om loin, Pasian’ thuciamnate zong a mawkna suak ding hi." 
Romans4:15 Thukham in Pasian’ heh nading piangsak hi. Ahi zongin thukham om kei leh thukham zui lo cih zong om thei lo hi. 
Romans4:16 Tua ahih manin Abraham’ suanlekhakte khempeuh tungah Pasian’ hehpihna piakkhong a suahtheih nadingin Thukham a zuite bek in ngah loin, Abraham’ up bangin a umte in zong a ngahtheih nadingun upna bulphuhin thuciamna kipia hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Abraham pen kha thu lamah eite khempeuh’ pupi ahi hi." 
Romans4:17 Lai Siangtho sungah zong, “Minam tampite’ pupi dingin ka hong bawl khin hi,” ci-in a kigelh hi. Tua hi a, bangmah a om nai lopi a thupiakna tawh a omsak thei, a site a hingsak thei, Abraham in a up Pasian’ muhna-ah hih thuciamna kipin a kizang ahi hi." 
Romans4:18 Lai Siangtho sungah, “Na suanlekhakte aksi zahin tam ding hi,” ci-in a kigelh mah bangin tua bang a piantheih nading lametna a om nai lopi mahin Abraham in umin lamen ahih manin minam tampite’ pupi a suak hi." 
Romans4:19 Abraham kum zakhat bang pha dektak ta a, a si dektak ta ahihna le a zi Sarah a ciinna thute a theih hangin a upna kiam tuan lo hi." 
Romans4:20 Amah in Pasian’ thuciamna muanlah dingin ngaihsun lo a, a upna khahsuah het lo hi. A upna hangin thakhauh semsemin Pasian a phat hi." 
Romans4:21 Pasian in a thuciamsa tungsakzo taktak ding hi, ci-in a muang hi." 
Romans4:22 Tua ahih manin, “A upna pen hoihna-in Pasian in a sang hi,” ci-in kigelh hi." 
Romans4:23 “A upna pen hoihna-in kisang,” ci-in a kigelh ciangin ama a’ ding bekin a kigelh hi lo hi." 
Romans4:24 Sihna panin i Topa Jesuh a hingsak pa a um eite khempeuh zong i upna hangin mihoihin hong kisang ding hi, ci-in eite a dingin zong a kigelh ahi hi." 
Romans4:25 Eite’ mawhna hangin a si dingin Jesuh kipia a, Pasian tawh eite i kipawl theih nadingin kihingkiksak hi." 
Romans5:1 Tu-in upna hangin Pasian tawh kipawl khinta ihih manin i Topa Jesuh Khrih hangin Pasian tawh a kilemkik ta ihi hi. 
Romans5:2 Ama hangin upna tawh tu-a i omna Pasian hehpihna sungah a tung ihi a, Pasian tawh minthanna ngahkhawm ding, ci-in lamen ihih manin i lung a dam hi." 
Romans5:3 Haksatna i thuak laitak nangawnin i lungdam veve hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh haksatna in thuakzawh hatna piangsak a," 
Romans5:4 thuakzawh hatna in Pasian’ pahtakna hong ngahsak a, ama hong pahtakna in lametna lianpi hong neisak ahihna thu i thei hi." 
Romans5:5 Pasian in eite tungah a hong piak a Kha Siangtho tawh eite sungah ama itna hong guang ahih manin hih lametna in eite hong lungkiasak ngei lo hi. 
Romans5:6 Eite cimawhin i om laitakin Pasian’ hoihsak hunin ei mi gilote a dingin Khrih hong si hi. 
Romans5:7 Mihoih khat a dingin a si ngam a omkha ahi zongin thukham zuizo mipa a dingin sih ngam nading a thu haksa mahmah khat ahi hi. 
Romans5:8 Ahi zongin eite mawhna nei ihih laitakin eite a dingin Khrih hong si ahih manin Pasian in eite hong it mahmahna thu hong lak khin hi. 
Romans5:9 Ama sihna hangin tu-in Pasian tawh kipawlthei ihih manin Pasian’ hehna hangin gimna panin zong hong suaktasak zaw kan lai ding hi. 
Romans5:10 Pasian tawh eite i kilangneih laitakin ama Tapa’ sihna hangin amah tawh hong kilemsak ahihleh tu-in Pasian tawh kipawl khinta ihih manin Khrih nuntakna in eite hong honkhiazo zaw kan ding hi lo ahi hiam? 
Romans5:11 Tuateng bek hi lo lai a, Pasian tawh hong kilemsak i Topa Jesuh Khrih hangin Pasian tungah i nuam mahmah hi." 
Romans5:12 Mi khat hangin leitungah mawhna hong om a, tua mawhna hangin sihna hong piang hi. Mi khempeuh mawh uh ahih manin tu-a bangzia-in mi khempeuh tungah sihna hong tung hi." 
Romans5:13 Thukham a om mapekin leitungah mawhna na omkhin a, thukham a om lohna munah Pasian in mawhna a ciaptehna laibu nei lo hi." 
Romans5:14 Ahi zongin Adam hun a kipan Moses hun dongin sihna in mite uk a, Adam in Pasian’ thupiak a man loh manin a khialh bangin a khial nai lo mite nangawn sihna khutnuai mah hi veve uh hi. Adam pen a hong pai lai ding mipa’ lim ahi hi." 
Romans5:15 Ahi zongin Pasian’ hong piak letsong pen Adam’ mawhna tawh kibang lo ahih manin tua tegel tehkak theih ding hi lo hi. Tua mi khat a khialhna hangin mi tampi a sihna pen a man mah ahi hi. Ahi zongin Pasian’ hong itna le hong hehpihna nakpitakin lianzaw lai a, mi khat ahi tua Jesuh Khrih’ hehpihna hangin mi tampi tak tungah hong kipia letsong lian mahmah hi." 
Romans5:16 Pasian’ letsong le mi khat’ mawhna a hatna zia kilamdang hi. Khialhna khat a om khit ciangin, “Mawh hi,” ci-in thukhenna kipia a, ahi zongin khialhna tampi tak a om khit ciangin a kilawm lopi mahin, “Dik hi,” cihna piakkhong thupha a om hi." 
Romans5:17 Mi khat bek’ mawhna hangin sihna in hong uk ahihleh mi khat mah ahi Jesuh Khrih hangin nakpitakin a lian Pasian’ hehpihna le mihoih-a sanna a ngah mite nungta-in thahatzaw kan ding uh hi. 
Romans5:18 Tua hi a, khialhna khat in mi khempeuh tungah thukhenna tungsak ahih mah bangin gamtatna hoih khat mah in mi khempeuh khahin nungtasak hi." 
Romans5:19 Mi khat in thu a man loh manin mi tampi mimawh a suahsak mah bangin mi khat in thu a manna hangin mi tampi in Pasian tawh kipawl theihna a ngah ding uh ahi hi. 
Romans5:20 Khialhna a tam semsem nadingin thukham hong kipia hi. Ahi zongin khialhna a tamna munah Pasian’ hehpihna hong lianzaw zel hi. 
Romans5:21 Tua ahih manin mawhna thahatin hong sihsak mah bangin, i Topa Jesuh Khrih hangin Pasian’ hehpihna thahat zaw lai a, mihoihin hong sangin nuntak tawntungna sung a hong tunpih hi." 
Romans6:1 Tua ahihleh Pasian’ hehpihna a liattheih nadingin mawhna bawlbawl ding ihi hiam? 
Romans6:2 Tua bang hi dek lo ding hi. Mawhna thu-ah a si eite in bangci-in mawhna bawl thei nawn ding ihi hiam? 
Romans6:3 Khrih Jesuh tawh i kipawl theih nadingin ama sungah a kiphum eite pen ama sihna mahah zong a sikhawm ihihlam thei lo na hi uh hiam? 
Romans6:4 I Pa’ vangliatna tawh sihna panin Khrih a kithawhkiksak mah bangin eite zong nuntakna thak i nuntak theih nadingin tui i kiphum ciangin amah tawh kiphum khawmin a sikhawm ihi hi. 
Romans6:5 Bang hang hiam cih leh ama sihna-ah sikhawmin pawlkhat i suah leh amah a thawhkikna-ah zong pawlkhat suakin i thokhawm ding hi. 
Romans6:6 Mawhna khutnuai-ah eite i om nawn loh nadingin mawhnopna lungsim i neihnateng i sucip a, singlamteh tungah Khrih a sih laitak mahin i ngeina luiteng a sisak khawm ihihna thu i thei hi." 
Romans6:7 Bang hang hiam cih leh mi khat a sih ciangin mawhna vangliatna panin a suakta ahi hi. 
Romans6:8 Ahi zongin Khrih tawh i sihkhawm leh amah tawh ei zong i hingkhawm ding hi, ci-in i um hi." 
Romans6:9 Bang hang hiam cih leh sihna panin Khrih kihingkiksak khin a, si kik ngei nawn lo ding hi. Ama tungah sihna in vangliatna nei nawn lo hi, ci-in i thei hi." 
Romans6:10 Ama sihna pen mawhna thu tawh kisai-a sihna hi a, sih kikkik kul loin a kuamah peuh zong khatvei bek a kisi ahi hi. Tu-a a nuntakna pen Pasian’ thu tawh kisai-a nuntakna ahi hi." 
Romans6:11 Tua mah bangin note zong Khrih Jesuh tawh kipawlin mawhna thu-ah si-in, Pasian’ thu-ah a nungta-in na kingaihsut ding uh ahi hi." 
Romans6:12 Tua ahih ciangin na pumpi uh deihna na zuih loh nadingun na pumpi uh, mawhna na uksak nawn kei ding uh hi." 
Romans6:13 Mawhna gamtat nadingin na pumpi nate uh khat beek na zang nawn kei ding uh hi. Note pen misi hinapi-in a kihingkiksak mite bang na hih manun, a hoihin a hong zattheih nadingin na pumpi bup uh Pasian’ tungah na piazaw ding uh hi." 
Romans6:14 Note pen thukham’ sawlna hangin nasem hi loin Pasian’ hong lah thuhoihte’ hangin nasem na hih uh manin mawhna’ sawlna mangin na gamta nawn kei un. 
Romans6:15 Eite pen thukham’ uk hi loin Pasian’ hehpihna in hong uk ahih manin mawhna i gamta kei ding hi. 
Romans6:16 Mi khatpeuh’ thu a mang dingin ama khut sungah na kipiak uh ciangin a thu na mante uh’ sila na hi uh hi. Mawhna na bawl uhleh sihna a thuak ding na hi uh a, thumangin na om uhleh Pasian tawh pawlkhat a suak ding na hi uh hi." 
Romans6:17 Nidangin silate bangin mawhna’ thu a mang hinapi-in, tu-in note tungah a hong kipia thuhilhna kipte, na lungsim khempeuh uh tawh zui na hih manun Pasian tungah i lungdam mahmah hi." 
Romans6:18 Mawhna’ vangliatna panin na suakta khinta uh a, a manin a gamta ding mite na hita uh hi." 
Romans6:19 Note’ theihtheih nadingin nisim nuntakna ziate tawh a hong genteh ka hi hi. Nidang lai-in hoih lohna le gitlohna a gamta dingin na pumpi uh na buppiak uh mah bangin, tu-in a man nate a sem dingin na pumpi uh buppiak unla, nuntakna siangtho nei ta un." 
Romans6:20 Mawhna khut sungah na om laitakun Pasian’ deihna bangin na gamtat ding uh kisam lo hi. 
Romans6:21 Ahi zongin, tuhunin gamtat dingin zumhuai na sakte uh, tuahun lai-in na gamtat manun bang thaman ngah na hi uh hiam? Tua na gamtatna thaman uh sihna ahi hi." 
Romans6:22 Ahi zongin tu-in mawhna bawlnopna panin suakta-in Pasian’ khutsung mi na hita uh hi. Tua thu hangin na ngah uh na pen Pasian a dingin a kipia khin nuntakna hi a, a tawntung nuntakna tawh a kizom ahi hi." 
Romans6:23 Bang hang hiam cih leh mawhna in thaman hong piak pen sihna hi a, ahi zongin i Topa Jesuh tawh i kipawl manin Pasian’ hong piakkhong pen nuntak tawntungna ahi hi." 
Romans7:1 Lawmte aw, note khempeuh in thukham thei na hih manun tu-a kong gen dingte na tel mahmah ding uh hi. Mi khat a nuntak sungteng bek thukham in uk thei hi." 
Romans7:2 Gentehna-in, pasal nei numei khat pen a pasal a nuntak sungteng bek, tua thukham in a pasal tawh lencip hi. Ahi zongin a pasal a sih ciangin tua a pasal tawh a lencip thukham panin a suakta hi." 
Romans7:3 Tua ahih manin a pasal a nuntak hun sungin pasal dang tawh a lupkhop leh mi tawh a mawh kici hi. Ahi zongin a pasal a si hileh thukham tawh kisai-in a suakta hi a, pasal dang a tenpih hangin mi tawh a mawh hi lo hi." 
Romans7:4 Sanggamte aw, note zong tua mah tawh a kibang na hi uh hi. Khrih tawh pumkhat na hihna uh hangin thukham tawh kisai thu-ah a sikhin na hi uh a, Pasian’ nasepna-ah eite a man nei i suahtheih nadingin sihna panin a kithokiksak Khrih tawh nupa na hi uh hi." 
Romans7:5 I leitung lungsim tawh i nuntak laiteng, thukham hangin i hihnop semsem mawhnopnate i gamta a, tuate khempeuh sihna tawh a kizom ahi hi." 
Romans7:6 Ahi zongin nidangin a hong lencip thukham panin Pasian in eite hong suaktasak khin ahih manin tua thukham tawh kisai-ah eite a sikhin ihi hi. Lai sungah a kigelh thukham lui sungah nungta nawn loin, Kha Siangtho’ hong piak nuntakna thakah a nungta ihi hi." 
Romans7:7 Tua ahihleh Thukham mahmah pen a siahuai ahi hiam? A sia hi lo hi. Mawhna bang hiam cih Thukham in hong theitel sak hi. Thukham in, “Hazatna lungsim nei kei in,” ci-in gen lo hileh, haza i cih bang ahi hiam, ci-in ka thei kei ding hi." 
Romans7:8 Thukham a omna hangin mawhna in nuamtak sa-in hazatna a tuamtuam ka neihtheih nading hong piangsak hi. Thukham om kei leh mawhna in bangmah sem thei lo hi. 
Romans7:9 Thukham ka theih ma-in mi nungta ka hi ngei a, thukham ka theih ciangin mawhnopna lungsim hong khangin kei ka si hi." 
Romans7:10 Nuntak ngah nadingin a kibawl thukham pen keima a dingin sihna hong hi zawsop hi. 
Romans7:11 Bang hang hiam cih leh thukham a om manin mawhna in nuamtaksa a, kei hong khemin tua thukham tawh a hong that hi." 
Romans7:12 Tua ahih ciangin Thukham mahmah hitaleh thupiaknate hitaleh hoihin man a, siangtho hi." 
Romans7:13 Tua ahihleh a hoih na khat in kei’ sih nading hong piangsak ahi hiam? Hi lo hi. Tua sihna pen mawhna’ nasepna hi a, mawhna pianzia bangci bang taktak hiam, cih a kitheih nadingin a hoih na khat zangin kei tungah sihna a hong piangsak ahi hi. Tua ahih manin thukham a om manin mawhna a siahuai mahmah ahihna hong kilangzaw kan lai hi." 
Romans7:14 Thukham pen i kha thu tawh kisai hi, ci-in i thei hi. Ahi zongin kei pen leitung pumpi tawh a nungta mi ka hi a, mawhna thu mangin a sal a suak ka hi hi." 
Romans7:15 Ka hihnopteng hihkha loin ka hih nop loh tengkeek mah hih zawsop ka hih manin keima gamtatna mahmah zong ka tel thei kei hi. 
Romans7:16 Ka hih nop lohteng ka hih veve ciangin Thukham a deihhuai khat hi, ci-in ka ngaihsutna hong langsak hi." 
Romans7:17 Tua ahih manin tua bangin a gamta taktak pen kei hi loin ka sunga om mawhna hizaw hi. 
Romans7:18 Ka leitung pumpi sungah a hoih na khat beek om lo hi, ci-in ka thei hi. Ka sungah a hoih gamtatnopna lungsim a om hangin ka hihzo kei hi." 
Romans7:19 A hoih ka gamtatnop teng gamta loin, ka hihnop loh siatnate ka gamta zawsop hi." 
Romans7:20 Ka gamtat nop lohteng ka gamtat veve ciangin tua a gamta pen kei hi nawn loin ka sunga om mawhna a gamta ahihna a hong kilang hi. 
Romans7:21 Tua ahih ciangin a hoih gamta nuam hinapi-in a sia bekbek a gamtakha ka hihna ka thei hi. 
Romans7:22 Ka lungsim tawng taktakah Pasian’ thukham hoih ka sa hi. 
Romans7:23 Ahi zongin kei’ deih loh thudang khat in ka lungsimah na hong sem hi. Tua ka sunga na hong sem pen in mawhna thu-ah kei hong mancip hi. 
Romans7:24 Kei pen a lungkham mi ka hita hi. Kei a hong sisak ding hih lungsim lui panin kua in kei hong honkhiazo ding ahi hiam? 
Romans7:25 I Topa Jesuh Khrih in hong honkhiazo ding ahih manin Pasian tungah ka lung a dam hi. Kei’ omzia taktak ahihleh: Ka lungsim tawh Pasian’ thu ka zui a, ka pumpi in mawhna a piangsak thu a zui hi." 
Romans8:1 Ahi zongin tu-in ahihleh Khrih Jesuh tawh kipawlin a nungta mite pen mawhna thukhenna tawh kipelh hi. 
Romans8:2 Bang hang hiam cih leh Khrih Jesuh tawh a hong kipawlsak Kha Siangtho in mawhna le sihna a piangsak thukham panin kei hong suaktasak khinta hi. 
Romans8:3 Mihingte thahat lo ihih manin Thukham in ahih zawh loh thute Pasian in a hihzo hi. Mawhna a beisak theih nadingin mihingte sunga om mawhna tungah thu a khenna-in ama Tapa hong sawl a, amah pen mihingte’ mawhna lungsim mah a nei-in a hong pai hi." 
Romans8:4 Eite’ deihna bangin nungta loin Pasian’ Kha Siangtho’ deihna bangin a nungta eite sungah Thukham’ deihna teng a kicin theih nadingin Pasian in a Tapa a hong sawl ahi hi. 
Romans8:5 Amau pumpi deihna bangin a nungtate, amau pumpi deihna in a lungsim uh a uk hi; Kha Siangtho deihna bangin a nungtate, Kha Siangtho in amau lungsim a uk hi." 
Romans8:6 I ngaihsutna, i pumpi deihna uksak lehang sihna tawh kizom hi; i ngaihsutna, Kha Siangtho uksak lehang nuntakna le nopsakna tawh a kizom hi." 
Romans8:7 Mi khatpeuh in ama pumpi deihna a ki-uksak ciangin Pasian’ thukhamte zui lo ahih manin Pasian’ gal suak a, a zuihnop hangin zong zui thei lo hi." 
Romans8:8 Amau pumpi deihna bangin a gamtate in Pasian lungdamsak thei lo uh hi. 
Romans8:9 Note sungah Pasian’ Kha Siangtho hong om nakleh nomau pumpi deihna bangin gamta loin Kha Siangtho deihna bangin na gamta ding uh hi. Khrih lungsim a nei lote Khrih tawh kipawl lo hi. 
Romans8:10 Ahi zongin note sungah Khrih hong om leh mawhna hangin na pumpi uh a si veve ding ahi zongin, note pen Pasian tawh kipawlkhin na hih manun note a dingin Kha Siangtho pen nuntakna ahi hi." 
Romans8:11 Sihna panin Jesuh a thokiksak Pasian’ Kha Siangtho note sungah hong om leh sihna panin Khrih a hingkik sakpa mah in note sungah a om ama Kha Siangtho mah tawh a sithei pumpi a hong nungtasak ding hi. 
Romans8:12 Tua ahih ciangin lawmte aw, i pumpi deihna bang zui-in gamtat ding a kiphamawh hi lo hi." 
Romans8:13 Na pumpi uh deihna zui-in na gamtat uhleh na si ding uh a, ahi zongin Kha Siangtho huhna tawh na mawh gamtatnate uh na sihsak uhleh na nungta ding uh hi." 
Romans8:14 Pasian’ Kha Siangtho in a makaih mite, Pasian’ tate ahi uh hi." 
Romans8:15 Note tungah Pasian in a hong piak a Kha Siangtho in note na lau nadingun sila-in a hong bawl hi lo a, Kha Siangtho in Pasian’ tate a hong suaksak ahi zaw hi. Tua Kha Siangtho mah in Pasian pen, “Pa aw, Pa aw,” hong ci theisak hi." 
Romans8:16 Eite, Pasian’ tate ihihna thu eima lungsim bek in a gen hi loin Pasian’ Kha Siangtho in zong hong genpih hi." 
Romans8:17 Eite pen ama ta ihih manin mite a dingin a koih thuphate i ngah banah Khrih a dingin a koihte zong i ngahkhawm lai ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Khrih in a thuak mah bangin i thuak nakleh amah a minthan’ mah bangin ei zong i minthang ding hi. 
Romans8:18 Tuhuna i thuaknate pen Pasian in a hong piak ding minthanna tawh ka ngaihsut khawm ciangin gentham ka sa het kei hi. 
Romans8:19 Pasian’ bawlsa khempeuh in Pasian’ tate a hong kilahkhiat hun ding lawp mahmahin a ngak uh hi. 
Romans8:20 Pasian’ bawlsate, amau utthu tawh hi loin siatna a thuak dingin Pasian mahmah in a ngaihsutsa ahi hi. Ahi zongin lametna omlai hi." 
Romans8:21 Pasian’ bawlsate, nikhat ni ciangin muattheih nading thu panin suakta-in Pasian’ tate tawh a nuam suahtakna a ngahkhawm ding uh hi." 
Romans8:22 Tuhun ciang dong Pasian’ bawlsa khempeuh nupi nausuak ding bangin na sa-in a tauna uh i thei hi. 
Romans8:23 Pasian’ bawlsa nate bek hi lo a, Pasian’ hong piakkhong Kha Siangtho maleep a ngah eite mahmah nangawn in zong, Pasian in ama tate-in hong bawlin i buppi-in a hong suahtaksak ding i ngakkawmin thumin tau-in i om hi." 
Romans8:24 Hih bangin lamenin i upna in eite hong honkhia khin hi. Ahi zongin i lamet pen i muh ciangin tua pen lamet hi nawn lo hi. Kua in a muhsa nate lamen nawn ahi hiam? 
Romans8:25 I muh lohte i lamet ciangin lungduaitakin i ngak thei hi. 
Romans8:26 Tua ahih manin eite bangzahin ginalo hitalehang eite a hong huh dingin Kha Siangtho a hong pai hi. Eite in a kilawm bangin thunget ding nangawn i thei kei a, ahi zongin Kha Siangtho mah in tauna tawh eite a dingin a hong thumsak hi." 
Romans8:27 Kha Siangtho in Pasian’ deihna tawh kizui-in Pasian’ mite a dingin hong thumsak ahih manin mihingte’ lungsimtawng thu a thei Pasian in Kha Siangtho’ ngaihsutna a thei hi. 
Romans8:28 Ama deihna bang a sem dingin Pasian in a hong sap, amah a it eite a dingin na khempeuh a hoihlamin piangsak hi, ci-in i thei hi." 
Romans8:29 Pasian’ Tapa mi khempeuh lakah a upa pen a suahtheih nadingin Pasian in a teelkholhsa mite, a Tapa tawh a kibang dingin a sehsa ahi hi." 
Romans8:30 Tua ahih manin ama sap mite a sehsa hi a, a sap mite amah tawh a kipawlin bawl a, amah tawh a kipawlin a bawl mite ama minthanna zong a hawm hi." 
Romans8:31 Hih teng bang ahih khit ciangin bang gen ding om nawn ahi hiam? Pasian in eite hong koppih peuh leh kua in eite hong zozo ding ahi hiam? 
Romans8:32 Ama Tapa nangawn siit loin eite khempeuh a dingin hong piakhia ahih manin, na dang khempeuh zong hong piazaw kan ding hi lo ahi hiam?" 
Romans8:33 Pasian in mawh lo hi, ci-in a gen khitsa ahih manin, Pasian’ teelsa mite tungah kua in mawhna guanthei nawn ding ahi hiam?" 
Romans8:34 Tua ahih manin kua in amaute tungah thu khenthei nawn ding ahi hiam? Eite a dingin a hong thumsak pa pen Pasian’ taklamah a tu, a sih khit ciangin sihna panin a kihingkiksak Khrih Jesuh hi lo ahi hiam?" 
Romans8:35 Tua ahih manin bangin Khrih’ itna tawh hong kikhensakzo ding ahi hiam? Haksatna, lungkhamna, bawlsiatna, gilkialna, zawnna, lauhuaina, sihnate khat peuhpeuh in hong khenzo ding ahi hiam?" 
Romans8:36 Lai Siangtho sungah zong, “Note hangin sunthapai-in siat nading lauhuaina ka thuak uh a, gawh ding tuu bangin a hong kibawl hi,” ci-in a kigelh hi." 
Romans8:37 Eite a hong it pa’ hangin hih thu khempeuhah a gualzo pente ihi hi. 
Romans8:38 Bangmah in ama hong itna tawh hong kikhensakzo het lo ding hi, ci-in ka thei hi. Sihna, nuntakna, vantung mite, vantung vangliatnate, tuhun nate le a hong tung ding nate," 
Romans8:39 leitung a om nate, leinuai-a om nate, Pasian’ bawlsa nate khat peuhpeuh in i Topa Khrih Jesuh hangin Pasian in eite hong itna tawh hong khenzo het lo ding hi." 
Romans9:1 Kei, Khrih tawh kipawl ka hih manin zuauthu ka gen thei kei hi. Kha Siangtho lamlahna tawh, ka lungsim kitheihna-ah zuau gen hetloin a mantakin ka gen thu in:" 
Romans9:2 Leitung silesa ah ka mipihte a dingin nakpitakin dahin ka lunggimna a khang hi. 
Romans9:3 Hi thei ding hileh amaute’ hoih nadingin keimah in Pasian’ samsiatna thuakin Khrih tawh kikhen nading ciang dong nangawnin amaute ka huhnuam hi. 
Romans9:4 Amaute pen Pasian’ teel Israel mite hi a, Pasian in ama ta-in bawlin a minthanna a hopte, amaute tungah thuciamna bawlin Thukham a piakte, a man taktakin biaktheihna nei-in thuciamna a ngahte," 
Romans9:5 le a thupi pupite’ suanlekhakte hi uh a, leitung silesa tawh kisai-in Khrih zong amau minam sung panin a piang ahi hi. Hih thute hangin mi khempeuh in na khempeuh a uk Pasian phat tawntung ta uh hen! Amen." 
Romans9:6 Ahi zongin Pasian’ thuciamnate a mawkna a suak hi sam lo hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Israel mi khempeuh Pasian’ teel mi hi khin lo hi. 
Romans9:7 Abraham’ suanlekhak khempeuh zong Pasian’ tate hi kim lo hi. Pasian in Abraham kiangah, “Na ta Isaac’ suanlekhakte bek nangma suanlekhakin kisim ding hi,” ci hi." 
Romans9:8 Tua ahih manin leitung ngeina tawh a suak tate pen Pasian’ ta hi lo a, Pasian’ thuciamna tawh kizui-a a suakte bek suanlekhak taktakin a kisim pan hizaw hi." 
Romans9:9 Bang hang hiam cih leh Pasian in hih bangin thuciamna bawl a, “A hun a tun ciangin kong paikik ding a, Sarah in tapa khat a nei ding hi,” ci hi." 
Romans9:10 Tua bek zong hi lo lai hi. Rebekah in eite’ pupi Isaac tawh tapa nih nei hi. 
Romans9:11 Pasian’ teelna pen a teel mite’ nasepna hang hi loin Pasian’ sapna tawh kisaizaw hi, ci-in a kilat nadingin a tate a sia a pha a gamtat theihma, a suahma pek mahin" 
Romans9:12 Rebekah kiangah Pasian in, “A uzaw in a nauzaw’ na sem ding hi,” na ci khinzo hi." 
Romans9:13 Tua mah bangin Lai Siangtho sungah, “Jakob ka it a, Esau ka mudah hi,” ci-in kigelh hi." 
Romans9:14 Tua bang ahihleh Pasian thutang lo hi, a kici thei ding hiam? Kici thei lo ding hi." 
Romans9:15 Bang hang hiam cih leh Pasian in Moses kiangah, “Ka hehpih nopte ka hehpih ding a, ka khasiat nopte ka khasiat ding hi,” ci hi." 
Romans9:16 Tua ahih ciangin mite’ utna le sepna tawh kisai lo a, Pasian’ hehpihna bek tawh kisaizaw hi." 
Romans9:17 Bang hang hiam cih leh Lai Siangtho sungah Pasian in Faro kiangah, “Ka vangliatna lah nading le leitung khempeuhah ka min a kitheih nadingin kong zatnop manin kumpi a hong suaksak ka hi hi,” ci hi." 
Romans9:18 Tua ahih manin Pasian in a hehpih nopte hehpih a, a paupeensak nopte paupeengsak hi." 
Romans9:19 Note in, “Tua bang ahihleh bang hangin Pasian in mi mawhsak thei ahi hiam? Pasian’ cihsa kua in kheelzo ding ahi hiam?” na cinuam kha ding uh hi." 
Romans9:20 Lawmte aw, ahi zongin kua in Pasian’ thu nialngam ding na hi uh hiam? Beel in amah a seekpa kiangah, “Bang hangin tua bangin hong seek na hi hiam?” ci ngei lo hi." 
Romans9:21 Beelseek pa in tungman lomkhat sung panin hun thupi diakin zat ding beel le zat mawkmawk ding beelin a ututin seektheih nading thu a nei hi. 
Romans9:22 Tua mah bangin Pasian in zong a beisa hunah siatna a thuak dingin a kilawm mite susia loin a ki-ipipna mite tungah a hehna le a vangliatna a lahtheih nading thu a neih mah bangin," 
Romans9:23 ama minthanna a lahtheih nadingin ama minthanna a ngah dingin a hong sehsa eite tungah zong ama hehpihna a hong piaktheih nading thu a nei hi. 
Romans9:24 Tua bangin a hong sap eite pen Jew mite sung bek pan hi loin Gentail mite sung panin zong ahi hi. 
Romans9:25 Hosea Lai Siangtho sungah, “Keima mi a hilote, ‘Keima mi,’ ka ci ding a, ka it loh mite, ‘Ka itte,’ ka ci ding hi." 
Romans9:26 ‘Ka mite hi kei uh teh,’ a kicihna leitang teekteek mahah, ‘A nungta Pasian’ tate na hi uh hi,’ kici ding hi,” ci-in kigelh hi." 
Romans9:27 Isaiah in Israel mite’ thu a genna-ah, “Israel mite, tuipi gei-a sehnel zahin a tam hangin mi tawmno khat bek suakta ding uh hi." 
Romans9:28 Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa in leitung mite thu hong khen baih ding hi,” ci hi." 
Romans9:29 Hih thu pen Isaiah mah in, “Vanglian Topa in eite’ suanlekhak ding hong siitsak lo hileh Sodom khua le Gomorrah khuamite i bang ding hi,” ci-in a genkholhsa thu ahi hi." 
Romans9:30 Tua ahihleh Pasian tawh kipawl theih nading hanciamna a nei lo Gentail mite pen upna hangin Pasian tawh kipawlthei a," 
Romans9:31 Pasian tawh a kipawl theih nadingin thukham zuihna tawh hanciam napi-in a zuih zawh lohna hangun Israel mite kipawl thei lo ahihleh a bangci thu ahi hiam? 
Romans9:32 Amaute in upna suang loin nasepna a suan hang uh ahi hi. Amaute pen Lai Siangtho in a gen mah bangin, “Puk nading suang,” a kici tungah a pukkha uh ahi hi." 
Romans9:33 Lai Siangtho in, “En un, keimah in Zion-ah mite a muktuk theih nading, mite a puktheih nading suang khat ka koih hi. Ahi zongin amah a muang mite khempeuh tavai cih om ngei lo ding hi,” ci hi." 
Romans10:1 Sanggamte aw, i mipihte in hotkhiatna a ngah nading deihsakin lungsim takpi tawh Pasian kiangah thu ka ngetsak hi." 
Romans10:2 Amaute in Pasian a kin mahmah lamtak uh thei-in teci-in ka pang ngam hi. Ahi zongin amaute in a man lampi tawh kin kha lo uh hi. 
Romans10:3 Amaute in Pasian tawh kipawl theih nading lampi man thei loin amau theihtawmna tawh hanciam kha uh ahih manin amah tawh kipawl theih nadingin lampi a khun’ zui kha lo uh hi. 
Romans10:4 Bang hang hiam cih leh upna a nei mi khempeuh Pasian tawh a kipawl theih nadingin Khrih in Thukham a beisak hi. 
Romans10:5 Moses in a laigelhna sungah, “Thukham deihna bangin a gamtazo mi khempeuh a nungta ding hi,” ci-in Thukham zuihna hangin Pasian tawh kipawl theih nading thu a na gen hi." 
Romans10:6 Ahi zongin upna hangin Pasian tawh kipawl theihna thu a kigenna-ah, “Vantungah kua va paito ding a,” ci kei unla, “Leinuai-ah kua va paisuk ding ahi hiam?” zong ci kei un, ci hi. Tua a cihna pen vantung panin Khrih a lasuk ding le sihna panin a thosak ding cihna ahi hi." 
Romans10:7  
Romans10:8 Tua bang a cih ciangin, “Pasian’ thu pen nai mahmahin note kam sung le na lungsim sung uhah om hi,” a cihnopna ahi hi. Tua Pasian’ thu pen kote’ hilhhilh, “Pasian um un,” cihna thu ahi hi." 
Romans10:9 Jesuh pen Topa hi, ci-in mite kiangah genin, Pasian in sihna panin amah hingkiksak zo hi, ci-in na lungsim sung uhah na up taktak uhleh hotkhiatna na ngah ding uh hi." 
Romans10:10 Bang hang hiam cih leh i lungsim ah i up taktakna hangin Pasian tawh kipawl theihna kingah a, i kamin i genna hangin hotkhiatna a kingah ahi hi." 
Romans10:11 Lai Siangtho in, “Amah a um mi peuhmah tavai lo ding hi,” ci hi." 
Romans10:12 Bang hang hiam cih leh Jew mi le Gentail mi a kideidanna om lo ahih manin Topa pen mi khempeuh’ Topa hi kim a, ama kiangah a ngen khempeuh tungah thupha tampi tak a pia hi." 
Romans10:13 Lai Siangtho in zong, “Topa tungah huhna a ngen khempeuhte in hotkhiatna a ngah ding uh hi,” ci hi." 
Romans10:14 Ahi zongin a up loh pa uh tungah kua in thu ngen thei ding ahi hiam? Ama thu za ngei kei leh kua in a thu um thei ding ahi hiam? Ama thu kigen kei leh kua in za thei ding ahi hiam? 
Romans10:15 A gen dingin kisawl kei leh kua in a thu gen thei ding ahi hiam? Tua ahih manin Lai Siangtho sungah, “Lungdamna thu a hilh dingin a hong pai mite hangin kinuam mahmah hi,” ci-in kigelh hi." 
Romans10:16 Ahi zongin Isaiah in, “Topa aw, ka thugente uh kua in um ahi hiam?” a cih mah bangin Lungdamna Thu a za mi khempeuh in um kim lo uh hi." 
Romans10:17 Tua ahih ciangin zakna panin upna hong piangthei a, Khrih thu up nading pen hilhna panin hong piangthei pan hi." 
Romans10:18 Tua ahihleh amaute in thu za lo uh ahi hiam? Lai Siangtho sungah, “Amau’ awgingte leitung khempeuh ah kizel a, a thugente uh in mun khempeuh a ban hi,” ci-in a kigelh mah bangin amaute in thu za khinzo uh hi." 
Romans10:19 Tua ahihleh Israel mite in a thei uh hiam? Moses mahmah in Pasian’ min tawh thu na gen a, “Keima mi pawl a hilote thupha pia-in, note’ hazat dingin ka bawl ding a, tua mihaite’ hangin note na heh nadingun ka hong bawl ding hi,” a cih mah bangin Israel mite in a thu a thei lo uh hi lo hi." 
Romans10:20 Tua banah Isaiah in Pasian’ min tawh hangtakin thu na gen a, “Kei hong zong lo mite in kei hong mu uh a, kei hong kan lo mite tungah ka kilak hi,” ci-in na gen hi." 
Romans10:21 Tua ciangin Israel mite tawh kisai-in, “Ka thu a mang lo, kei hong langpang mite tawh ka kilemkik theih nadingin a tawntungin ka hanciam hi,” ci-in a na gen hi." 
Romans11:1 Tua ahihleh Pasian in ama mi Israel-te nialin nusia mangkhin ahi hiam? Tua bang hi dek lo hi. Kei mahmah zong Abraham’ suan Israel mite ka hi a, tua sung panin Benjamin’ suan ka hi hi." 
Romans11:2 Pasian in tanglai panin a teelsa mite nusia lo hi. Elijah in Israel mite mawhsakin Pasian kiangah nakpitakin thu a genna Lai Siangtho sungah a kigelh thei lo na hi uh hiam? 
Romans11:3 Tua sungah, “Topa aw, Israel mite in na kamsangte thatin nangma biakna taute phelin susiagawp uh a, kei bekbek ka omlai hi. Kei nangawn thah hong sawm lai uh hi,” ci-in kigelh hi." 
Romans11:4 Ahi zongin Pasian in, “Baal milim a bia nai lo mihing tulsagih ka nei lai hi,” ci-in a dawng hi." 
Romans11:5 Tua mah bangin tuhunin zong Pasian in ama hehpihna tawh a teelsa mi tawmkhat omlai hi. 
Romans11:6 A teelna ah mite’ nasepna bulphuhin a teel hi loin ama dikna hangin a teel hizaw hi. Pasian in mihingte’ nasepna bulphuhin a teel hileh Pasian’ dikna pen dikna kici thei lo ding hi. 
Romans11:7 A thu omzia taktak hih bang ahi hi. Israel mi a tamzaw in a hanciamciam uh ngah lo uh hi. Pasian’ teel mi tawmkhat bek in ngah uh a, adangte in Pasian’ sapna thudon lo uh hi." 
Romans11:8 Tua ahih manin Lai Siangtho sungah, “Pasian in thu a ngaihsun thei lo, khua a phawk thei loin amaute bawl a, amaute in tuni dongin khua mu thei lo, khua za thei loin a om uh hi,” ci-in a kigelh hi." 
Romans11:9 Tua ciangin David in zong, “Amaute in a pawi bawlnate uh awklawh uh hen la, kiat lawhin gimna ngahlawh uh hen!" 
Romans11:10 Khua a muh loh nadingun a mit uh taw hen la, lungkhamna vangik lelin awn tawntung ta uh hen!” ci-in a gen lai hi." 
Romans11:11 Jew mite a puk uh ciangin sia paisuak ahi uh hiam? Sia paisuak lo uh hi. Amau’ mawhna hangin Gentail mite in hotkhiatna ngah uh hi. Gentail mite in hotkhiatna a ngah pen Jew mite in enna lungsim a neihtheih nading uh deihna ahi hi. 
Romans11:12 Jew mite’ mawhna pen leitung khempeuh thupha ngahna suak a, amau’ gitnat lohna pen Gentail mite’ hamphatna suak ahihleh Jew mi khempeuh in hotkhiatna a ngahkim uh ciangin bangzahin hoihkan ding ahi hiam?" 
Romans11:13 Tu-in no Gentail mite tungah thu ka hong gennuam hi: No Gentail mite a dingin sawltak ka sep sungteng ka nasep a thupi mahmahin ka ngaihsun ding hi. 
Romans11:14 Bang hang hiam cih leh ka mipihte in note hong entheih nading uh piangsak thei-in, tua manin amaute pawlkhat in hotkhiatna a ngah nading uh piangsakzo kha dingin ka kilamen hi." 
Romans11:15 Amaute a kinialna hangin Pasian tawh leitung mi khempeuh kipawl theihna piang ahihleh amaute a kisan’ hun ciangin a sisate nangawn a hinkikna hong hita ding hi. 
Romans11:16 Anlum a ki-em masa sung panin a themkhat Pasian biakna-in a kipiak ciangin a anlum buppi zong Pasian-a’ mah hi pah a, singkung khat’ zung zong Pasian a kipiak ciangin a hiang khempeuh zong Pasian-a’ mah ahi hi." 
Romans11:17 A kiciing oliv kung a hiangte kisatkhia-in gamlak oliv hiangte tawh kipeh hi. No Gentail-te pen tua gamlak oliv hiangte tawh a kibang na hi uh a, Jew mite’ hamphatna teng a ngahkhawm na hi uh hi." 
Romans11:18 Tua ahih manin oliv hiang a kisatkhia tawh a kibang Jew mite simmawhbawl kha kei un. Note na kiphatsak theih nading uh a thu om lo hi. Note pen a hiang tawh a kibang lel na hi uh a, note in a zungpi a hingsak hi loin, a zungpi in note a hong hingsak ahi zaw hi." 
Romans11:19 Note in, “Eite tawh hong kipeh theih nadingin a hiangte a kisatkhia ahi hi,” na cinuam ding uh hi." 
Romans11:20 Tua pen thuman ahi hi. Amaute in a up lohna hangun a kisatkhia hi a, note in na upna hangun amaute’ munah a om na hi uh hi. Tua ahih manin kiphatsakna lungsim nei kei unla, lamdangsakna tawh om khikhe zaw un." 
Romans11:21 Pasian in oliv hiang ngeite dawm lo ahihleh note hong dawm tuan lo ding hi. 
Romans11:22 Hih thu-ah Pasian a migit mahmahna le a khauh mahmahna i mu hi. A khial mite tungah khauh mahmah a, ama migitna a kizop paisuak theih nadingin na up paisuak nak-uhleh note tungah hong migi mahmah hi. Ahi zongin na zop paisuak kei uhleh note zong hong kisatkhia ding hi." 
Romans11:23 Tua ciangin Jew mite in zong a lungsim uh kheelin Pasian a up uhleh Pasian in a pehkik theih nading vangliatna nei ahih manin amaute zong amau’ mun ngei mahah pehkik ding hi. 
Romans11:24 Note pen na pianngei uh gamlak oliv kung panin hong kisatkhia-in note’ pianngei ahi lo a kiciing oliv kung tungah hong kipehthei ahihleh a kiciing oliv kung panin a kisatkhia tawh a kibang Jew mite pen Pasian in amau omna ngei-ah a pehkik ding olzaw mahmah lai ding hi. 
Romans11:25 Sanggamte aw, note in na theih dingun ka deih thusim khat om hi. Thei le-uhcin, “A pil mahmah hi hang,” na kici nawn kei pah ding uh hi. Tua thu in: Israel mite in a up nop lohna pen a tawntung ding thu hi lo hi. Pasian kiangah Gentail mite a pai dingzah in Pasian a zuat hun ciang dong ding bek ahi hi." 
Romans11:26 Tua hi a, Lai Siangtho sungah a kigelh mah bangin Israel mite khempeuh in hotkhiatna ngah ding uh hi. Lai Siangtho in, “Zion panin Honpa hong pai ding a, Jakob’ suanlekhakte sunga om gitlohna khempeuh maisak ding hi." 
Romans11:27 Amaute’ mawhna ka maisak ciangin hih ka thuciamna ka pia ding hi,” ci-in gen hi." 
Romans11:28 Jew mite in Lungdamna Thu um loin Pasian’ gal ahihna pen no Gentail mite’ hamphat nading hi a, ahi zongin Pasian’ teelna tawh kisai-in a pupite uh tungah a thuciamna huhau-in Pasian’ pawlte mah hi lai veve uh hi." 
Romans11:29 Bang hang hiam cih leh Pasian in a teel mite le thupha a piak mite tawh kisai-in a thu dokkik lo hi. 
Romans11:30 No Gentail mite in a beisa hunah Pasian’ thu na mang kei uh a, ahi zongin Jew mite’ thuman lohna hangin tu-in Pasian’ hehpihna na ngah uh hi." 
Romans11:31 Tua mah bangin amaute’ thuman lohna hangin note in Pasian’ hehpihna na ngahna uh pen Jew mite in zong Pasian’ hehpihna a ngahkik theih nading uh ahi hi. 
Romans11:32 Bang hang hiam cih leh Pasian in mi khempeuh tungah hehpihna a piaktheih nadingin a thuman lohna hangun mi khempeuh thongkia a bangsak hi. 
Romans11:33 Tua ahih manin Pasian’ hong hehpihna nakliat mahmah a, a pilna le a thu theihnate nakthuk mahmah hi. Ama thukhennate kua’ gentheih ding hi lo a, a nasepna ziate kua’ telzawh ding hi lo hi." 
Romans11:34 Tua ahih manin Lai Siangtho in, “Kua in Topa’ lungsim thei ding a, kua in ngaihsutna va pia thei ding ahi hiam?" 
Romans11:35 Amah in hong thukkik theih nadingin kuamah in ama tungah thupha va bawl ngei lo hi,” na ci hi." 
Romans11:36 Bang hang hiam cih leh na khempeuh ama piansak hi a, na khempeuh ama hang le ama minthan nading bekin a om ahi hi. Mi khempeuh in Pasian phat tawntung ta hen! Amen." 
Romans12:1 Tua ahih ciangin sanggamte aw, Pasian in eite tam veipi tak hong hehpih ahih manin ama lungkim nading le ama nasep nadingin nomau mahmah a hingtangin Pasian tungah na kipiak nadingun ka hong thum hi. Tua banga kipiakna pen Pasian biakna man taktak ahi hi." 
Romans12:2 Leitung mihingte’ gamtat bangin gamta kei unla, na lungsim uh kikheelin Pasian kipuahphasak un. Tua hileh a hoih nate bang hi a, bangte in amah lungkimsakin, bangte a kicing hiam ci-in thei-in Pasian’ deihna na phawk thei ding uh hi." 
Romans12:3 Pasian in kei tungah hehpihna hong piakkhongna hangin note tungah kong gennop thu in: Note tawh a kituakzah valin kilian ngaihsutzaw kha kei un. Pasian in note tungah upna hong piakzah tawh kizui-in kingaihsun bek zaw unla, a kilawm ciang khat bekin kingaihsun un." 
Romans12:4 I pumpi tungah zong na tampi i nei a, tua nate’ nasep a tuamtuam ahi hi." 
Romans12:5 Tua mah bangin eite mi tampi ihih hangin pumkhat ihi a, pumpi nate bangin khatlekhat a kizom ciat ihi hi." 
Romans12:6 Tua ahih manin Pasian in hehpihna hong piakkhongna tawh kizui-in i siamna a tuamtuamte zang ciat ni. I siamna pen Pasian’ thu gentheih nading siamna ahih leh i upna neihzah tawh kizui-in gen ni. 
Romans12:7 Nasep nading siamna a nei ihih leh na sem ni. Hilh nading siamna a nei ihih leh hilh ni. 
Romans12:8 Midangte hanthot theih nading siamna a nei ihih leh midangte hanthawn ni. Midangte hop theih nading a nei ihih leh citna taktak tawh hawm ni. Makaih theih nading siamna a nei ihih leh hoihtakin na sem ni. Midangte hehpih theih nading a nei ihih leh maitai takin hih ni. 
Romans12:9 Na ki-itnate uh lungsim takpi tawh hi sak unla, a siate mudahin a hoihte lenkip un." 
Romans12:10 Unau ki-itna lungsim nei unla, khatlekhat kizahtak bawl ding lamsang kidem un." 
Romans12:11 Thadah kei unla, nakpitakin na sem un. Lawp mahmahna lungsim tawh Topa’ na sem un." 
Romans12:12 Lamet na neihna hangun lungdamin om tawntung unla, lungkhamna na thuak uh ciangin lungduai-in thu na ngen tawntung un." 
Romans12:13 Na Khristian pihte uh a kisapna bangin na neihsate uh na hawm unla, zin le leengla do a siam mite na hita un." 
Romans12:14 No a hong bawlsia mite, Pasian in thupha a piak nadingin thu ngetsak unla, tua bang mite samsia loin thupha piazaw un." 
Romans12:15 A lungdam mite lungdampih unla, a dah mite dahpih un." 
Romans12:16 Mi deidan loin a kibangin en un. Kiphasak loin mineute tawh kikhawlthei unla, kipilsak se kei un." 
Romans12:17 Midangte’ gitlohnate thukkik kei unla, mi khempeuh in hoih hi, ci-in a ngaihsut ding bangin gamta un." 
Romans12:18 Ahih theih laiteng mi khempeuh tawh na kilem nadingun hanciam un. 
Romans12:19 Lawmte aw, na hehna uh kuama tungah thukkik kei unla, Pasian’ thukkik dingin koih lel un. Bang hang hiam cih leh Lai Siangtho sungah, “Keimah in amaute tungah ka thuk ding a, midangte a gimsak bangun ka gimsak ding hi, Topa in ci hi,” ci-in kigelh hi." 
Romans12:20 Tua ahih ciangin Lai Siangtho sungah, “Na galte uh a gil a kial leh an na pia un. A dang a taak leh tui na pia un. Tua bangin na gamtat uhleh amaute’ maizum nadingin a bawl na hi uh hi,” ci-in a kigelh bangin gamtazaw un." 
Romans12:21 Tua ahih manin gitlohna kizosak kei unla, a pha gamtatna tawh gitlohnate a zo na hi ta un." 
Romans13:1 A kuamah peuh in hong ukte’ thu na mang ciat un. Bang hang hiam cih leh Pasian’ thukimpih lohin kuamah in ukna thu nei lo hi; ukna thu nei i cih mite pen Pasian’ koih mite ahi hi. 
Romans13:2 Tua ahih manin ukna thuneite a nialte pen Pasian’ koihsa mite a nial suak a, tua bang mite in thukhenna a thuak ding uh hi." 
Romans13:3 Bang hang hiam cih leh gam uk mite pen a gamtat hoih mite’ kihtak ding hi lo a, mi tatsiate’ kihtak ding hi bek hi. Ukna thu a neite kihta loin na omnop uhleh a hoihin gamta un. Tua hileh amaute in note hong pakta-in hong phat ding uh hi." 
Romans13:4 Ukna thuneite pen note’ hoih nadingin Pasian’ nasemte ahi uh hi. Ahi zongin a sia-in na gamtat uhleh gim hong pia taktak ding uh ahih manin na lau ding uh ahi hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh amaute pen Pasian’ nasemte hi a, a sia-in a gamta mite tungah Pasian’ hehna bangin gim a pia dingte ahi uh hi." 
Romans13:5 Tua ahih manin Pasian’ gimpiak ding kihtakna hang bek hi loin, ahi ding thu mah hi, ci-a theihna tawh ukna thu a neite’ thu na man’ ding uh ahi hi." 
Romans13:6 Ukna thu a neite in amau’ sep dingteng a kimtakin a sep uh ciangin Pasian a dingin na a semte hi uh ahih manin tua thu hang mahin zong mangmu a pia na hi uh hi. 
Romans13:7 Tua ahih manin phiangsiah piak dingte tungah pia-in, mangmu piak dingte tungah pia-in, zahtak dingte zahtak bawlin, pahtawi dingte pahtawi ta un." 
Romans13:8 Khatlekhat ki-it ding cih lohbuang, kuama tungah leiba nei kei un. Midang a itte in Thukham deihna teng a zuikhin ahi hi." 
Romans13:9 Thukham sungah, “Nulepa mawhna bawl kei in, mi that kei in, guta kei in, hazatna lungsim nei kei in,” cihna le adang khempeuhte pen, “Nang na ki-it bangin na vengte na it in,” cihna thu in huam khinmang hi." 
Romans13:10 Midangte a it mi peuhmah in amaute tungah siatna bawl het lo ahih manin itna i neih ciangin Thukham buppi a zui khinta ihi hi. 
Romans13:11 Tuhun pen bang hun hita ahi hiam, ci-in theita na hih manun tu-a bangin na gamtat ding uh ahi hi. Tu-in note in khua phawkin na khanlawh ding uh hun hita hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Jesuh Khrih i up cil lai hun sangin tu-in Pasian in leitung haksatna panin eite hong hotkhiat ding hun hong naizaw hi." 
Romans13:12 Zan khuamial bei dektak a, sun khuavak hong tung dektak ta hi. Khuamial sunga gamtatnate khawlin khuavak sunga nazatte zam ta ni." 
Romans13:13 Sun khuavak sunga om mite bangin a kilawmin gamta ni. Gualnopna le zukhamna, mawhna le thangtatna, kitotna le kihazatnate-in i hun beisak kei ni." 
Romans13:14 Kidal nadingin, Topa Jesuh Khrih’ hong piak galhiamte zang unla, na pumpi uh deihna bangin gamtat nading hun omsak nawn kei un." 
Romans14:1 Upna neu mite pawlbawl unla, na ngaihsutna uh a kituah kei leh zong mawhsak kei un." 
Romans14:2 Mi pawlkhat in na khempeuh ka nektheih ding hi, ci-in ngaihsun uh hi; ahi zongin upna neute in anteh bek ne ngam uh hi." 
Romans14:3 Tua ahih manin a ne mite in a tang mite simmawhbawl kei hen la, a tang mite in zong a ne mite simmawhbawl kei hen. Bang hang hiam cih leh a ne mite zong Pasian in a san mite mah ahi hi." 
Romans14:4 Mi khat’ nasemte tungah kua in thu khen thei ding na hi uh hiam? A gina le a ginalo a khen ding pa pen amau’ Topa ahi hi. A Topa un hoih hi, a cih leh a kipsak zawh nading vangliatna nei ahih manin a kip hi lel ding uh hi." 
Romans14:5 Mi pawlkhatte in ni khatpeuh adang sangin thupi zaw hi, ci-in ngaihsun uh a, pawlkhatte in ni khempeuh kibangkim hi, ci-in ngaihsun uh hi. Tua ahih manin a kuamah peuh in amau’ hoihsakna thu ciantakin thei ta uh hen." 
Romans14:6 Ni khatpeuh thupi diak hi, ci-in a tang mite in Topa a pahtawina-in a tang ahi uh hi. An khempeuh a ne mi in zong Pasian’ tungah lungdamna ko-in ne uh ahih manin Topa a pahtawina mahin a ne uh ahi hi. Nek dingin kilawm lo hi, ci-in a ne lo mite in zong Pasian tungah lungdamna mah ko ahih manin Topa a pahtawina mahin a ne lo uh ahi hi." 
Romans14:7 Ama a’ ding bekin kuamah nungta lo a, ama a’ ding bekin kuamah si lo hi." 
Romans14:8 I nuntak leh Topa a dingin a nungta ihi a, i sih leh zong Topa a’ ding mahin a si ihi hi. Tua ahih manin i si a, i hing zongin Topa a’ ihi hi." 
Romans14:9 Hih thu hangin Khrih pen a site le a hingte’ Topa ahih theih nadingin hong si-in hong nungtakik hi. 
Romans14:10 Tua ahihleh bang hangin na Khristianpihte uh tungah thu khen a, bang hangin simmawhbawl thei na hi uh hiam? Thukhenna a thuak dingin Pasian’ mai-ah eite khempeuh a ding ciat ding ihi hi." 
Romans14:11 Lai Siangtho sungah, “Kei pen a nungta ka hih mah bangin ka mai-ah mi khempeuh hong kun ding a, Pasian ka hihna thu mi khempeuh in pulak taktak ding uh hi, Topa in ci hi,” ci-in a kigelh hi." 
Romans14:12 Tua ahih manin a kuamah peuh in i gamtatna ciat Pasian’ mai-ah a va kigentel ciat ding ihi hi. 
Romans14:13 Tua ahih manin khatlekhat kimawhsakin thu kikhen kei unla, i Khristianpihte i puksak khak loh nading, a dongtangsak ihih khak loh nadingin ngaihsun ciat ni." 
Romans14:14 Topa Jesuh tawh kipawlin a lungsim ka theihna tawh, na khat peuhpeuh ama thu-in a dawizek om het lo hi, ci-in teltakin ka thei hi. Ahi zongin mi khatpeuh in dawizek hi, ci-in a ngaihsut leh ama a dingin a dawizek hi pah hi." 
Romans14:15 An khatpeuh na nekna uh hangin na Khristianpihte’ lungnopmawhna na piansak uhleh itna lungsim tawh a gamta na hi nawn kei uh hi. Na an nekna uh tawh, Khrih in a sihlawh mite’ siat nading piangsak kei un." 
Romans14:16 Tua ciangin note in hoih na sak uh thute, midangte in a sia-in a genkhak loh theih nadingun na gamta un." 
Romans14:17 Bang hang hiam cih leh Pasian’ Ukna pen nekledawn tawh a kisai thu hi lo a, Kha Siangtho hangin i ngah Pasian’ deih bangin gamtatna, kilemna, lungdamna, cihte hizaw hi." 
Romans14:18 Hih bang danin Khrih’ na a sem mite in Pasian lungdamsak a, mite zong a lungkimsak uh hi." 
Romans14:19 Tua ahih ciangin mi tawh kilem theih nading le kha thu-ah khatlekhat thahatna i kipiak theih nading thute hanciam ciat ni. 
Romans14:20 Annek huhau-in Pasian’ sepsa thute susia kei ni. An khempeuh a kine thei ding ahi hi; ahi zongin tua nekna hangin mi khat peuhpeuh a pukding ahihleh a khial ihi hi. 
Romans14:21 Midangte in a puklawh theih annekna, zunekna, le na khat peuhpeuh i kikep ding a man pen ahi hi." 
Romans14:22 Hih thu-ah no’ upna le no’ ngaihsutnate, Pasian tawh note’ kikal thu hisak un. Amau lungsim sungah man a sak bangun a gamta zote pen a lung uh nuam mahmah hi." 
Romans14:23 Ahi zongin lunghimawh pipi-in a ne a om leh, a upna uh tawh kizui-in a gamta hi lo uh ahih manin Pasian in tua bang mite a mawhsak ding hi. I upna bangin gamtat lohna peuhpeuh mawhna ahi hi." 
Romans15:1 Upna lamah a thahat eite in upna zawngkhalte’ ginat lohna i thuakpih ding kilawm hi; eima ut bangin i gamta kei ding hi. 
Romans15:2 Midangte a upna uh hong khangin, mihoih hong suahtheih nadingun i gamta ciat ding hi." 
Romans15:3 Bang hang hiam cih leh Khrih zong ama nopsak theih nadingin gamta lo zaw hi. Lai Siangtho sungah, “Note hong kisimmawhna thute kei tungah hong tu hi,” ci-in a kigelh hi." 
Romans15:4 Lai Siangtho sungah a om thu khempeuh pen eite hilh nading, eite in lametna nei-in i thuakzawh nading, le i thahat theih nadingin a kigelh ahi hi." 
Romans15:5 Note in lungsim kikhatin i Topa Jesuh Khrih’ Pa ahi Pasian na phatkhawm theih nadingun Pasian in thuakzawhna le thahatna hong pia hen la, Jesuh Khrih deihna bangin gamta-in khatlekhat kithutuak takin hong omsak tahen." 
Romans15:6  
Romans15:7 Tua ahih ciangin Khrih in note hong san mah bangin midangte in Pasian a phattheih nadingun note khatlekhat na kisang un. 
Romans15:8 Hih banga kong genna pen, Pasian thuman hi, ci-in a kilat nadingin pupite tungah Pasian’ thuciamna a tungsak dingin, Jew mite hoih nading," 
Romans15:9 le Gentail mite in zong ama hehpihna hangin Pasian a phattheih nadingun Khrih a hong paina hang ahi hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Lai Siangtho sungah, “Tua ahih ciangin Gentail mite lakah ka lungdamna nang tungah ka hong ko ding a, nangma min phatna late ka sa ding hi,” cihna le" 
Romans15:10 tua ciangin, “Gentail mite aw, ama mite tawh lungdam khawm un,” cihna le" 
Romans15:11 tua ciangin, “Gentail mi khempeuh aw, Topa phat un; mi khempeuh aw, amah phat un,” cihna le" 
Romans15:12 tua ciangin Isaiah in, “Jessi’ suante khat hong khang ding a, Gentail mite a uk dingin milian hong suak ding a, ama hangin Gentail mite in lamet lungmuanna nei ding uh hi,” cihnate a kigelh hi." 
Romans15:13 Kha Siangtho’ huhna tawh note’ lametna a khan semsem theih nadingin, lametna a hong piathei Pasian in, amah na upna uh hangin lungdamna le nopsakna tawh note hong kidimsak tahen." 
Romans15:14 Thu upna sungah sanggamte aw, note mihoih hi-in, bangci gamtat ding cih thei-in, khatlekhat zong a kihilhthei dingin kong muang mahmah hi." 
Romans15:15 Ahi zongin hih kong laikhakna sungah note’ phawkkik dingin thu ka hong genna pawlkhatte-ah kong telkheh mahmah hi. Tua bangin ka hong telkhehna thu pen," 
Romans15:16 Gentail mite tungah na a sem dingin Khrih Jesuh sawltak hih theih nading hamphatna lianpi Pasian in kei a hong piakna hang ahi hi. Gentail mite pen Kha Siangtho in Pasian’ tungah a piak, ama santheih biakpiaknate a suahtheih nadingin Pasian kiang panin a hong pai Lungdamna Thu ka hilhna-ah siampi bangin na ka sem hi." 
Romans15:17 Tua ahih manin Khrih tawh kikopin Pasian a’ ding na ka sepna-ah kei ka kisathei mahmah hi. 
Romans15:18 Kha Siangtho’ vangliatna tawh lim le na lamdangte zangin, Gentail mite in Pasian thu a zuihtheih nadingun Khrih in ka thatang le ka kam ka muk a zatna thute bekah hangtakin genin ka telkheh ding hi. Tua ahih manin Jerusalem khua panin Illyrikam gam ciang dong ka zinna khempeuhah Jesuh Khrih hangin Lungdamna Thu ka hilh khinzo hi." 
Romans15:19  
Romans15:20 A tawntungin keima tup thu in: Mi khatpeuh in a patsa nasep maban, oltakin zomin a sem mi ka suahkhak loh nadingin Khrih thu a kizak ngei nai lohna munte bekah Lungdamna Thu hilh ding keima utna ahi hi." 
Romans15:21 Lai Siangtho sungah zong, “Ama thu a kigen ngei nai lohna mite in mu ding uh a, ama thu a za ngei nai lote in teltheih ding uh hi,” na kici hi." 
Romans15:22 Note kiangah ka hong paipak theih lohna pen tu-a kong genna thu hang ahi hi. 
Romans15:23 Ahi zongin hih gam kiimteng a ka nasepna man khinta ing a, note tawh ka kimuhnop zong kum tampi tak pha khinta ahih manin," 
Romans15:24 tu-in note tawh kimu theita dingin ka kilamen hi. Spain gam ka paikawmin note kiang ka hong nawk nuam a, note tawh tawlkhat i kikholh khit ciangin Spain gam ka paina dingah nong huh ding uh ka ut hi." 
Romans15:25 Ahi zongin tu laitakin ahihleh Jerusalem khua-a Pasian mite a kihuhna a puak dingin ka va pai masa ding hi. 
Romans15:26 Bang hang hiam cih leh Masedonia gam le Grik gam sunga om pawlpite in Jerusalem khua-a om Pasian’ mi a zawngte huh nadingin sum piak ding amau thu-in a vaihawmtawm uh hi. 
Romans15:27 Hih pen amau ngaihsut tawmna tawh lawptakin a huh uh ahi hi. A taktakin ci lehang hih mizawngte a huh dingun a kilawm mah ahi hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Jew mite in kha thu tawh kisai nate Gentail mite hawm uh ahih manin Gentail mite in zong leitung nate tawh Jew mite a huh dingun a kilawm khat ahi hi. 
Romans15:28 Amaute a dingin a kikaikhawm hih sumte a cingin amaute tungah apin, hih nasep ka man khit ciangin Spain gam manawh dingin ka hong paikhia ding a, note kiangah kong baang ding hi." 
Romans15:29 Note kiang ka hong tun ciangin Khrih kiang panin thupha tampi tak ka hong puak ding lamtak ka thei hi. 
Romans15:30 Lawmte aw, kei a dingin Pasian kiangah thu na hong ngetsak nadingun i Topa Jesuh Khrih i upna hang le Kha Siangtho in a hong piak itna tawh a hong thum ka hi hi." 
Romans15:31 Judea gam sunga a om thu um lo mite in kei hong gimsakkhak loh nading le Jerusalem khua-a a om Pasian mite a dingin nasepnate lungdam takin a hong santheih nadingun thu hong ngetsak un. 
Romans15:31 Judea gam sunga a om thu um lo mite in kei hong gimsakkhak loh nading le Jerusalem khua-a a om Pasian mite a dingin nasepnate lungdam takin a hong santheih nadingun thu hong ngetsak un. 
Romans15:32 Tua bangin thu hong ngetsak le-uhcin, Pasian’ deihna ahih nakleh note kiangah lungdam takin ka hong tung ding a, note tawh nuamtakin i kimu ding hi." 
Romans15:33 Nopsakna a hong pia Pasian in note khempeuh hong ompih tahen. Amen. 
Romans16:1 Kenkhrea khua-a om pawlpite lakah na a sem, thu upna sungah i sanggamnu Foebe pen mihoih mahmah khat ahihna thu note’ theih dingin ka deih hi." 
Romans16:2 Amah pen keimah a kipan mi tampi a dingin lawm hoih mahmah khat ahih manin, Pasian’ mite in a hih dingin a kilawm ahih mah bangin Topa’ thu sungah mihoihin na sang unla, note’ huh ding a kisapna khempeuhah hoihtakin na huh un." 
Romans16:3 Khrih Jesuh sungah na ka sepkhoppih Prisilla le Aquila na hopih sak un. 
Romans16:4 Amaute pen kei a dingin a si ngam uh ahi hi. Amaute tungah a lungdam kei guak bek zong hi loin, Gentail pawlpi mi khempeuh zong a lungdam ahi hi." 
Romans16:5 Amau’ inn-a kikhawm pawlpi mi khempeuh zong na hopih sak un. Asia gam sungah Khrih thu a um masa pen pa ahi ka lawm it mahmah Epainetas zong na hopih sak un. 
Romans16:6 Note a dingin nakpitakin na a sem Mary zong na hopih sak un. 
Romans16:7 Jew mipih ahih banah ka thongkiatpih ahi Andronikas le Junias zong na hopih sak un. Amaute pen kei’ Khristian suahma pekin a na suak khinsate na hi uh a, sawltakte khempeuh in a theihkim uh mite ahi uh hi." 
Romans16:8 Topa thu sungah ka lawm it mahmah ahi Ampliatas zong na hopih sak un. 
Romans16:9 Khrih nasepna sungah na ka sepkhoppih uh ahi Urbanas, le ka lawm Stakhus zong na hopih sak un." 
Romans16:10 Khrih tungah mi citak mahmah ahi Apelles zong na hopih sak un. Aristobulas innkuanpih mite zong na hopih sak un. 
Romans16:11 Jew mipih Herodion le Narsissas innkuan sunga i Khristian sanggamte zong na hopih sak un. 
Romans16:12 Topa’ na a sem Trifana le Trifosa, le Topa a dingin na tampi tak a sem ka lawm it Persis zong na hopih sak un." 
Romans16:13 Topa’ nasepna sungah a kikhai mahmah Rufas, le ta bangin kei a hong bawl tawntung ama nu zong na hopih sak un." 
Romans16:14 Asinkritas, Flegon, Hermes, Patrobas, Hermas, le amaute tawh a kikhawm khawm Khristian sanggamte zong na hopih sak un." 
Romans16:15 Filologas le Julia, Nereas le a sanggamnu le Olympas le amaute tawh a kikhawm khawm Pasian’ mi khempeuh zong na hopih sak un." 
Romans16:16 Sanggam ki-itna taktak tawh note khatlekhat kinamin na kihopih un. Khrih pawlpi khempeuh in zong hopihna kam hong khak uh hi. 
Romans16:17 Lawmte aw, note’ theihsa thute gensia langpangin, mite’ upna nawngkaisakin pawl a kikhensak mite kidawm un. Tua bang mite tawh kikhawl vet kei un." 
Romans16:18 Tua bang mite in i Topa Khrih’ na a sem hi loin, gilpi vai bek a sem uh ahi hi. Amaute in mite phatin kamkhum nono zang uh ahih manin mihoih pawlkhat a khemzo uh hi." 
Romans16:19 Lungdamna thu tawh kisai-ah na cihtakna uh mi khempeuh in thei ahih manin hih thu-ah kong lungdampih mahmah hi. A hoih bang hiam, ci-in theih nading pilna nei-in, a sia peuhmah tawh na kizopkhak hetloh nading uh kong deihsak hi." 
Romans16:20 Tua hileh eite tungah nopsakna a hong pia thei Pasian in Satan tuancilin note’ khenuai mi hong hisak baih ding hi. I Topa Jesuh Khrih hong hehpihna thupha, note tungah om tahen." 
Romans16:21 Ka naseppih Timoti in note hong hopih a, Jew mipih Lusias, Jason, le Sosipater-te in zong hong hopih uh hi." 
Romans16:22 Hih lai a gelhsak keimah Tertias in zong upna kikhat ihihna tawh ka hong hopih hi. 
Romans16:23 Keima zintunna pa le pawlpite’ kikhopna inn nei pa zong ahi Gaias in zong hong hopih hi. Ka omna khuapi sumkem pa Erastas le i Khristian sanggam Kuartas in zong hong hopih uh hi. 
Romans16:24 (I Topa Jesuh Khrih hehpihna thupha note khempeuh tungah hong om tahen. Amen.) 
Romans16:25 Eite khempeuh in Pasian phat ni. Keima hilh Jesuh Khrih thu ahi Lungdamna Thu le tanglai-in a ki-imcip, tu-in a kipholak thu-ah, amah pen note’ upna a hong kipsak thei pa ahi hi." 
Romans16:26 Ahi zongin mi khempeuh in Pasian umin a zuihtheih nadingin tu-in kamsangte’ laigelhnate le a nungta tawntung Pasian’ thupiakna tawh tua thu ki-imcip pen a hong kipholak ta ahi hi. 
Romans16:27 Thu khempeuhah pilna a nei, amah bek ahi Pasian in Jesuh Khrih hangin a tawntungin phatna ngah ta hen! Amen." 
1Corinthians1:1 Khrih Jesuh’ sawltak dingin Pasian in a hong teel keimah Paul le thu upna sungah i sanggam Sosthenes in," 
1Corinthians1:2 Jesuh Khrih tawh kipawlna hangin Pasian’ mi suakin, Pasian’ mi siangtho cihna a ngah, Korin khua-a om Pasian’ pawlpi mite le eite’ Topa bek hi loin, amaute’ Topa zong ahi, i Topa Jesuh Khrih tungah thu a ngen, mun khempeuhah a om mite tungah lai ka hong khak uh hi." 
1Corinthians1:3 I Pa Pasian le Topa Jesuh Khrih in note tungah dikna le nopsakna thupha hong tungsak tahen. 
1Corinthians1:4 Jesuh Khrih hangin note tungah Pasian in hehpihna thupha hong pia ahih manin ka lungdamna thu, Pasian tungah ka ko tawntung hi." 
1Corinthians1:5 Bang hang hiam cih leh Khrih tawh na kipawlna hangun, thugen siamna le thu theihtel siamna a kipan siamna nam khempeuh na neikim uh hi." 
1Corinthians1:6 Note sungah Khrih thu kiptakin om ahih manin," 
1Corinthians1:7 i Topa Jesuh Khrih hong kilatkik ding ngakin na om hun sungun thupha na ngah loh uh khat beek om lo hi. 
1Corinthians1:8 Ama hong kilatkik hun ciang dong, a tawp dongin mawhna le kisuanna nei loin na om nadingun i Topa Jesuh Khrih mah in note hong huh ding hi." 
1Corinthians1:9 Ama Tapa ahi i Topa Jesuh Khrih tawh a kikhawl dingin a hong sam Pasian pen a citak Pasian hi a, a gensa bangin a hong tungsak takpi ding ahi hi." 
1Corinthians1:10 Sanggamte aw, note khatlekhat kithutuakin, pawl kikhenna omkha loin, na lungsim, na ngaihsutna uh le na ngimna uh na kikhatsak nadingun i Topa Jesuh Khrih min tawh ka hong thum hi." 
1Corinthians1:11 Bang hang hiam cih leh sanggamte aw, note lakah kitot kiselna a omna thu, Khloe’ innkuanpih mite in kei kiangah hong gen uh hi." 
1Corinthians1:12 Tua bang ka cih ciangin note pawlkhat in, “Kei, Paul’ pawl ka hi hi,” cihna ahi a, pawlkhat in, “Kei, Apollos’ pawl ka hi hi,” cihna ahi a, pawlkhat in, “Kei, Peter’ pawl ka hi hi,” cihna ahi a, pawlkhat in, “Kei, Khrih’ pawl ka hi hi,” cihna ahi zongin na kampaunate uh ka cihna ahi hi." 
1Corinthians1:13 Note in Khrih na phelsuah zenzen uh hi. Note a dingin Paul in singlamteh tungah khaina thuak ahi hiam? Note, Paul’ nungzui dingin tui kiphum na hi uh hiam?" 
1Corinthians1:14 Krispas le Gaias cih simloh note khat beek hong tuiphum lo ka hih manin ka nuam mahmah hi. 
1Corinthians1:15 Tua bang hikeileh keima min tawh a kiphumin na kigen kha ding uh hi. 
1Corinthians1:16 (Eh! Stefanas-te innkuan zong ka tuiphum mah hi. Tuate cih simloh kuamah dang ka tuiphum lam ka thei kei hi.) 
1Corinthians1:17 Khrih in tuiphum nasep a sem dingin kei hong sawl lo a, Lungdamna Thu a hilh dingin a hong sawl bek ahi hi. Ka thuhilhna-ah zong thugen siamna le pilna a nei ka hi kei hi. Tua bang hi kei hen la, pilna le gen siamna a nei hi leng, Khrih in singlamteh tunga a thuakna thu in vangliatna a neihna hang kisa lo kha ding hi." 
1Corinthians1:18 Bang hang hiam cih leh sihna a thuak mite a dingin singlamteh tungah Khrih sihna thu pen a haihuai thu ahi hi. Ahi zongin hotkhiatna a ngah eite a dingin Pasian’ vangliatna ahi hi. 
1Corinthians1:19 Bang hang hiam cih leh Lai Siangtho sungah, “Mipilte’ pilna ka susia ding a, miteite’ teina ka heikhiatsak ding hi,” ci-in kigelh hi." 
1Corinthians1:20 Tua ahih manin tuhuna mipilte, miteite, le thusel a siamte, bangin kimang ahi hiam? Hih leitung pilna pen haina a suahsak khitna kilang khinzo hi." 
1Corinthians1:21 Pasian in ama pilna hong zang a, mihingte in amau’ pilna tawh pasian a theih zawh loh nadingun a bawl hi. Tua ahih manin mite in, “A haihuai thu,” ci-in a ngaihsut uh i thuhilhna a umte, Pasian in hotkhiatna a piazaw hi." 
1Corinthians1:22 A uptheih nadingun Jew mite in nalamdang kal uh a, Grik mite in pilna a thupisak uh hi." 
1Corinthians1:23 Ahi zongin kote in singlamteh tungah a kikhai Khrih’ thu ka hilh uh a, tua thu pen Jew mite a dingin a hehhuai thu hi a, Gentail mite a dingin a haihuai thu ahi hi." 
1Corinthians1:24 Ahi zongin Pasian in a hong sap ei Jew mite le Gentail mite a dingin Khrih pen Pasian’ vangliatna le Pasian’ pilna ahi hi. 
1Corinthians1:25 Bang hang hiam cih leh Pasian’ haina pen mite’ pilna sangin sangzaw lai a, Pasian’ thaneemna pen mite’ hatna sangin hatzaw lai hi." 
1Corinthians1:26 Sanggamte aw, Pasian in note hong sap laitakin na omzia uh ngaihsun un. Leitung mite’ hong muhna panin note a tamzaw, mipil na hi kei uh a, mi vanglian zong na hi kei uh a, mi thupi zong na hi kei uh hi." 
1Corinthians1:27 Ahi zongin Pasian in mipilte a maizumsak nadingin mihaite hong teel a, mi thahatte a maizumsak nadingin mi thaneemte a hong teel hi." 
1Corinthians1:28 Leitung mite in thupi a sakte uh a suksiat theih nadingin Pasian in leitung mite’ simmawh a niamte, bangmahin a ngaihsut loh uh mite a teel hi." 
1Corinthians1:29 Tua ahih manin Pasian’ mai-ah mite a kisaktheih nading thu om lo hi. 
1Corinthians1:30 Ahi zongin Pasian in Jesuh Khrih hangin note tungah nuntakna hong pia a, tua Jesuh Khrih pen eite’ pilna, Pasian tawh i kipawl theihna, Pasian’ mi siangtho suakin, hotkhiatna i ngah theihna ahi hi." 
1Corinthians1:31 Tua ahih ciangin Lai Siangtho sungah, “A kisathei mite, Topa’ hang bekin kisathei ta hen,” ci-in na kigelh hi." 
1Corinthians2:1 Sanggamte aw, Pasian’ thu hilhin note kiangah kong pai lai-in, mipilte’ zat kam thukpipi le pilna kamte ka zang kei hi." 
1Corinthians2:2 Bang hang hiam cih leh note kiangah ka om laitakin singlamteh tungah Jesuh Khrih a sihna thu simloh thudang peuhmah ngaihsut loh dingin ka ngaihsutsa ahi hi. 
1Corinthians2:3 Tua ahih manin note kiangah kong pai lai-in thaneemin, launa tawh ka ling a," 
1Corinthians2:4 thu ka hong hilh ciangin zong leitung mipilte’ zat kammalte le siamnate ka zang kei a, Pasian’ Kha Siangtho vangliatna tawh thu ka hong hilh hi." 
1Corinthians2:5 Tua ahih manin note’ thu upna pen mihingte’ pilna hang hi loin, Pasian’ vangliatna hangin a um na hi uh hi." 
1Corinthians2:6 Ahi zongin kha thu lamah a khangham mite tungah pilna thu ka gen hi. Tua ka gen pilna pen tu-in a maimang kuankuanta ding hih leitung mite’ pilna le vangliatna thu hi lo hi. 
1Corinthians2:7 Tua ka gen pilna thu pen mite’ theih lo dingin Pasian in a ipcip Pasian’ pilna thusim hi a, eite’ minthan nadingin leitung pianma pekin Pasian in a na koihsa thu ahi hi." 
1Corinthians2:8 Hih leitung a uk mite kuamah in hih pilna thu thei lo uh hi. Thei hi le-uh, a minthang Topa pen singlamteh tungah na that lo ding uh hi."
