2Corinthians4:11 Tua ahih manin kote’ leitung pumpi-ah Jesuh Khrih nuntakna a kilat nadingin Jesuh hangin ka leitung nuntak sungun sih nading lauhuaina ka phukha tawntung uh hi. 
2Corinthians4:12 Tua ahih manin kote a dingin sih nading a kisepsep laitakin note’ nuntak nading a kisem niloh ahi hi. 
2Corinthians4:13 Lai Siangtho in, “Um ka hih manin ka gen hi,” a cih mah bangin kote in zong um ka hih uh manin a gen ka hi uh hi." 
2Corinthians4:14 Topa Jesuh a hingkik sakpa in Jesuh mah tawh kote zong hong hingkiksak khawmin note tawh ama omna-ah hong paipih khawm ding hi, ci-in ka thei uh hi." 
2Corinthians4:15 Hih thute khempeuh note a’ ding a kikhualna hi a, Pasian’ hehpihna in mi tam ban semsem leh mi a tam semsem mah in Pasian’ minthan nadingin lungdam ko-in thu ngen ding uh hi." 
2Corinthians4:16 Tua thu hangin ka lungkia tuan kei uh hi. Kote’ leitung pumpi in damdamin muatlam ding a manawh ahi zongin ka kha nuntakna uh a nini-in thaksuak semsem hi. 
2Corinthians4:17 Tuhun laitakin tomno sung lungkhamna ka thuakte uh in ka thuakna uh sangin nakpitakin a lianzaw tawntung minthanna sung hong tunpih ding hi. 
2Corinthians4:18 Bang hang hiam cih leh a kimuthei nate a mitsuan ka hi kei uh a, a kimu thei lo nate a mitsuan ka hi uh hi. A kimuthei nate tomno sung bek kimang a, a kimu thei lo nate a tawntungin a kip ahi hi." 
2Corinthians5:1 Bang hang hiam cih leh hih ka tenna ka leitung pumpi uh a sih ciangin mihingte bawl ahi lo, Pasian in a kip tawntung dingin kote a dingin a hong bawlsak inn, vantungah a nei ding ka hihna uh ka thei uh hi." 
2Corinthians5:2 Tu laitakin ka vantung inn uhah ka omnopna uh lianlua mahmah ahih manin ngaklahin ka khuisasa uh hi. 
2Corinthians5:3 Vantung inn-ah ka om uh ciangin pumpi nei loin guak om ding ka hi kei uh hi. 
2Corinthians5:4 Hih leitung pumpi tawh ka om uh laitakin lungkhamin ka khuisasa uh hi. Hih ka leitung pumpi uh ka nusiat nopna hang uh hi loin a sithei pumpi pen a sithei nawn lo pumpi tawh a kilaih theih nadingin ka vantung pumpi uh ka deihna hang uh ahi hi. 
2Corinthians5:5 Hih kikheel nading a hong vaihawmsak pa pen Pasian hi a, kote a hong piak dingte khempeuh hong pia taktak ding cih a lahna-in kote tungah ama Kha Siangtho a hong pia hi." 
2Corinthians5:6 Tua ahih manin lungmuang takin ka om tawntung uh hi. Hih ka leitung pumpi uhah ka om laiteng uh Topa’ hong piak ding pumpi tawh a omkhawm nai lo ka hi uh hi. 
2Corinthians5:7 Muhna hang tawh lungmuangin a om hi loin upna hang tawh lungmuang takin a om ka hi uh hi. 
2Corinthians5:8 Lungmuang takin a ki-om hithiat hi a, hih leitung pumpi nusia-in Topa tawh omkhawm ding a ki-utzaw ahi hi." 
2Corinthians5:9 Tua ahih manin hih lai inn-ah a ki-om ahi a, hua lai vantung inn-ah a ki-om ahi zongin thudang khempeuh sangin Topa lungdamsak ding ngaihsutpi-in a kinei ahi hi." 
2Corinthians5:10 Bang hang hiam cih leh Khrih mai-ah thusitna a thuak dingin eite khempeuh a kilak ding ihi a, leitung i pumpi-in i omlai-in i gamtatna tawh kizui-in eite tawh a kituak ciatin a sia ahi a, a pha ahi zongin a ngah ciat ding ihi hi." 
2Corinthians5:11 Pasian zahtak nading thu ka lungsim uhah om tawntung ahih manin mite ka zolzawh nadingun ka hanciam uh hi. Pasian in kote’ lungsim teltakin hong thei a, note in zong na lungsim uhah kei hong thei dingin ka hong um hi." 
2Corinthians5:12 Note in na hong thupi ngaihsut theih nadingun koleko a hong kiphattawm zel ka hi kei uh a, lungsimtawng hoih lo napi-in a puatham siamna hangin a kisial mite nial thei-in, kote’ hangin note na kisaktheih nading uh deihna hizaw hi." 
2Corinthians5:13 Mihai ka hih uhleh zong Pasian’ minthan nading hi a, mipil ka hih uhleh zong note’ phattuam nading mah hi veve hi." 
2Corinthians5:14 Mi khempeuh a dingin mi khat si khin ahih manin mi khempeuh zong a ngeina lui uhah si khinta hi, ci-in ka theihna hangun tua Khrih’ itna in kote’ nuntakna hong uk hi." 
2Corinthians5:15 Ama hangin a nungtate, amau a dingin nungta nawn loin, amau’ hangin si-in a kihingkik sakpa a dingin a nuntak theih nadingun mi khempeuh a dingin amah a hong si hi." 
2Corinthians5:16 Tua ahih manin kote in mihingte’ ngeina zia tawh kuamah ka en nawn kei uh hi. Khrih mahmah zong mihing lungsim ngaihsutna zia tawh ka et ngei uh hangin tu-in tua bangin ka ngaihsun nawn kei uh hi. 
2Corinthians5:17 Tua ahih manin mi khatpeuh, Khrih tawh a kipawl ciangin mi thak suak a, a mi lui ngeina bei-in a mi thak ngeina a neita ahi hi." 
2Corinthians5:18 Hih thu khempeuh Pasian’ vaihawm hi a, eite pen Pasian’ gal hinapi-in Khrih hangin amah tawh a kilem mi hong hisak a, kote tungah tua kilem nading nasep hong pia hi." 
2Corinthians5:19 Tua ahih manin kote’ thugen bulpi in: Pasian in mite’ mawhnate ngaihsun nawn loin, Khrih hangin leitung mi khempeuh le amah a kilemin hong bawl a, tua kilemna thu a gen dingin kote hong seh hi." 
2Corinthians5:20 Tua ahih ciangin kote pen Khrih tangin nasem ka hi uh a, Pasian in kote zangin note tungah thu a hong gen ahi hi. Pasian tawh kilemin pawlkhatin na om nadingun Khrih tangin a hong thum ka hi uh hi." 
2Corinthians5:21 Khrih tawh i kipawlna hangin eite zong Pasian tawh a kibangin midik i suahtheih nadingin mawhna a nei lo Khrih pen eite’ tang dingin Pasian in mawhnei mi a suaksak hi. 
2Corinthians6:1 Tua bangin Pasian tawh na semkhawmin om ka hih manun Pasian’ hong hehpihna thu a mawkna na suahsakkhak loh nadingun ka hong thum uh hi. 
2Corinthians6:2 Bang hang hiam cih leh Pasian in, “A hunhoih a tun ciangin note’ hong ngetna ka hong ngai a, kong hotkhiat ni ding ciangin note ka hong huh hi,” na ci hi. Tua hi a, tuhun pen a hunhoih hi a, tuhun pen hotkhiat ni hun hita hi." 
2Corinthians6:3 Ka nasepna uhah mite in mawhna hong zon ding uh ut lo ka hih manun kuamah ka nawngkaisak khak loh nadingun ka hanciam uh hi. 
2Corinthians6:4 Tua ahih manin ka sepna khempeuh uhah Pasian’ nasemte ka hihna uh ka kilangsak uh a, lungduai takin gimna, haksatna, lungkhamnate ka thuak uh hi." 
2Corinthians6:5 Kote hong kisatin, thongah hong kikhia-in, mihonpi in hong hihgawp uh hi; nakpitakin na semin, an ne lo, ihmu lo liangin ka om uh hi." 
2Corinthians6:6 Siangtho takin nuntakna, thu theihna, lungduaina, migitna, Kha Siangtho’ huhna, itna taktak neihna," 
2Corinthians6:7 thuman genna, le Pasian’ nasemte ka hihna uh, Pasian’ vang tawh ka kilangsak uh hi. Kote in kihut nading le galsim nadingin hiamin thuman ka zang uh hi." 
2Corinthians6:8 Kote hong kipahtawi-in hong kimindaisak zel a, hong kisimmawh bawlin zong hong kiphat zel hi. Thuman gen hinapi-in zuaugen bangin hong kingaihsun a," 
2Corinthians6:9 mi khempeuh in hong theih hinapi-in theih loh mi bangin hong kibawl a, nong theih uh mah bangin kote a nungta hinapi-in misi bangin hong kingaihsun hi." 
2Corinthians6:10 Dahna ka thuak uh hangin ka lungdam uh a, kote a zawng tawh kibang napi-in mi tampi ka hausak uh a, bangmah a nei het lo tawh kibang napi-in a taktakin ka neih loh uh bangmah om lo hi." 
2Corinthians6:11 Korin khua-a om lawmte aw, kote in bangmah ip nei loin lungsim takpi tawh thu ka hong gen uh hi." 
2Corinthians6:12 Kote in ka lungsim uh a hong pia lo hi loin note in na lungsim uh a hong pia lo na hizaw uh hi. 
2Corinthians6:13 Tua ahih manin tate tungah thugen bangin thu ka hong gen hi. Kote’ ngaihsut bangin note in zong hong ngaihsun unla, na lungsim uh hong taanzausak ta un." 
2Corinthians6:14 Thu um lo mite tawh na na semkhawm kei un. Midik le mimawh bangci-in kipawlthei ding a, khuavak le khuamial bangci-in omkhawm thei ding ahi hiam?" 
2Corinthians6:15 Khrih le Dawimangpa bangci-in kithutuak thei ding a, thu um mi le thu um lo mi bangci-in a ngaihsutna uh kibang thei ding ahi hiam?" 
2Corinthians6:16 Pasian’ biakinn le lawkite’ milim bangci kilem theih ding ahi hiam? Bang hang hiam cih leh Pasian in, “Ka mite lakah tengin amaute tawh ka omkhawm ding hi. Kei pen amaute’ Pasian ka hi ding a, amaute, keima mi ahi ding uh hi." 
2Corinthians6:17 Tua ahih manin Vanglian Topa keimah in kong genin-ah: Amaute tawh kikhenin amaute kiang panin paikhia unla, a siang lo peuhmah sukha kei un. Tua hileh note ka hong ngai ding hi." 
2Corinthians6:18 Kei pen note’ Pa hong hi-in, note, keima tate na hi ding uh hi,” na ci hi." 
2Corinthians7:1 Tua ahih manin ka hong it lawmte aw, pumpi le lungsim a ninsak theite khempeuh panin kisiansuahin, Pasian zahtakna tawh nungta-in siangtho sinsenin om ni." 
2Corinthians7:2 Kuama tungah kote hong khial lo, kuamah hong siasak lo, noptaksa-in kuama tungah hong gamta lo ka hih manun na lungsim uh hong pia un." 
2Corinthians7:3 Hih bang ka hong cih ciangin note mawhsak nopna tawh thu a hong gen ka hi kei hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh ka hong gensa mah bangin note hong it mahmah ka hih manun note na hin uhleh hingkhawm, na sih uhleh zong a sikhawm ngam ka hi uh hi." 
2Corinthians7:4 Note hong muang mahmahin note hangin ka kisathei a, lungkhamna a tuamtuam ka tuah hangin lunghimawh loin ka lungnuam mahmah hi." 
2Corinthians7:5 Masedonia gam ka tunkhit uh ciang nangawnin tawldam cih om thei tuan lo a, a koimah peuhah kitotna le lungkhamna om kawikawi ahih manin lungsim patauhna hi tawntung hi." 
2Corinthians7:6 Ahi zongin a lungkia mite a hanthawn Pasian in Titus hong tunna tawh kote hong thakhauhsak hi. 
2Corinthians7:6 Ahi zongin a lungkia mite a hanthawn Pasian in Titus hong tunna tawh kote hong thakhauhsak hi. 
2Corinthians7:7 Ama hong tunna hang bek zong hi loin ama lungsim a thahat nadingin note’ gamtatna zong a hong zasak hi. Note in kei na hong muhnopna thu uh, note na dahna thu uhleh kei na hong hutnopna thu uh hong gen ahih manin ka lung a dam semsem hi." 
2Corinthians7:8 Ka hong laigelhna in note tawlkhat sung a hong dahsak manin ka lungsim nuam lo ahi tei ta zongin tua ka hong laigelhna hangin ka kisik kei hi. 
2Corinthians7:9 Bang hang hiam cih leh tu-in ka lung a dam hi. Note ka hong dahsak khakna hangin a lungdam hi loin note na dahna hangun na ngaihsutna uh kheel thei na hih manun a nuam ka hi hi. Tua na dahna uh Pasian in a hoihlamin hong zang ahih manin note a dingin siatna a hong piangsak ka hi kei zaw uh hi. 
2Corinthians7:10 Tua na dahna uh hotkhiatna ngahtheih nadingin na lungsim uh na kheel nadingun Pasian in hong zang ahih manin dah nading bangmah om lo hi. Ahi zongin hih leitung dahna lelte in ahihleh sihna piangsak hi. 
2Corinthians7:11 Hih note’ dahna pen Pasian in a hoihlamin hong zatsak ahih manin mawk om nawn loin lungsim takpi tawh kinna na nei uh a, hoih lo hi, ci-in ka hong gente lunghimawhin siansak nopna lungsim na nei uh hi. A thupiangsate hangin lau-in lunghimawhin a hoih lote gim na pianuam uh hi. Hih thu khempeuhah note na paubaan nading uh a om lo hong suaksak hi." 
2Corinthians7:12 Tua bangin lai ka hong gelh hangin a khial pa ahih kei leh a thuak pa ngaihsutna tawh hong gelh hi lo zaw-in, Pasian’ thu sungah kote’ thu bangzahin na hong mang uh hiam cih a kitheih nadingin a hong gelh ka hizaw uh hi." 
2Corinthians7:13 Tua ahih manin tu-in ka lung uh nuam mahmah hi. Kote’ lungsim hong nuamsak bek hi loin, Titus lungsim a noptheihna dingin ama tungah na gamta na hih manun ama lungdamna in zong kote’ lungdamna hong behlapto sawnsawn hi." 
2Corinthians7:13 Tua ahih manin tu-in ka lung uh nuam mahmah hi. Kote’ lungsim hong nuamsak bek hi loin, Titus lungsim a noptheihna dingin ama tungah na gamta na hih manun ama lungdamna in zong kote’ lungdamna hong behlapto sawnsawn hi." 
2Corinthians7:14 Titus mai-ah note ka hong kisialhpih ngei a, note in ka kisialhna thu-ah kei na hong zahhuaisak kei uh hi. Note tungah thuman bekbek a hong gen ka hih mah bangun Titus tungah ka kisialhna uh zong a kisial khial ka hihlohna uh hong kilang hi." 
2Corinthians7:14 Titus mai-ah note ka hong kisialhpih ngei a, note in ka kisialhna thu-ah kei na hong zahhuaisak kei uh hi. Note tungah thuman bekbek a hong gen ka hih mah bangun Titus tungah ka kisialhna uh zong a kisial khial ka hihlohna uh hong kilang hi." 
2Corinthians7:15 Note in ama thu mangin, launa le linna tawh amah na zindona uh a ngaihsut ciangin Titus in note hong itna khang semsem hi." 
2Corinthians7:15 Note in ama thu mangin, launa le linna tawh amah na zindona uh a ngaihsut ciangin Titus in note hong itna khang semsem hi." 
2Corinthians7:16 Note hong muang mahmah ka hih manin ka lungsim a nuam hi. 
2Corinthians8:1 Sanggamte aw, Masedonia gam pawpite-ah Pasian’ hehpihna hangin a piang thute ka hong theisak nuam uh hi." 
2Corinthians8:2 Amaute in haksatna a tuamtuam phukha-in nakpitakin ze-etna thuakin, amaute zawng mahmah hita se le-uh lungdam mahmah uh ahih manin piakna lamsangah cingh thei mahmah uh hi." 
2Corinthians8:3 Amaute in amau ngahna tawh kituak bekin a pia hi loin, a piak zawhzah dingun a kilawm sangin a tamzaw a piakna uh ka thei taktak uh hi. Kuama sawl hi loin amau lungsimah a uttawmna uh tawh," 
2Corinthians8:4 Judea gam a Pasian mite, ko zong hong huh sak un, ci-in hong thumthum uh hi." 
2Corinthians8:4 Judea gam a Pasian mite, ko zong hong huh sak un, ci-in hong thumthum uh hi." 
2Corinthians8:5 Hih bangin a gamtatna uh kote’ lamet sangin sangzaw pek hi. Amaute pen Topa tungah kipia masa uh a, tua ciangin Pasian’ deihna bangin kote tungah zong a hong kipia uh ahi hi." 
2Corinthians8:6 Tua mah bangin Titus in zong hih bang nasep nading hong pat khit ahih mah bangin midang huh nading na sepnate uh note lakah hong zawhpih vet dingin ka hanthawn uh hi. 
2Corinthians8:6 Tua mah bangin Titus in zong hih bang nasep nading hong pat khit ahih mah bangin midang huh nading na sepnate uh note lakah hong zawhpih vet dingin ka hanthawn uh hi. 
2Corinthians8:7 Note pen thu upna, thugenna, thutheihna, midang huh ding lawpna, le kote nong itna uh a kipanin na khempeuhah midang sangin ginazaw na hih mah bangun midang huh nading hih nasepna-ah zong na cingh mahmah ta un." 
2Corinthians8:8 Hih bang ka hong gen ciangin thupiakna tawh a hong gen hi loin, midangte in tua zahin mi huh nading kin ahihleh note in zong midang na itna uh bangzah taktak ahi hiam, ci-in ka theihnopna ahi hi." 
2Corinthians8:9 Bang hang hiam cih leh i Topa Jesuh zong hau mahmah napi-in ama zawnna tawh note mihau na suahtheih nadingun note’ hangin mizawngin hong kibawl ahih manin i Topa Jesuh Khrih hong itna bangzah takin lian hiam, cih thu na thei uh hi." 
2Corinthians8:10 Hih thu tawh kisai-in keima ngaihsutna panin: Note in ni kumin hih bang nasep ding utna lungsim a nei bek hi loin a pankhia masate na hih uh mah bangin na tangtut ding uh hoihpen hi. 
2Corinthians8:11 Tua ahih manin na patsa uh thu a bei dongin zomsuak unla, na geelsa uh na tangtunsak theih nadingun na neihsa uh tawh lawptakin na sem un." 
2Corinthians8:12 Piaknopna lungsim na neih nak-uhleh na neih lohnate uh siksan hi loin na neihna uh tawh kizui-in na piak uh Pasian in hong sang ding hi. 
2Corinthians8:13 Hih bangin ka hong gen ciangin midangte in noptuamna a ngah nadingin note in haksapi-in tuam gimpih ding ka cihna hi lo hi. 
2Corinthians8:14 Tu laitakin note cithei na hih manun amau cihmawhnate-ah huh le-uhcin, note in haksat na tuah hun uh ciangin zong amaute in hong huh ding uh ahih manin note khatlekhat na kihuh diamdiam ding uh ka deihna ahi hi." 
2Corinthians8:15 Bang hang hiam cih leh Lai Siangtho in zong, “An tampi a lapa in an hau lua tuan lo a, tawmno a lapa zong zawng lua tuan lo hi,” na ci hi." 
2Corinthians8:16 Kote’ hong kin zahin Titus in note hong kin nadingin Pasian in lungsim guan ahih manin Pasian tungah ka nuam mahmah uh hi. 
2Corinthians8:16 Kote’ hong kin zahin Titus in note hong kin nadingin Pasian in lungsim guan ahih manin Pasian tungah ka nuam mahmah uh hi. 
2Corinthians8:17 Amah in kote hong sawlna a hong mang ciang bek hi loin, amah in note huhnopna lungsim neitawm ahih manin note kiangah pai ding hong ngaihsun hi." 
2Corinthians8:18 Lungdamna thuhilh nasepna-ah pawlpi khempeuh in a zahtak mahmah, thu upna sungah ka sanggampa uh tawh zong ka hong kithuahsak uh hi." 
2Corinthians8:19 Tua tham loin, Pasian’ minthan nading le midangte ka huhnopna uh a kilat nadingin hih bangin mi huh nading vaihawmin ka khualzinna peuh uhah a hong zui dingin pawlpite in teelin a seh pa uh zong ahi hi." 
2Corinthians8:20 Citna tawh mi huh nadingin a kipia hih sum ka zeekna uh tawh kisai-in mi a phunkhak loh nadingun a kidawm mahmah ka hi uh hi. 
2Corinthians8:21 Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa’ hoihsak ding bek hi loin mite in zong hoih a sak ding bangin na a semnuam ka hi uh hi. 
2Corinthians8:22 Amau tegel tawh hong kithuah dingin thu upna sungah ka sanggam uh adang khat tawh zong ka hong tonsak uh hi. Amah pen na khempeuhah thuman mahmah hi, ci-in ka theih khitsa uh hi a, note hong muan mahmahna hangin note hong huh ding a lawpna khang semsem hi." 
2Corinthians8:23 Titus ahihleh note a’ ding ka nasepna-ah ka kikholhpih ka naseppih mi hi a, amah tawh hong kithuah ka sanggam tegel uh ahihleh pawlpite’ tang hi uh a, Khrih’ min a thangsakte ahi uh hi." 
2Corinthians8:23 Titus ahihleh note a’ ding ka nasepna-ah ka kikholhpih ka naseppih mi hi a, amah tawh hong kithuah ka sanggam tegel uh ahihleh pawlpite’ tang hi uh a, Khrih’ min a thangsakte ahi uh hi." 
2Corinthians8:24 Tua ahih manin note ka hong kisialhpihna uhah a kisial khial ka suah loh nading uh le pawlpi khempeuh in a theihtel nadingun hih ka sanggamte uh limtakin na limbawl un. 
2Corinthians9:1 Judea gam a om Pasian mite huh nading tawh kisai-in lai kong gelh ding kisam nawn lo hi. 
2Corinthians9:1 Judea gam a om Pasian mite huh nading tawh kisai-in lai kong gelh ding kisam nawn lo hi. 
2Corinthians9:2 Note’ huhnopna thu ka theih khitsa hi a, Masedonia gam a pawlpite kiangah zong note ka hong kisialhpih khitsa ahi hi. “Akhaia gam a pawlpite in ni kum a kipanin huh dingin a kithawisa uh ahi hi,” ci-in ka na gen hi. Tua banga note’ lawpna in amaute tampi tak thanuamsak hi." 
2Corinthians9:3 Ahi zongin note ka hong kisialhpihna uh a mawkna a suahkhak loh nadingin na huh nading uh na kiging khol un, ka hong cih mah bangin na kiginkholh theih nadingun ka sanggamte uh ka hong ma paisak hi." 
2Corinthians9:4 Tua bang hikeileh kei ka hong pai ciangin Masedonia gam a ka lawmte in hong zuikha zenzen hen la, note a kiging lopi-in a om hong tuakkha leh, note ka hong muan gen mahmahsa ahih manin note’ maizum ding gen loh, kote bangzah takin maizum ding ka hi uh hiam?" 
2Corinthians9:5 Tua ahih manin piak dingin na kamciamsa uh huhna sumte a baihsa-in a omtheih nadingin hih ka sanggamte a hong mapai ding kisam ka sa hi. Tua hileh kei ka hong tun ciangin a baihsa-in na om ding a, note in piak loh phamawh cihna lungsim tawh hi loin utna lungsim tawh a pia na hihna uh hong kilang ding hi." 
2Corinthians9:6 Note in na phawk ding uh thu panin: Khaici tawm a vawhte in tawm mah la ding a, tampi a vawhte in tampi mah la ding uh hi." 
2Corinthians9:7 Pasian in piaknopna lungsim tawh a pia mite bek deih ahih manin, a kuamah peuh in na lungsim sung uhah na ngaihsutsa zah ciat uh na pia unla, pia nuam lopipi le sawlzawh thu bek tawh na pia kei un." 
2Corinthians9:8 Note in na kisap khempeuh uh na neihtheih nading uh le midangte huh nading zong na neihthuah theih nadingun Pasian in hong pia thei hi. 
2Corinthians9:9 Bang hang hiam cih leh Lai Siangtho in, “Amah in citna tawh mizawngte pia zuahzuah a, ama migitna kip tawntung hi,” na ci hi." 
2Corinthians9:10 Tua ahih manin vawh ding khaici le nek ding an hong pia Pasian in note’ cit piakna hangin nopsakna lian tampi na ngahtheih nadingun note tungah a kisam khaici hong guanin a pungsak ding hi. 
2Corinthians9:11 Kote tungtawnin note’ huhna sumte a ngahna uh hangin mi tampi in Pasian a phattheih nadingin note na cit gamtatzawh tawntung nadingun Pasian in hong hausak tawntung ding hi. 
2Corinthians9:12 Bang hang hiam cih leh note’ huhna sumte in Pasian’ mi a cimawhte’ dong a hu bek hi loin, Pasian’ tungah lungdamkoh nading zong a piangsak ahi hi." 
2Corinthians9:13 Note in na up uh Jesuh hangin lungdamna thu-ah na cihtakna uh le amaute le midang khempeuh tungah na cit piakna hangun mi tampite in Pasian’ min phat ding uh hi. 
2Corinthians9:14 Note tungah Pasian in hehpihna thupha a val a kanin hong piakna hangin amaute in note hong munuam mahmahin thu zong hong ngetsak ding uh hi. 
2Corinthians9:15 A manphatna a kigen zo lo Pasian’ hong piak hih thupha hangin Pasian tungah i lungdamna ko ciat ni. 
2Corinthians10:1 Keimah Paul in Khrih migitna le lungduaina tawh note kiangah ka hong thum hi. Kei pen note tawh ka hong omkhawm laitakin a meidawi, note tawh ka omkhawm loh ciangin a tapkual han in hong kigen hi." 
2Corinthians10:2 Note kiangah ka hong pai ciangin ka hong hangsankhak loh nadingin na om nadingun ka hong thum hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh leitung ngaihsutna tawh nasem hi, ci-in kote a hong ngaihsunte tungah hangtakin ka gamta ding hi." 
2Corinthians10:3 Kote pen leitungah a teng mi ka hi mah uh hi; ahi zongin leitung lungsim ngimna tawh galdo ka hi kei uh hi. 
2Corinthians10:4 Kote’ zat galdona hiam pen leitung galhiam lelte hi lo a, galte’ panmun phualpi a susiazo ding Pasian’ galhiam khauhte ahi hi." 
2Corinthians10:5 Mite’ ngaihsutna a man lote ka thalnial gawpzo uh a, Pasian’ thu theih nading a khaktan thei nate ka susiagawp uh a, mi khempeuh’ ngaihsutna zo gawpin Khrih’ thu a mang dingin ka bawl uh hi." 
2Corinthians10:6 Note thumanin na cihtakna uh a kitheihtel khit ciangin a thuman lo a citak lo khempeuh gimpiak ding ka kipan ta ding uh hi. 
2Corinthians10:7 Note in na khatpeuh na ngaihsut uh ciangin a tungthamah a kimu theiteng na siksankha thei uh hi. Mi khatpeuh in Khrih tawh ka kipawl hi, ci-in a kingaihsut leh, amah a kipawl ahih zah mah bangin kote zong Khrih tawh a kipawl ka hihna thu uh limtakin ngaihsun tahen." 
2Corinthians10:8 Bang hang hiam cih leh note’ siat nading hi loin note’ hoihna dingin Topa in kote tungah hong piak thuneihna hong nakzat lua-in ka kisialhpih hangin themkhat zong ka maizum kei hi. 
2Corinthians10:9 Hih bangin lai ka hong gelhna tawh note a hong laugawpsak nuam ka hi kei hi. 
2Corinthians10:10 Mi pawlkhat in, “Paul’ laigelhte khauhin nasia mahmah a, ahi zongin eite kiangah amah a om ciangin bangmah thupi khollo hi,” hong ci uh hi." 
2Corinthians10:11 Tua ahih manin lai ka hong gelhna sung uhah ka thugente uh le note kiangah ka hong pai uh ciangin ka sepna dingte uh bangmah a kilamdang het lo ding ahihna thu tua mite in teltakin thei ta uh hen. 
2Corinthians10:12 Kote ahihleh tua bangin a kiliansak mahmah mite tawh a kikimin ka kingaihsun ngam buang kei ding uh hi. Amaute khatlekhat ki-en kakin thupi kisa mahmah uh ahih manin mihai taktak ahi uh hi. 
2Corinthians10:13 Ahi zongin kote ka kisialh nading uh kiciangtan a, note lakah na ka hong sep nadingun Pasian in a hong sehsaksa thu sung ciang bekah ka kisial thei uh hi." 
2Corinthians10:14 Note kiangah Khrih hangin lungdamna thu a hong hilh masate ka hih manun note kiangah thu ka hong hici gen uh ciangin a ciangtan khengvalin a gamta ka hi kei uh hi. 
2Corinthians10:15 Tua ahih manin Pasian in kote a dingin a hong sehsaksa khengvalin midangte’ nasepna-ah a kisial ka hi kei uh a, Pasian’ hong piak kote’ huam sungah note’ upna khangin note lakah ka nasepna uh a tangzaizaw a suah nading a lamen ka hi uh hi." 
2Corinthians10:16 Tua hileh note’ gam banah gam dangah Lungdamna Thu ka hilh thei ding uh a, midangte’ nasepnasa sungah zong ka kisialh ding uh kullo ding hi." 
2Corinthians10:17 Lai Siangtho in, “Mi khat peuhpeuh a kisialh nop leh Topa’ nasepnate bek kisialhpih hen,” na ci hi." 
2Corinthians10:18 Bang hang hiam cih leh mi khat peuhpeuh amah a kiphattawm ciangin a kipakta hi lo a, Topa in a phat ciangin a kipakta hi pan hi." 
2Corinthians11:1 Ka hai ahi phial zongin ka haina mah hong thuakpih le-uhcin ka ut hi. Hong thuakpih taktak ta un. 
2Corinthians11:2 Pasian in hong aam mahmah bangin note ka hong aam mahmah hi. Nungak le tangval nupa dingin a kigawm mah bangin khat bek ahi Khrih tawh a kigawm dingin nungak siangtho bang na hi uh hi. 
2Corinthians11:3 Ahi zongin gulpi in ama zuau ngian tawh Eve a khemzawh bangin na lungsim uh kihei-in Khrih tungah na kipiaknate uh na nusiatkhak ding uh ka lunghimawh hi. 
2Corinthians11:4 Bang hang hiam cih leh kote’ hilh a hi lo adang Jesuh’ thu a hilh hong pai ciangin lungdam takin na sang pahpah uh a, kote’ hong hilh Kha Siangtho le lungdamna thu tawh a kibang lo kha thu le lungdamna thu hong hilh a om ciangin na sang pahpah uh hi." 
2Corinthians11:5 Note in sawltak thupi mahmahte hi, ci-in na ngaihsut uh mite sangin themkha zong a neuzaw-in ka kingaihsun het kei hi." 
2Corinthians11:6 Thugen siamna le pilna thuk ka nei kei kha mah ding hi. Hih thu tawh kisai-in ahihleh, a tawntungin na khempeuhah ka hong gensa uh ahi hi." 
2Corinthians11:7 Note kiangah Pasian hangin Lungdamna Thu ka hong hilh ciangin note tung panin thaman bangmah ka hong ngen het kei a, note a thupi na suah ding uh ka deihna-in kei ka kiniamkhiat hi. Hih thu tawh kisai-in a sialamin kei hong lehngaihsut zawsop na hi uh hiam?" 
2Corinthians11:8 Note kiangah na ka sep laitakin pawlpi dangte in kei hong vak uh ahih manin, note huh nadingin midangte’ na a kisut ahi hi." 
2Corinthians11:9 Note lakah na ka sep laitakin Masedonia gam panin a hong pai pawlpi mite in ka sapna khempeuh hong puak uh ahih manin note khat beek ka hong gimsak kei hi. A beisa hunah note ka hong gimsakkhak loh mah bangin mailam hunah zong ka hong gimsakkha het kei ding hi. 
2Corinthians11:10 Khrih thuman keima sungah om ahih mah bangin no Akhaia gam sungah hih ka kisialhna thu mah kizom paisuak ding hi, ci-in ka kiciam hi." 
2Corinthians11:11 Hih bangin kam ka pau ciangin note ka hong it loh man ahi hiam? Note ka hong itna hang hizaw hi. Hih thu Pasian in thei hi. 
2Corinthians11:12 Tua sawltak dangte in, “Kote in zong amau’ sepzia mah bangin ka sem uh hi,” ci-in a kisialh theih loh nadingun tuhunin nasep thaman bangmah ka hong lak loh mah bangin mai lamah zong ka hong la kei ding hi." 
2Corinthians11:13 Amaute pen sawltak taktak hi loin, sawltak a kineihkhemte hi uh a, a nasepna uhah zong zuau-in, Khrih’ sawltak taktak a battheih nadingun a mel kiseel ahi uh hi." 
2Corinthians11:14 Tua pen lamdangsak ding hi lo hi. Satan nangawn Pasian’ vantungmi tawh a kibangin kibawltawm thei hi. 
2Corinthians11:15 Tua ahih manin Satan’ sawltakte pen thuman nasem bangin a kibawl manin lamdangsak ding hi lo hi. Hun bei ni ciangin amau gamtatna bangun thuak ngawn ding uh hi. 
2Corinthians11:16 Kuamah in mihai-in hong ngaihsun kei hen, ka ci kikkik nuam hi. Ahi zongin a hai-in hong ngaihsun na om uhleh zong tawmkhat ka hong kisialh theih nadingin ka haisapi mahin hong sang veve un." 
2Corinthians11:17 Tu-in ka hong gen ding thute pen Topa’ hong sawl hi lo hi. Tu-a kisialhna kam ka hong pau ciangin mihai taktak mah bangin a pau ka hi hi. 
2Corinthians11:18 Mi tampi in hih leitung ngeinate kisialhpih thei uh ahih manin kei zong ka hong kisial ding hi. 
2Corinthians11:19 Note pil kisa mahmah na hih manun lungdam takin mihaite na sang pahpah uh hi. 
2Corinthians11:20 Note, sila-in hong bawlin, note hong thangsiahin, na haina uh nuamtaksa-in hong hih thopthopin, note hong simmawh bawlin, na paang uh a hong bengbengte na sang uh hi." 
2Corinthians11:21 Tua bangin na om uh zumhuai mahmah hi. Kote ahihleh note tungah ka hong tuaci gamtat ngam kei uh hi. Ahi zongin a kisial ngam om ahihleh kei zong mihai bangin ka hong kisial ngam ding hi. 
2Corinthians11:22 Amaute Hebru mi ahihleh kei zong Hebru mi mah ka hi hi. Amaute Abraham’ suan Israel mite ahihleh kei zong Abraham’ suan Israel mi mah ka hi hi. 
2Corinthians11:23 Amaute Khrih nasem ahihleh kei zong hong hai pau mai ning. Khrih nasem a hoihzaw pekpek ka hi hi. Amaute sangin na ka nak sepzaw a, satna tamvei ka thuakzaw a, sih dektakna tamvei ka tuakzaw hi." 
2Corinthians11:24 Jew mite’ khut sungah sawmthum le kua vei satna nga vei tak ka thuak hi. 
2Corinthians11:25 Rom mite in thumvei hong sat a, khatvei suang tawh hong deng uh hi. Teembaw siatna thumvei ka tuak a, sun khat le zan khat tawntung tui tungah ka laam ngei hi." 
2Corinthians11:26 Khual ka zinzinna lamin tuikhang lauhuaina, misuamte lauhuaina, ka mipihte’ suk ding lauhuaina, Gentail mite’ suk ding lauhuaina, khuapi sung le gamlakah lauhuaina, tuipi tungah lauhuaina, lawm man lote’ hih ding lauhuaina a tuamtuamte ka phukha hi." 
2Corinthians11:27 Nasem silbawlin ki-om tawntung a, ihmu man lo liangin zong ka om zel hi. Gilkial dangtakin ka om zel a, annek ding nei lo, giah nading om lo, puansilh ding nei loin ka om hun tampi a om hi." 
2Corinthians11:28 Tua bang haksatna a tuamtuam ka thuak banah nisimin pawlpi a tuamtuamte a dingin lunghimawhin ka lunggimpih lai hi. 
2Corinthians11:29 A thaneem a om ciangin lungkhampihin kei zong ka thaneem a, mawhna-ah a pukkha a om ciangin dahin ka lunggimpih hi." 
2Corinthians11:30 Ka kisialh leh zong ka ginat lohna hong kilangsak nate hangin ka kisial bek hi. 
2Corinthians11:31 Topa Jesuh’ Pa Pasian in thupha ngah tawntung tahen. Amah in ka zuau hetloh lamtak a hong thei hi. 
2Corinthians11:32 Damaskas khuapi sungah ka om laitakin Kumpi Aretas khutnuai-a gam ukpa in kei hong mattheih nadingin Damaskas khuakulh kongpi cingsak a," 
2Corinthians11:33 ahi zongin kulh tawlet vang panin hong kikhaikhia suk ahih manin ama khutsung panin ka suakta hi. 
2Corinthians12:1 Bangmah phattuamnapi a om khollo ahi zongin ka kisialsial lai ding hi. Tu-in Topa in maang hong muhsakna le ka muhte ka hong gen ding hi. 
2Corinthians12:2 Tuma kum sawm le li hun lai-in vantung a dawl tungnung penah Khristian khat kilato hi. A pumpi taktak hiam, maangmu ahi hiam ka thei kei hi. Pasian in thei hi." 
2Corinthians12:3 Tua mipa pen Paradais-ah a om ahi hi. A pumpi taktak tawh ahi hiam, maangmu ahi hiam ka thei kei a, Pasian in thei hi." 
2Corinthians12:4 Mite kiangah genkhiatsawn dingin a kiphal lo a lamdang mahmah thu a za hi. 
2Corinthians12:5 Tua bang thu pen a kisialh taak mahmah thu hinapi-in ka kisialhpih kei hi. Kei a ginalo hinapi ama minthan nadingin Pasian in hong zang ahih manin tua thu pen a kisialh taak mahmah thu hinapi-in ka kisialhpih kei hi. Kei a ginalo hinapi ama minthan nadingin Pasian in hong zang ahih manin tua thu ka kisialhpih bek hi. 
2Corinthians12:6 Hih ka muh thu pen thuman ahih manin a kisialhpih hita leng zong mihai ka hi kei hi. Ahi zongin mite in keima sepna le keima genna a muh a zak banah a valin hong thupi ngaihsutkhak ding uh ut lo ka hih manin hih thu ka kisialhpih nuam kei hi. 
2Corinthians12:7 Ahi zongin hih a lamdang na tampite ka muhna hangin kisialin ka kisaktheih khak loh nadingin Satan’ sawltak bangin na a sem, keima pumpi sungah natna khat hong kipia ahih manin ka kisaktheih luat loh nadingin a hong kham hi." 
2Corinthians12:8 Tua natna tawh ka kipelh theih nadingin Topa kiangah thumvei tak thu ka ngen hi. 
2Corinthians12:9 Ahi zongin Topa in kei kiangah, “Na tha a nem ciangin keima vangliatna hat mahmah ahih manin nangma kisapna pen keima hehpihna hi bek hi,” ci-in hong dawng hi. Tua ahih manin keima sungah Khrih vangliatna hong omtheih nadingin lungdam takin ka thaneemna ka kisialhpih semsem hi." 
2Corinthians12:10 Kei ka thaneem mahmah laitakin a thahat mahmah suak ka hih manin Khrih hangin ka thaneemna, simmawh ka thuakna, haksatna, bawlsiatna le lungkhamna ka thuaknate tawh ka lung a kim mahmah hi." 
2Corinthians12:11 Note in kei a hong pakta ding hinapi-in hong pakta lo na hih manun note’ bawlin mihai bangin kisialin ka gamta hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh kei pen bangmahpi ka hihloh hangin sawltak thupi mahmahin na ngaihsutte uh sangin themkhat zong ka neuzaw tuan het kei hi. 
2Corinthians12:12 Sawltak man taktak ka hihna lim a kilangsak nate, note lakah lungduai takin hong kisem a, lim, nalamdang, le na a tuamtuamte note lakah hong kibawl hi." 
2Corinthians12:13 Note lakah na ka sepna hangin huhna bangmah kong nget loh cih simloh, pawlpi dangte sangin kong hamsiatsak zawkna bangmah om het lo hi. Tua bangin note kiang panin bangmah kong nget lohna hangin midang tawh hong kibangsak lo suak ka hih manin, tua khialhna hong maisak ta un." 
2Corinthians12:14 Tu-in kong hawh nading pen a thumvei nading hita a, note’ gim nadingin bangmah ka hong ngen het kei ding hi. Keima deih pen note’ sumlepaite hi loin note mahmah na hi uh hi. A taktakin ci lehang, tate in nu le pate a huh ding hi lo a, nu le pate in tate a huh ding hizaw hi." 
2Corinthians12:15 Note ka hong huhtheih nadingin lungdamtakin ka neih khempeuh kong piaknop banah keima pumpi mahmah zong ka hong kipia nuam hi. Tuazah takin ka hong itna pen it lohna tengin hong nei zawsop ding na hi uh hiam? 
2Corinthians12:16 Sumlepai vai-in note themkhat zong ka hong gimsak hetlohna na theihsa uh ahi hi. Ahi zongin mi pawlkhatte in, kei pen ngian zangin khemna tawh a lamdang khatah sum tamzaw ka ngah nading a vaihawmin hong gen uh hi." 
2Corinthians12:17 Note kiangah ka hong paisak mite tungtawnin note kiang panin keima hamphat nading bang la ka hi hiam? 
2Corinthians12:18 Note kiangah Titus a hong pai nading ka hahsawl a, amah tawh a kithuah dingin thu upna sungah ka sanggampa uh zong ka hong paisak hi. Titus in nuamtaksa-in note tungah bang hong ngen zenzen ahi hiam? Kote in lungsim kibangin na semin ka kalsuanna zia uh zong a kibang hi lo ahi hiam?" 
2Corinthians12:18 Note kiangah Titus a hong pai nading ka hahsawl a, amah tawh a kithuah dingin thu upna sungah ka sanggampa uh zong ka hong paisak hi. Titus in nuamtaksa-in note tungah bang hong ngen zenzen ahi hiam? Kote in lungsim kibangin na semin ka kalsuanna zia uh zong a kibang hi lo ahi hiam?" 
2Corinthians12:19 Note mai-ah ka mawhna uh a kiphelphel bang khatin na hong ngaihsut khak uhleh tua bang hi lo hi. Lawmte aw, ka hihna khempeuh uh note’ phattuam nading ka deihna uh tawh Khrih in kote’ gen ding a hong deih bangin Pasian’ mai-ah thu genin nasem ka hi uh hi." 
2Corinthians12:20 Bang hang hiam cih leh note kiangah ka hong tun ciangin note’ omzia ding ka deih bangin na om loh khak ding uh le note in keima maisuah na muhnopzia bangun na hong muh loh khak ding uh ka lunghimawh hi. Note lakah kitotna, hazatna, hehna, huaihamna, mi zahpihna, mi gensiatna, kiphatsakna, le buaina a omkhak ding ka lunghimawh hi." 
2Corinthians12:21 Note kiangah ka hong tun ciangin a beisa hunah note tampi tak thangtatin, numei tawh mawhna, hukna, lannate hangin na khialhnate uh na kisik loh manun keimah dahin kapin, note’ muhna-ah ka Pasian in kei hong maizumsak khak ding ka lunghimawh mahmah hi." 
2Corinthians13:1 Tu-a ka hong pai nading pen a thumveina hita hi. Lai Siangtho sungah, “Mawhna a bawl khat peuhpeuh a thei mi nih le thum a om ciang bekin a mawh hi, ci-in kingaihsun pan ding hi,” ci-in a kigelh mah bangin tua bangin ka hong sem ding hi." 
2Corinthians13:2 A beisa hunah mawhna a gamtate le adangte khempeuh kiangah, a nihveina ka hong hawh lai-in keima kam tawh ka hong gen bangin tu-in zong lai tawh ka hong gelhnop thu in: Ka hong paikik ciangin kuamah hong zah nawn lo ding ka hih manin gim na thuak pelmawh ding uh hi." 
2Corinthians13:3 Khrih in keima tungtawnin thu hong gen taktak mah ahi hiam, ci-in theihtelna na deih uh mah bangin tu-in na deihdeih uh na theita ding uh hi. Note tungah amah in na hong sep ciangin hong dam hih hetloin khauhtakin hong hih ding hi." 
2Corinthians13:4 Bang hang hiam cih leh thaneemna hangin singlamteh tungah a kikhai ahi zongin a hinkikna pen Pasian’ vangliatna hang ahi hi. Amah tawh ka kipawl manun kote zong ka tha uh nem a, ahi zongin note tungah na ka hong sep uh ciangin Pasian’ vangliatna zangin ka hong semkhawm ding uh hi." 
2Corinthians13:5 Thu um taktak mah ihi hiam, ci-in nomau mahmah na ki-entel ciat un. Na ki-ettelna uhah a cingtaak lo na hih kei nak-uhleh note sungah Khrih om ahih manin thu phawk un." 
2Corinthians13:6 Na ki-ettel uh ciangin a cingtaak mi hikim dingin ka hong lamen hi. 
2Corinthians13:7 Kote in ka nasepna uh a tangtun zo lo tawh ka kibangkha uh ahi zongin, kote’ nasepna a tangtun ding deih hi lo zaw-in, note gamta khialkha loin a manin na gamtat nading uh ka deihna uh tawh thu ka hong ngetsakzaw uh hi." 
2Corinthians13:8 Bang hang hiam cih leh kote pen thuman nasepna a khaktan thei dingte hi loin a khan nadingin nasemte ka hi uh hi. 
2Corinthians13:9 Kote’ deih bulpi pen note na cingtaak theih nading uh ahih manin note’ thahat laitakin kote ka thaneemna uh zong ka nuam veve uh hi. 
2Corinthians13:10 Note’ siat nading hi loin note’ phattuam nadingin Topa in kei tungah a hong piak thuneihna pen note tungah khauhtakin ka hong zatkhak loh nadingin lai a hong gelh ka hi hi. 
2Corinthians13:11 Sanggamte aw, tu-in mangpha na man un. Na omzia uh na kipuahpha-in ka hong thugente na zui unla, khatlekhat kithutuak kilem takin na om un. Itna le kilemna a piathei Pasian in note hong ompih tahen." 
2Corinthians13:12 Unau ki-itna tawh khatlekhat kihopihin na kinam un. 
2Corinthians13:13 Hih lai-a om Pasian’ mite khempeuh in note hong hopih uh hi. 
2Corinthians13:14 Topa Jesuh Khrih hong hehpihna thupha, le Pasian’ hong itna, le Kha Siangtho tawh kikholh theihna, note khempeuh tungah hong tung tahen." 
Galatians1:1 Mihingte’ hong sehna le hong sawlna tawh sawltak na a sem hi loin, Jesuh Khrih le sihna panin tua Jesuh a thosakkik Pasian’ hong sawlna tawh sawltak na a sem keimah Paul in Galati gam a om pawlpi tuamtuamte tungah lai ka hong khak hi." 
Galatians1:2 Kei tawh a omkhawm i Khristianpihte in zong note hong hopih uh hi. 
Galatians1:3 Eite’ Pa Pasian le Topa Jesuh Khrih in note khempeuh tungah dikna le nopsakna thupha hong tungsak tahen. 
Galatians1:4 A siahuai tuhun sung panin eite a hong suahtaksak nadingin eite’ Pa Pasian’ deihna tawh kizui-in i mawhna hangin tua Jesuh Khrih amahmah a hong kipiatawm ahi hi. 
Galatians1:5 Pasian’ min thang tawntung ta hen! Amen. 
Galatians1:6 A hong hehpihna tawh Khrih hangin note a hong sam Pasian nusiakik pakin lungdamna thudang khat na sang malam na hih manun lamdang ka sa mahmah hi. 
Galatians1:7 A taktakin ci lehang lungdamna thu adang a om hi lo a, mi pawlkhatte in note’ lungsim hong toknawi-in, Khrih hanga lungdamna thu hei-in thudang tawh laihnuam uh ahih manin, tua amau’ deih thu pen lungdamna thu a cihsak mawkmawk ka hi hi." 
Galatians1:8 Note tungah ka hong hilhsa uh lungdamna thu tawh a kilehngatin, kote a kipan vantungmi dongin thudang a hong hilh a om leh tua a hong hilh mipa hell khuk sungah tung ta hen!" 
Galatians1:9 Ka hong gen ngeisa mah bangin ka hong gen kikin-ah: Note’ sansa lungdamna thu tawh a kilehngatin thudang a hong hilh mi peuhpeuh hell khuksung tung ta hen! 
Galatians1:10 Hih bangin thu ka gen ciangin mite’ hong pahtak theih nading a zong tawh kibang na hong sa uh hiam? Mite’ pahtak ding a ut ka hi kei a, Pasian’ hong pahtak ding a hanciam ka hi hi. Mihingte’ hong pahtak theih nadingin a gamta hi zenzen leng, Khrih’ nasem ka hi kei ding hi." 
Galatians1:11 Sanggamte aw, keima hilh lungdamna thu pen mihingte tung panin a hong kipan ahihlohna thu na theih ding uh ka deih hi." 
Galatians1:12 Mi khatpeuh tung panin ka ngah hi lo a, mi khatpeuh in hong hilh zong hi lo hi. Jesuh Khrih in kei tungah a hong lahna hang bekin hih thu a thei ka hi hi." 
Galatians1:13 Jew biakna sungah ka omlai hunin Pasian’ pawlpi tuamtuamte bawlsiat ding kin mahmahin, a beimang nading uh ka hanciamna," 
Galatians1:14 le ka khangualte lakah Jew biakna lamah a makai pen ka hihna thu, le ka pu ka pate uh tang ngeinate a nakkin mahmah ka hihna a kipanin ka pianzia ngeisate khempeuh na zaksa na theihsa uh ahi hi." 
Galatians1:15 Ahi zongin Pasian in a hong hehpihna tawh ka suahma pekin kei hong teelin ama na a sem dingin hong sam khin hi. Keimah in ama Tapa hanga lungdamna thu, Gentail mite lakah ka hilhtheih nadingin kei tungah a Tapa hong kilatsak hun laitakin kuama kiangah thu dongin ka pai kei a,"

Galatians2:2 Pasian’ hong sawlna tawh tua lai-ah a pai ka hi hi. Ka nasepnate a mawkna a suahkhak ding ut lo ka hih manin makai lian a kineite tawh a tuamin kimuhna khat ka nei a, Gentail mite lakah ka hilh lungdamna thute amaute kiangah gentelna khat ka nei hi." 
Galatians2:3 Kei tawh a kithuah Titus nangawn Grik mi hinapi-in a vun ki-atsak tuan lo hi.

Galatians2:4 Ahi zongin mi pawlkhat in atsak nuam sam uh hi. Khrih Jesuh tawh ka kipawlna hangun suahtakna ka ngahna thu uh a kansim dingin amaute thu um mi kineihkhemin kote lakah hong kihel uh hi. Amaute in kote pen sila hong suaksak nuam uh ahi hi. 
Galatians2:5 Lungdamna thuman taktak pelem hetloin note a dingin a kipsuak theih nadingin amaute’ deihna themkhat zong ka zui het kei uh hi. 
Galatians2:6 Jerusalem khua-a om makai lian a kinei mite in kei’ nasepna tawh kisai thu-ah bangmah genthuah ding nei lo uh hi. (Pasian in maitang zahtak tuam nei tuan lo ahih manin hih bangin thu a gen ngam ka hi hi.) 
Galatians2:7 Amaute in genthuah ding a neih gen loh, Jew mite tungah lungdamna thu hilh ding nasep, Pasian in Peter tungah a piak mah bangin, Gentail mite tungah lungdamna thu hilh nading nasep, Pasian in kei tungah a hong piakna thu a muzaw uh hi." 
Galatians2:8 Bang hang hiam cih leh Jew mite lakah sawltak nasep a sem dingin Peter a koih mah bangin Gentail mite lakah sawltak nasep a sem dingin Pasian in kei a hong koih hi. 
Galatians2:9 Makai a kinei James, Peter, le Johan-te in Gentail mite lakah nasem dingin Pasian in kei hong sehna thu thei uh ahih manin, Pasian sungah nasemkhawm khat ihi hi, cih hong lahna uh limin kei le Barnabas tawh khut kiletna hong bawl uh hi. Kei le Barnabas in Gentail mite lakah na semin amaute in Jew mite lakah na a sep nading uh thukimna ka nei uh hi." 
Galatians2:9 Makai a kinei James, Peter, le Johan-te in Gentail mite lakah nasem dingin Pasian in kei hong sehna thu thei uh ahih manin, Pasian sungah nasemkhawm khat ihi hi, cih hong lahna uh limin kei le Barnabas tawh khut kiletna hong bawl uh hi. Kei le Barnabas in Gentail mite lakah na semin amaute in Jew mite lakah na a sep nading uh thukimna ka nei uh hi." 
Galatians2:10 Kote in amaute lakah a om mizawngte ka phawk ding uh hong kal bek a, tua lah kei zong ngaihsut penin ka neihsa thu mah ahi hi." 
Galatians2:11 Antiok khua-ah Peter hong hawh sungin a gamtat khialhna hangin thu uppih mite lak mahah amah ka taii hi. 
Galatians2:12 James in a hong sawl mi pawlkhatte, tua khua-ah a hong tunma-in Peter in thu um Gentail mite tawh an nekhawm napi-in, Gentail mite vun at ding hi, a ci mite a kihtakna hangin tua mite hong tun ciangin Gentail mite tawh an nekhawm ngam nawn loin hong kihemkhia hi." 
Galatians2:12 James in a hong sawl mi pawlkhatte, tua khua-ah a hong tunma-in Peter in thu um Gentail mite tawh an nekhawm napi-in, Gentail mite vun at ding hi, a ci mite a kihtakna hangin tua mite hong tun ciangin Gentail mite tawh an nekhawm ngam nawn loin hong kihemkhia hi." 
Galatians2:13 Thu um Jew midangte zong hong meidawisuah a, amaute’ gamtatna hangin Barnabas nangawn meidawi-in amaute bangin hong gamta hi." 
Galatians2:14 Lungdamna thu tawh kizui-in a mantakin gamta lo uh hi, ci-in ka muh ciangin amaute khempeuh’ zakin Peter kiangah, “Nang pen Jew mi hinapi-in Jew mi bangin gamta loin Gentail mite bangin a gamta khinsa na hi hi. Tua bangin a gamta khinsa hinapi-in bang hangin tu-in Gentail mite, Jew mite bangin a gamtat nadingun na gamtatna tawh lakkik na hi hiam?” ka ci hi." 
Galatians2:15 A taktakin ci lehang kote pen ka pian’ ka patun Jew mi ka hi uh a, “Mawhnei Gentail mi,” ka cih pawlte uh ka hi kei uh hi." 
Galatians2:16 Ahi zongin Jesuh Khrih upna hang bek tawh Pasian tawh kipawl theihna kingahin, Thukham zuihna hang tawh kingah ngei lo hi, ci-in ka thei uh hi. Kote mahmah in zong, Khrih hangin Pasian tawh ka kipawl theih nadingun Jesuh Khrih ka um uh a, Thukham deihna ka zuihna hang uh tawh hi lo hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Thukham zuihna hang tawh kuamah in Pasian tawh kipawl theihna ngah zo lo hi." 
Galatians2:17 Tua ahihleh Khrih ka upna hangun Pasian tawh kipawl theih nading ka hanciam uh ciangin mimawh mah ka hihna uh ka thei uh hi. Tua ahihleh Khrih pen mawhna a piangsak a suak ding hiam? Suak het lo ding hi. 
Galatians2:18 Thukham zuihna hang hi lo hi, ci-in ka phiatsa uh thu tu-in pankik leuleu leng kei mahmah Thukham khial pa ka suakkik zel ding hi." 
Galatians2:19 Thukham tawh kisai-in ahihleh Pasian a dingin ka nuntak theih nadingin tua Thukham mah in kei hong thatkhin ahih manin Thukham tawh kisai thu-ah misi bang ka hi hi. Singlamteh tungah Khrih a kithah lai-in kei zong amah tawh a sikhawm ka hi hi. 
Galatians2:20 Tua ahih manin tuhuna ka nuntakna zia pen kei hang hi nawn loin ka sungah a hong om Khrih hang ahi hi. Tua hi a, keimah hong itin, keima a dingin a nuntakna a hong pia Pasian’ Tapa ka muanna tawh tu laitakin a nungta ka hi hi." 
Galatians2:21 Hih bang ka gen ciangin Pasian’ hehpihna thupha ka deih lohna ahi kei a, Thukham zuihzawhna hangin Pasian tawh kipawl theihna om hileh, singlamteh tungah Khrih sihna a mawkna hi lel ding hi, a cinuam ka hizaw hi." 
Galatians3:1 Galati mihaite aw, singlamteh tungah Jesuh Khrih a sihna thu teltakin na theihsa uh ahih manin kua’ khemsa-in hici thei mawk na hi uh hiam?" 
Galatians3:2 Thukham na zuihna hangun Pasian’ Kha Siangtho ngah na hi uh hiam, ahih kei leh lungdamna thu za-in na upna hang uh hizaw ahi hiam?" 
Galatians3:3 Pasian’ Kha Siangtho tawh na patkhit uh ciangin nomau’ thatanghat thu tawh khup a sawm ding zahin hici hai lawmlawm na hi uh hiam? 
Galatians3:4 A beisa huna na tuahsa uh thute khempeuh a mawkna suakkhin zen ding ahi hiam? Tawmkhat beek phattuamna hong pia thei tei dingin ka um hi. 
Galatians3:5 Note in Thukham na zuihna hangun Pasian in Kha Siangtho hong pia-in nalamdang hong bawl ahi hiam, ahih kei leh lungdamna thu za-in na upna hang uh hizaw ahi hiam?" 
Galatians3:6 Abraham tunga thupiang ngaihsun dih un. Lai Siangtho in, “Abraham in Pasian um a, tua a upna hangin Pasian in amah tawh a kipawlthei dingin mihoihin a sang hi,” na ci hi." 
Galatians3:7 Tua ahih manin Abraham’ suanlekhak a man taktak i cihte pen upna a nei mite ahihna thu na theih ding uh ahi hi. 
Galatians3:8 Jew mite mah bangin Gentail mite in zong a upna uh hangin amah tawh a kipawlthei dingin Pasian in a bawl nading thu, Lai Siangtho in na ma theih hi. Tua ahih manin Lai Siangtho in Abraham tungah Lungdamna Thuthak na ma hilhkhol a, “Pasian in leitung mi khempeuh thupha a piak nadingin nangmah hong zang ding hi,” na ci hi." 
Galatians3:9 Abraham in a up manin Pasian in thupha a piak mah bangin Pasian a um midang khempeuh in zong thupha a ngah ahi uh hi. 
Galatians3:10 Hih thu tawh kisai-in Lai Siangtho in, “Thukham laibu sunga kigelh khempeuh a vekpi-in a zuikhin tawntung lote in Pasian’ samsiatna thuak hi,” ci ahih manin Thukham a suangte pen samsiatna a ngah mite ahi uh hi." 
Galatians3:11 Tu-in Lai Siangtho in, “Upna hangin Pasian tawh a kipawlthei mite bek nungta ding hi,” na ci ahih manin Thukham hangin kuamah in Pasian tawh kipawl theihna a ngah lohna thu teltakin hong kilang hi." 
Galatians3:12 Lai Siangtho in, “Thukham’ deih bangin a gamta zote nungta ding hi,” na ci ahih manin Thukham zuihna le upna thu na kimemat kha lo hi." 
Galatians3:13 Lai Siangtho in, “Sing tungah a kikhai mi peuhmah Pasian’ samsiat mi ahi hi,” na ci ahih manin eite a dingin Khrih in samsiatna a thuak manin Thukham zuihlahna hangin samsiatna panin eite a hong tankhia ahi hi." 
Galatians3:14 Khrih in eite a hong tatna pen, eite in i upna hangin Pasian in a hong ciam Kha Siangtho ngahin, Pasian in Abraham tungah a ciam thuphate zong, Jesuh Khrih hangin Gentail mite tungah a kipiak theih nading a deihna ahi hi." 
Galatians3:15 Khrih sungah sanggamte aw, i theihtheih ngei gentehna khat ka hong zang ding hi. Mi nih in thu khatpeuhah thukimna nei-in letmat a thuhkhit uh ciangin kuamah in tua thukimna nungphiat thei lo, zong behlap thei lo hi." 
Galatians3:16 Tu-in Pasian in Abraham le ama suan pa tungah thuciamna nei hi. Lai Siangtho sungah a kigelhna-ah, mi tampi a cihnopna ahi, “Na suan le na khakte,” cih kammal na zanglo a, mi khat bek ahi Khrih a cihnopna-in, “Na suan pa,” ci-in na gen hi." 
Galatians3:17 Tu-in ka hong gennop thu in: Pasian in Abraham tawh thuciamna bawl a, tua a thuciamna peksat sawm lo hi. Tua ahih manin tua thuciamna a kibawlzawh kum zali le kum sawmthum khit ciangin a kinung piak Thukham in tua thuciamna peksatin phiat thei lo ding hi." 
Galatians3:18 Pasian’ hong piakkhong pen Thukham zuihna hang tawh a kingah hi mawk leh piak ding hong ciamna hangin a kingah hi nawn lo ding hi. Ahi zongin Pasian in Abraham tungah letsong a piakna pen a thuciamnasa tawh kizui-in a piak ahi hi. 
Galatians3:19 Tua ahihleh Thukham bangin a kimang ding ahi hiam? Khialhna cih bang ahi hiam, cih a kitheih nadingin thuciamna banah hong kipiathuah hi a, thuciam a kipiakna, Abraham’ suan pa’ hun ciang dong bek a kimang dingin a kingaihsun ahi hi. Mihingte tungah Thukham hong kipiak lai-in vantungmi hong kisawlsawn a, mihing ahi Moses tungah hong kipiasawn hi." 
Galatians3:20 Ahi zongin Pasian in Abraham tungah thuciamna a bawl laitakin kuamah sawlsawn nei loin amah bek in a piak ahi hi. 
Galatians3:21 Tua ahihleh Thukham le Pasian’ thuciamnate a kilehngat ahi uh hiam? Hi het lo hi. Mihingte tungah hong kipia Thukham in nuntakna taktak hong pia thei hileh tua Thukham zuihna hangin mi khempeuh in Pasian tawh kipawl theihna ngah ding uh hi. 
Galatians3:22 Ahi zongin Jesuh Khrih a um mite tungah a upna hangun Pasian’ thuciam a kipiak theih nadingin Lai Siangtho in, “Mawhna khutnuai-ah leitung mi khempeuh a om hi,” na ci hi." 
Galatians3:23 Tua ahih manin upna thu hong tunma hun sungteng, upna thu a kilahkhiat ding ngakna-in Thukham in eite a hong hencip phot ahi hi." 
Galatians3:24 Tua hi a, i upna hangin Pasian tawh kipawl theihna i ngahna dingin Khrih a hong pai hun ciang dong, Thukham in eite a hong uk ahi hi." 
Galatians3:25 Tu-in ahihleh upna hun hita ahih manin Thukham in eite hong uk thei nawn lo hi. 
Galatians3:26 Khrih Jesuh tawh na kipawl manun note khempeuh Pasian’ tate na suahtheihna uh pen na upna hang uh ahi hi. 
Galatians3:27 Khrih sungah a kiphum note in Khrih’ pianzia a nei khinta na hi uh hi. 
Galatians3:28 Tua ahih manin Jew mi le Gentail mi, sila le sila ahi lo, numei le pasal cih bangin kideidanna om nawn lo a, note khempeuh Khrih tawh na kipawlna hangun pawlkhat hi-in, a kibangkim na hi uh hi." 
Galatians3:29 Khrih tawh na kipawl nak-uhleh Abraham’ suante na hita uh a, Pasian’ hong khap thute a ngah ding na hi uh hi." 
Galatians4:1 Ahi zongin gamhluah ding tapa in a pa’ neihsa khempeuh a luah ding hinapi-in a neulai hun sungteng silate mah bangin bangmah thu nei lo hi. 
Galatians4:2 A pa in ama gamhluah dingteng a piakma, a neulai hun sungteng, midang in tua naupang kemin a vai ding a hawmsak hi." 
Galatians4:3 Tua mah bangin eite zong kha thu-ah i neulai hun sungteng huihlak a uk vangneite’ khutnuai-ah a om ihi hi. 
Galatians4:4 Ahi zongin a hun a cin ciangin eite khempeuh Pasian’ tate i suahtheih nadingin Thukham nuai-ah a om mite a hong tankhia dingin Pasian in a Tapa hong paisak a, tua Tapa pen leitung ngeina bangin numei sung panin hong suakin, Jew Thukham sungah hong nungta hi." 
Galatians4:5  
Galatians4:6 Note pen ama tate na hihna uh a hong lah nadingin Pasian in ama Tapa’ Kha Siangtho, eite sungah hong tumsak a, tua Kha Siangtho in Pasian pen, “Pa aw, pa aw,” hong cisak hi." 
Galatians4:7 Tua ahih manin note pen sila hi nawn loin Pasian’ tate na hih manun Pasian in ama tate a dingin a koih khempeuh, note tungah hong pia ding hi." 
Galatians4:8 A beisa hunah Pasian thei lo na hih manun Pasian ahi lo vangliatna a neite’ sila-in na om uh hi. 
Galatians4:9 Ahi zongin note in tu-in Pasian meltheih khinin, tua ahih kei leh Pasian in note hong meltheih khinta ahih manin, a bang hangin bangmah a hih zo lo, a ginalo tua bangte lamah kiheikik nuam a, sila va suakkik nuam na hi uh hiam?" 
Galatians4:10 Note in nite, khate, hunte, kumte a kipan pawi tuamtuamte limtakin tan ding na hah ngaihsut mahmah uh hi." 
Galatians4:11 Tua ahih manin note a dingin ka nasepna khempeuh a mawkna a suahkhak ding ka hong lunghihmawhsak mahmah hi. 
Galatians4:12 Sanggamte aw, Thukham thu tawh kisai-in note’ gamtat bangin ka hong gamtat mah bangin kei’ gamtat mah bangin na hong gamtat ding uh ka hong thum hi. A beisa hunah kei tungah na hong gamta khial nai kei uh hi." 
Galatians4:13 Note kiangah lungdamna thu hilh ding ka hong kipatna pen ka pumpi cidam lohna hang ahihna thu na theihsa uh ahi hi. 
Galatians4:14 Ka pumpi cidam lohna pen note a dingin thu haksapi hinapi-in kei na hong simmawhbawl tuan kei uh a, zong na hong nolh tuan kei uh hi. Vantung panin a hong pai vantungmi zin do bang le Khrih Jesuh mahmah zin a do bangin na hong limbawl uh hi." 
Galatians4:15 Tua hun laitakin lungdam mahmah napi-in tu-in a bangci ta na hi uh hiam? A hithei khat hileh, tua hunin na mittang nangawn uh khelkhia-in kei a hong pianuamte na hihna uh teltakin ka thei hi." 
Galatians4:16 Note kiangah thuman ka hong genna hangin kei a hong galbawl na hi uh hiam? 
Galatians4:17 Tua mi pawlkhatte in note hong engin hong kin mahmah uh hi; ahi zongin amaute’ ngimna a hoih hi khol lo hi. Amaute’ hong kin bangin note in zong amaute kinin na kipawl theih nadingun kei kiang panin note a hong khenkhia nuam ahi lel uh hi. 
Galatians4:18 Ngimna hoih nei ahih nak-uhleh note’ phattuam nading kinna pen note tawh ka hong omkhawm sung bek hi loin, a tawntungin kin ding a hoih ahi hi." 
Galatians4:19 Taneute aw, note in Khrih’ pianzia bang na neih dong uh, naupaii nupi in ta a suah ding a gimpih bangin note ka hong lunggimpih ding hi." 
Galatians4:20 Note in ka maisuah na muhtheih nadingun hithei hileh note tawh ka omkhawm nuam mahmah hi. Tu-in note ka hong lunghimawh mahmah hi. 
Galatians4:21 Thukham nuai-ah a omnuam mite aw, Thukham in a gen thu a tel taktak mah na hi uh hiam?" 
Galatians4:22 Lai Siangtho sungah hih bangin na kigelh hi: Abraham in tapa nih nei a, khat pen a zi’ silanu tawh a neih a tapa hi a, a khat pen a zi tawh a neih a tapa ahi hi." 
Galatians4:23 Silanu tawh a neih a tapa pen leitung ngeina bangin a suak mawkmawk hi a, ahi zongin a zi tawh a neih a tapa pen Pasian’ thuciamna tawh kizui-in a suak ahi hi." 
Galatians4:24 Hihte pen gentehna lim ahi hi. Hih nupi nihte pen thuciamna nam nih a lahna ahi hi. Sila a suak tate a hingkhia nu Hagar hi a, Sinai Mual tunga kipia thuciamna a lahnopna ahi hi." 
Galatians4:25 Arabia gam a om Sinai Mual lim ahi Hagar pen tu laitakin a mite tawh salin a om Jerusalem khuapi a cihnopna ahi hi. 
Galatians4:26 Ahi zongin vantung Jerusalem pen sal hi lo a, eite’ pianna nu ahi hi." 
Galatians4:27 Bang hang hiam cih leh Lai Siangtho sungah, “A ciing nupi aw, lungdam in. Nausuah natna a thei ngei lo nupi aw, nuamin kiko in. Bang hang hiam cih leh a pasal in a nusiat nupi in a pasal tawh a om tawntung nupi sangin ta hauzaw ding hi,” ci-in na kigelh hi." 
Galatians4:28 Tu-in eite zong, Isaac mah bangin Pasian’ thuciamna hangin a piang tate ihi hi." 
Galatians4:29 Tua hun laitakin leitung ngeina bangin a piang mawkmawk tapa in Pasian Kha Siangtho hangin a piang tapa a bawlsiat mah bangin, tuhunin zong eite hong kibawlsia hi." 
Galatians4:30 Ahi zongin Lai Siangtho sungah, “Sila numei’ tapa in sila ahi lo numei’ tapa tawh gamh luahkhawm thei lo ding ahih manin, sila numei le a tapa hawlkhia in,” na kici hi." 
Galatians4:31 Tua ahih manin sanggamte aw, eite pen sila numei’ tate ihi kei a, sila ahi lo numei’ tate ihi hi." 
Galatians5:1 Khrih in eite hong khahkhiat khitna hangin mi suaktate hi khinta ihih manin tua suahtakna thu-ah kipin om unla, sila va suakkik nawn kei un." 
Galatians5:2 Tu-in keimah Paul in ka hong gen ding thu limtakin na ngai un: Note in vun-atna na zat uhleh note a dingin Khrih’ nasepna a kimanna a om het lo ahi hi. 
Galatians5:3 Vun-atna a zang mi khempeuh in Thukham dang khempeuh zong a vekpi-in a zuih ding a tavuan ahihna thu teltakin phawk ta uh hen. 
Galatians5:4 Thukham zuihna hangin Pasian tawh kipawl theih nading a hanciamte pen Khrih tawh a kikhen na hi uh a, Pasian’ hehpihna in note hong huam thei lo hi." 
Galatians5:5 Kote ahihleh Pasian in amah tawh a kipawlthei dingin hong bawl ding hi, ci-in lamenin, kote’ upna hangin Kha Siangtho’ vangliatna tawh hong piang ding hi, ci-in a om ka hi uh hi." 
Galatians5:6 Bang hang hiam cih leh Jesuh Khrih tawh i kipawl ciangin vun-atna le vun-at lohna a thupi tuan om lo a, Khrih i upna hangin midangte i itna a thupi hi bek hi." 
Galatians5:7 A beisa hunah hoihtakin a gamtate na hi uh hi. Tu-in a manin na gamtat loh nadingun kua in lam hong pialsakin Pasian’ thu hong mang losak ahi hiam? 
Galatians5:8 Note a hong sam Pasian in note na pial nadingun hong zolkhia het lo ding hi. 
Galatians5:9 Silngo themno khat in annel lom buppi tawk thei hi, na kici hi." 
Galatians5:10 Eite, Topa tawh a kipawl khawmte ihih manin kei tawh a kilamdangin note in bangmah ngaihsut tuam nei het lo ding, ci-in ka hong muang a, a kua a kua hitaleh note hong nawngkaisakte pen Pasian in gim pia ding hi, ci-in ka um hi." 
Galatians5:11 Sanggamte aw, vun-atna kisam hi, ci-in a hilh lai hi leng, bang hangin bawlsiatna thuak zenzen ding ka hi hiam? Tua bangin thu a hilh hi leng, singlamteh tunga Khrih’ sihna thu ka hilhna hangin bangmah buaina a om kei ding hi." 
Galatians5:12 No hong lungkhamsak mite in a maban uh nawtsuak uh hen la, a ut leh a pasal nateng nangawn uh atkhia mangkhin vet uh hen!" 
Galatians5:13 Sanggamte aw, note ahihleh a suakta mi ahi dingin Pasian in a hong sap ahi hi. Ahi zongin tua suahtakna pen na pumpi uh ut bangbangin gamtat theih nadingin paulam zonna-in nei kei unla, itna tawh khatlekhat kikhualna-in zangzaw un." 
Galatians5:14 Bang hang hiam cih leh Thukham khempeuh thu khatin kigawm thei a, “Nangmah na ki-it bangin na vengte na it in,” cihna tawh kitomlak thei hi." 
Galatians5:15 Ahi zongin note pen gamsa bangin khatlekhat kiphuai-in kipetkha le-uhcin na vekpi-un na siatlawhkhak ding uh lauhuai ahih manin hoihtakin na kidawm un. 
Galatians5:16 Note kiangah ka hong gen thu in: Kha Siangtho’ hong sawlna bangin gamta unla, na pumpi uh utna bangin gamta kei un." 
Galatians5:17 Bang hang hiam cih leh ei’ pumpi ut bangin gamta lehang Kha Siangtho’ deihna tawh na kituak lo a, Kha Siangtho’ deihna bangin gamta lehang ei’ pumpi deihna tawh na kituak lo zel ahih manin hih nih tegel a kilangpang niloh na hi a, note’ ut bangin a gamta thei lo na hi uh hi." 
Galatians5:18 Kha Siangtho’ deihna bangin na gamtat uhleh Thukham khutnuai-ah na om nawn kei uh hi. 
Galatians5:19 Tu-in mihing pianzia hong kitel a, tuate pen: Numei tawh mawhna, thangtatna, lanluat mana khialhna," 
Galatians5:20 milim biakna, mi bumna, kilangbawlna, kitotna, hazatna, hehna, huaihamna, kikhenna, pawltuam lungsim neihna," 
Galatians5:21 enna, zukhamna le biakna pawi-ah zukhamna a kipan adangdangte ahi hi. A beisa hunah ka hong hilhkholhsa bangin tu-in ka hong genkikin-ah: Hih bangin a gamta mite pen Pasian’ Ukna sungah omkha het lo ding hi." 
Galatians5:22 Ahi zongin Kha Siangtho’ sawlna bangin gamtatnate pen: Itna, lungdamna, lungnopna, lungduaina, migitna, hoihna, cihtakna," 
Galatians5:23 dikna le pumpi ki-ukzawhna hi a, hih bangin a gamta mite, Thukham in bangmah cih thei lo hi." 
Galatians5:24 Tua hi a, Jesuh Khrih a zui mite in a leitung lungsim pianzia uh le a leitung lungsim deihna khempeuh uh a phiat khitsa ahi hi." 
Galatians5:25 Kha Siangtho in eite hong nungtasak khinta ahih manin ama hong sawlna bangin eite a nungta ding ihi hi. 
Galatians5:26 Kuamah kiphasak loin, khatlekhat kiphin loin, kuamah i kihaza kei ding hi." 
Galatians6:1 Sanggamte aw, mi khatpeuh a gamta khial a om ciangin, Kha Siangtho’ deihna bangin a nungta note in tua a khial pa a manin a gamtatkik theih nadingin thunem zangin na huh un. Note in zong amah bangin ze-etna na tuahkhak loh nadingun na kikem un." 
Galatians6:2 Thu haksa na tuah uh ciangin khatlekhat na kihuh un. Tua hileh Khrih’ thukham a zui na hi uh hi. 
Galatians6:3 Mi khatpeuh, bangmah hi lo napi-in amah a kithupi ngaihsut mawkmawk leh amah le amah a kikhem ahi hi." 
Galatians6:4 A kuamah peuh in ama gamtatna ciat entel henla, kisialh nading a om leh ama gamtatna siksanin kisial henla, midangte tawh ki-ettehin kisial kei hen." 
Galatians6:5 Bang hang hiam cih leh a kuamah peuh in i gamtatna bang ciatin a ngah ding ihi hi. 
Galatians6:6 Pasian thu hilhna a za mipa in ama neih na hoihte khempeuh zong, amah a hilh pa tawh zangkhawm tahen." 
Galatians6:7 Pasian a kikhemzo dingin ngaihsunkha kei un. Mi khempeuh in ama vawh nam khaici mah ngahkik ding hi. 
Galatians6:8 Mi khatpeuh in ama leitung pumpi deihna khaici a vawh leh sihna ngah ding a, Kha Siangtho deihna khaici a vawh leh Kha Siangtho tung panin nuntak tawntungna ngah ding hi." 
Galatians6:9 Tua ahih manin na hoih sep ding cimtak kei ni. Lungkia loin i sep nakleh a hun ciangin thaman i ngah ding hi. 
Galatians6:10 Tua ahih ciangin hunhoih i ngah simin midangte tungah a hoihin i gamta ding a, a diakdiakin thu upna sungah i innkuanpihte khempeuh tungah i hoih gamtat ding i phawk ding hi." 
Galatians6:11 Tu-in keima khut mahmah tawh laimal gol pipi-in lai ka hong gelh na mu uh hi. 
Galatians6:12 Note in na vun uh na at nadingun a hong hahbawl mite in mihoih ahihna uh kilangsak nuamin, a kimuthei nate a kisialhpih mite ahi uh hi. Singlamteh tungah Khrih a sihna thu hangin amaute in bawlsiatna a ngah loh nadingun a tuaci gamtat ahi uh hi." 
Galatians6:13 Vun-atna a zang mite nangawn in Thukham zuinuam tuan lo uh hi. Hih a pualam gamtatna thu note in na zuihna hangun kisialnuam uh ahih manin note in vun-atna na zat ding uh a hong deih uh ahi hi. 
Galatians6:14 Ahi zongin keimah in ahihleh, singlamteh tungah i Topa Jesuh a sihna thu bek ka kisialhpih ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh singlamteh tungah ama sihna hangin kei a dingin leitung thute misi bang a, kei zong, leitung thu-ah misi mah ka bang hi." 
Galatians6:15 Vun ki-atna le ki-at lohna a thupi om tuan lo a, mi thak nam pawl hih ding bek a thupi ahi hi." 
Galatians6:16 Hih ka thugenna a zui mite a kipanin Pasian’ mite khempeuh tungah Pasian in nopsakna le hehpihna thupha hong pia tahen. 
Galatians6:17 A tawpna-ah ka gennop thu in: Ka pum tunga om meimapawn pen Khrih sila ka hihna lim ahih manin kuamah in kei hong nawngkaisak nawn kei tahen. 
Galatians6:18 Sanggamte aw, note khempeuh tungah i Topa Jesuh Khrih hehpihna thupha hong tung tahen. Amen." 
Ephesians1:1 Pasian’ sawlna tawh Jesuh Khrih’ sawltak ahi keimah Paul in, Efesa khua-ah a om thu um mite tungah lai ka hong khak hi." 
Ephesians1:2 Eite’ Pa Pasian le Topa Jesuh Khrih in note tungah dikna le nopsakna thupha hong tungsak tahen. 
Ephesians1:3 Khrih tawh eite i kipawlna hangin vantung gam panin kha tawh kisai letsong namkim hong pia ahih manin eite’ Topa Jesuh Khrih’ Pa ahi Pasian tungah i lungdamna ko ciat ni. 
Ephesians1:4 Ama mai-ah eite pen paubaanna a nei lo, mi siangthote ahi ding le Khrih hangin ama mite ahi dingin leitung a pianma pek nangawnin Pasian in a hong teelsa ihi hi." 
Ephesians1:5 Pasian in Jesuh Khrih hangin ama mite ahi dingin eite a hong bawl ding a sehkholhsa hi a, tua bangin a hong bawl ding pen ama tupna le a utna ahi hi." 
Ephesians1:6 Ama it Tapa hangin hih bangin letsong hong pia ahih manin ama hong hehpihna hangin Pasian phat ni. 
Ephesians1:7 Khrih hong sihna hangin eite in suahtakna ngahin, i mawhnate hong kimaisak ahi hi. Tuazah dongin Pasian’ hong hehpihna thu bangzah takin lian ahi hiam?" 
Ephesians1:8  
Ephesians1:9 Pasian in a pilna le a thumuhnate zangin ama geelsa bangin hong sem a, Khrih zangin a sepnop thusimteng eite tungah hong kilangsak hi." 
Ephesians1:10 Tua a geel thu pen, a hunhoih a tun ciangin Khrih khutnuai-ah, vantung le leitungah a om khempeuh gawm ding ahi hi." 
Ephesians1:11 Na khempeuh, Pasian’ ngaihsutna le a geelsa bangin a piang hi. A cil pek a kipanin a ngaihsutsa thu tawh kizui-in Khrih tawh i kipawlna hangin Pasian’ tate ihih nadingin Pasian mah in a hong sehsa ihi hi." 
Ephesians1:12 Tua ahih manin Khrih a muang masa eite in Pasian phatin a minthanna vang kilangsak ni. 
Ephesians1:13 Note in zong hotkhiatna a hong ngahsakthei Lungdamna Thu a man za-in Khrih na up uh ciangin, Pasian in a hong ciamsa bangin ama mi na hihna uh a kilat nadingin note tungah Kha Siangtho hong piakna tawh a hong ciamteh hi." 
Ephesians1:14 Tua Kha Siangtho pen, Pasian in piak dingin a hong ciamsa thu eite khempeuh in i ngah taktak ding a kician ahihna thu a hong lahna hi a, ama mi ahi taktak eite khempeuh pen a suakta takpi mite ihihna a kilat nading ahi hi. Tua ahih manin a kuamah peuh in Pasian phat ciat ni." 
Ephesians1:15 Note in Topa Jesuh na muanna thu uh le thu umte khempeuh na itna thu uh ka zak hun a kipanin," 
Ephesians1:16 tawlnga loin note’ tangin Pasian’ tungah lungdamna ka na pulak tawntung hi. Ka thungetna-ah zong note ka hong phawk tawntung a," 
Ephesians1:17 i Topa Jesuh Khrih’ Pasian ahi, a minthang Pa Pasian in note tungah Kha Siangtho hong pia-in, tua Kha Siangtho in note tungah lungpilna hong pia-in, note in Pasian na theih nadingun note tungah Pasian hong kilatsak nadingin thu ka hong ngetsak niloh hi." 
Ephesians1:18 Note bang dingin hong sam a, a mite tungah a hong ciam thupha lamdangte bangzah takin lian a, thu um ahi eite sungah na a hong sem vangliatna bangzah takin lian ahi hiam, cih na muhtheih nadingun note’ lungsim mit hong vaksak nadingin thu ka na ngen hi. Eite sungah na a hong sem vangliatna pen sihna panin Khrih hingsakin, vantung gamah zong, ama taklamah a tutsak nadingin a zat vangliatna mah ahi hi." 
Ephesians1:19  
Ephesians1:20  
Ephesians1:21 Vantungah ukna, aana, vangliatna a neite khempeuh tungah Khrih in ukna aana nei lai a, hih leitung bekah hi loin a hong tung ding leitungah zong amah a lianpen ahi hi." 
Ephesians1:22 Pasian in Khrih’ khenuai-ah na khempeuh koih a, thu khempeuhah pawlpi’ lutang dingin Khrih a bawl hi." 
Ephesians1:23 Tua pawlpi pen Khrih’ pumpi hi a, tua pawlpi a dingin amahmah kipia-in, mun khempeuha om pawlpite, thu khempeuhah a cingtaaksak hi." 
Ephesians2:1 A beisa hunah na thuman lohna uh le na mawhna uh hangin kha thu tawh kisai-ah a si na hi uh hi. 
Ephesians2:2 Tuahun lai-in leitung gitloh gamtatnate na zui uh a, Pasian thu a um lo mite sungah tu laitakin na a sem, huihlak a ukte’ thu na mang uh hi." 
Ephesians2:3 A taktakin eite khempeuh zong amaute mah i bang ngei a, i pianpih lungsim zui-in nungta-in, i pumpi le i lungsim deihna bangin i gamta hi. Tua ahih manin eite khempeuh zong Pasian’ hehna hangin gim a thuak dingte ihi hi." 
Ephesians2:4 Tua bang hinapi-in Pasian’ hong hehpihna le eite hong itna lian mahmah ahih manin," 
Ephesians2:5 i mawhna hangin kha thu tawh kisai-in misi ihih laitakin Khrih tawh eite hong nungtasak hi. Pasian’ hehpihna hangin hotkhiatna a ngah thei ihi hi. 
Ephesians2:6 Khrih Jesuh tawh eite i kipawlna hangin vantungah amah tawh i ukkhawm theih nadingin sihna panin Pasian in a hong thokhawmsak hi. 
Ephesians2:7 Khrih Jesuh tungtawnin a hong lah ama hehpihna le a hong itna bangzah takin lianin lamdang ahi hiam, ci-in a hong tung ding hunah a hong lah tawntung theih nadingin hih bangin a hong thokhawmsak ahi hi." 
Ephesians2:8 Note’ upna hangin Pasian’ hong hehpihna tawh hotkhiatna a ngah na hi uh hi. Note’ thalawhna hangin a ngah hi loin Pasian’ hong piakkhong ahi hi. 
Ephesians2:9 Note’ hanciamna tawh a ngah hi lo na hih manun na kisialh nading uh a thu om lo hi. 
Ephesians2:10 Eite a hong bawlpa pen Pasian hi a, Jesuh Khrih tawh i kipawl ciangin i nuntakna-ah gamtat hoih a nei dingin a hong bawl ihi hi. Hih pen eite’ omzia dingin a na ngaihsut kholhsa ahi hi." 
Ephesians2:11 Amau mahmah in amau pumpi tungah a hihna uh tawh vun a ki-at mite ka hi uh a ci Jew mite in, vun a ki-at lo mite a hong cih uh, na pian’ na patun Gentail mi ahi note in nidanga na omzia uh phawkkik dih un." 
Ephesians2:12 Tuahun lai-in Khrih tawh na kikhen uh a, Pasian’ teel Israel minamte hi loin a pualam mite na hi uh hi. Pasian in ama mite tungah piak dingin a ciam thute zong a ngah dingte na hi kei uh a, Pasian a nei lo, lamet ding bangmah nei loin leitungah a om na hi uh hi." 
Ephesians2:13 Ahi zongin a gamlapi-ah a om ngei hinapi-in tu-in Khrih Jesuh tawh na kipawlna hangun ama sihna in Pasian kiang hong tunpih hi. 
Ephesians2:14 Khrih mahmah in Gentail mite le Jew mite pawlkhatin hong bawl ahih manin eite tungah nopsakna a hong piapa ahi hi. Hih minam nihte khenin gal a piangsak dalna pen Khrih in ama pumpi tawh a satkham hi. 
Ephesians2:15 Amah tawh kipawlna hangin minam nihte pawlkhat a suahtheih nadingin minam a dei Jew Thukham le a ngeinate khempeuh phiatin, eite pawlkhat hong suahin a hong kilemsak hi." 
Ephesians2:16 Singlamteh tungah a sihna tawh Khrih in kilangneihna beisak a, tua singlamteh hangin minam nihte pawlkhat suahin Pasian kiang a tunpih hi." 
Ephesians2:17 Tua hi a, Khrih in Pasian tawh a kigamla no Gentail mite tung le Pasian tawh a kinai Jew mite tungah kilem nading Lungdamna Thuhoih a hong hilh hi." 
Ephesians2:18 Khrih hangin Jew mi le Gentail mi ahi eite khempeuh, Kha Siangtho huhna tawh Pa Pasian kiangah i paithei hi." 
Ephesians2:19 Tua ahih ciangin no Gentail mite pen a pualam mi, gamdang mite na hi nawn kei uh a, Pasian mite tawh minam khat hita-in, Pasian innkuan sung mite na hita uh hi." 
Ephesians2:20 Note zong, sawltakte le kamsangte in a phuhsa innkhuam tungah a kilam na hi uh a, tua inn sutpi pen Jesuh mahmah ahi hi." 
Ephesians2:21 Tua inn sutpi Khrih pen inn-a a kilam khempeuh a puapi pen hi a, Topa a dingin biakinn siangtho a suah dongin tua inn a khangsak hi." 
Ephesians2:22 Note zong midangte tawh kigawmin ama tungah na kilam uh a, Kha Siangtho-in Pasian a ten nading inn na suak uh hi." 
Ephesians3:1 No Gentail mite hangin Jesuh Khrih thu tawh kisai-in thongkia keimah Paul in Pasian kiangah thu ka ngen hi. 
Ephesians3:2 Note’ phattuam nadingin Pasian in hong hehpihna tawh hih nasep a sem dingin a hong sawlna thu na theihsa uh ahi hi. 
Ephesians3:3 Lai ka hong khaksate sungah a tomno-in kong gensa bangin Pasian in ama thusim kei tungah hong hilh khinzo hi. 
Ephesians3:4 Tua ka laigelh na sim le-uhcin Khrih tawh kisai a thusim ka theihna thu na phawk ding uh hi. 
Ephesians3:5 A beisa hunah tua thusim pen kuama tungah kigen lo a, ahi zongin Pasian in tu-in a siangtho a sawltakte le a kamsangte tungah Kha Siangtho a hilhsak hi." 
Ephesians3:6 Tua thusim pen: Lungdamna thu a kihilhna hangin Gentail mite in Jew mite tawh Pasian’ thupha ngahkhawm thei a, amaute tawh pawlkhat suakin, Pasian in piak dingin a ciam thute, Khrih hangin a ngahkhop theihna uh ahi hi." 
Ephesians3:7 Tua lungdamna thuhilh a sem dingin Pasian in a tuam vilvelin ama vangliatna tawh kei a hong seh hi. 
Ephesians3:8 Pasian’ mi khempeuh lakah kei a neupen hinapi-in, Khrih hangin a kigen zo lo thu manpha ahi Lungdamna Thu, Gentail mite lakah a gen ding," 
Ephesians3:9 le Pasian in a geelsim thute a kisep khiatna thu mi khempeuh a musak dingin Pasian in kei tungah hih hamphatna hong pia hi. Tuhun laitakin vantung a uk van mite in pawlpi’ hangin Pasian’ pilna a nam tuamtuamin a muhtheih nadingun na khempeuh a bawl Pasian in a beisa hunah hih thu khempeuh a imcip hi. 
Ephesians3:10  
Ephesians3:11 Pasian in a tawntungin a ngimna a omsa bangin i Topa Khrih Jesuh nasepna tawh a ngimna a hong tungsak hi. 
Ephesians3:12 Amah tawh i kipawlna le amah i muanna hangin kimuang takin Pasian kiangah paitheih nading hun i nei hi. 
Ephesians3:13 Tua ahih manin note hangin ka thuakna pen note’ phattuam nading ahih manin tua ka thuakna thu hangin lungkiatna-in na nei kei un. 
Ephesians3:14 Hih ama geelna teng ka ngaihsut ciangin, vantung a tung khinsa mite le leitungah a omlai mite khempeuh’ pianna i Pa Pasian’ mai-ah ka khukdin a," 
Ephesians3:15  
Ephesians3:16 note’ lungsim a thahat nadingin Pasian in a kicing ama vangliatna sung panin a Kha Siangtho tawh note hong thakhauh sakin," 
Ephesians3:17 na upna hangun note lungsim sungah Khrih hong tengin, itna thu-ah zung thuk kha-in bulkip na neih nadingun thu ka ngen hi." 
Ephesians3:18 Tua hileh note in Pasian mi ahi midangte khempeuh tawh Khrih hong itna bangzah takin sau-in zai a, bangzah takin thukin sang ahi hiam, cih na theikhawm ding uh hi." 
Ephesians3:19 Khrih hong itna a kicing takin theihkhit zawh loh ding ahi ta zongin note in thei-in, Pasian thu a cingin na theih nadingun thu ka hong ngetsak hi." 
Ephesians3:20 Eite a dingin na a hong sepsak, eite’ ngetzah val, le i ngaihsut zawh loh zah dongin a vangliatna tawh tampi tak a hong hihsak thei" 
Ephesians3:21 eite’ Pasian pen, pawlpi mite khempeuh le Khrih Jesuh tawh a kipawl mi khempeuh in a khang khangin a tawntungin phat ciat ta uh hen. Amen." 
Ephesians4:1 Tua ahih ciangin Topa’ na ka sepna hangin thong a kia keimah in note’ nuntakzia dingin a hong deihna tawh a kilawm a kituakin na nuntak nadingun ka hong hanthawn hi. 
Ephesians4:2 Kiniamkhiatin, thunemin, lungduai-in om tawntung un. Khatlekhat kihuhna tawh na ki-itna uh kilangsak un." 
Ephesians4:3 Kha Siangtho kimakai sakin, khatlekhat kilemin pawlkhat na hihna uh na kipsak tawntung un." 
Ephesians4:4 A kibang lametna khat bek a ngahkhawm dingin Pasian in note hong sap mah bangin eite khempeuh pumkhat bek hi-in Kha Siangtho zong khat bek mah a neikhawm ihi hi. 
Ephesians4:5 Topa khat bek, upna khat bek, tuiphumna khat bek mah a zangkhawm ihi hi." 
Ephesians4:6 Mi khempeuh’ Pa ahi Pasian khat bek om a, mi khempeuh’ Topa hi-in, na khempeuh hih kimin, mun citengah a om hi." 
Ephesians4:7 Ahi zongin eite khempeuh in Khrih hong piakna tawh kizui-in siamna a tuam khat ciat i ngah hi. 
Ephesians4:8 Tua ahih manin Lai Siangtho sungah, “A sangna munah a paitoh ciangin matsa salte tampi paipih a, mite tungah letsong a pia hi,” ci-in na kigelh hi." 
Ephesians4:9 “Paito,” a cih ciangin bang a cihnopna ahi hiam cih leh, lei sung a thukpenna munah paisuk masa khinzo, a cihnopna ahi hi." 
Ephesians4:10 Tua ahih manin mun khempeuhah a omkim khit theih nadingin a paisuk mipa pen mah vantung a sangpen dawn nangawn khengto-in na paito hi. 
Ephesians4:11 Amah in mite tungah siamna a tuamtuam hong pia a, pawlkhatte sawltak nasep a sem ding, pawlkhatte kamsang nasep a sem ding, pawlkhatte thuhilh kawikawi nasep a sem ding, pawlkhatte pawlpi kem nasep a sem ding, le pawlkhatte laihilh nasep a sem dingin a hong seh hi." 
Ephesians4:12 Hih nasep a tuamtuamte khempeuh a sem dingin Pasian’ mi khempeuh kigingkhol sakin Khrih a dingin na semin Khrih pumpi a khansak theihna ding deihna ahi hi. 
Ephesians4:13 Tua hileh Pasian’ Tapa i theihna le i thu upna-ah kithukhatin, eite a khangcing suakin, Khrih’ cingtaakna ciang i banto ding hi." 
Ephesians4:14 Tuahun ciangin thu upna lamah naupang ihi nawn kei ding a, mite khemin a khialsak theite’ mutna hangin i suk hoi i to hoi nawn kei ding a," 
Ephesians4:15 itna lungsim tawh thutak genin, lutang ahi Khrih tawh i kibat dongin i khangto ding hi." 
Ephesians4:16 Ama ukna mangin pumpi na a tuamtuamte a kituak takin kizom a, amaute limtakin a kizop dimdiamna hangin pumpi pen pumkhat a suak thei hi. Pumpi na a tuamtuamte in amau’ sep ding ciat hoihtakin a sep uh ciangin itna hangin pumpi khangin a cingtaak a suak thei hi." 
Ephesians4:17 Tu-in Topa’ min tawh limtakin note kiangah ka hong gennop thu in: Thu um lo dawibiate bangin gamta nawn kei un. Amaute’ thu ngaihsutte a kimang bangmah om lo a," 
Ephesians4:18 a ngaihsutnate uh khuamial tawh kibang hi. Amaute’ lungsim khauhin bangmah thei het lo uh ahih manin Pasian’ hong piak nuntakna neikha het lo uh hi. 
Ephesians4:19 Amaute in maizumna mel thei nawn lo uh a, siatna sung tungin, a ututun a kilawm lopipi-in gamta uh hi." 
Ephesians4:20 Tua bang gamtatnate pen Khrih thu panin na theihkhak uh hi lo hi. 
Ephesians4:21 Note in Khrih thu na zaksa uh hi a, ama nungzui na hih manun Jesuh’ thutakna na theihsa uh ahi hi." 
Ephesians4:22 Zuauna lungsim in a suksiat khitsa, nidangin na nuntakna ngei uh ahi na pianlui uh paikhia unla," 
Ephesians4:23 na lungsim uh le na ngaihsutna uh thaksuak sak un. 
Ephesians4:24 A thutang a siangtho ahihna thu, nuntakna mahmah panin a kilangsak, Pasian’ pianzia tawh kibangin a kibawl na ngeina thak uh bangin na nungta un." 
Ephesians4:25 Tua ahih manin zuau gen nawn kei unla, Khrih pumpi nate ihihna hangin pawlkhat ihih manin khatlekhat tungah thuman kigen ni." 
Ephesians4:26 Na heh uh ciangin, tua hehna hangin khialkha kei unla, a tawntungin heh paisuak kei un." 
Ephesians4:27 Dawimangpa in hong suksiat theih nading hun omsak kei un. 
Ephesians4:28 Guta ngeite in gu nawn loin, ama nuntak nading thuman takin thalawhin, mizawngte zong a huhtheih lai nadingin thatang tawh nasep ding kipan ta uh hen." 
Ephesians4:29 Na kiho uh ciangin kamguh zang kei unla, na pauna uh a za mite in phattuamna a ngahtheih nadingin na-in a kimang kam hoihte bek na pau un." 
Ephesians4:30 Ni khat ni ciangin Pasian in note hong tatkhiat taktak nading thu a ciantakin hong lahna le Pasian’ neihsa na hihna uh hong ciamtehna-in Kha Siangtho hong pia ahih manin, tua Pasian’ Kha Siangtho na dahsak kei un." 
Ephesians4:31 Kimuhdahna, hehna, thangpaihna, kitotna, kikona, kilungsim neihna khempeuh beisak unla," 
Ephesians4:32 khatlekhat kihehpihin, lungsim nem tawh na kihozaw unla, Khrih’ hangin Pasian in note’ mawhna hong maisak mah bangin khatlekhat na mawhna uh na kimaisak ta un." 
Ephesians5:1 Note pen Pasian in a hong it a tate na hih manun amah tawh na kibat nadingun hanciam un. 
Ephesians5:2 Khrih in eite a hong it manin Pasian in eite’ mawhna hong maisak theih nadingin a namtui biakna-in Pasian kiangah a kipiak mah bangin note zong itna tawh na gamta un. 
Ephesians5:3 Note pen Pasian’ mi na hih manun note lakah nulepa khialhna, a kilawm lo-a gamtatna, huaihamna cihte genin zong na nei vet kei un." 
Ephesians5:4 A kilawm lo-a kampauna, le ciamnuih hoih lo cihte zong na zang kei unla, Pasian tungah lungdamkohna kam na pauzaw un." 
Ephesians5:5 Nulepa khialhna a gamta mi, a kilawm lo-a a gamta mi, le a huaiham (huaihamna zong milim biakna zahin sia hi) mite in Khrih Ukna le Pasian Ukna sungah bangmah ngah nei het lo ding ahihna uh teltakin thei ta un." 
Ephesians5:6 Hih bang mawhnate i bawl hangin phamawh kei, ci-in a mawk gen mite’ khemsa-in ta kei un. Pasian thu mang loin hih bangin a gamta mite in Pasian’ hehna a thuak ding uh ahi hi." 
Ephesians5:7 Tua ahih manin tua bangin a gamta mite tawh kisukha vet kei un. 
Ephesians5:8 Note pen khuamial sungah a omngei hinapi-in, Topa’ mi na suahkhit uh ciangin khuavak sungah a om hita na hih uh manin khuavak sungah a om mite bangin na gamta un." 
Ephesians5:9 Bang hang hiam cih leh khuavak sunga omna in a hoih, a man, a thutakte hong piangsak hi." 
Ephesians5:10 Bangteng in Topa lungkimsak ahi hiam, ci-in kan un." 
Ephesians5:11 Khuamial gamtatna, bangmahin a kimang lo nasepnate su vet kei unla, tua bang gamtatnate a hoih lohna pholak zaw un." 
Ephesians5:12 Kuama theih lohin a simthamin a hihte uh gen ding nangawnin zong zumhuai lua hi. 
Ephesians5:13 Na khat peuhpeuh khuavakah pusuah lehang a pianzia man taktak hong kilang hi. 
Ephesians5:14 Tua ahih manin la sungah, “A ihmu mi aw, khanglo inla, sihna panin tho in. Tua hileh Khrih in nang hong taan ding hi,” kici hi." 
Ephesians5:15 Tua ahih ciangin hoihtakin kingaihsunin gamta unla, mihaite bang hi loin mipilte bangin gamta un." 
Ephesians5:16 Tuhun pen hun hoih lo hun ahih manin na hun neih khempeuh uh a hoih lamin zang un. 
Ephesians5:17 Tua ahih manin hai ommawk kei unla, Topa in bang a sem dingin hong deih ahi hiam, ci-in kan un." 
Ephesians5:18 Zu in mi siasak thei ahih manin zu ne kei unla, Kha Siangtho tawh a kidimin omzaw un." 
Ephesians5:19 La a tuamtuamte genin sakna tawh Topa’ thu gen belin nei unla, na lungsim khempeuh uh tawh Topa phatna la sa un." 
Ephesians5:20 I Topa Jesuh Khrih hangin thu khempeuhah Pa Pasian tungah lungdamna ko ta un. 
Ephesians5:21 Khrih na zahtakna uh hangin na thu uh na kimang tuak un. 
Ephesians5:22 Zite aw, Topa’ thu na man’ uh mah bangin na pasalte uh thu na mang un." 
Ephesians5:23 Bang hang hiam cih leh Khrih pen ama pumpi ahi pawlpi a honkhia pa hi-in, pawlpi tungah ukna thu a neih mah bangin pasal in a zi tungah ukna thu a nei ahi hi." 
Ephesians5:24 Pawlpi pen Khrih’ khutnuai ahih mah bangin zite zong thu khempeuhah a pasalte uh khutnuai hi ding uh hi.
