Ephesians5:25 Pasalte aw, Khrih in pawlpi itin a pumpi a piak mah bangin na zite uh na it un." 
Ephesians5:26 Pawlpi pen paubaanna a om het lo, a siangtho mahmahin Khrih kiangah a kipiak theih nadingin Pasian thu tawh tui-ah a silsiang khit ciangin Pasian kiangah a aptheih nadingin pawlpi a dingin Khrih a kipia ahi hi." 
Ephesians5:27  
Ephesians5:28 Tua mah bangin pasalte in zong amau pumpi zah mah bangin a zite uh a it ding uh ahi hi. A zi a it mi pen amah a ki-it mi ahi hi. 
Ephesians5:29 Eite pen ama pumpi nate ihihna hangin Khrih in hong it mah bangin kuamah in ama pumpi mudah ngei lo a, hoihtakin kemin a vakzaw hi." 
Ephesians5:30  
Ephesians5:31 Tua ahih manin Lai Siangtho in, “Hih thu hangin pasal in a nu le a pa nusia-in a zi tawh kigawm ding a, amau tegel khat a suak ding uh hi,” na ci hi." 
Ephesians5:32 Pasalte in amau pumpi zahin a zite uh itin, zite in zong amau pumpi zah mahin a pasalte uh a it ding uh ahih mah bangin, Lai Siangtho in hih bangin a gen ciangin a thukzaw khat, Khrih le pawlpi a ki-itna a gennopna ahi hi, ci-in ka ngaihsun hi." 
Ephesians5:33  
Ephesians6:1 Tate aw, na nu na pate uh thu na man ding uh Khristian ngeina hi a, ahi ding mah ahi hi." 
Ephesians6:2 Thupiakna a lian khat in, “Na nu le na pa zahtak in,” cihna hi a, khapna thu tawh kizom pahin, “Zahtak lecin nang a dingin thu hong hoihin, leitungah na khan a sau ding hi,” na ci pah hi." 
Ephesians6:3  
Ephesians6:4 Pate aw, na tate uh a hehtheih nadingin bawl kei unla, Khristiante ngeina tawh kituakin taii-in hilhin pantah un." 
Ephesians6:5 Silate aw, launa le linna tawh na leitung tote uh thu mang unla, Khrih’ na na sep uh mah bangin lungsim takpi tawh na na sepsak un." 
Ephesians6:6 A hong pahtak ding uh deihna tawh amaute’ muhsung bekin tuaci gamtat kei unla, Khrih’ sila na hihna hangun Pasian’ hong deih bangin lungsim takpi tawh na sem un." 
Ephesians6:7 Mihingte’ na a sem bang lelin kingaihsun loin Topa’ na a sem bangin kingaihsun unla, thanopna tawh sem un." 
Ephesians6:8 Salte ahi a, sal ahi lote ahi zongin na hoih a sem mi khempeuh, Topa in thaman a piak ding lamtak na thei un." 
Ephesians6:9 Tote aw, silate in note hong bawl mah bangin note in zong amaute limbawl unla, tawn’ gawpgawpnate zang nawn kei un. Note le na silate uh vantung panin To khat khutnuai-ah a om na hihna uh le tua Topa in kuamah maitang zahtak tuam nei loin a kibangin mi khempeuh thu a khen ahihna thu na phawk ta un." 
Ephesians6:10 Tu a kipanin Topa tawh na kipawlna uh le ama vangliatna hangin na tha uh khauhsak ta un. 
Ephesians6:11 Dawimangpa’ hong hih nading khempeuh na dalzawh nadingun Pasian’ galvan namkim na zang un. 
Ephesians6:12 Eite’ do pen leitung mite hi lo a, vantung huihlakah a om ukna, aana a neite, hih leitung khuamial a uk a tuamtuamte ahi hi." 
Ephesians6:13 Tua ahih manin hun haksat hun hong tun ciangin galte’ hong suknateng khempeuh nangzo-in, a tawpna-ah a gualzo na hih theih nadingun Pasian’ galvan namkim na zang un." 
Ephesians6:14 Tua ahih ciangin kawnggak gak bangin thutak zang unla, awmdal bulh bangin thuman zang unla," 
Ephesians6:15 kithawi a khedap bulh bangin Lungdamna Thu a hilhkhia dingin kiging un. 
Ephesians6:16 Tua banah, dawimangpa’ hong kapna thaltang kuangte na sukmit nadingun lum puak bangin upna na nei tawntung un." 
Ephesians6:17 Siklukhu khuk bangin hotkhiatna nei unla, Kha Siangtho in a hong piak Pasian’ thu pen namsau zat bangin na zang un." 
Ephesians6:18 Kha Siangtho tawh kopin a tawntungin Pasian kiangah na kisapna khempeuh uh ngenin na thum unla, tatsat loin Pasian mi khempeuh a dingin thu na ngetsak un." 
Ephesians6:19 Thu ka hilhtheih hun ding ciangin lungdamna thusim hangtakin ka hilhkhiat theih nadingin Pasian in ka thugen ding hong hilh nadingin kei a dingin zong thu na ngetsak ta un. 
Ephesians6:20 Pasian’ thu genin taangmi ka sepna hang mahin sikkhau khihna thuakin thongkia ka hih manin ka hilh dingin a kilawm bangin hangtakin ka gen ngam nadingin thu hong ngetsak ta un. 
Ephesians6:21 Ka septe le ka omzia khempeuh na theih nadingun Topa thu sungah i sanggam, thuman takin na a sem Tikhikas in note kiangah thu khempeuh a cingin hong gen ding hi." 
Ephesians6:22 Kote’ omzia na theih nading uh le amah in note’ lungsim hong thahatsak theih nadingin amah a hong paisak ka hi hi. 
Ephesians6:23 Pa Pasian le Topa Jesuh Khrih in ulenaute khempeuh tungah nopsakna le itna, thu upna tawh hong piakhawm tahen." 
Ephesians6:24 Tatsat loin i Topa Jesuh Khrih a it tawntung mi khempeuh tungah hehpihna thupha hong tung tahen. 
Philippians1:1 Jesuh Khrih’ sila keimah Paul le Timoti in Filippi khua-a om Khrih tawh a kipawl Pasian’ mite, siate, le upate khempeuh tungah lai ka hong khak uh hi." 
Philippians1:2 I Pa Pasian le Topa Jesuh Khrih in note tungah dikna le nopsakna thupha hong pia tahen. 
Philippians1:3 Note ka hong phawk simin ka biak Pasian tungah ka lungdamna ka ko hi. 
Philippians1:4 Note in lungdamna thu na zak ni uh a kipanin tuni ciang dong, lungdamna thuhilh nasepna-ah kei na hong huhna uh hangin ka nuam mahmah a, note a dingin thu ka nget simin lungdam mahmahna tawh ka ngen tawntung hi." 
Philippians1:5  
Philippians1:6 Note sungah hih nasep hoih a hong pankhia Pasian in Jesuh Khrih hong paikik hun ciang dong, mi cingtaak na hih nadingun hong huh ding hi, ci-in teltakin ka thei hi." 
Philippians1:7 Lungdamna thu hangin ka thongkiatna le lungdamna thu man hi, ci-in pangin ka kipsak nading hun ka ngahna-ah kei tawh a hong pangkhawm na hih manun ka lungsim sungah note na om tawntung uh a, hih zahta-in note ka hong phawk ding a kilawm thu mah ahi hi." 
Philippians1:8 Jesuh Khrih lungsimzah mahin note ka hong it taktakna thu Pasian in a hong thei hi. 
Philippians1:9 Note a’ ding deihsakna tawh thu ka hong ngetsak thu in: Note’ lungsimah itna khang semsemin, a sia le a pha a mantakin khenthei-in a hoihpen na teeltheih nading uh ahi hi." 
Philippians1:10 Tua hileh Khrih hong paikik ni ciangin paubaanna om loin a siangtho na hi ding uh hi. 
Philippians1:11 Jesuh Khrih in note mihoih a hong suahsak theihna le mite in Pasian pahtawi-in a phattheihna thu, note’ gamtat hoih in midangte tungah kilangsak ding hi." 
Philippians1:12 Sanggamte aw, kei tungah a piang thu in lungdamna thu mai a nawtsakzaw ahihna thu na theih ding uh ka deih hi." 
Philippians1:13 Bang hang hiam cih leh Khrih nasem ka hihna hangin thongkia ka hihna thu, inncing galkapte a kipanin mi khempeuh in a thei uh hi." 
Philippians1:14 Tua banah keima thongkiatna hangin hih lai-a om Khristiante a tamzaw in Topa muanna-in nei uh a, lau hetloin Pasian’ thu gen ngamna-in neizaw uh hi." 
Philippians1:15 Mi pawlkhatte in ahihleh hong hazatna le hong langpan’ nopna tawh Khrih thu hilh uh a, ahi zongin mi pawlkhatte in lungsim hoihtak mah tawh a hilh uh hi." 
Philippians1:16 Hih bang mite in, Pasian’ hong sawlna tawh lungdamna thu ka hutna hangin thongkia ka hihna thu thei-in, itna lungsim tawh Pasian’ thu a hilh uh hi." 
Philippians1:17 Pawlkhatte in ahihleh lungsim hoih tawh hi loin ka thongkiatna-ah na ka sak semsem theih nadingin kei hong demna-in Khrih thu a hilh uh hi. 
Philippians1:18 Ahi zongin phamawh ka sa kei hi. Lungsim hoih tawh a kihilh a, lungsimkhem tawh a kihilh ahi zongin, bangbang hitaseleh Khrih’ thu gen uh ahih nungsang, kei ka lungdam hi." 
Philippians1:19 Note hong thungetsakna le Jesuh Khrih Kha Siangtho huhna tawh suakta ding hi ing, ci-in thei ka hih manin ka lungdam hi." 
Philippians1:20 Ka si a, ka hing zongin, a diak diakin tu a kipanin a tawntungin midangte in Khrih phat theih nading lungsim hanna a neih theih nadingun ka lungsim le ka pumpi tawh keima tavuan ka lelh hetloh nading pen ka deihdeih, ka lametet bulpi ahi hi." 
Philippians1:21 Bang hang hiam cih leh Khrih a’ ding bekin a nungta ka hi a, si taleng zong kei a dingin hoihzaw semsem lai hi." 
Philippians1:22 Leitung pumpi nungta lai hi leng na a manpha tampi semthei ding ka hih manin, sih ding le hin ding ka teelsawn ding ka thei kei hi." 
Philippians1:23 Hih thu nih khentat hak ka sa mahmah hi. Kei a dingin hoihzaw thampek ahih manin leitung pumpi si-in Khrih tawh omkhawm ding ka ut hi. 
Philippians1:24 Ahi zongin note a dingin kei ka hin lai ding kisam phazaw hi. 
Philippians1:25 Hih thu a hoihpen ding hi, ci-in theitel ka hih manin note’ khantoh nading le upna hangin na lungdamna uh a khangsak dingin note ka hong hinpih lai ding hi." 
Philippians1:26 Tua ahih manin note kiangah ka hong hawhkik ciangin Jesuh Khrih tawh kipawlin na nuntakna uhah kei nong kisialhpih nading uh thu tampi hong omlai ding hi. 
Philippians1:27 Note tawh a omkhawm dingin ka hong paithei a, ka hong paithei kei zongin note in lungdamna thu tawh kipawl upna thu-ah ngimna kikhatin kiptakin na om nading uh le deihna kikhatin na dokhawmna thu uh ka zak theih nadingin Khrih hanga lungdamna thu tawh a kilawm a kituakin na nuntak ding uh a thupi pen ahi hi." 
Philippians1:28 Note a hong gualzosak ding pa pen Pasian ahih manin na galte uh na kihta kei un. Hangtakin om tawntung le-uhcin, note a gualzo ding hi-in, na galte uh a guallel ding ahihna thu, na galte un hong thei ding hi." 
Philippians1:29 Bang hang hiam cih leh Khrih’ na sep nading hunpha zong note tungah a hong kipia hi a, Khrih upna tawh ama na a sem hi bek loin, thuakna tawh zong a sem ding na hi uh hi." 
Philippians1:30 Tua ahih ciangin tu-in note in na hong muh uh ka galdona le tu mahmahin ka do lailai na zak uh thute-ah kei na hong dopih thei ding uh hi. 
Philippians2:1 Note, Khrih tawh kipawlin na nuntakna uh in note hong thahatsak hi. Kha Siangtho tawh kikhawlin, khatlekhat kihehpihin, dikna na kibawl uh hi." 
Philippians2:2 Tua ahih manin kei tawh ngaihsutna kibangin note khatlekhat ki-itin, khatlekhat lungsim kituakin na omna uh tawh keima lungdamna na hong cingtaaksak nadingun ka hong kun hi." 
Philippians2:3 Huaihamna lungsim le kisialh nopna lungsim tawh bangmah gamta kei un. Kiniamkhiat ciat unla, midangte thupi ngaihsutzaw un." 
Philippians2:4 Note’ phattuam nading bek ngaihsun kei unla, midangte’ phattuam nading ngaihsutsak zaw un." 
Philippians2:5 Note in Jesuh Khrih lungsim puakzia na nei un. Tua lungsim puak zia in: 
Philippians2:6 Jesuh Khrih in Pasian’ pianzia nei napi-in, Pasian tawh a kizakim theihna dingin thatanghat thu a suang kei hi." 
Philippians2:7 Amah kiniamkhiat tawm zaw a, nasem lim a hong puazaw hi. Mihing bangin amah hong kibawl a, mihing teekteek mah a hong sun hi." 
Philippians2:8 Amah hong kiniamkhiat tawm a, singlamteh tung nangawnah sih ding a ut hi." 
Philippians2:9 Hih thu hangin Pasian in a lianpenin amah koih a, min lian dang khempeuh sangin a min lianzaw-in a koih hi." 
Philippians2:10 Tua ahih manin vantung, leitung, leinuai-a om mi khempeuh in Jesuh pahtawi-in khukdin ding uh a," 
Philippians2:11 Jesuh Khrih in Topa ahi hi, ci-in taangko-in Pa Pasian a min thangsak ding uh hi." 
Philippians2:12 Tua ahih ciangin ka hong it sanggamte aw, note tawh ka hong omkhawm lai-in ka thu na hong man’ tawntung uh mah bangin, tu-in note tawh ka hong omkhawm loh hun ciangin zong ka thu na hong man’ ding uh thupizaw lai hi. Pasian kihtakna le zahtakna tawh na maa uh nawt unla, amah in note hong hotkhiatna thu a cingtaak suaksak un." 
Philippians2:13 Bang hang hiam cih leh note in utna lungsim na neih nading uh le ama deihna na zuihzawh nadingun note sungah Pasian in a tawntungin na a hong sem ahi hi. 
Philippians2:14 Na khempeuh phun lo, thu nial loin sem un." 
Philippians2:15 Tua hileh a lungsim kawi, a hoih lo leitung mite lakah paubaanna a nei lo a siangtho, Pasian’ tate na hi ding uh a, nuntakna thu na genna uh hangin leitung mite lakah khuavak bangin na hoihna uh a kilang mite na hi ding uh hi." 
Philippians2:16 Tua hileh a beisa hunah ka sepna le ka hanciamnate a mawkna suak lo ding ahih manin Khrih hong paikik ni ciangin kei ka kisial thei ding hi. 
Philippians2:17 Note’ upna hangin biakpiakna-in keimah hong kigo hitaleh zong, note khempeuh mah bangin kei zong ka lungdam veve ding hi." 
Philippians2:18 Tua mah bangin note in zong hong lungdampih ta un. 
Philippians2:19 Note kiang panin thu ka zakna hangin ka lung a noptheih nadingin note kiangah Timoti ka hong paisak baih nadingin Topa Jesuh in hong huh ding hi, ci-in ka lamen hi." 
Philippians2:20 Note ka hong lunghihmawh zahin amah bek mah in note hong lunghihmawhpih hi. 
Philippians2:21 Adangte in ahihleh Jesuh Khrih thu kinloin, amau’ aituam vai bek lunghimawh uh hi." 
Philippians2:22 Ahi zongin Timoti ahihleh lungdamna thu nasepna-ah pata bang ka hih manun manpha mahmah hi. 
Philippians2:23 Keima pianzia ding ka theihkhit phetin note kiangah Timoti ka hong paisak pah ding hi. 
Philippians2:24 A sawt loin kei mahmah zong ka hong paitheih nadingin Topa in hong huh ding hi, ci-in ka muang hi." 
Philippians2:25 Note in kamtai ding le keimah hong huh dingin na hong sawl uh, kei tawh na semkhawmin gal hong simpih, i sanggampa Epafroditas pen note kiangah ka hong ciahsakkik ding kisam hi, ci-in ka ngaihsun hi." 
Philippians2:26 Amah in note hong munuam mahmah a, ama natna na zak manun amah zong lunghimawh mahmah hi." 
Philippians2:27 Amah a ci na takpi a, zong si dektak hi. Ahi zongin Pasian in amah hehpih hi. Amah hehpih kei leh keima dahna kibehlapto sawnsawn ding ahih manin amah bek a hehpih hi loin kei zong a hong hehpih ahi hi." 
Philippians2:28 Tua ahih manin amah na muh uh ciangin na lungdam theih nading uh le kei’ lunghihmawhna a kiam nadingin amah ka hong ciahsak ding ka kin semsem hi. 
Philippians2:29 Khrih nasepna-ah note in pumpi tawh na hong huhkim theih loh manun note’ tangin amah in kei a hong huh manin a nuntakna hong pia-in sihlawh dektak hi. Tua ahih manin hih bang mite na zahtakbawl mahmah unla, Topa’ nasem taktak hi, ci-in lungdam takin na limbawl un." 
Philippians2:30  
Philippians3:1 A tawpna-ah, sanggamte aw, Topa in note tungah lungdamna hong tungsak tahen. Ka hong gelhsa thute ka hong gelhkik ding cimtakhuai ka sa kei a, note a dingin lungmuanhuai zaw lai hi." 
Philippians3:2 Ui bangin a miginalo, a gitloh gamtat, vun at ding a ci teiteite kiang panin na kidawm un." 
Philippians3:3 Bang hang hiam cih leh eite in Kha Siangtho’ hong huhna tawh Pasian bia-in, Jesuh Khrih tawh i kipawl manin lungdamin, a tung lama kilang vun-atna limte muanin nei lo ihih manin, amaute hi loin, eite pen vun-atna man taktak a zang mite ihi zaw hi." 
Philippians3:4 Kei mahmah zong, tua bang nate muantheih ding a nei pa ka hi hi. A puatham a ciaptehna muantheih ding nei ing, a ci a om leh, ke’n ka limneih zaw lai hi." 
Philippians3:5 Ka suahzawh a ni giat ni-in ka vun a ki-at hi. Kei pen Hebru minam citak ka hi a, Israel mite sung panin Benjamin’ suante ka hi hi. Jew Thukham zuihna tawh kisai-in Farisi mi pawl ka hi a," 
Philippians3:6 nak hahkatlua kisa-in pawlpite nangawn ka bawlsia hi. Thukham zuihna tawh midik kitang ding hileh paubaanna mahmah ka nei kei hi. 
Philippians3:7 Ahi zongin hamphatna-in ka neih theih ding tua bangte khempeuh, Khrih hangin supngam dingin ka ngaihsun hi." 
Philippians3:8 Hih bang nate bek hi loin, ka Topa Jesuh Khrih ka theihna manphazaw lua sa ka hih manin na dang khempeuh ka sum ngamzaw lai hi. Khrih hangin na dang khempeuh ka nusia khin a, Khrih tawh ka kipawl theih nadingin na dang khempeuh ninneng bang lelin ka ngaihsun hi." 
Philippians3:9 Khrih tawh kiptakin kipawl khin ka hih manin Thukham zuihna tawh a kingah thei keima hanciamna tawh dik ngahna cihte ka nei nawn kei hi. Tu-in, Jesuh Khrih upna hangin Pasian in a hong piak diksakna ka ngah a, tua pen upna siksanin a hong kipia ahi hi." 
Philippians3:10 Jesuh Khrih thei-in, ama thawhkik bangin thokikin, kei zong sihna panin hong hingsakkik ding hi, ci-in ka lametna hangin ama thuak bangin thuakin, sihna-ah zong amah tawh ka kibat ding ka utpi pen ahi hi." 
Philippians3:11  
Philippians3:12 Ahi zongin ka utna tungkhin ing, cingtaak khinta ing, a ci ka hi kei hi. Khrih Jesuh in kei a dingin a hong sepsak hamphatnate kimtakin ka ngahtheih nadingin a hanciam lai ka hi hi." 
Philippians3:13 Sanggamte aw, tua hamphatna a ngah khinin ka kingaihsun kei hi. Tua ahih manin a beisa thute mangngilh bawlin mainawtin ka hanciam a," 
Philippians3:14 Khrih Jesuh nasepna tawh vantung nuntakna-ah Pasian’ hong sapna ahi hamphatna ka ngahtheih nadingin, a kung lam zuanin tangtakin ka tai hi." 
Philippians3:15 Kha thu-ah a khangham eite in hih bang lungsim pua ciat ni. Hih bang lungsim a nei lo i omkhak leh zong, Pasian in a kitel takin hong kilangsak ding hi." 
Philippians3:16 Bangbang hitaleh ang, i tunna ciangciang panin mainawt ciat ni." 
Philippians3:17 Sanggamte aw, keima gamtat bangin hong gamta niloh un. Note’ etteh dingin a hoihin kote hong gamta ka hih manun, kote’ gamtat bangin a gamtate na etteh un." 
Philippians3:18 Singlamteh tungah Khrih a sihna thu tawh a kilehngatin a nungta mi tampi tak a omna thu, a beisa hunah tamveipi ka hong genkhin a, tu-in zong khitui tawh ka hong genpha kikkik hi." 
Philippians3:19 Amaute in amau pumpi deihnate Pasian zahin ngaihsun uh a, a maizum nading uh thute-ah kisial zawsopin, leitung nate bek ngaihsutin nei uh ahih manin Hell khuksung a tung ding uh ahi hi." 
Philippians3:20 Ahi zongin eite ihih leh vantung gam mite ihi a, vantung panin a hong pai ding Topa Jesuh Khrih, eite’ Honpa, lawptakin a ngakte ihi hi." 
Philippians3:21 Amah in na khempeuh ama khutnuai-ah koihna-in a zat vangliatna mah tawh a ginalo i leitung pumpi pen ama a’ mah bangin a minthang pumpi tawh hong kheelsak ding hi. 
Philippians4:1 Tua ahih manin sanggamte aw, note ka hong it mahmah a, nakpitakin ka hong goih hi. Note in nakpitakin kei na hong lungnuamsak uh a, note ka hong angtanpih mahmah hi. Tua hi a, sanggamte aw, Topa sungah kiptakin nungta un." 
Philippians4:2 Euodia le Sintikhe, Topa’ hangin a kilemkik ding uh ka thum nuam hi." 
Philippians4:3 Hih numei nihte in Klement le a nungta mite a kikhumna Pasian’ laibu sungah a kikhum, ka naseppih dangte khempeuh tawh, lungdamna thu a kizelh nadingin nakpitakin kei tawh na hong semkhawm uh ahih manin, citakin kei tawh na a semkhawm note in zong amau tegel na huh nadingun ka hong thum hi." 
Philippians4:4 Topa sungah lungdam tawntung un, ka hong cihsa bangin tu-in zong lungdam un, ka hong ci kik hi." 
Philippians4:5 Mi khempeuh tungah na dik un. Topa hong pai baih ta ding hi. 
Philippians4:6 Thu khat peuhpeuhah lunghimawh lua kei unla, na kisap bangbang uh, lungdamna tawh Pasian kiangah na ngen un." 
Philippians4:7 Mihingte in a theihtel zawh loh Pasian’ hong piak lungsim nopna in, Khrih Jesuh tawh na kipawlna uh hangin note hong lungnuamsak ding hi." 
Philippians4:8 Sanggamte aw, a tawpna-ah ka hong gennop thu in, a hoih le a phattaak thute tawh na lungsim uh na kidimsak un. Tuate in: A man, a dik, a tang, a siangtho, a deihhuai, le a pahtakhuai thute ahi hi." 
Philippians4:9 Keima genna le ka gamtatna panin thei-in na san uh thute, nomau pumpi mahmah tawh na zui un. Tua hileh nopsakna a hong piathei Pasian in note hong ompih ding hi." 
Philippians4:10 Topa’ hangin ka lungdamna lian mahmah hi. Hun sauveipi khit ciangin kei na hong phawkna uh na hong langsakkik thei uh hi. Kei hong kin loin omngei uh teh, a ci ka hi kei a, na hong kinna uh na hong lah nading uh hun om thei lo, ka cihna ahi hi." 
Philippians4:11 Bangbangin om taleng a lungkim thei dingin a kisinsa ka hih manin hih bang ka hong gen ciangin ka kitangsapna a hong pulak nuam ka hi kei hi. 
Philippians4:12 Cihmawhna le cihtheihna a sinsa ka hi hi. Tua ahih manin ka hau a ka zawng zongin, ka vah a ka kial zongin, koi mun koi mun hitaleh ah a lungkimthei dingin a kisinsa ka hi hi." 
Philippians4:13 Khrih in a hong piak vangliatna tawh hihte khempeuh nawkzawh nading thahatna a nei ka hi hi. 
Philippians4:14 Ahi zongin ka lungkham laitakin na hong huh manun hoih mahmah hi. 
Philippians4:15 Na theihsa uh mah bangin Lungdamna Thu ka hilh cil lai-in note’ gam Masedonia panin ka paikhiat hunin no Filippi pawlpite bek mah in kei na hong huh uh a, ka ngahna le ka piakkhiatnate, note bek mah in a hong theihpih na hi uh hi." 
Philippians4:16 Thesalonika khua-ah cimawhin ka om lai-in huhna nong puak uh khatvei bek hi lo hi. 
Philippians4:17 Note tung panin na tampi ka ngahnop man hi lo a, note’ hamphatna a kibehlap nading ka deihna hizaw hi." 
Philippians4:18 Note’ hong piak nate kicing piikpeek hi. Epafroditas in note’ hong na khakte hong tunpih ahih manin ka kitangsapna khempeuh kicingkim hi. Hih nate pen Pasian biakna-in na piak uh, lungdam takin a hong san, a namtui nate ahi hi." 
Philippians4:19 A na ka sep i Topa Pasian in ama hauhna tawh kizui-in Khrih Jesuh hangin note’ kitangsapna khempeuh hong pia ding hi. 
Philippians4:20 I Pa Pasian in a tawntungin minthanna ngah tahen. Amen. 
Philippians4:21 Khrih Jesuh sungah a om mi siangthote khempeuh na na hopihsak un. Kei tawh a omkhawm kamsangte khempeuh in zong note hong hopih uh hi. 
Philippians4:22 Hih lai-a om Khristian khempeuh, a diakdiakin kumpi nasem i lawmte in note hong hopih uh hi." 
Philippians4:23 Topa Jesuh Khrih hehpihna thupha, note khempeuh tungah hong tung tahen." 
Colossians1:1 Pasian’ deihna tawh Jesuh Khrih’ sawltak dingin a hong kiseh keimah Paul le i sanggam Timoti in," 
Colossians1:2 Kolose khua-ah a om Pasian’ mi ahi, Khrih sungah kiptakin a om sanggamte tungah lai ka hong khak uh hi. I Pa Pasian in note tungah dikna le nopsakna thupha hong tungsak tahen." 
Colossians1:3 Note in Khrih Jesuh na muanna uh le Pasian’ mite khempeuh na itna thu uh za ka hih manun note a’ ding thu ka hong ngetsak uh ciangin i Topa Jesuh Khrih’ Pa Pasian tungah lungdamna ka ko tawntung uh hi. 
Colossians1:4  
Colossians1:5 Thu dang na zakma un, lungdamna thuman taktak na zak uh ciangin lametna na nei uh hi. Note a dingin vantungah a hong kikoihsak tua lametna hangin note in muanna le itna a nei na hi uh hi." 
Colossians1:6 Note in Pasian hong hehpihna thu za-in, ahi bangbangin na theih hun uh a kipanin thupha na ngah uh bangin leitung midang khempeuh tungah zong lungdamna thu in thupha tunin, leitung khempeuhah a kizel ahi hi." 
Colossians1:7 Hih thu pen, Khrih nasepna sungah kote’ tangin citakin na a sem, kote’ naseppih Epafras tung panin na zak uh ahi hi." 
Colossians1:8 Amah in, Kha Siangtho’ piak itna na neihna uh zong, kote kiangah a hong gen hi." 
Colossians1:9 Tua bangin note’ thu ka zak uh hun a kipanin Pasian kiangah thu ka hong ngetsak uh a, kha thu tawh kisai pilna le theihtelnate nei-in, Pasian’ deihna na theihtheih nadingun ka hong ngetsak uh hi." 
Colossians1:10 Tua bang hileh Topa’ deihna bangin nungta-in, amah a lungkimsak ding thute bek na sem tawntung ding uh a, na gamtatnate uh a hoih bekbek hong hi-in, Pasian’ thu na theihna uh hong khang semsem ding hi." 
Colossians1:11 Note in lungduai maitai takin thuakzo-in, khuavak gam sungah a om Pasian’ mite tawh nopsakna a ngahkhawm thei dingin a hong bawl i Pa tungah lungdamna na koh theih nadingun a minthang ama vangliatna in note tungah thahatna hong guan tahen." 
Colossians1:12  
Colossians1:13 Amah in khuamial vangliatna panin eite hong honkhia-in, a lungmuanhuaina mun, a it a Tapa’ ukna sungah hong koih a," 
Colossians1:14 tua a Tapa in eite hong khahkhia a, i mawhna hong kimaisak khinta hi." 
Colossians1:15 Khrih pen a kimu thei lo Pasian’ lim hi a, a kipiangsak khempeuh lakah tapa upa pen ahi hi." 
Colossians1:16 Vantung le leitungah a om na khempeuh, kha thu tawh kisai vangliatna, tote, mi ukte, aana neihnate a kipan a kimuthei hitaleh a kimu thei lo hitaleh na khempeuh, Pasian in amah zangin a piangsak hi. Leitung a kipanin huih lakah a om khempeuh dongin, Pasian in Khrih a dingin amahmah zangin a piangsak hi." 
Colossians1:17 Na khempeuh khat beek a om ma-in amah om khinta a, amah tawh a kipawl manin na khempeuh ama mun sansanah hoihtakin a omthei hi." 
Colossians1:18 Na khempeuhah amah a lianpen ahih theih nadingin, amah pen pawlpi ahi ama pumpi lutang hi a, pawlpi’ nuntakna a kipatna hi a, sihna panin a kithokiksak Tapa cil ahi hi." 
Colossians1:19 Tua Tapa in Pasian’ pianzia a kimin a neih nading, Pasian mahmah in a sehsa ahi hi." 
Colossians1:20 Pasian in a Tapa zangin na khempeuh ama kiangah a kaihkik ding a sehsa ahi hi. Tua ahih manin singlamteh tungah a Tapa a sihna hangin amah tawh kilemkik theih nading hong omsak ahih manin, leitung, vantung a om khempeuh ama kiangah a hong tunkik ahi hi." 
Colossians1:21 A beisa hunah note’ lungsim gitlohna le gamtatsiatna hangin Pasian tawh kigamla-in Pasian’ gal na hi uh hi. 
Colossians1:22 Ahi zongin, a Tapa a pumpi mahmahin a hong sihna hangin note, a cidam, a siangtho, paubaanna om hetloin ama kiangah hong laktheih nadingin Pasian in note ama lawmin a hong bawl khinta ahi hi." 
Colossians1:23 Ahi zongin note in lungdamna thu na zak cil lai-un na neih uh lametna panin ling hetloin, bulkip nei-in citakin na om paisuak ding uh ahi hi. Tua lungdamna thu mah keimah Paul in hilhin ka sepbel hi a, leitung mun khempeuhah a kihilh lungdamna thu mah ahi hi." 
Colossians1:24 Tu-in ka pumpi-in ka thuakna tawh Khrih in ama pumpi ahi pawlpi a dingin a thuak ding a kisam laiteng a kitangcingsak suak ka hih manin note a dingin ka thuakna thu-ah ka lung a dam hi. 
Colossians1:25 Pasian’ thu a kicing takin note’ phattuam nadingin a hilh dingin pawlpi nasem dingin Pasian in kei a hong bawl hi. 
Colossians1:26 Tua thuhilh ding pen a beisa hunah a ki-imcip thu hi a, ahi zongin tu-in Pasian’ mite tungah a kipholak ta ahi hi." 
Colossians1:27 Pasian in mi khempeuh a dingin a koihcing hih a thupi a deihhuai a thusim pen ama mite tungah pholak ding a sawm ahi hi. Tua thusim in: Khrih tawh a kipawlte in Pasian tawh minthanna ngahkhawm ding hi, cihna ahi hi." 
Colossians1:28 Tua ahih manin a milip tungah Khrih’ thu ka hilh uh a, Khrih tawh a kipawlna uh hangin a milipin a khangcingin Pasian’ omna-ah ka tunpih theih nadingun a milip tungah hilhin ka genkhol uh hi." 
Colossians1:29 Hih bang a tangtun theih nadingin Khrih in kei tungah a hong piak ka thahatna khempeuh zangin, nakpitakin na semin ka hanciam hi." 
Colossians2:1 Note a kipan Laodisia khuamite le kei a hong thei ngei nai lo mi khempeuhte a’ ding nangawnin hahkat takin na ka sem hi. 
Colossians2:2 Note, lungsim hanna tawh kidimin, thu a man taktakin na theihna hangun lungkip takin omin, itna tawh pumkhat na suahtheih nading uh ka deihna ahi hi. Tua hileh Pasian’ thusim ahi Khrih mahmah na thei ding uh hi." 
Colossians2:3 Khrih pen Pasian’ pilna le a thuthuk khempeuh a kitheihtheih nading ahi hi. 
Colossians2:4 Kuamah in note a hong khem zawh loh nadingin hih bang thu a hong gen ka hi hi. 
Colossians2:5 Bang hang hiam cih leh note tawh ka hong omkhawm loh hangin ka lungsimin note tawh ka hong omkhawm a, Khrih na upna uh hangin kiptakin na omkhawmna uh ka theih manin ka nuam mahmah hi." 
Colossians2:6 Note hong honpa dingin Topa Khrih na sansa uh ahih mah bangin amah tawh hoihtakin kipawlin nungta un. 
Colossians2:7 Note tungah a hong kihilhsa bangin ama sungah zungthuk kha unla, ama deihna bangin nungta-in, na upna uhah khauh semsemin, lungdam takin om un." 
Colossians2:8 Khrih thu tawh a kituak lopi-in, tangthu tuanthu ahi a, huihlak a ukte’ thu siksanin ahi zongin, bangmahin a kimang lo leitung pilna tawh mite’ khemsa-in sila na suahkhak loh nadingun kingaihsun un." 
Colossians2:9 Bang hang hiam cih leh mihing hong suahna sungah Khrih in Pasian’ pianzia khempeuh a kimtakin nei a," 
Colossians2:10 Khrih tawh na kipawlna hangun nuntakna kicing na nei uh hi. Huihlak a ukte le aana neite khempeuh tungah amah a lutangpi hi lai hi. 
Colossians2:11 Amah tawh na kipawlna uh hangin mihingte in pumpi vun a at uh bang hi loin, Khrih’ vun-atna ahi mawhnopna lungsim tawh kipelhna a ngah khinta na hi uh hi." 
Colossians2:12 Note tui na kiphum uh ciangin Jesuh tawh kiphum khawmin, misite’ lak panin Khrih a thosak Pasian’ vangliatna na up manun Khrih mah tawh tuiphumna panin a thokhawm leuleu na hi uh hi." 
Colossians2:13 A beisa hunah na mawhna uh hangin kha thu tawh kisai-in misi na hi uh a, Gentail mi na hih manun Thukham nei lote na hi uh hi. Ahi zongin Khrih hangin Pasian in note hong hingsak a, i mawhna khempeuh hong maisak khinta hi." 
Colossians2:14 Eite a dingin a hoih lo, i mawhna a kiciamtehna khempeuh, hong phiatsak a, tuate khempeuh singlamteh tungah kilhcipin a beisak ta hi." 
Colossians2:15 Amah in huihlak a ukte le vangliatna a nei khempeuh, singlamteh tungah zogawp khin a, galzote in a sal matte a kaih uh bangin mi khempeuh muhin a gualzawhna a lak hi." 
Colossians2:16 Tua ahih manin annek tuidawn, biakna pawite, Khadet pawi, le Sabbath ni tawh kisai-in kuamah in ngeina zuih ding bawl kei un." 
Colossians2:17 Hihte pen mailam ah a hong piang ding nate’ lim hi lel a, ahi zongin tu-in a taktak ahi Khrih hong omta hi." 
Colossians2:18 Maang a muhna hangun a thupi diakin kingaihsunin, a kilawm lo zah dongin kiniamkhiat nading le vantung mite biak ding a hong hanthawn mite’ khemsa-in ta kei un. Tua bang mite pen amau’ ngaihsut tawmna tawh a kihisak mawk hi a," 
Colossians2:19 lutang ahi Khrih a len nawn lo uh ahi hi. Lutang ahi Khrih’ ukna tawh pumpi na khempeuh kizom dimdiam uh ahih manin pumpi in thahatna ngah a, Pasian’ deih bangin a khangto hi." 
Colossians2:20 Khrih tawh sikhawm khin na hih manun huihlak a ukte’ khutsung panin a suakta khin na hi uh hi. Tua hinapi-in, bang hangin hih leitung mite bangin gamta na hi uh hiam? Bang hangin ngeina a tuamtuamte," 
Colossians2:21 “Lawng kei un, ciam kei un, su kei un,” cihte zuihin nei na hi uh hiam?" 
Colossians2:22 Hih nate pen i nek, i zat khit ciangin a maimang hi lel a, mihingte’ bawltawm thuhilhna le ngeina hi lel hi." 
Colossians2:23 Hih bang gamtatnate pen a tungthamin i et ciangin limtakin biaknopna lungsim a piangsak ding, kiniamkhiatna a piangsak ding, pumpi ki-ukzawhna a piangsak ding tawh kibang hi. Ahi zongin a taktakin hihte khat beek in pumpi ki-ukzawhna piangsak zo lo hi." 
Colossians3:1 Note pen Khrih tawh a thokik khinte na hih manun, Pasian’ taklam a kumpi tokhom tungah Khrih a tutna mun vantung thute ngaihsutin nei un." 
Colossians3:2 Vantungah a om thute ngaihsutin nei unla, leitungah a om thute ngaihsutin nei kei un." 
Colossians3:3 Note a sikhin na hi uh a, note’ nuntakna pen Khrih tawh Pasian’ sungah a kiseelkhawm ahi hi." 
Colossians3:4 Note’ nuntakna taktak Khrih ahih manin amah hong kilat ciangin note zong amah tawh hong kilang khawmin amah tawh na minthang khawm ding uh hi. 
Colossians3:5 Tua ahih manin nulepa mawhna, a kilawm lo gamtatna, hukna lanna, a hoih lo lunggulhna, le milim biakna nam khat ahih manin huaihamna ahi note sungah a om leitung lungsimte na sisak un." 
Colossians3:6 Ama thu a mang lo mite tungah hih bang gamtatna hangin Pasian’ hehna hong tung ding hi. 
Colossians3:7 Note pen hih bangin gamta-in a nungta ngeite na hi uh hi. 
Colossians3:8 Ahi zongin tu-in hehna, thangpaihna, muhdahna, gensiatna, kam hoih lo pauna cihte nei nawn kei un." 
Colossians3:9 Ngeina lui le gamtatna lui khempeuh a beisakkhin na hihna uh kithei-in khatlekhat tungah zuauthu kigen nawn kei unla," 
Colossians3:10 ngeina thak tawh kituakin gamta un. Eite a hong piangsak Pasian a kicing takin i theih semsem nadingin amah a sun dingin a hong thakbawl tawntung ahi hi. 
Colossians3:11 Tua ahih manin Gentail mi le Jew mi, vun-at mi le vun-at loh mi, khuapi mi le khuaneu mi, sila le sila ahi lo, cih bangin a kilamdanna om lo a, Khrih pen mi khempeuh a’ ding hi thei a, thu khempeuh a’ ding hi thei a, thu khempeuhah amah bek ahi hi." 
Colossians3:12 Pasian in note hong itin, hong teelin, ama mi siangthote hikhin na hih manun note pen hehpihna nei-in, migi-in, kiniamkhiatin, dikin, na lungduai ding uh ahi hi." 
Colossians3:13 Note lakah khatlekhat a kilungkim lo na om uh ciangin khatlekhat na mawhna uh kimaisakin na kihuh ciat un. Topa in note’ mawhna hong maisak bangin note zong khatlekhat na mawhna uh na kimaisak ding uh hi. 
Colossians3:14 Hihte khempeuh banah, mi khempeuh kilem takin a hong om khawmsak thei ahi ki-itna na bulphuh un." 
Colossians3:15 Note pumkhat suakin a lungdam khawm dingin Pasian in a hong sap ahih mah bangin Khrih hong piak nopsakna in note’ lungsim hong uk ta hen la, lungdamin om ta un." 
Colossians3:16 Khrih thu a cingtakin note lungsimah hong om hen la, pilna tawh khatlekhat thu kihilhin na kitai un. Pasian tungah lungdam kohna-in Thuciam Lui sunga late, la thakte, le biakna late na sa un." 
Colossians3:17 Na kampauna, na gamtatnate khempeuh uhah, Topa Jesuh hangin Pa Pasian tungah lungdam kohna-in Jesuh min paulamin na hih ding uh hi." 
Colossians3:18 Zite aw, Khristiante gamtat dingin a kilawm ahih mah bangin na pasalte uh thu na mang un." 
Colossians3:19 Pasalte aw, na zite uh it unla, amaute tungah ngongtat kei un." 
Colossians3:20 Tate aw, na nu na pate uh thu man’ tawntung ding pen na Khristian nasep uh ahi hi. Tua bang thumanna in Pasian lungdamsak hi." 
Colossians3:21 Pate aw, na tate un a thuak zawh loh zah dong dingin thuhilhin taii niloh kei un." 
Colossians3:22 Silate aw, thu khempeuhah na leitung topa uh thu na mang un. Amau’ hong pahtak ding deihna tawh a hong muh sung bekin a hoihtatte hi kei unla, Topa na zahtakna uh hangin lungsim tak tawh gamta un." 
Colossians3:23 Mite’ nasem bangin kingaihsun loin, Pasian’ nasem bangin kingaihsun unla, na sep peuhpeuh uh lungsim takpi tawh lawpin sem un." 
Colossians3:24 Topa in note tungah thaman a hong piak ding lamtak phawk gige un. Tua bangin na sepna uhah Khrih Topa’ na a semsem na hi uh hi. 
Colossians3:25 A man loin a gamtate in ahihleh a gamtatna bangun thuak ding uh hi. Pasian in kuamah deidan loin amau’ gamtatna bang ciatin thu a khen ahi hi. 
Colossians4:1 Tote aw, note in zong vantungah To khat na neihna uh phawk unla, na silate uh a kilawm a kituakin bawl un." 
Colossians4:2 Lungsim takpi tawh thu ngen tawntung unla, kidawm kawmin lungdamna tawh thu ngen un." 
Colossians4:3 Mite kiangah Khrih’ thusim hilhtheih nadingin Pasian in kote tungah hunpha hong piaktheih nadingin thu hong ngetsak un. Ka thongkiatna pen hih thu hang mah ahi hi. 
Colossians4:4 Mite’ teltheih dingin a kitel takin ka gentheih nadingin thu hong ngetsak un. 
Colossians4:5 A pualam mite tungah a kilawm a kituakin gamta unla, hunhoih na ngah khempeuh uh na valkhongsak ngei kei un." 
Colossians4:6 Kam na pau uh ciangin mi’ zaknop, mi’ ngaihnop dingin na pau un. Tua hileh na kihopih uh mite khempeuh a dingin phattuamna a nei kam a pau na hi ding uh hi." 
Colossians4:7 Topa’ nasepna-ah citakin a manpha mahmah ka naseppih uh ka sanggam uh Tikhikas in kei’ thu a kicing takin note kiangah hong gen ding hi. 
Colossians4:8 Hih lai-a kote’ omzia hong gen ciangin note’ lungsim a noptheih nadingin amah a hong paisak ka hi hi. 
Colossians4:9 Note’ khuapih mi, a citak i sanggam it pa Onesimas zong ka hong zuisak hi. Amau tegel in hih lai-a thupiang khempeuh note kiangah hong gen ding uh hi." 
Colossians4:10 Kei tawh thong a kiakhawm Aristarkhas in note hong hopih hi. Barnabas’ sanggamnu’ tapa Marka in zong hong hopih hi (amah hong pai ciangin hoihtakin na pawlbawl un, ci-a hong kigen pa ahi hi)." 
Colossians4:10 Kei tawh thong a kiakhawm Aristarkhas in note hong hopih hi. Barnabas’ sanggamnu’ tapa Marka in zong hong hopih hi (amah hong pai ciangin hoihtakin na pawlbawl un, ci-a hong kigen pa ahi hi)." 
Colossians4:11 Justas zong a kici zel Jesuh in zong note hong hopih hi. Vun-atna a zang Jew mi Khristian a hong suakte lak panin hih mi thumte bek, Pasian thu-ah ka naseppih lakah a hong kihel ahi hi. Ka nasepna-ah amaute in nakpitakin hong huh uh hi." 
Colossians4:12 Jesuh Khrih nasem, note’ makai Epafras in zong hong hopih hi. Pasian’ deihna bangin note nungta-in, lungsim khanghamin kiptakin na omtheih nadingun amah in thu hong ngetsak tawntung hi." 
Colossians4:13 Amah in note-a’ ding a kipan Laodisia khua le Hierapolis khua mite a dingin nakpitakin na a sepna thu ka thei hi. 
Colossians4:14 I it siavuanpa Luka le Demas in zong hong hopih uh hi. 
Colossians4:15 Laodisia khua-a om i sanggamte le Nymfas le ama inn-a a kikhawm pawlpi mite na hopihsak un. 
Colossians4:16 Hih ka hong laikhak na sim khit uh ciangin Laodisia khua-a om pawlpite zong na simsak unla, Laodisia khua pawlpite kiang pan hong pai ding lai zong note in na sim hamtang un." 
Colossians4:17 Tua ciangin Arkhippas kiangah, “Pasian a dingin nasepna nang tungah hong kipia pen hoihtakin na zo in,” ci-in na gen un." 
Colossians4:18 Keimah Paul’ khut mahmah tawh, Note ka hong hopih hi, cihna lai ka gelh ahi hi. Sikkhau khihna ka thuakna thu mangngilh kei un. Note khempeuh tungah Pasian’ hehpihna thupha hong tung tahen." 
1Thessalonians1:1 Keimah Paul, le Silas, le Timoti in Pa Pasian le Topa Jesuh Khrih sungah a om Thesalonika khua-a om pawlpi mite tungah lai ka hong khak uh hi. Pasian in note tungah dikna le nopsakna thupha hong tungsak tahen." 
1Thessalonians1:2 Note khempeuh hangin Pasian tungah lungdamna ko tawntungin, ka thungetna uhah note ka hong phawk tawntung uh hi." 
1Thessalonians1:3 Bang hang hiam cih leh i Pa Pasian kiangah thu ka nget simun note’ upna hangin na nuntakziate uh, itna na neih manun nakpitakin na nasepnate uh le i Topa Jesuh Khrih hong paikik ding lametna na neih manun kiptakin na omnate uh ka phawk tawntung uh hi." 
1Thessalonians1:4 Sanggamte aw, Pasian in note hong itin ama mi dingin a hong teel khitna thu ka thei uh hi." 
1Thessalonians1:5 Bang hang hiam cih leh note kiangah Lungdamna Thu ka hong hilh lai-un kam bek tawh a hong gen hi loin, Kha Siangtho’ vangliatna le Lungdamna Thu a man taktak hi, ci-in theihna tawh a hong pai ka hi uh hi. Note kiangah ka om laitakun note’ phattuam nadingin ka sep ka bawlna khempeuh uh na thei uh hi." 
1Thessalonians1:6 Kote le Topa’ gamtat bangin note na gamta uh a, note in gimna nakpitakin thuaklawh napi-in Kha Siangtho’ huhna tawh lungdam takin thu umin na om uh hi." 
1Thessalonians1:7 Tua ahih manin Masedonia gam le Akhaia gam sung khempeuhah thu um mi khempeuhte a dingin etteh hoih na suak uh hi. 
1Thessalonians1:8 Note’ gamtatna ziate’ hangin Masedonia le Akhaia gam sungteng bekah Topa’ thu a kithei hi loin, note in Pasian na upna thu uh mun khempeuhah kiza ahih manin kote’ gen ding bangmah kisam nawn lo hi." 
1Thessalonians1:9 Note kiangah ka hong pai lai-un kote na hong limbawlna thu uh, le a nungta a man Pasian’ thu zui-in a bia ding le," 
1Thessalonians1:10 a hong tung ding Pasian’ hehna panin eite a hong honkhia, sihna panin Pasian in a thawhsakkik a Tapa Jesuh, van panin a hong pai ding ngak dingin milim paisanin Pasian’ lamah na kiheina uh thute mi khempeuh in gen belin a nei uh hi." 
1Thessalonians2:1 Sanggamte aw, note kiangah ka hong painasa thu a mawkna a suahlohna thu nomau mahmah in na thei uh hi." 
1Thessalonians2:2 Note in na theihsa uh mah bangin Thesalonika khua ka hong tun ma-un Filippi khua-ah simmawh bawlna le maizumna ka thuak uh hi. Tua bangin nakpitakin hong kilangbawlna hangin Pasian kiang panin a hong pai Lungdamna Thu note kiangah gen ngam nadingin i Pasian in kote sungah lungsim hanna a hong guan hi. 
1Thessalonians2:3 Kote in thu ka hong hilh uh ciangin thuman lo, ngimna hoih lo le khemnopna lungsim tawh a hong hilh ka hi kei uh hi." 
1Thessalonians2:4 Pasian in kote hong thei-in Lungdamna Thu a hilh dingin kilawm hong sa ahih mah bangin mite’ lungdam theih nadingin thu a hilh hi loin kote’ lungsim ngimna a hong thei Pasian’ lungkim nadingin thu a hilh ka hizaw uh hi. 
1Thessalonians2:5 Tua ahih manin note in na theih uh mah bangin mite’ lungdam theih nading phatna kamte ka zang kei uh a, kote’ phattuam nading ngaihsutna tawh zong bangmah ka sem het kei uh hi. Hih bang ka hihna uh Pasian in hong thei hi." 
1Thessalonians2:6 Khrih sawltakte ka hihna uh hangin phatna ka ngah ding uh a kilawm hinapi-in note le midangte, a kuamah peuh’ hong phat ding a zong ka hi kei uh hi." 
1Thessalonians2:7 Note kiangah ka hong om lai-un nupite in a tate uh itna tawh a bawl bangin note ka hong bawl uh hi. 
1Thessalonians2:8 Note hong it mahmah ka hih manun Pasian kiang panin a hong pai Lungdamna Thu bek hong gen loin, kote’ nuntakna mahmah zong note a dingin a pia ngamin ka om uh hi. Tua ahih manin kote’ hong muhna-ah note a manpha mahmah na hi uh hi." 
1Thessalonians2:9 Sanggamte aw, ka nasep ka silbawlnate khempeuh uh note in na thei uh hi. Pasian kiang panin a hong pai Lungdamna Thu note kiangah ka hong hilhna hangun note in themkhat beek na gimlawhkhak loh nadingun a sun a zanin nakpitakin na ka sem uh hi." 
1Thessalonians2:10 Note in hih thu na theih uh mah bangin Pasian in zong hong thei hi. Thu um note tungah kong gamtatnate uh siangtho-in thuman a, paubaan nading bangmah om het lo hi." 
1Thessalonians2:11 Pa in a tate a bawl bangin note ka hong bawlna uh na thei uh hi. 
1Thessalonians2:12 Note hong hehnemin ka hong hanthawn uh a, amah tawh ukna le minthanna a ngahkhawm dingin a hong sam Pasian’ lungkimna bangin na gamtat theih nadingun ka hong gengen uh hi." 
1Thessalonians2:13 Note kiangah Pasian’ thu ka hong gen uh ciangin no thu um mite sungah ama thu tawh kisai-in Pasian in na hong sem ahih manin kote’ thugente pen Pasian’ thu taktak ahih mah bangin kote’ thugenna na zak uh ciangin mihing’ thu bangin ngaihsun loin Pasian’ thu taktak mahin hong sang na hih manun, hih thu hangin zong Pasian’ tungah ka lungdamna uh ka ko uh hi." 
1Thessalonians2:14 Tua ahih manin sanggamte aw, Judea gam sunga om, Khrih Jesuh thu a um, Pasian’ mi ahi mite in a thuak bangin note in zong a thuak na hi uh hi. Amaute in Jew mite’ bawlsiatna a thuak uh mah bangin note in zong note’ gam mite mah’ bawlsiatna na thuak uh hi." 
1Thessalonians2:14 Tua ahih manin sanggamte aw, Judea gam sunga om, Khrih Jesuh thu a um, Pasian’ mi ahi mite in a thuak bangin note in zong a thuak na hi uh hi. Amaute in Jew mite’ bawlsiatna a thuak uh mah bangin note in zong note’ gam mite mah’ bawlsiatna na thuak uh hi." 
1Thessalonians2:15 Tua Jew mite in Topa Jesuh le kamsangte that uh a, kote zong hong bawlsia uh hi. Pasian’ lungkim loh nadingin gamta uh a, mi khempeuh langbawl uh hi." 
1Thessalonians2:16 Gentail mite tungah hotkhiatna thu ka gen ding uh hong khaktan uh ahih manin amau’ mawhnasate a behlap niloh a suak uh hi. Ahi zongin a tawpna-ah Pasian’ hehna amaute tungah a tungta hi. 
1Thessalonians2:17 Sanggamte aw, kote ahihleh no tawh i lungsim a kikhen loh hangin tawlkhat sung i pumpi a kikhen sungin note ka hong phawk mahmah uh a, note kiangah hawhkik ding nakpitakin ka hanciam uh hi." 
1Thessalonians2:18 Note kiangah hong hawhkik nuam ka hih manun note kiangah hawhkik ding ka hanciam zelzel hangun kong pai ding uh Satan in hong khaktan hi. 
1Thessalonians2:19 Tua banga kong painopna uh pen, note bek mah kote’ lamet, ka lungdamna uh le kote’ gualzawhna lukhu na hi uh a, Topa Jesuh hong pai ciangin ama mai-ah kong kisialhpih ding uh na hi uh hi." 
1Thessalonians2:20 Kote’ thupi suahna le lungdamna pen note bek mah na hi takpi uh hi. 
1Thessalonians3:1 A tawpna-ah ka thuakzawh nawn loh uh ciangin Athen khua-ah kei le Silas omin," 
1Thessalonians3:2 Khrih Lungdamna Thu hilhna-ah Pasian a dingin kote tawh na a semkhawm i sanggampa Timoti hong paisak le-ung hoihpen ding hi, ci-in ka ngaihsun uh hi. Amah in note hong hanthawnin na upna uhah hong kipsakin," 
1Thessalonians3:3 hih bawlsiatna hangin note khat beek na puk loh nading uh deihna tawh a hong paisak ka hi uh hi. Hih bang bawlsiatna pen i thuak ding mah hi, ci-in note in zong na theih uh ahi hi." 
1Thessalonians3:4 Bang hang hiam cih leh note tawh kong omkhawm lai-un zong, na theihsa uh bangin tu-a na thuak bangte teekteek mah uh a thuak ding hi hang, ci-in ka hong genkholhsa uh ahi hi." 
1Thessalonians3:5 Tua ahih manin ka thuakzawh nawn loh ciangin note’ upna zia a thei dingin Timoti ka hong sawl hi. Dawimangpa’ ze-etna in note hong puksakkha-in, kote’ nasepna a mawkna suakkha ding hi, ci-in ka lunghimawh uh hi." 
1Thessalonians3:6 Ahi zongin tu-in note kiang panin Timoti hong tungkhin a, note’ upna le nong itna uh thute a hong gen hi. Kote na hong lim ngaihsutnate uh le kote in ka hong muhnop uh mah bangin note in zong kote na hong muhnopna uh thute khempeuh a hong gen hi." 
1Thessalonians3:7 Tua ahih manin sanggamte aw, note’ upna thu ka zak uh ciangin lungkham sinkhamna ka thuak laitakun ka tha uh hong hatsak hi." 
1Thessalonians3:8 Topa’ thu-ah kiptakin om na hih manun tu-in ka husang theita uh hi. 
1Thessalonians3:9 Tu-in note hangin Pasian tungah ka lungdamna uh ka ko theita uh a, note hangin ka lungdamna khempeuh uh, Pasian tungah ka ko uh hi." 
1Thessalonians3:10 Pasian in eite maitang kimu-in hong omsak theih nading le note’ upna ka hong kicinsak theih nadingun a sun a zanin lungsim takpi tawh thu ka ngenngen uh hi. 
1Thessalonians3:11 Tu-in eite’ Pa ahi Pasian le i Topa Jesuh in note kiangah ka hong paitheih nading uh lampi hong honsak tahen. 
1Thessalonians3:12 Kote in note ka hong it zahun, note khatlekhat na ki-itna uh le mi khempeuh na itna uh, hong liansak semsem tahen." 
1Thessalonians3:13 Tua hileh i Topa Jesuh a mi siangthote khempeuh tawh hong pai ciangin eite’ Pa ahi Pasian’ mai-ah kisuanna om hetloin lungsim siangtho takin na om thei ding uh hi. 
1Thessalonians4:1 Tu-in sanggamte aw, Pasian’ deihna le ama lungkim nadingin bangci nuntak ding cih thu kote kiang panin na theihsa uh thute tawh kizui-in na nuntaksa uh ahih mah bangin a kicingzaw semsemin na nuntak nadingun i Topa Jesuh min tawh hong thumin ka hong hanthawn uh hi." 
1Thessalonians4:2 Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa Jesuh min tawh ka hong thuhilhnate uh na theihsa uh ahi hi. 
1Thessalonians4:3 Note a siangtho-in nungta-in numei tunga mawhna tawh na kipelh siangtho nading uh Pasian in hong deih hi. 
1Thessalonians4:4 Pasian a thei lo dawibiate in kilunggulhna hang bek tawh a pumpi uh a zat bang hi loin, note in a kilawm a siangtho-in na pumpi uh bangci zat ding cih thu na theih ding uh hong deih hi." 
1Thessalonians4:5  
1Thessalonians4:6 Hih bang thute-ah kuamah in Khrih sungah na sanggamte uh tungah na khialh loh nading uh le na khasiatsak loh nading uh hong deih hi. Pasian in hih bangin a gamta mite gim pia ding hi, ci-in khauhtakin note kiangah ka hong genkhol khinzo uh hi." 
1Thessalonians4:7 Eite a thanghuai gamtat dingin Pasian in a hong sam hi lo a, a siangtho-in a nungta dingin a hong sam ahi hi." 
1Thessalonians4:8 Tua ahih manin hih thute a thudon lo mi in mite a thudon lo hi loin, note tungah ama Kha Siangtho a hong pia Pasian a thusim lo ahi hi." 
1Thessalonians4:9 Ahi zongin thu uppih mite it ding tawh kisai-in bangmah gelh ding na kisam nawn kei uh hi. Khatlekhat na ki-it nading uh Pasian in note tungah hong hilh khinzo hi. 
1Thessalonians4:10 Masedonia gam sunga om thu um mi khempeuh na it khin takpi uh hi. Tua ahih manin sanggamte aw, itna na neih semsem nadingun ka hong thum uh hi." 
1Thessalonians4:11 Tu ma-a ka hong gensa uh mah bangin kamtam nuam se loin hoihtakin om hithiatna, no tawh a kisai thu bek ngaihsutna, le note’ nuntak nading na na sep nading uh hanciamin nei un." 
1Thessalonians4:12 Tua bangin gamta le-uhcin thu um lo mite in note hong zahtak ding uh a, mite’ neihsa na duhgawh kei ding uh hi." 
1Thessalonians4:13 Sanggamte aw, lametna a nei lo mite bangin na dahluat loh nadingun a sisa mite’ omzia ding thu na theih ding uh ka deih hi." 
1Thessalonians4:14 Jesuh si-in thokik hi, ci-in i up mah bangin Pasian in Jesuh hong paipih kik ciangin amah umin a si mite zong hong tonpih ding hi, ci-in i um hi." 
1Thessalonians4:15 Topa’ thugen note kiangah ka hong gen uh thu in: Topa hong paikik ni ciangin a nungta lai eite pen a sisa mite tawh i kimuh ma-in Topa tawh i kimu kei ding hi. 
1Thessalonians4:16 Pasian’ thupiakna awging lianpi, vantungmi mangpa’ thugenna, le Pasian’ peengkul hong ging ding a, vantung panin Topa mahmah hong paisuk ding hi." 
1Thessalonians4:17 Tua ciangin tua hun laitakin a nungta lai eite pen vankim lai-ah Topa a dawn dingin amah a um a sisa mite tawh hong kilakhawm ding a, Topa tawh i omkhawm tawntung ding hi, cihna ahi hi." 
1Thessalonians4:18 Tua ahih ciangin note khatlekhat hih thu tawh na kihehnem un. 
1Thessalonians5:1 Ahi zongin sanggamte aw, hih thu hong pian ding hun tawh kisai kong gelh ding uh kisam lo hi." 
1Thessalonians5:2 Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa hong pai ding Ni pen zan a gutate bangin theihkholh lohin hong tung ding hi, ci-in note in teltakin na theihsa uh ahi hi." 
1Thessalonians5:3 Mite in, “Thu khempeuh a hoih laitak hi a, bangmah patauh nading om lo hi,” a cih laitakin thakhatthu-in amaute tungah siatna hong tungvat ding hi. Nausuah natna bangin gimna thuak ding uh a, kuamah suakta lo ding uh hi." 
1Thessalonians5:4 Ahi zongin sanggamte aw, note ahihleh khuamial gamtatnate gamta lo na hih manun guta bangin tua Ni hong tunvat ciangin lamdang na sa kei ding uh hi." 
1Thessalonians5:5 Bang hang hiam cih leh note khempeuh, khuavak gamtatna a nei, sun khuavak mite na hi uh a, eite pen khuamial gamtatna a nei, zan khuamial mite ihi kei hi." 
1Thessalonians5:6 Tua ahih ciangin midangte bangin eite mawk om hithiat loin khua phawkin pilvang ni. 
1Thessalonians5:7 Zan khuamial pen mite’ ihmut hithiat hun le zukham hun ahi hi. 
1Thessalonians5:8 Ahi zongin eite pen khuavak gamtatna a nei sun khuavak mi ihih manin pilvang ni. Awmdal bangin upna le itna bulhin, siklukhu bangin i lamet hotkhiatna khu ni." 
1Thessalonians5:9 Pasian in ama hehna a thuak dingin eite a hong teel hi lo a, i Topa Jesuh Khrih hangin hotkhiatna a ngah dingin a hong teel ahi hi." 
1Thessalonians5:10 Amah a hong paikik ciangin a hing ihi a, a si ihi zongin amah tawh i omkhawm theih nadingin eite a dingin amah a hong si ahi hi." 
1Thessalonians5:11 Tua ahih manin tu laitakin na omzia uh mah bangin khatlekhat kihanthawnin na kihuh ciat ta un. 
1Thessalonians5:12 Sanggamte aw, Topa in note lam a hong lak ding le a hong makai dingin a seh, note lakah na a hong sem mite, a kilawm a kituakin zahtakbawl un." 
1Thessalonians5:13 Amau’ nasepna hangin amaute nakpitakin itbawlin zahtak un. Note khatlekhat kilem takin na om un. 
1Thessalonians5:14 Sanggamte aw, a thadah mite hilh unla, a meidawite hanthawnin, a zawngkhal mite huh unla, hih bang mite ngongbawl kei un." 
1Thessalonians5:15 Gitlohna lamsang kuamah kithuk loin, note khatlekhat tung le mi khempeuh tungah a pha kibawl ding ngaihsutpi-in na nei un." 
1Thessalonians5:16 Lungdam tawntungin," 
1Thessalonians5:17 thu ngen niloh unla," 
1Thessalonians5:18 bangbang hong piang taleh na lungdamna uh Pasian tungah ko tawntung un. Khrih Jesuh tawh kipawlin na nuntakna sung uhah hih bangzia-in na om ding uh Pasian in a hong deih ahi hi. 
1Thessalonians5:19 Kha Siangtho nasepna dongtangsak kei unla," 
1Thessalonians5:20 thuhilhnate simmawhbawl kei un. 
1Thessalonians5:21 Thu khempeuh entel pha unla, a hoihte kemin," 
1Thessalonians5:22 a sia lamsang peuhmah pelh un. 
1Thessalonians5:23 Nopsakna a hong pia Pasian in na khempeuhah sianthona le kicinna hong pia hen la, na kha uh, na nuntakna uh, le na pumpi uh hoihtakin hong kem hen la, i Topa Jesuh Khrih hong pai ciangin mawhna khat zong a nei het lo dingin hong bawl tahen." 
1Thessalonians5:24 Note a hong sam i Pa Pasian a thutak hi a, a thuciamte khempeuh hong tungsak taktak ding hi." 
1Thessalonians5:25 Sanggamte aw, kote a’ ding thu hong ngetsak un." 
1Thessalonians5:26 Thu uppih mi khempeuh khatlekhat a siangtho ki-itna lungsim tawh kinamin na kihopih un. 
1Thessalonians5:27 Thu um mi khempeuh’ zak dingin hih lai na sim nadingun Topa’ min tawh ka hong thum hi. 
1Thessalonians5:28 I Topa Jesuh Khrih hehpihna thupha note tungah hong tung tahen. 
2Thessalonians1:1 Keimah Paul, le Silas, le Timoti-te in: Pasian le Topa Jesuh Khrih sungah a om, Thesalonika khua-a om pawlpi mite tungah lai ka hong khak uh hi." 
2Thessalonians1:2 Pa Pasian le Topa Jesuh Khrih in note tungah dikna le nopsakna thupha hong tungsak tahen. 
2Thessalonians1:3 Sanggamte aw, note’ upna nakpitakin khang a, note khatlekhat na ki-itna uh lian semsem ahih manin Pasian tungah lungdamna koh ding a kilawm ahih mah bangin, note hangin ama tungah lungdamna ka ko tawntung uh hi." 
2Thessalonians1:4 Bawlsiatna le gimna na thuakna khempeuh uhah na upna uh khahsuah loin thuakzo paisuak na hih manun midangte kiangah Pasian’ pawlpi ka na kisialhpih uh hi. 
2Thessalonians1:5 Tu-a na thuaknate uh hangin Pasian’ Ukna sungah a om dingin a kilawm mi suak na hih manun Pasian’ thukhenna a man ahihna hong kilangsak hi. 
2Thessalonians1:6 Pasian in a manin na sem ding ahih manin note a hong gimsak mite tungah Pasian in gimna pia ding a," 
2Thessalonians1:7 tu-a gimna a thuak note le kote tungah zong nopsakna hong pia ding hi. Vantung panin Topa Jesuh le a vanglian a vantung mite, meikuang tawh hong kilat ciangin," 
2Thessalonians1:8 Pasian a thei lo mite, le i Topa Jesuh tawh kisai Lungdamna Thu a um lo mite tungah gimna a tungsak ding hi." 
2Thessalonians1:9 Ama mite khempeuh le thu um mite khempeuh hangin minthanna le pahtawina a ngah dingin Topa hong pai Ni ciangin a noptuak mahmah Topa’ minthanna huamsung panin amaute kihawlkhia ding a, tawntung suksiatna dan a thuak ding uh hi. Ahi zongin note in ka hong gen uh thute um na hih manun tua nopna sungah na om ding uh hi." 
2Thessalonians1:10  
2Thessalonians1:11 Tua ahih manin ama hong sapna tawh a kilawm a kituak nuntakna na nuntak theih nading uh le ama vangliatna tawh a hoih na hihnop khempeuh uh hihzo-in, na upna uh hangin na khempeuh na zawhtheihna dingun Pasian kiangah thu ka hong ngetsak tawntung uh hi." 
2Thessalonians1:12 Tua hileh, eite’ Pa Pasian le Topa Jesuh Khrih hong hehpihna hangin note in ama tung panin minthanna ngahin, ama min zong a thangsak na hi ding uh hi." 
2Thessalonians2:1 Sanggamte aw, i Topa Jesuh Khrih hong pai nading thu le amah a dawn dingin eite i kikhop nading thu tawh kisai-in note kiangah kong thum nopna uh panin:" 
2Thessalonians2:2 Topa’ hong pai ding ni hong tung khinta hi, ci-a thu kigenna hangin lunghimawhin lungmangin om kei un. Thuhilh khat peuhpeuh in hih bang thu hong genkha thei ding a, tua thu pen kote’ gen leh gelh hi, ci-in zong genkha ding uh hi." 
2Thessalonians2:3 Ahi zongin kuama khemsa-in ta kei un. Bang hang hiam cih leh nakpitakin Pasian langpanna lianpi le hell khuksung a tung ding ahi A Gilopa hong kilat matengin tua Ni hong tung lo ding hi. 
2Thessalonians2:4 Tua A Gilopa in mite’ biak pasian a kici khempeuh le na khempeuh nialgawp ding hi. Tuate khempeuh sangin a lianzaw-in a kingaihsut banah, Pasian ka hi hi, ci-in Pasian’ biakinn sung mahmahah pai-in va tu ding hi." 
2Thessalonians2:5 Note tawh ka hong omkhawm lai-in hih thute khempeuh hong genkhin ka hih manin na phawk lai ding uh hi. 
2Thessalonians2:6 Ahi zongin tu laitakin tua bang a pian loh nadingin a kham khat om ahihna thu na thei uh hi. A hun a tun ciangin A Gilopa hong kilang ding hi. 
2Thessalonians2:7 Kuamah kim in a phawk loh Gitloh Gamtatna kigamta khinta a, ahi zongin hih thu a pian ding a khamcip pa a kilakkhiat khit matengin a hong piang ding thu hong piang nai lo ding hi." 
2Thessalonians2:8 A khamcip pa a kilakkhiat khit ciangin A Gilopa hong kilang ding a, Topa Jesuh hong pai ciangin tua A Gilopa mutlum ding a, vanglian minthangin hong kilatna tawh a maimangsak ding hi." 
2Thessalonians2:9 Satan’ vangliatna tawh A Gilopa hong pai-in, lim le nalamdang a tuamtuamte hong bawl ding a," 
2Thessalonians2:10 gitloh khemna a nam tuamtuam zangin, siatna a thuak ding mite a khem ding hi. Tua bang mite in a suahtak nadingun thuman sang nuam lo, deih lo uh ahih manin siatna a tuak uh ahi hi." 
2Thessalonians2:11 Tua ahih manin Pasian in amaute lakah nasem dingin zuau thahatna paisak ahih manin amaute in a man lo thu um uh hi. 
2Thessalonians2:12 Tua ahih manin thuman um loin, mawhna sungah nuam a sa khempeuh in mawhsak thukhenna thuak ding uh hi." 
2Thessalonians2:13 Ahi zongin sanggamte aw, Topa in note hong it a, Kha Siangtho vangliatna hang le note in thuman na upna uh hangin ama mi siangthote na suah nadingun nopsakna a ngah masa dingin Pasian in note hong teel ahih manin note hangin Pasian tungah lungdamna ka ko tawntung uh hi." 
2Thessalonians2:14 Topa Jesuh Khrih tawh minthanna na ngahkhawm theih nadingun note tungah ka hong hilh uh Lungdamna Thu tawh hih nopsakna ah Pasian in note a hong sam ahi hi. 
2Thessalonians2:15 Tua ahih ciangin sanggamte aw, kam tawh ahi a, lai tawh ahi zongin ka hong hilh uh thumante limtakin zui unla, kiptakin om un." 
2Thessalonians2:16 I Topa Jesuh Khrih mahmah leh, eite hong itin, a hong hehpihna tawh thakhauhna le lametna a hong pia tawntung eite’ Pa Pasian in" 
2Thessalonians2:17 note lungsimah thakhauhna hong guan hen la, a hoih thu khempeuh genin a semzo dingin na tha uh hong hatsak tahen." 
2Thessalonians3:1 Sanggamte aw, tu-in note lak mah bangin mun dangah zong Topa’ thu manlang takin kizel pakin lungdam takin a kisan’ theih nadingin kote a’ ding thu hong ngetsak un." 
2Thessalonians3:2 Mi khempeuh in thu um nai lo uh ahih manin a gilo a siahuai mite panin Pasian in kote hong hotkhiat nadingin zong hong ngetsak un. 
2Thessalonians3:3 Note ahihleh, Topa citak mahmah ahih manin hong thahatsak ding a, A Gilopa kiang panin hong honkhia ding hi." 
2Thessalonians3:4 Note kiangah ka hong gen uh thute a kipat cil a kipanin na zuih uh mah bangin zui paisuak taktak ding, ci-in note muanna lungsim kote sungah Topa in hong guan hi." 
2Thessalonians3:5 Pasian bangin itna nei-in Khrih thuak bangin na thuakzawh nadingun Topa in note lungsim hong bawlsak tahen. 
2Thessalonians3:6 Sanggamte aw, i Topa Jesuh Khrih min tawh kong sawlnop uh thu panin: Note tungah ka hong hilhsa uh thute a zui lo, a thadah gamtat thu uppih mite tawh na kikhawl kei un." 
2Thessalonians3:7 Kote’ gamtatzia bangin a gamta ding na hihna uh teltakin na thei uh hi. Note tawh ka hong omkhawm lai-un ka thadah om kei uh hi. 
2Thessalonians3:8 Kuama an a khongin ka ne kei uh hi. Note khat peuhpeuh in nong suplawhkhak loh nadingun a sun a zanin hahkat takin na ka sem uh hi. 
2Thessalonians3:9 Hih bangin ka gamtatna uh pen note’ hong piakte a khongin ne-in a zang dingin a kilawm mah hinapi-in, note’ etteh ding gamtatzia a hong lak ka hizaw uh hi." 
2Thessalonians3:10 Note tawh ka hong omkhawm lai-un, “Na a sem nuam lo mi peuhmah an nesak kei un,” ci-in ka hong gen uh hi." 
2Thessalonians3:11 Hih bangin thu ka hong genna uh pen note lakah mi pawlkhatte thadahin na sem nuam lo uh a, midangte’ nasepna va nawngkaisak zawsop hi, ci-in ka zakna hang uh ahi hi." 
2Thessalonians3:12 Tu-in tua bang mite in kuamah nawngkaisak nawn loin man manin na sem hiathiatin amau’ nuntak nadingun na a sep nadingun Topa Jesuh Khrih min tawh hanthawnin thu ka hong pia uh hi. 
2Thessalonians3:13 Sanggamte aw, note in a hoihin gamtat ding na cimtak ngei het kei ta un." 
2Thessalonians3:14 Hih lai sunga ka hong gente uh a zui nuam lo mi khatpeuh a om leh tua mipa limtakin ciamteh unla, amah a maizum theih nadingin kikholhpih nawn kei un." 
2Thessalonians3:15 Ahi zongin amah galbawl kei unla, thu uppih mi khat hihna tawh hilhbawl zaw un." 
2Thessalonians3:16 Eite tungah nopsakna a hong pia thei Topa in note tungah a tawntungin nopsakna hong pia hen la, amah in note khempeuh hong ompih tahen." 
2Thessalonians3:17 Keimah Paul in kong hopih hi, cihna kammal teng keima khut tawh ka hong gelh ahi hi. Keima laikhak khempeuh hih bangzia-in ciamtehin ka hih ngeina ahi hi." 
2Thessalonians3:18 I Topa Jesuh Khrih hong hehpihna thupha note khempeuh tungah hong tung tahen. 
1Timothy1:1 Eite a hong Hon Pasian le eite’ lamet Khrih Jesuh’ thupiakna tawh Khrih Jesuh’ sawltak ahi keimah Paul in," 
1Timothy1:2 Thu upna sungah ka tapa taktak ahi Timoti tungah lai ka hong khak hi. Pa Pasian le eite’ Topa Khrih Jesuh in dikna, hehpihna le nopsakna thupha, nangma tungah hong tungsak tahen." 
1Timothy1:3 Masedonia gam lam manawhin ka pai lai-in Efesa khua-ah na om ding ka hong sawl mah bangin tu-in zong tua khua mahah na omlai inla, thu upna man lo a hilh mite, a thuhilh a khawl nadingun thu na pia in." 
1Timothy1:4 Phuahtawm tangthute le min tampipi kizom deudau-a khangsimnate in upna tawh i ngahtheih Pasian’ vaihawmnate tangtungsak loin, khatlekhat kitotna piangsak lel ahih manin, tua bang thute a manlahpih loh nadingun na gen in." 
1Timothy1:5 Hih bangin thupiakna pen, upna taktak le kisuanna om hetloin lungsim siangtho taktak tawh ngaihsutna panin a hong piangkhia ki-itna a khantheih nading deihna ahi hi." 
1Timothy1:6 Mi pawlkhatte, hih bang ngaihsutna panin peukhia-in bangmahin a kimang lo thu kikupna tawh nitum uh hi." 
1Timothy1:7 Thei kisa ngelin a gen kankan uh thute le amau kampauna mahmah zong bang gen ka hi hiam cih a thei het lo hinapi-in amaute pen Pasian’ thukhamte a hilh dingin utzaw lai uh hi. 
1Timothy1:8 Thukham pen a kizat nading a kilawm ciang ah zangthei lehang a hoih thu khat hi, ci-in i thei hi." 
1Timothy1:9 Ahi zongin i phawk dingah, mi hoihte a dingin thukham a kibawl hi lo a, thukham zui lote, thumang lote, Pasian’ deih bangin a gamta lote le mawhneite, biakna lungsim a nei lote le kam kilawm lo a paute, nute pate a thatte, midang a thatte," 
1Timothy1:10 nulepa mawhna a gamtate, palepa mawhna a bawlte, mi a gute, zuauthu a gente, mite’ siat nading thu a gente, le thuman tawh a kilehbulhin a gamta mite a dingin thukham a kibawl ahi hi." 
1Timothy1:11 Thuman ka cih pen thupha tawh kidimin a minthang Pasian in ka hilh dingin kei tungah a hong piak Lungdamna Thu ahi hi. 
1Timothy1:12 Hih bangin na sepzawh nadingin thatang hatna a hong pia i Topa Khrih Jesuh tungah ka lungdam hi. Ama nasem dingin kei hong muangin hong seh ahih manin ka nuam hi. 
1Timothy1:13 A beisa hunah amah gensia-in, simmawh bawlin, ama mite a bawlsia pa ka hih ngei tei hangin ama thu ka up nai loh manin theih lohna tawh a gamta ka hih manin Pasian in kei hong hehpih hi." 
1Timothy1:14 Pasian in genzawh lohin kei hong hehpih a, Khrih Jesuh tawh kipawlna hangin i ngahtheih upna le itna a hong guan hi." 
1Timothy1:15 Khrih Jesuh, mawhneite a honkhia dingin leitungah hong pai hi, cihna thu a man hi a, a uphuai a sanhuai thu ahi hi. Keimah zong tua mawhnei mite lakah a mawhpha bel ka hi hi." 
1Timothy1:16 A mawhnei pha bel ka hihna thu hang mahin, nidang ciangin amah umin nuntak tawntungna a ngah ding mite’ etteh theih dingin Khrih Jesuh in a lungduaina cingtakin kei tungah hong lahtheih nadingin Pasian in kei a hong hehpih ahi hi." 
1Timothy1:17 Amah bek Pasian ahi, a kimu thei lo, a si ngei lo, tawntung Kumpipa in minthanna le pahtawina ngah tawntung tahen. Amen." 
1Timothy1:18 Ka ta Timoti aw, tanglai pek a kipanin nang bang mite a dingin a kigensa thu tawh kizui-in nang tungah a thu ka hong ap hi. Hoihtakin gal na dozawh nadingin galhiamin tua thute zang inla," 
1Timothy1:19 na upna le lungsim kisuang loin na omna thu kiptakin len paisuak in. Mi pawlkhatte in a lungsim kitheihna uhah man a kisakna bangun gamta lo uh ahih manin a thu upna uh a mawkna a suah uh hi. 
1Timothy1:20 Tua bang mite lakah Hymenaias le Alexander kihel uh a, Pasian gensiat nawn loh nading thu a phawktheih nadingun Satan’ khut sungah amaute ka ap hi." 
1Timothy2:1 A masa penin kong gennop thu in: Mi khempeuh a dingin Pasian tungah ngetna, thungetna, thumna le lungdamkohna na neih ding uh ahi hi." 
1Timothy2:2 Eite nuamtakin omthei-in, biakna lungsim nei-in a kilawm takin i nuntak theih nadingin kumpite le uliante a dingin thu na ngetsak un." 
1Timothy2:3 Hih bang gamtatnate pen eite hong Hon Pasian’ muhna-ah a hoih a kilawm thu ahi hi. 
1Timothy2:4 Mi khempeuh in hotkhiatna ngahin, thuman a theihkim ding Pasian in deih hi." 
1Timothy2:5 Bang hang hiam cih leh Pasian khat bek om a, Pasian le mite a hong kilemsakkik thei Khrih Jesuh khat bek om hi." 
1Timothy2:6 Mi khempeuh a tankhia dingin tua Jesuh hong kipiatawm a, a hun lian laitakin a hong kipiakna pen Pasian in mi khempeuh a hotkhiat nopna thu a kilatna ahi hi." 
1Timothy2:7 Hih ka gen thu pen zuau ahi lo, thu taktak a gen ka hi a, Gentail mite lakah upna thu le hih thuman a gen dingin sawltak na semin thu a hilh dingin kei a hong kisawl ahi hi." 
1Timothy2:8 Mun khempeuhah a om pasal khempeuh in kuamah tawh kitotna le lungsim kinopmawhna nei hetloin, lungsim siangtho tawh a khut uh lamin thu a nget ding uh ka deih hi." 
1Timothy2:9 Tua mah bangin numeite zong a kilawm a kituak bekin kizemin kipuahin, sam khawng a uanglua-in bawl loin, a khengvalin kizepna a tuamtuamte zang loin," 
1Timothy2:10 biakna lungsim neite a dingin a kilawm ahih mah bangin gamtat hoih a neih ding uh ka deih hi. 
1Timothy2:11 Numeite in gamdai takin kiniamkhiatna tawh thu ngai-in a sin ding uh ahi hi. 
1Timothy2:12 Numeite in pasalte tungah aana nei-in thu a hilh ding ka phalkei hi. Gamdai takin a om ding uh ahi hi. 
1Timothy2:13 Bang hang hiam cih leh a masa-in Adam kipiangsak a, tua ciangin Eve kipiangsak pan hi." 
1Timothy2:14 Adam in khemna thuak masa lo a, numei in thuakin a khial masa a suak hi." 
1Timothy2:15 Ahi zongin numei in a kilawm a kituakin upna, itna le sianthona thu-ah kiptakin a om nakleh nausuah gimna sihpih lo ding hi." 
1Timothy3:1 Mi khatpeuh, pawlpi sia nasep a ut leh a hoih mahmah ahi hi, a cihna thu a man ahi hi." 
1Timothy3:2 Tua ahih manin siate pen paubaanna a nei lo mi, zi khat bek a nei mi, lungsim hoih hithiat mi, thu a ngaihsun thei mi, a kilawm a kituakin a gamta mi, zin le leengla do a siam mi, thuhilh a siam mi," 
1Timothy3:3 zu a kham lo mi, a ngongtat lo mi, lungsimnem mi, kitot a uk lo mi, sum a deihlua lo mite hi ding uh hi." 
1Timothy3:4 A innkuan sung hoihtakin a ukzo mi, a tate thumangsak thei-in, na khempeuhah a kilawm a kituakin a gamtasak thei mi hi ding uh hi." 
1Timothy3:5 Bang hang hiam cih leh mi khatpeuh in a innkuan sung ukzia ding a theih kei leh Pasian’ pawlpi kem thei lo ding hi. 
1Timothy3:6 Khristian a suaktungte zong hi lo ding hi. Tua bang mi thakte kiphasak thei a, Dawimangpa mah bangin thukhenna a thuak mite hikha thei ding hi." 
1Timothy3:7 Pawlpi mi ahi lo midangte in zong a zahtak mite hi ding hi. Tua hileh mindai kha lo ding a, Dawimangpa’ thangah awk kha lo zawdeuh ding hi." 
1Timothy3:8 Pawlpi upa dingte zong a gamtat hoih, a lungsim citak, leenggahzu tam a ne lo, sum thu-ah a huaiham mi hi lo ding uh hi." 
1Timothy3:9 Lungsim kisuanna a om lo, upna thu-ah a kip mite hi ding uh hi." 
1Timothy3:10 A masa-in kize-et phot ding a, paubaanna a om kei leh sem thei pan ding uh hi." 
1Timothy3:11 A zite uh zong a gamtat hoih mi hi-in, mi gensiat a hat lote hi ding uh a, lungsim citak, thu khempeuhah a thuman mi hi ding uh hi." 
1Timothy3:12 Upate pen zi khat bek a nei mi, a tate le a innkuansung hoihtakin a ukzote hi ding hi." 
1Timothy3:13 Pawlpi upa hoihtakin a semthei mite pen mite in zahtak uh a, Khrih Jesuh a upna thu uh kisuanna om hetloin hangtakin gen ngam uh hi." 
1Timothy3:14 Nang kiangah hong pai-in nang tawh kimu baih ding cih lametna tawh hih lai a hong gelh ka hi hi. 
1Timothy3:15 Ahi zongin ka hong zekai khak zenzen leh thuman thutak khuampi le bulpi, a nungta Pasian’ pawlpi ahi Pasian’ innkuan sungah bangci gamtat ding cih na theih nadingin hih ka hong laikhak in lam hong lak ding hi." 
1Timothy3:16 I biakna pen a thuthuk a thulian taktak ahihna thu hih bangin i thei hi: Mihing lim pua-in amah hong kilang a, a man taktak ahihna thu Kha Siangtho in kilangsak a, vantung mite in a mu uh hi. Mi khempeuh tungah ama thu kihilh a, mun khempeuhah ama thu ki-umin, vantungah amah kilato hi." 
1Timothy4:1 Nidang ciangin a upna panun mi pawlkhat pialin, zuauthu gente le dawi thu a kigente a zuih nading uh Kha Siangtho in teltakin a gen hi." 
1Timothy4:2 Tua bang zuau thuhilhnate pen zuau genin mi a khem, sik emsa tawh tatgawp bangin a lungsim un a hoih le a hoih lo a khenthei nawn lote’ kam panin hong gingkhia ding hi." 
1Timothy4:3 Tua bang mite in zi neih le pasal neih ding le an pawlkhat nek ding hoih lo hi, ci uh hi. Ahi zongin thu umin, thuman thutak a thei mite in lungdamna ko-in a nek dingin Pasian in tua ante a bawl ahi hi." 
1Timothy4:4 Pasian’ bawlsa na khempeuh a hoih hi a, nial loin, lungdamna pulakin san ding ahi hi." 
1Timothy4:5 Pasian’ thu le thungetna hang tawh tuate a hoih a suak ahi hi. 
1Timothy4:6 Nang in na zuihsa upna thu le thuhilhna man na zuih kawmin hih ka hong thugente, i sanggamte kiangah na gen nakleh Khrih Jesuh’ nasem a hoih khat na hi ding hi." 
1Timothy4:7 Pasian’ thu tawh a kituak lo, a haihuai tangthu phuahtawmte ngaihsutin na nei vet kei in. Pasian’ deihna tawh a kituakin na nuntak zawh nadingin na kisin in." 
1Timothy4:8 Pumpi kisekin kisinna manpha hi. Ahi zongin kha thu-ah kisekin kisinna pen tuhun laitak le a hong tung ding hunah nuntakna hong piathei ahih manin manphazaw lai hi," 
1Timothy4:9 ci-a kigen pen a man taktak thu hi a, umin sin dingin a kilawm thu ahi hi." 
1Timothy4:10 A diakdiakin ei thu umte in mi khempeuh a Honkhia, a nungta Pasian muangin lamen ihih manin nakpitakin hanciamin na a sem ihi hi." 
1Timothy4:11 Ka hong gensa thute na hilhsawn in. 
1Timothy4:12 Khangno lai na hihna thu hangin mite’ simmawh dingin na om kei inla, kampauna, gamtatna, itna, upna, le sianthona-ah thu um mite’ etteh dingin na om in." 
1Timothy4:13 Kei ka hong pai matengin mipi mai-ah Lai Siangtho simna, a khiatna genna, le hanthotnate-ah tavuan na la in." 
1Timothy4:14 Kamsangte’ thugennate le upate in na tungah a khut uh nga-in thu hong ngetsakna ahi nangma hihtheih siamnate na valkhongsak kei in. 
1Timothy4:15 Mi khempeuh in na khantohna hong muhtheih nadingin hih thute limtakin ngaihsun inla, hahkatin na sem in." 
1Timothy4:16 Na gamtatna le na thuhilhnate-ah hoihtakin kidawmin om lecin nangmah a kipan na thugen a za mite a dingin phattuamna om ding ahih manin na nasepna-ah hoihtakin om in. 
1Timothy5:1 Nang sangin a uzaw mite taiibawl kei inla, na pa bangin ngaihsunin hanthawn in. Nang sangin a nauzawte na nau bangin bawl in." 
1Timothy5:2 Nang sangin a uzaw numeite na nu bangin bawl inla, nang sangin a nauzaw numeite, lungsim siangtho tak tawh na nau numei bangin bawl in." 
1Timothy5:3 Meigong taktak ahi numeite zahtakbawl in. 
1Timothy5:4 Meigong numei khatpeuh in tate ahi a, tute ahi zongin a neih leh innkuan sungah biakna tawh kisai-in tavuan a neihna uh hilh inla, a nu a pa, a pu a pite a huh nadingun gen in. Hih bang gamtatna pen Pasian’ muhna-ah a hoih thu ahi hi." 
1Timothy5:5 A kem a khoi ding a om lo meigong taktak ahi numeite in Pasian bek mah muan le suanin nei-in, a sun a zanin Pasian’ huh ding deihin thu ngen tawntung uh hi." 
1Timothy5:6 Ahi zongin a pumpi uh deihna zui-in a gamta meigong numeite pen a pumpi uh a nuntak hangin kha thu-ah a sikhin ahi uh hi. 
1Timothy5:7 Amaute paubaanna a om loh nadingin hih ka hong thupiaksate amaute tungah gensawn in. 
1Timothy5:8 Mi khatpeuh in a beh a phung, a diakdiakin a innkuansung mite a vak nop kei leh a upna a nusia hita a, thu um lo mite sangin siazaw lai hi." 
1Timothy5:9 Meigong numei khat peuhpeuh a khan kum sawmguk a cingsate, le pasal khatvei bek a nei ngeite bek, meigong sazian sungah koih in." 
1Timothy5:10 Tua banah a gamtat hoihna a kitheite, a tate hoihtakin a khansuahsate, a inn-ah zin le leengla do a siam mite, kiniamkhiatin Pasian’ mite’ khe a silsakte, a lungkham mite a huhte, le thu khempeuhah a hoih gamtat mite hi lai ding uh hi." 
1Timothy5:11 A khangno lai meigong numeite, sazian sungah hel kei in. A pumpi uh deihna zui-in pasal a neihkik nop uh ciangin Khrih taisan uh ahih manin," 
1Timothy5:12 a thuciam masak uh palsat uh ahih manin a mawh a suak uh hi. 
1Timothy5:13 Tua bek zong hi loin, bangmah sem loin inn khat pan inn khatah vak kawikawi-in a hun uh mawk beisak uh a, a vakmawk uh tawh maisak loin mi gensia kawikawi-in midangte va nawngkaisak uh a, a gen lohpi ding teng uh genin va nei uh hi." 
1Timothy5:14 Tua ahih manin, i langte’ hong gensiat nading a om loh nadingin, a khangno lai meigong numeite in pasal nei-in, ta nei-in, amau innkuansung ukin a om ding uh ka deihzaw hi." 
1Timothy5:15 Bang hang hiam cih leh meigong numei pawlkhat, Satan’ nung a zui dingin kipan khinta uh hi." 
1Timothy5:16 Thu um innkuan sungah meigong numei a nei a om leh pawlpite in a kisam meigong taktakte a huhtheih nadingin pawlpi tungah tavuan hong guan kei hen la, amau’ meigong numeite na huh ta uh hen." 
1Timothy5:17 Pawlpi sungah ukna le makaihna siamin, thuhilh le thugen hahkat tawh a thuah upate pen thaman a zah nih piak dingin kilawm hi." 
1Timothy5:18 Bang hang hiam cih leh Lai Siangtho in, “Buh a cil bawngtal muk na tuam kei in,” a cih banah, “Nasempa in a thaman a ngah ding a kilawm ahi hi,” na ci hi." 
1Timothy5:19 Upa khat peuhpeuh a mawhsak mi nih le thum a om kei buang leh thu-in na sim kei in. 
1Timothy5:20 A khial takpi upa a om leh upa dangte a lautheih nadingin a lawmte mai-ah tua a khial pa taii-in thuhilh in. 
1Timothy5:21 Hih ka hong gen thute na zatna-ah kuamah guptuam paihtuam nei hetloin hoihtakin hong mangin na zat nadingin Pasian, Khrih Jesuh, le a siangtho vantung mite’ muhna-ah limtakin a hong gen ka hi hi." 
1Timothy5:22 Topa’ na a sem dingin kipsakna-in khut nga-in thungetna pen kuama tungah zang mengmeng kei in. Midang a khialte tawh khialkhawm kha kei inla, siangtho takin na omtheih nadingin limtakin kikem in." 
1Timothy5:23 Na gil sung natna le na nat mun zelzelna hangin tui bek zang nawn loin leenggahzu tawmtawm na zang in. 
1Timothy5:24 Mi pawlkhatte’ khialhnate kimu pahpahin mawhsakna thuakpah uh a, pawlkhatte’ khialhna pen damdamin hong kinung theih hi." 
1Timothy5:25 Tua mah bangin gamtat hoihnate zong kilangin, kimu-in, a kithei pah kei zongin ki-imcip suak thei lo hi." 
1Timothy6:1 Kuamah in Pasian’ min le i thuhilhnate hong gensiatsak lohna dingin sila khempeuh in a tote uh zahtakbawl ta uh hen. 
1Timothy6:2 Thu um mi to-in a nei silate in upna sungah sanggam khat hi hang, ci-in ngaihsutna tawh a tote uh zahtakbawl loin omkha kei uh hen. Amaute’ nasepna hangin hamphatna a ngah mite pen thu um mi le a it uh mite ahih manin a hoihzaw-in a sepsak ding uh a kilawmzaw ahi hi. Tu-a ka hong gen ding thute mi khempeuh tungah hilhin gen in." 
1Timothy6:3 Topa Jesuh Khrih thu tawh a kituak lo, i biakna paizia tawh a kilehngatin thu tuamdang a hilh mite pen," 
1Timothy6:4 a kiphasak mawkmawk hi uh a, bangmah a thei het lo ahi uh hi. Tua bang mite in thu kisel thu kinial cihte ut belin nei uh a, hazatna, lungsim kituah lohna, kizahkona, a sia lamin ki-upmawhnate piangsak uh a," 
1Timothy6:5 thuman thutak zui loin, a lungsim paizia uh a man nawn lo, biakna pen hauhtheih nading lampi bekin a ngaihsun mite in a tawntungin kitot kiselna a piangsak uh ahi hi." 
1Timothy6:6 Pasian biakna hangin a neihsateng tawh a lungkim mite pen biakna in mihau a suaksak takpi mah ahi hi. 
1Timothy6:7 A taktakin ci lehang, leitungah mihingin i suah laitakin sumlepai tawh i suak kei a, i sih ciangin zong leitung panin bangmah i keng thei tuan kei hi." 
1Timothy6:8 Tua ahih manin annek tuidawn, nikten puansilh i neih nakleh a phazo ahi hi." 
1Timothy6:9 Ahi zongin a haunuam mite in ze-etna a tuamtuam thuak a, duhhopna, huaihamna a haivai thute-ah awkcipin, haksatna le siatna a tuahlawh uh hi." 
1Timothy6:10 Sum deihluatna in siatna namkim piangsak hi. Mi pawlkhat in sum deihlua liang uh ahih manin a upna panun pialkhia-in gimna lungkhamna tampi a thuaklawh uh hi. 
1Timothy6:11 Ahi zongin Pasian’ mi ahi nangmah in tua thute khempeuh pelh inla, thuman thutak, Pasian’ deih bangin nuntakna, upna, itna, kipna, le lungnemna na neihzawh nadingin hanciam in." 
1Timothy6:12 Upna thu-ah hoihtakin nawksuak inla, mi tampi’ zakin na pulaksa, Pasian in nangmah a hong piak nuntak tawntungna lenkip in." 
1Timothy6:13 Na khempeuh tungah nuntakna a pia Pasian, le Pontias Pilat mai-ah hangtakin thu a gen ngam Khrih Jesuh’ mai-ah nang ka hong thupiakna in:" 
1Timothy6:14 I Topa Jesuh hong kilatkik Ni dongin paubaanna le mawhsakna om hetloin nang hong kipia thute na zui in. 
1Timothy6:15 Kumpite’ Kumpi, topate’ Topa, thupha ngahin amah bek a lianpen ahi Pasian in hun a sak khatpeuh ciangin Jesuh hong kilangsakkik ding hi." 
1Timothy6:16 Tua i Pasian bek mah a si thei lo hi a, khuavak pha mahmah sungah om ahih manin kuamah in a kiang neh thei lo hi. Kuamah in amah mu ngei lo a, zong mu thei lo hi. A tawntungin amah kipahtawi hen la, vanglian tawntung tahen. Amen." 
1Timothy6:17 Tuhuna a hau mite kisatheikha loin, a kip lo hauhnate muan le suanin neikha loin, eite in nuamtakin i zat theih dingin citna tawh a hong pia Pasian a muan a suan nadingun na hilh in." 
1Timothy6:18 A hoih nate semin, gamtat pha-in, citna lungsim nei-in midangte a hopnop nadingun na hilh in." 
1Timothy6:19 Tua hileh mai lamah amaute’ nuntak nading bulpi taktak ahi neihsate, amau a dingin a khol mite ahi ding uh hi." 
1Timothy6:20 Timoti aw, nang tungah a hong kipia thute hoihtakin na zui in. Mi pawlkhatte in, “Thu theihna,” ci-in a ngaihsutkhak uh, Pasian’ thu tawh a kituak lo, thu kihai selnate na pelh in." 
1Timothy6:21 Mi pawlkhatte in tua bang pilna a nei-in kingaihsun uh a, upna thu bulpi khahsuahna-in a nei uh hi. Note khempeuh tungah Pasian’ dikna thupha hong tung tahen." 
2Timothy1:1 Khrih Jesuh tawh i kipawlna hangin hong kipia ding nuntakna thu a gen dingin Pasian’ deihna tawh Khrih Jesuh’ sawltak nasep a sem dingin a hong kisawl keimah Paul in 
2Timothy1:2 Ka it ka ta Timoti tungah lai ka hong khak hi. Pa Pasian le i Topa Khrih Jesuh in dikna, hehpihna, le nopsakna thupha nang tungah hong tungsak tahen." 
2Timothy1:3 A sun a zanin ka thungetna-ah nang ka hong phawk tawntung a, ka pu ka pate’ sep mah bangin kisuanna lungsim om hetloin a na ka sep Pasian tungah ka lungdamna ka ko hi." 
2Timothy1:4 Na khitui luannate phawk ka hih manin ka lung a dam theih nadingin nang tawh kimu nuamin a sun a zanin ka ngaihsun tawntung hi. 
2Timothy1:5 Na pi Lois le na nu Eunis in a neih upna bangte pawl mah, lungsim takpi tawh na upna thu ka phawk a, tu-in zong nang sungah tua bang upna om hi, ci-in ka ngaihsun hi." 
2Timothy1:6 Tua ahih manin nang tungah ka khut nga-in thu ka hong ngetsak lai-in nangma tungah Pasian in hong piak siamna na sosuah nadingin ka hong phawksak hi. 
2Timothy1:7 Bang hang hiam cih leh Pasian in eite tungah meidawina lungsim hong guan lo a, thahatna, ki-itna, pumpi ki-ukzawhna lungsim hong guan hizaw hi." 
2Timothy1:8 Tua ahih manin i Topa’ thu gen nading thu-ah ahi a, ama thu hangin thong a kia keima thu-ah ahi zongin maizum het kei in. Pasian in nangma tungah thahatna hong pia ahih mah bangin Lungdamna Thu hangin thuakna-ah zong a thuaknuam hizaw in." 
2Timothy1:9 Eite’ sepzawhna hang hi loin ama ngimnasa bang leh a dikna hangin Pasian in eite hong honkhia-in ama mi dingin a hong sam hi. Pasian in leitung a pianma pekin Khrih Jesuh tungtawnin tua dikna a hong piak hi a," 
2Timothy1:10 tuhun ciangin eite hong Honpa Khrih Jesuh tungtawnin a dikna hong langsak ta hi. Tua Jesuh in sihna beisak a, lungdamna thu hangin sih nawn lohna thu a hong kilangsak hi." 
2Timothy1:11 Hih a thak Lungdamna Thu hilhin a taangko ding le sawltak na a sem dingin kei a hong kikoih ahi hi. 
2Timothy1:12 Tua ahih manin hih bangteng a thuak ka hi hi. Ahi zongin ka up pa ka thei a, ama tungah ka apte tua Ni dong hong kepsakzo ding hi, ci-in thei ka hih manin ka maizum het kei hi." 
2Timothy1:13 Keima tung panin na zaksa a man thute zui inla, Khrih Jesuh tawh i kipawlna hangin i ngah upna le itna thu-ah kiptakin om in." 
2Timothy1:14 Eite sungah a hong teng Kha Siangtho in a hong ap thuhoihte limtakin kem in. 
2Timothy1:15 Na theihsa bangin Asia gam sunga om mi khempeuh in kei hong nusia uh a, tuate lakah Figelas le Hermogenes-te zong kihel uh hi." 
2Timothy1:16 Onesiforas in tamveipi kei hong lungnuamsak ahih manin Pasian in a innkuan bupun hehpihna thupha pia tahen. Ka thongkiatna hangin amah maizum lo a," 
2Timothy1:17 Rom khua hong tun ciangin kei hong muh matengin hong zong pah hi. 
2Timothy1:18 Topa in tua Ni ciangin ama tungah hehpihna thupha pia tahen. Efesa khua-ah ka omlai-in nakpitakin kei a hong huhnate khempeuh na theihsa ahi hi. 
2Timothy2:1 Ka ta aw, nang na hih leh Khrih Jesuh tawh i kipawl manin i ngah hehpihna hangin thahatin om in." 
2Timothy2:2 Mi tampite’ theihin ka thuhilh, na zaksa thu khempeuh, midangte a hilhsawn thei dingin a citak mite tungah hoihtakin a zuih dingun na hilh in."
