2Timothy2:3 Khrih Jesuh’ galkap hoih hihna tawh thuak dingin a kisam khempeuh na na thuak in. 
2Timothy2:4 Galkap a semlai mipa in ama tungah a om bupa a lungkimsak theih nadingin na sem ahih manin tualsung mite’ nasep tawh thuahkhawm lo hi. 
2Timothy2:5 Kimawl kidemna-ah a kihel mi khatpeuh in kimawlna ngeina zui lopi-in gualzawh pahtawina ngah thei lo hi. 
2Timothy2:6 Hahkat takin lo a khopa in anlak hun ciangin a tampen a ngah dingin a kilawm ahi hi. 
2Timothy2:7 Topa in thu khempeuh na theih nadingin hong huh ding ahih manin hih ka thugente khempeuh limtakin na ngaihsun in. 
2Timothy2:8 Lungdamna Thu ka hilhna sungah ka gen mah bangin David’ suan, sihna panin a kithosak Jesuh Khrih na na phawk in." 
2Timothy2:9 Ama hangin a kingah Lungdamna Thu ka hilh manin gimna ka thuak a, mithat bangin sikkol hong kibulh hi. Pasian’ thu ahihleh sikkol kibulh thei lo hi." 
2Timothy2:10 Tua ahih manin Pasian’ teel mite in zong Khrih Jesuh hangin hotkhiatna le tawntung minthanna a ngahkhawm theih nadingun amaute’ hangin na khempeuh ka thuak hi. 
2Timothy2:11 Tua ahih manin, “Amah tawh i sihkhawm le amah tawh i nungta khawm ding hi." 
2Timothy2:12 Eite in gimna i thuak paisuakzawh leh amah tawh i ukkhawm ding hi. Amah i nial leh amah in zong eite hong nial ding hi. 
2Timothy2:13 Amah le amah kikhem thei lo ahih manin eite i citak kei zongin amah citak veve ding hi,” ci-in a kigenna thu man mahmah hi." 
2Timothy2:14 Na mite thu kinialin a kitot loh nadingun Pasian’ mai-ah thupi takin na hilhkhol in. Tua bang thu kinialna in a za mite phattuamna ngahsak loin a siasak bek ahi hi. 
2Timothy2:15 Pasian’ thuman a mantakin hilhin, na nasepna-ah maizumna thuak loin, Pasian’ pahtakna na ngahtheih nadingin na siam tawpin hanciam in." 
2Timothy2:16 Pasian tawh mite a kigamlasak semsem thei thu ginalo, a haihuai thu kikup thu kiselnate na pelh in." 
2Timothy2:17 Tua bangin amau’ thugennate in mite siasak a, tua banga thugente lakah Hymenaias le Filetas a kihel uh hi." 
2Timothy2:18 Thuman lampi panin amaute pialkhin uh a, thawhkikna thu pen a beisa thu hi ta hi, ci-in thu um mi pawlkhat lungmangsak uh hi." 
2Timothy2:19 Ahi zongin Pasian in a phuhsa sutpi kilokzo ngei lo ding hi. Tua sutpi tungah, “Topa in ama mi kua teng hiam cih thei hi,” cihna le, “Topa tawh kipawl ing, a ci peuhmah in mawhna sukhalo ding hi,” cihna kigelh hi." 
2Timothy2:20 Inn lian khat peuhpeuh sungah umlebeel a nam tuamtuam a om hi. Pawlkhatte ngun tawh kibawl a, pawlkhatte kham tawh kibawl a, pawlkhatte sing tawh, pawlkhatte tungman tawh kibawl hi. Pawlkhatte a thupi diakin zattheih ding, pawlkhatte nisimin a mawkmawkin zattheih ding ahi hi." 
2Timothy2:21 Mi khatpeuh a hoih lo na khempeuh panin kikemin a siangtho takin a om nakleh na hoih nam khempeuh a sem dingin a Topa tungah ki-apin, a Topa tungah a manpha suak ahih manin a thupi diakte-ah amah kizang ding hi." 
2Timothy2:22 Tua ahih manin khangno lunggulhna hoih lote pelh inla, lungsim takpi tawh Topa tungah huhna a ngen mite tawh thuman thutak, upna, itna, kilemna na neihtheih nadingun hanciam khawm un." 
2Timothy2:23 Thu kihai seelna, thei lo pi-a thu kinialnate na pelh in. Tua bangte in kitotna a piansak lamtak na theihsa ahi hi." 
2Timothy2:24 Topa’ na a sem mite, kitot a hatte hi lo ding a, mi khempeuh tungah lungsim nemin, thugen siamin, thuakzawhna nei-in," 
2Timothy2:25 thunem tawh a langte’ hoih lohna a puahtheite hi ding hi. Tua bang hileh Pasian in amaute kisiksak thei ding a, thuman thutak hong thei-in," 
2Timothy2:26 Dawimangpa in ama deihna bangin a gamta dingin a mat khit hangin ama thang panin amaute suakta khathei ding uh hi. 
2Timothy3:1 Nitawp ni hun pen a lauhuai hun ahih ding lamtak phawk in. 
2Timothy3:2 Tuahun ciangin mite in amau angsung ding bek ngaihsunin, huaihamin, kisialin, kihisakin, mi zahko-in, nu le pate’ thu mang loin, lungdam theihna mel nei loin, biakna lungsim nei loin," 
2Timothy3:3 mi khual loin, hehpihna nei loin, mi gensia-in, ngongtatin, kihtakhuai-in, thuhoih deih loin," 
2Timothy3:4 ciampelin, thu khual loin, kiphasak gawpin, Pasian don loin pumpi nopsakna bek deihin," 
2Timothy3:5 biakna thu a puathamteng zui napi-in biakna hangin vangliatna thu a omte deih lo ding uh hi. Tua bangin a gamta mite na pelh in. 
2Timothy3:6 Tua bang mite pawlkhat, mite inn-ah va hawh khiankhianin, deihna nam tuamtuam le mawhna lungsim tawh a kidim numeite na thuzawh uh hi." 
2Timothy3:7 Tua bang numeite in thu a zakzak uh hangin a man le a man lo khen thei lo uh ahih manin thuman thutak thei zo lo uh hi. 
2Timothy3:8 Jannes le Jambres-te in Moses thu a nial mah bangin upna paizia a man lo hih thuhilh mite in zong thuman thutak a nial uh hi. 
2Timothy3:9 Ahi zongin Jannes le Jambres-te tungah a piangsa thu mah bangin mi khempeuh in amaute’ haina mu ding uh ahih manin a nasepna uh sau tung khollo ding hi. 
2Timothy3:10 Ahi zongin nangmah in ahihleh ka thuhilhna, ka gamtatna, le ka nuntakna-ah ka ngim ka tup thute na hong zui hi. Ka upna, ka lungduaina, itna ka neihna, ka lungkipna," 
2Timothy3:11 bawlsiatna ka thuakna, gimna ka thuakna, le Antiok, Ikonium, le Lystra khuate-ah kei tunga thupiang, nasia takin bawlsiatna ka thuaknate na theih na phawksa ahi hi. Ahi zongin Topa in hih haksatnate khempeuh panin kei hong suaktasak hi." 
2Timothy3:12 Khrih Jesuh tawh kipawlin Pasian’ deihna bangin a nungta nuam khempeuh in bawlsiatna a thuak ding mah hi a," 
2Timothy3:13 migilote le thuthei kineihin mi khem theite zong siattat semsemin, amaute in mi khemkhemin, amaute mah in zong khemna a thuak ding mah uh ahi hi." 
2Timothy3:14 Ahi zongin nang na hih leh na theihsa na upsa thute ah kip paisuak in. Nang tungah thu hong hilhte kua mi ahi hiam cih na theihsa hi a," 
2Timothy3:15 Khrih Jesuh upna hangin hotkhiatna a hong ngahsak thei ding pilna a hong pia Lai Siangtho pen na neutung a kipanin a theisa na hihna thu zong na theihsa thu mah ahi hi. 
2Timothy3:16 Pasian’ na a sem mite mi cingtaak hi-in, na hoih namkim a septheih nadingun Lai Siangtho pen Pasian’ lamlahna tawh a hong kipia hi a, thuman thutak hilh nading, a khialte taii nading, a man lote a manin puah nading, a manin nuntak theih nading thuhilh nadingin a manpha mahmah ahi hi." 
2Timothy3:17  
2Timothy4:1 Pasian’ mai, le a hingte hitaleh a site hitaleh mi khempeuh’ thu a khen ding Khrih Jesuh’ mai-ah nakpitakin ka hong hanthawn hi. Amah Kumpi-in hong paikikin ukna hong kipan ding ahih manin," 
2Timothy4:2 hunhoih hunsia cih khen tuan loin Pasian’ thu hilh ding na kin ngaihsut nading, lungduaina tawh mite’ lungsim zo-in, mite taii-in, hanthawnin na hilh nadingin thu a hong pia ka hi hi." 
2Timothy4:3 Mite in thuman a ngaih nop loh hun, amaute’ deihna bek a zuihnop hun, amaute’ zaknop thute bek a gen ding sia a cial thuahthuah hun hong tung ding hi." 
2Timothy4:4 Amaute in thuman thutak ngainuam nawn loin tangthu phuahtawm peuh ngaihsutpi-in nei ding uh hi. 
2Timothy4:5 Ahi zongin nang na hih leh thu khempeuhah na lungsim ki-ukin haksatnate na thuak inla, Pasian’ thugen nasep semin, na nasepna-ah maa na tun in." 
2Timothy4:6 Kei ka hih leh Pasian biakna-in hong kipiak ding hun hong tungta hi. Hih leitung nuntakna ka nusiat ding hun hita hi. 
2Timothy4:7 Kidemna-ah ka hat tawpin ka hih khin a, a mong dongin ka tai khin a, upna thu khotakin lenin ka zokhin hi." 
2Timothy4:8 Thu a manin a khen Topa in tua Ni ciangin kei a hong piak ding thuman lukhu ahi gualzawhna thaman in tu-in kei hong ngak gige hi. Kei tung bekah a hong pia ding hi lo a, ama hong paikik ding itna tawh a ngakte khempeuh tungah zong a pia ding ahi hi." 
2Timothy4:9 Kei kiangah na hong pai baih theih nadingin hong hanciam in. 
2Timothy4:10 Demas in hih leitung thu kinzaw ahih manin kei hong nusia-in Thesalonika khua-ah a pai hi. Kresen, Galatia gamah pai a, Titus, Dalmatia gamah pai hi." 
2Timothy4:10 Demas in hih leitung thu kinzaw ahih manin kei hong nusia-in Thesalonika khua-ah a pai hi. Kresen, Galatia gamah pai a, Titus, Dalmatia gamah pai hi." 
2Timothy4:11 Luka bek kei kiangah om hi. Marka in nasepna-ah nakpitakin hong huhthei ahih manin na hong pai ciangin amah hong tonpih in. 
2Timothy4:11 Luka bek kei kiangah om hi. Marka in nasepna-ah nakpitakin hong huhthei ahih manin na hong pai ciangin amah hong tonpih in. 
2Timothy4:12 Tikhikas ahihleh Efesa khua-ah ka paisak khin hi. 
2Timothy4:13 Na hong pai ciangin Troas khua-ah Karpas kianga ka nusiat ka puantualpi hong pua inla, laibute zong, a diakdiakin savun laidalte tawh zong hong pua in." 
2Timothy4:14 Sikseekpa Alexander in kei tungah siatna lianpi hong bawl hi. Ama gamtatna tawh kizui-in Topa in thuk ding hi. 
2Timothy4:15 Amah in i thuhilhna nakpitakin nial ahih manin amah tawh kisai-ah nangma pumpi kidawm mahmah in. 
2Timothy4:16 Keimah kihut nading thu ka gen masak ni-in kuamah in hong koppih loin hong taisanmang uh hi. Tua thu hangin mawhsakna thuak kei beek uh hen! 
2Timothy4:17 Ahi zongin Topa in kei hong ompih a, Gentail mi khempeuh tungah Pasian’ thu a kicingin ka gentheih nadingin thahatna a hong pia hi. Tua ahih manin sih nading thukhenna pan hong suaktasak hi." 
2Timothy4:18 Topa in siatna khempeuh panin kei hong honkhia ding a, ama vantung gamah muanhuai takin hong tunpih ding hi. Amah in a tawntungin minthanna ngah tahen. Amen." 
2Timothy4:19 Prisilla, Aquila, le Onesiforas-te innkuan na hopihsak in." 
2Timothy4:20 Erastas, Korin khua-ah omlai hi. Trofimas, Miletas khua-ah a cina-in ka nusia hi." 
2Timothy4:21 Phalbi tunma-in nong pai theih nadingin hong hanciam in. Eubulas, Pudens, Linas, Klaudias, le i sanggam dangte khempeuh in zong hong hopih uh hi." 
2Timothy4:22 Topa in nangmah hong ompih tahen. Note khempeuh tungah Pasian’ hehpihna thupha hong tung tahen. 
Titus1:1 Pasian’ sila, le Jesuh Khrih’ sawltak ahi keimah Paul in, Thuzuau a gen ngei lo Pasian in tangtawng pekin thu hong ciamin, a hunhoih a tun ciangin thuhilhna tawh a hong kilatsak nuntak tawntungna thu lametna tawh, Pasian’ teel mite’ upna le thuman thutak a theihna uhah biakna thu tawh kituakin a khan semsem nading thu a hilh dingin eite hong Hon Pasian’ thupiakna tawh nasep hong kipia ahih manin," 
Titus1:2  
Titus1:3  
Titus1:4 Thu upna-ah ka ta taktak ahi Titus tungah lai ka hong khak hi. Pa Pasian le eite hong Hon Khrih Jesuh in nangma tungah hehpihna le nopsakna thupha hong tungsak tahen. 
Titus1:5 Krete Tuikulh gam sung tengah a manin puahphat ding a kisam lai a omte a sem ding le khua simah pawlpi upa a koih dingin tua gamah a hong nusia ka hi hi. Nang tungah ka hong gensa thute hoihtakin na phawk in: 
Titus1:6 Upate pen paubaanna a om lote hi ding a, zi khat bek nei-in, a tate zong thu um mi hi-in, a thumang lo, a phengtat gawpte hi lo ding uh hi." 
Titus1:7 Pawlpi siate pen Pasian’ nasem ahih manin paubaanna a om lo, a kiphasak lo, zukham thei mi ahi lo, a ngongtat lo, a huaiham lo," 
Titus1:8 zinleleeng do a siam mi, thuhoih a deih mi, a pumpi a ki-ukzo mi, a thutang mi, a siangtho mi, le a kisekzo mi hi ding uh hi." 
Titus1:9 Upna bulpi tawh a kituak thute limtakin lenkip ding uh hi. Tua hileh thuhilhna man tawh midangte hanthawn thei ding uh a, thuman a nial mite’ khialhna zong laktel thei ding uh hi." 
Titus1:10 Bang hang hiam cih leh thu a mang lo, thu a mawk gengen, mi a khem thei, a diakdiakin Jew ngeina bangin vun-at nading thu a gen tampi tak a om uh hi." 
Titus1:11 Sum ngahtheih nading bekin a kilawm lopi-in thu hilhin biakna innkuan buppi nawngkaisak uh ahih manin thu a gen nawn loh nadingun khaktan ding ahi hi. 
Titus1:12 Amau Krete gam mite sung panin a kamsang uh khat in, “Krete gam mite a zuauthei tawntung, ganhing bangin a gilo, a thadah a uisan mi ahi uh hi,” na ci hi." 
Titus1:13 Hih ama thugen a man mahmah ahi hi. Tua ahih manin thu upna man nei thei-in," 
Titus1:14 Jew mite’ tangthu phuahtawmte ahi a, thuman a nial mite’ thupiaknate ahi zongin a don nawn loh nadingun khauhtakin taii-in na thuhilh in." 
Titus1:15 Lungsim siangthote a dingin na khempeuh a siang hi a, ahi zongin thu um lote a lungsim ngaihsutnate uh siakhin ahih manin amaute a dingin a siang bangmah om lo hi." 
Titus1:16 Pasian a thei-in a kigen uh hangin a gamtatnate uh tawh kilehbulh hi. Amaute a muhthadahhuai, a thumang lo, na hoih sem dingin a kilawmna a om lo mite ahi uh hi." 
Titus2:1 Ahi zongin nangmah in upna man tawh a kituak thu na hilh in. 
Titus2:2 Pasal khanghamte a kilawm a kituakin a omtheih nading, thu ngaihsun thei mi ahih nading, a kikemzo mite ahih theih nading, upna man a neihtheih nading, itna man a neihtheih nading uh le a manin lungkipin a thuakzawh nadingun na gen in." 
Titus2:3 Tua mah bangin mite in Pasian’ thu a gensiatkhak loh nadingun numei khanghamte zong a gamtat a khuahek uh a zahtakhuai ahih nading, mi gensiate ahih loh nading, zunek kiphamawhte ahih loh nading, thuhoih thupha hilhin," 
Titus2:4 amaute sangin a nauzaw nupite in a pasalte uh le a tate uh a it nadingun a hilh ding," 
Titus2:5 thu ngaihsun thei, a gamtat siangtho, inn nasep a kizen, a migi, le a pasalte uh thu a mang thei mi ahih nadingun na gen in." 
Titus2:6 Tua mah bangin khangnote zong amau pumpi a ki-ukzawh nadingun na hanthawn pha in. 
Titus2:7 Nangma pumpi mahmah gamtat hoihna a kipan thu khempeuhah etteh hoih dingin na om in. Lungsim takpi tawh mite’ zahtaktheih dingin thu na hilh inla," 
Titus2:8 mite’ mawhmat theih loh ding kamhoihte na zang in. Tua hileh i langte in hong gensiat theih nading mu loin a mai uh zum lel ding hi. 
Titus2:9 Silate in zong a tote uh thu mangin, thu khempeuhah a tote uh a lungkimsak nading, a tote uh thu seelloin," 
Titus2:10 a guktak loh nading, a tawntungin hoih gamtatin a cihtakna uh a kilatsak nadingun na hanthawn in. Tua hileh eite hong Hon Pasian’ thu a hoihna a kilangsakte ahi ding uh ahi hi." 
Titus2:11 Bang hang hiam cih leh mi khempeuh in hotkhiatna a ngahtheih nadingun Pasian in ama hehpihna hong lak khinzo hi. 
Titus2:12 Eite in i lamet, a lian Pasian le eite hong Hon Jesuh Khrih a vangliatna hong kilatkik ding hun ngakin i om laitakin i biakna tawh a kituak lo thute le leitung nate deihna phiatin, lungsim hi hithiatin omin, thutangin, hih leitungah Pasian’ deihna bangin i nuntak nadingin tua hehpihna thu in eite hong hilh hi." 
Titus2:13  
Titus2:14 I mawhna khempeuh panin hong honkhia ding le ama neihtuam i suahtheih nadingin Jesuh amahmah hong kipumpiak a, eite pen gamtat hoih gamtat ding a lawp mahmah ihi hi." 
Titus2:15 Hih ka hong thugente hilh inla, mite taii-in na hanthot ciangin na aana neihteng khempeuh zang kawm in. Mite’ simmawhin om kei in." 
Titus3:1 Na mite in hong uk kumpite le aana neite’ thu mangin, thuhoih khempeuh a sem dingin a kigingsa-in a om ding uh phawksak inla," 
Titus3:2 kuamah gensia loin, mite tawh kilemin kikhawl thei-in, lungsim nemin, mi khempeuh tungah a dik nading uh na gen in." 
Titus3:3 Bang hang hiam cih leh eite zong nidangin haitatin, thumang loin, vakvai-in, duhna deihna a tuamtuamte thuaklahin, thusia le enna lungsim tawh a gamtate, mite in hong mudahin, eite khatlekhat zong a kimudah ngeite ihi hi." 
Titus3:4 Ahi zongin eite hong Honpa ahi Pasian’ itna le a migitna thu hong kilat ciangin," 
Titus3:5 amah in eite hong honkhia hi. Eite in na hoih i sepzawhna hangin hong honkhia hi loin eite tungah suahtakna le nuntakna thak a hong pia Kha Siangtho in hong sawpsiangna hangin a hong hehpihna tawh a hong honkhia ahi hi. 
Titus3:6 Pasian in eite hong Hon Jesuh Khrih hangin eite tungah a kicing takin Kha Siangtho hong pia ahih manin," 
Titus3:7 ama hong hehpihna hangin Pasian tawh kilemin i lamet nuntak tawntungna a ngah thei ihi hi. 
Titus3:8 Hih ka thugente a man mahmah ahi hi. Tua ahih manin Pasian’ thu a um mite in gamtat hoih a neihtheihna dingun hih ka hong thugente na lim ngaihsut ding ka deih hi. Ka hong thugente a hoih hi a, mite a dingin a manpha vive ahi hi." 
Titus3:9 Ahi zongin a haihuai thu kiselna, min kigual deudau khangsimna, kitotna, thukham kitotlawhna cihte na pelh in. Tuate a kimanna a om lo, a mawkna thu hi lel hi." 
Titus3:10 Kitot, kikhen nading a piangsak mite pen khatvei nihvei bang na hilh khit ciangin kisukha nawn vet kei in." 
Titus3:11 Tua bang mite a kisiakhin hi a, a mawhna un a khialhna uh a kilangsak ahihna thu na thei in." 
Titus3:12 Artemas ahi a, Tikhikas ahi zongin khat peuhpeuh nang kiangah ka hong paisak ciangin, Nikopolis khua-ah phalbi sung omsawm ka hih manin, kei omna tua khua-ah nong paitheih nadingin hong hanciam in." 
Titus3:13 Sitni Zenas le Apollos-te a khualzinna uh manlang takin a paisuak theih nadingun na hihtheih bangin na huh inla, lamkalah kisapna bangmah a neihkhak loh nading uh zong na thei in." 
Titus3:14 I mite ommawk loin, thu kisam a phamawhte huh thei-in, na hoih na phate a septheih nadingun na hilh in." 
Titus3:15 Kei tawh a om mi khempeuh in nang hong hopih uh hi. Thu upna sungah ei hong itte khempeuh na na hopihsak in. Note khempeuh tungah Pasian’ hehpihna thupha hong tung tahen. 
Philemon1:1 Khrih Jesuh hangin thong a kia keimah Paul le i sanggampa Timoti in, Ka hong it uh, ka naseppih uh ahi Filemon," 
Philemon1:2 le na inn-ah a hong kikhawm pawlpite le i sanggamnu Apfia le thu upna-ah galkap khawmpih Arkhippas-te tungah lai ka hong khak uh hi. 
Philemon1:3 I Pa Pasian le Topa Jesuh Khrih in note tungah dikna le nopsakna thupha hong tungsak tahen. 
Philemon1:4 Pasian’ mite khempeuh na itna thu le Topa Jesuh na upna thu na zakhin ka hih manin Pasian kiangah thu ka nget simin nangmah hong phawkin Pasian tungah lungdamna thu ka ko tawntung hi. 
Philemon1:5  
Philemon1:6 Thu umte ihihna hangin Khristian sungah eite i kikholh manin, Khrih hangin i nuntakna sungah i ngah thupha a hoih khempeuh na theihna a kicin semsem nadingin thu ka ngen hi." 
Philemon1:7 Sanggam aw, nangma hangin Pasian’ mite in lungnopna ngah uh ahih manin tua bang itna na neihna hangin ka lungdamin ka tha a nuam mahmah hi." 
Philemon1:8 Tua ahih manin Khrih hangin unau khat ihihna tawh hih dingin a kilawm bangin na gamtat nadingin thu ka hong gen ngam hi. 
Philemon1:9 Hih bangin ka hong genna pen itna i neihna hang ahi hi. Tu lai takin Khrih taangmi ahi keimah Paul zong, Khrih Jesuh hangin thongkia-in a om ka hi hi." 
Philemon1:10 Tua ahih manin Khrih hangin ka ta ahi Onesimas a dingin ka hong thumsak hi. Thong sungah ka om sungun kha thu tawh kisai-ah ama pa ka suak hi. 
Philemon1:11 Nidangin nang a dingin amah a kimanna bangmah om lo a, ahi zongin tu-in ei tegel a dingin mi manpha mahmah ahi hi." 
Philemon1:12 Keima pumpi zahin ngaihsutna tawh nang kiangah amah ka hong puakkik hi. 
Philemon1:13 Lungdamna Thu hangin thongkia-in ka om sungin nangma tangin kei a hong huh dingin ka kiangah ka omsak nuam hi. 
Philemon1:14 Ahi zongin nangma nasep hoihna pen keima hong kalh hi loin nangma uttawmna tawh na sep a suahtheih nadingin nangma lungkimna om masa lopi-in bangmah ka hih nuam kei hi. 
Philemon1:15 A tawntungin nang kiangah amah hong om paisuak theih nadingin tawlkhat sung nang kiang panin Onesimas a paikhia zong hi khathei ding hi. 
Philemon1:16 Tu-in amah sal bek hi nawn loin sal sangin a thupizaw, Khrih hangin i sanggam hong hita hi. Kei a dingin amah a manphat mah bangin sal hihna le Topa thu sungah sanggam hihna tawh nang a dingin zong hong manphazaw kan ding hi." 
Philemon1:17 Tua ahih manin nasepna-ah pawlkhat taktakin kei na hong ngaihsut nakleh kei na hong limbawl ding zahin amah na limbawl in. 
Philemon1:18 Nang tungah hong khialh a, leiba thangba hong neih leh zong keima khialh, keima batin na seh in." 
Philemon1:19 Keimah Paul in ka hong loh ding hi, cihna thu keima khut mahmah tawh a lai ka gelh ahi hi. Nangma nuntakna bulpi mahmah zong keima hang ahihna thu gen kullo hi." 
Philemon1:20 Tua ahih manin sanggam aw, Topa’ hangin hih ka hong thumna hong pia in. Khrih sungah unau khat ihih manin ka lungsim hong nuamsak in." 
Philemon1:21 Ka hong genna sangin a hoihzaw a phazaw-in na gamta ding, ci-in muan mahmahna tawh hih lai a hong gelh ka hi hi." 
Philemon1:22 Tua banah, Pasian in note khempeuh’ thungetna hong pia-in, note kiangah kei hong paikik thei dingin kilamen ka hih manin ka om nading inndei zong a baihsa-in na bawl un." 
Philemon1:23 Khrih Jesuh hangin thong ka kiatpih Epafras a kipan," 
Philemon1:24 ka naseppih Marka, Aristarkhas, Demas, le Luka-te in hong hopih uh hi." 
Philemon1:24 ka naseppih Marka, Aristarkhas, Demas, le Luka-te in hong hopih uh hi." 
Philemon1:25 Topa Jesuh Khrih hehpihna thupha, note tungah hong tung tahen." 
Hebrews1:1 A beisa hunah Pasian in kamsangte zangin i pupite tungah a lam tuamtuam tawh a khen khenin thu na gen ngeizo hi. 
Hebrews1:2 Ahi zongin tuhun nunung ciangin leitung vantung na khempeuh a bawlin a zat, a tawpna-ah na khempeuh a luah dingin a seh a Tapa zangin eite tungah thu hong gen hi." 
Hebrews1:3 Tua Tapa in Pasian’ minthanna vang hong taangkhiasak a, Pasian’ lim taktak mah hong pua-in, ama kampauna tawh leitung vantung buppi pai-in a kip hi. Mihingte a mawhna panun a siansak khit ciangin Vanglian pipa Pasian’ taklam, vantungah a tu hi." 
Hebrews1:4 Vantung mite’ ngah minthanna sangin Tapa tungah Pasian in a piak min a liatzawk mah bangin vantung mite sangin Tapa lianzaw thampek hi. 
Hebrews1:5 Bang hang hiam cih leh Pasian in vantungmi khat peuhpeuh tungah, “Ka Tapa na hi hi. Tu ni-in na Pa ka suak hi,” ci ngei lo hi. Tua mah bangin, “Kei, ama Pa ka hi ding a, amah, ka Tapa ahi ding hi,” ci-in zong kam pau ngei lo hi." 
Hebrews1:6 Tua banah, Pasian in leitungah a Tapa neihsun hong paisak ding ciangin, “Pasian’ vantungmi khempeuh in amah bia ding uh hi,” na ci hi." 
Hebrews1:7 Ahi zongin vantung mite’ thu a gen ciangin, “Pasian in a vantung mite huih bangin bawl a, a nasemte meikuang bangin bawl hi,” na ci hi." 
Hebrews1:8 Ahi zongin Tapa’ thu a gen ciangin Pasian in, “Pasian aw, na kumpi tokhom khang tawntungin kip ding a, thuman thutang tawh na gam sung na uk ding hi." 
Hebrews1:9 Thuman na deih a, khialhna na mudah hi. Tua ahih manin nangma Pasian in nangmah hong teelin, na lawmte tungah a piak sangin a lianzaw, a lungdamhuai pahtawina nang hong pia hi,” a ci hi." 
Hebrews1:10 Tua banah, “Topa ahi nangmah in a kipat cil-in leitung na piangsak a, na khut tawh vantungte na bawl hi." 
Hebrews1:11 Tua nate khempeuh mangthang ding a, nang na hih leh na om paisuak ding hi. Tua nate puan bangin luisuak thei ding a," 
Hebrews1:12 puan khep bangin na khep ding a, tua nate khempeuh kikhelkhel ding uh hi. Ahi zongin nang na kibang tawntung ding a, teek hun cih na nei ngei kei ding hi,” na ci lai hi." 
Hebrews1:13 Ahi zongin Pasian in ama vantung mite kiangah, “Na galte na khenuai-ah ka hong sikcipsak matengin ka taklamah hong tu in,” ci ngei lo hi." 
Hebrews1:14 Vantung mite pen Pasian’ na a sem, a kimu thei lo khate hi uh a, hotkhiatna a ngah ding mite a huh dingin Pasian in a hong sawl ahi hi." 
Hebrews2:1 Tua ahih manin i zaksa thuman thutakte i khahsuahkhak loh nadingin kiptak khotakin i letkip ding kisam hi. 
Hebrews2:2 Vantung mite in hong gen thute thuman hi a, tua thu a palsatte in a kilawm bangin gim thuak ding uh hi." 
Hebrews2:3 Tua ahih manin a thupi mahmah hih hotkhiatna thudon loin i om leh suahtakna om thei ngei lo ding hi. A masa-in Topa mahmah in hotkhiatna thu hong pulak a, tua thu a za mite in thuman ahihna thu eite tungah hong gen leuleu uh hi." 
Hebrews2:4 Amaute’ thugenna banah Pasian in vangliatna lim, le nalamdang a tuamtuamte bawlna tawh hong genbeh lai hi. Tua banah ama hoihsak bangin Pasian in Kha Siangtho zong hong hawm lai hi." 
Hebrews2:5 Eite in genbelin i neih a hong tung ding leitung pen Pasian in vantung mite’ khut sungah koih lo hi. 
Hebrews2:6 Lai Siangtho mun khatah a kigenna-ah, “Pasian aw, nangma ngaihsut tham dingin mi pen bang hi a, na phawk tham dingin mihing’ ta bang hi lel ahi hiam?" 
Hebrews2:7 Ahi zongin vantung mite sangin a neuzaw deuhin na bawl a, minthanna le pahtawina na guan a," 
Hebrews2:8 na khempeuh na uk sak hi,” na ci hi. “Pasian in na khempeuh a uk dingin bawl,” a cih ciangin na khempeuh a huamkhin hita hi. Mihing in na khempeuh a uklam i thei nai kei hi." 
Hebrews2:9 Ahi zongin Pasian’ hehpihna hangin mi khempeuh a dingin Jesuh a sih theih nadingin tawlkhat sung vantung mite sangin a neuzaw-in a kibawlna i mu a, sihna a thuakna hangin minthanna le pahtawina a ngahna thu i thei hi." 
Hebrews2:10 Na khempeuh ama a dingin a piangsak Pasian in tate tampi minthanna a ngahsak theih nadingin a thuakna tawh hotkhiatna thu-ah a makai dingin Jesuh a bawl ding a kilawm mah ahi hi. 
Hebrews2:11 Mawhna panin mite a siangthosakpa le sianthosakna a ngah mite in, Pa, a kibang a neikhawm uh hi. Tua hi a, Jesuh in mite, “Sanggam,” a cih ding zum ngaihsut lo ahih manin," 
Hebrews2:12 “Pasian aw, ka sanggamte kiangah nangma thu ka gen ding a, mi khempeuh mai-ah nangmah ka hong phat ding hi,” na ci a," 
Hebrews2:13 tua ciangin, “Pasian muanin ka nei ding hi,” na ci kik a, tua ciangin, “Pasian in hong piak ta dangte tawh hih lai-ah ka om hi,” na ci leuleu hi." 
Hebrews2:14 Tate a cih mite pen leitung cilesa a nei mite ahih manin, ama sihna hangin sihna a uk Dawimangpa a sukgawp theih nadingin Jesuh in mihing pianzia mah hong nei phot hi." 
Hebrews2:15 Tua ahih manin sihna a kihtak manin sal bangin a om mite amah in hong suaktasak hi. 
Hebrews2:16 Ama lunghihmawh pen vantung mite hi lo a, Abraham’ suanlekhakte a lunghimawh ahihna thu hong kitel hi." 
Hebrews2:17 Tua ahih manin mihingte’ mawhna a kimaisak theih nadingin Pasian’ na a sepna-ah mite a dingin hehpihna le cihtakna tawh Siampi Lianpen a suahtheih nadingin a sanggamte tawh a kibangin mihing lim a hong puak ding a kisam ahi hi. 
Hebrews2:18 Ama pumpi mahmah in ze-etna le gimna thuak ahih manin tuhun ciangin tua bang a thuakte a hong huhthei hi. 
Hebrews3:1 Tua ahih manin Pasian’ sapna a ngah mi siangthote aw, eite’ upna thu tawh kisai-ah Siampi Lianpen a sem dingin Pasian’ sawltak Jesuh’ thu ngaihsun dih un." 
Hebrews3:2 Pasian’ inn sungah na a sepna-ah Moses a cihtak mah bangin hih siampi nasep a sem dingin a seh Pasian’ tungah Jesuh a citak hi. 
Hebrews3:3 Ahi zongin inn a lam pa pen a inn sangin a minthanzawk mah bangin Moses sangin Jesuh pahtawizawk ding ahi hi. 
Hebrews3:4 Inn khempeuh a lam na om ciat sam a, ahi zongin na khempeuh a piangsak pa pen Pasian ahi hi." 
Hebrews3:5 Moses pen nasem khat hihna tawh Pasian’ inn sungah thu khempeuhah citak a, mailam hunah Pasian in a gen ding thute a gen hi." 
Hebrews3:6 Ahi zongin Khrih pen Pasian’ innsung a uk Tapa ahihna tawh a citak ahi hi. I lametna thu tawh kisai-in lungsim hanna le muanna tawh i omsuak nakleh eite pen Pasian’ inn ihi hi. 
Hebrews3:7 Tua ahih ciangin Lai Siangtho sungah, “Tu ni-in Pasian’ aw na zak uhleh" 
Hebrews3:8 gamlakah na om lai-un amah ze-etin, Pasian na lehdo lai hun uh bangin na lungsim uh khauhsak nawn kei un." 
Hebrews3:9 Na pu na pate un kum sawmli sung ka nasepnate mu napi-in kei hong ze-et veve uh hi. 
Hebrews3:10 Tua ahih manin amaute tungah ka heh a, ‘Amaute citak lo niloh uh a, ka thukhamte zui nuam lo uh hi,’ ka ci hi." 
Hebrews3:11 Ka heh manin ka kiciam a, ‘Ka tawlngakna munah hong pai-in kei tawh hong tawlnga khawm ngei lo ding uh hi,’ ka ci hi,” na ci hi." 
Hebrews3:12 Sanggamte aw, a nungta Pasian kiang panin a paikhia zah dingin thu um lo, a gilo na omkhak loh nadingun na kingaihsun un." 
Hebrews3:13 Lai Siangtho in, “Tu ni,” a cih pen eite tungah zong hong cihna hi lai ahih manin mawhna’ khemsa-in ta-in na lungsim uh na khauhsakkhak loh nadingun khatlekhat kihanthawnin na kihuhzaw un." 
Hebrews3:14 A kipat tungin i neih lungmuanna kiptakin i let ciat nakleh i vekpi-in Khrih tawh pawlkhat ihi hi. 
Hebrews3:15 Lai Siangtho in, “Tuni-in Pasian’ aw na zak uhleh Pasian na lehdo lai uh hun bangin na lungsim uh khauhsak nawn kei un,” na ci hi." 
Hebrews3:16 Pasian’ aw za napi-in amah a lehdo kuate ahi hiam? Moses in Egypt gam panin a paikhiatpih mi khempeuh ahi uh hi. 
Hebrews3:17 Kum sawmli sung kuate tungah Pasian heh ahi hiam? Mawhna bawlin, gamlakah a si mite tung ahi hi." 
Hebrews3:18 Thupi takin Pasian kiciamin, “Ka tawlngakna munah hong pai-in, kei tawh tawlnga ngei lo ding uh hi,” a cih ciangin kuate a cih nopna ahi hiam? Amah a lehdote a cihna ahi hi." 
Hebrews3:19 Tua ahih manin a up lohna uh hangin tawlngakna munah a lutzawh lohna uh i thei hi. 
Hebrews4:1 Ahi zongin tu-in eite va pai-in amah tawh i tawlngak khawm theih nadingin Pasian in thuciam hong nusiat khin ahih manin tua tawlngakna munah a lutlah na suahkhak loh nadingun lau-in kidawm ni. 
Hebrews4:2 Bang hang hiam cih leh amaute in Lungdamna Thu a zak uh mah bangin eite in zong i za hi. Amaute in Lungdamna Thu a zak uh ciangin upna tawh na sang lo uh ahih manin a thuzak uh amaute a dingin a phattuamna om lo hi. 
Hebrews4:3 Ahi zongin eite ihih leh amah in, “Ka heh manin ka kiciam a, ‘Hih leitangah hong lut lo ding uh a, ka tawlngakna munah hong pai-in kei tawh hong tawlnga khawm ngei lo ding uh hi,’ a cihte bang hi loin ei thu umte pen Pasian tawh a tawlnga khawm ihi hi. Leitung a piansak cil pek a kipanin a nasep a mankhin hinapi-in tu-a bangin thu gen veve lai hi." 
Hebrews4:4 Lai Siangtho mun khatah, “A ni sagih ni-in a nasepna khempeuh panin Pasian tawlnga hi,” ci-in ni sagihna thu tawh kisai na gen hi." 
Hebrews4:5 Hih thu mah na kigenkik a, “Ka tawlngakna munah hong pai-in kei tawh hong tawlnga ngei lo ding uh hi,” na ci kik hi." 
Hebrews4:6 Lungdamna Thu a za masate in um lo uh ahih manin Pasian tawh va tawlnga khawm thei lo uh hi. Tua ahih manin va pai-in Pasian tawh a tawlnga khawm ding mi pawlkhat omlai hi. 
Hebrews4:7 “Tuni,” cihna kammal na omlai ahih manin Pasian in nidang khat seh lai ahihna thu hong kilang hi. Lai Siangtho sungah, “Tuni-in Pasian’ aw na zak uhleh na lungsim uh khauhsak nawn kei un,” a cihna mun i mat khitsa mah bangin tuazawh kum tampi khit ciangin David tungtawnin thu hong genkik hi." 
Hebrews4:8 Joshua in Pasian’ tawlngakna munah mite tunpih khin hileh Pasian in a nidang khat thu nunggen nawn lo ding hi. 
Hebrews4:9 Tua ahih manin tu-a thu om zia-ah ci lehang ni sagih ni-in Pasian a tawlngak mah bangin Pasian’ mite a tawlngak nading omlai hi. 
Hebrews4:10 Bang hang hiam cih leh a nasepna panin Pasian a tawlngak mah bangin va pai-in Pasian tawh a tawlngate khempeuh zong a nasepna panun khawl ding uh hi. 
Hebrews4:11 Tua ahih manin amaute in a uploh manun Pasian’ tawlngakna munah a lut zawh loh uh bang hi loin va pai-in Pasian tawh i tawlngak khawm theih nadingin hanciam ciat ni. 
Hebrews4:12 Pasian’ thu nungta-in a gamtang hi a, langnih a hiam namsau sangin hiamzaw lai hi. Kha le lungsim, guh le taang kituahna, guh le guhngek dongin khenkhia thei hi. Mihingte’ lungsim ngimna le a ngaihsutnate zong theithei hi." 
Hebrews4:13 Pasian’ mai-ah seelcip theih ding bangmah om lo hi. Eite khempeuh i dinna ding pa’ mai-ah a kipiangsak na khempeuh a kiliah a ki-im thei om loin kimu sinsen hi. 
Hebrews4:14 Tua ahih manin eite in Pasian’ omna vantung a va tung khinsa, Siampi Lianpen ahi Pasian’ Tapa Jesuh neikhin ihih manin i sansa upna thu kiptakin len ni." 
Hebrews4:15 Eite’ neih Siampi Lianpen pa in i ginat lohna-ah eite a hong hehpih thei lo ding hi lo hi; eite mah bangin ze-etna khempeuh a thuak hi a, ahi zongin mawhna a bawl lo ahi hi." 
Hebrews4:16 Tua ahih manin a kisap hunin, eite a hong huh dingin hehpihna le dikna thupha i ngahtheih nadingin, kimuanna lungsim tawh hehpihna tokhom va zuan ciat ni." 
Hebrews5:1 Siampi lianpen ahi peuhpeuh mipa pen a mite’ mawhna hangin Pasian’ tungah biakna le letsong a piaksak dingin ama mipihte lak panin kiteelin nasep a kiguan’ ahi hi. 
Hebrews5:2 Amah zong lam tampi-ah a ginalo thei mi mah ahih manin thu thei lo mite le a khial mite tungah lungnem takin na sem thei hi. 
Hebrews5:3 Amah zong miginalo mi mah ahih manin mite’ mawhna hangin biakna a pia hi bek loin ama mawhna mahmah hangin zong biakna a pia ahi hi. 
Hebrews5:4 Tua bangin pahtawina a nei siampi lianpen nasep pen a sem dingte amau utthu tawh a kisehtawm mawk hi lo hi; siampi lianpen a sem dingin amahmah a kisehtawm hi lo a, Aaron a kisap mah bangin Pasian in amah a seh ahi hi." 
Hebrews5:5 Tua mah bangin Khrih zong, amahmah in siampi lianpen nasep a semtawm mawk hi loin Pasian in ama kiangah, “Nang, ka Tapa na hi hi. Tuni-in na Pa ka suak hi,” na ci hi." 
Hebrews5:6 Mun dang khatah zong, “Melkhizedek siampi gui zui-in a tawntungin siampi na hi ding hi,” na ci lai hi." 
Hebrews5:7 Leitungah mihingin Jesuh a omlai-in sihna panin amah a honkhia thei ding Pasian tungah thu ngenin khitui naptui tawh thumin na kiko hi. 
Hebrews5:8 Amah, Pasian’ Tapa hinapi-in a thuakna tawh thumang ahih theih nading a na kisin hi." 
Hebrews5:9 Tua bangin a cingtaak mi a suahkhit ciangin ama thu a mang mite khempeuh a dingin tawntung hotkhiatna a kipatna hong suak a," 
Hebrews5:10 Melkhizedek gui zui-in siampi lianpen dingin Pasian in a bawl hi. 
Hebrews5:11 Hih thu tawh kisai-in i gen ding tampi a om hangin note in thu thei hak mahmah na hih manun i gentel theih nading haksa hi. 
Hebrews5:12 Tu-in note pen midang a hilh dingin sia na suahtheih ding uh hun hikhin napi-in note mahmah pen Pasian’ thu a bulpite hilh ding na kisam lai uh hi. Antak nethei nai loin nawi bek a nethei lai na hi uh hi. 
Hebrews5:13 Nawi bek a ne laite pen naungek ahih manin a man le a man lo thu bangmah phawkthei nai lo uh hi. 
Hebrews5:14 Ahi zongin antak i cih pen a sia le a pha a khenthei, a lim le a lim lo a khentheita, a khangham khinsa mite a’ ding ahi hi." 
Hebrews6:1 Tua ahih manin Khrih thu a kipat cilna lelte nusia-in a thuthuk zawte ngaihsutin nei ni. Bangmahin a kimang lo nasepnate nusiat ding, Pasian upna thu," 
Hebrews6:2 tuiphumna le khut ngakna thu, misite thawhkikna le tawntung gimthuakna, cih thute genpha sansan nawn kei ni." 
Hebrews6:3 Eite in mainawt ni. Pasian in hong thukimpih ahih nakleh i mainawt ding ahi hi. 
Hebrews6:4 A tawpkik khinsate a kisik kik nadingin kibawl zo lo hi. Pasian’ khuavak sungah amaute om khinin, vantung nopna ciam khinin, Kha Siangtho ngah khinin," 
Hebrews6:5 Pasian’ thu a hoihna phawk khinin, a hong tung ding vangliatna thu zong thei khin uh ahih manin," 
Hebrews6:6 amaute a tawpkik leh, amau utthu tawh singlamteh tungah Pasian’ Tapa thatkikin a zumhuai dingin a pholak kikkik suak uh ahih manin a kisik theih nading uh lampi om nawn lo hi." 
Hebrews6:7 A tungah a kia guahtuite hupin, a kikhawhsak mite a dingin a kimang thei kungte a khangsak leitang pen Pasian in thupha a pia hi." 
Hebrews6:8 Ahi zongin tua leitang in lingkungte le sialtalling kungte hong posak leh Pasian in samsia-in, mei tawh kihaltum ding hi." 
Hebrews6:9 Lawm itte aw, hih bangin thu i gen hangin note ka hong muang mahmah uh a, hotkhiatna tawh kizomin thupha a hoihzaw ngah taktak uh hi, ci-in ka hong ngaihsun uh hi." 
Hebrews6:10 Pasian, a man loin gamta ngei lo ahih manin na Khristianpihte uh a beisa hunah na huhna uh le tu dongin na huh laina uh tawh ama a dingin na nasepna uh le amah na itna uh na lahnate uh hong mangngilh het lo ding hi." 
Hebrews6:11 Note khat ciat’ lametna thu hong tun taktak theih nadingin a tawp dongin lawpin na thanop paisuak nading uh ka hong deihsak pha uh hi. 
Hebrews6:12 Note thadah loin upna le lungduaina a nei mite bangin, Pasian’ hong ciamsa thu na ngah nadingun ka hong deihsak uh hi." 
Hebrews6:13 Pasian in Abraham’ tungah thu a ciam ciangin a tunsak takpi ding bek thu a ciam hi. Thu a ciam ciangin zong amah sangin a lianzaw kuamah om nawn lo ahih manin ama min tawh thu ciam a," 
Hebrews6:14 “Nang thupha hong pia-in suanlekhak tampi a nei dingin ka hong ciam hi,” a ci hi." 
Hebrews6:15 Abraham in lungduai takin na ngak ahih manin Pasian’ thuciam a ngah hi. 
Hebrews6:16 Mi khat peuhpeuh in thu a ciam ciangin amah sangin a lianzaw khat’ min tawh kiciam ahih manin, thu kituhnate-ah tua thuciamna pen a tawpna hita hi." 
Hebrews6:17 Pasian in ama geelnasa a kheel ngei het lo ding ahihna thu a thuciamna a ngah ding mite tungah teltakin theisak nuam ahih manin a thuciam banah kiciamna khat a bawl lai hi. 
Hebrews6:18 Tua hi a, a kikheel thei lo thu nih kithuap ahih manin Pasian in zuau gen thei lo ding hi. Tua hi a, amah a beel eite in eite mai-ah hong kikoih lametna thu kiptakin i letcip nadingin i tha hong nuamsak hi." 
Hebrews6:19 I lungsim a hong kipsak dingin tu-a bang lametna a nei ihi hi. Tua i lametna kician mahmah a, vantung biakinn siangtho tawngnung sung ciang dong tung khinta hi." 
Hebrews6:20 Tua lai munah eite’ tangin Jesuh na ma tun khinta a, siampi Melkhizedek gui zui-in a om tawntung ding siampi lianpen a suak hi." 
Hebrews7:1 Abraham in a galsimna ah kumpite thatin gualzo-in a hong ciah ciangin A Lianpen Pasian’ siampi ahih banah Jerusalem khua kumpi zong ahi Melkhizedek in Abraham na dawnin thupha a pia hi. 
Hebrews7:2 Abraham in a na ngah khempeuh sung panin Melkhizedek tungah sawm-ah-khat a pia hi. Melkhizedek min a khiatna in, “Thuman Kumpi,” a cihna hi phot a, tua banah Jerusalem khua kumpi zong hi lai ahih manin ama min pen, “Kilemna Kumpi,” cihna zong ahi hi." 
Hebrews7:3 Melkhizedek’ pa le a nu a kipanin a suahna thu, a sihna thu, le a khang tangthu peuhmah a kiciamtehna om lo ahih manin Pasian’ Tapa tawh a kibang hi a, siampi mah hi tawntung paisuak hi." 
Hebrews7:4 Tua ahih manin bangzah takin milian ahihna thu na thei uh hi. I pupi Abraham nangawn in zong gal sungah a ngah nate sung panin ama tungah sawm-ah-khat na pia hi. 
Hebrews7:5 Levi suanlekhak sung panin siampi a sem mite pen Abraham’ suanlekhak mah hinapi-in, amau mipih Israel-te tung panin sawm-ah-khat a lak nadingun Thukham a na kibawl hi." 
Hebrews7:6 Ahi zongin Melkhizedek ahihleh Levi’ suanlekhak hi lo napi-in Abraham’ tung panin sawm-ah-khat na la-in thuciamna a ngah mipa zong thupha a na pia lai hi. 
Hebrews7:7 A lianzawte in a neuzawte thupha a na piakna pen a man thu hi a, sel theih ding hi lo hi." 
Hebrews7:8 Siampite’ lakna tawh kisai-in ahihleh a sithei mi mah ahi siampite in mite tung panin sawm-ah-khat a la uh hi. Ahi zongin Melkhizedek’ lakna tawh kisai-in ahihleh Lai Siangtho in a gen mah bangin a nungta tawntung mipa in sawm-ah-khat a la ahi hi. 
Hebrews7:9 Abraham in Melkhizedek tungah sawm-ah-khat a piak ciangin ama suan Levi in zong ama pupi Abraham tungtawnin a pia mah kici thei hi. 
Hebrews7:10 Bang hang hiam cih leh Melkhizedek in Abraham a na dawn laitakin Levi suak nai lo ahih manin a pupi Abraham’ sung mahah a omlai ahi hi. 
Hebrews7:11 Israel mite in Levi’ suanlekhak siampite tungtawnin Thukham ngah uh hi. Levi’ suanlekhak siampite’ nasepna kicingtaak hileh Melkhizedek siampi nam zui-in siampi namdang a pian ding kisam nawn lo ding a, Aaron gui zui-in siampi omsa a kimangpah ding ahi hi." 
Hebrews7:12 Siampi nam kikheel ahih manin a thukham zong a kikheel ding kisam hi. 
Hebrews7:13 Hih bang thute a kigenna i Topa pen a namtuam khat hi a, ama phung sung panin biakna tau-ah siampi na a sem khat beek om lo hi." 
Hebrews7:14 I Topa pen Judah suan sung panin a piang ahih manin Moses in siampi thu a na gen ciangin hih Judah minam genin na nei lo hi. 
Hebrews7:15 Melkhizedek tawh a kibang siampi namtuam khat hong pian’ ciangin hih thu hong kitelpha semsem hi. 
Hebrews7:16 Amah pen mihingte’ bawl ngeina zui-in siampi a suak hi lo a, a si thei lo nuntak tawntungna vang tawh siampi a suak ahi hi." 
Hebrews7:17 Bang hang hiam cih leh Lai Siangtho in, “Melkhizedek nam bangin tawntung siampi na hi hi,” na ci hi." 
Hebrews7:18 Ngeina lui pen ginaloin, a kimanna om lo ahih manin kinawlkhin hi." 
Hebrews7:19 Moses Thukham ahi ngeina lui in a cingtaaksak zawh bangmah om lo ahih manin eite in Pasian i naih theih nading lametna ahi ngeina thak hong kithun hi. 
Hebrews7:20 Tua banah Pasian’ kiciamna zong hong omlai hi. Midangte siampi-in a kibawl laitakin tua bang kiciamna na om lo hi. 
Hebrews7:21 Ahi zongin Pasian in Jesuh kiangah, “Topa in a lungsim a kheel loh nading limtakin kiciam khin a, ‘Nang, tawntung siampi na hi hi,’” na ci ahih manin kiciamna tawh Jesuh siampi a na suak ahi hi." 
Hebrews7:22 Hih bangin a kilamdang diakin a kibawlna in Jesuh pen kiciamna hoihzaw ahihna thu hong kilangsak hi. 
Hebrews7:23 A kilamdanna a dang khat in: Siampi dangte pen sithei-in a nasep zom paisuak thei lo ahih manin a mi malin tampi pha uh hi. 
Hebrews7:24 Ahi zongin Jesuh nungta tawntung ahih manin midang tungah a nasep ki-ap nawn loin amahmah in siampi nasep sem paisuak hi. 
Hebrews7:25 Tua hi a, mite a dingin a thumsak thei dingin amah nungta tawntung ahih manin ama tungtawnin Pasian kiang a zuante khempeuh, tu a kipanin a tawntungin a honkhia thei ahi hi." 
Hebrews7:26 Tua bangin a siangtho, paubaanna a nei lo, vantungah a lian penin a kikoih Siampi Lianpen Jesuh i neih a hoih mahmah ahi hi." 
Hebrews7:27 Siampi lianpen dangte in nisimin amau’ mawhna hangin biakna pia masa-in, tua ciangin midangte’ mawhna hangin a piak niloh bang hi loin, amah khatvei bek a kipiakna tawh a tawntung adingin a kimang paisuak ahi hi." 
Hebrews7:28 Moses Thukham in siampi lianpen a sem dingin cingtaakna a nei thei lo mihing mah na seh a, ahi zongin tua Thukham nungah a hong piang Pasian’ thuciamna in a tawntungin a cingtaakin a kibawl Tapa, Siampi Lianpen dingin kiciamna tawh a na seh hi." 
Hebrews8:1 Tu-in i gennop thu pen hih bang ahi hi: Vantungah Pasian’ tokhom taklamah a tu tua bang Siampi Lianpen khat a nei ihi hi. 
Hebrews8:2 Amah in, mite’ bawl ahi lo, Topa mahmah in a bawl a taktak puanbuk ahi a Siangtho Pen mun sungah siampi lianpen nasep a sem ahi hi." 
Hebrews8:3 Pasian tungah letsong a tuamtuamte a pia ding le ganhing tawh biakna a pia dingin siampi lianpen a sem peuhpeuhte a kiseh ahih mah bangin eite’ Siampi Lianpen pa in zong bangkhat teitei a piak ding kisam hi. 
Hebrews8:4 Jew Thukham tawh kizui-in Pasian tungah letsongte a pia ding siampite om khinta ahih manin leitungah Jesuh a omlai hileh siampi hithei het lo ding hi. 
Hebrews8:5 Leitung a siampite’ sepsepte pen vantungah a om thu, a limin a sem uh ahi hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Moses in Puanbuk lam ding a kipat ciangin Pasian in, “Mual tungah i om lai-in a lim ding khempeuh kong lah bang teekteekin a kihih nadingin na thei in,” na ci hi." 
Hebrews8:6 Tua ahih manin Pasian le mite kikalah Jesuh in a bawl thuciamna pen na a hoihzaw piak nading thuciamna ahih mah bangin Jesuh tungah a kipia siampi nasep pen siampi dang khempeuhte’ sep sangin a lianzaw ahi hi. 
Hebrews8:7 Thuciamna a masa kimang thei hileh thuciamna a nihna kisam nawn lo ding hi. 
Hebrews8:8 Tua ahih manin Pasian in ama mite mawhsakna thu na gen a, “Topa in hih bangin ci hi: Israel mite le Judah mite tawh thuciamna thak ka bawl ding hun hong tung ding hi." 
Hebrews8:9 Egypt gam panin a paikhiatpih dingin a pu a pate uh ka khut tawh ka kaih lai a, amaute tawh ka bawl thuciamna bang hi lo ding hi. Amaute tawh ka bawl thuciamna zui lo uh ahih manin kei zong amaute ka don kei hi." 
Hebrews8:10 Ahi zongin tu-in Israel mite tawh ka bawl ding thuciamna hih bang ahi hi. Amaute sungah ka thukham ka guang ding a, amaute lungtang tungah gelhin, amaute’ Pasian ka hi ding a, amaute pen keima mi ahi ding uh hi." 
Hebrews8:11 A neupen pan a lianpen dongin mi khempeuh in hong thei ding uh ahih manin ‘Topa thei in,’ ci-in a ulenau le a mipihte kiangah kuamah in a hilh ding kisam nawn lo ding hi." 
Hebrews8:12 A mawhna a khialhna uhah amaute ka hehpih ding a, tua bangte phawkin ka nei nawn kei ding hi,” na ci hi." 
Hebrews8:13 Pasian in thuciamna thak a gen ciangin thu ciamna lui pen a bei-in a seh ahi hi. Tua a bei thuciamna pen a maimangta ahi hi. 
Hebrews9:1 A masa thuciamna nangawn in biakna zia ding le biak nading mun tawh kisai ngeina na nei tei sam hi. 
Hebrews9:2 Puanbuk khat kibawl a, a puanung dei pen Siangtho Mun kici a, tua sungah meivak, sabuai, le Ompihna Anlum kikoih hi." 
Hebrews9:3 Tua Siangtho Mun a kideina zomah Siangtho Pen Mun a kici a dei dang khat om leuleu hi. 
Hebrews9:4 Tua sungah paknamtui hal nading kham kibawl biakna tau le kham tawh a kizut Thuciamna Singkuang om hi. Tua Thuciamna Singkuang sungah manna anlum a kikoihna kham beel, tehno nei-in a hing Aaron’ ciangkhut le thukhamte a kigelhna suangpek nihte kikoih hi." 
Hebrews9:5 Tua Thuciamna Singkuang tung sanah Pasian’ ompihna lim ahi kherub nihte om a, tua kherub nihte in hehpihna tokhom liimsun uh hi. Hih nate’ thu tu-in a neng a tawngin i gen khinzo kei hi." 
Hebrews9:6 Hih bang tengin a kibawl khit ciangin a dei puanung sungah nisim a nasep uh a sem dingin siampite a lut hi. 
Hebrews9:7 Ahi zongin a dei sungnung sungah Siampi Lianpen pa bek kum khatin khatvei pai a, theih loh man a, amah le mite’ khialhna hangin ganhing sisan tawh biakpiakna a bawl hi." 
Hebrews9:8 A puanung inndei a om laiteng a sungnung ahi, a Siangtho Pen Mun a kihong nai lo ahihna thu Kha Siangtho in hong kilangsak hi." 
Hebrews9:9 Hih bang omzia pen tuhun lai thu a lahna ahi hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Pasian tungah a kipia letsongte le ganhing tawh biaknate in a bia mite’ lungsim siangsak zo lo hi. 
Hebrews9:10 Zu le an, le pumpi siansuahna ngeina tuamtuamte hi bek a, Pasian in na khempeuh a puahphat hun ma kikal sungteng zat ding ngeina ahi hi." 
Hebrews9:11 Ahi zongin tu-in a hoihzaw thu a sem ding Siampi Lianpen Khrih hong tung khinta a, ama lutna biakbuk pen a kipiangsak tawm, khut tawh a kibawl biakbuk hi loin a lianzaw, a cingtaakzaw mun ahi hi." 
Hebrews9:12 Siangtho Pen Mun ah a tawntungin a kimang dingin khatvei bek Khrih a va lut ciangin biakpiak nadingin keel sisan le bawngno sisante va keng loin ama sisan va keng a, eite a dingin tawntung hotkhiatna a hong ngahsak hi." 
Hebrews9:13 Keel sisan, bawngtal sisan, le bawngla kihaltum vute, biakna vai-in a siang lo mite tungah a kitheh ciangin biakna vai-in mite’ pum tung siangthosak thei ahihleh," 
Hebrews9:14 tawntung Kha Siangtho hangin Pasian tungah a cingtaak biakpiak nadingin Khrih in a piak ama sisan in na tam semkhia zozaw ding a, a nungta Pasian’ na i septheih nadingin bangmahin a kimang lo nasepna panin ama sisan in i lungsim hong siangsak ding hi." 
Hebrews9:15 Thuciamna masa in a huamkhak mite, a mawhna panun a suahtak theih nading uh ngeina om pen a si suak khinta ahih manin, Pasian’ sap mite in a ciamsa tawntung thupha a ngahtheih nadingun Khrih in thuciamna thak a hong vaihawm ahi hi." 
Hebrews9:16 Mi khat in a sih khit ciangin a gamhluah dingin a deih pa lai-in ciamtehin a koih leh a laibawl pa a sih phot ding kisam hi. 
Hebrews9:17 A laibawl pa a hin laiteng tua lai kizang thei lo a, a sih khit ciangin kizang thei bek hi." 
Hebrews9:18 Tua mah bangin thuciamna masa zong sisan a kizat ciangin thu suak thei pan hi. 
Hebrews9:19 Moses in zong mite tungah Thukham sunga om thute a piak lai-in bawngno sisan, keel sisan, le tui sungah puknah le tuumul san diahin, tuate tawh Thukham laibu le mite theh a," 
Hebrews9:20 “Pasian in note tungah a hong piak thuciamna sisan ahi hi,” a ci hi." 
Hebrews9:21 Tua banah Moses in Biakbuk le biakna-in a kizang a sunga na om khempeuh zong sisan a theh hi. 
Hebrews9:22 Thukham kizatna sungah na khempeuh sisan tawh kisiansuah a, sisan a kiluansak khit ciang bekin mawhna kimaisak thei pan hi." 
Hebrews9:23 A taktak ahi lo vantung limte pen hih bangin siansuahna kibawl hi. Ahi zongin vantung nate in hih sangin a hoihzaw biakpiakna kisam hi. 
Hebrews9:24 Tua ahih manin a lim ahi mihingte’ bawl Siangtho Mun sungah Jesuh pai lo a, vantung mahmahah va pai-in Pasian’ omna-ah eite’ tangin tu-in amah a va kilaak ahi hi." 
Hebrews9:25 Kum simin Siangtho Pen Munah Jew Siampi Lianpente amau’ sisan ahi lo, ganhing sisan tawh a pai zelzel bangun amah va pai themthum lo hi." 
Hebrews9:26 Tua bangin va pai zelzel hileh leitung piancil a kipanin a va thuak zelzel ding ahi hi. Ahi zongin amah biakna-in a va kipiakna hangin a kimang paisuak a suahtheih nadingin mawh maisak nadingin hun bei kuan ciangin amah khatvei a va kipia hi. 
Hebrews9:27 Mi khempeuh khatvei si-in, tua khit ciangin Pasian’ thukhenna a thuak ding ahih mah bangin," 
Hebrews9:28 mi tampite’ mawhna a thuak dingin Khrih zong khatvei bek a kipia hi. A nihveina hong kilatkik ciangin mawhna thu tawh kisai nasem ding hi nawn loin, lawptakin amah a ngak mite a honkhia ding ahi hi." 
Hebrews10:1 Jew Thukham pen mailam hunah a taktak a hong tung ding lim lahkholhna hi bek ahih manin tua Thukham tawh kizui-in a kum a kumin a kipia biakpiakna in Pasian kiang a zuan mite mi cingtaak suahzo ngei lo hi. 
Hebrews10:2 Thukham zui-in Pasian a bia mite in mawhna panin siansuahna ngahzo uh hileh a lungsim uhah kisuanna lungsim om nawn lo ding ahih manin biakpiakna piak kikkik kul nawn lo ding hi. 
Hebrews10:3 Tua ahih manin biakpiakna a kipiak simin a kum kumin mite a mawhna uh a kiphawksak kikkik ahi hi. 
Hebrews10:4 Tua hi a, bawngtal sisan le keel sisan in mawhna siangsakzo ngei lo hi." 
Hebrews10:5 Tua ahih manin leitungah Khrih hong pai ciangin Pasian kiangah, “Ganhing le khawhsa tawh biakna na deih kei a, nang kong biak nadingin pumpi khat nong vaihawmsak hi." 
Hebrews10:6 Meihal biakna le mawh maisak nadingin biaknate tawh nang na lungkim kei hi. 
Hebrews10:7 Tua ahih manin, ‘Thukham laibu sungah keima thu a kigelh bang teekteek mahin keima hih ding nong deih bang teekteek mah ahih dingin ka hong pai hi, Pasian aw,’ ka ci hi,” a ci hi." 
Hebrews10:8 “Ganhing le khawhsa tawh biakna na deih kei a, meihal tawh biakna le mawhmaisak nadingin biaknate tawh na lungkim kei hi,” a cih ciangin hih biakpiaknate khempeuh Thukham tawh kizui-in hih bangin kam na pau veve lai a," 
Hebrews10:9 tua banah, “Nangma deih bang ahih dingin ka hong pai hi,” na ci thuah lai hi. Tua ahih manin Pasian in Khrih tawh biakna a kipsak theih nadingin ganhing le khawhsa tawh biakna luite na beisak phot hi." 
Hebrews10:10 Pasian’ deihna bangin Jesuh Khrih gamta a, a tawntungin a kimang paisuak dingin ama pumpi biakna-in khatvei a kipiakna hangin eite khempeuh i mawhna panin a siang ihi hi." 
Hebrews10:11 Jew siampite nisimin a nasepna uh munah dingin a kibang biakpiakna mah pia niloh uh a, ahi zongin tua a piak uh biakpiaknate in mawhna maisak thei lo hi." 
Hebrews10:12 Ahi zongin Khrih in mawhna hangin khatvei a piakkhit ciangin a tawntung a dingin kimang ahih manin Pasian’ taklam ah tu hithiat a," 
Hebrews10:13 Pasian in ama khenuai-ah a galte khempeuh a koihsak nading hun ngakin a om hi. 
Hebrews10:14 Mawhna panin a sianthosak mite, khatvei bek biakpiakna a bawlna tawh siangtho paisuaksak hi." 
Hebrews10:15 Kha Siangtho in zong hih thu hong theihpih ahih manin," 
Hebrews10:16 “Topa in hih bangin ci hi: Mailam hunah amaute tawh thuciamna khat ka bawl ding a, amaute sungah ka thukhamte guanin, amaute lungtang tungah ka gelh ding hi,” a cih khit ciangin," 
Hebrews10:17 “Amaute’ mawhna le a gitloh gamtatnate uh ka ciamteh nawn kei ding hi,” ci hi, ci-in a na gen hi." 
Hebrews10:18 Tua hi a, mawhna a kimaisak khit ciangin mawh maisak nadingin biakna piak ding kisam nawn lo hi." 
Hebrews10:19 Tua ahih ciangin sanggamte aw, Jesuh hong sihna hangin Siangtho Pen Munah ut utin luttheih nading thu i neita hi." 
Hebrews10:20 Ama pumpi mahmah ahi dalna puan tawnin nuntakna lampi-ah i pai theih nadingin amah in lampi thak hong honsak hi. 
Hebrews10:21 Pasian’ innsung a uk siampi lianpen zong i nei hi. 
Hebrews10:22 Tua ahih manin mawhna thu-ah kisuanna lungsim om nawn loin, tui siangtho tawh i pumpi a kisawpsa-in muanna le lungsim takpi tawh Pasian kiang zuan ni." 
Hebrews10:23 Pasian in piak dingin a hong ciam thu muangngam ihih manin i lametna thu kiptakin len ni. 
Hebrews10:24 Khatlekhat ki-itin a hoih nate i sep nadingin kihanthawn ciat ni. 
Hebrews10:25 Mi pawlkhatte in kikhop a pelh bang hi loin, eite in kikhop khawmnate pelh loin om ni. Topa’ hong pai ding Ni hong naina thu thei ihih manin khatlekhat kihanthawn semsemzaw ni." 
Hebrews10:26 Thuman thutak i theih khit ciangin mawhna i bawl hamtang lai leh i mawhna a kimaisak nadingin biakpiakna dang om nawn lo a," 
Hebrews10:27 a kihtakhuai thukhenna le Pasian’ thu a nial mite a kangtum ding meikuangpi bek omlai hi. 
Hebrews10:28 Moses Thukham a zui lote pen mi nih le thum in mawh mah hi, ci-in teci a pan’ khit nakleh kihehpih hetloin sihna kithuaksak hi." 
Hebrews10:29 Tua bang ahihleh Pasian’ Tapa a simmawh, mawhna a hong maisak Pasian’ thuciamna sisan a thudon lo, Pasian’ hehpihna a hong puak Kha Siangtho a hehsakte’ thuak ding bangzah takin lianzaw kan ding ahi hiam?" 
Hebrews10:30 Bang hang hiam cih leh, “Phulakna keima a’ hi a, ka thukkik ding hi,” a ci pa le, “Topa in ama mite thu a khen ding,” a ci pa i theih ahi hi." 
Hebrews10:31 A nungta Pasian’ khut sungah thumang loin i tunkhak ding a lauhuai mahmah ahi hi. 
Hebrews10:32 A beisa hun a note tungah thupiangte phawkkik un. Pasian’ khuavak sungah na om khit uh ciangin haksatna tampi thuak napi-in tuate na lel kei uh hi. 
Hebrews10:33 Mipi’ mai-ah hong kisimmawhin hong kibawlsia a, tua bang a thuakte na pawlpih ngam uh hi." 
Hebrews10:34 Note in a hoihzaw, a kipzaw nate a nei na hihlam uh kithei na hih manun thongkia mite thuakpih ngamin, na neihsa uh hong kilaksak hangin zong lungdam takin na om thei veve lai uh hi." 
Hebrews10:35 Tua ahih manin thaman lianpi a hong ngahsak thei na lungsim hanna uh na khahsuah kei un. 
Hebrews10:36 Pasian’ deihna bangin gamta-in, ama thuciam na ngahtheih nadingun lungduai-in thuakzawhna na kisam uh hi." 
Hebrews10:37 Bang hang hiam cih leh Lai Siangtho sungah, “A sawt loin, a hong pai ding pa hong tung ding a, hong zekai nawn lo ding hi." 
Hebrews10:38 Ahi zongin keima mi a thuman mite in ka thu umin nungta ding uh a, a nungkik a om uhleh tua mite tungah ka lungkim kei ding hi,” na ci hi." 
Hebrews10:39 Eite pen nungkikin a maimang mite ihi kei a, upna nei-in hotkhiatna a ngah mite ihi hi." 
Hebrews11:1 Upna nei i cih ciangin i muhtheih nai loh i lamette ngah takpi ding, ci-in muanna lungsim neihna ahi hi." 
Hebrews11:2 Tanglai mite in upna a na neih manun Pasian in a na pakta hi. 
Hebrews11:3 Pasian’ kampauna tawh leitung le vantung piang a, tu-a i muhtheih nate a om nai lopi panin hong piang hi, ci-in i upna bek mah tawh a thei ihi hi." 
Hebrews11:4 A upna hang mah tawh Abel in Kain’ piakna sangin a santheih huaizaw biakpiakna Pasian’ tungah a na pia hi. Pasian in ama biakna na sang ahih manin a upna hangin mihoih hi, ci-in Pasian’ pahtakna a na ngah hi. Abel a sihzawh a sawtpi hikhin napi-in tu dong mahin upna thu a hong gengen lai a suak hi." 
Hebrews11:5 A upna hang mahin Enok zong sihna tawh kipelh hi. Pasian in ama kiangah lato ahih manin kuamah in Enok mu nawn lo hi. Amah a kilaktoh ma-in Enok in Pasian’ lungkimna ngah hi, ci-in Lai Siangtho in a na gen hi." 
Hebrews11:6 Upna lo tawh kuamah in Pasian lungkimsak zo lo hi. Pasian kiang a zuan mi peuhmah in Pasian a om takpi ahihna thu le amah a zongte Pasian in thaman pia hi, ci-in a up ding kisam hi." 
Hebrews11:7 Noah in zong a upna hang mah tawh mailam a thupiang ding a muh theih lohpi mahin Pasian’ thugenna na mang a, teembaw khat bawlin a innkuanpihte tawh na suakta hi. Hih bangin a gamtatna tawh leitung midangte a mawh ahihna kilangsak a, a upna hangin mihoih hihna thu Pasian kiang panin a ngah hi." 
Hebrews11:8 Pasian in ama tungah piak dingin a ciam leitangah Abraham a pai dingin a sap lai-in Abraham in Pasian’ sapna a manna pen a upna hang mah ahi hi. A pai nading mun nangawn thei lopi-in a gam le a lei nusia-in a ding khia hi. 
Hebrews11:9 Pasian in piak dingin a ciam gamah a upna hang mah tawh gamdangpi hinapi-in peemta-in va om phot a, ama ngah bangin thuciamna a ngah a ta Isaac le a tu Jakob tawh puanbuk peuhah a om phot uh hi." 
Hebrews11:10 Pasian in geelin a lam, bulkip a nei khuapi, Abraham in a ngakna-in tua bangin a om ahi hi." 
Hebrews11:11 Sarah a ta neihtheih ding hun beikhin napi-in ama tungah thuciam pa zuau lo ding, ci-in Abraham in upna a neihna hang mahin Sarah gai-in ta a nei ahi hi." 
Hebrews11:12 A cimang khinin a kingaihsun hih mi khat’ suanlekhakte pen vana aksi zah leh tuipi gei-a sehnel zahin a tam hi. 
Hebrews11:13 Hih mite khempeuh in amaute tungah piak dingin Pasian’ ciam thute ngah nai lo uh a, gamlapi-ah a omlai galmuhin hopih thei bek uh a, hih leitungah khualmi peemta hi lel hang, ci-in kitheihna tawh omin a upna mah uh tawh a si uh hi." 
Hebrews11:14 Tua bang mite in amau a dingin a gam a lei ding uh a zong ahihna uh hong kilang hi. 
Hebrews11:15 Amaute in a nusiat uh leitung ngaihsutpi penin a nei uh hileh hong ciahkik theih nading uh hun ngah ding uh hi. 
Hebrews11:16 Ahi zongin amaute’ lunggulh pen leitung sangin a hoihzaw vantung gam ahi hi. Pasian in amaute a dingin khuapi khat na vaihawmsak ahih manin, tua bang mite in amah pen ka Pasian uh hi, ci-in a gen ding uh Pasian in maizumna in na ngaihsun lo hi." 
Hebrews11:17 Pasian in Abraham a ze-et laitakin Abraham in a upna hang mah tawh Pasian biak nadingin a tapa Isaac na pia ngam hi. Pasian mah in Abraham tungah tapa ka hong pia ding ci-in a ciam hinapi-in, Pasian’ ciamna bangin a neih tua a tapa neihsun mah, Pasian biak nadingin Abraham in pia dingin na kithawi hi." 
Hebrews11:18 Tua a piak ding tapa pen Pasian in, “Na tapa Isaac tungtawnin suanlekhak na nei ding hi,” a cih pa ahi hi." 
Hebrews11:19 Pasian in a sisa nangawn hingkiksak thei ding hi, ci-in Abraham in a up mah bangin Abraham in a sisa a tapa Isaac a limin a ngahkik ahi hi." 
Hebrews11:20 A tapa Jakob le Esau in mai lamah thupha ngah ding hi, ci-in Isaac in a na gen ngamna pen a upna hang mah ahi hi." 
Hebrews11:21 Jakob a sihkuan ciangin a ciangkhut dawnah kingamin Pasian bia a, Josef’ tapa tegel thupha a piakna pen Pasian in na pia takpi ding hi, ci-in a upna hang mah ahi hi." 
Hebrews11:22 Josef a sih ding ciangin Egypt gam panin Israel mite a paikhiat nading thu le ama luanghawm a bawl nading zia a vaikhaknate zong a upna hang mah ahi hi. 
Hebrews11:23 Moses a suah ciangin a nu le a pa in hoihsa mahmahin, kumpipa’ thupiakna kihta tuan loin kha thum sung a seelcip ngamna uh zong a upna hang mah uh ahi hi." 
Hebrews11:24 Moses a gol ciangin Faro’ tanu’ tapa kicih ding a ut nawn loh ngamna zong a upna hang mah ahi hi. 
Hebrews11:25 Tomno sung mawhna sungah nuamtakin om ding sangin Pasian’ mite tawh gimna thuakkhawm ding a utzaw hi. 
Hebrews11:26 Mailamah a thaman ding mukhol thei ahih manin Egypt gam sunga hauhna le nopsaknate khempeuh sangin Khrih hangin simmawhna thuak taakzaw tham hi, ci-in a ngaihsun hi." 
Hebrews11:27 Moses pen kumpipa’ heh ding lau hetloin Egypt gam panin paikhia a, a kimu thei lo Pasian a mu bang keekin a nungkik hetlohna zong a upna hang mah ahi hi." 
Hebrews11:28 Mi That Vantungmi in Israel mite ta upa pen khempeuh a thahkhak loh nadingin Paisan Pawi kipiangsakin, inntual kongtungzawl khempeuh sisan a kizutna zong upna hang mah ahi hi." 
Hebrews11:29 Lei keu tunga pai bang keekin Israel mite in San Tuipi a kantan theihna uh zong a upna hang mah uh ahi hi. Amaute’ pai bangin Egypt mite in pai ding a sawm uh ciangin tui in a tuumcip hi. 
Hebrews11:30 Israel mite in Jerikho khuapi ni sagih sung a kimvel khit uh ciangin a kulhpi a cipna zong a upna uh hang mah ahi hi. 
Hebrews11:31 Numei paktat Rahab in thukante limtakin na zindo a, Pasian’ thu a mang lo mite tawh a sihkhawm lohna zong a upna hang mah ahi hi." 
Hebrews11:32 Tu-a bangin gengen lai ding ihi hiam? Gideon, Barak, Samson, Jefthah, David, Samuel, le kamsangte’ thu i gen nading hun om lo hi." 
Hebrews11:33 Hih mite khempeuh in zong a upna uh hang mah tawh kumpi gam tuamtuamte zo-in, thumanin a gamtat manun Pasian’ thuciam a ngah uh hi. Upna hang mah tawh humpinelkai kamte hucip uh a," 
Hebrews11:34 meikuangpi mitsak thei-in, sih nading panin suakta uh a, ginalo napi-in thahat uh a, gal sungah thahatin gamdang galkapte a zogawp uh hi." 
Hebrews11:35 Numeite in a sihsuah mite uh, thawhkikna tawh a ngahna uh zong a upna uh hang mah ahi hi. Mi pawlkhatte in a hoihzaw nuntakna-ah a thawhkik theih nadingun leitungah suahtak ding ut tuan loin bawlsiatna thuakin a si uh hi." 
Hebrews11:36 Mi pawlkhat in simmawhna, satna, sikkol bulhna le thongkiatna zong a thuak uh hi." 
Hebrews11:37 Suang tawh a kidenglum, sing-at tawh a kiphelkham, namsau tawh a kisatlum a om hi. Tuuvun peuh, keelvun peuh silhzo bekin, cimawhin zawng uh a, gimna le bawlsiatna a thuak uh hi." 
Hebrews11:38 Amaute a dingin leitung mite kilawm zo lo uh ahih manin galtai bangin gamlak le mualtung khawngah vak kawikawi-in, leihawm suanghawm sung peuhah a om uh hi." 
Hebrews11:39 Hih mite’ upna lian mahmah hi, ci-in a kitheih hangin piak dingin Pasian in a ciamsa thute a ngah nai kei uh hi." 
Hebrews11:40 Bang hang hiam cih leh Pasian in eite a dingin a hoihzaw-in thu hong vaihawmsak a, amaute tawh eite i kikop ciangin amaute a cingtaak ahih theih phing nading uh Pasian’ geelna ahi hi." 
Hebrews12:1 Tua hi a, eite in i kiim i pamah hih zahin a tam teci nei ihih ciangin eite a hong dongtangsak thei nate khempeuh le eite a hong gakcip mawhna le khialhnate khempeuh paikhia-in, i mai-ah a om tai nading lampi a mong dongin lungsim kiptakin tai ni." 
Hebrews12:2 Eite hong makai-in i upna a hong cingtaaksak Jesuh mitsuanin nei ni. Mailamah a ngah ding lungdamna hangin maizumna kihta loin singlamteh tungah sihna hong thuak a, tu-in Pasian tokhom taklamah a tu hi." 
Hebrews12:3 Tua zahta-in mawhnei mite’ langbawlna a thuaknate ngaihsun unla, note lungkia loin khauhtakin om un." 
Hebrews12:4 Tu ciang dong mawhna tawh na kidona uhah sihna zah ciang dongin na dona uh om nai lo hi. 
Hebrews12:5 Pasian in note, tate, hong ci-in hong hanthotna thu mangngilh khinta na hi uh hiam? Pasian in note kiangah, “Ka ta aw, Topa’ hong thuhilhna zangkhai ngaihsut kei inla, gim a hong piak ciangin lungkia kei in." 
Hebrews12:6 Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa in a it mite thuhilh a, ta taktakin a ngaihsut mite a taii hi,” hong ci hi." 
Hebrews12:7 Pasian’ hong thuhilhna na thuak ding mah uh ahi hi. Pasian in note ta-in hong ngaihsun ahih manin a thuak na hi uh hi. Pate’ thuhilhna le taiina a thuak lo ta kuamah om lo hi. 
Hebrews12:8 Tate’ thuak bangin thuhilhna le taiina thuak loin hong kikoih mawk leh ta taktak hi loin zawlta na hi lel ding uh hi. 
Hebrews12:9 Tua banah, i leitung pate in gim hong pia a, zong i zahtak lai hi. Tua ahihleh kha thu tawh kisai-ah i Pa’ thu mang phazaw-in i nuntak ding kisam hi." 
Hebrews12:10 I leitung pate in amau’ hoihsak bangin nuntak tomno sung ngaihsutna-in hong thuhilhin gim hong pia a, ahi zongin Pasian in amah tawh kibangin siangtho-in i omtheih nadingin eite hong khualna-in hong thuhilhin gim hong pia hi." 
Hebrews12:11 Thuhilhna tawh gim hong kipiak ciangin nuam kisa hetloin na kisa mahmah sam a, ahi zongin tua thuhilhna a mangzote in thuman nuntakna hangin nopsakna thaman a nung ngah uh hi." 
Hebrews12:12 Tua ahih ciangin a zaw nuangnuang na khutte uh le a no dakdak na khukte uh khauhsak un. 
Hebrews12:13 Bai luangluangin a paite, na guh na taang uh a kipelh loh nadingin lampi tang zui-in na pai un." 
Hebrews12:14 Mi khempeuh tawh na kilem theih nading uh hanciam un. Nuntak siangtho lo tawh kuamah in Topa mu zo lo ding ahih manin nuntak siangtho na nungta un. 
Hebrews12:15 Pasian’ hehpihna a ngahlah na hihkhak loh nadingun na kidawm un. Zungkha a nei singkung hong khangin mi tampi gimsakin a siatsak bangin mite a siasak na hihkhak loh nadingun na kidawm un. 
Hebrews12:16 Numei tawh a mawh mite suakkha kei unla, Esau bangin annek khat tawh innluah za a zuak mi na suahkhak loh nadingun kidawm un." 
Hebrews12:17 Bang hang hiam cih leh Esau in a pa kiang panin thupha ngahkik nuamin khitui naptui tawh a nget hangin a gamtatnasa a bawlkik theih nading lampi om nawn lo ahih manin bangmah ngahthei tuan nawn lo hi. 
Hebrews12:18 Israel mite in a tuahsa bangin note in Sinai Mual tunga meikuang, khuamial le lungzinna, huihpi," 
Hebrews12:19 peengkul tumna awging le a kihtakhuai awgingte na za nai kei uh hi. Israel mite in awging a zak uh ciangin kihta lua uh ahih manin a zakkik nawn loh nadingun a thum uh hi. 
Hebrews12:20 “Ganhing nangawn in tua mual a sukkhak le kidenglum ding hi,” ci ahih manin thuakngap lo uh hi." 
Hebrews12:21 Tua pen naklauhuai mahmah ahih manin Moses in zong, “Lau-in ka ling hi,” a na ci hi." 
Hebrews12:22 Ahi zongin note pen Zion Mual, a nungta Pasian’ khuapi, vantung Jerusalem, simzawh loh vantung mite a omna," 
Hebrews12:23 vantungah a min a kikhum Pasian’ ta upate a kikhopna, mi khempeuhte’ thu a khen Pasian’ kiang, a cingtaakin a kibawl midikte’ kha a omna," 
Hebrews12:24 thuciamna thak a hong vaihawm Jesuh kiang, Abel’ sisan sangin thu hoihzaw a gen sisan a kithehna mun na tungzo uh hi." 
Hebrews12:25 Tua ahih manin note tungah thu a hong gen pa’ thugen na ngaih loh khak ding uh kidawm un. Hih leitungah thu a gen pa’ thu a ngai lote suakta lo ahih manin vantung panin thu a hong gen pa’ thugen ngai kei lehang i suakta kei zaw kan lai ding hi. 
Hebrews12:26 Tuahun lai-in thu a gen ciangin leitung kiling a, ahi zongin tu-in amah in thu hong ciam a, “Leitung bek lingsak loin vantung tawh zong khatvei ka lingsak lai ding hi,” hong ci hi." 
Hebrews12:27 “Khat vei lingsakkik lai ding,” a cih ciangin a kipiangsak nate kilingsakin kipaikhia ding a, a kilingsak lo nate kip lai ding ahihna thu hong kilangsak hi." 
Hebrews12:28 Tua ahih manin a kilingsak zo lo Pasian’ gam i ngah manin lungdamin, zahtakna le lamdangsakna tawh Pasian’ lungkimna bangin amah bia ni." 
Hebrews12:29 Bang hang hiam cih leh eite’ Pasian pen a kangtum thei meikuang tawh a kibang ahi hi. 
Hebrews13:1 Khrih sungah unau bangin na ki-itna uh na zomsuak un. 
Hebrews13:2 Khualmite hoihtakin zin na do ding uh na phawk un. Mi pawlkhat in vantung mite zindo ahihlam a phawk lopi-in a do na hi gige uh hi. 
Hebrews13:3 Amaute tawh thong a kiakhawm bangin kingaihsunin thong sunga om mite na phawk un. Note zong leitung pumpi mah tawh a nungta lai na hih manun gimna a thuak mite na phawk un. 
Hebrews13:4 Mi khempeuh in nupa thu thupi ngaihsut uh hen la, zite pen pasalte tungah citakin, pasalte zong a zite uh tungah citak uh hen. Pasian in a thangtat mite le nulepa mawhna a gamta mite tungah thu khen ding hi." 
Hebrews13:5 Sum deihluatna tawh na kipelh nadingun na nuntakna uhah kikem unla, na neihzah uh tawh lungkim un. Pasian in, “Note ka hong nusia ngei kei ding a, ka hong tamasak ngei kei ding hi,” hong ci hi." 
Hebrews13:6 Tua ahih manin kimuanna lungsim tawh hangtakin, “Topa, kei hong huhpa hi a, ka lau kei ding hi. Kua in bang hong cihzo ding ahi hiam?” ci ngam ni." 
Hebrews13:7 Note tungah Pasian’ thu a hong gen, nidanga na makai masate uh phawk un. Amaute’ nuntakna le a sihna ziate uh ngaihsun unla, amaute’ upna bang na neih nadingun hanciam un." 
Hebrews13:8 Jesuh Khrih pen zani, tuni, a tawntungin kibang ngitnget hi." 
Hebrews13:9 Thuhilhna lamdang a tuamtuamte zui-in lam man panin pialkha kei un. A zui mite tungah bangmah phattuamna a piangsak thei lo annek tuidawn tawh kisai ngeina zuihna in thahatna hong pia thei lo a, Pasian’ hehpihna bek in i lungsim hong thahatsak thei hi." 
Hebrews13:10 Jew biakbuk-ah na a sem siampite in biakna tau tungah a kipia biakna sate nek nading thu nei lo uh hi. 
Hebrews13:11 Jew Siampi Lianpen pa in mawhna hangin biak nadingin Siangtho Pen Munah a ganhing sisan paipih a, ahi zongin a ganhing pumpi pen giahphual pualamah kihaltum hi." 
Hebrews13:12 Tua mah bangin Jesuh in zong ama sisan tawh mite’ mawhna a siansak theih nadingin khuapi pualamah a si hi. 
Hebrews13:13 Tua ahih manin eite zong a pualamah pai-in Jesuh tawh maizumna thuakkhawm ni. 
Hebrews13:14 Eite a dingin hih leitungah a kip khuapi om lo ahih manin a hong piang lai ding khuapi a zong ihi hi. 
Hebrews13:15 Tua ahih manin Jesuh tungtawnin amah i biakna-in i kam tawh ama min pulakin Pasian phat tawntung ni. 
Hebrews13:16 Khatlekhat tungah thuhoih kibawlin na kihuh ding uh mangngilh kei un. Hih bang gamtatnate pen Pasian a lungkimsak thei biakna ahi hi. 
Hebrews13:17 Na makaite uh thu na mang unla, a genna uh bangin na gamta un. Pasian kiangah amaute in a nasepnate uh a pulak ding uh ahih manin tawlnga loin note hong lunghimawh tawntung uh hi. Amaute’ thu mang le-uhcin a nasepna uhah lungdam mahmah ding uh a, mang kei le-uhcin dah pipi-in na sem ding uh hi. Dah pipi-in a nasepna uh note a dingin zong phattuamna a om tuan hi lo hi." 
Hebrews13:18 Kote a dingin thu hong ngetsak niloh un. A tawntungin na a manin sepnopna lungsim nei ka hih manun ka lungsim uhah kisuanna om loin siang mahmah hi. 
Hebrews13:19 Note kiangah Pasian in kei hong paisakkik baih theih nadingin nakpitakin thu na na nget nading uh ka hong thum pha nuam hi. 
Hebrews13:20 Ama sihna hangin Tuucing Lianpa suakin, a sisan tawh tawntung thuciamna a kipsak i Topa Jesuh pen sihna panin a thokiksak, eite tungah nopsakna a hong pia Pasian in," 
Hebrews13:21 ama deihna bangin na na septheih nadingun a kisam thuhoihte khempeuh note tungah hong guanin, ama lungkimna bangin i gamtat theih nadingin Jesuh Khrih hangin eite sungah na hong sem hen la, Khrih in a tawntungin minthanna ngah paisuak tahen. Amen." 
Hebrews13:22 Sanggamte aw, hih ka hong laigelh pen sau khollo ahih manin hih ka hong hanthotna thute limtakin na ngaih nadingun ka hong thum hi." 
Hebrews13:23 I sanggampa Timoti zong thong panin a suahtak khitna thu ka hong theisak nuam hi. Amah hong pai baih nakleh note kiangah ka hong pai ciangin ka hong tonpih ding hi. 
Hebrews13:24 Na makaite uh le Pasian’ mi khempeuh na hopihsak un. Italy gam panin a hong pai mite in note hong hopih uh hi. 
Hebrews13:25 Note khempeuh tungah Pasian’ hehpihna thupha hong tung tahen. Amen. 
James1:1 Pasian le Topa Jesuh Khrih sila keimah James in Leitung mun khempeuhah kithehthangin a om minam sawm le nihte tungah hopihna lai ka hong gelh hi. 
James1:2 Sanggamte aw, thuhaksa a tuamtuam na thuak uh ciangin lungdam nadingin na ngaihsun zaw un." 
James1:3 Tua bangin na upna uh hong kize-etna na thuakzawh uh ciangin na kipna uh hong kilangsak ahihna thu na thei uh hi. 
James1:4 A kisam bangmah om loin a cingtaak na suahtheih nadingun na thuakna uh hangin a tawntungin na kip paisuak nadingun na ngaihsun un. 
James1:5 Pilna kisam na om uhleh Pasian kiangah ngen un. Mi khempeuh tungah Pasian dikin cingh mahmah ahih manin hong pia ding hi. 
James1:6 Ahi zongin na nget uh ciangin hong pia takpi ding hi, ci-in muanna tawh na ngen un. A muanglah mite pen huih nunna lam peuhah a kinil kawikawi tuihualte tawh kibang lel hi." 
James1:7 Tua bang mite, lungsim kip a nei lo, a kineihkhem hi lel uh a, Topa kiang panin bangmah a ngah hetloh ding lamtak uh a theih ding uh ahi hi." 
James1:8  
James1:9 Miniamte in liatna a ngah ciangin lungdam uh hen. 
James1:10 Mihaute zong a niam uh ciangin lungdam veve uh hen. Lopa pak bangin a mangthang veve ding ahi uh hi. 
James1:11 Ni hong suakin a sat ciangin lopate vul a, a paakte pulhin a hoihnateng a bei mah bangin a haute zong manlahin a om laitakun siatna a thuak ding uh ahi hi." 
James1:12 A hoih takpi mah hiam, ci-in sinna a thuak ciangin a nangzote a hampha mahmah ahi hi. Tua bangin a nangzote in, amah a itte tungah Pasian in a piak dingin a ciam nuntakna lukhu a ngah ding uh hi." 
James1:13 Mi khat peuhpeuh in tua bang ze-etna a thuak ciangin, “Pasian in kei hong ze-et hi,” ci-in ngaihsun kei hen. Siatna in Pasian ze-et ngei lo a, mite a siat nadingin Pasian in zong ze-et ngei lo hi." 
James1:14 Mi khatpeuh in ama deihna zui-in a gamtat ciangin mawhna a piangsak ahi hi. 
James1:15 Lungsim utna a gol semsem ciangin mawhna hong piang a, mawhna hong cingtaak ciangin sihna hong piang hi." 
James1:16 Sanggamte aw, mite’ khemsa-in om kei un." 
James1:17 A hoih thu le na khempeuh, Pasian kiang panin hong pai hi a, vantung khuavak a Piangsak pa ahih manin amah kikheel ngei lo a, amah a kihei manin khua zong mial tuan lo hi." 
James1:18 Ama piansakte khempeuh lakah eite a masa pen i suahtheih nadingin thuman thutak zangin ama utthu tawh eite a hong piangsak tawm ahi hi. 
James1:19 Sanggamte aw, note in na theih ding uh ka deih thu in: Thu kigen khempeuh hoihtakin ngai pahpah un. Ahi zongin pau pahpah kei unla, heh pakpak kei un." 
James1:20 Mihingte’ hehna in Pasian’ sep ding thuhoihte khaktan hi. 
James1:21 Tua ahih manin ngeina hoih lote le gamtat siate khempeuh nusia unla, Pasian’ thu mangin note’ lungsim sungah a hong koih thu zui un. Tua thu in note hong honkhia thei hi." 
James1:22 Nomau kikhem tawmin thu zak bek tawh maisak kei unla, na zak bangun zui-in semzaw un." 
James1:23 Mi khat in thu a zak bek tawh maisakin a zakna bangin a zuih kei leh limlangah a maitang a ki-en mipa tawh kibang bek hi. 
James1:24 Limlangah a ki-en mipa in amah hoihtakin a kimuh khit ciangin paikhia a, bangci pian ka hi hiam cih a mangngilh pah hi." 
James1:25 Ahi zongin mite a suaktasak thei thukham cingtaak hoihtakin a et khit ciangin a thu ngai-in a mangngilh pah hi loin, hoihtakin ngaihsun tawntungin a zuite pen a sepna khempeuh uhah Pasian in thupha a pia ding hi." 
James1:26 Mi khatpeuh in Khristian ka hi hi, ci napi-in kampau a kidopzawh kei leh amahmah a kikhemtawm hi lel a, ama biakna neih a mawkna ahi hi." 
James1:27 Pa Pasian in a siangtho biakna citakin a ngaihsut thu in: Tagahte le meigong numeite a haksatna uhah hoihtakin kemin, leitung siatnate tawh kisawhkha loin siangtho takin omna ahi hi." 
James2:1 Sanggamte aw, minthanna vang tawh a kidim i Topa Jesuh Khrih umin na om laitakun a pualama kilang pianziate siksanin mi na deidan kei un." 
James2:2 Gentehna-in, kham zungbuh bulhin puan manpha a silh mihau khat le puan siasa a silh mizawng khat, note’ kikhopna-ah hong paikhawm leh," 
James2:3 limtakin a kizem mipa zahtakbawl zaw-in, “Hih lai-ah tutna nuamah hong tu in,” ci le-uhcin a, ahi zongin mizawng pa kiangah, “Tua lai-ah na ding phot in,” cihna ahi a, “Sual tung hih ka khe kiang khawngah hong tu in,” cihna ahi zongin kam na zat uhleh," 
James2:4 mi a deidan na hi uh a, ngaihsutna hoih lo nei-in a gamta na hi uh hi." 
James2:5 Sanggamte aw, hoihtakin na ngai un. Pasian a it mite tungah piak dingin a ciam vantung gam a ngah ding le upna thu-ah mihau a suak dingin Pasian in leitung mizawngte a teel hinapi-in," 
James2:6 note in mizawngte na simmawhbawl uh hi. Note hong bawlsia-in thukhen zum hong tun pahpahte, mihaute hizaw uh hi." 
James2:7 Pasian in note a hong phuah min hoih a gensiate, mihaute mah ahi uh hi." 
James2:8 Lai Siangtho sungah, “Nangmah na ki-it bangin na vengte na it in,” ci-in a genna Topa’ Thukham zui le-uhcin a hoih hi pah hi." 
James2:9 Ahi zongin mi na deidan uhleh note a khial na hi uh a, Thukham a palsat na hi veve uh hi." 
James2:10 Mi khatpeuh in thukham dang khempeuh a zuih hangin khat a khialh nakleh a vekpi-in a khial mah ahi hi. 
James2:11 Bang hang hiam cih leh, “Nulepa mawhna na bawl kei in,” a ci pa mah in, “Mi na that kei in,” cithuah lai veve hi. Nulepa mawhna na gamtat loh hangin mi na thah nakleh thukham palsat mah na hi veve hi." 
James2:12 Tua ahih manin mi a khahkhia thei thukham tawh kizui-in thukhenna a thuak ding mi bangin kampau-in na gamta un. 
James2:13 Bang hang hiam cih leh hehpihna lungsim a nei lote tungah Pasian in thu a khen ciangin hehpih lo ding a, hehpihna lungsim a neite tungah Pasian in thu a khen ciangin a hehpihna in zozaw ding hi." 
James2:14 Sanggamte aw, mi khat in, “Upna ka nei hi,” a cih hangin a sepna in a zuih kei leh bang phattuamna om ding ahi hiam? Tua a upna bek in amah honkhia ding ahi hiam?" 
James2:15 Gentehna-in, na mipih khat peuhpeuh uh annek tuidawn, nikten’ puansilh nei loin haksapi-in om hen la," 
James2:16 note khat peuhpeuh in, ama pumpi kisapna bangmah pia lopi-in, “Khualum gilvah takin om in,” ci mawk lel le-uhcin bang phattuamna om ding ahi hiam?" 
James2:17 Tua ahih ciangin gamtatna in a zui lo upna guak pen a si ahi hi. 
James2:18 Ahi zongin mi khatpeuh in, “Mi khat in upna nei a, adang khat in gamtatna nei hi,” ci zenzen leh, gamtatna in a zui lo upna hong lak dih in; keimah in ahihleh ka upna ka gamtatna tawh ka hong lak ding hi, ka ci ding hi." 
James2:19 Pasian khat bek om hi, ci-in na um hi. Tua pen hoih mahmah hi. Dawite nangawn in zong tua bangin umin lau-in ling deldel uh hi." 
James2:20 Lawmte aw, gamtatna in a zui lo upna pen a hawmpi ahihna thu ka hong lak ding hi." 
James2:21 Eite’ pupi Abraham in biakna tau tungah a tapa Isaac a piakna hangin Pasian tawh kipawl thei hi. 
James2:22 Tua ahih manin upna le sepna kizom khawm a, sepna in upna a kicinsakna thu na thei uh hi." 
James2:23 Lai Siangtho in, “Abraham in Pasian um a, a upna hangin Pasian in mihoihin a sang hi,” ci-in a genna thumanin tung takpi a, Abraham pen Pasian’ lawmpa kici hi." 
James2:24 Tua ahih manin, mi khatpeuh in a upna bek tawh hi loin, a sepna tawh a kizuih ciangin Pasian tawh kipawl theihna ngah pan ahihna thu na thei uh hi." 
James2:25 Numei paktat Rahab zong tua bangmah ahi hi. Israel mi thukante hoihtakin zin na do-in, lampi dangah ciahsakin na suaktasak a, ama nasepna hangin Pasian tawh kipawl theihna a ngah ahi hi." 
James2:26 Tua ahih manin hu a diik lo, hu a sang lo pumpi pen a si ahih mah bangin sepna tawh a kizom lo upna zong a si ahi hi." 
James3:1 Sanggamte aw, mite tungah thu a hilh eite pen midangte sangin a khauhzaw-in thu hong kikhen ding ahih manin note tampi sia na suaknuam se kei un." 
James3:2 Eite khempeuh a khialthei zelzelte vive ihi hi. Kampauna-ah a khial ngei lo mi a om leh a cingtaak mahmah hi a, a pumpi zong a ukzo mi ahi hi." 
James3:3 Sakol in i thu hong mantheih nadingin kamkaih i bulh a, a sakol pumpi buppi i ukzo hi." 
James3:4 Teembawte ngaihsun dih un. Teembaw lian mahmah a, huihpi in nakpitakin a mut hangin a hawlpa’ deihna bangin a heina neu khat tawh ki-ukzo hi." 
James3:5 Tua mah bangin leii zong i pumpi na sung panin a neu mahmah khat hinapi-in thusia lianpipi piangsak zo hi. Gam khempeuh zong mei-ek neuno khat pan kipanin a kangtum thei hi. 
James3:6 Leii pen mei tawh kibang hi. I pumpi na sung panin a neuno khat hinapi-in i pumpi buppi a sia suahthei a, hell khuk sung panin a hong piang mei tawh i nuntakna buppi hong kangtumsak thei hi." 
James3:7 Mihingte in gamsa, vasa, a bokvak ganhing le tui sunga om ngasate a kipan ganhing khempeuh zualsakin ukzo uh hi." 
James3:8 Ahi zongin siattheih nading gukhal tawh a kidim, a omkhong thei lo leii pen zualsakin a ukzo kuamah om lo hi." 
James3:9 I leii tawh eite’ pa ahi Topa i phat thei a, Pasian tawh a kisunin a kibawl i mipihte zong tua i leii mah tawh i samsia thei hi." 
James3:10 Kam khat sung panin thupha le thusia pusuak khawm hi. Sanggamte aw, hih bang ahi ding hi het lo hi." 
James3:11 Tuinak khat panin tui lim le tui lim lo hong luangkhia khawm thei ahi hiam? 
James3:12 Sanggamte aw, theikung in oliv hong gahthei a, leenggui in theipum hong gahthei ahi hiam? Tui-al in tuilim piangsak ngei lo hi." 
James3:13 Note lakah pilin thuthei a kisa a om leh kiniamkhiatin pilin, nuntak hoih le gamtat hoih tawh a lahkhiat ding ahi hi." 
James3:14 Ahi zongin na lungsim uhah enna, gitlohna, le huaihamna a om leh a zuaugen na hi uh a, pil ing, ci-in kisialh nading bangmah om lo hi." 
James3:15 Tua bang pilnate vantung panin a hong pai hi lo a, leitung pilna, kha thu tawh a kisai lo, a dawivai ahi hi." 
James3:16 Enna le huaihamna a om nakleh buaina le siatna nam khempeuh tawh kizom pahpah hi. 
James3:17 Ahi zongin tunglam panin a kingah pilna a siangtho ahi hi. Mi tawh kilem thei-in dik a, mi tawh kikhawl thei a, hehpihna lungsim nei-in gamtat hoih a, mi lang-et lo a, kineihkhem cihte om lo hi." 
James3:18 Kilemna a piangsak mite in lungnuam takin a tuh khaici in hoihna le dikna a piangsak hi. 
James4:1 Note lakah a om kitotna le kilaina koi panin hong piang ahi hiam? Deihluatna lungsim na neih manun note’ pumsung a kitoktok niloh ahi hi. 
James4:2 Na na deih uh a, ahi zongin nei lo na hih manun mi na thatnuam uh hi. Nate deihna lungsim na nei uh a, ahi zongin ngah zo lo na hih manun kitawngin na kilailawh uh hi. Pasian kiangah na deih uh ngen lo na hih manun a ngah lo na hi uh hi." 
James4:3 Pasian kiangah na nget sun uh ciangin zong note’ nopsak nading bek ngenin, na ngaihsutna uh man lo ahih manin a ngah lo na hi uh hi." 
James4:4 A citak lo mite aw, leitung tawh kipawlna pen Pasian tawh kigalneihna ahih lamtak thei lo na hi uh hiam? Leitung tawh a kipawl mite pen Pasian tawh a kigalneih dingin a kibawlbawl ahi uh hi."
