James4:5 Lai Siangtho sungah, “Eite sungah a hong guat kha pen Pasian in ngai mahmah hi,” ci-in a kigelhna a mawkna-in a kigelh sa na hi uh hiam?" 
James4:6 Lai Siangtho in, “Pasian in a kihisakte nial a, a kiniamkhiatte a hehpih hi,” a cih mah bangin Pasian’ hong hehpihna lianzaw hi." 
James4:7 Tua ahih manin Pasian’ thu na mang un. Dawimangpa na nial un. Nial le-uhcin no kiang panin taikhia ding hi. 
James4:8 Pasian kiang nai un. Amah in zong hong nai ding hi. Mawhneite in na khut uh silsiang unla, a kineihkhemte in na lungsim uh siangsak un." 
James4:9 Dahin, thumin, kap un. Na nuihnate uh kahna suaksak zaw unla, na lungdamnate uh maigumna suaksak zaw un." 
James4:10 Topa mai-ah kiniamkhiat un. Tua hileh amah in hong lian bawl ding hi. 
James4:11 Sanggamte aw, khatlekhat kigensia kei un. A mipihte gensia-in thu a khente in Thukham gensia-in thu a khen ahi hi. Thukham na gensiat uhleh Thukham a zui hi loin thu a khen na hi uh hi." 
James4:12 Thukham a pia pa le thu a khen pa pen Pasian bek hi a, amah bek in hong honkhiazo a, hong susiazo hi. Tua ahih manin bang hangin na mipihte uh gensia-in thu a khenthei dingin kingaihsun zenzen na hi uh hiam?" 
James4:13 Tuni ahih kei leh zing ciangin tua khua tua khua-ah va pai-in, kum khat bang va omin, sumbawlin a meet tampi va ngah ni, a ci mite aw, ka thugen hong ngai dih un." 
James4:14 Zing ciangin na nuntakna uh bangci ding cih nangawn na thei kei uh hi. Meiilum tawlkhat sung kaii-in a mangthang pak tawh a kibang lel na hi uh hi. 
James4:15 Note in, “Topa in hong thukimpih nakleh nungta-in tua bang tua bang i sem ding hi,” na cih ding uh hi bek hi." 
James4:16 Ahi zongin note kihisakin na kisial uh hi. Tua bangte hoih het lo hi. 
James4:17 A hoih a manin gamtat ding thei napi-in a gamta lote a khial ahi hi. 
James5:1 A haute aw, tu-in ka thugen hong ngai dih un. Note tungah a hong tung ding lungkhamna hangin kapin thum un." 
James5:2 Na neihsate uh muattumta a, na puante uh nget in netum khinta hi." 
James5:3 Na ngun le na khamte uh kekseu khinta hi. Hih kekseuna pen note langah teci suak a, mei in a kattum bangin na sa uh hong netum ding hi. Hih a hun nunung ciangin tu-a bangin a piang dingin neihsa a khol na hi uh hi." 
James5:4 Na lo uh a hong khawhsakte a thaman pia lo na hih manun tu-in amaute’ phunna za un. Anla dingin na sawl uh mite’ phunna Vanglian Topa in za khinta hi. 
James5:5 Hih leitung na nuntak sungun uang nekin na noptat mahmah uh hi. Note hong kigawh hun ding kiginna-in a kithausak phitphet na hi uh hi. 
James5:6 A thuman mite mawhsakin na that uh a, amaute in na thu uh hong nial zo lo uh hi." 
James5:7 Tua ahih ciangin sanggamte aw, Topa hong pai matengin lungduai takin om un. Lo khote in zong a lo panun an a ngahtheih nadingun lungduai takin khuapi guah le tuk guah a ngakna thu thei un." 
James5:8 Note zong na lungduai un. Topa hong pai ding hun naita ahih manin na lungsim uh na thahatsak un. 
James5:9 Sanggamte aw, Pasian in note tungah thu hong khenkhak loh nadingin khatlekhat na kiphunsan kei un. Thukhen ding pa hong nai mahmah ta a, hong tung dektak ta hi." 
James5:10 Sanggamte aw, Topa’ min tawh thu a gen kamsangte na phawk un. Gimna a thuak laitakun lungduai-in a thuaknate uh na etteh un." 
James5:11 Tua bangin a thuak mite a hampha mahmah hi, i ci hi. Job in a thuakna-ah a lungduaina na thei uh a, Topa in dikna le hehpihna nei ahih manin a tawpna-ah Job tungah a piak thuphate na thei uh hi." 
James5:12 Hih thute khempeuh banah, sanggamte aw, thu khat peuhpeuh na gen uh ciangin kiciam se kei un. Vantung ahi a, na khat peuhpeuh tawh ahi zongin kiciam kei un. Pasian’ thukhenna na thuakkhak loh nadingun a hite, “Hi,” ci lel unla, a hilote, “Hilo,” na ci lel un." 
James5:13 Lungkhamna a thuak na om uhleh thu na ngen un. A lungdam na om uhleh phatna la na sa un. 
James5:14 A cina na om uhleh pawlpi upate sam un. Amaute in thu hong ngetsakin Topa min tawh sathau hong zut ding uh hi. 
James5:15 Upna tawh thu a kinget ciangin Topa in cinate noptuamsakin, damsak ding a, mawhna nei ahihleh zong a mawhna maisak ding hi." 
James5:16 Tua ahih manin na ci uh a dam nadingin khatlekhat tungah na mawhna uh kipulakin thu na kingetsak ta un. Mihoihte’ thungetna in vang nei a, na lianpi semzo hi." 
James5:17 Elijah zong eite mah bangin mi mawkmawk hinapi-in, guah a zuk loh nadingin lungsim takpi tawh thu a nget ciangin kum thum le kum lang sung tua gam sungah guah zu lo hi." 
James5:18 Tua ciangin guah a zuk nadingin thu ngenkik leuleu a, van panin guah hong zu-in, leitungah nektheih ding gah le teh hong piangkik hi." 
James5:19 Sanggamte aw, note khatpeuh thuman lampi panin pialkha-in, adang khatpeuh in thuman lampi-ah a tun pihkik theih leh," 
James5:20 tua bangin a khial mite lam manah a tunpihkik mipa in a khial mite a sih nading panin honkhia-in, mawhna tampi a mai nadingin na a sempa ahihna thu na phawk un." 
1Peter1:1 Jesuh Khrih sawltak keimah Peter in Pontas gam, Galatia gam, Kappadosia gam, Asia gam, le Bithynia gamah kithehthangin peemta-in a om mite kiangah lai ka hong khak hi." 
1Peter1:2 Pa Pasian in ama ngimnasa bangin note hong teel a, note in Jesuh Khrih’ thu mangin, ama sisan tawh sianthona a ngah dingin a Kha Siangtho tawh note mi siangtho-in a hong bawl hi. Note tungah hehpihna le nopsakna thupha hong tam tun semsem tahen." 
1Peter1:3 I Topa Jesuh Khrih’ Pa Pasian tungah lungdam ni. Ama hong hehpih mahmahna hangin sihna panin Jesuh Khrih a thawhkik sakna tawh eite tungah nuntakna thak a hong pia hi. Tua ahih manin i lametna kiam ngei lo a," 
1Peter1:4 Pasian in ama mite a dingin a koih thuphate i ngah nadingin lamenin i om hi. Tua thuphate sia ngei lo, nin ngei lo, mual ngei loin a om tawntungna vantungah note a dingin a hong koihsak hi." 
1Peter1:5 Note’ upna hangin nitawp ni ciangin na ngah ding uh hotkhiatna nomau-a’ ahihna a kilatsak nadingin Pasian in ama vangliatna tawh a hong kepsak ahi hi. 
1Peter1:6 Tua ahih manin tu laitakin mite’ bawlsiatna a tuamtuam na thuak manun tawlkhat na lungkham uh ahi zongin hih bang thuakna hangin lungdamzaw un. 
1Peter1:7 Hih bang thuaknate in a um takpi mah na hihna uh hong kilangsak hi. A siathei khamte nangawn, a hoih taktak mah ahi hiam, ci-in mite in mei tawh sin uh ahih manin, kham sangin a manphazaw note’ upna zong a kiptak mah ahi hiam, ci-in Pasian in hong sin ding mah ahi hi. Tua bangin na thuakzawh uhleh Khrih hong kilat Ni ciangin phatna, minthanna, le pahtawina na ngah ding uh hi." 
1Peter1:8 Amah mu ngei lo napi-in na it uh a, amah mu ngei lo napi-in a thu umin kama genzawh loh zah dongin nakpitakin na lungdam uh hi." 
1Peter1:9 Tua bangin na upna uh hangin kha thu-ah hotkhiatna a ngah na hi uh hi. 
1Peter1:10 Kamsangte in hih hotkhiatna thu mah kanin ngaihsut belin nei uh a, Pasian in note tungah a hong piak ding thupha mah, kamsangte in gen belin a neih uh ahi hi." 
1Peter1:11 Khrih in gimna thuakin, tua khit ciangin minthanna a ngah nading thu Kha Siangtho in a gen ciangin, amaute sungah a om tua Khrih’ Kha Siangtho in kua a cihna hi a, bang hun ciang hi ding hiam, ci-in a kankan uh pen tuhun thu a gen ahi hi." 
1Peter1:12 Vantung panin a hong kisawl Kha Siangtho’ vangliatna tawh thu a gen thupuakte’ tung panin na zak uh Thute mah kamsangte in a gen laitakun, tua a thugente uh amaute a’ ding hi loin note a’ ding ahihna thu, Pasian in tua kamsangte tungah a na genzo hi. Vantung mite nangawn in hih thute a theihtelnop khat uh ahi hi." 
1Peter1:13 Tua ahih manin na lungsim uh ki-ukin a kigingsa-in om unla, Jesuh Khrih hong kilat ni ciangin na ngah ding uh hehpihna thupha ngaihsutin nei un." 
1Peter1:14 Pasian’ thu na mang unla, na theih nai loh uh hun lai-in na gamtat ngei uh bangin na gamta nawn kei un." 
1Peter1:15 Note a hong sampa a siangtho ahih mah bangin note zong na gamtatna khempeuh uhah na siangtho un. 
1Peter1:16 Lai Siangtho sungah zong, “Keimah siangtho ka hih manin note zong na siangtho un,” na kici hi." 
1Peter1:17 Mi khempeuh amau gamtatna tawh kizui-in a kibang kimin thu a khen Pasian kiangah thu na nget uh ciangin, “Pa aw,” ci na hih manun hih leitungah na om laiteng uh amah zahtakin om un." 
1Peter1:18 Na pu na pate uh nuntakzia, bangmahin a kimang lo nuntakna panin a hong suahtaksak nadingin Pasian in note’ man dingin a piak pen a man a kiam thei ngun le khamte bang hi lo a," 
1Peter1:19 tuuno bangin paubaanna a om lo, a manpha mahmah Khrih, biakna-in a hong kipiakna tawh Pasian in note a hong suaktasak ahi hi." 
1Peter1:20 Pasian in hih bang dingin leitung pianma pekin Khrih a teelsa hi a, note a hong khualna-in tuhun nunung ciangin Pasian in note kiangah amah a hong lakkhia pan ahi hi." 
1Peter1:21 Sihna panin amah hingkiksakin minthanna a pia Pasian, ama hangin muang thei na hih uh manin, na up na muan na lamet uh Pasian ahi hi." 
1Peter1:22 Tu-in lungdamna thuman na zuihna hangun note kisiansuah khinin, na thu uppih mite uh lungsim tak tawh itthei khinta na hih manun na lungsim khempeuh uh tawh limtakin na ki-it un." 
1Peter1:23 A sithei nu le pate sung pan hi loin a sithei lo nu le pate sung panin a nungta tawntung Pasian’ thu tawh naungek bangin a suakkik na hi uh hi. 
1Peter1:24 Tua ahih manin Lai Siangtho sungah, “Mihingte, lopa tawh kibang a, a minthannate uh lopa pak tawh kibang hi. Lopate vulin paakte pulh a," 
1Peter1:25 ahi zongin Topa’ thu kip tawntung hi,” ci-in na kigelh hi. Note kiangah a hong kihilh Lungdamna Thu pen tua Topa’ thu ahi hi." 
1Peter2:1 Tua ahih manin gitlohna, zuauna, kineihkhemna, huaihamna, le kigensiatnate na omsak nawn kei un." 
1Peter2:2 Naungek suakcilte na bang unla, note khangto-in hotkhiatna na ngahtheih nadingun kha thu tawh kisai nawizu siangtho duh belin na nei tawntung un." 
1Peter2:3 Bang hang hiam cih leh note in Topa’ hoihna thu na thei khinzo uh hi. 
1Peter2:4 Mite in bangmahin kimang lo hi, ci-in a nilkhiat hangin Pasian in a manpha hi, ci-in a teel, nuntakna a piathei suangpi ahi Topa kiangah na pai un." 
1Peter2:5 Note zong nuntakna a piathei suangpi mah bangin kha thu tawh kisai biakinn lam nadingin na kizang unla, Jesuh Khrih hangin Pasian’ santheih biaknate a pia dingin a siangtho siampi na suak un." 
1Peter2:6 Bang hang hiam cih leh Lai Siangtho sungah, “A manpha suang khat ka teelkhia a, innkiu suang dingin Zion-ah ka koih hi. Amah a umte, zahhuai ngei lo ding hi,” ci-in na kigen hi." 
1Peter2:7 Tua ahih manin no a um mite a dingin amah pen a manpha suang hi a, ahi zongin amah a um lote a dingin, “Innlamte in a nilkhiat suang, innkiu suang bulpi a suak khinta hi,”" 
1Peter2:8 a cihna leh, “Hih suang pen mite’ hoina suak ding a, hih suangpi pen a pukna uh suak ding hi,” a cihna bang hi ding hi. Amaute in lungdamna thu um lo uh ahih manin a puk uh ahi hi. Pasian in a tuaci ding mahin a deih ahi hi." 
1Peter2:9 Ahi zongin note pen Pasian in a hong teelkhiat minam, Kumpi siampi pawl, a siangtho minam, Pasian’ mite na hi uh a, khuamial sung panin a lamdang mahmah ama khuavak sungah a hong samkhia pa’ nasepna a lamdangte a genkhia dingin Pasian in a hong teel mite na hi uh hi." 
1Peter2:10 Nidangin Pasian’ mi na hihloh uh hangin tu-in ama mi na hi uh a, nidangin Pasian’ hehpihna na theih loh uh hangin tu-in ama hehpihna na ngah uh hi." 
1Peter2:11 Ka itte aw, hih leitungah gamdang mi, a peempak bangin kingaihsun unla, na kha nuntakna uh tawh a kilehngat pumpi’ deihnate na kikham un." 
1Peter2:12 Gentail mite in note mi hoih lo hi, ci-in hong gensia nuamin mawhna hong zon ciangin, note’ hoihna bekbek mu-in, Pasian a hong pai Ni ciangin a phattheih nadingun amaute lakah na gamtatna uh hoihsak tawntung un." 
1Peter2:13 Topa’ hangin leitung ukna aana neite’ thu na mang un. Kumpipa’ thu ahi a," 
1Peter2:14 a gamtat siate gim pia-in, a gamtat hoihte a pahtawi dingin kumpipa in a sawl thuneite khempeuh’ thu ahi zongin na mang un." 
1Peter2:15 Bang hang hiam cih leh thu thei loin a mot paupau mihaite, na gamtat hoihna un a daihsak ding, Pasian’ deihna ahi hi." 
1Peter2:16 Sila ahi lo mi bangin gamta unla, ahi zongin gitloh gamtat nadingin na suahtakna uh zang loin Pasian’ sila bangin na gamtazaw un." 
1Peter2:17 Mi khempeuh zahtak bawlin thu uppih mite na it unla, Pasian zahtak bawlin kumpipa zong na zahtak un." 
1Peter2:18 Nasemte aw, na tote uh thu na mang un. A thudik a migi na tote bek uh a zahtak hi loin a gilo na tote uh thu zong na mang un." 
1Peter2:19 Pasian’ thu na ngaihsutna uh tawh a kilawm lopi mahin gimna na thuak uhleh na thuakna uh hangin Pasian in thupha hong pia ding hi. 
1Peter2:20 Note na gamtat khialhna uh hangin hong kisat ciangin lungduai takin na thuak manun bangmah phattuamna om lo hi. Ahi zongin a manin gamta napi-in gimna na thuak uh ciangin lungduai takin na thuak uhleh Pasian in thupha hong pia ding hi. 
1Peter2:21 Khrih mahmah in zong note a dingin thuakin, ama khekhap na zuihtheih nadingun etteh ding lim hong nusiat ahih manin hih bangin a thuak ding mahin Pasian in note a hong sam ahi hi." 
1Peter2:22 Khialhna bangmah gamta lo a, zuau a gen lam zong kiza ngei lo hi." 
1Peter2:23 Amah a kizahko ciangin na ko thuk lo hi. Gimna a thuak ciangin na tawnggawp lo a, a manin thu a khen Pasian muanin a na nei hi." 
1Peter2:24 Eite, mawhna lamah misi bangin, thuman lamah nungta-in i gamtat theih nadingin Khrih mahmah in eite’ mawhna ama pumpi mahmah tawh singlamteh tungah a pua hi. Ama liamna hangin note in damna na ngah uh hi." 
1Peter2:25 Note, tuu bangin a gammang na hi uh a, ahi zongin note’ kha nuntakna hong Cingin hong Kem pa a zui dingin a hong kiciahpih kik khin na hi uh hi." 
1Peter3:1 Tua mah bangin zite aw, na pasalte uh Pasian thu um lo ahihkhak leh na gamtatna hangun Pasian thu a uptheih nadingun na pasalte uh thu na mang un. Kampau kul sese loin," 
1Peter3:2 na gamtat hoihna uh a muh uh ciangin Pasian thu hong um ding uh hi. 
1Peter3:3 Na hoih nadingun puatham kizepna ahi sambawlna, kham le suangmanpha tawh kizepna, puan hoihnono silhnate na bulphuh kei unla," 
1Peter3:4 Pasian’ muhna-ah a manpha mahmah ahi lungsim puakzia, a tul thei lo sunglam hoihna na bulphuh zaw un." 
1Peter3:5 A beisa hunah Pasian muangin thu um numeite in a pasalte uh thu mangin, tu-a bang danin a hoih nadingun a kibawl uh hi." 
1Peter3:6 Sarah zong tu-a bangmahin gamta a, a pasal Abraham’ thu mangin, “Topa aw,” a ci hi. Note zong a hoihin gamta-in, bangmah launa nei loin na om nak-uhleh tu-in Sarah’ tanute na hita uh hi." 
1Peter3:7 Tua mah bangin pasalte aw, note sangin na zite uh a thahat lo zawdeuh ahihna thu na phawk un. Note mah bangin Pasian’ piak nuntakna a ngahte ahih uh manin na zite uh zahtak bawl un. Tua hileh na thungetna uh bangmah in hong nawngkaisak lo ding hi." 
1Peter3:8 A tawpna-ah kong gennop thu in: Lungsim le ngaihsutna kikhat nei-in unau ki-itna lungsim nei unla, migi-in kiniamkhiat un." 
1Peter3:9 Hong bawlsiate siatna tawh thukkik loin hong samsia mite samsia kik kei unla, Pasian in note a hong sap lai-in thupha a hong piak dingin hong ciamsa ahih manin, hong siat bawlte thupha tawh na thukzaw un." 
1Peter3:10 Bang hang hiam cih leh Lai Siangtho in, “Nuntak nuam deihin, hunhoih a zang nuamte in kamsia pau kei uh hen la, zuauthu gen kei ta uh hen." 
1Peter3:11 Gitlohna pelhin hoih gamtat uh hen la, mi tawh kilem ding hanciamin kilem theih nadingin hahkat ta uh hen." 
1Peter3:12 Topa in a thuman mite mu a, amaute’ thungetna pia tawntung hi. Ahi zongin a gamtatsia mite Topa in a langbawl hi,” na ci hi." 
1Peter3:13 Note in a hoih gamtat ding utin hanciam le-uhcin kua in hong bawlsia ding ahi hiam? 
1Peter3:14 A hoihin na gamtat manun gimna na thuak uhleh zong Pasian in thupha hong pia ding hi. Mite kihta kei unla, lunghihmawh ngaihsut kei un." 
1Peter3:15 Na lungsim sung uhah Khrih zahtakbawl unla, amah Topa-in nei un. Note’ lametna thu a hong dong a omkhak leh hoihtakin a genthei dingin kiging tawntung unla, ahi zongin lungnemna le zahtakna lim tawh gen un." 
1Peter3:16 Khrih nungzui na hihna hangun na gamtat hoihna uh hong gensia-in hong simmawhbawl a om ciangin a maizum theih nadingun na lungsim uhah kisuanna a om het lo dingin na siangtho om un. 
1Peter3:17 Gamtatsia-in i om sangin Pasian’ deihna ahih nakleh i gamtat hoihna hangin gimna i thuak hoihzaw hi. 
1Peter3:18 Khrih mahmah zong note a dingin si a, Pasian’ kiangah hong tunpih theih nadingin mihoih khat pen mihoih lote’ mawhna hangin khatvei a si hi. Mite in ama leitung pumpi that a, ahi zongin Pasian in kha nuntakna a pia hi." 
1Peter3:19 Tua kha nuntakna tawh va pai-in thongkia-in a om khate kiangah thu a va hilh hi. 
1Peter3:20 Noah in teembaw a bawl hun laitakin Pasian in lungduai takin ngak hinapi-in hih kha a nei mite pawlkhat in Pasian’ thu mang lo uh hi. Teembaw sungah a om mi giat bek, tui in a suaktasak hi." 
1Peter3:21 Tui pen note a hong honkhia tuiphumna lim hi a, pumpi panin nin sawpkhiatna lim hi loin, Jesuh Khrih thawhkikna hangin lungsim siantho nadingin Pasian’ tungah kamciamna lim ahi hi. Tua Jesuh thawhkikna in note hong honkhia ahi hi." 
1Peter3:22 Tu-in vantungah tua Khrih pai khin a, Pasian’ taklamah omin, vantung mite le ukna aana a neite khempeuh tungah a ukin a om hi." 
1Peter4:1 Khrih in ama pumpi-in thuak ahih manin note in zong tua bang lungsim mah nei-in na kithakhauhsak ding uh ahi hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh pumpi-in a thuak mite peuhmah, mawhna tawh kisawhkha nawn lo uh hi." 
1Peter4:2 Tua ahih manin tu a kipanin na leitung nuntak sung uh mihingte’ deihna bangin gamta loin Pasian’ deihna bangin na gamtat ding uh ahi hi. 
1Peter4:3 A beisa hunah dawibiate’ gamtat bangin a hoihkhop khat na gamta khinta uh a, a kilawm loin gamtatna, hukna lanna, zunekna, uangtatna, zukham luatna le a muhdahhuai milim biakna-in na hun uh na beisak uh hi." 
1Peter4:4 Tu-in note in dawibiate pawlpih nawn loin ut utin na phengtat loh uh ciangin lamdangsa-in note hong kosia uh hi. 
1Peter4:5 Ahi zongin amaute in a site le a hingte’ thu a khen dingin a om Pasian’ mai-ah thudotna thuak ding uh hi. 
1Peter4:6 Tua thu hang mahin, midang khempeuh thu a khen mah bangin a leitung nuntakna uhah Pasian in thu a khen khit tei hangin kha nuntakna-ah Pasian mah bangin a nuntak theih nadingun mi sisate kiangah Khrih in Lungdamna Thu a hilh ahi hi." 
1Peter4:7 Na khempeuh a bei nading hun hong naita hi. Nomau pumpi ki-uktawm thei-in pilvang unla, hoihtakin thu a ngen thei-in om ta un." 
1Peter4:8 Itna in mawhna tampi khuhcip thei ahih manin lungsim takpi tawh khatlekhat ki-it ding thupi ngaihsut pha pen un. 
1Peter4:9 Khatlekhat maitai takin zinleleeng na kido un. 
1Peter4:10 Pasian’ piak na a zatsiamte bangin Pasian’ kiang panin na ngah uh nate, midangte’ phattuam nadingin na zang un." 
1Peter4:11 Minthanna le vangliatna a nei tawntung Pasian in Jesuh Khrih hangin thu khempeuhah phatna a ngah theih nadingin thuhilhte in Pasian’ thu na hilh unla, na a semte in Pasian’ piak thahatna tawh na sem un. Amen." 
1Peter4:12 Ka itte aw, note’ upna hong kize-etna-in gimna haksate na thuak manun a thu lamdangpi-in ngaihsun kei unla, na lungkham ngaihsut kei un." 
1Peter4:13 Tua bangin Khrih tawh thuakkhawm le-uhcin ama minthanna hong kilat ciangin note lungdam mahmah ding na hih manun, tua banga na thuakna uhah na lungdamzaw un." 
1Peter4:14 Khrih nungzui hihna hangin mite’ kosiatna na thuak uhleh note sungah a minthang Kha Siangtho ahi Pasian’ Kha Siangtho hong om ahihna lim ahih manin a hampha mahmah na hi uh hi. 
1Peter4:15 Ahi zongin mi thahna, guktakna, gamtat khialhna, le thusia bawlna hangin gimna a thuakte na hikha kei un." 
1Peter4:16 Ahi zongin Khristian hihna hangin gimna na thuak uhleh kuamah in maizum ngaihsut kei unla, Khrih min hangin na thuak manun Pasian tungah na lungdam un." 
1Peter4:17 Tu-in thukhen kipat hun ding hong tungta-in Pasian’ mi eite tungah hong kipan ahihleh Pasian kiang panin hong pai Lungdamna Thu a um lo mite a dingin bangzahin lungkhamhuai ding ahi hiam? 
1Peter4:18 Lai Siangtho in, “Mi hoihte kihonkhia zo liailiai bek ahihleh Pasian a um lo mawhnei mite bang suak ding ahi hiam?” na ci hi." 
1Peter4:19 Tua ahih ciangin Pasian’ deihna bangin gimna a thuak mite gamtat hoihin, a kamciam a tangtungsak tawntung hong Piangsak pa muangin ama khut sungah a ki-ap ding uh ahi hi." 
1Peter5:1 Keima pumpi mahmah zong pawlpi upa hi-in, Khrih thuakna zong ka mit tawh mu-in, mailam hunah a hong kilang ding minthanna zong a ngah ding pa ka hihna tawh note lakah a om pawlpi upate kiangah ka hong thum nop thu in:" 
1Peter5:2 Pasian in note’ khut sungah a hong piak tuuhonte hoihtakin na cing unla, ut lo pipi hi loin, Pasian’ hong deih bangin utna lungsim takpi tawh na cing un. Sum ngahnopna bek tawh a sem hi loin utna lungsim tawh a semte na hi un." 
1Peter5:3 Note’ kep dingin a hong kipia tuute, aana neihna tawh a cing hi loin tuute’ etteh dingin a gamtate na hi un." 
1Peter5:4 Tuucing pipa hong pai ciangin a mual ngei lo minthanna lukhu a hong pia ding hi. 
1Peter5:5 Tua mah bangin no khangnozaw deuhte in zong a khanghamte’ thu na mang un. Lai Siangtho in, “Pasian in a kiphasak mite nial a, a kiniamkhiat mite a hehpih hi,” a cih mah bangin na vekpi-un kiniamkhiatna puan bangin silhin, khatlekhat na na kisepsak un." 
1Peter5:6 Pasian in ama hoihsak hun ciangin note hong laptoh theih nadingin a thahat Pasian’ khutnuai-ah kiniamkhiatin na om un. 
1Peter5:7 Pasian in note hong kem ahih manin na lungkhamnate khempeuh uh ama kiang tunpih un. 
1Peter5:8 Note pilvangin khua phawk un. Na gal uh ahi Dawimangpa, humpinelkai bangin a nektheih ding zongin vak kawikawi hi." 
1Peter5:9 Leitungah thu um dang khempeuh in zong note’ thuak mah bangin a thuak ahihna thu thei unla, na upna uhah kipin Dawimangpa na nial un." 
1Peter5:10 Tawlkhat na thuak khit uh ciangin, Khrih tawh na kipawlna hangun tawntung minthanna a ngah dingin note a hong sam, hehpihna kicingin a nei Pasian in note a cingtaakin hong bawl ding a, kipna, thahatna, bulkip kician hong pia ding hi." 
1Peter5:11 Tua Pasian in a tawntungin ukna vangliatna nei paisuak tahen. Amen. 
1Peter5:12 Thu upna sungah mi citakin ka ngaihsut Silas’ huhna tawh hih lai tomno gelhin amah ka hong puasak hi. Hih thute pen Pasian’ hong hehpihna taktak hi, ci-in teci pangin note ka hong hanthawn hi. Tua ahih manin hih thute-ah kipin om un." 
1Peter5:13 Note mah bangin Pasian in a teel, Babylon khua-a om pawlpi mite in hopihna kam hong khak uh a, ka tapa Marka in zong note hopihna kam mah hong khak hi." 
1Peter5:13 Note mah bangin Pasian in a teel, Babylon khua-a om pawlpi mite in hopihna kam hong khak uh a, ka tapa Marka in zong note hopihna kam mah hong khak hi." 
1Peter5:14 Khristian ki-itna tawh khatlekhat kinamin na kihopih un. Khrih thu um note khempeuh tungah nopsakna thupha hong tung tahen. 
2Peter1:1 Jesuh Khrih nasem le sawltak ahi keimah Simon Peter in: Eite’ Pasian le Honpa ahi Jesuh Khrih a thumanna hangin kote’ upna zah mahin upna manpha a nei mite tungah lai ka hong khak hi. 
2Peter1:2 Pasian le i Topa Jesuh na theihna uh hangin hehpihna le nopsakna thupha note tungah tampi tak hong tung tahen. 
2Peter1:3 Ama minthanna le a hoihnate a neikhawm dingin a hong sampa i theihna hangin Pasian’ deih bangin biakna mantak i nuntak theih nadingin ama vangliatna in eite’ kisap na khempeuh a hong pia hi. 
2Peter1:4 Amah in piak dingin a hong ciam a manpha mahmah nate hih bangzia-in hong pia a, hih ama hong piak nate hangin leitungah a om siatna a piangsak thei duhluatna le deihluatnate panin na suakta uh a, Pasian’ pianziate na nei uh hi." 
2Peter1:5 Hih thu hangin na upna ban uhah gamtat hoihna na behlap unla, na gamtat hoihna uh thutheihna tawh na behlap un;" 
2Peter1:6 na thutheihna uh pumpi ki-ukzawhna tawh na behlap unla, na pumpi ki-ukzawhna uh thuakzawhna tawh na behlap un; na thuakzawhna uh Pasian’ deih bangin gamtatna tawh na behlap unla," 
2Peter1:7 Pasian’ deih bangin na gamtatna uh sanggam ki-itna tawh na behlap un; na sanggam ki-itna uh itna thukpi tawh na behlapzawh nadingun na hanciam un. 
2Peter1:8 Hih bang hoihnate a kicingin na neih uhleh i Topa Jesuh Khrih na theihna uhah thahatin kimanna na nei ding uh hi. 
2Peter1:9 Ahi zongin hih bang hoihna a nei lo mite pen mittaw-in a gamla a mu thei lo mite hi a, a mawhna lui uh panin a siangkhin ahihlam uh zong a mangngilh ta ahi uh hi." 
2Peter1:10 Tua ahih manin sanggamte aw, Pasian in note hong sapna le hong teelna-ah a kip taktak na hih nadingun hahkat mahmah un. Tua bangin hahkat le-uhcin na puk ngei kei ding uh hi." 
2Peter1:11 Tua hileh eite’ Topa le Honpa Jesuh Khrih Uk tawntungna sungah nuamtakin na lut thei ding uh hi. 
2Peter1:12 Tua ahih manin note in hih thute thei khinin, na theihsa uh thumanah kiptakin na omkhin uh ahi zongin a hong phawksakkikkik ka hi hi." 
2Peter1:13 Ka nuntak laiteng hih thute ka hong phawksakkikkik ding thuhoih khat hi, ci-in ka ngaihsun hi." 
2Peter1:14 I Topa Jesuh Khrih in teltakin hong genkhin ahih manin hih leitung pumpi ka nusiat baih nading thu ka thei hi. 
2Peter1:15 Tua ahih manin ka sih khit ciangin hih thute na phawkkik kik theih nadingun ka hihtheih zahin ka hanciam ding hi. 
2Peter1:16 I Topa Jesuh Khrih a vangliatna le a hong paikik nading thute note kiangah ka hong gen uh ciangin mihingte’ phuahtawm tuanthute siksanin a hong gen hi loin, ka mit mahmah uh tawh ka muh uh a vangliatnate a hong gen ka hi uh hi." 
2Peter1:17 Vanglian Minthang pa in, “Hih pen ka it ka Tapa hi a, ama tungah ka lung a kim mahmah hi,” ci-in genin, Pa Pasian in ama tungah minthanna vang le pahtawina a piak laitakin komau pumpi mahmah tawh a om ka hi uh hi." 
2Peter1:18 Mual siangtho tungah amah tawh ka omkhawm laitakun vantung panin hong ging awte komau mahmah in ka za uh hi. 
2Peter1:19 Tua ahih manin kamsangte’ gen thute a man taktak ahihna thu ka teltheih uh hi. Note’ lungsimah Zingsol hong suakin khua a hong vak matengin khuamial lak a mei taang bangin hih thute ngaihsun le-uhcin hoih mahmah ding hi. 
2Peter1:20 Na phawk ding uh a thupi mahmah khat in: Lai Siangtho sunga om thugen kholhnate, kuamah in ama pilna tawh a khiatna gen thei lo hi." 
2Peter1:21 Bang hang hiam cih leh mihingte in a deih manin mailam thugenkholh theihna a kingah hi lo a, Kha Siangtho’ sawlna tawh Pasian’ kiang panin a hong pai thute a kigen ahi zaw hi." 
2Peter2:1 Mite lakah kamsang man lo a omngei mah bangin note lakah sia man lo hong om ding hi. Siatna a piangsak thei thuhilhna a man lo hong lutpih simin, amaute mahmah a tankhia Topa nangawn nial ding uh hi. Tua ahih manin thakhat thu-in siatna thuaklawh ding uh hi." 
2Peter2:2 Tua bang hinapi-in mi tampi tak in amau’ gamtat hoih lohna zui ding uh a, tua bangin amau gamtatna hangin mite in thuman lampi gensia ding uh hi." 
2Peter2:3 Hih sia man lote in a huaiham manun note kiang panin sum a ngahtheih nadingun phuahtawm thu hong gen ding uh hi. Ahi zongin sawtpek a kipanin amaute’ thu a Khen ding pa a kigingsa-in om niloh a, amaute a Susia ding pa in en gige hi." 
2Peter2:4 Bang hang hiam cih leh vantung mite nangawn in khialhna a neih ciangin Pasian in khahkhong loin hell khuk sungah khia a, Thukhen Ni hun dong ngakin khuamial sungah kol bulhsa-in a omsak hi." 
2Peter2:5 Pasian in tanglai mite khahkhong loin amah a um lo mite, tuiciin tumsak a, thuman thutak a hilh Noah le adang mi sagih bek suaktasak hi." 
2Peter2:6 Pasian in Sodom le Gomorrah khuapite tungah thu khenin mei tawh haltum a, Pasian a um lo mite’ thuak nading limin a bawl hi." 
2Peter2:7 Ngeina bangin a gamta lo mite in Lot a lungkhamsakna panun Pasian in mihoih Lot a honkhia hi. 
2Peter2:8 Tua mihoih pa, amaute lakah teng a, nisimin amaute’ gamtat hoih lohnate za-in mu tawntung ahih manin lunggim mahmah hi." 
2Peter2:9 Tua ahih manin Topa in tua bang mihoihte a gimna uh panin suakta sakin, tua bang migilote Thukhen Ni hun dongin gimna pia-in a koihcip theih nading siamna a nei hi." 
2Peter2:10 Pasian’ thu nialin amau pumpi deihna zui-in a gamta mite gim pia phadiak hi. Hih sia man lote kiphasakin hangsan mahmah uh a, minthanna a nei vantung a omte zahtak hetloin gensia ngam uh hi." 
2Peter2:11 Hih sia man lote sangin hatzaw-in a vanglianzaw vantung mite nangawn in Topa’ mai-ah minthanna a nei vantung mite gensia ngam lo, mawhsak ngam lo uh hi." 
2Peter2:12 Ahi zongin mat ding le thah dingin a piang gamlak ganhing gilote bangin a pianpih lungsim uh zui-in gamta uh a, a theih loh uh thute a gensia uh hi. Tua ganhingte mah bangin amaute kisusia ding a," 
2Peter2:13 mite a gimsak mah bangun amaute tungah gimna kipia ding hi. A ut bangbangun suntangpi-in gamtat ding nuam a sa uh hi. Tua bang mite in note tawh ankuang hong umkhawmin, a zuau gamtatnate uhah nuamsa-in a om uh pen amaute a dingin a zumhuai mahmah ahi hi." 
2Peter2:14 Numei bekbek etnopin nei uh a, a mawhnopna lungsim uh kam thei lo hi. Upna cingtaak lo mite zol belin nei uh a, huaihamna lungsim bekbek a nei uh hi. Tua bang mite, Pasian’ samsiat mite ahi uh hi." 
2Peter2:15 Thuman lampi nusia-in gammang uh a, a man loin gamtatna tawh sum a ngah nuam Beor’ tapa Balaam’ gamtat bangin gamta uh hi." 
2Peter2:16 Balaam in ama mawhna hangin taiina a thuak hi. A pau thei lo la, mihing bangin hong pau a, kamsang Balaam’ haitatna a khawlsak hi." 
2Peter2:17 Hih bang mite pen a kangcip khinsa ciktui, huih in a mutkhiat meiipi tawh kibang uh a, Pasian in amaute’ om nadingin khuamial sahpi omna mun a koih kholhsak hi." 
2Peter2:18 Amaute kiphasakin haipau uh a, a khial gamtat mite sung panin a suakta khin liailiai zo mite, leitung pumpi deih bangin a gamtat nadingun a zol uh hi." 
2Peter2:19 Amaute pen siatna a piangsak thei zongsatna lelin sila hinapi-un mite tungah suahtak nading thu a gen uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh mite pen, a hong zo peuhpeuhte’ sila ihi hi." 
2Peter2:20 I Topa le Honpa Jesuh Khrih theihna hangin leitung siatna sung panin suakta khin napi-un, leitung siatna-ah awk kikin a lelte pen, a masa a pianzia uh sangin a nunung a pianzia uh siahuaizaw hi." 
2Peter2:21 Tua bang mite in amaute tungah a kipia thu siangthote thei-in a nusiat kik sangun thuman lampi a thei ngei het lo uh hileh amau a dingin hoihzaw thampek ding hi. 
2Peter2:22 Paunak-ah, “Ui in a luak nekik hi,” a cihna le, “Vok a kisilsiang khit ciangin buannawng lak mahah bualkik veve hi,” a kicihna thu, amaute tungah a piang ahi hi." 
2Peter3:1 Ka itte aw, hih ka hong laigelh a nihveina hi a, lungsim siangtak tawh thu na ngaihsut phatkik theih nadingun a nihvei mahin ka hong phawksakkik hi." 
2Peter3:2 Tanglai peka kamsang siangthote’ thugen kholhte le note lakah sawltak na a semte in Topa le Honpa’ thupiakte a hong gensawn uh thute na phawkkik ding uh ka deih hi. 
2Peter3:3 A masa penin na theih ding uh panin: Hun nunung lam ciangin amau pumpi deihna zui-in a gamta mi pawlkhat hong om ding a, amaute in note hong zahpih bawlin," 
2Peter3:4 “Amah a hong paikik nading a thuciamna a bangci ahi hiam? I pu i pate zong si khinta uh a, leitung piancil a kipanin tu dong na khempeuh a kibang mahin omom lai hi,” hong ci ding uh hi." 
2Peter3:5 Amaute in a kitheihmawh bawl uh thu pen: Tanglai pekin Pasian in ama kampauna tawh vantung le leitung na piangsak hi. Tui sung panin tui mah tawh leitung na piangsak a," 
2Peter3:6 tui tawh a piansak leitung pen tui mah tawh na susia leuleu hi. 
2Peter3:7 Tu-in tua Pasian’ kampauna mah tawh, mei tawh haltum dingin tu-in a om vantung le leitung a kikoihcing hi a, Pasian a um lo mite thu kikhenin a kisuksiat hun ding bek ngakin a om ahi uh hi." 
2Peter3:8 Ahi zongin ka itte aw, na mangngilh loh ding uh ka deih thu in: Topa a dingin ni khat le kum khat, kum tulkhat le ni khat a kilamdan’ luatna om lo hi." 
2Peter3:9 Mi pawlkhatte’ ngaihsut bangin Topa in a kamciamna a hong tungsak hak hi zenzen lo hi. Note khat beek in siatna na thuakkhak ding uh deih loin na vekpi-un na kisik ding uh deih ahih manin hong pai nai lohna pen note hong khualna hizaw hi. 
2Peter3:10 Ahi zongin theihkholh lohpi-in guta bangin Topa hong pai ding Ni hong tung ding hi. Tua Ni ciangin nakpitakin a ging in vantungte maimang sakin, vantung nate mei in kangtumin maimang ding a, leitung le a tunga om na khempeuh a mangthang ding hi." 
2Peter3:11 Hih nate khempeuh hih bangin kisusia mangkhin ding ahih manin note a bangci mi dingin kilawm cih limtakin na ngaihsun un. A siangtho nuntakna nei-in Pasian’ deihna bangin na gamta unla," 
2Peter3:12 vantungte mei in kangtumin, vantung nate sa lua-in a tuimang ding hun Pasian’ Ni hong tunbaih theih nadingin na hihtheih zahun hanciam unla, na ngak un." 
2Peter3:13 Eite in Pasian’ hong ciamsa, thuman bekbek a kizat nading mun van thak le lei thak a ngak ihi hi." 
2Peter3:14 Tua ahih ciangin ka itte aw, hih Ni ding ngakin na om laitakun Pasian’ muhna-ah paubaanna om hetloin amah tawh nuamtakin na omkhawm theih nadingun hanciam un." 
2Peter3:15 I sanggam Paul in Pasian’ piak pilna zangin note kiangah lai a hong gelhnate sungah a gen mah bangin note khempeuh in hotkhiatna na ngahtheih nading uh hun hong piakna-in Topa hong zekai ahihna thu na phawk un. 
2Peter3:16 Lai a hong gelhna sungah a thugente tu-ate mah a gennuam ahi hi. A laigelhna sungah a telhak thu tampi om a, theihna kicing loin lungsim kip lo mi pawlkhatte in Lai Siangtho sung thu a ututun a kawihei uh bangin Paul’ thugente zong a man lopi-in khia uh ahih manin siatna a tuaklawh uh hi." 
2Peter3:17 Tua ahih ciangin ka itte aw, hih thute theikhol unla, ngeina man zui lo mite’ khemna zuikha-in na bulkip panun na pukkhak loh nadingun na kidawm un." 
2Peter3:18 Hehpihna thu le i Topa le Honpa Jesuh Khrih theihna thu-ah na khangto semsem zaw un. Tuhun a kipanin a tawntungin amah in minthanna ngah paisuak tahen. Amen. 
1John1:1 Leitung piancil lai pek a kipanin a omsa ahi nuntakna a piathei Thu tawh kisai, note kiangah ka hong gelh uh hi. Kote mahmah in ama thugen ka za uh a, ka mit mahmah uh tawh amah mu-in, limtakin ka ettel uh hi a, ka khut mahmah uh tawh ka lawn’ uh ahi hi." 
1John1:1 Leitung piancil lai pek a kipanin a omsa ahi nuntakna a piathei Thu tawh kisai, note kiangah ka hong gelh uh hi. Kote mahmah in ama thugen ka za uh a, ka mit mahmah uh tawh amah mu-in, limtakin ka ettel uh hi a, ka khut mahmah uh tawh ka lawn’ uh ahi hi." 
1John1:2 Hih nuntakna pen a kimuthei a hong suah ciangin kote mahmah in ka mu uh hi. Tua ahih manin kote tungah a hong kilak, Pa Pasian tawh a omkhawm tua nuntak tawntungna pen genbelin nei-in, note tungah zong a hong gen ka hi uh hi." 
1John1:2 Hih nuntakna pen a kimuthei a hong suah ciangin kote mahmah in ka mu uh hi. Tua ahih manin kote tungah a hong kilak, Pa Pasian tawh a omkhawm tua nuntak tawntungna pen genbelin nei-in, note tungah zong a hong gen ka hi uh hi." 
1John1:3 Pa Pasian le a Tapa Jesuh Khrih tawh kote pawlkhatin ka om uh mah bangin note zong kote tawh pawlkhat nong suahtheih nading uh deihna-in ka muhsa uh le ka zaksa uh thute a hong gen ka hi uh hi. 
1John1:3 Pa Pasian le a Tapa Jesuh Khrih tawh kote pawlkhatin ka om uh mah bangin note zong kote tawh pawlkhat nong suahtheih nading uh deihna-in ka muhsa uh le ka zaksa uh thute a hong gen ka hi uh hi. 
1John1:4 Kote’ lungdamna a cingtaak theih nadingin hih lai a hong gelh ka hi uh hi. 
1John1:4 Kote’ lungdamna a cingtaak theih nadingin hih lai a hong gelh ka hi uh hi. 
1John1:5 Ama kiang panin za-in note tungah ka hong gen uh thu in: Pasian, khuavak hi a, khuamial tawh kizopna themkhat zong nei het lo hi." 
1John1:5 Ama kiang panin za-in note tungah ka hong gen uh thu in: Pasian, khuavak hi a, khuamial tawh kizopna themkhat zong nei het lo hi." 
1John1:6 Tua ahih manin Pasian tawh ka kipawl hi, ci napi-in khuamial tawh kisai gamtatnate i gamtat le i kampauna le i gamtatna tawh zuauthu a gen ihi hi." 
1John1:6 Tua ahih manin Pasian tawh ka kipawl hi, ci napi-in khuamial tawh kisai gamtatnate i gamtat le i kampauna le i gamtatna tawh zuauthu a gen ihi hi." 
1John1:7 Ahi zongin amah, khuavak ahih mah bangin eite in zong khuavak gamtatnate i gamtat takpi leh eite pawlkhat ihi a, ama Tapa Jesuh’ sisan in i mawhna khempeuh panin eite hong siangsak hi." 
1John1:7 Ahi zongin amah, khuavak ahih mah bangin eite in zong khuavak gamtatnate i gamtat takpi leh eite pawlkhat ihi a, ama Tapa Jesuh’ sisan in i mawhna khempeuh panin eite hong siangsak hi." 
1John1:8 Mawhna ka nei kei hi, i cih leh eite a kineihkhem ihi a, eite a thutak lo ihi hi." 
1John1:8 Mawhna ka nei kei hi, i cih leh eite a kineihkhem ihi a, eite a thutak lo ihi hi." 
1John1:9 Ahi zongin Pasian kiangah i mawhnate va pulak lehang, amah citakin thuman ahih manin, i mawhnate hong maisakin i hoih lohnate khempeuh hong siangsak ding hi." 
1John1:9 Ahi zongin Pasian kiangah i mawhnate va pulak lehang, amah citakin thuman ahih manin, i mawhnate hong maisakin i hoih lohnate khempeuh hong siangsak ding hi." 
1John1:10 Pasian in a mawh hi, hong ci ahih manin eite in ka mawh ngei kei hi, i cih leh Pasian pen zuaugen a suaksak ihi a, i sungah ama thu a om het lo ahi hi." 
1John1:10 Pasian in a mawh hi, hong ci ahih manin eite in ka mawh ngei kei hi, i cih leh Pasian pen zuaugen a suaksak ihi a, i sungah ama thu a om het lo ahi hi." 
1John2:1 Ka itte aw, note na khialhkhak loh nading uh ka deihna-in hih lai a hong gelh ka hi hi. Ahi zongin mi khatpeuh a khialh ciangin eite a dingin Pa Pasian kiangah a hong thumsak dingin a thuman Jesuh Khrih i nei hi." 
1John2:1 Ka itte aw, note na khialhkhak loh nading uh ka deihna-in hih lai a hong gelh ka hi hi. Ahi zongin mi khatpeuh a khialh ciangin eite a dingin Pa Pasian kiangah a hong thumsak dingin a thuman Jesuh Khrih i nei hi." 
1John2:2 Tua Jesuh hangin eite’ mawhna hong kimaisak a, eite a’ ding bek hi loin leitung mi khempeuh’ mawhna zong a mai nading ahi hi." 
1John2:2 Tua Jesuh hangin eite’ mawhna hong kimaisak a, eite a’ ding bek hi loin leitung mi khempeuh’ mawhna zong a mai nading ahi hi." 
1John2:3 Eite in ama thupiaknate i zuih leh amah a thei taktak ihihna hong kilang hi. 
1John2:3 Eite in ama thupiaknate i zuih leh amah a thei taktak ihihna hong kilang hi. 
1John2:4 Mi khatpeuh in, “Pasian ka thei hi,” ci napi-in a thupiaknate a zuih kei leh tua mi a zuaugen mi hi a, a thutak lo mi ahi hi." 
1John2:4 Mi khatpeuh in, “Pasian ka thei hi,” ci napi-in a thupiaknate a zuih kei leh tua mi a zuaugen mi hi a, a thutak lo mi ahi hi." 
1John2:5 Ahi zongin ama thu a zui mite pen Pasian a itna a kicingtaak taktak mi ahi hi. Hih bangin i gamtat leh Pasian tawh a kipawl taktak ihihna i thei hi. 
1John2:5 Ahi zongin ama thu a zui mite pen Pasian a itna a kicingtaak taktak mi ahi hi. Hih bangin i gamtat leh Pasian tawh a kipawl taktak ihihna i thei hi. 
1John2:6 Pasian tawh ka kipawl hi, a ci mi khempeuh, Jesuh Khrih a gamtat bangin a gamtat ding ahi hi." 
1John2:6 Pasian tawh ka kipawl hi, a ci mi khempeuh, Jesuh Khrih a gamtat bangin a gamtat ding ahi hi." 
1John2:7 Kong it lawmte aw, hih ka hong gelh thupiaknate pen a thak hi lo a, a kipat cil a kipanin na neihsa uh thupiakna lui mah ahi hi. Tua thupiakna lui pen note in na zakzaksa uh thu ahi hi." 
1John2:7 Kong it lawmte aw, hih ka hong gelh thupiaknate pen a thak hi lo a, a kipat cil a kipanin na neihsa uh thupiakna lui mah ahi hi. Tua thupiakna lui pen note in na zakzaksa uh thu ahi hi." 
1John2:8 Ahi zongin note kiangah ka hong gelh thupiakna pen na zak ngei loh uh thuthak hi a, Khrih gamtatna le note’ gamtatnate in tua thu a man taktak ahihna hong kilangsak hi. Tu-in khuamial beita a, khuavak taktak hong taang khinta hi, cihna pen thuthak ahi hi." 
1John2:8 Ahi zongin note kiangah ka hong gelh thupiakna pen na zak ngei loh uh thuthak hi a, Khrih gamtatna le note’ gamtatnate in tua thu a man taktak ahihna hong kilangsak hi. Tu-in khuamial beita a, khuavak taktak hong taang khinta hi, cihna pen thuthak ahi hi." 
1John2:9 Mi khatpeuh in khuavak gamtatna ka gamta hi, ci napi-in a Khristian mipihte a muhdah leh khuamial gamtatna mah a gamta lai ahi hi." 
1John2:9 Mi khatpeuh in khuavak gamtatna ka gamta hi, ci napi-in a Khristian mipihte a muhdah leh khuamial gamtatna mah a gamta lai ahi hi." 
1John2:10 A Khristian mipihte a it mite pen khuavak gamtatna a gamta hi a, tua bang mite a puktheih nading thu om lo hi." 
1John2:10 A Khristian mipihte a it mite pen khuavak gamtatna a gamta hi a, tua bang mite a puktheih nading thu om lo hi." 
1John2:11 Ahi zongin a Khristian mipihte a mudah mite pen khuamial sungah omin khuamial gamtatna a gamta uh hi a, tua khuamial in bangmah ngaihsunsak thei lo ahih manin a gamtat nading mel uh thei lo uh hi." 
1John2:11 Ahi zongin a Khristian mipihte a mudah mite pen khuamial sungah omin khuamial gamtatna a gamta uh hi a, tua khuamial in bangmah ngaihsunsak thei lo ahih manin a gamtat nading mel uh thei lo uh hi." 
1John2:12 Ka tate aw, Khrih hangin note’ mawhna hong kimaisak ahih manin lai a hong gelh ka hi hi."

1John2:13 Pate aw, a kipat cil a kipanin a na om pa thei na hih manun lai a hong gelh ka hi hi. Tangvalte aw, Dawimangpa zokhin na hih manun lai a hong gelh ka hi hi. Tate aw, Pa Pasian thei taktak na hih manun lai a hong gelh ka hi hi." 
1John2:13 Pate aw, a kipat cil a kipanin a na om pa thei na hih manun lai a hong gelh ka hi hi. Tangvalte aw, Dawimangpa zokhin na hih manun lai a hong gelh ka hi hi. Tate aw, Pa Pasian thei taktak na hih manun lai a hong gelh ka hi hi." 
1John2:14 Pate aw, note tungah lai ka hong gelhna pen a kipat cil a kipanin a na om pa na theihna hang uh ahi hi. Tangvalte aw, note tungah lai ka hong gelhna pen note na lungsim uh thahatin, Pasian’ thu zui-in, Dawimangpa zokhin na hihna hang uh ahi hi." 
1John2:14 Pate aw, note tungah lai ka hong gelhna pen a kipat cil a kipanin a na om pa na theihna hang uh ahi hi. Tangvalte aw, note tungah lai ka hong gelhna pen note na lungsim uh thahatin, Pasian’ thu zui-in, Dawimangpa zokhin na hihna hang uh ahi hi." 
1John2:15 Hih leitung nate le Pasian tawh a kizom lo thute deihluatin nei kei un. Mi khatpeuh in hih leitung nate a deihluat leh amah in Pa Pasian it taktak thei lo hi. 
1John2:15 Hih leitung nate le Pasian tawh a kizom lo thute deihluatin nei kei un. Mi khatpeuh in hih leitung nate a deihluat leh amah in Pa Pasian it taktak thei lo hi. 
1John2:16 Bang hang hiam cih leh pumpi deihna, mit tawh mu-in i deihte, le mite’ kisaktheihpih nate ahi leitung nate khempeuh pen Pa Pasian tawh a kizom thu hi lo a, leitung tawh a kizom thu ahi hi." 
1John2:16 Bang hang hiam cih leh pumpi deihna, mit tawh mu-in i deihte, le mite’ kisaktheihpih nate ahi leitung nate khempeuh pen Pa Pasian tawh a kizom thu hi lo a, leitung tawh a kizom thu ahi hi." 
1John2:17 Leitung nate le leitung deihnate a beibei ding hita a, ahi zongin Pasian’ deihna bangin a gamta mite pen kip tawntung ding hi." 
1John2:17 Leitung nate le leitung deihnate a beibei ding hita a, ahi zongin Pasian’ deihna bangin a gamta mite pen kip tawntung ding hi." 
1John2:18 Tate aw, tu-in huntawpna hong naita hi. Khrih’ Gal hong pai ding hi, ci-in na zaksa uh mah bangin tu-in Khrih’ gal tampi tak hong tung khinta hi. Tua ahih ciangin bei nading nai taktakta hi, ci-in i thei hi." 
1John2:18 Tate aw, tu-in huntawpna hong naita hi. Khrih’ Gal hong pai ding hi, ci-in na zaksa uh mah bangin tu-in Khrih’ gal tampi tak hong tung khinta hi. Tua ahih ciangin bei nading nai taktakta hi, ci-in i thei hi." 
1John2:19 Khrih’ gal ahi hih mite pen ei’ pawl hi ngei napi-in hong taisan uh hi. Ei’ pawl taktak hileh eite tawh omkhawm paisuak ding uh ahih manin, tu-in amaute paikhia uh ahih ciangin ei’ pawl taktak ahihlohna uh hong kilang hi." 
1John2:19 Khrih’ gal ahi hih mite pen ei’ pawl hi ngei napi-in hong taisan uh hi. Ei’ pawl taktak hileh eite tawh omkhawm paisuak ding uh ahih manin, tu-in amaute paikhia uh ahih ciangin ei’ pawl taktak ahihlohna uh hong kilang hi." 
1John2:20 Ahi zongin Khrih in note tungah Kha Siangtho hong piakhin ahih manin note khempeuh in a man na thei uh hi. 
1John2:20 Ahi zongin Khrih in note tungah Kha Siangtho hong piakhin ahih manin note khempeuh in a man na thei uh hi. 
1John2:21 Tua ahih manin note kiangah lai ka hong gelhna pen note in a man na theih lohna hang uh hi loin, note in a man thei-in, zuauthu pen thuman panin hong piang ngei lo hi, ci-in zong na theihna uh hangin a hong gelh ka hizaw hi." 
1John2:21 Tua ahih manin note kiangah lai ka hong gelhna pen note in a man na theih lohna hang uh hi loin, note in a man thei-in, zuauthu pen thuman panin hong piang ngei lo hi, ci-in zong na theihna uh hangin a hong gelh ka hizaw hi." 
1John2:22 Tua ahihleh zuau thugen i cihte kuate ahi hiam? Jesuh pen Khrih hi lo hi, a cite ahi hi. Hih bangin thugente pen Khrih’ Gal hi a, amaute in Pa le Tapa a nihin nial uh hi." 
1John2:22 Tua ahihleh zuau thugen i cihte kuate ahi hiam? Jesuh pen Khrih hi lo hi, a cite ahi hi. Hih bangin thugente pen Khrih’ Gal hi a, amaute in Pa le Tapa a nihin nial uh hi." 
1John2:23 Tapa a nialte in Pa zong a nial hi a, Tapa a sangte in Pa zong a sang ahi hi." 
1John2:23 Tapa a nialte in Pa zong a nial hi a, Tapa a sangte in Pa zong a sang ahi hi." 
1John2:24 Note in ahihleh a kipat cil a kipan na zak uh thute hoihtakin na zui un. A kipat cil a kipan na zak uh thute hoihtakin na zuih nak-uhleh Tapa tawh kipawlin, Pa Pasian tawh zong a kipawl na hi ding uh hi." 
1John2:24 Note in ahihleh a kipat cil a kipan na zak uh thute hoihtakin na zui un. A kipat cil a kipan na zak uh thute hoihtakin na zuih nak-uhleh Tapa tawh kipawlin, Pa Pasian tawh zong a kipawl na hi ding uh hi." 
1John2:25 Khrih in eite tungah piak dingin a hong ciamsa thu pen hih nuntak tawntungna ahi hi. 
1John2:25 Khrih in eite tungah piak dingin a hong ciamsa thu pen hih nuntak tawntungna ahi hi. 
1John2:26 Note khempeuh a hong sawm mite’ thu tu-a zah tawh khin phot ni. 
1John2:26 Note khempeuh a hong sawm mite’ thu tu-a zah tawh khin phot ni. 
1John2:27 Khrih in note tungah ama Kha Siangtho hong piakhin a, tua Kha Siangtho na neih laiteng uh kuamah in note hong hilh ding kisam nawn lo hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Kha Siangtho in note tungah thu khempeuh hong hilh a, tua a hong hilh thute a man vive hi a, zuauthu khat zong om lo hi. Tua ahih manin Kha Siangtho’ hilhnate zui unla, Khrih sungah kiptakin om un." 
1John2:27 Khrih in note tungah ama Kha Siangtho hong piakhin a, tua Kha Siangtho na neih laiteng uh kuamah in note hong hilh ding kisam nawn lo hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Kha Siangtho in note tungah thu khempeuh hong hilh a, tua a hong hilh thute a man vive hi a, zuauthu khat zong om lo hi. Tua ahih manin Kha Siangtho’ hilhnate zui unla, Khrih sungah kiptakin om un." 
1John2:28 Ka itte aw, Khrih hong kilatkik ciangin lungmuang takin i omtheih nading le ama hong pai Ni ciangin i bukbuk loh nadingin amah tawh kiptakin kipawl ni." 
1John2:28 Ka itte aw, Khrih hong kilatkik ciangin lungmuang takin i omtheih nading le ama hong pai Ni ciangin i bukbuk loh nadingin amah tawh kiptakin kipawl ni."

1John3:1 Pa Pasian in eite bangzah takin hong itna thu thei un. Ama hong itna lian mahmah ahih manin eite pen Pasian’ tate hong kici a, hong kicih mah bang ihi takpi hi. Leitung mite in tuhun ciang dong Pasian thei lo uh ahih manin eite zong a hong thei lo uh ahi hi."

1John3:12 Dawimangpa’ mi ahi, a naupa mahmah a that Kain bang kei ni. Kain a gamtatna man lo a, a naupa’ gamtatna man ahih manin Kain in a naupa a that ahi hi."

1John3:14 Ei Khristiante khatlekhat ki-it ihih manin sihna khutsung panin paikhia-in nuntakna khut sungah a lut khinta ihihna thu i thei khinzo hi. Itna lungsim a nei lote pen sihna khutsung mahah a omlai uh ahi hi.

1John3:16 Itna i cih bangci theih ding ihi hiam cih leh: Khrih in eite a dingin a nuntakna hong pia hi. Ei zong i Khristian mipihte a dingin i nuntakna i piak ngam ding ahi hi. 
1John3:17 Mi khat hau mahmah hen la, a Khristian mipih a cimawhte mu napi-in huhna bangmah pianuam hetkei leh, bang hangin amah in Pasian ka it hi, ci thei ding ahi hiam?" 
1John3:17 Mi khat hau mahmah hen la, a Khristian mipih a cimawhte mu napi-in huhna bangmah pianuam hetkei leh, bang hangin amah in Pasian ka it hi, ci thei ding ahi hiam?"

1John3:19 Tua ahih manin tu-a bangin i om leh a thuman Pasian tawh a kipawl ihihna le ama mai-ah lungmuang takin a omthei ding ihihna i thei ding hi. 
1John3:20 I lungsimah ei mawh i kisak leh zong, eite’ lungsim theihna sangin Pasian’ theihna kicingzaw a, na khempeuh a thei ahihna zong i thei hi."

1John3:24 Pasian’ thupiakna a zui mi khempeuh, Pasian tawh om uh a, Pasian in zong amaute a ompih hi. Pasian in eite tungah a hong piak Kha Siangtho hangin Pasian in eite a hong ompihna thu i thei hi." 
1John4:1 Ka it lawmte aw, kha ka nei a ci mi khempeuh’ thugen um kei unla, tua thute Pasian kiang pan mah ahi hiam, ci-in kantel un. Bang hang hiam cih leh leitungah kamsang a kineihkhem tampi hong om khinta hi." 
1John4:1 Ka it lawmte aw, kha ka nei a ci mi khempeuh’ thugen um kei unla, tua thute Pasian kiang pan mah ahi hiam, ci-in kantel un. Bang hang hiam cih leh leitungah kamsang a kineihkhem tampi hong om khinta hi." 
1John4:2 Pasian’ Kha sawlna tawh thugente le adangte bangci khentheih ding na hi uh hiam cih leh: Jesuh Khrih pen mihing bangin hong pai hi, ci-in a gente khempeuh Pasian Kha’ lamlahna tawh thugen ahi hi." 
1John4:2 Pasian’ Kha sawlna tawh thugente le adangte bangci khentheih ding na hi uh hiam cih leh: Jesuh Khrih pen mihing bangin hong pai hi, ci-in a gente khempeuh Pasian Kha’ lamlahna tawh thugen ahi hi." 
1John4:3 Ahi zongin hih thu a nial mi peuhmah, Pasian Kha’ sawlna tawh thugen hi lo uh hi. Hih bang mite pen Khrih’ Gal hi a, hong pai ding hi, ci-in na zaksa uh mah bangin tu-in leitungah a hong om khinta ahi uh hi." 
1John4:3 Ahi zongin hih thu a nial mi peuhmah, Pasian Kha’ sawlna tawh thugen hi lo uh hi. Hih bang mite pen Khrih’ Gal hi a, hong pai ding hi, ci-in na zaksa uh mah bangin tu-in leitungah a hong om khinta ahi uh hi." 
1John4:4 Ka it tate aw, note, Pasian’ mite na hi uh a, tua bang kamsang kineihkhemte a zokhin na hi uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh leitung mite a panpih dawimangpa sangin note hong ompih Pasian vanglian zaw hi." 
1John4:4 Ka it tate aw, note, Pasian’ mite na hi uh a, tua bang kamsang kineihkhemte a zokhin na hi uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh leitung mite a panpih dawimangpa sangin note hong ompih Pasian vanglian zaw hi." 
1John4:5 Kamsang a kineihkhemte in leitung thu gen uh a, amaute pen Pasian a thei lo hih leitung mite tawh kipawl uh ahih manin leitung mite in amau’ thugen a ngai uh hi." 
1John4:5 Kamsang a kineihkhemte in leitung thu gen uh a, amaute pen Pasian a thei lo hih leitung mite tawh kipawl uh ahih manin leitung mite in amau’ thugen a ngai uh hi." 
1John4:6 Ahi zongin note pen Pasian’ mite na hi uh hi. Pasian a thei mi peuhmah in kote’ thugen hong ngai uh a, Pasian’ pawl ahi lo mi peuhmah in kote’ thugen hong ngai lo uh hi. Tua ahih manin hih bangin thuman Kha le zuau kha a kilamdanna i theithei hi."

1John4:7 Ka it lawmte aw, Pasian pen itna hong piankhiatna bulpi ahih manin eite khatlekhat ki-it ni. Itna a nei mi peuhmah, Pasian’ tate hi a, Pasian a thei uh hi." 
1John4:7 Ka it lawmte aw, Pasian pen itna hong piankhiatna bulpi ahih manin eite khatlekhat ki-it ni. Itna a nei mi peuhmah, Pasian’ tate hi a, Pasian a thei uh hi." 
1John4:8 Pasian pen ki-itna ahih manin itna a nei lo mite in Pasian thei lo uh hi.

1John4:9 Pasian in eite hong itna hong bangci lah hiam cih leh: Ama hangin eite in nuntakna i ngahtheih nadingin a Tapa neihsun Pasian in leitungah a hong paisak hi. 
1John4:10 Hih ka gen itna pen eite in Pasian i itna thu hi lo a, Pasian in eite hong itin, i mawhna a maitheih nadingin a Tapa a hong paisakna thu ahi hi." 
1John4:10 Hih ka gen itna pen eite in Pasian i itna thu hi lo a, Pasian in eite hong itin, i mawhna a maitheih nadingin a Tapa a hong paisakna thu ahi hi."

3John1:10 Tua ahih manin kong pai ciangin kote hong gensiatna, zuauthu a genna, le a gamtatna khempeuh ka pholak ding hi. Tua bang mi gensiatna ciang bek hi loin, i Khristian mipihte zin nangawn tungsak nuam lo a, zin a tungsak nuamte nangawn khamin, pawlpi panin hawlkhiat ding hanciam lai hi." 
3John1:10 Tua ahih manin kong pai ciangin kote hong gensiatna, zuauthu a genna, le a gamtatna khempeuh ka pholak ding hi. Tua bang mi gensiatna ciang bek hi loin, i Khristian mipihte zin nangawn tungsak nuam lo a, zin a tungsak nuamte nangawn khamin, pawlpi panin hawlkhiat ding hanciam lai hi." 
3John1:11 Ka hong it lawm Gaias aw, mi hoih lote’ gamtatna zui kei inla, mihoihte’ gamtatna zui in. A gamtat hoih mite pen Pasian tawh a kipawl mi hi a, a gamtat hoih lo mite pen Pasian a thei nai lo ahi uh hi." 
3John1:11 Ka hong it lawm Gaias aw, mi hoih lote’ gamtatna zui kei inla, mihoihte’ gamtatna zui in. A gamtat hoih mite pen Pasian tawh a kipawl mi hi a, a gamtat hoih lo mite pen Pasian a thei nai lo ahi uh hi." 
3John1:12 Mi khempeuh in Demetrias phatkim uh a, a manin ama gamtatna mahmah in hih thu a manna hong kilangsak hi. Kote in zong ama hoihna ka thei uh a, tua ama hoihna ka gennate uh a thuman ahi hi." 
3John1:12 Mi khempeuh in Demetrias phatkim uh a, a manin ama gamtatna mahmah in hih thu a manna hong kilangsak hi. Kote in zong ama hoihna ka thei uh a, tua ama hoihna ka gennate uh a thuman ahi hi." 
3John1:13 Gen ding tampi ka neih hangin lai-in gelhkhiat ding kong sawm kei zaw hi. 
3John1:13 Gen ding tampi ka neih hangin lai-in gelhkhiat ding kong sawm kei zaw hi. 
3John1:14 Nang tawh kimu baih thei dingin kilamen ka hih manin, tuahun ciangin maitang kimu-in i kiho ding hi."

3John1:15 Nangma tungah nopsakna thupha hong tung tahen. Hih lai-a om i lawmte in hong hopih uh hi. Tua lai-a om i lawmte khempeuh a milipin na hopihsak in. 
3John1:15 Nangma tungah nopsakna thupha hong tung tahen. Hih lai-a om i lawmte in hong hopih uh hi. Tua lai-a om i lawmte khempeuh a milipin na hopihsak in. 
Jude1:1 Jesuh Khrih’ sila ka hih banah James’ nau keimah Jude in: Pasian’ sapna hangin Jesuh Khrih kepna sungah Pasian itna tawh a om mite tungah lai ka hong khak hi. 
Jude1:1 Jesuh Khrih’ sila ka hih banah James’ nau keimah Jude in: Pasian’ sapna hangin Jesuh Khrih kepna sungah Pasian itna tawh a om mite tungah lai ka hong khak hi. 
Jude1:2 Note khempeuh tungah hehpihna, le itna thupha tampi tak hong tung tahen." 
Jude1:3 Ka itte aw, eite in i ngahkhawm hotkhiatna thu, note kiangah gelh nuam mahmahin ka om laitakin Pasian in ama mite tungah a tawntungin a kimang dingin khatvei bek a hong piak upna thu-ah note in na nawksuak nadingun hanthotna gelh ding a kisapna thu ka phawk hi." 
Jude1:4 Bang hang hiam cih leh Pasian’ thu a ngaihsun lo mi pawlkhat, eite lakah kuama phawk lohin hong lutsim uh a, amaute’ mawh gamtat ngamnate a seelna-un Pasian’ hehpihna thupha a lehlamin hei-in, eite in khat bek i neih i Mangpa le i Topa ahi Jesuh Khrih a nial uh hi. Hih bang mite’ gimthuak ding thu tanglai pekin Lai Siangtho in a gensa thu ahi hi." 
Jude1:5 Note in na theihsa uh ahi ta zongin ka hong phawksak nop thu in: Topa in Egypt gam panin Israel mite honkhia khin napi-in amah a um lo mite a nung ciangin susiagawp hi. 
Jude1:6 Amau’ aana neih huamsung bekah om loin a omna panun a paikhia vantung mite zong leinuai khuamial sungah sikkol kibulhin amau’ thu a kikhen ding Ni lianpi ngakin Pasian in a koihcip hi. 
Jude1:7 Sodom khua le Gomorrah khua le a kiima om khuapi mite zong tua vantung mite mah bangin gamta uh a, numei tawh mawhnopna bek tham loin pasal le pasal kilunggulhna ciang dong nei uh ahih manin midangte’ etteh dingin tawntung meikuang a thuak uh hi." 
Jude1:8 Tua mite mah bangin hih mite zong thumu-in kinei-in amau pumpi thanghuaisak uh a, Pasian’ thu nialin tunglam a om minthanna a neite a simmawhbawl uh hi." 
Jude1:9 Vantung milian pa Mikhael nangawn tua bangin gamta ngam lo hi. Moses’ luanghawm kituhin Dawimangpa tawh a kitot laitakin Mikhael in Dawimangpa zahkona kammal zang ngam loin, “Topa in nang hong taii ta hen,” ci bek hi." 
Jude1:10 Ahi zongin hih mite in a theihtel loh uh thute simmawhbawl uh a, ganhing bangin a pianpih lungsim uh tawh gamta uh ahih manin siatna thuaklawh uh hi." 
Jude1:11 Hih mite a dingin dahhuai mahmah hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Kain’ gamtat bangin gamta-in, sum ngaihsutna-in Balaam’ khialh bangin khial uh a, Korah’ lehdo bangin lehdo-in siatna thuak uh hi." 
Jude1:12 Note’ annek khopna-ah zumna mel nei loin hong omgawp uh ahih manin hong siatsuah uh a, amau’ pumpi bek ngaihsun uh hi. Amaute pen cikmahin guah a zusak ngei lo, huih in a letkhiatmang meiipi, tuk hun laitak nangawnin a gah a gah lo, kizunglotin a keutum singkungte," 
Jude1:13 a sepna uh tawh amau mah’ maizum nading a piangsak tuipi hualte, le Pasian in amaute’ om nadingin leisung khuamial thukpi a koihsak tawntung, a lampial aksite tawh kibang bek uh hi." 
Jude1:14 Tanglai pekin Adam pan khang sagihna Enok in zong hih thu mah na genkhol a, a genna-ah, “En un, Topa, a mi siangtho honpite tawh hong pai ding a," 
Jude1:15 Pasian’ deihna bangin a gamtat lohna hang uh le kam hoih lopipi zangin Pasian a gensiatnate uh hangin Pasian’ deihna bangin a gamta lo mite tungah thu khenin mawhsakna pia ding hi,” na ci hi." 
Jude1:16 Hih mite a tawntungin phunin khatlekhat mawhna kizong uh a, amau pumpi deihna bangun gamta-in kiphasak uh a, phattuamna a ngah theih nadingun midangte a phat uh hi." 
Jude1:17 Ahi zongin ka itte aw, i Topa Jesuh Khrih’ sawltakte in note tungah hong gensa thute na phawk un." 
Jude1:18 Amaute in note kiangah, “Hun nunung lam ciangin Pasian’ deihna tawh a kituak lo amau pumpi deihna zui-in note a hong simmawhbawl mi pawlkhat hong piang ding hi,” hong ci uh hi." 
Jude1:19 Hih mite in pawl kikhenna piangsakin, amau pumpi deihna bangin gamta uh a, Kha Siangtho zong nei lo uh hi." 
Jude1:20 Ahi zongin ka it note ahihleh a siangtho na upna uhah na kip semsem unla, Kha Siangtho vangliatna tawh thu na ngen un." 
Jude1:21 I Topa Jesuh Khrih in a hong hehpihna tawh nuntak tawntungna hong piak ding na ngakkawmun Pasian’ itna sungah na kip un. 
Jude1:22 A um taktak zo lote hehpih unla," 
Jude1:23 meiphual sung panin dawhkhiat bangin midangte na honkhia un. Mi pawlkhatte’ mawhna-ah note zong na siatkhak loh nadingun kidop kawmna tawh na huh unla, amau’ gamtat hoih lo mawhnate na mudah un." 
Jude1:24 Ama minthanna mai-ah paubaanna om hetloin lungdam takin a hong paipih theih nadingin note na pukkhak nading panun a hong kem," 
Jude1:25 khat bek ahi eite a hong Hon Pasian in, tuma, tu laitak, le a tawntungin, minthanna, vangliatna, uk zawhna, le aana nei tawntung tahen. Amen." 
Revelation1:1 Hih laibu pen a piang baih ding thute, Pasian’ nasemte tungah a lah dingin Pasian in Jesuh tungah a thu pia a, Jesuh in maang sungah a lah thute ahi hi. Khrih in ama vantungmi sawl a, a nasempa Johan kiangah hih thute a kilangsak hi." 
Revelation1:2 Johan in zong a muhsa thu khempeuh na gen leuleu hi. Hih thute pen Johan in Pasian kiang panin hong pai thute le Jesuh Khrih in ama tungah a lahkhiat thuman thutakte a genna thu ahi hi. 
Revelation1:3 Hih laibu a sim mite mi hampha hi a, hih thu kigente ngai-in, hih laibu sungah a kigelh thu a zuite zong mi hampha mah ahi uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh hih thu kigente a tun ding hun hong naita hi." 
Revelation1:4 Johan in Asia gam sungah a om pawlpi sagihte tungah a khak lai ahi hi. A beisa hun, tuhun, le mailam hunah a om tawntung Pasian kiang pan le ama tokhom mai-ah a om Kha Siangtho sagihte tung pan le," 
Revelation1:5 thuman takin teci a pang, sihna panin a kithokiksak Tapa upa, leitung kumpite tungah ukna aana a nei Jesuh Khrih kiang panin note tungah hehpihna le nopsakna thupha hong tung tahen. Tua Jesuh Khrih in eite hong it a, ama sihna tawh i mawhna panin eite hong suaktasak a," 
Revelation1:6 ama Pa Pasian’ na a sem dingin siampi le kumpi za-ah a hong koih hi. Tua Jesuh in minthanna le vangliatna nei tawntung tahen. Amen. 
Revelation1:7 En un, amah hong paita ding a, meiipi tawh hong tonkhawm ding hi. Teipi tawh amah a sunte a kipan mi khempeuh in a mu ding uh hi. Amah a hong pai ciangin leitung mi khempeuh lau-in a kap ding uh hi. Hih ka gen bangin hong piang takpi ding hi. Amen." 
Revelation1:8 A beisa hun, tuhun, le mailam hunah zong a om tawntung ding a Vanglian Topa Pasian in, “Kei pen na khempeuh a Kipatna le a Tawpna ka hi hi,” a ci hi." 
Revelation1:9 Note’ sanggam keimah Johan in Jesuh tawh kipawlna hangin note mah bangin bawlsiatna thuakin, Pasian’ Ukna sungah omin, lungduai takin a thuak mipa ka hi hi. Pasian’ thu le Jesuh’ hong gen thumante ka genna hangin Patmos a kici tuikulh-ah kei hong kikoih hi." 
Revelation1:10 Topa’ ni-in Kha Siangtho tawh kidimin ka om laitakin peengkul bangin a gingpha mahmah khat ka nung lamah ka za a," 
Revelation1:11 “Na muhte khempeuh laibu sungah gelh inla, Efesa pawlpi, Smyrna pawlpi, Pergamum pawlpi, Thiatira pawlpi, Sardis pawlpi, Filadelfia pawlpi, Laodisia pawlpi, hih pawlpi sagihte kiangah khak in,” hong ci hi." 
Revelation1:12 Kua in kei hong hopih ahi hiam, ci-in a en dingin ka kihei leh kham kibawl meivakna sagih ka mu hi." 
Revelation1:13 Tua meivakte lakah, puantualpi khat silhin a awm-ah kham kibawl awmgak a gak, mi tawh a kibang khat ka mu hi." 
Revelation1:14 A samte tuumul bangin kangin, khuavak bangin pak a, a mittangte meikuang a bang hi." 
Revelation1:15 A khete, pumbukah a kihalsan sumngo bang a, a awging ahihleh tuipi ging a bang hi." 
Revelation1:16 A taklam khutah aksi sagih tawi-in, a kam sung panin langnih a hiam namsau khat hong pusuak a, a maitang sun nitaang a bang hi." 
Revelation1:17 Amah ka muh ciangin misi bangin ama khe phungah ka puk hi. Ahi zongin amah in ka tungah a taklam khut hong nga a, “Lau kei in; kei pen a kipatna le a tawpna ka hi a," 
Revelation1:18 a nungta mipa zong ka hi hi. Kei ka si ngei hi. Ahi zongin tu-in hong en in, a nungta tawntung ka hi hi. Sihna le misite omna gam keima khutnuai ahi uh hi." 
Revelation1:19 Tua ahih ciangin tu-a na muh, tu laitakin a om thute le tu nung ciangin a hong piang ding thute, lai sungah gelh in." 
Revelation1:20 Tu-in ka taklam khut sungah na muh aksi sagihte le kham kibawl meivakna sagihte a khiatna in: Aksi sagihte pen pawlpi sagihte’ vantung mite a cihna hi a, meivakna sagihte pen pawlpi sagihte a cihna ahi hi." 
Revelation2:1 “Efesa khua-a pawlpi vantungmi kiangah lai gelh inla, a taklam khutah aksi sagih tawi-in, kham kibawl meivakna lakah a pai kawikawi Jesuh’ thugenna hih bang ahi hi:" 
Revelation2:2 “Note’ nasepna, na gimna uh le lungduai takin na thuakna uh, le migilote koihmawk loin, sawltak hi lo napi-in sawltak hi ung, a ci mite dongtelin sawltak ahihlohna uh na muhkhiatnate uh ka thei hi." 
Revelation2:3 Note in lungduai takin thuakin, keima min hangin thuakzo-in, lungkia hetloin na omna uh ka thei hi." 
Revelation2:4 Ahi zongin note ka hong mawhsakna khat om a, tua in: A masa lai-a kei na hong it bangun tu-in na hong it nawn kei uh hi." 
Revelation2:5 Tua ahih manin na lampialna uh phawkin, na mawhna uh panin kihei unla, na gamtat ngeisa bangun gamta kik un. Na mawhna panun kihei-in na kisikkik kei uhleh note kiangah hong pai-in na meivakna uh ka hong lakkhiatsak ding hi." 
Revelation2:6 Ahi zongin note ka hong pahtakna khat om a, tua in: Keima muhdah mah bangin Nikolas pawlte na mudah uh hi." 
Revelation2:7 Tua ahih manin zak nading bil a neite in Kha Siangtho in pawlpite kiangah a gen thute na za un. A gualzo mite tungah, Pasian’ Huan sunga om nuntakna singgahte a nektheih nadingun thu ka pia ding hi." 
Revelation2:8 “Smyrna khua pawlpi vantungmi kiangah lai gelh inla, a kipatna le a tawpna, si ngei napi-in a hingkik pa’ thugen in:" 
Revelation2:9 Na lungkhamnate uh le na zawnnate uh ka thei hi. A taktakin note a hau na hi uh hi. Jew mi hi lo napi-in Jew mi ka hi uh hi, ci-in note a hong gensiatnate uh ka thei hi. Tua bang mite pen Satan’ pawlte ahi uh hi." 
Revelation2:10 Na thuak ding uh haksatnate kihta kei un. Dawimangpa in note pawlkhat thong sungah hong khia-in hong ze-et ding hi. Gimna na thuak hun ding uh ni sawm sung bek hi ding hi. Na sih dongun kei tungah hong citak un. Tua hileh nuntakna lukhu ka hong pia ding hi. 
Revelation2:11 Tua ahih manin zak nading bil a neite in Kha Siangtho in pawlpite kiangah a gen thute na za un. A gualzo mite, nihvei sihna in gimsakkha nawn lo ding hi." 
Revelation2:12 “Pergamum khua pawlpi vantungmi kiangah lai gelh inla, a langnihin a hiam mahmah namsau a nei pa’ thugen in:" 
Revelation2:13 Satan in a kumpi tokhom a phuhna munah a om na hih lamtak uh ka thei hi. Keima thu citakin teci a pang cinten Antipas, Satan’ omna munah a kithah hun laitak nangawnin kei na hong upna uh na khahsuah kei uh hi." 
Revelation2:14 Ahi zongin note ka hong mawhsak nading thu tawmkhat a om hi. Milim biakna ante nesakin, nulepa paktatna piangsak a, Israel mite mawhna a gamtasak Balak tungah thu a hilh Balaam’ thuhilhnate a um mi pawlkhat note lakah a om hi." 
Revelation2:15 Tua mah bangin Nikolas pawlte’ thuhilhna a um mi pawlkhat zong note lak mahah a om hi. 
Revelation2:16 Tua ahih manin na mawhna panun kisikkik un. Na kisik kei uhleh note kiangah kei hong pai baihin, ka kam panin a pusuak namsau tawh amaute ka do ding hi." 
Revelation2:17 Tua ahih manin zak nading bil a neite in Kha Siangtho in pawlpite kiangah a gen thute na za un. A gualzo mi tungah a kiselcip manna an pawlkhat le min thak a kigelhna suangkang khat ka pia ding hi. Tua suangkang pen a ngahte simloh kuamah dang in thei lo ding hi. 
Revelation2:18 “Thiatira khua pawlpi vantungmi kiangah lai gelh inla, meikuang tawh a kibang mittang nei-in sumngo kihalsan tawh a kibang khe a nei Pasian’ Tapa’ thugen in:" 
Revelation2:19 Note’ gamtatna, itna na neihna, upna na neihna, na nasepna, lungduai takin na thuakna uh, le a kipatcil lai sangin a nunung lamah na hoihzawknate uh ka thei hi." 
Revelation2:20 Ahi zongin note ka hong mawhsak nading thu khat om hi. Kamsang numei ka hi, ci-in thu a gen Jezebel na nial kei uh hi. Ama thuhilhna hangin ka nasemte in numei-pasal paktatna gamta-in milim biakna ante a ne uh hi." 
Revelation2:21 Tua numei a kisikkik nading hun ka piak hangin a paktatna panin kihei nuam lo hi. 
Revelation2:22 Tua ahih manin tu-in tua numei tawh a paktatna uh panin a kisikkik kei uhleh tua numei le amah tawh a paktat mi khempeuh, lupna ngaksakin nakpitakin gimna ka thuaksak ding hi." 
Revelation2:23 Tua numei’ thu a zui mi khempeuh ka that ding hi. Tua hileh, mihingte’ ngaihsutna le lungsim a kantel pa ka hihna thu pawlpi khempeuh in thei ding uh hi. Note’ gamtatna ciat tawh kizui-in ka hong thukkik ding hi." 
Revelation2:24 Ahi zongin Thiatira khua-a om note pawlkhat in tua numei’ thuhilhna hoih lote na zui kei uh a, mite in, ‘Satan’ thu thukpite hi,’ a cih thute na sukha kei uh hi. Note tungah vangik bangmah ka hong suan kei ding hi." 
Revelation2:25 Ka hong pai matengin na neihsateng uh na lenkip ta un. 
Revelation2:26 A gualzo, a tawp dongin keima deihna bangin a gamtazo mite tungah, keimah in ka Pa tung panin ka ngah vangliatnate mah ka pia ding hi. Minam dangte tungah ukna a neih nading uh aana ka pia ding a, leibeel satkhap bangin sik ciangkhut tawh minam dangte satgawp ding uh hi." 
Revelation2:27  
Revelation2:28 Amaute tungah zingsol zong ka pia ding hi. 
Revelation2:29 Tua ahih manin zak nading bil a neite in Kha Siangtho in pawlpite kiangah a gen thute na za un. 
Revelation3:1 “Sardis khua pawlpi vantungmi kiangah lai gelh inla, Pasian Kha Siangtho sagih le aksi sagih a nei pa’ thugen in: Note’ gamtatnate ka thei a, note a si hinapi-in a hing min na pua uh hi." 
Revelation3:2 Tua ahih manin khua phawk unla, na neihlai sunte uh a beimang ma-in thasanpha kik un. Bang hang hiam cih leh na nasepnate uh Pasian’ muhna-ah a cingtaak nai het lo ahihna thu ka thei hi." 
Revelation3:3 Tua ahih manin note a hong kihilh na zaksa uh thute phawkkik unla, tua thute zui-in na mawhna panun kisik kik un. Khua na phawk kei uhleh note kiangah guta bangin ka hong pai ding a, ka hong tunlam nangawn na thei kei ding uh hi." 
Revelation3:4 Ahi zongin Sardis khuasunga om note lakah a puan a ninsak nai lo tawmkhat na om uh hi. Tua bang mite kilawm uh ahih manin kei tawh puanpak silhin ka tonkhawm ding uh hi. 
Revelation3:5 A gualzo mite in tua bangin puanpak silh ding uh a, a nungta mite a kikhumna laibu sung panin amaute’ min ka phiat kei ding hi. Ka Pa le ama vantung mite kiangah zong keima mite ahihna uh ka pulak ding hi." 
Revelation3:6 Tua ahih manin zak nading bil a neite in Kha Siangtho in pawlpite kiangah a gen thute na za un. 
Revelation3:7 “Filadelfia khua pawlpi vantungmi kiangah lai gelh inla, David’ tawhtang kemin, ama honsa kong kuamah in a khak zawh loh, ama khaksa kong kuamah in a hon zawh loh, a thuman a siangthopa’ thugen in:" 
Revelation3:8 Note’ nasepnate ka thei hi. Na tha uh a hat loh hangin ka thu zui-in kei tungah na hong cihtakna uh ka thei hi. Tua ahih manin kuamah in a khak zawh loh ding kong, note’ mai-ah honsa-in ka koih hi." 
Revelation3:9 Jew mi hi lo napi-in Jew mi hi ung, ci-in zuau a gen Satan’ pawlte, note’ mai-ah hong paisakin na khephung uhah ka boksak ding a, note ka hong itna thu amaute ka theisak ding hi." 
Revelation3:10 Note in lungduai takin na thuak nading uh ka hong thupiakna zui na hih manun leitung a a om mi khempeuh ze-et nadingin leitung bupah a hong tung ding lungkhamna panin kei zong note ka hong suaktasak ding hi. 
Revelation3:11 Keimah ka hong pai baih ding hi. Kuamah in, na ngah ding uh gualzawhna lukhu hong tuhkhak loh nadingun na neihsate uh hoihtakin na lenkip un." 
Revelation3:12 A gualzote pen ka Pasian’ sutpi-in ka bawl ding a, amaute paikhia ngei nawn lo ding uh hi. Amaute tungah ka Pasian’ min le ka Pasian kiang vantung panin a hong paisuk ding Jerusalem khua thak min ka gelh ding a, amaute tungah keima min thak zong ka gelh ding hi." 
Revelation3:13 Tua ahih manin zak nading bil a neite in Kha Siangtho in pawlpite kiangah a gen thute na za un. 
Revelation3:14 “Laodisia khua pawlpi vantungmi kiangah lai gelh inla, thuman le citakin teci a pang, Pasian’ piansakte khempeuh a kipatna ahi Amen’ thugen in:" 
Revelation3:15 Note’ gamtatnate ka thei a, vot lah vot vet lo, sa lah sa vet loin na omna uh zong ka thei hi. A vot na hih kei uhleh a sa hi vet le-uhcin ka ut hi." 
Revelation3:16 Ahi zongin note pen vot lah vot vet lo, sa lah sa vet loin a laklawhin om na hih manun ka kam sung panin ka hong siakhia ding hi." 
Revelation3:17 Note a zawng, a mittaw, puansilh ding a nei lo, a hehpihhuai, a lungkhamhuai na hih lamtak uh thei loin, kote hau-in ka cithei uh a, bangmah kisapna ka nei kei uh hi, na ci uh hi." 
Revelation3:18 Tua ahih manin na hauhtheih nadingun kei kiang panin kham citak hong lei-in a zumhuaipi-in guaktanga na omna uh na kisel nadingun puanpak hong lei unla, khua na muhtheih nadingun mit zatui hong lei un." 
Revelation3:19 Ka it mite thuhilhin ka taii hi. Tua ahih manin lungsim tak tawh na mawhna panun kisik kik un. 
Revelation3:20 Kongkhakah dingin kong ka hong kiu hi. Ka aw za-in kong hong honte kiangah lutin an ka nekhawm ding uh hi. 
Revelation3:21 Keimah zong gualzo-in ka Pa’ tokhomah ka tutkhawm uh mah bangin a gualzote khempeuh zong kei tawh ka tokhom tungah hong tutkhawm theih nadingun thu ka pia ding hi. 
Revelation3:22 Tua ahih manin zak nading bil a neite in Kha Siangtho in pawlpite kiangah a gen thute na za un, ci-in gen in,” a hong ci hi." 
Revelation4:1 Hih thuteng khit ciangin ka khuadak leh vantungah kong a kihongsa-in a om ka mu hi. Peengkul awging tawh a kibang, kei kiangah thu a hong gensa awging mah in, “Hih lai-ah hong paito in. Tunung ciangin thupiang dingte ka hong lak ding hi,” hong ci hi." 
Revelation4:2 Thakhat thu-in Kha Siangtho tawh ka kidim a, tua vantung a tokhom tungah mi khat a tu ka mu hi." 
Revelation4:3 Tua tokhom tungah a tupa pen Jasper le Karnelian suangmanpha bangin taang ziazua a, a tokhom kimkot pen Emerald suangmanpha bangin suum pempam hi." 
Revelation4:4 Tua tokhom kimkotah tokhom sawmnih le li om a, tuate tungah puanpak silhin kham lukhu a khu upa sawmnih le lite tu uh hi." 
Revelation4:5 Tua tokhom panin khuaphialep hong taangkhia-in, awging le vanging hong kipankhia a, a tokhom mai-ah Pasian’ kha ahi meivak sagih a kivak hi." 
Revelation4:6 A tokhom mailam tengah Kristal suangmanpha bangin a siang kilkel, limlang peekpi kiphah tuipi bangin a dum dide hi. Tua tokhom kiim a pang ciatah a nung le a mai-ah mit a dimin a nei ganhing li a om hi." 
Revelation4:7 A ganhing a khatna pen humpinelkai tawh kibang a, a nihna bawngtal tawh kibang a, a thumna in mihing maitang nei a, a lina pen muvanlai a leeng lai tawh kibang hi." 
Revelation4:8 Tua ganhing lite in kha guk ciat nei-in, tua a khate’ sunglam le a pualamah mittang a dimtakin om a, a sun a zan tawlnga loin la sa uh a, “A beisa, tuhun, le a tawntungin a om Vanglian Topa Pasian, siangtho hi, siangtho hi, siangtho hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Revelation4:9 Tua ganhingte in a nungta tawntung, tokhom tungah a tupa tungah a lungdamna uh ko-in pahtawi-in a phat simun" 
Revelation4:10 nungta tawntungin tokhom tungah a tupa mai-ah tua upa sawmnih le lite zong bokin amah bia uh a, tua tokhom mai-ah a lukhute uh lawnin la sa uh a," 
Revelation4:11 “Kote’ Topa Pasian aw, nangmah in na khempeuh piangsakin, nangma deihna bangin na khempeuh omin, na khempeuh kipiangsak ahih manin, minthanna, pahtawina, le vangliatna na ngah tawntung dingin a kilawm hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Revelation5:1 Tua ciangin, tokhom tungah a tupa in a taklam khutah a tawi laizial tawn khat ka mu hi. Tua a laidal tung a langnih tuakah lai kigelhin a kizialcip khit ciangin a kiphel theih loh nadingin mun sagih-ah kiciamteh hi." 
Revelation5:2 Tua ciangin a thahat vantungmi khat ka mu a, amah in nakpitakin, “Hih laizial a ciamtehnate lakhia-in a laizial a phel dingin a kilawm kua om ahi hiam?” hong ci hi." 
Revelation5:3 Ahi zongin tua laizial a phel ding mi, vantung, leitung, leinuai-ah kuamah kimu lo hi." 
Revelation5:4 Tua laizial phelin a sung a en dingin a kilawm kuamah kimu lo ahih manin nakpitakin ka kap hi. 
Revelation5:5 Tua laitakin upate khat in kei kiangah, “Kap kei in. Judah minam sung panin Humpinelkai, David suan sung panin a lianpa gualzo khinta a, tua laizial ciaptehna sagihte lakhia-in a laizial phelthei ding hi,” a hong ci hi." 
Revelation5:6 Tua upate’ huamsung, ganhing lite le kumpi tokhom kikalah Tuuno a ding ka mu hi. Tua Tuuno pen a kigo lumsa tawh kibang a, leitung khempeuhah a kisawlkhia, Pasian’ khate’ lim ahi ki sagih le mittang sagih a nei hi." 
Revelation5:7 Tua Tuuno va pai a, tokhom tungah a tupa in a taklamah a tawi laizial a va la hi." 
Revelation5:8 Tua laizial a lak khit ciangin ganhing lite le upa sawmnih le lite, Topa’ mai-ah a kun uh hi. Amaute in harp lasakna khat ciat le Pasian’ mi siangthote in thungetna-in a zat uh paknamtui a dimin a om paknamtui beel khat ciat a tawi uh hi." 
Revelation5:9 Amaute inla thak khat sa uh a, “Nang Tuuno, tua laizial a lakhia ding le a ciamtehnate a lakhia dingin na kilawm hi. Nang hong kigo khin ahih manin mi namkim le pau namkim a pau mite sung panin na sisan tawh Pasian a dingin mite na lei khin a," 
Revelation5:10 Pasian’ na a sem dingin siampi za le kumpi za na pia a, amaute in leitung ukin a om ding uh hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Revelation5:11 Tua ciangin ka khuadak leh tokhom le ganhing lite le upate’ kimkotah atul-amakin a ding miaimuai vantung mite’ awging ka za hi. 
Revelation5:12 Amaute in nakpitakin la sa uh a, “A kigo Tuuno in vangliatna le hauhna, pilna le thahatna, pahtawina, minthanna, le phatna, a ngah dingin kilawm hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Revelation5:13 Tua ciangin vantung, leitung, leinuai, tuipi sung le mun khempeuhah a om nuntakna a nei khempeuh inla a sakna uh ka za a, amaute in, “Tokhom tungah a tupa le Tuuno in phatna, pahtawina, minthanna le vangliatna, ngah tawntung ta hen,” a ci uh hi." 
Revelation5:14 Tua ciangin ganhing lite in zong, “Amen,” na ci uh a, upate in zong khukdinin Pasian a bia uh hi." 
Revelation6:1 Tua ciangin Tuuno in tua ciaptehna sagih sung panin khat a honkhiat ka mu hi. Tua laitakin ganhing lite sung panin khat in vanging bangin nakpitakin, “Hong pai in,” a cihna ka za hi." 
Revelation6:2 Ka khuadak leh sakol kang khat hong pai a, a tungah a tuang pa in thal khat a tawi hi. Ama tungah lukhu khat kipia a, a gualzo pa hihna tawh a gualzo dingin a kuankhia hi." 
Revelation6:3 Ciamtehna a nihna a hon ciangin ganhing a nihna in, “Hong pai in,” a cihna ka za hi." 
Revelation6:4 Sakol a ausan khat hong pai a, mite khatlekhat a kithah theih nadingun a sakol tung tuang pa in leitungah galkidona a piansak theih nading vangliatna kipia a, ama tungah namsau lian mahmah khat zong kipia lai hi." 
Revelation6:5 Ciamtehna a thumna a hon ciangin ganhing a thumna in, “Hong pai in,” a cihna ka za hi. Sakol vom khat hong pai ka mu a, a tungah a tuang pa in a khutah tawitehna a tawi hi." 
Revelation6:6 Tua ganhing lite lak panin awging bang khat ka za a, “Mangbuh lawhta khat in ni khat tha man a, mangbuhham lawhta thum in ni khat tha mah man hi. Ahi zongin oliv huan le leenggui huan susia kei in,” a ci hi." 
Revelation6:7 Ciamtehna a lina a hon ciangin ganhing a lina in, “Hong pai in,” a cihna ka za hi." 
Revelation6:8 Ka khuadak leh sakol puang khat ka mu a, a tungah a tuang pa’ min pen Sihna hi a, a nungah Hell in a zui hi. Amaute in namsau, kialpi, pulnatna, le gamsate tawh leitung mi sehlisuah sehkhat a thahtheih nadingun thu a kipia hi." 
Revelation6:9 Ciamtehna ngana a hon ciangin Pasian’ thu a genna hang le Pasian’ thu citakin teci a panna uh hangin a kithat mite’ kha, biakna tau nuai-ah a om ka mu hi." 
Revelation6:10 Amaute nakpitakin kiko uh a, “A thuman, a siangtho, a Vanglian Topa aw, leitungah a omlai, kote a hong that mite tungah cik ciangin thu khenin, kote hong thahna hangin cik ciangin phu la ding na hi hiam?” a ci uh hi." 
Revelation6:11 Tua ciangin amaute tungah puantualpi a kang khat ciat kipia a, amaute a kithah mah bangin a kithat lai ding a naseppihte uh le a sanggamte uh a kim matengin tawlkhat sung a tawlngak lai nading uh kigen hi." 
Revelation6:12 Ciamtehna gukna a hon ciangin ka khuadak le nakpitakin zin hong ling a, ni pen puanvom bangin hong vomin, kha pen sisan bangin a hong san hi." 
Revelation6:13 Aksite ahihleh huihpi in theipuam a mutkhiat bangin van panin kia zaizai uh hi. 
Revelation6:14 Laidal a kizial bangin vanpi kizialin maimang a, mual le tuikulhte khempeuh a omna uh panin maimangta hi." 
Revelation6:15 Tua ciangin leitung kumpite le miliante, galkapmangte, mihaute le mi vangliante, silate le sila ahi lote a kipanin a kuamah peuh, mualtung a leihawmte sungah bu uh a," 
Revelation6:16 mualte le suangtum lianpite kiangah, “Kote tungah hong kiasuk unla, tokhom tungah a tupa’ maitang le Tuuno’ hehna panin kote hong liah un." 
Revelation6:17 Amaute’ hehna hangin gimna hun hong tungta ahih manin kua in thuakzo ding ahi hiam?” a ci uh hi. 
Revelation7:1 Tua khit ciangin leitung kiu li-ah vantungmi li, kiu khatah khat ciat dingin leitung, tuipi tung, le singkung khat peuhpeuh a mutkhak loh nadingin leitung huih lite lencipin a om uh ka mu hi." 
Revelation7:2 Tua ciangin a nungta Pasian’ ciaptehna a tawi vantungmi khat, nisuahna lam panin hong paito ka mu hi. Leitung le tuipi suksiat theih nading vangliatna a kipia vantungmi lite kiangah amah in nakpitakin gen a," 
Revelation7:3 “I Pasian’ nasemte, a taltang uhah ciaptehna i bawl khit matengin leitung, tuipi, le singkungte susia nai kei in,” a ci hi." 
Revelation7:4 Israel mite sung panin a nam namin Pasian’ ciaptehna tawh a taltang uhah a kiciamteh mi a vekpi-in 144,000 pha hi, ci-in hong kigen hi." 
Revelation7:5 Tuate pen Israel minam sawm le nih sungah nam khatah then khat tulnih ciat hi a, tua minamte pen Judah minam, Reuben minam, Gad minam, Asher minam, Naftali minam, Manasseh minam, Simeon minam, Levi minam, Issakhar minam, Zebulun minam, Josef minam, le Benjamin minam ahi uh hi."
