Revelation7:10 Amaute nakpitakin awngin, “Tokhom tungah a tu i Pasian le Tuuno pen eite a hong honkhia ahi uh hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Revelation7:11 Tokhom, upate, le ganhing lite kimkotah vantungmi khempeuh dingin tokhom mai ngatin kunin Pasian bia uh a," 
Revelation7:12 “Amen! Eite’ Pasian in phatna, minthanna, pilna, lungdamkohna, pahtawina, vangliatna, le hatna a tawntungin nei ta hen! Amen,” a ci uh hi." 
Revelation7:13 Tua laitakin upate khat in keima kiangah, “Hih puanpak a silh mite kuate hi a, koi lai panin hong pai ahi uh hiam?” ci-in hong dot ciangin," 
Revelation7:14 “Ka thei kei hi, topa aw. Nangmah in na theizaw ding hi,” ka ci hi. Tua ciangin amah in keima kiangah, “Hih mite pen bawlsiatna lianpi thuakin a hong suakta mite ahi uh hi. Amaute in a puan uh sawpsiangin Tuuno sisan tawh a paaksak uh ahi hi." 
Revelation7:15 Tua ahih manin Pasian’ tokhom mai-ah amaute ding uh a, sun le zanin a biakinn sungah ama na sem uh hi. Tokhom tungah a tupa in amaute ompihin a hu ding hi." 
Revelation7:16 Amaute gilkial cih om nawn lo ding a, a dang uh zong taak nawn lo ding hi. Nisa zong thuakkha nawn lo ding uh a, a sa in zong kangkha nawn lo ding hi." 
Revelation7:17 Bang hang hiam cih leh Tokhom laizangah a om Tuuno, amaute a kem pa hi ding a, nuntakna tui omna-ah amaute paipih ding a, Pasian in a khitui khempeuh uh nulsak ding hi,” hong ci hi." 
Revelation8:1 Tuuno in ciaptehna sagihna a hon ciangin vantungah nai lang sung bang kidai dide hi. 
Revelation8:2 Tua ciangin Pasian mai-ah a ding vantungmi sagihte ka mu a, amaute tungah peengkul sagih a kipia hi." 
Revelation8:3 Tua ciangin kham kibawl paknamtui kuang a tawi vantungmi adang khat hong pai-in biakna tau mai-ah a ding hi. Pasian’ mite in thungetna-in a zat paknamtuite tawh hal beh ding le tokhom mai-ah a om kham kibawl biakna tau tungah piak dingin amaute tungah paknamtui tampi tak a kipia hi. 
Revelation8:4 Pasian’ mai-ah a ding vantung mipa’ khutsung panin paknamtui khu le Pasian’ mite’ thungetna van lam manawhin kizialto hi. 
Revelation8:5 Tua ciangin tua vantungmi in paknamtui kuang la a, biakna tau panin mei-am la-in a sungah a koih khit ciangin leitungah lawnsuk a, nakpitakin van gingin zin ling a, khua phia-in keek a kia hi." 
Revelation8:6 Tu-in peengkul sagih a tawi vantungmi sagihte a peengkul uh a tum dingin hong kithawi uh hi. 
Revelation8:7 A masa vantungmi in a peengkul hong tum a, gialpi le mei, sisan tawh kihelin leitungah a kiasuk hi. Leitung sehthumsuah sehkhat, le lopa hing sehthumsuah sehkhat a kangtum hi." 
Revelation8:8 A nihna vantungmi in a peengkul hong tum a, mual lianpi tawh a kibang, mei in kangin a kuang zuazua khat, tuipi sungah kilawnsuk hi." 
Revelation8:9 Tuipi sehthumsuah sehkhat sisan suakin, tuipi sunga om ganhingte sehthumsuah sehkhat si a, teembaw sehthumsuah sehkhat a kisia hi." 
Revelation8:10 A thumna vantungmi in a peengkul hong tum a, vantung panin aksi lian khat meikuang bangin hong kiasukin gunte le tuinakte sehthumsuah sehkhat tungah a tu hi." 
Revelation8:11 Tua aksi a min Gamsai hi a, tui sehthumsuah sehkhat gamsai tui suak a, tua tui khasak ahih manin a dawn mi tampi tak a si uh hi." 
Revelation8:12 A lina vantungmi in a peengkul hong tum a, ni sehthumsuah sehkhat kisatkhia-in, kha zong sehthumsuah sehkhat mah kisatkhia a, aksi zong sehthumsuah sehkhat mah kisatkhia ahih manin a taanna uh sehthumsuah sehkhat ciat a bei hi. Sunin hun sehthumsuah sehkhat tang khua vak lo a, zanin zong hun sehthumsuah sehkhat tang mah kha le aksi taang lo hi." 
Revelation8:13 Tua ciangin ka khuadak leh vankim lai-ah muvanlai khat a leenkawmin nakpi-in ham a, “Vantung mi adang thumte in a hong tum lai ding peengkulte hangin leitungah a teng mi tungah gimna, gimna, gimna lianpi hong tung ding hi,” a cihna ka za hi." 
Revelation9:1 Tua ciangin a ngana vantungmi in a peengkul hong tum a, vantung panin leitungah aksi khat a leengsuk ka mu hi. Tua aksi tungah kuahawm thukpi honna tawhtang a kipia hi." 
Revelation9:2 Amah in tua kuahawm thukpi a hon ciangin meiphualpi panin meikhu bangin meikhu tampi hong pusuak a, tua meikhu hangin ni mialin khim a zing hi." 
Revelation9:3 Tua meikhu sung panin kauphete hong pusuakin leitungah pai uh a, momaite’ neih bangin a gupha mahmah amaute tungah a kipia hi." 
Revelation9:4 Amaute in lopate, singkungte a kipan a hing khat peuhpeuh bangmah cih loin, a taltang uhah Pasian’ ciaptehna a om lo mite bek a gimsak nadingun thu a kipia hi." 
Revelation9:5 Amaute in tua bang mite that loin kha nga sung a bawlsiat nading uh thu kipia a, amaute’ bawlsiatna pen momai in mi a deh ciangin a na tawh kibangin a na velval ahi hi." 
Revelation9:6 Tua hun ciangin mite in a sihtheih nading uh a zonzon uh hangin sihtheih nading lampi mu lo ding uh a, sinuam mahmah napi-un sithei het lo ding uh hi." 
Revelation9:7 Tua kauphete’ pianzia pen galsim dingin a kithawi sakolte tawh kibang uh hi. A lu tung uhah kham lukhu tawh a kibang khu uh a, a maitang uh mihing maitang tawh a kibang hi." 
Revelation9:8 A sam uh numei sam tawh kibang a, a ha uh humpinelkai ha tawh a kibang hi." 
Revelation9:9 A awm uh, sik-awmdal tawh a kibang pian in tuam a, a khazap uh a gingte pen galkido laitakin sakol in a kaih leeng tampite’ gin’ tawh a kibang hi." 
Revelation9:10 Momai bangin mei nei-in mi dehthei uh a, tua a mei uh tawh mihingte kha nga sung gimsak theih nading gu a nei uh hi." 
Revelation9:11 Amaute in tua kuahawm thukpi a uk vantungmi pen kumpi-in nei uh a, tua vantungmi a min pen Hebru pau-in Abaddon hi a, Grik pau-in Apollion hi a, “A Susia pa,” a cihnopna ahi hi." 
Revelation9:12 Tu-in gimna khatna a beina hita a, ahi zongin gimna nam nih hong tung lai ding a om hi." 
Revelation9:13 Tua ciangin a gukna vantungmi in a peengkul hong tum a, Pasian’ mai-ah a om kham kibawl biakna tau kiu lite panin awging khat ka za hi." 
Revelation9:14 Tua awging in peengkul a tawi vantungmi a gukna kiangah, “Eufratis Gun lianpi-ah a kihencip vantungmi lite khahkhia in,” a ci hi." 
Revelation9:15 Tua ahih manin leitung mi khempeuh sehthumsuah sehkhat a thah ding uh a kum, a kha, a ni, a nai hun ngakin a kigingsa-in a om tua vantungmi lite a kikhahkhia hi." 
Revelation9:16 Mi a that ding sakol tung tuang galkap mak sawmnih pha hi, ci-in hong kigen hi." 
Revelation9:17 Ka maang sungah ka muh sakolte le a tungah a tuangte pen hih bang ahi hi: Sakol tung tuangte in mei bangin a san, sapfaia suangmanpha bangin a dum, kat bangin a eng, awmdal a bulh uh hi. A sakol lutangte pen humpinelkai lutang tawh kibang a, a kam uh panin meikuang, meikhu, le kat a pusuak hi." 
Revelation9:18 Hih sakolte’ kam panin a hong pusuak meikuang, meikhu, le kat, hih gimna nam thumte in leitung mi sehthumsuah sehkhat a sisak hi." 
Revelation9:19 Hih sakolte in a kam le a mei uhah gu nei uh a, a meite un gul tawh kibangin lutang nei ahih manin a meite uh tawh mi a liamsak uh hi." 
Revelation9:20 Hih gimna tawh a si lo midangte pen amau’ gamtatnasa panin kikhelkik nuam lo uh hi. Dawi a biaknate uh, khua a mu thei lo, khua a za thei lo, lam a pai thei lo ngun, kham, sumngo, suang, le sing a kibawl milim a biakte uh khawl tuan lo uh hi." 
Revelation9:21 A mi thahna, a aisanna, a paktatna, le a guktaknate uh zong khawl tuan lo uh hi." 
Revelation10:1 Tua ciangin a thahat vantungmi khat, meiipi in tuamin, a lu tungah sakhituihup khimin, a maitang nitaang tawh kibangin, a khete meikuang khuampi tawh a kibang khat, vantung panin a hong kumsuk ka mu hi." 
Revelation10:2 A khut sungah laizial neu khat phelsa-in a tawi hi. A taklam khe in tuipi sung sikin, a veilam khe in leitung sik a," 
Revelation10:3 nakpitakin kiko ahih manin humpinelkai hawk tawh a kibang hi. Tua bangin a kiko ciangin van sagih a gingte in a dawng hi. 
Revelation10:4 Tua van sagih a gingte’ thugen a mankhit phetin tua a thugente lai-ah a gelh dingin ka kithawi hi. Ahi zongin vantung panin awging khat ka za a, “Tua thute lai-ah gelh kei inla, tua van sagih a gingte’ thugen imcip in,” hong ci hi." 
Revelation10:5 Tua ciangin tuipi le leitung kalkakin a ding ka muh vantungmi in vantung lamah a taklam khut laamto-in," 
Revelation10:6 a nungta tawntung, vantung le a sunga om khempeuh, leitung le a sunga om khempeuh, le tuipi le a sunga om khempeuh a bawl Pasian’ min tawh kiciam a, “Tu-in zekai nawn het lo ding hi." 
Revelation10:7 A sagihna vantungmi in a peengkul a tum ciangin ama nasem kamsangte tungah a gensa bangin Pasian in ama ip thusim a geelte hong semkhia ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Revelation10:8 Tua ciangin vantung panin awging ka zak in kei kiangah thu hong genkik a, “Tuipi le leitung kalkakin a ding vantungmi’ khut sungah a om laizial kiphelsa pen va la in,” hong ci hi." 
Revelation10:9 Tua ahih manin vantungmi kiangah va pai-in tua laizial neu a hong piak nadingin ka va gen leh amah in, “La inla, ne in. Na gil sung a tun ciangin thuk mahmah ding a, ahi zongin na kam sungah khuaizu bangin khum mahmah ding hi,” hong ci hi." 
Revelation10:10 Kei zong tua vantungmi’ khutsung panin a laizial neu la-in ka ne hi. Ka kamah khuaizu bangin khum dekdak a, ahi zongin ka nekkhit ciangin ka gil sung thuk velvalsak hi." 
Revelation10:11 Tua ciangin keima kiangah, “Minam tuamtuam, pau nam tuamtuam a zangte le kumpite tungah a piang ding thu na gen ding kisam lai hi,” hong kici hi." 
Revelation11:1 Tua ciangin ciangkhut tawh a kibang teh nading ciang khat kei kiangah hong kipia a, “Pai inla, Pasian’ biakinn le biakna tau le tua lai-ah Pasian a bia mite va teh in." 
Revelation11:2 Ahi zongin biakinn pualam tualte teh kei in. Minam dangte’ khut sungah kipia khin a, amaute in kha sawmli le nih sung Khuapi Siangtho tuancilgawp ding uh ahih manin tua a tualte teh loin nusia lel in." 
Revelation11:3 Ka teci nihte puanhampi silhin ka paisak ding a, amaute in ni tulkhat zanih sawmguk sung Pasian’ thu a gen ding uh hi,” hong ci hi." 
Revelation11:4 Tua teci nihte pen leitung Topa mai-ah a om oliv kung nihte le meivakna nihte ahi uh hi. 
Revelation11:5 Mi khatpeuh in amaute suksiat ding hanciam leh amaute’ kam panin meikuang pusuakin a galte a kangtum hi. Amaute suksiat ding a hanciam peuhpeuh tua bangin kisusia hi. 
Revelation11:6 Amaute’ ut hunhunin a thugen laitakun guah zu losak thei uh a, tuite sisan a suahsak theih nadingun vangliatna nei uh a, leitungah gimna a tuamtuam tungsak thei uh hi." 
Revelation11:7 Amaute in Pasian’ thu genin a teci panna a zawhkhit uh ciangin kuahawm thukpi sung panin a hong paikhia ganhing in tua teci pangte simin zogawpin that ding a," 
Revelation11:8 singlamteh tungah amaute’ Topa a kithahna mun Sodom ahih kei leh Egypt minkhem a pua khuapi kongzingah a luanghawm uh kipaidak ding hi. 
Revelation11:9 Mi namkim, pau namkim a zang mi tuamtuamte in ni thum le ni lang sung amaute’ luanghawm en ding uh a, a luanghawmte a kivui ding phal lo ding uh hi." 
Revelation11:10 Teci a pang tua kamsang nihte in leitung mite tungah gimna nakpitakin tungsak uh ahih manin hih mi nihte a sihna hangin lungdamin pawi bawl ding uh a, a nuamna uh hangin khatlekhat letsong kipia ding uh hi." 
Revelation11:11 Ahi zongin ni thum le ni lang a cinkhit ciangin amaute sungah Pasian kiang panin nuntakna hu lutin, amaute a khe-un hong ding uh ahih manin a mute khempeuh nakpitakin lau mahmah uh hi." 
Revelation11:12 Tua ciangin tua teci pang nihte in, “Hih lai-ah hong pai un,” ci-in vantung panin a kisapna awging a za uh hi. Tua ahih manin a galte uh’ muhin vantung meiipi sungah paito uh hi." 
Revelation11:13 Tua hun laitakin nakpitakin zin ling a, a khuapi sehsawmsuah sehkhat tang ding kisiacip a, tua zinling in mi tulsagih a sisak hi. A si lo a hing laite lau mahmah uh a, vantung Pasian a liatna thu a phat uh hi." 
Revelation11:14 Gimna nihna a bei hita a, ahi zongin gimna a thumna hong tung baih ta ding hi." 
Revelation11:15 Tua ciangin a sagihna vantungmi in a peengkul hong tum a, vantungah nakpitakin aw hong ging a, “Leitung uk nading aana neihna pen i Topa Khrih a’ hong suakkhin a, amah in a tawntungin uk paisuak ding hi,” hong ci hi." 
Revelation11:16 Pasian mai-a a tokhom ciat uhah a tu upa sawmnih le lite zong mai pukin Pasian bia uh a," 
Revelation11:17 “A beisa hun le tu hunah a om tawntung a Vanglian Topa Pasian aw, tu-in na vangliatna zangin uk ding hong kipan khin na hih manin nangma tungah ka nuamna uh ka hong ko uh hi." 
Revelation11:18 Na hehna hong kilat hun hong tungta a, misite thukhen nading hun hong tungta ahih manin minam dangte heh mahmah uh hi. Nangma nasem kamsangte, a lian a neu, nang hong kihta mi khempeuhte thaman na piak ding hun hi ta a, leitung a susia mite na suksiat ding hun hi ta hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Revelation11:19 Tua ciangin vantungah a om Pasian biakna innpi kihong a, a Thuciamna Singkuang zong biakinn sungah a om a kimu hi. Tua ciangin nakpitakin khua phia-in a ging lianpi om a, van gingin zin ling a, gialpi a kia hi." 
Revelation12:1 Tua ciangin vanah lim lamdang lian khat hong kilang hi. Puan silh bangin ni silhin, a khe nuai-ah kha omin, aksi sawm le nih a kisuanna lukhu, a lu tungah a khu numei khat om hi." 
Revelation12:2 Tua numei naupaii hi a, nausuah natna tungta ahih manin na sa-in a kiko hi." 
Revelation12:3 Tua ciangin lim lamdang adang khat mah vanah hong kilang leuleu hi. Gulpi san a lian mahmah khat om a, lutang sagih le ki sawm nei a, a lutang sagihte-ah lukhu mah nei ciat hi." 
Revelation12:4 A mei tawh vanah a om aksi sehsawmsuah sehkhat vatkhia-in leilak a denna hi. A nau a suah phetin a ne pah dingin nausuak dingin a kithawi tua numei’ mai-ah a ding hi. 
Revelation12:5 Tua ciangin tua numei in leitung minam khempeuh sik ciangkhut tawh a uk ding ta pasal khat hong nei hi. Ahi zongin tua naungek pen thakhatin kilakhia-in Pasian a tutna a tokhomah a kipaipih hi. 
Revelation12:6 A numei pen Pasian in ama a dingin a bawl kholhsakna mun gamlakah tai a, tua munah ni tulkhat zanih sawmguk sung kikhoi ding hi." 
Revelation12:7 Tu-in vantungah galkidona hong om a, Mikhael le a vantung mite in gulpi le a vantung mite a do uh hi." 
Revelation12:8 Ahi zongin tua gulpi guallel ahih manin tua gulpi le a vantung mite, vantungah ki-om sak nawn lo hi." 
Revelation12:9 Tua ciangin tua tanglai gulpi, Dawimangpa ahih kei leh Satan a kici, leitung mi khempeuh a khem pa pen a vantung mite tawh leitungah kilawnsuk hi." 
Revelation12:10 Tua ciangin vantungah nakpitakin awging khat ka za a, “Tu-in Pasian in hong honkhia khinta a, kumpi vangliatna a neihna hong lakkhia khinta a, ama Khrih in aana a neihna thu lakkhia khinta hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh a sun a zanin eite’ Pasian’ mai-ah dingin i sanggamte mawhsakna a gen tawntungpa, tu-in vantung panin kilawnkhia khinta hi." 
Revelation12:11 I sanggamte in Tuuno sisan le thuman a genna uh tawh amah na zo uh a, a nuntakna nangawn uh na pia ngam uh hi." 
Revelation12:12 Tua ahih manin vantungte le tuate sungah a teng mi khempeuh aw, lungdam un! Ahi zongin vantung panin Dawimangpa hong kilawnkhia suk a, hun tomno bek a neilai ahihlam thei ahih manin leitung le tui tungah a omte a dingin lauhuai mahmah ding hi,” hong ci hi." 
Revelation12:13 Gulpi in leitungah a kilawnkhia khin ahihlam a kitheih ciangin ta pasal a nei nupi a delh dingin hong kithawi hi. 
Revelation12:14 Ahi zongin tua gulpi in a sukkhak theih loh nadingin kum thum le alang sung gamlakah a kikep nading munah a leentheih nadingin muvanlai gol mahmahte’ kha tawh a kibang kha nih tua numei a kiguan’ hi. 
Revelation12:15 Gulpi in zong tuikhang tawh tua numei a taihsak theih nadingin a kam panin gunpi luang bangin tua numei’ nungah tui a luangsak hi. 
Revelation12:16 Ahi zongin leitung in tua numei na huh a, gulpi kam panin a luang tuite a kam tawh na hupkang hi." 
Revelation12:17 Tua ciangin tua numei tungah gulpi heh mahmah a, tua numei’ suanlekhak dangte ahi, Pasian’ thupiakna zui-in, Jesuh thu-ah kiptakin a om mite a sim dingin kuankhia a," 
Revelation12:18 tuipi gei-ah dingin a om hi. 
Revelation13:1 Tua laitakin tuipi sung panin ganhing khat a hong pusuak ka mu hi. Tua ganhing in ki sawm le lutang sagih nei a, a ki sawmte tungah lukhu khat ciat om a, a lutang sagihte tungah min hoih lo khat ciat a kigelh hi." 
Revelation13:2 Tua ka muh ganhing pen kamkei tawh kibang a, a khete vom khe tawh kibang a, a kam pen humpinelkai kam tawh a kibang hi. Gulpi in tua ganhing tungah ama vangliatna, ama tokhom, le aana lianpi a pia hi." 
Revelation13:3 A lutang khat in sih nading zahin liamma lianpi nei ngei napi-in damkik a, leitung mi khempeuh in lamdang sa-in tua ganhing a zui ngeingai uh hi." 
Revelation13:4 Gulpi in tua ganhing tungah ama aana pia ahih manin mite in tua gulpi a bia uh hi. A ganhing zong bia uh a, “Hih ganhing tawh a kibang kua om a, kua in amah suzo ding ahi hiam?” ci uh hi." 
Revelation13:5 Tua ganhing, kiphatsakna le kam khel nono a pautheih nading le kha sawm le nih sung aana a zattheih nadingin thu kipia hi." 
Revelation13:6 Tua ahih manin Pasian, ama min, a omna mun, le vantungah a omte khempeuh samsia-in a ko gawpgawp hi." 
Revelation13:7 Pasian’ mite simin a zawhgawp theih nading zong kiphal hi. Minam tuamtuam, pau nam tuamtuam a zang mite khempeuh tungah uktheih nading aana a kipia hi." 
Revelation13:8 Tua ahih manin a kigo Tuuno laibu sungah a nungta ding mite’ min, leitung pianma pekin a kikhumna-ah a kihel lo leitung mi khempeuh in tua ganhing bia ding uh hi." 
Revelation13:9 “Salin a pai dingin a kisehsa mite sal mahin pai ding a, namsau-in thah dingin a kisehsate namsau mah tawh kithat ding hi. Tua ahih manin Pasian’ mite in upna le thuakzawhna kisam hi,” a kicihna thu, zak nading bil a neite in za ta uh hen." 
Revelation13:10  
Revelation13:11 Tua ciangin leisung panin a hong pusuak ganhing adang khat ka mu hi. Tua ganhing in tuu bangin ki nih nei a, a kampau zia pen gulpi kampau tawh kibang hi." 
Revelation13:12 Tua ganhing masa a omna mahah ganhing masa’ aana khempeuh zang a, a liamma a damsa tua ganhing masa pen leitung le a tunga om mi khempeuh, aana tawh a biasak hi." 
Revelation13:13 Tua ganhing nihna in nalamdang lianpipi bawl a, mi khempeuhte’ muhin van panin leitungah meikuang nangawn a kiasak thei hi." 
Revelation13:14 Ganhing masa omna-ah nalamdang bawltheih nading thu ngah ahih manin a nalamdang bawlna tawh leitungah a om mi khempeuh khem a, namsau tawh a si ding zahin a kisat liamsa hinapi a nungta lai ganhing pahtawi nading milim khat a bawl nadingun a gen hi." 
Revelation13:15 Tua ganhing nihna in ganhing masa lim dingin a kibawl milim sungah a hu a muap ciangin hong pauthei a, tua milim a bia lo khempeuh a thahtheih nadingin thu a ngah hi." 
Revelation13:16 Tua ganhing in a lian a neu, a hau a zawng, sila le sila ahi lo, mi khempeuh in a taklam khut tung uh ahih kei leh a taltang uhah ciaptehna a neih nadingun thu a pia hi." 
Revelation13:17 Tua ahih manin tua ganhing min ahih kei leh a min tangin a nambat ciaptehna a tungah a nei lo mi peuhmah, vanlei vanzuakin paikhia thei lo uh hi." 
Revelation13:18 Hih thu-ah pilna kisam hi. Hih nambat pen 666 hi a, mihing khat min tangin a ding hi a, mipil mitei peuhpeuhte in hih ganhing nambat a cihnopna thei ding uh hi." 
Revelation14:1 Tua ciangin ka khuadak leh Zion Mual tungah Tuuno a dingin a om ka mu hi. Amah tawh mi tul za le tul sawmli le tulli dingkhawm uh a, tua mite’ taltangah Tuuno le a pa’ min kigelh hi." 
Revelation14:2 Tua laitakin tuizeu lianpi le vanging tawh a kibang a gingpha mahmah aw khat vantung panin a hong ging ka za hi. Tua awging pen harp lasakna a kitum a ging tawh kibang hi. 
Revelation14:3 Tokhom, ganhing lite, le upate’ lam nga-in tua mihonpite inla thak khat a sa uh hi. Tua la pen leitungah a kitankhiasa mi tul za le tul sawmli le tul lite simloh kuamah dang in sa thei lo uh hi." 
Revelation14:4 Hih mite in numei tawh paktatna gamta ngei nai lo uh a, paubaanna a nei lote ahi uh hi. Amaute in Tuuno a paina peuhpeuhah zui uh a, midang khempeuh sung panin a kitankhiasa, Pasian le Tuuno tungah a kipia masa mite ahi uh hi." 
Revelation14:5 Amaute, paubaanna om kiuhkeuh lo uh ahih manin zuauthu gen ngei het lo uh hi." 
Revelation14:6 Tua ciangin leitungah a teng mi namkim, pau namkim a zang mite tungah a tawntungin Lungdam nading Thu gen ding a nei vantungmi khat vankim lai-ah a leeng ka mu hi." 
Revelation14:7 Amah nakpitakin kiko a, “Amah in mihingte thu a khen ding hun hong tungta ahih manin Pasian kihta unla amah phat un. Van le lei, tuinak le tuipite a bawlpa hong bia ta un,” a ci hi." 
Revelation14:8 Tua ciangin vantungmi a nihna in hong zui a, “A Lian Babylon khuapi kicim, kicim! Amah a huk a lanna leenggahzu, mi khempeuh tungah pia-in khamsak a, gimna thuaksak hi,” a ci hi." 
Revelation14:9 Tua ciangin vantungmi a thumna in a masa tegel hong zui leuleu-in nakpitakin, “Tua ganhing le a lim bia-in a taltang ahih kei leh a khut tungah ciaptehna a ngah mi peuhmah in," 
Revelation14:10 Pasian’ leenggahzu zong dawn ding uh hi. Pasian in ama hehna ahi leenggahzu khauh pen ama hehna hai sungah a dimtakin sung khinzo ta hi. Tua bang mite pen a siangtho vantung mite le Tuuno mai-ah meikuang le kat khu tawh gimna kipia ding hi. 
Revelation14:11 Amaute a kibawlsiatna mei, khu tawntung a, ganhing le a lim bia-in, a min kigelhna a nei mi peuhmah in a sun a zanin tatsat loin gimna thuak paisuak uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Revelation14:12 Pasian’ thupiakna zui-in Jesuh tungah a citak Pasian’ mite a dingin thuakzawhna kisam hi. 
Revelation14:13 Tua ciangin vantung panin awging khat ka za a, “Tu a kipanin Topa thu-ah a si mite mi hampha mahmah ahi hi, cihna gelh in,” a ci hi. Tua ciangin Kha Siangtho in, “Hi takpi hi. Amaute’ nasepna thaman in amaute zui ding ahih manin a nasep gimna panun tawlnga-in nuamsa-in om ding uh hi,” ci-in a dawng hi." 
Revelation14:14 Tua ciangin ka khuadak leh meiipi a bang a kang biakbuak om a, tua meiipi tungah mihing tawh a kibang khat tu-in, kham lukhu khu-in, a khutah phiaukawi hiam khat a tawi ka mu hi." 
Revelation14:15 Biakinn sung panin vantungmi khat hong paikhia a, meiipi tungah a tu mipa nakpitakin samin, “Leitung mite lak dingin min mahmah a, a lak hun hong tungta ahih manin na phiaukawi tawh at in,” a ci hi." 
Revelation14:16 Tua ahih manin meii tungah a tupa in leitungah a phiaukawi hong van a, leitung mite a at hi." 
Revelation14:17 Tua ciangin vantung biakinn panin vantungmi adang khat hong paikhia leuleu a, amah in zong phiaukawi hiam khat mah a tawi hi." 
Revelation14:18 Tua ciangin biakna tau panin vantungmi adang khat hong paikhia leuleu hi. Tua vantungmi pen mei a ukpa hi a, phiaukawi hiam a tawipa kiangah nakpitakin, “Leitung mite leenggah bangin minta ahih manin leitung mite na phiaukawi tawh atin a lom lomin kaikhawm in,” a ci hi." 
Revelation14:19 Tua ahih manin vantungmi in zong leitungah a phiaukawi hong van a, leitung mite kaikhawmin Pasian’ hehna lian leenggah cilna phualah a kaikhawm hi." 
Revelation14:20 Khuapi pualamah kicil a, a cilna panin sisan vive luangkhia-in, pi nga bang thukin, tai zanih ciang bangah tuikhang bangin a luang hi." 
Revelation15:1 Tua ciangin vanah nalamdang lian mahmah khat ka mu hi. Gimna nam sagih a hong keng vantungmi sagih om uh a, Pasian’ hehna a lah tawpna uh ahih manin a nunung pente ahi uh hi." 
Revelation15:2 Tua ciangin mei tawh a kihel limlang peekpi kiphah tuipi tawh a kibang ka mu hi. Ganhing, a lim, le a min nambat tawh a kipiasa a zote, Pasian’ lasakna harpte tawi-in tuipi tawh a kibang gei-ah a ding uh hi." 
Revelation15:3 Amaute in Pasian’ nasem Moses la le Tuuno la sa uh a, “A Vanglian Topa Pasian aw, na nasepnate lamdangin lian mahmah hi. Khang tawntung a Kumpipa aw, na nasepnate-ah thumanin na thutang hi." 
Revelation15:4 Topa aw, nang, kua in hong kihta lo ding a, na liatna hong phat lo ding ahi hiam? Nang bek na siangtho hi. Thumanin na sepnate mi khempeuh in mu uh ahih manin minam khempeuh nang kiangah hong pai-in, na mai-ah hong bia ding uh hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Revelation15:5 Tua khit ciangin ka khuadak leh a sungah Pasian’ Ompihna Mun a om vantung biakinn a kihong ka mu hi. 
Revelation15:6 Tua biakinn sung panin vantungmi sagih, gimna sagih tawh hong pusuak uh a, puanpak silhin, kham awmgak tawh a awm uh a gak uh hi." 
Revelation15:7 Ganhing lite sung panin khat in a nungta tawntung Pasian’ hehna a dim hai sagih, vantungmi sagihte kiangah a pia hi." 
Revelation15:8 Tua biakinn sungah Pasian’ minthanna le a vangliatna khu kidim ahih manin, vantungmi sagihte in hong paipih gimna sagih a ven’ matengin biakinn sungah kuamah lut thei lo uh hi." 
Revelation16:1 Tua ciangin biakinn panin awging khat in vantungmi sagihte kiangah, “Leitungah va pai unla, hai sungah a om Pasian’ hehnate va sungkhia un,” ci-in awging lianpi tawh a genna ka za hi." 
Revelation16:2 Tua ahih manin a khatna vantungmi va pai-in leitungah hai va bung a, a tungah ganhing ciaptehna a neite le a lim a bia mite tungah a kihhuai meima a na mahmah hong piang hi." 
Revelation16:3 A nihna vantungmi in tuipi tungah a hai hong bung a, tuipi tuite misite’ sisan tawh kibang hong suak ahih manin tuipi sungah a om nuntakna a nei khempeuh a si hi." 
Revelation16:4 A thumna vantungmi in gunte le tuinakte tungah a hai hong bung a, a tui khempeuh sisan a hong suak hi." 
Revelation16:5 Tua ciangin tuite a uk vantungmi in, “A beisa hun a kipanin tuhun dongin a om a Siangtho Pa aw, hih bangin na thukhenna-ah nang na thuman hi." 
Revelation16:6 Amaute in mi siangthote le kamsangte’ sisan luangsak uh ahih manin tu-in amaute’ dawn dingin sisan a pia na hi hi. Hih pen amaute’ ngah dingin a kilawm ahi hi,” a cihna thu ka za hi." 
Revelation16:7 Tua ciangin biakna tau panin aw khat hong ging a, “A Vanglian Topa Pasian aw, na thukhennate thumanin thutang hi,” a cihna ka za hi." 
Revelation16:8 A lina vantungmi in ni tungah a hai hong bung a, ni in a satna tawh mite a kanggawp hi." 
Revelation16:9 Nisa in mite kanggawp ahih manin mite in hih gimna tawh kisai-ah thu a nei Pasian a samsia uh hi. Ahi zongin a mawhna uh panin kisikin Pasian a phat ding uh ut lo uh hi. 
Revelation16:10 A ngana vantungmi in ganhing tokhom tungah a hai hong bung a, tua ganhing’ ukna gam sung tengah khua hong mial hi. Mite in na a sak manun a leii pet uh a," 
Revelation16:11 a meimate uh na a sak manun vantung Pasian a samsia uh hi. Ahi zongin a gamtat siatna uh panin kisik nuam lo uh hi. 
Revelation16:12 A gukna vantungmi in Eufratis Gun lianpi tungah a hai hong bung a, nisuahna lam kumpite hong pai nading lam a bawlkholhna-in a tuite hong kangcip hi." 
Revelation16:13 Tua ciangin gulpi kamsung, ganhing kamsung, le a man lo kamsangpa’ kamsung panin uiphuk tawh a kibang kha gilo thum a hong pusuak ka mu hi." 
Revelation16:14 Tuate pen dawite’ kha hi a, nalamdang a bawl uh hi. A Vanglian Pasian’ Ni hong tun ciangin gal a do dingin leitung gam khempeuhah a om kumpite a kaikhawm dingin a kuankhia uh hi." 
Revelation16:15 (“Na ngai un! Guta bangin kei ka hong pai hi. Mihon lakah guaktangin pai-in maizumna a ngahkhak loh nadingun a puante uh kemin, pilvang khuaphawkin a om mite a hampha ahi uh hi.”)" 
Revelation16:16 Tua khate in Hebru pau-in Armageddon a kici munah kumpite a kaikhawm uh hi. 
Revelation16:17 A sagihna vantungmi in huihlakah a hai hong bung a, biakinn sung tokhom panin nakpitakin aw khat hong gingin, “Man khinta hi,” a ci hi." 
Revelation16:18 Tua ciangin khua hong phia-in, a ging lianpi hong om a, van hong gingin nakpitakin zin hong ling hi. Zinling khempeuh lakah a husia pen ahih manin mihing a pianzawh hih bang zinling omngei nai lo hi." 
Revelation16:19 Khuapi phelthum kisuah a, gam sunga om khuapi dang khempeuh kisia hi. Pasian in Babylon khuapi mangngilh lo a, ama hehna ahi leenggahzu a hai sung panin Babylon khuapi a dawnsak hi." 
Revelation16:20 Tuikulh khempeuh mangthang a, mual khempeuh maimang hi." 
Revelation16:21 Gial gol pipi, khat ciangin tawi sawmthum val a gik, van panin mite tungah hong kia hi. Tua gimna nasialua ahih manin tua gialte hangin mite in Pasian a samsia uh hi." 
Revelation17:1 Tua ciangin hai sagih a tawi vantungmi sagihte sung panin kei kiangah khat hong pai a, “Hong pai in; gun tampi gei-ah a kilam a paktat mahmah khuapi gimna a kipiakzia ding ka hong lak ding hi." 
Revelation17:2 Leitung kumpite in tua a paktat mahmah nu tawh gamtat hoih lo gamta uh a, leitung mite in ama paktatna leenggahzu dawnin a kham uh hi,” hong ci hi." 
Revelation17:3 Kha Siangtho tawh kidimin ka om a, vantungmi in gamlak mun khatah hong tunpih hi. Tua lai-ah, a tungah min hoih lo nam tuamtuam a dimin a kigelh ganhing a san khat tungah numei khat a tu ka mu hi. Tua ganhing in lutang sagih le ki sawm a nei hi." 
Revelation17:4 Tua numei in puan a dupsan le a ausan silh a, kham, suangmanpha, le kep kibawl kizepna a tuamtuamte tawh a pumpi dimin kizem a, a paktatna hangin a kihhuai a nin mahmah nate a dimin a omna kham hai khat a tawi hi." 
Revelation17:5 A taltang tungah, “A paktat numeite le leitung kihhuainate khempeuh a pianna, A Lian Babylon Khuapi,” ci-in khiatna tuamkhat a nei min a kigelh hi." 
Revelation17:6 Tua ciangin mi siangthote le Jesuh tungah a cihtak uh manin a kithat mite’ sisan dawnin zukham a batna ka mu hi. Tua numei ka muh ciangin lamdang ka sa mahmah hi. 
Revelation17:7 Ahi zongin vantungmi in keima kiangah, “Bang hangin lamdangsa na hi hiam? Tua numei le amah a pua, lutang sagih le ki sawm a nei ganhing a cihnopna thu ka hong gen ding hi." 
Revelation17:8 Tua na muh ganhing nidangin a om hangin tu-in om nawn lo hi. Ahi zongin tu-in kuahawm thukpi panin hong pusuakin sihna a thuak dingin paikhia ding hi. Tua ganhing nidangin omngei a, tu-in om nawn lo napi-in khatvei hong kilangkik ding ahih manin, a nungta mite’ min a kikhumna laibu sungah leitung pianma-in a kigelh nai lo, tu laitakin leitungah a om mite in tua ganhing a et uh ciangin lamdangsa ding uh hi." 
Revelation17:9 Hih thu-ah pilna le thutheihna kisam hi. Lutang sagihte pen tua numei a tutna mual sagih ahi hi. 
Revelation17:10 Tua lutang sagihte pen kumpi sagihte zong a cihna ahi hi. Tua kumpi sagihte lakah nga beizo a, khat in ukna aana neilai a, khat pen a hong piang lai ding ahi hi. Amah a hong kilat ciangin tomno sung bek om ding hi." 
Revelation17:11 Nidangin omngei a, ahi zongin tu-in a om nawn lo ganhing pen kumpi sagihte tawh a kipawl a kumpi giatna hi a, sihna thuak dingin a pai ding ahi hi." 
Revelation17:12 Ki sawmte pen gam uk dingin a hong kipan nai lo kumpi sawm hi a, ahi zongin a ganhing tawh kumpi aana a neikhawm dingin nai khat sung bek a hun kipia ding hi." 
Revelation17:13 Hih mi sawmte in ngimna khat nei uh a, vangliatna le aana a neihteng uh a ganhing tungah a pia uh hi." 
Revelation17:14 Amaute in Tuuno a sim ding uh hi. Ahi zongin Tuuno pen kumpite’ Kumpi, topate’ Topa ahih manin, amah le ama sap, a teel, citakin amah a zuite in tua kumpi sawmte a zogawp ding uh hi,” hong ci hi." 
Revelation17:15 Tua ciangin vantungmi in hong genthuah lai a, “A paktat numei a tutna gun tuite pen minam tuamtuam, pau nam tuamtuam a zang mihonpite ahi hi." 
Revelation17:16 Tua na muh ganhing le a ki sawmte in a paktat numei mudah ding uh hi. Ama neih khempeuh laksakin a pumguakin koih ding uh a, a sa ne-in mei tawh haltum ding uh hi." 
Revelation17:17 Bang hang hiam cih leh Pasian in ama thugente a tuntheih nadingin ama deihna bangin amaute in a sepnop nading uh lungsim guan a, lungsim kikhatin ganhing tungah amau’ ukna aana a piasak hi." 
Revelation17:18 Na muh numei pen leitung kumpi khempeuh tungah ukna a nei khuapi ahi hi,” hong ci hi." 
Revelation18:1 Tua khit ciangin vantung panin vantung midang khat a hong paisuk ka mu hi. Amah in aana a lian mahmah nei a, ama vang in leitung buppi a taan hi." 
Revelation18:2 Amah nakpitakin kiko a, “A Lian Babylon khuapi kicim, kicim! Tu-in dawite’ kua suak khinta-in, kha gilote’ omna suak khinta a, a kihhuai, a muhdahhuai vasa namkim in omna-in neita uh hi." 
Revelation18:3 Bang hang hiam cih leh ama hukna leenggahzu mi khempeuh dawnsak a, leitung kumpite tawh paktat a, ama hukna hangin leitung sumbawlte in a hauhlawh uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Revelation18:4 Tua ciangin vantung panin aw dang khat ka za a, “Keima mite aw, a mawh gamtatna-ah kihel kha-in a gimthuakna thuakpih kha ding na hih manun hong paikhia un." 
Revelation18:5 Ama mawhna in van ban a, a gamtat hoih lohnate Pasian in phawk gige hi." 
Revelation18:6 Amah in note hong bawl bangin ama tungah gamta unla, ama tungah a zah nihin thukkik un. Amah in note a hong dawnsak a zah nihin a khauh leenggahzu ama dawn dingin a hai sungah sung un." 
Revelation18:7 Amah kisialin a kiphatsakna zah tawh a kizui-in dahna le lungkhamna thuaksak un. Amah in, ‘Kei kumpinu ka hi a, meigong numei lah ka hi kei a, dahna ka thuak ngei kei ding hi,’ ci ahih manin," 
Revelation18:8 gimna in ni khatthu-in ban ding a, pulnatna, kahna, le kialpi in vatgawp ding hi. Ama tungah thu a khen Topa Pasian vanglian ahih manin mei tawh kihaltum ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Revelation18:9 Amah tawh paktatin a kiphasak khawm leitung kumpite in tua khuapi a katna meikhu a muh uh ciangin dahin a kap ding uh hi. 
Revelation18:10 Ama thuakna kihta-in a gamlapi-ah om ding uh a, “Hih a vanglian Babylon khuapi in a thuakna, bangzah takin lauhuai-in, bangzah takin nasia! Nai khat sung bekin hih zah gimna thuak!” ci ding uh hi." 
Revelation18:11 Amaute’ na zuakte kuamah in lei nawn lo ahih manin leitung sumbawlte zong tua khuapi’ thuakna hangin dahin a kap uh hi. 
Revelation18:12 A khamte, a ngunte, a suangmanphate, a kepte, a puanpakte, a puansante, a nai puante, a khausante, a singnamtuite, a sing manphate, a saihate, a sumngote, a sikte, a suangkangte," 
Revelation18:13 a sinnamon singnamtuite, a singteh namtuite, a myrrh paknamtuite, a saledi-te, a leenggahzute, a sathaute, a annelte le mangbuhte, a bawngte le a tuute, a sakolte le a leengte, le mihing ahi a silate uh kuamah in lei nawn lo hi." 
Revelation18:14 Tua ahih manin sumbawlte in tua khuapi kiangah, “Deihin na lunggulhgulh na khempeuh maimangta a, na hauhna le na nopcitna teng beita a, cikmah ciangin na ngahkik nawnkei ding hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Revelation18:15 Tua khuapi sungah sumbawlin a hauhlawh mite in ama thuakna a muh uh ciangin lau-in a gamlapi-ah dingin kapin thum ding uh a," 
Revelation18:16 “Hih a lian khuapi in a thuakna, bangzah takin lauhuai, bangzah takin nasia! Puan hoihnono, a dupsan le a sante silhin, kham, suangmanpha, le kepte tawh a kizem ngei khuapi!" 
Revelation18:17 Nai khat sungin a hauhna khempeuh maimang ta!” a ci uh hi. Teembaw ukte le a tungah a tuangte, teembaw hawlte le tuipi tungah nuntakna a zongte a gamlapi-ah ding uh a," 
Revelation18:18 a khuapi katna khu a muh uh ciangin, “Hih zahin a lian khuapi koi lai-ah om ahi hiam?” ci-in a kiko uh hi." 
Revelation18:19 A kah a thum kawmun a lu tung uhah leivui thehin kap uh a, “Tuipi teembaw a nei khempeuh in a hauhlawh uh hih khuapi bangzah takin lauhuai-in nasia ahi hiam? Nai khat sungin maimangta hi." 
Revelation18:20 Vantung aw, ama siatna hangin lungdam in. Mi siangthote, sawltakte, le kamsangte aw, note tungah hong gamtatna hangin Pasian in ama tungah thukhenna pia khinta ahih manin lungdam ta un,” a ci uh hi." 
Revelation18:21 Tua ciangin a thahat vantungmi khat in angawina suang tawh a kibang suang lianpi khat la-in tuipi sung denna a, “A lian Babylon khuapi hih bangin kilawn ding a, kimukik ngei nawn lo ding hi." 
Revelation18:22 Harp lasakna a ging le la sate’ awging, tamngai le peengkul awgingte, nang sungah kiza nawn lo ding hi. Nasem a tuamtuamte nang sungah kimu nawn lo ding a, angawina a ging zong kiza nawn lo ding hi." 
Revelation18:23 Na sungah meivak taang zong kimu nawn lo ding a, a kiteng nungak le tangval a lungdamte’ awging kiza nawn lo ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh na sumbawlte, leitungah a thahat pen hi a, na ai tawh leitung mi khempeuh na khem hi." 
Revelation18:24 Nang Babylon khuapi, hih bangin gim hong kipiakna pen kamsangte le mi siangtho a kithatte’ sisan le leitungah a kithat mi khempeuh’ sisan nangma sungah a kimuhna hang ahi hi,” a ci hi." 
Revelation19:1 Tua khit ciangin vantungah mihonpi a kikona awging tawh a kibang khat ka za a, “Pasian phat un! Hotkhiatna, minthanna le vangliatna pen eite’ Pasian-a’ ahi hi." 
Revelation19:2 A thukhennate thumanin thutang a, a paktatna tawh leitung mi khempeuh a siasak, a paktat nu tungah thu khen khinta a, ama nasemte a thahsakna hangin ama tungah a phu la khinta hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Revelation19:3 Tua ciangin khatvei kiko kik leuleu uh a, “Pasian phat un! Tua khuapi a katna khu tatsat loin van lamah khuto tawntung hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Revelation19:4 Tua ciangin upa sawmnih le lite le ganhing lite in tokhom tungah a tu Pasian mai-ah kunin bia uh a, “Amen! Pasian phat un!” a ci uh hi." 
Revelation19:5 Tua ciangin tokhom panin aw khat hong ging a, “Amah a kihta a lian a neu mite, le ama nasem khempeuhte aw, eite’ Pasian phat un,” a ci hi." 
Revelation19:6 Tua ciangin tuizeu ging le vanging tawh a kibang mihonpi kikona awging bang khat ka za a, “A Vanglian eite’ Topa Pasian kumpi suakkhin ahih manin Pasian phat un." 
Revelation19:7 Tuuno’ zineih ding hun hong tungta a, a Lawmnu a kithawisa-in omkhin ahih manin lungdam kipakin amah phat ni." 
Revelation19:8 Puan hoih mahmah, siangin a pak mahmahte, ama silh dingin kipia hi,” a ci uh hi. Tua puan hoih pen Pasian’ mi siangthote’ gamtatna mante ahi hi." 
Revelation19:9 Tua ciangin vantungmi in keima kiangah, “Hih thu gelh in: Tuuno’ zineihna pawi-ah a kisam mite a hampha mahmah ahi hi,” hong cihkhit ciangin, “Hihte pen Pasian’ gen taktak kammal ahi hi,” hong cithuah lai hi." 
Revelation19:10 Tua ciangin amah a bia dingin a khe phungah ka kunsuk a, ahi zongin amah in, “Kei hong bia kei in. Kei pen Jesuh’ hong thugente a lenkip nang le na sanggamte khempeuh tawh nasemkhawm khat ka hi hi. Pasian bia in!” hong ci hi. Jesuh’ thugen in kamsang nasep sepnop nading lungsim a guan ahi hi." 
Revelation19:11 Tua ciangin vantung a kihong ka mu a, sakol kang khat a om hi. A tungah a tuang pa pen a Citak a Thuman pa kici hi. Amah in thumanin thu khenin gal a do hi." 
Revelation19:12 A mittangte meikuang tawh kibang a, lukhu tampi a khu hi. Amah simloh kuamah dang in a theih loh min khat ama tungah a kigelh hi." 
Revelation19:13 Sisan sungah a kidiah puantualpi khat silh a, amah pen, “Pasian’ Thu,” cihna min tawh a kisam hi." 
Revelation19:14 Vantung galkapte a siangtho puanpak hoih tawh kizem uh a, sakol kangte tungah tuangin amah a zui uh hi." 
Revelation19:15 Minam dangte a zawhgawp nading namsau hiam khat a kam sung panin a pusuak hi. Amah in sik ciangkhut tawh minam dangte ukin, a Vanglian Pasian’ heh mahmahna tawh leenggah cilna-ah leengtui a sukkhia ding hi." 
Revelation19:16 A puan tung le a phei tungah, “Kumpite’ Kumpi, topate’ Topa,” ci-in a min kigelh hi." 
Revelation19:17 Tua ciangin ni sungah vantungmi khat a ding ka mu a, amah in vankim lai-ah a leeng vasa khempeuh nakpitakin samin, “Pasian’ pawi lianpi-ah a kikhawm dingin hong pai un." 
Revelation19:18 Hong pai unla, kumpite’ sa, galkapmangte le galkapte’ sa, sakolte le a tungah a tuangte’ sa, a lian a neu, silate le sila ahi lo mi khempeuhte’ sa hong ne un,” a ci hi." 
Revelation19:19 Tua ciangin sakol tungah a tuang pa le a galkapte a sim dingin ganhing le leitung kumpite a galkapte uh tawh a kikaikhawm ka mu hi. 
Revelation19:20 Tua ciangin a ganhing le tua ganhing omna-ah nalamdang a bawl kamsang zuau pa kiman khawm hi. Ganhing ciaptehna a neite le ganhing lim a biate pen tua na lamdangte tawh a kikhem ahi hi. Ganhing le kamsang zuau pa, a nihun kat kikhulna meiphualpi sungah a hingtangun kilawn hi." 
Revelation19:21 Sakol tungah a tuang pa’ kam panin a hong pusuak namsau in amaute’ galkap khempeuh thatlum khin a, vasate khempeuh in a nekzawh zahzahun amaute’ sa a ne uh hi." 
Revelation20:1 Tua ciangin vantung panin vantungmi khat hong paisukin, kuahawm thukpi honna tawhtang le sikkhau khainiang golpi khat a tawi ka mu hi." 
Revelation20:2 Amah in tanglai gulpi, Dawimangpa ahih kei leh Satan zong a kici pa manin kum tulkhat sung a hencip hi." 
Revelation20:3 Tua ciangin kuahawm thukpi sungah khiasuk a, kum tulkhat a cin mateng minam tuamtuamte a khemtheih nawn loh nadingin a tawh kalhin a ciamteh hi. Kum tulkhat a cinkhit ciangin tawlkhat sung a kikhah ding ahi hi." 
Revelation20:4 Tua ciangin tokhom tungah a tu mi pawlkhat ka mu a, tua mite tungah thukhen nading aana a kipia ahi hi. Jesuh thu a genna le Pasian thu hangin a kithat mite’ kha zong ka mu hi. Tua mite in ganhing ahi a, a lim ahi zongin bia lo uh hi; a taltang uhah ahi a, a khut tung uhah ahi zongin ganhing ciaptehna nei lo uh hi. Amaute hong hingkik uh a, Khrih tawh kum tulkhat sung ukna aana a neikhawm uh hi." 
Revelation20:5 Kum tulkhat a cin mateng a si dangte hingkik lo uh hi. Hih pen sihna panin thawhkikna a masa ahi hi. 
Revelation20:6 Hih thawhkikna masa sungah a kihel mite pen Pasian’ mi siangtho hi a, a hampha mahmah ahi uh hi. Nihvei sihna in tua bang mite bangmah cihzo nawn lo ding a, amaute pen Pasian le Khrih’ siampite hi ding uh a, amah tawh kum tulkhat sung ukna aana nei ding uh hi." 
Revelation20:7 Kum tulkhat a cin ciangin a thongkiatna panin Satan kikhah ding a," 
Revelation20:8 Gog le Magog a kici leitung gam khempeuhah a om minam khempeuh a khem dingin kuankhia ding hi. Satan in a galsimpih dingin tuipi gei-a sehnel zahin a tam mihonpi kaikhawm ding hi. 
Revelation20:9 Leitung khempeuhah amaute pai uh a, Pasian’ mi siangtho omna mun le Pasian in a it khuapi umcih uh hi. Ahi zongin vantung panin meikuang hong paisukin amaute a kangtum hi." 
Revelation20:10 Amaute a khem Satan pen ganhing le kamsang zuau pa a omna mun, kat a kikhulna meiphualpi sungah kilawn a, a sun a zanin tua lai munah amaute in gimna a thuak tawntung ding uh ahi hi." 
Revelation20:11 Tua ciangin tokhom kang a lian khat le a tungah a tupa ka mu hi. Ama omna panin lei le van lengkhiamang a, a tunna mel uh kithei lo hi." 
Revelation20:12 A lian a neu misite tua tokhom mai-ah dingin laibute a kilem ka mu hi. Tua ciangin a nungta mite a kigelhna laibu a dang khat zong a kilem ka mu hi. Amaute’ gamtatna tua laibute sungah a kigelhna tawh kizui-in misite tungah thu a kikhen hi. 
Revelation20:13 Tuipi sungah a om misite, tuipi in hong pusuah a, Sihna le Misite’ Gam in zong amau sungah a om misite hong pusuah uh hi. Tua ciangin a vekpi-in amaute’ gamtatnasa tawh kizui-in thu a kikhen hi." 
Revelation20:14 Tua ciangin Sihna le Misite’ Gam, meiphualpi sungah a kilawn hi. Hih meiphualpi pen sihna nihna ahi hi." 
Revelation20:15 A nungta mite a kigelhna laibu sungah a min a om lo peuhmah meiphualpi sungah kilawn hi. 
Revelation21:1 Tua ciangin van thak khat le lei thak khat ka mu hi. Van masa le lei masa maimang khin a, tuipi zong om nawn lo hi." 
Revelation21:2 Mothak khat a pasal tawh a kituah dingin a kizem bangin vantung Pasian kiang panin Khuapi Siangtho ahi Jerusalem khua thak a hong paisuk ka mu hi. 
Revelation21:3 Tokhom panin nakpitakin awging khat ka za a, “Tu-in Pasian omna inn pen mite tawh omkhawm ta hi. Pasian in amaute ompih ding a, amaute pen ama mite hi ding uh hi. Pasian mahmah amaute tawh omkhawm ding a, amah pen amaute’ Pasian hi ding hi." 
Revelation21:4 Amaute’ mit panin khitui khempeuh nulsak ding hi. Thu luisate maimang khinta ahih manin sihna, dahna, le na sa-a kahna cihte om nawn lo ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Revelation21:5 Tua ciangin tokhom tungah a tupa in, “Tu-in na khempeuh a thakin ka bawl hi,” ci hi. Tua ciangin, “Hih thute thumanin muantaak ahih manin lai-ah gelh in,” hong ci lai hi." 
Revelation21:6 Tua ciangin amah in, “Tu-in man khinta! Kei pen a kipatna le a tawpna a cihna Alfa le Omega ka hi hi. A dangtak mi khempeuh tungah nuntakna tuinak panin a khongin tui ka pia ding hi." 
Revelation21:7 A gualzo mi khempeuh in kei tung panin a ngah ding thu in: Kei pen amaute’ Pasian ka hi ding a, amaute keima ta ahi ding uh hi." 
Revelation21:8 Ahi zongin a meidawite, a lehtatte, a lampialte, mi thatte, a paktatte, aisante, milim biate, le zuaugente om nading mun pen sihna nihna ahi kat a kikhulna meiphualpi kuang sung ahi hi,” a ci hi." 
Revelation21:9 Tua ciangin gimna nunung sagihte a dimin a om hai sagih a tawi vantungmi sagihte sung panin khat kei kiangah hong pai-in thu hong gen a, “Hong pai in; Tuuno zi, a Mothak ka hong lak ding hi,” hong ci hi." 
Revelation21:10 Tua laitakin Kha Siangtho tawh ka kidim a, tua vantungmi in mual sang mahmah khat dawnah hong paipih hi. Vantung Pasian kiang panin a hong paisuk Khuapi Siangtho ahi Jerusalem khua a hong lak hi." 
Revelation21:11 Tua khuapi pen Pasian’ vang tawh tee ziazua a, Jasper suangmanpha bangin taang a, Kristal suangmanpha bangin siang kilkel hi." 
Revelation21:12 A kulh sahin sang mahmah a, kulhkongpi sawm le nih nei-in, a kongpite-ah vantungmi sawm le nih om a, a kulhkongpite tungah Israel minam sawm le nihte’ min kigelh hi." 
Revelation21:13 Nisuahna lamah kongpi thum, leilu lamah thum, leitaw lamah thum, nitumna lamah thum mah om hi." 
Revelation21:14 Tua khuapikulh pen kulh tawphah suang sawm le nih tungah a kiciang hi a, tua suangtawphahte tungah Tuuno sawltak sawm le nihte’ min kigelh hi." 
Revelation21:15 Keima kiangah thu a hong gen vantungmi in tua khuapi, a kulhkongpite le a kulh a teh nadingin kham kibawl tehna ciang khat a nei hi." 
Revelation21:16 Tua khuapi a pang kikim linlian a, a dung a vai a kikim ahi hi. A ciang tawh khuapi a teh ciangin tai tul le zanga bang pha a, a dung, a vai le a sanna kikim hi." 
Revelation21:17 A kulhpi zong ama zat tehna tawh a teh ciangin pi zanih sawmkhat guk a sang hi. 
Revelation21:18 A kulhpi dingin jasper suangmanpha kiciang a, a khuasung pen kham citak tawh a kibawl hi a, limlang bangin siang kilkel hi." 
Revelation21:19 Tua khuapi kulh suangtawphahte pen suangmanpha namkim tawh kizem hi. A masa-in jasper suangmanpha, a nihna-ah sapfira suangmanpha, a thumna-ah agate suangmanpha, a lina-ah emerald suangmanpha," 
Revelation21:20 a ngana-ah onik suangmanpha, a gukna-ah karnelian suangmanpha, a sagihna-ah khrisolait suangmanpha, a giatna-ah beryl suangmanpha, a kuana-ah topaz suangmanpha, a sawmna-ah khrisoprase suangmanpha, a sawm le khatna-ah jakinth suangmanpha, a sawm le nihna-ah amethyst suangmanpha tawh a kizem hi." 
Revelation21:21 A kongpi sawm le nihte kep sawm le nih tawh a kibawl hi a, kongpi khat ciangin kep sabit khat ahi hi. A khuapi sung lampite kham citak vive hi a, limlang bangin a sung kimu paisuak thei hi." 
Revelation21:22 A Vanglian Topa Pasian le Tuuno pen khuapi biakinn hita ahih manin tua khua sungah biakinn dang ka mu kei hi. 
Revelation21:23 Pasian’ minthanna vang pen khuavak hi a, Tuuno zong meivak hi khin ahih manin tua khuapi in nitaang le khataang cihte kisam lo hi." 
Revelation21:24 Tua a taang sungah leitung mite lam pai ding uh a, leitung kumpite in a neihsa khempeuh uh hong paipih ding uh hi." 
Revelation21:25 Zan khuamial hun cih om lo ding ahih manin kulhkongpite khak hun cih om loin a tawntungin kihong paisuak ding hi. 
Revelation21:26 Leitung mite’ hauhna le liatnateng tua khuapisung hong kitunpih ding hi. 
Revelation21:27 Ahi zongin a siang lo, a hoih loin a gamta mi, zuau a gen mite kuamah lut thei lo ding uh a, a nungta mite a kigelhna Tuuno laibu sungah a min a omte bek tua khuapi sungah lutthei ding uh hi." 
Revelation22:1 Tua ciangin vantungmi in Pasian le Tuuno tokhom panin a hong luangkhia, kristal suangmanpha bangin a tee selsel gun tui hong lak a," 
Revelation22:2 khuapi sung lampi laizangah a luang hi. Tua gun pang tuakah nuntakna singkung po a, kha simin gah ahih manin kum khat sungin sawm le nih vei a gah hi. A tehte zong natna dam nading zatui-in kizang hi." 
Revelation22:3 Pasian’ samsiatna a ngah peuhpeuh tua khua sungah om lo hi. Tua khuapi sungah Pasian le Tuuno’ tokhom om ding a, ama nasemte in amah a bia ding uh hi." 
Revelation22:4 Amaute in ama maitang mu ding uh a, a taltang tung uhah ama min kigelh ding hi." 
Revelation22:5 Topa Pasian pen amaute’ khuavak hi-in, a tawntungin amaute in uk paisuak ding uh ahih manin khuamial hun cih om nawn lo ding a, khua a vaksak ding meivak le nitaang cihte kisam lo ding uh hi." 
Revelation22:6 Tua ciangin vantungmi in kei kiangah, “Hih thute muantaak a, thuman ahi hi. Kamsangte tungah a Kha Siangtho a pia Topa Pasian in a hong piang baih ding thute, a nasemte tungah a lak dingin a vantung mite a hong sawl hi,” hong ci hi." 
Revelation22:7 Jesuh in, “Kei a hong pai baihta ding ka hi hi. Hih laibu sunga kigelh thu a zui mite mi hampha ahi hi,” a hong ci hi." 
Revelation22:8 Keimah Johan in hih thute za-in ka muh ahi hi. Hih thute za-in ka muh ciangin hih thute kei tungah a hong lak vantungmi a bia dingin a khe phungah ka boksuk hi. 
Revelation22:9 Ahi zongin amah in, “Kei hong bia kei in. Kei pen nang le na sanggamte, le hih laibu sungah a om thu a zui mite tawh nasemkhawm khat ka hi hi. Pasian bia in,” hong ci hi." 
Revelation22:10 Tua ciangin vantungmi in kei kiangah, “Hih laibu sungah a kigelh thute a tun ding hong naita ahih manin imcip kei in." 
Revelation22:11 A gilo mite gilo lailai hen la, a kihhuai gamtatte kihhuai gamtat lailai hen la, a hoih gamtatte hoih gamtat lailai hen la, a siangtho mite a siangtho mah hi lailai ta hen!” hong ci hi." 
Revelation22:12 Tua ciangin Jesuh in, “Kei ka hong pai baihta ding a, mi khempeuh a gamtatna uh tawh kizui-in a thaman ding uh ka hong puak ding hi." 
Revelation22:13 Kei pen a masa le a nunung, a kipatna le a tawpna a cihnopna ahi Alfa le Omega ka hi hi,” a hong ci hi." 
Revelation22:14 Khuapi kulhkongpi sungah a luttheih nading le nuntakna singgah a nektheih nadingun a puan uh a siangin a sawp mite, mi hampha ahi uh hi." 
Revelation22:15 Ahi zongin a lampial mite, aisan mite, a paktat mite, mi thatte, milim biate, le zuaugen nuamsa-in zuau a gengen mite, khuapi pualamah a om uh hi." 
Revelation22:16 “Keimah Jesuh in pawlpite a dingin hih thute nang kiangah a hong gen dingin ka vantungmi ka hong sawl hi. Kei pen David’ zung le a suan ahi, zingsol ka hi hi,” a hong ci hi." 
Revelation22:17 Kha Siangtho le Mothak in Jesuh kiangah, “Hong pai in,” a ci uh hi. Hih thu a za mi khempeuh in zong Jesuh aw, “Hong pai in,” ci ta uh hen. A dangtak mi khempeuh hong pai uh hen la, a deih khempeuh in nuntakna tui a khongin hong la ta uh hen." 
Revelation22:18 Keimah Johan in hih laibu sungah a kigelh thu a za mi khempeuh ka hong hilhkholh nopna panin: A thu a behlap na om uhleh Pasian in zong hih laibu sungah a kigelh gimnate note tungah hong behlap ding a," 
Revelation22:19 hih laibu sungah a kigelh thute a hemkhia na om uhleh Pasian in zong hih laibu sungah a kigelh nuntakna singgah le Khuapi Siangtho sungah na ngah ding uh hamphatnate note kiang panin hong hepkhiatsak ding hi. 
Revelation22:20 Hih thu khempeuh hong genin teci a pang mipa in, “Ka hong pai baih taktak ding hi,” hong ci hi. Na cih bangin hi ta peuh hen. Topa Jesuh aw, hong pai ta in!"
